Exodus4:21 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Mu kubhiẋila mu Ijitu, u kumbidila o kubhanga bhu pholo ia Falaó o madiuanu oso u nga ku bhana bhu maku; eme-phe nga kà mu kolesa o muxima uê, ka-nda kuẋikina kueha o ifuẋi." 
Exodus4:22 Bhenhobho eie ua kʼambela Falaó, kuma: Jihova uambe kiki: Izalaiele monʼami, monʼami ua phande-kumbi." 
Exodus4:23 Nga tumu ku ku ambela kuila: Eha monaʼami, phala a ngi kalakele; eie-phe ki ua ditunu ku mu eha, eme nga-nda kujibha monʼé ua phande-kumbi." 
Exodus4:24 Anga ki bhita kuila, ku tula mu njila, bhu kibangu bhua zekela, Jihova u takana ni Mozé, anga u sota ku mu jibha." 
Exodus4:25 Zipola bhenhobho u kuata ditadi diatu, u bhatula o kinhunga kia monʼê ua diiala, u ki tula bhu inama ia Mozé; uixi: Ni kidi kiene, ki tualʼiki, eie ua di bhange u iala diami dia manhinga." 
Exodus4:26 Ngana kiene kiua kia mu eha. Muhatu anga u kala mu ki zuela, uixi: Eie u diiala dia manhinga, mukonda dia kusaia." 
Exodus4:27 Jihova anga u ambela ue Alá, uixi: Ndé mu kikangalakata, ua kà takane ni Mozé; muene anga uia, u takana-nê bhu mulundu ua Nzambi, u mu bhana jibeju." 
Exodus4:28 Mozé anga u kunda Alá maka moso ma Jihova ma mu tumu-nâ, ni ijimbuete ioso ia mu tendelela ku i bhanga." 
Exodus4:29 Bhenhobho Mozé ni Alá anga a bhiẋila, a bhongolola adiakimi oso a anʼa Izalaiele." 
Exodus4:30 Alá anga u tanga maka moso ma tangela Jihova kua Mozé, u bhanga ijimbuete bhu mesu a mundu uoso." 
Exodus4:31 Kifuẋi anga a xikana; o kia zubha kuívua kuma Jihova ua suu anʼa Izalaiele iú ua mono o jiphaxi jâ, ene a bheteka o mítue, anga a bheza." 
Exodus5:1 Kia zubha kubhanga kiki, Mozé ni Alá a bhiẋila kua Falaó a mu ambela, exi: Kiene kia zuela Jihovʼiki, Nzambi ia Izalaiele: Eha mundu uami, phala aie mu kikangalakata, a ngi bhangele-mu fesa." 
Exodus5:2 Kuala Falaó-phe: Jihova nanhi muene, phala eme ngi mu ivue dízui, ni ngehe Izalaiele? Eme, Jihova ki nga mu ijiia; kia mukuâ dingi, Nga ditunu kueha Izalaiele." 
Exodus5:3 Kuala ene: Nzambi ia Jihebeleu ua tu sange; eie tuehe-phe, tua ku diondo, tuie njila ia izuua itatu mu kikangalakata, tua kà satele Jihova, Nzambi ietu; mbe muene kʼeze kuthandu dietu ni dibhebhu mba xibhata." 
Exodus5:4 Muenexiʼa Ijitu anga u a ambela, uixi: Phalahi, eie Mozé ni Alá, muala kufudisa mundu kukalakala? Muanganenu mu-ie ku thonga ienu." 
Exodus5:5 Falaó anga u zuela dingi uixi: Mua mono, mundu mʼoxi ioso a vulu kiá, enu-phe muala ku a zumbula ku ikalakalu iâ. Falaó u beta dingi kutatesa anʼa Izalaiele." 
Exodus5:6 Kizuua kienhókio Falaó anga u ambela atumini ala mu kalakesa, uixi:" 
Exodus5:7 Kana dingi kubhana mundu iangu ia kuʼmbila o jindobhi, kala ki mua bhange mazá ni mazadinha; ene a muangane, a sote ene o iangu iâ." 
Exodus5:8 O konda-phe ia jindobhi jala kumba tunde okulu, kale a i tenesa muene, kana ku a sosoluela ku konda né imoxi ngó; kuma ala ni usonde kiene kia dikolela, exi: Tuehe tuie mu satela Nzambi ietu." 
Exodus5:9 A xinienu muene ni kikalakalu kia neme, mala enʼió, phala a landuke ni kukalakala; ka kale mu dielela ku maka a makutu a muia ni ku a tela." 
Exodus5:10 Abhondeleki, o akalakexi ala mu kalakesa o mundu, ni akalakexi a atuminʼâ, anga a tangela o mundu, exi: Falaó uambe kiki: Nguami ku mi bhana iangu, tunde lelu katé ku pholo." 
Exodus5:11 Kale enʼuenu muene muia mu i sota kuoso ku mu i muena; mukonda ku kikalakalu kienu ka-nda ku mi sosolola-ku kima. 
Exodus5:12 Mukonda dia kiki mundu a muangenena mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu mu sota iangu ia kuʼmbila jindobhi. 
Exodus5:13 O abhondeleki anga a a jijidika, exi: Kumbidilenu, konda i tene izuua ioso, kala kia kexi ku mi bhana iangu." 
Exodus5:14 Atumini a anʼa Izalaiele, oso a te-ku kuala Abhondeleki a Falaó, anga a a beta, a ebhula, exi: Phalahi, konda ki i tena ni mazá ni lelu, ia jindobhi kala ki muʼomba jinga ukulu." 
Exodus5:15 O Atumini a anʼa Izalaiele, anga eza, a dikola kua Falaó, exi: Phalahi, o abhikʼé ua mu a bhanga kiki?" 
Exodus5:16 Kala ku a bhana dingi iangu, abhikʼé, maji a tu ambela exi: Umbenu; ua mono a tu beta, tu abhikʼé; maji ki etu tuala ni kuêla, kuêla kua mundu ué muene." 
Exodus5:17 Kuala muene: Enu muala mu a asonde, mu asonde muene; kiene ki mua ki ambela kuma: Tuehe, tuia mu satela Jihova." 
Exodus5:18 Ndenu, ka kalakadienu; maji o iangu ka mi bhana-iu, kana, kikale-phe mu bhakula o konda iatena ia jindobhi." 
Exodus5:19 Akalakexi a anʼa Izalaiele, anga a mona, exi: Uíndua ua tu iza! Hé a ambela exi: Kana kusosolola ku konda ia jindobhi, kale i tena muene kizuua ni kizuua." 
Exodus5:20 Mu kutunda kua Falaó, anga a takana mu njila ni Mozé ni Alá;" 
Exodus5:21 anga a ambela, exi: Jihova a ki suue, a mi bhange kioso kia tokala; mukonda mua tu nuhisa dizumba diaiibha kua Falaó, ni akua mbèle ku mbanza, kífua mua a bhana xibhata bhu maku, ia ku tu jibha etu." 
Exodus5:22 Mozé anga u vutuka kua Jihova, uixi: Ngana, ua ki bhangela-hi, mundu iú ku u bongesa malebnhu kiki? Eme-phe ua ngi tumikisinaʼhi?" 
Exodus5:23 Kuma tunde ki ngeza kua Falaó kuzuelela mu dijina dié, muene ua bandekeza phulu ku mundu iú, eie-phe kukudila o mundu ué, ki kuata-ku." 
Exodus6:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eie ua-nda ki mona-ke, kioso ki ngi bhanga Falaó, kuma ku a eha kikale lukuaku lua nguzu lu bhita-bhu, mu kuívua lukuaku lua nguzu kiene kia-nda ku a kaia mʼoxi iê." 
Exodus6:2 Nzambi anga u zuela ni Mozé, u mu ambela, uixi: Eme Jihova." 
Exodus6:3 Nga tukulukila jinga Mbalahamu, ni Izake, ni Jakobo, kala ngi Nzambi, Muteni-a-ioso; maji ka ngʼijidile mu dijina diami dia Jihova." 
Exodus6:4 Nga kuatesa kikutu kiami ni ene, mu ku a bhana ixi ia Kanana, ixi ia unhunginu uâ mua kexi kunhungina." 
Exodus6:5 O kukema kua anʼa Izalaiele nga ku ivu, a a bhake mu ubhika kuala akua Ijitu; eme nga lembalala o kikutu kiami." 
Exodus6:6 Kala kiki, ambela anʼa Izalaiele, kuma: Eme Jihova, mu imbamba ia mi xina akua Ijitu nga-nda ku mi katula-mu, ngi mi jituna mu ubhika uâ, ngi mi kula ni lukuaku lua sununuka, hé ngi londekeza ubatuilu ua kidi ni isunji ia makota;" 
Exodus6:7 eme anga ngi mi tambula kukala mu mundu uami, anga ngi kala ngi Nzambi ienu; hinu mu kʼijie kuma eme Jihova, Nzambi ienu, nga tena ku mi katula bhoxi dia imbamba ia mi xina akua Ijitu." 
Exodus6:8 Hinu ngi mi bhiẋidisa mʼoxi i nga lokela Mbalahamu, ni Izake, ni Jakobo, ku a bhana-iu; ngi mi bhana-iu muene mu undundu uenu, mukonda eme Jihova." 
Exodus6:9 Mozé anga u ambela anʼa Izalaiele kala kia mu ambelʼiki: Ene-phe ka ẋikina kuívua Mozé, mukonda dia kikote ku muxima ni kubhondalala mu ubhika." 
Exodus6:10 Jihova anga u zuela dingi ni Mozé, uixi:" 
Exodus6:11 Bokona kua Falaó, u zuele-nê, kuila ehe anʼa Izalaiele, a tunde mʼoxi iê." 
Exodus6:12 Mozé anga u zuela bhu pholo ia Jihova, uixi: Tala kuma anʼa Izalaiele ka mu ẋikina ku ngʼivua; Falaó-phe ua-nda ku ngʼivua kiebhi, ngi kiximba kia kuzuela?" 
Exodus6:13 Jihova anga u zuela dingi ni Mozé ni Alá u a tendelela kioso kia zuela ni anʼa Izalaiele ni Falaó muenexiʼa Ijitu, phala kukatula anʼa Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus6:14 Enʼiá ene ala ku pholo mu mabhata a jitata jâ. Anʼa Lubene a mala, muene monʼa Izalaiele ua phande-kumbi: Hanoke ni Palu, Hezelone ni Karmi; ene o mabhata ma Lubene." 
Exodus6:15 Anʼa Ximinhá a mala: Jemuuele ni Jamini, Ohade ni Jakini, Zohale ni Saúlo maniʼâ mukua Kanana; iá o mabhata ma Ximinhá." 
Exodus6:16 O iá ene o majina ma anʼa Levi a mala, kioso kia di kaiejela mu ku a vuala: Ngelexone, ni Kohate, ni Meladi; o mivu ia Levi ia bhange ku muenhu, hâma ia muvu ni makuinhi atatu ni sambuadi." 
Exodus6:17 Anʼa Ngelexone a mala: Libini ni Ximei, ku mabhata mâ." 
Exodus6:18 O anʼa Kohate a mala: Amlame, ni Izahale, ni Hebolone, ni Uziiele; o mivu ia Kohate ia bhange ku muenhu, hâma ia muvu ni makuinhi atatu ni itatu." 
Exodus6:19 O anʼa Meladi a mala: Mahali ni Muẋi. Iá ene o mabhata a jilevita mu kiubha-kiubha, kioso kia di kaiejela mu ku a vuala kuâ." 
Exodus6:20 Amlame anga u bhenga muhatu, Jokebede phange ia tatʼâ; muene anga u mu vualela Alá ni Mozé: o mivu ia Amlame ia bhange ku muenhu, hâma ia muvu ni makuinhi atatu ni sambuadi." 
Exodus6:21 O anʼa Izahale a mala: Kola, ni Nefange, ni Zikidi." 
Exodus6:22 Anʼa Uziiele a mala: Mizaiele, ni Elizafane, ni Sitadi." 
Exodus6:23 Alá anga u bhenga muhatu, Eliseba monʼa Aminadabe, phange ia Nasone; muene anga u mu vualela Nadabe; ni Abihu, Eliiazale ni Itamale." 
Exodus6:24 O anʼa Kola a mala: Asidi, ni Elikana, ni Abiasafo; ene o mabhata ma akua Kola." 
Exodus6:25 O Eliiazale, monʼê Alá ua diiala anga u bhenga muhatu ku anʼa Putiiele; muene anga u mu vualela Finehase. Enʼiá ene ala ku pholo mu mabhata a jitata jâ ku jilevita, kioso kia di sokesa mu madiembo mâ." 
Exodus6:26 Enʼiá-phe Alá ni Mozé, a ambela kuala Jihova, uixi: Mu katula anʼa Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ni ku a ta mu ilombo iâ." 
Exodus6:27 Mozé ni Alá ene a zuela ni Falaó, muenexiʼa Ijitu, phala kukatula anʼa Izalaiele mu Ijitu." 
Exodus6:28 A nga ki bhita kuila, mu izuuʼomo kioso kia zuela Jihova ni Mozé mʼoxi ia Ijitu," 
Exodus6:29 Jihova u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eme Jihova; Zuela ni Falaó, muenexiʼa Ijitu, u mu tangele ioso i nga-nda ku ku ambela eme." 
Exodus6:30 Mozé anga u zuela bhu pholo ia Jihova, uixi: Ngi kiximba kia kuzuela, Falaó ua-nda ku ngʼivua kiebhi?" 
Exodus7:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Aluka-ze, nga ku bhange kala u Nzambi kua Falaó; kota dié Alá u kala-phe polofeta ié." 
Exodus7:2 Eie u zuela kioso ki ngi ku tuma; phange ié Alá-phe muene u ambela Falaó kuila ehe anʼa Izalaiele, a tunde mʼoxi iê." 
Exodus7:3 Eme-phe ngi kolesa o muxima ua Falaó, ngi vudisa ijimbuete iami ni madiuanuʼami mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus7:4 Falaó-phe ka-nda ku mʼivua, eme ngi tula lukuaku luami ku thandu dia Ijitu, hinu ngi tundisa ilombo iami, o mundu uami ua anʼa Izalaiele mu ixi ia Ijitu, ku isunji ia vulu i bhita-bhu." 
Exodus7:5 O akua Ijitu-phe a kejiia kuma eme ngi Jihova, kioso ki ngi sunununa lukuaku luami ku thandu dia Ijitu, mu katula anʼa Izalaiele muʼaxaxe kâ." 
Exodus7:6 Mozé ni Alá anga a ki bhanga; kala kioso kia a tumu Jihova kiene muene kia bhange. 
Exodus7:7 Mozé anga u kala mu makuinhi nake a muvu, Alá mu makuinhi nake a muvu ni itatu, kioso kia zuela ni Falaó." 
Exodus7:8 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Exodus7:9 Kioso Falaó kia kà zuela ni enu, kia kèla idikiza hanji kidiuanu kienu; bhenhobho ua kʼambela Alá, uixi: Kuata mbangala, u i takuile bhoxi bhu pholo ia Falaó i kituke nhoka." 
Exodus7:10 Mozé ni Alá anga a bokona kua Falaó, anga a ki bhanga, kala kia a tumu Jihova; Alá anga u takula o mbangala bhoxi bhu pholo ia Falaó ni bhu pholo ia akua mbèle iê, anga i kituka nhoka." 
Exodus7:11 Bhenhobho Falaó ue u ixana jihete ni jinganga, ene o imbanda ia Ijitu, ene anga a ki bhanga ue ni uanga uâ." 
Exodus7:12 Mukonda ene uâ kala muthu ua takula o mbangala iê bhoxi, anga ji kituka jinhoka; mbangala ia Alá-phe anga i minha jimbangala jâ ene." 
Exodus7:13 Falaó-phe bhenhobho u kola muẋma, ka ẋikina ku a evua; kiene kia tange Jihova, kiene." 
Exodus7:14 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Muxima ua Falaó ua thathamana, ka ẋikina kueha o mundu kuiâ." 
Exodus7:15 Eie-phe ndeie kua Falaó mu kimenemene; kuma muene ua-nda kuila ola ioio ku menha; eie-phe ua kʼèmana ku kubumu kia Nilu, u takane-nê; o mbangala ia kitukile o nhoka uia na-iu uê bhu maku." 
Exodus7:16 Ua kà mu ambela kiki, uixi: Jihova, Nzambi ia Jihebeleu, ua ngi tumu ko kué uixi: Eha o mundu uami phala aie ku ngi bhikila mu kikangalakata; ua mono-phe katé ni kiki kua ẋikina kuívua." 
Exodus7:17 Jihova uambe kiki: Bhene bhu ua-nda ku ngʼijidila kuma eme Jihova; bheniabha-phe, mbangala i nga kuatʼiii nga-nda kubeta na-iu ku menha ala mu honga, ene-phe a-ndu kituka manhinga." 
Exodus7:18 O jimbiji jala mu ngiji ji fua, honga ioso i bola; katé akua Ijito anda kutala hadi mu sota menha a kúnua." 
Exodus7:19 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Ambela Alá, uixi: Kuata mbangala ié, u sununune lukuaku lué ku thandu dia menha ma Ijitu, ni ala mu jihonga, ni ala mu milombo, ni ala mu mazanga ni mu majiia, ene oso a kituke manhinga; ku kale manhinga mʼoxi ioso ia Ijito ni mu itutu ia miẋi, ni ia matadi." 
Exodus7:20 Ni Mozé ni Alá anga a bhanga kala kia a tumu Jihova; Alá anga u zenga o mbangala u beta menha mala mu honga, bhu mesuʼa Falaó, ni bhu mesuʼa akua mbèle iê; menha oso ala mu honga anga a kituka manhinga." 
Exodus7:21 O jimbiji jala mu menha anga ji fua; menha ene oso a bola akua Ijitu anga a lémbua kúnua menha mu honga; mʼoxi ioso ia Ijito anga mu iibha ni manhinga. 
Exodus7:22 O imbanda ia akua Ijitu anga a ki bhanga uê ni uanga uâ; anga ki bhekela Falaó ku kola o muxima, ka ẋikina ku a evua, kala kia tange Jihova." 
Exodus7:23 Falaó anga u tunda-bhu, uia ku bhata diê, iene iosoʼii ka ẋikina ngó ku i ta muxima." 
Exodus7:24 Akua Ijitu oso anga a kala mu kanda jifiẋi bhu mbandu ia honga, mu sota menha ma kúnua; kuma menha mu ngiji a lémbua ku a nua." 
Exodus7:25 Kienhokio sambuadi dia izuua anga i tena, tunde Jihova kia beta honga ia Nilu." 
Exodus8:1 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi: Bokona kua Falaó u mu ambela, uixi: Jihova uambe kiki: Eha o mundu uami, aie a ngi bhikile." 
Exodus8:2 O ki u dituna ku a eha, ngi ku beta ni dibhebhu dia mazote ma bhiẋila muoso mua suku jimbámbe jé joso." 
Exodus8:3 O mazote mu honga a di vuala, a banda, a bokona monzo ié, ni mu dizekelu dié, ni bhu hama bhene, ni mu jinzu ja akua mbèle ié, ni mundu ué uoso, ni ku majiku ni mu jímbia ja kulambela." 
Exodus8:4 O mazote a ku kuma ni ku mukutu ué, ni ku ifuẋi ié ioso, ni ku akua mbèle ié ioso." 
Exodus8:5 Johova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi: Tangela Alá, a sununune lukuaku ni mbangala ié ku thandu dia jihonga ni milombo ni majiia, a bhangese mazote kutunda-mu nʼeze mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu," 
Exodus8:6 Alá anga u sununa lukuaku luê ku thandu dia menha ma Ijitu; mazote anga a banda, hé ezalesa ixi ioso ia Ijito." 
Exodus8:7 O imbanda ia uanga ue anga a ki bhanga ni uanga uâ, a bheka ue mazote mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus8:8 Bhenhobho Falaó u ixana Mozé ni Alá, uixi: Diondenu Jihova, a katule o mazote kokuaʼami ni ku mundu uami. Kiene kiua ki ngʼeha o mundu nʼaie mu satela Jihova." 
Exodus8:9 Mozé anga u ambela Falaó, uixi: Eie muene u ki âmba, eme ki ngi zuela; ngi ku diondela thembu iahi, ni mbele ié ni kifuẋi kié phala o mazote a ku batuke, ni mu jinzu, a xale ngó mu honga?" 
Exodus8:10 Muene, uixi: Mungu. Mozé uixi: Ki bhita muene, kala ki ua tange eie; phala eie u kʼijiie kuma kana-ku dingi u soka ni Johova, Nzambi ietu." 
Exodus8:11 Mungu mazote a ku batuka ku mukutu ué, ni mu jinzu, ni ku mbèle ié, ni ku ifuẋi ue; a xalela ngó mu honga." 
Exodus8:12 Bhenhobho ni Mozé ni Alá anga a tunda kua Falaó, Mozé anga u dikola kua Johova mukonda dia mazote ma bheka kua Falaó." 
Exodus8:13 Jihova anga u bhanga kala kia zuela Mozé; mazote hé a fua mu jinzu, ni mu malumbu, ni ku mikáu." 
Exodus8:14 Anga a a bhongolola jimvumbu-jimvumbu; ixi ioso anga i nuha kibuzu. 
Exodus8:15 Falaó-phe kia mono kuila kuala hanji kunhoha, u kola dingi o muxima, ka ẋikina ku a evua; kiene kia tange Jihova, kiene." 
Exodus8:16 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi: Tangela Alá a leke o mbangala iê, a bete o fufutila ia mavu bhoxi, phala i biluke jina mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu." 
Exodus8:17 Anga a ki bhanga; kuma Alá ua leka o lukuaku ni mbangala, iú ua beta of fufuta ia mavu bhoxi anga muiza jina ni ku mikutu ia athu, ni ku mikutu ia ibhaku; fufutila ioso ia mavu ia biluka jina mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu." 
Exodus8:18 O imbanda ue anga a ki fikisa ni uanga uâ, maji a lémbua; jina-phe anga ji kala ku athu oso ni ku ibhaku." 
Exodus8:19 Bhenhobho-phe o imbanda ambela Falaó, exi: Iú mulembu ua Nzambi kiá; Falaó-phe u kola muxima, ka ẋikina ku a evua, kala kia tange Jihova." 
Exodus8:20 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi: Mungu u fundumuka mu kimenemene, uimane bhu pholo ia Falaó; uejiia iene ola iê ia kutunda kuia ku menha; u mu ambela, uixi: Jihova uambe kiki: Eha o mundu uami, phala a ngi bhikile." 
Exodus8:21 O ki uila kana, povo iami ngué ku a eha, ngi tuma jinzungule ja jihamue ku thandu dié, ni ku thandu dia mbèle ié, ni ku mundu ué, ni mu jinzu jé; o jinzo ja akua Ijitu jʼizala jinzungule ja jihamue, katé ni bhoxi bhua diota." 
Exodus8:22 Kizuua kienhókio o ixi ia Ngozene mua tungu o mundu uami ngi i tungula, dibhebhu dia jihamue ki di kala-mu; phala eie u kʼijiie kuma eme ngi Jihova mu ngongo ioso." 
Exodus8:23 Ngi ta mbámbe mu kaẋi ka mundu uami ni mundu uê; mungu ki kúkia kiene ki bhita o kijimbuete kiki. 
Exodus8:24 Jihova anga u ki bhanga; hé kuiza matuta a makota a jihamue mʼonzo ia Falaó, ni mu jinzo ja akua mbèle iê; o ixi ioso ia Ijitu anga i sekala mukonda dia jinzungule ja jihamue jenʼiji." 
Exodus8:25 Falaó anga u ixana Mozé ni Alá, uixi: Ndenu, mu satele Nzambi ienu mʼoxi muenhumu." 
Exodus8:26 Mozé-phe, uixi: Ki kiene kia tokala kubhanga; kuma jisata jetu ji tu satela Jihova, Nzambi ietu, kisunji ku akua Ijitu; kifua ku sata kisunji bhu mesu ma akua Ijitu, ene ka-nda ku tu bûba ni matadi?" 
Exodus8:27 Tu ehe tuie njila ia izuua itatu mu kikangalakata, phala tu satele Jihova Nzambi ietu kala kia tumu muene." 
Exodus8:28 Bhenhobho, kuala Falaó: Nga-nda ku mi eha ni mu-iii, phala mu satele Jihova, Nzambi ienu, mu kikangalakata; maji ki muie dikanga diavulu; ngi diondedienu ue eme." 
Exodus8:29 Mozé-phe uixi: Eme ngi tundʼó, mga-nda ku dionda Jihova phala mungu a ku katule jinzugule ja jihamue, ni ko kué u Falaó, ni ku mbèle ié ni ku mundu ué; Falaó-phe ka ngi nganale dingi, nʼa kambe kueha o mundu kuia mu satela Jihova." 
Exodus8:30 Bhenhobho Mozé anga u tunda kua Falaó, u dionda kua Jihova." 
Exodus8:31 O Jihova anga u bhanga kala kia zuela Mozé; jinzungule ja jihamue u ji katula kua Falaó, ni ku mbèle iê, ni kifuẋi kiê; né lumoxi ngó ki lua xala-ku." 
Exodus8:32 Maji Falaó anga u tona dingi kukola muxima uê, nguê kueha o mundu nʼaiâ." 
Exodus9:1 Kienhókio o Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi: Bokona kua Falaó u mu ambele, kuma Jihova, Nzambi ia Jihebeleu, uambe kiki: Eha mundu uami, phala aie a ngi bhikile." 
Exodus9:2 Mukonda ki u dituna ku a eha, hé u jijila ku a kuata mu nguzu," 
Exodus9:3 talesa o lukuaku lua Jihova lua-nda kutuluka ku thandu dia ibhaku ié iala mu mukáu, ni ku jikabalu, ni jibulu, ni ku jikamelo, ni ku jingombe, ni ku jimbudi, ni ku jihombo; ku kala muene dibhebhu dia iibha." 
Exodus9:4 Jihova ua-nda kutungula ue o ibhaku ia Izalaiele ni ibhaku ia akua Ijitu; phala ki ku fue kima ku ibhaku ioso ia tokala ku anʼa Izalaiele. 
Exodus9:5 Jihova anga u xinda kithangana, uixi: Mungu, ki kúkia ngó, Jihova kiene kia bhanga kima kiki mʼoxi mumu." 
Exodus9:6 Kúkia ni kimene, Jihova anga u ki bhanga; ibhaku ioso ia akua Ijitu i fua, ku ibhaku ia anʼa Izalaiele ni kimoxi ngó, ki kiafu-ku." 
Exodus9:7 Falaó anga u tuma kutala ku ibhaku ia anʼa Izalaiele, u sanga kidi muene ni kibhaku kimoxi ngó ki kiafu-ku. Maji o muxima ua Falaó-phe ua thathamana, o mundu nguê ku u eha." 
Exodus9:8 Bhenhobho-phe Jihova, anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi: Votenu uthókua, muizalese o makuʼenu ni mabhubhu a utókua, ua fólono, Mozé a u kuue bhulu bhu mesu muene a Falaó." 
Exodus9:9 Utókua-phe, o fufuta iê i di uanena mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, anga i di bhanga jihana ni mâmbu aia ni kukituka mabhuna ni ku athu ni ku ibhaku mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus9:10 Ene anga a katula o utókua ua fólono, emana bhu pholo ia Falaó, Mozé anga u u kuua bhulu, anga u di bhanga mâmbu ni maveve aia ni kufuafua ku mikutu ia athu ni ku mikutu ia ibhaku." 
Exodus9:11 Anga o imbanda ia akua Ijitu a lémbua kuimana bhu pholo ia Mozé, mukonda dia maveve; kuma a fuluka ni ku imbanda ni ku akua Ijito oso." 
Exodus9:12 Maji o Jihova ua kolesa o muxima ua Falaó, ka ẋikina ku a evua; kiene kia tange Jihova kua Mozé, kiene." 
Exodus9:13 Bhenhobho Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Ki kúkia, u di meneka dingi ua kèmane bhu pholo ia Falaó, u mu ambela, kuma: Jihova, Nzambi ia Jihebeleu, ua-mbe kiki: Eha o mundu uami, phala aie ku ngi bhikila." 
Exodus9:14 Mukonda o kiki kiá nga-nda kutumikisa o mabhebhu ami oso ku thandu dia muxima ué, ni ku thandu dia akua mbèle ié, ni ku mundu ué; phala eie u kʼijiie kuma eme ki ngi moneka mukuetu nga soko-nê mu ngongo ioso." 
Exodus9:15 Kuma kindalʼiki, se ngʼedile ngi sunununa o lukuaku luami ni kibuika, hé ngi ku kuama ni eie ni mundu ué uoso, hinu mu ngongo enu oso mua bhu-mu;" 
Exodus9:16 maji-phe kiene ki nga ku bhakela ku muenhu, phala ku ku idikiza kutena kuami, mbé o dijina diami di fumane mu ngongo ioso." 
Exodus9:17 Ki ualʼokio kifua eie hanji ua thathamena o mundu uami, nguaʼié ku a eha ni aiʼâ?" 
Exodus9:18 Talesa-phe, mungu mu ola kala iii, nga-nda ku nokesa mvula ia matadi a kuama, i bhinga kuila mʼoxi ia Ijitu mumu kiluua i kala-mu, tundé ku dimatekenu diê katé ni kiki." 
Exodus9:19 Kala kiki-phe, tuma lusolo o ibhaku ié ioso iala ku mukáu u i bhongoluele ku bhata; kuma a kale muthu, a kale kibhaku, mungu u xala ku mukáu, ua kambe ku mu bhongoluela ku bhata, matadi a mvula nʼa mu kuatela koko, ua kà fua." 
Exodus9:20 Bhenhobho oso ku akua mbèle ia Falaó ala ni uoma ia Jihova, a tumu ngunza jâ, ni ibhaku kulenga-ku ku mukáu nʼeza ku bhata;" 
Exodus9:21 Maji-phe oso ahuku, nguaʼuâ kusuua kizuelu kia Jihova, ni ngunza jâ, ni ibhaku iâ, a i xalesa ku mukáu." 
Exodus9:22 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Sunununa o lukuaku lué, u lu talese mu diulu, phala ku sonoke mvula ia matadi mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, i bete athu, i bete ibhaku, i bete idima ku mábhia, mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu." 
Exodus9:23 Mozé anga u zenga o mbangala iê, u i londekeza mu diulu, Jihova anga u tumikisa mvula ia inuminu ni matadi, ni túbhia tuenda ni ku di loza mu mavu; Jihova anga u nokesa mvula ia matadi mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu." 
Exodus9:24 Kala kiki, ku kala matadi a mvula, ni túbhia tua di lungu-nâ kumoxi, ma kuama muene kiavulu, kia bhingi mʼoxi ia Ijitu kiluua kibhita-mu tunde muʼandekela kutunga-mu athu." 
Exodus9:25 Matadi anga ma beta oso ala ku mukáu mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, akale athu, a kale ibhaku; matadi ma beta ue o idima ioso ku mábhia, ni miẋi ioso ku mukáu ia bukujuka o jithangu." 
Exodus9:26 Kikale ngó mʼoxi ia Ngozene, muala anʼa Izalaiele, muene ngó mua kambe kunoka o mvula ia matadi." 
Exodus9:27 Bhenhobho Falaó u tuma kuixana Mozé ni Alá, u a ambela, uixi: Kumbʼidi nga te muene kituxi; Jihova kidi kiê, ualunguʼê, ni eme ni mundu uami tua bhukumuka." 
Exodus9:28 Diondenu-phe kua Jihova, inuminu ioso iii ni matadi, kuabhu, ibhue-ku; phala ngi mi ehe mu ienu, ki ngi mi fudisa dingi." 
Exodus9:29 Mozé anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngʼila ngi tunda ngó mu mbonge, ngi leka o maku mami kua Jihova; ua-nda mona-phe inuminu ia batuka, o matadi a bhuê-ku; phala eie u kʼijiie kuma ixi ioso iangene ia Jihova." 
Exodus9:30 Eie-phe ki ualʼokio, ni akua mbèle ié, nga kʼijiia muene kiambote kuma ki mua-ndo ẋikina luua kukala ni uoma ua Jihova Nzambi." 
Exodus9:31 Bhenhobho ni linhu ni sevada a i beta ue; kuma sevada ia kexile ia sangununa kiá, o linhu ia tûluka." 
Exodus9:32 Ni tidiku-phe ni senteio, ka i beta-ku mukonda kiluua i kula." 
Exodus9:33 Mozé anga u tunda mu mbonge, kia zubha kutunda kua Falaó, u sanzumuna maku mê kua Jihova; ni inuminu ni matadi anga a bhua-ku, o mvula i batuka kunoka mu ngongo." 
Exodus9:34 Falaó-phe kia zubha kumona kuma mvula ni matadi ni inuminu ia bhu-ku, u tona dingi kuta kituxi, u kola o muxima, ni muene ni akua mbèle iê." 
Exodus9:35 Kienhiki o muxima ua Falaó anga u kola muene, ngueiê kueha anʼa Izalaiele kuiâ; kiene kia tange Jihova kua Mozé, kiene." 
Exodus10:1 O kia bhiti imʼiii Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Bokona kua Falaó; kuma eme nga mu kolesa o muxima, ni muene di akua mbèle iê, phala ngʼidikize isuma iami iii muʼaxaxe kâ." 
Exodus10:2 Eie muene hinu u ki tangela ue anʼé ni alaulʼé, ima ioso i nga kalakala mu Ijitu, ni ijimbuete iami i nga mu bhanga muʼaxaxe kâ phala mu kʼijiie kuma eme ngi Jihova." 
Exodus10:3 Mozé ni Alá anga aia a bokona kua Falaó, a mu ambela, exi: O Jihova, Nzambi ia Jihebeleu uambe kiki: Eie u dituna katé bhebhi kutoloka bhu pholo iami? Eha o mundu uami, phala aie a ngi bhikile." 
Exodus10:4 O ki uila ngué kueha o mundu uami, nʼaiʼâ, mungu muene ngi bheka kihoho mu jimbámbe jé." 
Exodus10:5 Bhuoso bhu ki tula bhu izala, o mavu ku a mono dingi; ki ende ni kudia o ima ioso iauisu ia xala, ioso ia subhuka ku mvula ia matadi, ni miẋi ioso i sabhuka ku mikáu." 
Exodus10:6 Ni mu jinzu jé mu izala, ni mu jinzu joso ja akua mbèle ié, ni mu jinzu ja akua Ijitu oso; ki bhinga ni jitata jenu ni jikuku nuka a ki muene ki kala kiki, tundé kizuua kia bhanga athu mu ngongo, katé kizuua kia lelu. Anga u lunguluka, u tunda bhu pholo ia Falaó." 
Exodus10:7 Akua mbèle ia Falaó a mu ambela, exi: Mbambe bhebhi bhu suka muthu muenʼíú ni ku tu tatesa? A ehe, mala enhá, aie, a bhikile Jihova Nzambi iâ; kífua kua kʼijiia luua kuma Ijitu a mu sengulula?" 
Exodus10:8 Mozé ni Alá anga a a bheka dingi kua Falaó; Muene anga u ambela, uixi: Ndenu, mua kà bhikile Jihova, Nzambi ienu; maji akua-hi a-nda kuia-ku?" 
Exodus10:9 Kuala Mozé: Ki bhinga etuʼoso tuia, ni anʼa ndenge ni adiakimi, ni anʼetu a mala ni anʼetu a ahatu, ni mbudi jetu ni ngombe jetu, kuma tua-nda kua kà bhange kizokola kua Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Exodus10:10 Kuala Falaó: Jihova a mi endese, se nga mi eha ni anʼenu. Di langienu-phe, mbata nga mi mono kuila enʼuenu muandala mu bhanga kudimuka." 
Exodus10:11 Ki kiene-phe, nguami! Se muʼandala muia ngó enu mu mala, mua kà bhikile Jihova; kuma kiene ki muambe. Anga a a kaia bhu pholo ia Falaó." 
Exodus10:12 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Sunununa lukuaku lué ku thandu dia ixi ia Ijitu, phala kihoho kize mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ki die iangu ioso iala-mu, ioso ia subhuka ku matadi a mvula." 
Exodus10:13 Mozé anga u zenga o mbangala iê ku thandu dia ixi ia Ijitu, Jihova anga u bheka kitembu kia mutundila-kumbi mʼoxiʼomo, ni kizuua kiosuʼokio ni usuku uê; o ki kuáki kitembu kia mubandela-kumbi kieza ni kihoho." 
Exodus10:14 Kihoho anga ki bhita mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, ki tula katé mu jimbámbe jê joso; kia vudila-ku kinéne kuma mʼokulu nuka kuejile kihoho kala kiki, o ku hádia ue nuka kia kèza-ku dingi." 
Exodus10:15 Kuma kiezalesa ixi ioso, mavu oso a kusuka ni ene nguí ni kihoho, anga ki dia o iangu ioso ku mavu, ni ibundu ioso ku miẋi, ni ioso kiá ia subhuka ku matadi a mvula; katé ku miẋi ioso ni ku idima, ni kiangu ngó ki ki xala-ku mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, tundé ku mbámbe katé ku mbámbe ia mukuá." 
Exodus10:16 Bhenhobho Falaó u tuma kuixana Mozé ni Alá ni lusolo; u a ambela, uixi: Nga te kituxi, ni kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu, ni kókuenu enu." 
Exodus10:17 Maji-phe ngi lolokienu kituxi kiami, lumoxi ngó luenhulu, mu ngi diondele kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu, phala a ngi katule ngó kalunga kosoʼaka." 
Exodus10:18 Muene anga u tunda kua Falaó, u dionda Jihova." 
Exodus10:19 Jihova anga u lungulula o kitembu, hé ku bhuka kitembu kia nguzu kia mubolokela-kumbi kizangula o kihoho, anga ki ki takula mu Kalunga Kakusuka; ni dihoho ngó dimoxi ki dia xala mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu." 
Exodus10:20 Maji o Jihova-phe ua kolesa muxima ua Falaó, o kueha anʼa Izalaiele, ka ki bhange." 
Exodus10:21 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Sunununa lukuaku lué, u lu talese mu diulu, phala kuize kitombe mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, kitombe kia kuila ni ku maku u ki babata." 
Exodus10:22 Mozé anga u sunununa o lukuaku luê, u lu talesa mu diulu, anga ku kala kitombe kiaxiti mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, mu izuua itatu;" 
Exodus10:23 o mu izuua itatu ioso ia muvimba, ene oso kala ku di mona dingi muthu ni mukuá, kana muthu ue ua balumuka bhu kididi bhu kia mu kuatela izuua ioso itatu; o anʼa Izalaiele-phe ene oso ku mabhata mâ kua zedié." 
Exodus10:24 Falaó bhenhobho anga u ixana Mozé, uixi: Ndenu, mua kà bhikile Jihova; ku xale ngoho o jimbudi jenu, ni anʼenu ndenu-nâ." 
Exodus10:25 Mozé-phe, uixi: Ni eie muene ue u bhana bhu maku etu jisata ni maujitu ma kuoha, ioso i tua kà satela Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Exodus10:26 Ni ibhaku ietu tuia naiu, ni kikoto ngoho ki ki xala-ku; mukonda kuene ku tua-nda kua ka katula ia kusatela na-iu Jihova, Nzambi ietu; o kuijiia-phe ioso i tu katula, ki kale ngó ki tua kà bhiẋila kuenhoko." 
Exodus10:27 Maji-phe Jihova ua kolesʼê o muxima ua Falaó, ka ẋikina ku a eha." 
Exodus10:28 Falaó anga u mu ambela, uixi: Tunda bhabha, u ngi bhue ku mesu; aluka-ze, kizuua kioso ki u ngi mona dingi o pholo, ki kala kizuua kié kia kúfua." 
Exodus10:29 Kuala Mozé: Ua zuela kiambote; pholo ié ki nga-nda tona dingi ku i mona. 
Exodus11:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Kua xala hanji dibhebhu dimoxi ngó di ngi bheka ku thandu dia Falaó, ni ku thandu dia Ijitu; ki di zubha kubhita, kiene kiua ki a mi eha; o kia-nda ku mi eha, o uehelu uê ua ku mi kaia ni mu tunde lusolo bhabha." 
Exodus11:2 Ambela-phe o mundu uoso evue, kuila a bhinge ku akuaʼxi a tungu-nâ, kala diiala a bhinge ku diiala ni mukuâ, kala muhatu a bhinge ku muhatu ni mukuâ, makembu a phalata ni makembu a ulu." 
Exodus11:3 Jihova anga u bhana o mundu uê ngalasa ku mesu a akua Ijitu. Ni Mozé ua di bhange kilamba kia dikota mʼoxi ia Ijitu, a mu xila ni ku mesu a akua mbèle ia Falaó, ni ku mesu a mundu uoso kiá." 
Exodus11:4 Mozé anga u zuela, uixi: Jihova uambe kiki: Usuku ua lelu, mu kaẋi ka kizuua, ngi bhita muʼaxaxi ka ixi ia Ijitu;" 
Exodus11:5 anʼoso a phande-kumbi mʼoxi ia Ijitu afua, tunde ku phande-kumbi ia Falaó a xikama-nê bhu kiandu, katé ku phande-kumbi ia kahatu kaia ku dima dia ditadi dia kuhuhila; ni anʼa ibhaku oso ue a phande-kumbi." 
Exodus11:6 Kua kà bhita ngololo ia dikota mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, ngololo nuka aʼivile, nuka ue ià kala-ku dingi." 
Exodus11:7 Ku ana Izalaiele-phe, né ímbua ngó ki ia kà tena kuzambesa dimi diê mu ku buzila muthu mba kibhaku; phala mu kʼijiie kuila Jihova ua tungula akua Ijitu ni akua Izalaiele." 
Exodus11:8 Kienhókio, ene osoʼá akua mbèle ié, a kèza ku ngi sota, ni ku ngi diundila ni kudionda, kuila: Ndeie, ni mundu uoso ua ku kaiela, mʼoxi mu bhue-mu; kiene kiua ki nga kà tunda. Anga u tunda bhu pholo ia Falaó, uezala ni njinda." 
Exodus11:9 Bhenhobho Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Falaó ka-nda ku mʼivua phala o isuma iami i di sokolole mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus11:10 Ni Mozé ni Alá ene a bhange o isuma ioso iii bhu pholo ia Falaó; Jihova-phe ua kolesa o muxima ua Falaó, o kueha anʼa Izalaiele kutunda mʼoxi iê, ka ẋikina ku ki bhanga." 
Exodus12:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, ni Alá, mʼoxi ia Ijitu, uixi:" 
Exodus12:2 Mbeji iii muene, iene i kala ienu ia kamoxi ku jimbeji joso; phala enu iene o mbeji ia dianga ku muvu." 
Exodus12:3 Ambelenu o kionge kioso kia Izalaiele kuma: Kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeji iii, kala diiala uoso uala kiá ni dibhata diê, a kuate seseme ia mbudi, kala dibhata ni mbudi iê, kala kioso kiala ku mabhata ma jitata jâ;" 
Exodus12:4 maji se o dibhata-phe dia tolo, ka tena kúdia mbudi nʼa i zubha, a di bundè ni dibhata dia mukuá, kioso kia di zukama ku jinzo; kabasa mienhu ia soko kioso kia tokala o udilu ua muthu, mu di sokesa kuila mbudi imoxi mua soko na-iu o ku i dia." 
Exodus12:5 O mbudi iene i kala iadisanze sé ngó unema, ndumbe ia kiubha kimoxi; hé ku jimbudi mu katula, hé ku jihombo mu katula;" 
Exodus12:6 anga mu i bhaka katé mu kizuua kia kauana ku dikuinhi, ku mbeji imoxi ienhiʼi, kizuuʼokio-phe, mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, o kionge kioso kia muiji ua Izalaiele kiene kia i jibha." 
Exodus12:7 Hé a kuata-phe o manhinga-mê anga a ma sangela ku mikangala ia dibhitu iene kiiadi kiâ, ni ku phidika ja thandu ja mabhitu ma jinzo muoso mu ala ku dila." 
Exodus12:8 Xitu a i dia usuku uenʼió, ia uóhe ku túbhia, ni jimbolo ja kambe felemendu; a i elela mafe a lulu." 
Exodus12:9 Ki mu die-ku kama koso-koso ka uisu, mba mu i lamba mu menha, kikale mu i oha ku túbhia; ni mútue uê, ni inama, ni miẋima ioso moxi." 
Exodus12:10 Kana kuxia-ku kima katé ki kúkia; se kuxala katé kuáki, kale mu i oha mu túbhia." 
Exodus12:11 Mu i dia kala kiki: Mua zuata, mua di bhadika, jihaii ku inama o mbangala bhu lukuaku; mu i dia ni lusolo; kuma iene o Phasu ia Jihova." 
Exodus12:12 Mbata mu usuku uenhó eme ngi bhita mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, ngi beta-mu ana oso a phande-kumbi òvualele mu Ijitu, ni ku athu ni ku ibhaku; o jinzambi joso ja Ijitu ngi ji bhana njumbu; eme ngi Jihova." 
Exodus12:13 O manhinga-phe ma kale kijimbuete ku jinzo joso mu mualʼenu; o ki ngi mona manhinga ngi mi somboka, kana dibhebhu di mi tula enu mu ku mi buidisa, kioso ki ngi kuama o ixi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus12:14 Kizuua kienhiki ki mi kala kizuua kia di tungula, mu kiʼimununa jinga ni kizokola kia Jihova; ku miji ienu ioso katé ku hádia ni hádia, mu kuata jinga fesa iê, ki kale kijila kia mi bhana." 
Exodus12:15 O jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu mu ji dia mu sambuadi dia izuua; tunde kiá kizuua kiene kia dianga, felemendu ioso i bhua-mu mu jinzu; kuma uoso u dia jimbolo ja felemendu tunde kizuuʼokio kia dianga katé kizuua kia kasambuadi, muenhó muthu ua ku mu batula mu undandu ua Izalaiele." 
Exodus12:16 Kizuua kiadianga, mu kala ni kionge kikôla; mu kizuua kia kasambuadi ue, mu kala ni kionge kikôla; mu izuua iiadi iii, ki mu bhange midimu ia kima, kikale ngó kikalakalu kia kubhanga kúdia; kiene ki mu bhanga, kuabhu." 
Exodus12:17 O fesa ia jimbolo ja kambe felemendu, mu i kuata kienhiki; kuma kizuua kimoxʼiki, kiene kizuua ki nga katula o ilombo ienu mʼoxi ia Ijitu; mukonda dia kiki, mu kuata kizuuʼiki ku miji ienu ioso, katé ku hádia ni hádia; ki kala kijila ki nga mi bhana." 
Exodus12:18 Ku mbeji ia kamoxi, tunde kizuua kiê kia kauana ku dikuinhi, katé kizuua kia kamoxi ku makuinhi aiadi, mu kumbi diê dia ngoloxi, mu dia jimbolo ja kambe felemendu." 
Exodus12:19 Mu sambuadi dia izuua iii, ki mu kale ni felemendu mu jinzo jenu; kuma uoso udia kima nʼa te-mu felemendu, muthu ió muthu ua ku mu batula mu kionge kia Izalaiele, a kale nzuangiza, a kale muthu a mu vuala ku bhata." 
Exodus12:20 Kana kúdia kima kiala ni felemendu; ku mabhata menu, enu oso mu dia jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu." 
Exodus12:21 Bhenhobho Mozé u tuma kuixana adiakimi oso a Izalaiele, u a ambela, uixi: Solenu kiá jimbudi, kioso ki mua di sokesa ku mabhata, kala dibhata ni mbudi iê, mu jibhe o Phasu." 
Exodus12:22 Mu kuata ni kakiezu ka hisopo, mu ka bonde mu manhinga mala bhu mbasinha, mu sangele ku mikangala iiadi ni phidika ia thandu ia dibhitu ni manhinga ala bhu mbasinha; anga mu di jikila mʼonzo, kana muthu u tunda bhu kanga diê, katé ki kúkia." 
Exodus12:23 Kuma Jihova ua-nda kubhita mʼoxi ioso mu kuama akua Ijitu; o kia-nda kumona manhinga ku phidika ni ku mikangala iiadi ia dibhitu, Jihova u somboka dibhitu diodio, kehela mubuikixi kubokona mu jinzu jenu phala ku mi kuama." 
Exodus12:24 Kienhiki ki kala kijila kienu ki mu kuata, katé ku mululu ni ku muláula." 
Exodus12:25 Ku hádia-phe kioso ki mua kà bhiẋila mʼoxi ia tange Jihova ku mi bhana-iu, mua kà kumbidila ue o kijila kienhiki." 
Exodus12:26 O kia kèla anʼenu a mʼibhula, kuila: Mua ki bhangela-hi, kubhitisa o kikalakaluʼiki?" 
Exodus12:27 Enu mua kèla kuma: Sata iangene ia Jihova, kifua phasu iê, kia somboka o jinzo ja anʼa Izalaiele mu Ijitu, kizuua kia kuama akua Ijitu ene, o mabhata metu anga ua a bhana muenhu. O mundu bhenhobho hé a diunda a bheza." 
Exodus12:28 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tunda-bhu, a ki bhanga; kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé ni Alá, a ki bhange muene." 
Exodus12:29 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, o usuku uenhó, mu kaẋi ka kizuua, Jihova u kuama ana oso a phande-kumbi mʼoxi ia Ijitu, tunde ku thungunu ia Falaó, ua xikama bhu kiandu kiê, katé ku monʼa hutile a mu kutila mu kaleia; ni anʼa phande-kumbi ku ibhaku." 
Exodus12:30 Falaó anga u balumuka mu usuku, ni muene ni akua mbèle iê oso, ni athu oso akua Ijitu; anga ku kala ngololo ia vulu mu Ijitu; kuma kana-ku inzu mua kambe kúfua muthu." 
Exodus12:31 Anga u ixana Mozé ni Alá mu usuku, uixi: Zangukenu, mu tunde mu kaẋi ka mundu uami, ni enu ni anʼa Izalaiele; ndenu, mua kà bhikile Jihova kala ki muambe." 
Exodus12:32 Ni jimbudi jenu ni jingombe ambatenu-ju, kala ki muambe, phala mu muangane; eme uami ngi sambedienu nda ngi kale ni kuzediua." 
Exodus12:33 O akua Ijitu anga a landameka o mundu, mbé a tunde mʼoxi iâ ni lusolo; kuma ambe exi: Etu oso tua-nda kúfua." 
Exodus12:34 O mundu anga a katula o ikose iâ ia jimbolo, kiluua ngó a i ta felemendu mu maulungu ma kubhondela anga maulungu a ma kutila bhu malasola, a a ta bhu isuxi." 
Exodus12:35 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhanga kala kia ambela Mozé, a bhinga ku akua Ijitu makembu ma phalata ni makembu ma ulu, ni izuatu." 
Exodus12:36 Jihova anga u bhana o mundu uê ngalasa ku mesu a akua Ijitu, anga a a bhana muene kioso kia bhingi. Kifua kubhûnda kuene, ene anga a bhunda akua Ijitu." 
Exodus12:37 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a katuka bhu Lameseji, a ta kibangu bhu Sukote; o ku a alula a tena hama jisamanu ja jimidi; mala ngó akua kuenda bhoxi, o anʼa ndenge ka a te-mu." 
Exodus12:38 Sai dingi ni kifuẋi kia dikota kia jinzuángiza a di bundu momuʼâ ia endela-nâ kumoxi, ni nzungule ia ibhaku ia jimbudi, ni jihombo, ni jingombe." 
Exodus12:39 Anga a kanga o jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu, ku ikose ia tundu na-iu mu Ijitu; kuma ka tele-mu luua felemendu, mukonda o kutunda mu Ijitu kifua ku a kaia, ka a bhana kithangana, ni huta ka i iudika dingi." 
Exodus12:40 Kala kiki mivu ia bhange anʼa Izalaiele mu Ijitu, hama jiuana ja muvu ni makuinhi atatu." 
Exodus12:41 O mu kukala-kukala-phe, kiabhu o hama jiuana ja muvu ni makuinhi atatu, mu kizuua kienhókio muene, kiene kia tundu o ilombo ioso ia Jihova mu Ijitu." 
Exodus12:42 Kifua usuku ió Jihova ua a tele muxima mu ku a katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu; usuku iú-phe usuku ua Jihova, ua tokala anʼa Izalaiele oso a mu ta muxima katé bhua kà suka o miji iâ." 
Exodus12:43 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé ni Alá, uixi: Kijila kia Phasu kienhiki: Mukua muiji uengi ka tena kudia-ku." 
Exodus12:44 Maji o mubhika ua muthu-phe, a mu sumbu ni kitadi, se a mu saie kiá, u diê." 
Exodus12:45 O nzuangiza-phe ni ngunza ka tena kudia-ku. 
Exodus12:46 Kikale mu i díla moxiʼaʼnzu; kana ku katula-ku ku xitu iê, phala ku tunda na-iu bhu kanga. O ku ifuba iê, né kimoxi ngó ki mu ki bukule-ku." 
Exodus12:47 Kionge kioso kia Izalaiele kikale a kà bhanga kienhiki. 
Exodus12:48 Se bhu kala mukuaʼxi iengi ueza kutunga ni enu, iu ua mesena kukuata ue o Phasu ia Jihova, kikale mala oso a dibhata diê a a saia, o kia zubha ku ki bhanga, kiene kiua kia tena kuzukama ni ku i kuata; u kala kiá mukuâ ni mukua ixi, a mu vualela ku bhata; kana muthu-phe a kambe ku mu saia, u tena kudia-ku." 
Exodus12:49 Kijila ki kala kiene kimoxi, phala iú a mu vualela ku bhata ni iú muthu uengi ueza kutunga muʼaxaxi kenu." 
Exodus12:50 Ana oso a Izalaiele anga a bhanga kienhiki; kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé ni Alá, kiene muene kia bhange." 
Exodus12:51 Anga ki bhita kuila, mu kizuua kienhókio, Jihova u katula anʼa Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu, kala kia di te mu ilombo iâ." 
Exodus13:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Exodus13:2 Ngi lumbile ana oso a phande-kumbi, oso a tuama kujikula divumu mu anʼa Izalaiele, a kale athu, a kale ibhaku; kuma ami." 
Exodus13:3 Mozé anga u ambela o mundu, uixi: Lembalalenu kizuuʼiki kia lelu, kizuua ki mua tundu mu Ijitu, mu dibhata dia ubhika; kuma Jihova ua mi katula-mu ni nguzu ia lukuaku luê; kana kúdia jimbolo ja felemendo, kizuua kienhiki." 
Exodus13:4 Mua tundu kizuua kia lelu, mbeje ia Abibi." 
Exodus13:5 Kioso-phe Jihova kia kà mi bheka mʼoxi ia Makanana, ni Mahiti, ni Mamodi, ni Mapelezi, ni Mahivi, ni Majebusi, ixi ia lokela jitata jenu ku mi bhana-iu, ixi i kunguluka lete ni uiki, mua kà kuata ue kijilʼiki, mu mbeji iene i tualʼiii." 
Exodus13:6 Mu sambuadi dia izuua mu kala mu kúdia jimbolo ja kambe felemendu, o kizuua kia kasambuadi, ki kala kia fesa iangene ia Jihova." 
Exodus13:7 Jimbolo ja kambe o felemendu mu ji dia mu sambuadi dioso dia izuua; ka mi mone ni jimbolo jala ni felemendu, ka mi mone ni felemendu, katé ku mbámbe ienu." 
Exodus13:8 Kizuua kienhókio mua kʼàmbela anʼenu kuma: Tua ki bhangela mukonda dia kidiuanu kia tu bhange Jihova, mu ku tu katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus13:9 Kia kà kala kidimbu ku lukuaku luenu, ni kijimbuete bhu dibhomo, phala ngonge ia Jihova i mi kale mu kanu; kuma Jihova ua mi katula ni lukuaku lua nguzu mu Ijitu." 
Exodus13:10 Kala kiki, mu kuata jinga o kijila kienhiki, bhu kumbi uila bhabha, ku tunda muvu, kuiza muvu." 
Exodus13:11 Kia kà kala-phe ue kiki, kuma Jihova kia kà mi bheka mʼoxi ia Makanana, kala kia mi lokela enu ni jitata jenu, kia kà mi bhana-iu o ku i vua." 
Exodus13:12 Kienhókio mua ká lumbila Jihova oso a tuama kujikula o divumu, ni anʼ oso a ibhaku a tuama ku a vuala, jindumbe ji kala jangene ja Jihova." 
Exodus13:13 Maji-phe se bulu, o mona a tuama ku mu vuala, mu mu kula ni mbudi; o ki mu kamba ku mu kula, mu mu bukula o xingu; maji ku athu, ana oso a phande-kumbi mu a kula muene." 
Exodus13:14 O ki kala anʼenu hádia a mʼibhula, exi: Kiki kima kiahi? mua kèla kuma: Nguzu ia lukuaku lua Jihova ia bhiti-bhu, mu ku tu katula mu Ijitu, mu dibhata dia ubhika." 
Exodus13:15 Mukonda o mu kuiza ku ki bhanga, kia thathamana Falaó, iú ua di tunuʼê ku tu eha, Jihova ua jibha ana oso a phande-kumbi mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ni ku anʼathu, ni ku anʼa ibhaku; kiene kia ngi bhangesa kuila ana oso a tuama kujikula o divumu, ngʼa a lumbila Jihova, se jimdumbe; o anʼa phande-kumbi ku athu-phe, ngʼa a kula." 
Exodus13:16 Ki kala kidimbu ku lukuaku lué, kala fita ia ku bhiti bhu dibhomo; kuila nguzu ia lukuaku lua Jihova ia bhiti-bhu, mu ku tu katula mu Ijitu." 
Exodus13:17 Kia bhiti-phe kiki kuila, Falaó kia zubha kueha o mundu nʼaiâ, Nzambi ka a songuela mu njila ia akua Fidíxia, sumbala iene ia batulula; kuma Nzambi ua-mbe, uixi: Sumba mundu a diela, kia-ndu takana ni ita, a mesena a vutukila mu Ijitu;" 
Exodus13:18 Kala kiki, Nzambi-phe ua nhungisa o mundu mu njila ia kikangalakata, njila ia Kalunga Kakusuka; anʼa Izalaiele-phe mu kutunda mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ene oso a maneka ibhakatu iâ." 
Exodus13:19 Mozé ue ua katula o ifuba ia Zuze, iu ua i ambatesa; kuma Zuze ua lokesa jinga anʼa Izalaiele, uixi: Nzambi hinu u mi zungila, o mu kuia, ni ifuba iami mu i ambata, muia na-iu." 
Exodus13:20 Anga a katuka bhu Sukote, a ta kibangu bhu Etamu, bhu mbámbe ia kikangalakata." 
Exodus13:21 Jihova anga u a tuamenena; mu muanha mu philadi ia dituta, phala ku a edikiza o njila; o mu usuku mu philadi ia túbhia, phala ku a muikina a kale mua zele; phala a tene kuenda mu muanha, ni mu usuku." 
Exodus13:22 O philadi ia dituta mu muanha, ni philadi ia túbhia mu usuku, iemana jinga muene bhu pholo ia mundu, ki ia sondoloka jinga-bhu dingi, muanha ni usuku." 
Exodus14:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Exodus14:2 Tangela anʼa Izalaiele phala a te honda, a te o kibangu kiâ bhu mbandu ia Pihahilote, bhu kaẋi ka Mingidole ni kalunga, bhua lulama ni bhu Baale-Zefone; bhu sámbua diê bhene bhu mu ta o kibangu, bhu mbandu muene ia kalunga." 
Exodus14:3 Falaó-phe mu kutala anʼa Izalaiele, ua-nda kuila, uixi: A sukamena, a batukila mu kingalakata, kuma o kikangalakata kia a kondoloka." 
Exodus14:4 Eme-phe ngi kolesa o muxima ua Falaó, o muene ua-nda ku a kaiela, eme bhenhobho nda ngi fumane ku thandu dia Falaó, ni ku thandu dia kilombo kiê kioso, akua Ijitu phala à kʼejiie kuma eme Jihova, O ana a Izalaiele anga a bhanga kienhókio." 
Exodus14:5 O kia ki tangela Falaó kuila o mundu ia lenga, muxima ua Falaó ni ua akua mbêle iê anga u aluluka, exi: Tua bhange kiebhi, tueha Izalaiele kuiê, ua kexi mu ku tu bhikila?" 
Exodus14:6 Falaó bhenhobho ua iudika o dikalu diê dia ita, hé uambata ni mundu uê;" 
Exodus14:7 anga u katula hama jisamanu ja makalu amukuâ, a tungula muene ni makalu oso a Ijitu, ni ilolo iê ia ita a di longo-mo." 
Exodus14:8 Kuma Jihova ua kolesa o muxima ua Falaó, muenexiʼa Ijitu, anga u kaiela anʼa Izalaiele, mukonda muene ua fika kuma anʼa Izalaiele a mu baluka; manhi sai lukuaku lua nguzu lua a katula." 
Exodus14:9 Akua Ijitu anga a kaiela kuoso kuala ene, ni jikabalu ni makalu a Falaó, ni akua kusambela o jikabalu, ni kilombo kioso, anga a a kuatela bhua te o kibangu kiâ bhu mbandu ia Pi-hahilote, bhua lulama ni bhu Baale-Zefone." 
Exodus14:10 Kia zukama Falaó, anʼa Izalaiele a zambula mesu, a mona Ijitu ioso ia solomoka mu ku a kaiela; anga a bhuuama ni uoma, a dikola kua Jihova." 
Exodus14:11 Anga ambela Mozé, exi; Kifua mu Ijitu mua kambele jimbila, eiʼeie ua tu katula-mu phala ku tu jibhila kunu mu kikangalakata? Ua tu bhangela-hi kiki, ua tu katula ngó mu Ijitu?" 
Exodus14:12 Ki kiene ki tua ku ambela mu Ijitu, tuixi: Tu ambule, tu kale kubhikila akua Ijitu? Kifua ki kota kubhikila akua Ijitu, ki soka ni kufuila mumu mu kikangalakata?" 
Exodus14:13 Mozé anga u ambela o mundu, uixi: Ki mu kale ni uoma; ximbakatenu nda mu mone o ubhuluilu ua Jihova, ua-nda ku mi bhanga lelu; kuma o akua Ijitu mua-lu mona lelu, ku pholo ku tuia nuka dingi mua kà a mona." 
Exodus14:14 Jihova muene ua-nda ku mi bhangela, enu di xibhienu ngó." 
Exodus14:15 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Uala ku ngi kolelaʼhi eme? Ambela anʼa Izalaiele ende ni kuenda;" 
Exodus14:16 eie-phe, zenga o mbangala ié, u sununune o lukuaku lué ku thandu dia kalunga, u ka uanunune mu kaẋi o anʼa Izalaiele a bhite muene mu kaẋi ka kalunga, bhoxi dia kukuta." 
Exodus14:17 Eme-ze ngi kolesa o miẋima ia akua Ijitu, phala ene uâ a kutuke-mu mu ku a kaiela; bhenhobho ngi tambula fuma ku thandu dia Falaó, ni ku kilômbo kiê kioso, ni makalu ê a ita, ni kavalelu jê." 
Exodus14:18 O akua Ijitu à kʼijiia kuma eme Jihova, kioso ki nga-ndu tambula o fuma ku thandu dia Falaó, ni ku makalu ê, ni ku jikavalelu jê." 
Exodus14:19 O Anjo ia Jihova ia tuanemena o kilômbo kia Izalaiele, anga i tunda ku pholo iâ iza hé i a kalela ku dima; ni philadi ia dituta i tunda ku pholo ku ia kexile, ieza, iemana ku dima diâ." 
Exodus14:20 Kifua a batula bhu kaẋi ka kilômbo kia Ijitu ni kilômbo kia Izalaiele; o dituta diene dimoxi, ku mbandu ia akua Ijitu dia bheka kitombe kiedi bui, o ku mbandu ia Izalaiele mukengeji uia ni ku a muikina; kala kiki, usuku uosʼó a di kalela, ka tena ku di zukama." 
Exodus14:21 Mozé anga u sunununa o lukuaku luê ku thandu dia kalunga; Jihova anga u vutula o menha a kalunga ni kitembu kia mutundila-kumbi kia bhuka usuku uosʼô, ki kia bhangesa kuila bhu kaẋi bhua kukuta, menha a di uanununa mbandu ni mbandu." 
Exodus14:22 O anʼa Izalaiele anga a kutuka mu kaẋi ka kalunga, mua kukuta; o menha emana kala phalelu, ku mbandu ia kúdia, ni ku mbandu ia kiasu." 
Exodus14:23 O akua Ijitu a kexi mu ku a kaiela, anga a kutuka uâ mu kaẋi ka kalunga, ni jikamelo ja Falaó, ni makalu, ni kavalelu jê." 
Exodus14:24 Kutula-phe ku makolombolo, Jihova mu philadi ia túbhia ni dituta kia tale o kilômbo kia akua Ijitu, u kala mu ku a tatesa." 
Exodus14:25 Anga u mbonjomona o malola ku makalu mâ, katé aia ni ku a kukila bhoxi, akua Ijitu anga a zuela, exi: Tu lengienu o pholo ia Izalaiele; kuma Jihova uala ku a bhangela, iú u a mu bhondeleka akua Ijitu." 
Exodus14:26 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Sunununa dingi lukuaku lué ku thandu dia kalunga, phala menha ma vutuke mu bobesa akua Ijitu, ni makaluʼâ, ni kavalelu jâ." 
Exodus14:27 Bhenhobho Mozé anga u sunununa lukuaku luê ku thandu dia kalunga, kalunga anga ka vutuka ni nguzu bhu kididi kiê, kuila kuma ku kúkia; akua Ijitu anga a sota kulenga, maji Jihova ua bobesa akua Ijitu mu kaẋi ka kalunga." 
Exodus14:28 Kuma menha ma vutuka, makalu ma boba, ni asambedi a jikabalu, ni kilômbo kioso kia Falaó, ene oso a kaiela ni kukutuka mu kaẋi ka kalunga; né muthu ngó ka subhuka-ku." 
Exodus14:29 Maji o anʼa Izalaiele-phe muene mua bhitiʼâ, endela bhoxi dia kukuta mu kaẋi ka kalunga, menha ma di bhange phalelu, ku mbandu ia kúdia, ni ku mbandu ia kiasu." 
Exodus14:30 Kienhiki Jihova kia bhulula Izalaiele mu kizuua kienhókio bhu maku a akua Ijitu; Izalaiele anga a mona ngó o imbi ia akua Ijitu ia takuka bhu ndúndu ia kalunga. 
Exodus14:31 Izalaiele anga a mona o kidiuanu kia kalakala Jihova mu kubuidisa akua Ijitu; mundu anga a kala ni uoma ua Jihova; anga a xikana Jihova, ni selevende iê Mozé." 
Exodus15:1 Kizuuʼokio Mozé ni anʼa Izalaiele emba muimbu iú, mu kuximana Jihova, exi: Ngʼimbila Jihova, kuma Muene ua di jingisa kinéne; ni kabalu ni iú ua sambela-ku ua a texe mu menha." 
Exodus15:2 Jihova muene nguzu iami, mukumbi uami, kua muene kua ngʼijila kubhuluka. Iú Muene Nzambi iami, ngi mu ximana jinga; muene Nzambi ia tatʼetu, eme ngi mu zangeleka." 
Exodus15:3 Jihova kindanda kia ita; jina diê Jihova muene. 
Exodus15:4 O makalu a Falaó ni kilômbo kiê ua a texe mu menha; o ilolo iê, ia tungula, a boba mu Kalunga Kakusuka." 
Exodus15:5 Mabhuku ma a bhiti ku thandu; a boba muʼ alunga ka zongo mukuâ ni ditadi. 
Exodus15:6 Lukuaku lué lua kúdia, eie u Jihova, luala ni nguzu ia fuma; lukuaku lué lua kúdia, u Jihova, lua muanganesa o nguma, muangatatá." 
Exodus15:7 Mu kuzangalala kué kuavulu, ua a tolola oso ambe ku ku kitukila; ki ua a tumikisa o njinda ié, ene abhi kala maxinde a kitumba." 
Exodus15:8 Mu kubhusa kua mazulu mé, menha ma di lumala, jihungulule jemana muene kala kixitu; mabhuku exi muene ngé muʼaxaxi ka muzanza." 
Exodus15:9 Kuala o nguma: Ngi kaia, ngi kuata, tu uane o mbole; nga kà a bhanga kia ngi kala ku muxima katé kia kumu; xibhata iami ngi i tomona, o lukuaku luami lua kà a buikisa." 
Exodus15:10 Ua bhusu ni kitembu kié, kalunga ka a bhiti ku thandu; a njoboka kala xumbu mu mabhuku a makota." 
Exodus15:11 Ku jinzambi nanhi muene u soka ni eie u Jihova? Mukuenu nanhi u kôla kiki mu kuzela ni kuiuka, kilamba ki kuata uoma, mukua kubhanga madiuanu?" 
Exodus15:12 Ki uedi u sunununa lukuaku lué lua kúdia, mavu a bhane mu kanu, iá a a minha." 
Exodus15:13 Mu kiadi kié uendesa o mundu iú, u ua kula eie-muene (ua di bhange u kilamba kiâ); mu nguzu ié ua ambata Katé bhu kibúta kié kikôla kia kuzela ni kuiuka." 
Exodus15:14 O ifuẋi iamukuâ a kʼivu, a teketa; a tunga mu Fidíxia mika ia a kuata." 
Exodus15:15 Mavunda a Idomo a diuana; mazonda a Mouabhe kua exa kìmbulambula; akuaʼaxi ia Kanana a botomoka. 
Exodus15:16 Kua a tulukila kekenha ni kikote; o nguzu ia lukuaku lué ia a bhuuika, a xikama ni ene hudií kala ditadi; katé kia zaúka o mundu ué, u Jihova, katé kia zaúka, o mundu ué u ua sumba." 
Exodus15:17 Eie hinu u a bokuesa, u a phapha, ku mulundu ué ua undundu. U a bhaka bhu kididi ki ua solo, u Jihova, mu kala kibúta kié, bhu dibezelu dié, Ngana, dia tunga o maku mé." 
Exodus15:18 Jihova ua hingila-ku; o ungana ué u nangenena. 
Exodus15:19 Kuma o jikabalu ja Falaó, ni makalu mê, ni jikavalelu jê, a a bobesa; anʼa Izalaiele-phe ni muʼaxaxi ka kalunga endela bhoxi dia kukuta." 
Exodus15:20 Bhenhobho o Midiiana, polofeta, phange ia Alá ia muhatu, u kuata kangoma ka manzuela, u tuamena, ahatu oso a mu kaiela ni tungoma tuâ ni kukina." 
Exodus15:21 Midiiana anga u tambuijila, uixi: Imbidienu Jihova o kikóue kia undanda; kuma ni kabalu ni iú ua sambela-ku, ua a texi mu menha." 
Exodus15:22 Mozé anga u tuma Izalaiele kuia dingi ku pholo, a tundu bhu Kalunga Kakusuka, anga a bokona mu kikangalakata kia Sule; edi enda izuua itatu mu kikangalakata, menha ka moneka." 
Exodus15:23 Anga a tula bhu Mahala, o menha a Mahala-phe a lémbua ku a nua, mukonda alulu; kiene kia lukila-bhu exi bhu Mahala" 
Exodus15:24 O mundu anga a kuata ku longolola Mozé, exi: Tua-nda kunua-hi?" 
Exodus15:25 Muene anga u dikola kua Jihova; Jihova anga u mu idikiza muẋi, o kia u te mu menha, menha mê ala kiá a fema. Bhenhobho bhene bhua a bhela o jingonge ni kijila; anga bhenhobho u a lola hanji." 
Exodus15:26 Hé u a ambela, uixi: Se u ívua kiambote o dízui dia Jihova, Nzambi ié, hé u bhanga kioso kia mu iukila ku mesu mê, ni u bhana o dítui ku itumu ié, hé u aiuka o ijiia iê iene ioso, ki ngi te dingi mahaxi ku thandu dié, né uhaxi umoxi ku mahaxi oso u nga te ku thandu dia akua Ijitu; kuma eme ngi Jihova, eme-muene ngi ku saka." 
Exodus15:27 Anga eza, a tula bhu Elimi, bhuala kuinhi dia fixi ni kiiadi ja menha, ni makuinhi sambuadi a máie; anga a ta kibangu bhenhobho bhu mbanduʼa menha." 
Exodus16:1 Anga a kuata dingi njila iâ, kutunda bhu Elimi, kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele anga eza mu kikangalakata kia Sine, bhu kaẋi ka Elimi ni Sinai, kizuua kia katanu ku dikuinhi, mbeje ia kaiadi tunde bhu kukatuka kuâ mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus16:2 O kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele anga a kuata kulongolola Mozé ni Alá mu kikangalakatʼomo. 
Exodus16:3 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a zuela kua ene, exi: Tamano tua fuile ku lukuaku lua Jihova, mʼoxi ia Ijitu, kioso ki tua kexile mu xikama bhu mbanduʼa jímbia ja xitu, anga tu dia o mbolo, hé tu i lémbua; enu-phe mua tu katula, enu mua tu bheka mu kikangalakatʼumu, phala kujibha o mundu uosʼú ni nzala." 
Exodus16:4 Jihova bhenhobho anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Talesa-ze, ngi mi nokesa mbolo i tunda mu diulu; mundu a kale mu tunda izuua ioso mu i nona bhoxi, a fikise ioso ia soko ku i dia kizuua kimoxi, ngʼa lole mba a ẋikina kuendela mu ngonge iami, mba kana." 
Exodus16:5 Kutula-phe mu kizuua kia kasamanu, a none ioso i soka kudia mu izuua iiadi, ioso iene mu nona izuua iamukuá i kale mu luiadi." 
Exodus16:6 Mozé ni Alá anga ambela anʼa Izalaiele, exi: Lelu mu ngoloxi mua-nda ku kʼijiia kuila Jihova muene ua mi katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu;" 
Exodus16:7 o mungu ki kúkia mu kimene, mua-ndu mona o unene ua Jihova; mukonda muene ua mʼivu o kulongolola kuenu; Jihova mua mu longolola, etu tu akua-hi kuila mu tu longolola etu?" 
Exodus16:8 Mozé anga u kumbulula dingi, uixi: Mu ki mona, Jihova kianda ku mi bhana kúdia xitu mu ngoloxi, ki kukia anga mu dia mbolo katé muekuta; mukonda Jihova ua mʼivu o kuzuela kuenu, ku mua mu longolola na-ku muene. Mbata etu, etu akua-hi? Ki etu mua tu longolola, kuma mua longolola Jihova." 
Exodus16:9 Mozé anga u ambela Alá, uixi: Ambela kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, a zukame bhu pholo ia Jihova; mukonda ua mʼivu o kulongolola kuenu." 
Exodus16:10 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, kioso Alá kiala kuzuela ni kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, ene oso kiedi sui ku mbandu ia kikangalakata a mona kubenha kua Jihova kua monekena mu dituta." 
Exodus16:11 Jihova anga u zuela kua Mozé, uixi:" 
Exodus16:12 Ngʼevu o kulongolola kua anʼa Izalaiele; a ambele-phe, kuila: Lelu mu ngoloxi iii, kumbi ki di koloka, mu dia xitu, o ki kúkia mu dia mbolo, mu ikuta; phala enu mu kʼijiie kuma eme Jihova, Nzambi ienu." 
Exodus16:13 Kutula-phe mu kumbi dia ngoloxi kueza tungumbe, kilômbo kioso kiezala; o ki kuaki mu kimene, dimume dia tula mu jimbandu joso ja kilômbo." 
Exodus16:14 O kia tuka dimume, ku mavu oso a kikangala-kata kua di kuu tumbundu tuofele, tuedi kala tumbuelekese tua matadi mvula, mukuâ ni kiene kuiza mukulakaji ku mbambi iavulu." 
Exodus16:15 Anʼa Izalaiele kia zubha ku ki mona, a dibhula mudiâ exi: O kiki kima kia-hi? kuma ka kʼijiia, kiluua a ki mona. Mozé anga u a ambela, uixi: O iii iene o mbolo, ia mi bhana Jihova phala ku i dia." 
Exodus16:16 Jihova ua mi tumu kiki: Nonenu-ku, kala muthu kioso kia mu soko mu kudia kuê; kifua kala muthu nganza, kala kia soko athu uala-nâ mʼonzo; muthu ni muthu nganza, oso kiá a mu kala mu balaka iê." 
Exodus16:17 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a ki bhanga; amoxi a nona kiavulu, o amukuá a nona kia tolo." 
Exodus16:18 O ki eza-phe ku i zonga mu nganza-nganza, ua nona kiavulu ki kua mu subhuka kima, o ua nona kia tolo ki kua mu kambe ue kima; kala muthu ua sokesa ni athu a mu kala bhu jiku diê, a tokala o kudia." 
Exodus16:19 Mozé anga u a ambela, uixi: Ibhue lelu ni ku i dia, kana muthu u zekesa-ku phala mungu." 
Exodus16:20 Maji-phe sai iá ka ẋikina kuívua Mozé, a zekesa-ku katé kuaki, a sanga muala maminhu, iii nuha kibuzu. Mozé anga u a temena." 
Exodus16:21 Izuua ioso anga a i nona kimene ni kimene, kala muthu kia mu soko mu kudia kuê; mukonda kiatua jinga o muanha-phe i sangumuka." 
Exodus16:22 Kutula kizuua kia kasamanu-phe, a nona kúdia kua luiadi, kifua nganza jiiadi kala muthu; o makota oso a kionge anga eza a ki tangela Mozé." 
Exodus16:23 Muene anga u a ambela, uixi: Kiene muene kia zuela Jihova; uixi: Mungu kizuua kiangene kia kunhoha, sabhalu ikola ia Jihova; kangenu ioso i mua mesena kukanga, lambenu ue ioso i mua mesena kulamba; o futa ioso i mu xia-ku, bhakenu-iu, phala enu mungu ki kúkia." 
Exodus16:24 Anga a i bhaka kizuua kienhókio katé kuáki, kala kia tange Mozé; maji ki ia bolo, ki iala ue maminhu." 
Exodus16:25 Bhenhobho Mozé, uixi: Iene i mu dia lelu; kuma lelu sabhalu ia ngene ia Jihova; lelu bhoxi ki mua-nda ku i sanga-bhu." 
Exodus16:26 Mu i mona mu izuua isamanu; kia kasambuadi-phe kia sabhalu, mu kizuuʼiki ki i kala-ku." 
Exodus16:27 Kutula-phe kizuua kia kasambuadi bhu kala athu amoxi-mu a tunda mu kunona, maji a lémbua; ka i sange-ku." 
Exodus16:28 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Katé bhebhi bhu mu suka ni kuxibhaka o itumu iami ni ijiia?" 
Exodus16:29 Talenu kuma Jihova ua mi bhana o sabhalu, kiene kia mi bhela kizuua kia kasamanu kúdia kua izuua iiadi; Xalenu kala muthu bhu kididi kiê, kana muthu utunda bhu kididi kiê kizuua kia kasambuadi." 
Exodus16:30 Kala kiki, mundu a kala mu nhoha kizuua kia kasambuadi." 
Exodus16:31 Dibhata dia Izalaiele-phe anga exana kudiʼuku, exi, Maná; i di fuangana ku jimbutu ja jikuendulu, izela; o mu kanu u ívua ila kala jimbolo ja uiki." 
Exodus16:32 Mozé anga u amba, uixi: Kiene kia tumu Jihova ʼiki: Mu kuata nganza imoxi ia maná, mu i bhake katé ku miji ni miji, phala a mone kúdia ku nga mi dikila na-ku mu kikangalakatʼumu, kioso ki nga mi katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus16:33 Mozé anga u ambela Alá, uixi: Kuata ímbia ia mavu, u te-mu nganza imoxi ia maná, u i bhake bhu pholo ia Jihova, ia kulunda ku miji ioso katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Exodus16:34 Kala Jihova kia tumu kua Mozé, kiene ue Alá kia i bhake bhu pholo ia Umbangi, iú ua i lundu." 
Exodus16:35 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a dia maná mu makuinhi auana a muvu, katé kia bhiẋila ku ixi ia tungu athu; iá a dia jinga o maná katé kieza mu jimbámbe ja ixi ia Kanana." 
Exodus16:36 Nganza ji kala dikuinhi mu tenesa midila ia efah. 
Exodus17:1 O kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, anga a sendumuka mu kikangalakata kia Sine, enda jinjila joso ja tumu Jihova, katé kia te o kibangu bhu Lefidimi; kana-bhu-phe menha ma mundu kúnua." 
Exodus17:2 Bhenhobho o povo anga a di kuata ni Mozé, exi: Tu bhane menha, phala tu nue. Mozé anga u a ambela, uixi: Mua di kuatela-hi ni eme? Phala-hi mu bhumina Jihova?" 
Exodus17:3 O mundu-phe bhenhobho dinhota dia a kuata; mundu anga a longolola Mozé, exi: Phala-hi ua tu katula mu Ijitu; phala ku tu jibha ni dinhota, etu ni anʼetu ni ibaku ietu?" 
Exodus17:4 Mozé anga u dikola kua Jihova, uixi: O mundu iú ngʼa a bhanga kiebhi? Kua a xala kia ngó ku ngi bûba ni matadi." 
Exodus17:5 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Bhita bhu pholo ia mundu, ni adiakimi amukuá a Izalaiele, u ila-nâ kumoxi; ni mbangala ié u i kuata, ioso i ua betele na-iu o honga ia menha nda uie." 
Exodus17:6 Eme-ze ngi ku tuamenena kuenhoko, nga kèmana bhu ditadi bhu Holebe; eie-phe ua kà beta ditadi, mua kà fuafua menha, phala o mundu uoso a nue. Mozé anga u ki bhanga ku mesu a adiakimi a Izalaiele." 
Exodus17:7 Kididi kienhokio anga u ki luka uixi: Masahe, a ki luka ue Medibah, mukonda dia mvunda ia anʼa Izalaiele, mukonda ue a bhumina Jihova, exi: O ki tualʼiki, tuila Jihova tuala-nê, inga kana?" 
Exodus17:8 Amaleke anga u vubuka bhenhobho, u lua ita ni Izalaiele bhu Lefidimi." 
Exodus17:9 Mozé anga u ambela Josuué, uixi: Sola makuenze, nda uie u lue ni Amaleke; eme mungu ngʼimana bhu thala ia kalundu, ni mbangala ia Nzambi ngi i kuata bhu maku." 
Exodus17:10 Josuué anga u bhanga kala kia mu tumu Mozé, u lua ni Amaleke; ni Mozé-phe ni Alá, ni Hule, anga a banda bhu thala ia kalundu." 
Exodus17:11 Anga kiia ni kubhita kuila, kioso Mozé kia leka o lukuaku, Izalaiele ala kota ku nguzu; o kia lu tulula o Amaleke muene u kala kota." 
Exodus17:12 Mozé-phe maku a mu suku; anga a katula ditadi, a mu tela-diu bhu kididi, muene hé u xikama-ku; ni Alá-phe ni Hule a mu fikidila maku, iú ku mbandu imoxi, iú ku mbandu ia mukuá; makuʼê anga a kolokota ni ku a leka katé kia tula o dikumbi." 
Exodus17:13 Josuué anga u buidisa Amaleke ni mundu uê ku mazu a xibhata. 
Exodus17:14 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Kiki soneka-kiu, ki kale musêndu mu divulu, u ki jimbuile ue mu mátui ma Josuué; kuma Amaleke ngi mu jimisa o mbutu, bhoxi a diulu u bhua-bhu." 
Exodus17:15 Mozé anga u tunga-bhu o kalatódio, u ka luka dijina dia Jihova-nisi" 
Exodus17:16 anga u amba, uixi: Mukonda Jihova ua loka, Jihova u kala ni mvunda ni Amaleke ku tunda muiji kuiza muiji." 
Exodus18:1 Kiki Jétulu, nganga ia Midiiana, ukouʼa Mozé uevu ima ioso Nzambi ia bhange mu kuatekesa Mozé, ni mundu uê ua Izalaiele; kuma uevu ue kioso Jihova kia katula Izalaiele mu Ijitu." 
Exodus18:2 Jétulu, ukouʼa Mozé, anga u katula Zipola, mukaji a Mozé, kuma Mozé ua mu katuile aie ku bhata diâ," 
Exodus18:3 ni anʼê kiiadi a mala, dikota dijina diê Ngelexone; kuma uambe, uixi, ngi nzuangiza mʼoxi ia athu engi;" 
Exodus18:4 ndenge dijina diê Eliiezele; kuma uambe, uixi: Nzambi ia tatʼetu ua ngi kuatekesa, ua ngi kudila ku xibhata ia Falaó." 
Exodus18:5 Jétulu, ukouʼa Mozé, anga uiza kua Mozé, u mu bhekela anʼê kiiadi a mala, ni mukaji ê; u mu sanga mu kikangalakata bhua te kibangu kiâ, bhu mulundu ua Nzambi;" 
Exodus18:6 anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eme ngi ukouʼé Jétulu, ngeza ku ku kunda, nga ku bhekela mukajiʼé; ni anʼé kiiadi a mala muhetuʼé ueza-nâ." 
Exodus18:7 Mozé anga u tunda mu kauidila ukouʼê, u mu diundiula, u mu bhana jibeju anga a di kunda, a dʼibhudisa kioso kia zekele, hé a bokona mu balaka." 
Exodus18:8 Mozé anga u kunda ukouʼê kioso kia bhange Jihova kua Falaó ni kua akua Ijitu, mukonda dia jihenda ja kuatela Izalaiele, ni jihadi joso ja tale mu njila, ni kia a kuatekesa jinga Jihova, mu ku a kudila." 
Exodus18:9 Jétulu anga u sanguluka mu kuívua o mbote ioso ia bhange Jihova kua Izalaiele, ni kia a kudila ku akua Ijitu." 
Exodus18:10 Jétulu anga u zuela, uixi: A tane-ku Jihova ua mi kudila bhu maku a akua Ijitu, ni bhu maku a Falaó; ua kudila o kifuẋi kiki ku mualala ua akua Ijitu." 
Exodus18:11 O kiki nga kʼijiia kuma Jihova kota, jinzambi joso ndenge; mukonda enhó a di zangeleka ni ku mi tatesa, ua a katula o mahanha." 
Exodus18:12 Jetulu, ukouʼa Mozé, anga u kuata kibhaku kia kuoha, ni jisata ja Nzambi; Alá anga uiza, ni adiakimi oso a Izalaiele, a dia fesa ni ukouʼa Mozé, bhu pholo ia Nzambi." 
Exodus18:13 Anga kibhita-phe kuila, ki kuáki, Mozé u xikama mu fundisa o mundu; mundu uemana ua mu bhongolokela tunde kimene katé ngoloxi." 
Exodus18:14 Ukouʼa Mozé-phe kia zubha ku mu mona ioso iala mu bhanga ku mundu, uixi: Ihi ienhiʼii i uala mu bhanga ku mundu? Ua xikamenaʼhi ubheka ué ni mundu uoso ku ku imanena kiki, tunde kimene katé ngoloxi?" 
Exodus18:15 Mozé anga u ambela ukouʼê, uixi: Mukonda o mundu iú eza kokuami, mu kuibhula kua Nzambi." 
Exodus18:16 Kioso, ene kia kala ni maka, eza kokuami, eme ni ngi fundisa bhu kaẋi ka muthu ni mukuâ, hé ngʼa tangela itumu ia Nzambi." 
Exodus18:17 Ukouʼa Mozé-phe, u mu ambela, uixi: Ki ki uabha, ki uala mu bhanga." 
Exodus18:18 Anda ku ku bhuidisa kia vulu, ni eie muene ni mundu uene uala-nâ; kuma kimbamba kiki kiavulu phala eie ngó, ku ki tena ubheka ué." 
Exodus18:19 Ivua-phe dízui diami, ngi ku bhane kaiula, Nzambi a ku kuatekese, eie u imanena o mundu bhu pholo ia Nzambi, maka mâ uenda ni ku a bheka kua Nzambi," 
Exodus18:20 uenda ni ku a longa o itumu ni ijiia, hé u a edikiza o njila ia tokala kuila, ni kikalakalu kia tokala kubhanga." 
Exodus18:21 Sota mu mundu, oso athu a tena, ala ni kilunji, akua uoma ua Nzambi, akua kidi, ka ẋikina kúdia mangonha, u a tese ku pholo; iá a tambula konda ia jimidi, iá a tambula konda ia jihama, iá a tambula konda ia makuinhi atanu, o iá dikuinhi-dikuinhi;" 
Exodus18:22 ene-phe a kale mu fundisa o mundu iú thembu joso. O maka a makota, a ku bhekela-nâ eie; maka ofele-phe, ene a a tetulule mudiâ; mu kubhanga kienhókio, ua-nda kubhebhulula o kimbamba kié, ene ni a ku kuatekese ku ki ambata." 
Exodus18:23 Se eie u bhanga kienhiki, o Nzambi ue kiene kia ku tuma, eie-phe ua-nda ku laia kiengi, ni mundu uoso iú hádia ua kà bhiẋila ni kutululuka bhu kididi kiâ." 
Exodus18:24 Mozé anga u ívua dízui dia ukouʼê, u bhanga ioso kala kia mu ambela muene." 
Exodus18:25 Mozé anga u sola adiakimi akua kilunji mu axaxi ka Izalaiele ioso, u a ta ku pholo mu tambula konda ia mundu, o iá jimidi, o iá jihama, o iá makuinhi atanu, o iá dikuinhi-dikuinhi." 
Exodus18:26 Anga enhá a kala mu fundisa o mundu mu thembu joso; maka abhonzo a a bheka kua Mozé, maka ofele-phe ene a a tetulula mudiâ." 
Exodus18:27 Mozé anga u di xalesa ni ukouʼê, o muene hé uia ku bhata diê." 
Exodus19:1 Bhu mbeji ia katatu tunde kia tundu anʼa Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu, mu kizuua kia dianga kia mbeji ienhoio, a bhiẋila mu kikangalakata kia Sinai," 
Exodus19:2 Kia zubha kutunda bhu Lefidimi, a bhikila mu kikangalakata kia Sinai, anga a ta kibangu kiâ mu kikangalakata; Izalaiele hé u ta kibangu kiê mu mukáu ua mulundu ua lulama ni ua Sinai." 
Exodus19:3 Mozé anga u banda kua Nzambi, Jihova anga u mu ixana mu kaẋi ka mulundu, uixi: Uambela kiki o dibhata dia Jakobo, u ambela anʼa Izalaiele, kuila:" 
Exodus19:4 Mua mono ioso i nga bhange kua akua Ijitu, enu nga mi ambata kala ku mabhabha a holokoko, eme nga mi bhiẋidisa kokuami." 
Exodus19:5 Kiki-phe, se mu tumaka muene dízui diami, se mu kuata o kikutu kiami, mu kala mu athu ami angene, mua di tungula ku miji ioso; kuma ioso mu ngongo eme muene ia ngi tokala." 
Exodus19:6 Enu-phe mu ngi kala mu utuminu ua jinganga jami, mu mundu uami uazele. Enhá ene o maka u ua kà tangela anʼa Izalaiele." 
Exodus19:7 Mozé anga uiza, uixana adiakimi a kifuẋi, hé u a zuelela o maka oso enhá a mu tumu Jihova o ku a zuela." 
Exodus19:8 O mundu-phe uoso anga etaiela kumoxi, exi: Ioso ia tange Jihova, iene i tua-nda kubhanga. Mozé anga u vutuila Jihova kioso kia zuela o mundu." 
Exodus19:9 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eme nga-nda kuiza kokué; ngi ku tulukila mu dituta dia kitombe, phala o mundu a dʼivile kioso ki ngi ku zuelesa, phala eie ue a ku xikane katé ku hádia ni hádia. Kuma Mozé ua tangela Ngana kioso kia vutula o mundu ue." 
Exodus19:10 Jihova anga uambela Mozé, uixi: Ndeie ku mundu u a zelese, a di bonze lelu ni mungu, a sukule izuatu iâ." 
Exodus19:11 Akale plondo phala kizuua kia katatu; kuma mu kizuua kia katatu Jihova ua-ndu tuluka ku mesu a mundu uoso ku thanduʼa mulundu ua Sinai. 
Exodus19:12 O mundu ua kà a xindila jimbámbe ku mbandu joso, hé u a tangela, uixi: Di langienu! Ki mu bande ku mulundu, mba mu bhiẋila mu jimbambe jê, kuma uoso u tuta ngó mu mixinda ia jimbambe ja mulundu, a kà mu jibha." 
Exodus19:13 Ki bhua kàla dingi lukuaku lu mu kuata, kale a mu bûba ni matadi, mba a mu asa ni mufula; a kale muthu, a kale kibhaku, ka laie dingi; ki mu ivua mbungu ia xiki lujiji, kiene kiua ki mu banda ku mulundu." 
Exodus19:14 Kioso Mozé kia tuluka ku mulundu, iú ueza bhuala o mundu, u bonza o kifuẋi, anga a sukula o izuatu iâ." 
Exodus19:15 Anga u ambela o kifuẋi, uixi: Mu kala polondo, (mu di iudika) kizuua kia katatu; kana ku di kasanesa ni muhatu." 
Exodus19:16 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, mu kizuua kia katatu ki kuandeka ngó kúkia, kua kuata kunumina ni kutelaka jinzanji ku mulundu ni dituta dia kitombe (dia bhiti-ku), ni koloneta ia xiki ni dízui dia suina kiavulu. Katé ni mundu ala mu kibangu a kala mu teketa." 
Exodus19:17 Mozé anga u tubhula o mundu ku kanga dia kibangu, mu kutakana ni Jihova; anga emana bhoxi dia mulundu." 
Exodus19:18 Mulundu uoso ua Sinai anga u kala mu tuka dixi, mukonda Jihova ua tulukila ku thandu diê muʼaxaxe ka túbhia, dixi diê anga di banda kala dixi dia kidijiku kionéne mulundu uoso anga u teketa, uia ni kutunguta kiavulu." 
Exodus19:19 O dízui dia koloneta anga di-ia ni ku di bandekeza o kusuina kuê; Mozé u zuela, Nzambi anga u mu vutuila ni dízui dia lomboloka." 
Exodus19:20 Jihova kia tuluka ku mulundu ua Sinai, u tula bhu thala ia mulundu; Jihova anga u ixana Mozé kubanda bhu thala ia mulundu; Mozé anga u banda." 
Exodus19:21 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Tuluka, u tendelele o mundu, ka bhume ni kusomboka bhu mbámbe, mbé kutalesa Jihova, phala ki bhu kale mundu ua vulu a fua muʼaxaxe kâ." 
Exodus19:22 Ni jinganga ue, ene mu zukama kua Jihova, a di zelese, phala Jihova kʼa kuame ni kalunga ka ku a balukila." 
Exodus19:23 Mozé anga u ambela Jihova, uixi: O mundu ka-nda kutena kubanda ku mulundu ua Sinai; kuma eie ua tendelela kuila: Xinda mbambe ku mulundu, u u kôlese." 
Exodus19:24 Jihova anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ndé, tuluka; phala u bande dingi ni Alá; Jinganga-phe ni mundu uoso ka bhumine kusomboka o mbambe, mu kubanda kua Jihova, phala Muene ka a kuame ni kalunga." 
Exodus19:25 Bhenhobho, Mozé, u tuluka kuala o mundu anga u a tangela imʼiii." 
Exodus20:1 Nzambi anga u zuela maka mosoʼama, uixi:" 
Exodus20:2 Eme Jihova, Nzambi ié, nga ku katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu, mu dibhata dia ubhika." 
Exodus20:3 Kana kukala ni nzambi jengi bhu pholo iami. 
Exodus20:4 Kana ku di iudikila kiteka kiósonge, né kidifanganu kioso kia kima ki kala mu diulu ku thandu, mba mu ngongo bhoxi, mba mu menha kʼoxi a mavu." 
Exodus20:5 Kana ku i fukamena, kana ku i bheza; kuma eme Jihova, Nzambi ié, ngʼene ngi Nzambi ia difuba; ana ngʼa a bhesa kaxtiku mu ituxi ia jitata, katé ku mululu ni ku muláula ua iá a ngi zemba," 
Exodus20:6 ngi kuatela henda katé ku midi ia miji ua iâ a ngi zola anga aia ni kualuka ijiia iami. 
Exodus20:7 Kana kutumbula dijina dia Jihova, Nzambi ié, mu kingoho; mukonda kua Jihova kà kamba kuêla uoso u tumbula o dijina diê mu kingoho." 
Exodus20:8 Aiuka kizuua kia sabhalu, nda u ki kôlese." 
Exodus20:9 Kalakala mu izuua i samanu, u zubhe kikalakalu kiê kioso." 
Exodus20:10 Maji o kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe, kia sabhalu ia ngene ia Jihova Nzambi ié; mu kizuuʼiki kana kubhanga-mu kikalakalu kioso-kioso, né eʼmuene, mba monʼê ua diiala mba ua muhatu, né selevende ié ia diiala mba ia muhatu, né ibhaku ié, né musonhi ua ku tula mu lumbu lué;" 
Exodus20:11 kuma mu izuua isamanu muene mua iudika Jihova o diulu ni ixi, ni kalunga, ni ima ioso iala-mu, anga unhoha kia kasambuadi; kia bhangesa Jihova kubenzela o kizuua kia sabhalu, iu ua ki kôlesa." 
Exodus20:12 Bhana ujitu kua tatʼenu ni mamʼenu, phala izuua ié i vule, mʼoxi i ku bhana Jihova, Nzambi ié." 
Exodus20:13 Kana kujibha mukuenu. 
Exodus20:14 Kana kuta phanda. 
Exodus20:15 Kana kunhana. 
Exodus20:16 Kana kutatela mukuenu umbangi ua makutu mu kima ka ki bhange. 
Exodus20:17 Kana kukala ni luimbi lua inzo ia mukuenu, kana kukala ni luimbi lua muhatu a mukuenu, né mukalakadi uê ua diiala mba ua muhatu, né ngombe iê mba bulu iê, né kima kioso-kioso kiangene kia mukuenu." 
Exodus20:18 Mundu uoso anga evua inuminu, a mono nzaji kutelaka, ni dízui a dʼivu dia koloneta, ni mulundu a u mono uala kuxongota dixi; mundu-phe kia mono ima iii a teketa, anga a bholoka, emanena ngó mu kanga." 
Exodus20:19 Anga ambela Mozé, exi: U tu zuelesa eie, tu ku ivue; kana dingi Nzambi ku tu zuelesa, phala ki tu fue." 
Exodus20:20 Mozé anga u ambela mundu, uixi: Kana kukala ni uoma; kuma Nzambi ueza ku mi lola, phala uoma uê u kale bhu pholo ienu, phala ki mu te ituxi." 
Exodus20:21 O mundu anga emana dikanga, Mozé ngó ua zukama ku kitombe kia xiti, bhuala Nzambi." 
Exodus20:22 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Ambela anʼa Izalaiele, kuma: Enu mua ki mono muene kuila nga mi zuelesa tunde mu diulu mu ngala." 
Exodus20:23 Ki mu kale-phe ni nzambi jengi hé mu ngi bunda na-ju kumoxi; kana ku di iudikila nzambi ja phalata, mba nzambi ja ulu." 
Exodus20:24 U ngi tungila kalatódio ka mavu, anga u ngi satela ku thandu diê; o sata jê ja kuoha, ni sata ja paze, ni ja jimbudi jé, ni ja jingombe. Bhuoso bhu kididi bhu ngi bhangesa dijina diami kufumanena-bhu, ngi ku sanga bhenhobho, anga ngi ku bhana kuzediua." 
Exodus20:25 Se uambe ku ngi tungila kalatódio ka matadi, a kale matadi a ngoho; kuma se ua a bhitisa felu, ua ngi fukuila na-ku." 
Exodus20:26 Kana kubandela ku matala ku kalatódio kami, phala o tuẋi ié ki i di dʼikize kuenhoko." 
Exodus21:1 O jiji jene o jingonge ji ua kà a tudila. 
Exodus21:2 Se u sumba mubhika ua Hebeleu, u ku bhikila mivu isamanu; maji o mu muvu ua kasambuadi-phe a tambule ufolo, u mu eha sé ku mu xinda kima." 
Exodus21:3 Hé ua bokuene ubheka uê, a tunde ubheka uê; se ua sakanene kiá, a tunde kumoxi ni muhatuʼê." 
Exodus21:4 Hé ngana iê muene ua mu bhana muhatu, iú ua mu vualela anʼa mala ni anʼa ahatu, muhatu ni ana, angene a ngana iê, muene u tunda ubheka uê." 
Exodus21:5 Mubhika-phe kia kèla kuma ngana iami nga mu zolo, ni muhatuʼami, ni ana, nguami kutambula ufolo," 
Exodus21:6 ngana iê-phe u mu bheka bhu pholo ia afundixi, anga u mu bhiẋidisa ku dibhitu, mba ku mikangalu ia dibhitu, ngana iê bhenhobho a mu kubule dítui ni sovela; u kala-phe kiá mubhika katé bhu ufuilu." 
Exodus21:7 Hé bhu kala diiala u sumbisa monʼê ua muhatu mu kala mubhika, ió-phe ka tunde dingi kala ki tunda abhika a mala." 
Exodus21:8 O ki kala ngana iê uambele ku mu lumba ukama ka mu uabhela dingi, ndandu jê a mu kule; maji katena ku mu sumbisa ku athu engi, kila kala ua mu tundu ufe." 
Exodus21:9 Hé ua mu sumbuila monʼê-phe ua diiala, ki kale u mu bhanga kala kia fuama kubhanga anʼê muene a ahatu." 
Exodus21:10 Hé uedi u sakana muhatu ua mukuá, iú-phe ni kúdia kuê, ni kuzuata, ni ifua ia tokala mu kusakana ka mu tebhunuina-iu." 
Exodus21:11 Hé u kamba ku mu bhanga ima itatu ioso iii, kikale-phe u mu eha ngoho sé kitadi." 
Exodus21:12 Se muthu u kuama mukuá katé kia fua, ió-phe muthu ua ku mu jibha ue, sé kufula." 
Exodus21:13 Hé ka kexi ku mu kanena ni ku mu batamena, ka ki bhange kiluelu, Nzambi iu ua ki bhitisa bhu makuʼê, ngi ku idikiza-phe kididi kuoso ku a lengela." 
Exodus21:14 Maji o muthu-phe se u kanena mukuâ ni kubhuma, anga u mu tela masunga, ni a mu jibhe, muthu ió né bhu kalatódio kami mu mu katula-bhu muene phala a fue ue." 
Exodus21:15 Uoso u kuama phaiʼiâ mba manhiʼâ, a mu jibha sè kufula." 
Exodus21:16 Uoso u nhana muthu hé u mu sumbisa, mba a mu kuata-nê bhu maku, a mu jibhe sè kufula." 
Exodus21:17 Uoso u xinga jindaka kua phaiʼâ, mba manhiʼâ, a mu jibhe sè kufula." 
Exodus21:18 Hé athu a kala mu zoka, o iú u beta mukuâ ni ditadi, mba home, maji ka fu, hé u kala ngó mu katela bhu hama," 
Exodus21:19 hinu kia balumuka, nʼa nhungu bhu kanga ni mbangala ié, iú-phe uoso ua mu beta ua jituka kiá mu mulonga; kikale ngó u mu futa thembu iê ia bhange bhoxi anga u mu sasa muene katé kieluka kiambote." 
Exodus21:20 Se muthu u beta mubhikʼê ua diiala mba ua muhatu, ni mbangala, mubhika nʼa fuila ku kibetu, a mu bhese kaxtiku sè kufula." 
Exodus21:21 Maji-phe se o mubhika u bhanga kiá kizuua kimoxi mba iiadi ni muenhu, ngana iê ka mu bhe dingi kaxtiku; kuma ua mu sumbu mu kitadi kiê." 
Exodus21:22 Hé bhu kala mala ala mu zoka, anga a kuama muhatu uala mu mikutu iiadi, anga ki mu bhangesa kuseluka mona, maji muene-ku ka nemana ni kima, a mu bhakesa muene mulonga, u bhana kioso kia mu xindi diiala uoso uavu muhatuʼê, u bhaka kala kia mu tetuluila adiakimi." 
Exodus21:23 Maji se bhu kala kalunga ni kunemana, kuabhu-phe, a bhane kiá muenhu mu muenhu," 
Exodus21:24 diesu mu diesu, dizu mu dizu, lukualu mu lukuaku, kinama mu kinama," 
Exodus21:25 kúbhia mu kúbhia, fidila mu fidila, kutua mu kutua." 
Exodus21:26 Se muthu u beta diesu dia mubhikʼê ua diiala, mba ua muhatu, diesu anga difua, ki kale u mu eha kiá ku ufuolo mukonda dia diesu die." 
Exodus21:27 Hé u sokola dizu dia mubhikʼê ua diiala mba ua muhatu, ki kale u mu eha kiá nʼaii ku ufuôlo mukonda dia dizu diê." 
Exodus21:28 Se bhu kala ngombe i lua diiala mba muhatu, muthu nʼa fue, ngombe mu i bûba ni matadi, ni xitu iê kana ku i dia; maji mukua ngombe muene muanʼuê, ka kala ni kituxi." 
Exodus21:29 Maji se a mu bhele kiá umbangi, o muene-phe ka i kuika, ií ia jibha muthu mba diiala mba muhatu, ngombe mu i bûba ni matadi, ni muene mukua ngombe mu mu jibha." 
Exodus21:30 Hé a mu xinda-phe kikúlu kia ku kudikula, mu kukula-phe muenhu uê kioso kia mu xindi kiene kia bhaka." 
Exodus21:31 Ngombe se ialu monʼa diiala mba monʼa muhatu, mu mu bhanga kala ki nga batulʼiki." 
Exodus21:32 Ngombe hé ialu mubhika ua diiala mba ua muhatu, ngana iê a mu bhane makuinhi atatu a xikulu ia phalata, o ngombe mu i bûba ni matadi." 
Exodus21:33 Se muthu u jikula, mba u kanda dikungu, anga u kamba ku di xita, ngombe mba bulu anga i fua mu dikungu," 
Exodus21:34 muthu ua kande o dikungu diê, u futa kitadi mu kibhaku kia mukuâ, maji o kibhaku kiafu ki kale kiá kia mukua dikungu." 
Exodus21:35 Se bhu kala ngombe i lua ngombe iangene ia mukuâ, anga i fua, ki kale o ngombe ia muenhu a i sumbisa, o kitadi a uana ngó mbambe o zulu; ni ngombe iafu, a i sesa." 
Exodus21:36 O ki kala ngombe ia hôlua, a kʼijiia kuma iene kúlua kiá okulu, o muene mukua ngombe iê ka i kuika, u futa-phe ngombe mu ngombe sé kufula, o ngombe iafu i kala iê." 
Exodus22:1 Hé muthu u nhana ngombe mba mbudi, nʼa i jibha, mba u i sumbisa, ngombe u i futa ngombe jitanu, o mbudi u i futa mbudi jiuana." 
Exodus22:2 Se muii a mu kuata uala kubula inzu ia ngene, anga a mu kuama hé u fua, ki bhu kala mulonga ua manhinga kua iú ua kuamʼô, mukonda diê." 
Exodus22:3 Maji-phe se o dikumbi dia bande kiá, ki kala kiá mulonga ua manhinga; ki bhinga-phe kiá o muii u futa ioso ia nhana, se kala ni kima kia futa na-kiu, a mu sumbisa mukonda dia uíii uê." 
Exodus22:4 Se kimbamba kia nhana a mu kuata na-kiu, ki kié hanji ni muenhu uê, ki kale ngombe, mba bulu, mba mbudi, u i futa mu luiadi." 
Exodus22:5 Se muthu u diuisa díbhia, mba kithádi kia mivide, mukonda uehela kibhaku kiê ni ki die mu díbhia dia mukuâ, ku idima iê muene, ni ku mivide iê muene, ioso ia beta kuuabha, kuene kua katula mu futa idima ia mukuâ ia diua." 
Exodus22:6 Se túbhia tua uama, anga tu kuata mu isaku ia sakela ku díbhia, ita ia tiliku anga i bhia, mba jimbutu joso kiluua a ji muna, mba díbhia dioso di bhia, uoso ua uika túbhia u futa muene ioso iabhi." 
Exodus22:7 Se muthu u bhakesa kua mukuâ, mba kitadi, mba imbamba ioso-ioso, anga a ki nhana mʼonzo ia iú ua bhake, o muii se a mu kuata u futa mu luiadi." 
Exodus22:8 Se muii ka mu kuata, mukuaʼnzo iê ki kale a mu bheka ku afundixi phala kuibhula kiambote se ua kuata lukuaku luê mu imbamba iangene ia mukuá." 
Exodus22:9 Se maka oso-oso a milonga ia kufika uiii, ki kale ngombe, ki kale bulu, ki kale mbudi, ki kale kizuatu, ki kale kima kioso kia jimbila, nganji anga u zuela, uixi: Kiki kimbamba kiami, ene oso kiiadi kiâ eza ni maka mâ ku afundixi; uoso-phe a mu êlesa kuala afundixi u futa mu luiadi kua mukuá." 
Exodus22:10 Se muthu u vuisa mukuá bulu, mba ngombe, mba mbudi, mba kibhaku kioso-kioso, anga ki fua, mba a ki kuama, mba ki jimbila sé muthu ku ki mona," 
Exodus22:11 bhu kaẋi kâ bhu bhita mulôko ua Jihova, se kidi kiene muene ka kuata-ku ni lukuaku luê ku imbamba iangene ia mukuá; mukua imbamba iê-phe ki kale u ẋikina, ka tena ku mu futisa kimbamba kia jimbila." 
Exodus22:12 Maji se a mu nhana-kiu ki kale u futa mukuâ o kimbamba kiê. 
Exodus22:13 Se-phe kia diua ku iama, a bheke o kisasu kioso kia subhuka-ku, mu umbangi; kia diua ka tena ku mu futisa-kiu." 
Exodus22:14 Se muthu u sobha kibhaku kua mukuá o ku aia anga a ki kuama mba kia fu, o mukua kiê kala-bhu, kikale a mu futa-kiu." 
Exodus22:15 Se mukua kiê iú bhobho, ka mu futisa-kiu dingi; se kiejile mu kunganhala, kifua ku ufunu, o kitadi kioso kia nganhala kia soko." 
Exodus22:16 Se diiala u bhomba kilumba, kiluua a mu ta iambu, anga u zeka-nê, ki kale u mu lemba kiá, a kale muhatuʼê." 
Exodus22:17 Maji se o phaʼiâ nguê muene ku mu bhana-ne, kiene kimoxi u bhana kitadi kala ki ene kulemba ilumba." 
Exodus22:18 Muloji kana ku mu ehela kulaia. 
Exodus22:19 Uoso u zeka ni kiama muthu ua ku mu jibha, sè kufula." 
Exodus22:20 Uoso u satela nzambi iengi, ki kua Jihova, kana, ió muthu ua ku mu jibha muene." 
Exodus22:21 Nzuángiza kana ku mu bhanga phulu, kana ku mu bhikisa; kuma enu uenu mua kexile mu jinzuángiza mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Exodus22:22 Kana kutatesa mutudi (ua muhatu) mba hukunhu. (file). 
Exodus22:23 O ki kala-phe u ki bhanga o ku a tatesa, anga ene a di kola kokuami, eme-phe ngʼa evua muene o kudikola kuâ;" 
Exodus22:24 o ki uama o njinda iami, ngi mi jibha muene ku xibhata; ahatu enu a kà xala atudi, o anʼenu a kà xala jihukunhu."
