Numbers1:18 Anga a bhongolola kilômbo kioso, a di tanga mísala iâ, mu kuvuadiua kuâ, mu mabhata ma jitata jâ, a di soneka majina, oso a bhiẋila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, anga a alula mútue ni mútue, mu kizuua kia dianga ku mbeje ia kaiadi." 
Numbers1:19 Kala kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé. Kiene kia alula mu kikangalakata kia Sinai. 
Numbers1:20 Anʼa Lubene, monʼa Izalaiele ua phande-kumbi, miji iâ, mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina, ku a alula ku mútue-mútue, mala a bhiẋila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:21 a alula ku muiji ua Lubene, makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi jisamanu, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers1:22 Anʼa Ximinhá, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina, a a xindi ku mítue-mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:23 a a soneka ku muiji ua Ximinhá, makuinhi atanu a midi, ni divua dia midi, ni hama jitatu." 
Numbers1:24 Anʼa Ngade, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mu mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mútue ni mútue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:25 a a soneka ku muiji ua Ngade, makuinhi auana a midi ni midi jitanu, ni hama jisamanu, ni makuinhi atanu." 
Numbers1:26 Anʼa Juda, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mu mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a alula ku mútue-mútue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:27 a a soneka ku muiji ua Juda, makuinhi sambuadi a midi ni midi jiuana ni hama jisamanu." 
Numbers1:28 Anʼa Isakale, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:29 a a soneka ku muiji ua Isakale, makuinhi atanu a midi, ni midi jiuana, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers1:30 Anʼa Nzebulone, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:31 a a soneka ku muiji ua Nzebulone, makuinhi atanu a midi, ni sambuadi dia midi ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers1:32 Anʼa Zuze, moxi ku anʼa Ifalaimi, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:33 a a soneka ku muiji ua Ifalaíme, makuinhi auana a midi, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers1:34 Anʼa Manasa, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:35 a a soneka ku muiji ua Manasa, makuinhi atatu a midi, ni midi jiiadi, ni hama jiiadi." 
Numbers1:36 Anʼa Bejamí, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:37 a a soneka ku muiji ua Bejamí, makuinhi atatu a midi, ni midi jitanu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers1:38 Anʼa Dane, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:39 a a soneka ku muiji ua Dane, makuinhi asamanu a midi, ni midi jiiadi, ni hama sambuadi." 
Numbers1:40 Anʼa Asele, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku a xinda mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:41 a a soneka ku muiji ua Asele, makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi imoxi, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers1:42 Anʼa Nafitali, miji iâ mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ, ku majina-majina ku alula mítue, mala a bhikila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:43 a a soneka ku muiji ua Nafitali, makuinhi atanu a midi, ni midi jitatu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers1:44 Enʼiá a alula kuala Mozé ni Alá kumoxi ni ilamba ia Izalaiele, kuinhi dia muthu ni kiiadi, kala muthu uala ku pholo ia dibhata dia jitata jê." 
Numbers1:45 Kala kiki ene oso a a soneka ku anʼa Izalaiele, ku mabhata ma jitata jâ, mala oso a bhiẋila mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba a somboka-mu kiá, makuenze oso mua Izalaiele a tena kuia ku ita," 
Numbers1:46 dialuilu dia ene oso a a soneka, a tena hama jisamanu ja midi, ni midi jitatu, ni hama jitanu, ni makuinhi atanu." 
Numbers1:47 Anʼa Levi-phe, mu muiji ua jitata jâ, ka a te-mu kioso ki alula." 
Numbers1:48 Kuma Jihova ua ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers1:49 Muiji ua Levi kana ngó ku a ta mu dialuilu, kana ku a xinda kumoxi ni anʼa Izalaiele;" 
Numbers1:50 akua Levi-phe u a tungula, a kuate kulanga balaka ia umbangi, ni itutu iê ioso ni ima ioso ia tokala-ku; ene ambata o balaka ni itutu iê ioso; ene a i kalakela, mu ta kibangu ene a bhaka balaka mu kaẋi." 
Numbers1:51 O balaka né ia bhingi kuenda, ene akua Levi a i sokomona; o bhua bhingi ku imika dingi, ene akua Levi a i sokeka; hé bhueza muthu uengi ki kale a mu jibha." 
Numbers1:52 Anʼa Izalaiele mu kutula, a tule kala muthu mu kibangu kiê mua tokala, kala muthu bhu bandela ia kibuka kiê." 
Numbers1:53 Akua Levi-phe kibangu kiâ ki kondoloka, ki bhaka o balaka ia umbangi mu kaẋi, mbebhu ki ku kale njinda ku thandu dia kilômbo kia anʼa Izalaiele; kienhiki, akua Levi ene a kala ni muanu ua kulanga balaka ia umbangi." 
Numbers1:54 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhanga kienhiki; kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, kiene muene kia bhange." 
Numbers2:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers2:2 Anʼa Izalaiele ki a ta kibangu, ene oso a tule muthu uoso bhu mvela iê, bhuala o kijimbuete kia dibhata dia jitata jê; ibangu iâ i bhita mu kanga dia balaka ia kutakanena, kifua a i bhaka bhu kaẋi." 
Numbers2:3 Ku mbandu ia thunda ku tundila dikumbi, kuene ku kala mvela ia kibangu kia Juda, ni ibhuka iê; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Juda, muene Nasono dia Aminadaba." 
Numbers2:4 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi sambuadi a midi, ni midi jiuana, ni hama jisamanu." 
Numbers2:5 A di zukama-nê o muiji ua Isakale; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Isakale, muene Netanaiele dia Zuuale." 
Numbers2:6 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi atanu a midi, ni midi jiuana, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers2:7 Ku kaiela-phe muiji ua Nzebulone; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Nzebulone, Eliiaba dia Helone." 
Numbers2:8 Kilombo kiê, kia a soneka a tena makuinhi atanu a midi, ni sambuadi dia midi, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers2:9 Ene oso, a a soneka, a tokala ku kibangu kia Juda, a tena hama ia midi, ni makuinhi nake a midi, ni midi jisamanu, ni hama jiuana, mu ibuka iâ. Mu kukatuka, ene a tuamena ku pholo." 
Numbers2:10 Ku mbandu ia sulu, kuene ku kala mvela is kibangu kia Lubene, mu mu ibuka iâ; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Lubene, muene Elizule dia Xedele." 
Numbers2:11 Kilombo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi jisamanu, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers2:12 A di zukama-nê o muiji ua Ximinhá; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Ximinhá, Xelumiiele dia Nzudixadai." 
Numbers2:13 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi atanu a midi, ni divua dia midi, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers2:14 Kua ene ku kaiela ue muiji ua Ngade; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Ngade, Eliiazafu dia Leuele." 
Numbers2:15 O kilombo kiê, kia a soneka a tena makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi jitanu, ni hama jisamanu, ni makuinhi atanu." 
Numbers2:16 Ene oso, a a soneka, a tokala ku kibangu kia Lubene, a tena hama ia midi, ni makuinhi atanu a midi, ni midi imoxi, ni hama jiuana, ni makuinhi atanu, mu ibhuka iâ. Mu kukatuka, ene kadi, a kaiela ku akuâ a tuamenena." 
Numbers2:17 Enhá kioso kia katuka, ku kaiela kiá balaka ia kutakanena, ni kibuka kia akua Levi mu kaẋi ka ibuka iamukuâ; ni mu kuenda ni mu kutula ene oso a kala mu ididi iâ, a kala bhua moxi ni mabandela mâ." 
Numbers2:18 Ku mbandu ia luiji, kuene ku kala mvela ia kibangu kia Ifalaime, ni kibuka kiê; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Ifalaimi, muene Elixama dia Amihudi." 
Numbers2:19 Kilombo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi auana a midi, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers2:20 A di zukama-nê o muiji ua Manasa; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Manasa, Ngamadiiele dia Pedazule." 
Numbers2:21 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka a tena makuinhi atatu a midi, ni midi jiiadi, ni hama jiiadi." 
Numbers2:22 Ku kaiela ue o muiji ua Bejamí; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Bejamí, muene Abidani monʼa Ngidiione." 
Numbers2:23 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi atatu a midi, ni midi jitanu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers2:24 Ene oso, a a soneka, a tokala ku kibangu kia Ifalaimi, a tena hama ia midi, ni nake dia midi, ni hama. Mu kukatuka, ene tatu, a kaiela ku akuâ." 
Numbers2:25 Ku mbandu ia kusuku, kuene ku kala mvela ia kibangu kia Dane, ni ibuka iê; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Dane, muene Ahiiezele dia Amixadai." 
Numbers2:26 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi asamanu a midi, ni midi jiiadi, ni hama sambuadi." 
Numbers2:27 A di zukama-nê o muiji ua Asele; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Asele, muene Pajiiele dia Okolane." 
Numbers2:28 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi imoxi, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers2:29 Ku kaiela ue ni muiji ua Nafitali; kilamba-phe kia anʼa Nafitali, muene Ahila dia Inane." 
Numbers2:30 Kilômbo kiê, kia a soneka, a tena makuinhi atanu a midi, ni midi jitatu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers2:31 Ene oso, a a soneka, a tokala ku kibangu kia Dane, a tena hama ia midi, ni makuinhi atanu a midi, ni sambuadi dia midi, ni hama jisamanu. Mu kukatuka, ene uana, a sukidila ku dima." 
Numbers2:32 Enhá, ene a a soneka ku anʼa Izalaiele ku mabhata ma jitata jâ; a alula mu ibangu ku ibuka iâ, kifua hama jisamanu ja jimidi, ni midi jitatu, ni hama jitanu ni makuinui atanu." 
Numbers2:33 Akua Levi-phe ka a te-mu, mu kosoneka kuenʼiuku kua anʼa Izalaiele, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers2:34 Kiene kia bhange anʼa Izalaielʼiki, kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, kiene kia te ibangu bhu jimvela jâ, kiene ue kia katuka jinga mu kuenda, ene oso a di sokesa mu kuvuadiua kuâ, mu mabhata ma jitata jâ." 
Numbers3:1 Ingo ia vumu ienʼiii ia Alá ni Mozé, kizuua kia zuela Jihova ni Mozé mu mulundu ua Sinai." 
Numbers3:2 Majina ma anʼa Alá enhá: Nadabe, muene phande-kumbi, ni Abihu, ni Eliiazale, ni Itamale." 
Numbers3:3 Enhá ene o majina ma anʼa Alá a mala, ene a undile ni ku a ta maji, anga maku mâ ma kala mòlumbe mu ku bhanga kikalakalu kia unganga." 
Numbers3:4 Nadabe ni Abihu anga a fuila bhu pholo ia Jihova, kioso kia bhana tubhia tuengi kua Jihova mu kikangalakata kia Sinai, ene oso-phe ka xi mona; Eliiazale ni Itamale anga a bhikila ku unganga ku pholo ia tatʼâ Alá." 
Numbers3:5 Jihova anga u zuela ni Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers3:6 Muiji ua Levi eze bhua zukama, ua bheka bhu pholo ia nganga Alá, ende ni ku mu kalakela." 
Numbers3:7 Aie ni ku mu langidila muene, a langidile ue kilômbo kioso, bhu kanga dia balaka ia kutakanena, ende ni kubhanga kikalakalu kioso kia balaka." 
Numbers3:8 A kale ni muanu ua kulangidila o itutu ioso ia balaka ia kutakanena, ene a langidila anʼa Izalaiele, mu ku bhanga kikalakalu kia balaka." 
Numbers3:9 Jilevita kifua ua bhana kua Alá, ni ku anʼê; Ene a di tungula mu anʼa Izalaiele mu ku a bhana kua muene." 
Numbers3:10 Eie u tungula Alá ni anʼê, a xikamena kiá unganga uâ uene; muthu uengi uiza-bhu u kala muthu ua ku mu jibha." 
Numbers3:11 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers3:12 Ua mono, eme nga solo jilevita muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele, bhu kididi kia ana a phande-kumbi, a tuama kujikula divumu muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele; Jilevita a kale ami-eme;" 
Numbers3:13 kuma ana oso a phande-kumbi a di bhange ami-eme; tundé kizuua ki nga beta ana oso a phande-kumbi mʼoxi ia Ijitu, nga di lumbila ana oso a pande-kumbi mua Izalaiele, ni ku athu ni ku ibhaku; a di bhange kiá ami-eme, eme ngi Jihova." 
Numbers3:14 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé mu kikangalakata kia Sinai, uixi:" 
Numbers3:15 Alulenu anʼa Levi, ku mabhata ma jitata jâ ni mu kuvuadiua kuâ; anʼoso a mala tundé iú uala ngó mu mbeji imoxi katé ku ukota, u a xinda." 
Numbers3:16 Mozé anga ua xinda mu kizuelu kia Jihova, kala kia mu tumu." 
Numbers3:17 Anʼa Levi a mala majina mâ iâ: Ngelexone, ni Kohate, ni Meladi." 
Numbers3:18 Anʼa Ngelexone majina mâ: Libini ni Ximei mu kuvuadiua kuâ. 
Numbers3:19 Anʼa Kohate a mala, mu kuvuadiua kuâ: Analá, ni Isahale, ni Hebolone, ni Uziiele." 
Numbers3:20 Anʼa Meladi a mala, mu kuvuadiua kuâ: Mahali ni Muxi. Kuku kuene kuvuadiua kua Jilevita ku mabhata ma jitata jâ." 
Numbers3:21 Kua Ngelexone kuene kua tundu akua Libini ni akua Ximei; mene o mabhata ma anʼa Ngelexone. 
Numbers3:22 Kia a soneka mala oso tundé iú uala mu mbeji imoxi tulé ku makota, mua tundu sambuadi dia midi ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers3:23 Mabhata ma anʼa Ngelexone a ta kibangu kiâ ku dima dia balaka ku mbandu ia luiji. 
Numbers3:24 Kilamba-phe kia dibhata dia tata dia anʼa Ngelexone, muene Eliiazafu dia Laiele." 
Numbers3:25 Kimbamba kia anʼa Ngelexone, mu kuambata balaka, o jikulutina ja balaka, ni jithanga jê, ni mavunga ni dibeka dia kuxita bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers3:26 Ni jikultina ja lumbu, ni dibeka dia kuxita bhu muelu ua lumbu, muala balaka ni kalatódio, ni mikolo iê ioso ia tokala-ku." 
Numbers3:27 Kua Kohate kuene kua tundu akua Analá, ni akua Izahale, ni akua Hebolone, ni akua Uziiele; mene o mabhata ma anʼa Kohate." 
Numbers3:28 Kia a bhange dialuilu mala oso, tundé iú uala mu mbeji imoxi katé ku makota, mua tundu nake dia midi ni hama jisamanu, phala kutambula konda ia dibhezelu." 
Numbers3:29 Mabha ma anʼa Kohate a ta kibangu kiâ ku mbandu ia sulu ia balaka. 
Numbers3:30 Kilamba-phe kia dibhata dia katata dia anʼa Kohate, muene Elizafane dia Uziiele." 
Numbers3:31 Kimbamba kiâ o álaka, ni meza, ni kaxtisale, ni jikalatódio, ni imbamba ioso iene mu bhanga na-iu kikalakalu kia dibhezelu, ni dibeka dia kibatulu ni ima ioso ia tokala-ku." 
Numbers3:32 Eliiazale monʼa Alá muene u kala kilamba u tumina ilamba ioso ia Jilevita, muene uala ku pholo ia iá a tambula konda ia dibhezelu." 
Numbers3:33 Kua Meladi kuene kua tundu akua Mahali ni akua Muxi; mene o mabhata ma anʼa Meladi. 
Numbers3:34 Kia a soneka mala oso, tundé iú uala ngó mu mbeji imoxi katé ku makota, mua tundu midi jisamanu ni hama jiiadi." 
Numbers3:35 Kilamba-phe kia dibhata dia tata dia anʼa Meladi, muene Nzudiiele dia Abihaíle; kibangu kiâ a ki ta ku mbandu ia kusuku ia balaka." 
Numbers3:36 Kimbamba kia bhana ku anʼa Meladi kienhiki: O jingunji ja balaka, ni mikangala iê, ni jiphiladi jê, ni ibaka iê, ni ima ioso ia tokala ku kikalakalu kiê." 
Numbers3:37 Ni jiphiladi ja lumbu lua kondoloka, ni ibaka iê, ni jiphapha jê, ni mikolo." 
Numbers3:38 A ta kibangu kiâ bhu pholo ia balaka, ku mbandu ia thunda, ene a Mozé, ni Alá ni anʼâ, a langidila dibhezelu, ni ima ioso i bhanga anʼa Izalaiele mu kubheza; muthu uengi uiza-bhu u kala muthu ua ku mu jibha." 
Numbers3:39 Ene oso a a soneka ku Jilevita, a alula kuala Mozé ni Alá kala kia a tumu Jihova, mu mabhata mâ, mala oso tundé iú uala ngó mu mbeji imoxi katé ku makota, ala makuinhi aiadi a midi, ni midi jiiadi." 
Numbers3:40 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Alula ana oso a phande-kumbi a mala mu Izalaiele, tundé iú uala mu mbeji imoxi katé ku makota, u kuate dialuilu dia majina mâ." 
Numbers3:41 Eme-phe u ngi kuatela Jilevita, eme ngi Jihova, a kale ami bhu kididi kia ana a phande-kumbi oso mu Izalaiele; ni ibhaku ia Jilevita i kale iami bhu kididi kia anʼa ibhaku oso a dianga ku a vuala mu Izalaiele ioso." 
Numbers3:42 Mozé anga u soneka kala kia tumu Jihova, ana oso a phande-kumbi ku ana oso a Izalaiele." 
Numbers3:43 Ana oso a mala ku majina mâ, tundé kua iú uala ngó mu mbeji imoxi tulé ku makota, mua tundu makuinhi aiadi a midi, ni midi jiiadi, ni hama jiiadi, ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kitatu." 
Numbers3:44 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers3:45 Kuata Jilevita bhu kididi kia ana a phande-kumbi mu anʼa Izalaiele oso, ni ibhaku ia Jilevita bhu kididi kia ibhaku ia ene; Jilevita-phe a kale ami, eme ngi Jihova." 
Numbers3:46 Kuma ana phande-kumbi ala kota mu kuvula, Jilevita ndenge, o hama jiiadi ja mona ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kitatu, a di te-ku a bhingi ku a kula." 
Numbers3:47 Kala mútue u tambula xikulu jitanu, xikulu ia dibhezelu ia bhana, kuma xikulu i kala ni makuinhi aiadi a jela." 
Numbers3:48 O kitadi-phe kia ku di kula, oso a di te-ku mudiâ, u ki bhana Alá ni anʼê." 
Numbers3:49 Mozé anga u tambula kitadi kia ku di kula, kua iá oso a di te-ku ka a kula kuala Jilevita;" 
Numbers3:50 ua ki tambula ku ana a phande-kumbi ku anʼa Izalaiele, kia tena midi ia xikulu, ni hama jitatu, ni makuinhi asamanu, ni xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu;" 
Numbers3:51 kitadʼiki, kia ku di kula, Mozé anga u ki bhana Alá ni anʼê, mu kizuelu kia Jihova, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers4:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers4:2 Bhanga dialuilu dia anʼa Kohate muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Levi, mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ," 
Numbers4:3 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé mu makuinhi atanu a muvu, oso a fuama ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers4:4 Kikalakalu-phe kia anʼa Kohate kienhiki mu balaka ia kutakanena, ku imbamba ikôla kinène." 
Numbers4:5 O kilombo hé kia-ndu katuka mu kuenda, Alá ni anʼê a tuama kubokona, a tulula dibeka dia kibatulu, a di futa ku álaka ia umbangi;" 
Numbers4:6 a ta-ku dingi divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, o ku thandu a vungina-ku thanga ia azulu ioso, hé a ta-ku o mikambu iê." 
Numbers4:7 O ku meza a kilumbu kuala o jimbolo ja sata, a futa-ku ue thanga ia azulu, a ta ku thandu diê malonga ni jingutu ni jímbia ni jinganza ja kulunduluila; ni mbolo iabhingi ki iene kukamba dingi, kuene ku i kala;" 
Numbers4:8 anga a futa-ku thanga ia husu, ni divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, hé a ta-ku ni mikambu iê." 
Numbers4:9 A kuata ue thanga ia azulu a futa ku kaxtisale ka dimuikinu, ni jikandeia jê, ni itokelu ia kutoka na-iu, ni ijiminu, ni itutu ia maji, ioso ia tokala ku kikalakalu kiê;" 
Numbers4:10 tudilu diê ni imbamba iê ioso a i ta mu divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, anga a i ta ku mikambu." 
Numbers4:11 Ku kalatódio ka ulu ue a futa-ku thanga ia azulu, a ta ni divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, hé a ta-ku ni mikambu iê;" 
Numbers4:12 imbamba ioso ue ia kikalakalu, iene kukalakela na-iu mu dibhezelu, a dianga ku i ta mu thanga ia azulu, a i ta dingi divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, hé a i ta mikambu ia kuambatela." 
Numbers4:13 Kalatódio a ka komba hanji o uthôkua uê, a ka futa thanga ia hundu;" 
Numbers4:14 a ta ku thandu diê imbamba iê ioso iene kukalakela na-iu ku kalatódio, ni iomuenu ia kuambatela túbhia, ni jingouele ja kukuata xitu, ni jipá ni jimbasinha, imbamba iê ioso kiá; anga a ta-ku divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, hé a ta-ku ni mikambu iê." 
Numbers4:15 Kioso Alá ni anʼê kia kà zubha kuvunga ku imbamba ioso ia dibhezelu, kilombo kuila kia-nda kukatuka kiá, kiene kiua kiʼza anʼa Kohate mu ku i zangula; ima iene ikôla-phe ka i kuate ni maku, phala ka fue. Ima iii iene kimbamba kia anʼa Kohate ku balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers4:16 Kimbamba kia Eliiazale dia Alá, nganga, o maji a dimuikinu, ni uasu ua uabha dizumba, ni mubhaku ua makudia ua bhingi ki uene kukamba-ku dingi, ni maji a kuundila, ni kutambula konda ia balaka ni ima ioso iala-mu, ni dibhezelu ni ima ioso iatokala-ku." 
Numbers4:17 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers4:18 Muiji ua mabhata ma anʼa Kohate, kana ku a batula mu kibuka kia Jilevita;" 
Numbers4:19 inda mu a bhanga kiki, phala a laie, ka fue, kia bhixila mu kuzangula o imbamba ikôla kinène: Alá ni anʼê ene a tuama o kubokona, hé a a uanena muthu ni muthu ni kikalakalu kiê, ni kimbamba kiê," 
Numbers4:20 ene-phe ka tuame kubokona mu dibhezelu, nʼa mone kioso ki a ta imbamba ikôla mu mavunga, phala ka fue." 
Numbers4:21 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers4:22 Soneka ue anʼa Ngelexone, ku mabhata ma jitata jâ, ni mu kuvuadiua kuâ;" 
Numbers4:23 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu, u a alula oso a fuama ku ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers4:24 Kikalakalu kia dibhata dia anʼa Ngelexone kienhiki, ni mu kukalakala ni mu kuambata imbamba:" 
Numbers4:25 Ene ambata jikulutina ja balaka, ni balaka ia kutakanena, ni jithanga jê ku thandu, ni divunga dia ibha ia njimbu, ni dibeka dia muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena," 
Numbers4:26 ni jikulutina ja lumbu, ni dibeka dia muelu ua lumbu lua kondoloka balaka ni kalatódio i kala mu kaẋi, ni mikolo iê, ni ingolongondo ia kikalakalu kiê kioso kia tokala ku ki bhanga ku ima ioso iii, ene kiene o kikalakalu kiâ." 
Numbers4:27 Mu kitumu kia Alá ni anʼê, muene mu kalakela anʼa Ngelexone, mu imbamba iâ ni mu kikalakalu kiâ; enu mu a uanena o imbamba ioso iambata." 
Numbers4:28 Kiene kikalakalu kia mabhata ma anʼa Ngelexone mu balaka ia kutakanena; u a kala ku pholo ni ku a tambula konda muene Itamale dia Alá, o nganga." 
Numbers4:29 O ki uiza ku anʼa Meladi, u a bhanga ue dialuilu mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ;" 
Numbers4:30 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu, u a alula oso a fuama ku ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers4:31 Kimbamba kiâ—phe kiki mu kukalakala kuâ ku balaka ia kutakanena: O jingunji ni mikangala iê, ni jiphiladi ni ibaka iê," 
Numbers4:32 ni jiphiladi ja lumbu lua kondoloka, ni ibaka iê, ni jiphapha, ni mikolo, ni ingolongondo ioso ia tokala ku kikalakalu kiê; mu a uanena muthu ni muthu ni kimbamba kiê." 
Numbers4:33 Kiene o kikalakalu kia mabhata ma anʼa Meladi ku balaka ia kutakanena, u a kala ku pholo ni ku a tambula konda muene Itamale dia Alá, o nganga." 
Numbers4:34 Ni Mozé ni Alá ni ilamba ia kilômbo, anga a bhanga dialuilu dia anʼa Kohate mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni mabhata ma jitata jâ;" 
Numbers4:35 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu," 
Numbers4:36 oso a fuama ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena; 
Numbers4:37 enhá ene a alula ku mabhata ma anʼa Kohate, phala kukalakela ku balaka ia kutakanena, kuala Mozé ni Alá a alula, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers4:38 Iá a a bhange dialuilu ku anʼa Ngelexone, mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ," 
Numbers4:39 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu, oso a fuama ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers4:40 ene-oso-phe a alula mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ, a tena midi jiiadi, ni hama jisamanu, ni makuinhi atatu a muthu." 
Numbers4:41 Enhá, a alula ku mabhata mâ anʼa Ngelexone, phala kukalakela ku balaka ia kutakanena, kuala Mozé ni Alá a alula, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers4:42 Iá a a bhange dialuilu ku mabhata ma anʼa Meladi, mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ," 
Numbers4:43 tundé mu makuinhi tatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu, oso a fuama ukuenze ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers4:44 ene-phe a a xindi ku mabhata mâ, a tena midi jitatu, ni hama jiiadi." 
Numbers4:45 Enhá, a alula ku mabhata ma anʼa Meladi, kuala Mozé ni Alá a alula, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers4:46 Ene osoʼá a a bhange dialuilu ku Jilevita, kuala Mozé ni Alá ni ilamba ia Izalaiele, mu kuvuadiua kuâ ni ku mabhata ma jitata jâ;" 
Numbers4:47 tundé mu makuinhi atatu a muvu katé ku makuinhi atanu a muvu, oso a fuama ukuenze ua kikalakalu, ni kuambata imbamba ia balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers4:48 ene oso-phe a alula, a tena nake dia midi, ni hama jitanu, ni makuinhi nake." 
Numbers4:49 Mu kitumu kia Jihova, a alula, kuala Mozé, ni ku a uanena ikalakalu iâ ni imbamba iâ, enʼió mudiâ a alula kienhiki, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers5:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers5:2 Tuma anʼa Izalaiele, a tubhule mu kibangu oso a kate dibhute, ni oso ku mikutu iâ kuala kutunda ima iabolo, ni oso a kasana mukonda dia imbi;" 
Numbers5:3 a kale diiala, a kale muhatu, mu a tubhula mu kibangu, a kale ku kanga, phala ka kasanese kibangu, mukonda eme muene nga tungu mu kibangu." 
Numbers5:4 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a ki bhanga, a a tubhula mu kibangu; kala kia tange Jihova kua Mozé, kiene kia bhange anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers5:5 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers5:6 Tangela anʼa izalaiele, hé diiala mba muhatu u ta kituxi kioso-kioso, kiene kuta muthu, anga u bhukumukina Jihova, muthu ió uala ni kuêla." 
Numbers5:7 U bhinga-phe, u fisala kituxi kiê kioso kia te; u bhaka mulonga kioso ki ua tokala, u ta-ku dingi mbandu ia katanu ia kiki kia futu, a bhane kua ió uoso mukua mulonga uê." 
Numbers5:8 Mukua mulonga se ua fu, ka xi dilemba kua tokala ku bhaka mulonga, a bhane kiá kua Jihova, ki kale kiangene kia nganga; kumoxi ni kilumbe kia mbudi kia sata ia kiluuluilu ia-nda ku mu luulula." 
Numbers5:9 Kiene ue, ujitu uoso ua anʼa Izalaiele, ua ima ia kulumba, ua bhakula kua nganga, u kale ua nganga muene;" 
Numbers5:10 ima ikôla ia bhake muthu uoso-uoso, iangene ia muene; kioso kia bhana muthu kua nganga, kiê-muène." 
Numbers5:11 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers5:12 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele ua tangela kiki: Hé mukajiʼa muthu u dianguka hé u ta kituxi kua muadi uê," 
Numbers5:13 diiala diengi anga u zeka-nê, muadi uê ka kʼijiia, a ki sueka, muhatu ua kasana, o kiene ki kiala mbangi, ki bhuala ua a kuatela mu kituxi," 
Numbers5:14 o diiala diê-phe kua muiza muxima ua difuba, muhatu ua te kituxi; iú uala ku mu kuatela difuba, mba ue difuba diê ngó, muhatu ka te kituxi," 
Numbers5:15 bhenhobho diiala u bhinga u bheka mukajʼê kua nganga, ni mubhaku uê uiza na-u, mbamdu ia kakuinhi ku efah ia fuba ia sevada; ka lunduluila-ku-phe maji, ka te-ku ue uasu ua dizumba kuma mubhaku ua kúdia kua difuba, ua kufika kiaiibha, mubhaku ua dibanzelu, u bhekela ku banza o kituxi." 
Numbers5:16 Nganga anga u mu sunga bhua zukama, u mu bheka bhu pholo ia Jihova;" 
Numbers5:17 nganga-phe u katula menha akôla, mu kitutu kia mavu; o ku fufuta ia bhoxi mu balaka u zangula-ku ue, u ta mu menha." 
Numbers5:18 Nganga anga u bheka muhatu bhu pholo ia Jihova, kindemba ku mútue ua muhatu a ki vungununa, ki kala ngó, o mubhaku ua makudia ua dibanzelu a mu kuatesa-u bhu maku, o mubhaku ua mákudia ua difuba; nganga-phe muene u kuata ni lukuaku luê o menha alulu a bheka mázui." 
Numbers5:19 Nganga anga u mu lokesa, u ambela muhatu: se kuende ni diiala, se kua dianguka mu bhanga ufusa, eʼmuene u mukajiʼa muthu, menha iá alulu a bheka mázui, ka ku bhange kima." 
Numbers5:20 Maji-phe se ua ki bhange, eʼmuene u mukajiʼa muthu, se ua bhange ufusa, sai diiala ua zeka-nê, ki muene muadi uê," 
Numbers5:21 (bhenhobho-phe nganga u lokesa muhatu mulôko ua mázui, u ambela muhatu kiki:) Jihova a ku bhange u mukua mázui, u mukua kisunji mu kaẋi ka kifuẋi kié, a bhangese ditabela dié ku kamba nguzu, divumu dié di jimba." 
Numbers5:22 Menha iá a bheka mázui, a ku bokone mu divumu, a bhangese ditabela dié ku kamba nguzu, divumu dié di jimba, Mu hatu-phe ua kèla, Amene, Amene!" 
Numbers5:23 Nganga anga u soneka mázui oso iá mu divulu, anga ua jimuina mu menha alulu enhá:" 
Numbers5:24 Muhatu anga u mu nuisa menha alulu a bheka mázui; menha-phe enʼiá a tesa mázui a mu bokona, hé a ludila momo." 
Numbers5:25 Nganga anga u tambula mubhaku ua makúdia ma difuba, uala bhu maku a muhatu, u kala mu bhuka mubhaku ua makúdia bhu pholo ia Jihova, hé u u bheka ku kalatódio;" 
Numbers5:26 nganga anga u katula dibhûbhu ku mubhaku ua makúdia, o mubhaku ua dibanzelu, hé u di ohela ku kalatódio; anga ua ká nuisa o menha ku muhatu;" 
Numbers5:27 o kia zubha ku mu nuisa menha, se kia kidi muene ua bhange ufusa, ua te kituxi kua muadi uê, menha-phe ma bheka mázui ma mu bokona bhenhobho, ma bheka misusu, katé divumu diê di jimba, ditabela di zoza, muhatu ió-phe u kala kisunji mu kaẋi ka akuá." 
Numbers5:28 O ki kala-phe ka bhangé ufusa, ua zediê, ki ku mu bhiti kima, ni kuaia u bhanga muiji." 
Numbers5:29 Kiene kijilʼiki kia difuba, hé mukajiʼa muthu u dianguka, anga u bhanga ufusa;" 
Numbers5:30 mba muxima ua difuba ua kuata diiala, mukajʼê ua mu fika ima iaiibha; u bheka-phe muhatu kua Jihova, nganga anga u mu bhitisa ku utalelu ua kijila kiosuʼiki." 
Numbers5:31 Diiala ka kala ni kuêla, muhatu-phe ki kala ʻlamba dia kituxi kiê." 
Numbers6:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers6:2 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele, u a tangela, kuma: Hé diiala mba muhatu u ta hasa, hasa ia Nazilé, ia ku di lumbila kua Jihova," 
Numbers6:3 ki kale ku vinhu u batuka-ku ni kúnua kuoso ku kodiuisa; ka nu Mvindangele ia vinhu, mba mvindangele ia kúnua kuengi ku kodiuisa; ka nu menha ma jiuva, ka di jiuva jene, né jauisu né jakukuta." 
Numbers6:4 Izuua ioso ia bhanga ku unazilé ka di kima ki tunda ku muvide, tundé ku mbutu iê moxi katé ku iangu iê ku kanga." 
Numbers6:5 Izuua ioso ia hasa iê ia unazilé ki ku bhiti phoko ia bhutu ku mútue uê; katé kia kà-bhua izuua ioso ia di lumbila kua Jihova, u kala muthu ukôla; kindemba kiê ku mútue u kieha, ki lebha." 
Numbers6:6 Izuua ioso ia di lumbila kua Jihova, ka zukame ku kimbi." 
Numbers6:7 Ka di kasanesa mukonda dia tatʼâ, né kiá mamʼâ, né kiá phange iê ia diiala mba ia muhatu, se a fu; kuma ua di kalela, o hasa iê ia te ia ku di lumbila kua Nzambi ia mu kala ku mútue." 
Numbers6:8 Izuua ioso ia di lumbila, u kala muthu ukôla ua Jihova." 
Numbers6:9 Hé muthu u ẋikuka ngó nʼa fuila bhu kinama kiê, kua muiza kukasana ku mútue uê ua ku di lumba; ki kale u bhuta mútue kizuua kiê kia ku di zelesa; kizuua kia kasambuadi kiene kia bhuta o mútue." 
Numbers6:10 Mu kizuua kia kanake u bheka tumembe tuiadi, mba tuphomba tuiadi, kua nganga bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers6:11 nganga anga u bhana kamoxi ku sata ia kituxi, ni kamukuá ku sata ia kuoha, mu ku mu bhuisa ikuma, mukonda ua te kituxi mu takana ni kimbi, anga u zelesa dingi mútue uê kizuua kienhókio." 
Numbers6:12 Anga u di lumbila kua Jihova luamukuá dingi, u bhanga izuua iê ia unazilé, u bheka kilumbe kia mbudi, kia muvu umoxi ku sata iê ia kuêla; o izuua ia dianga kubhanga-phe, i aie ngó; mukonda mu kaẋi ka ku di lumba, mua muiza ku kasana." 
Numbers6:13 Kijila kia nazilé-phe kienhiki, izuua ia ku di lumba kuê se ia tena. A mu bheka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers6:14 anga u bhana ujitu uê kua Jihova, kilumbe kia mbudi kia muvu umoxi sé ngó dixaka, kia sata ia kuoha, ni mbudi ia mukaji ia muvu umoxi sé ngó dixaka, ia sata ia kituxi, ni kilumbe sé ngó dixaka, kia sata ia paze," 
Numbers6:15 ni kinda kia jimbolo ja kambe kifulufulu kia felemendu, ni makende ma fuba ia kábhia iòtoxe kiambote iólunge ni maji, ni jibolaxa ja tolo mukômo jóuese ni maji, ni mubhaku ua mákudia ni ua makunua." 
Numbers6:16 Nganga anga u i bheka ioso bhu pholo ia Jihova, u bhana sata iê ia kituxi, u bhana sata iê ia kuoha." 
Numbers6:17 U bhana ue kilumbe kia sata ia mutululuku ia satela Jihova, ni kinda kia jimbolo ja kambe kifulufulu kia kinanesa; nganga anga u bhana ue mubhaku ua mákudia ni mubhaku ua mákunua." 
Numbers6:18 O nazilé-phe u bhuta mútue uê ua unazilé, bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena, o kindemba kia tundu ku mútue uê ua unazilé anga u ki ta mu túbhia tuala kuoha o sata ia mutululuku." 
Numbers6:19 Nganga anga u katula kinama kia kilumbe, kia lukuaku, kiolambe, ni mbolo imoxi mu kinda ia kambe kifulufulu kia kinanesa, ni bolaxa imoxi ia mukômo uófele, anga u i ta bhu maku a nazilé, kioso kia zubha kubhuta mútue uê ua unazilé;" 
Numbers6:20 nganga anga u i bhuka bhu pholo ia Jihova, kuma sata ia kubbukila, i kala-phe ujitu uangene ua nganga, kumoxi ni thulu ia sata ia kubhukila, ni kinamá kia ʼkuaku lua xitu ioso ia sata ia kuzangumuna. Se ua zubha kubhanga kiki, nazilé kiene kiua kia tena kúnua o vinhu." 
Numbers6:21 Kiki kiene o kijila kia nazilé ua te hasa, ni ujitu uê ua tokala kubheka ua ku di lumbila kua Jihova; u ta-ku dingi se ua tena kulenda kima; kioso kia tange mu hasa jê, kiene kia kaiela mu ku di lumba." 
Numbers6:22 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers6:23 Ambela Alá ni anʼê kuma: Kienhiki ki mu bhana jinga kizediuise ku anʼa Izalaiele, ni kuila:" 
Numbers6:24 Jihova a ku zediuise, a ku lange;" 
Numbers6:25 Jihova a ku muikine ni kubenha kua pholo iê, a ku kuatele henda;" 
Numbers6:26 Jihova a bhetule pholo iê ku thandu dié, a ku bhane o kutululuka." 
Numbers6:27 Kienhiki kiene ki mu ta jinga dijina diami ku thandu dia anʼa Izalaiele; eme ni ngʼa zediuise. 
Numbers7:1 Mu kukala-phe kizuua kia zubha Mozé kuimika o balaka, ua i undu, iú ua i kôlesa, ni imbamba iê ioso, ni kalatódio ni itutu iê; iene ioso ua i undu ni maji, ua i kôlesa;" 
Numbers7:2 kizuua kienhókio, ilamba ia Izalaiele, ene mítue ia mabhata ma jitata jâ, a bhana maujitu. Ene ilamba ia miji a a tele ku pholo mu kubhanga dialuilu;" 
Numbers7:3 anga a bheka ujitu uâ bhu pholo ia Jihova, makalu masamanu ma bhiti mavunga ku thandu, ni jingombe ja makalu, kuinhi dia ngombe ni kiiadi, kifua ilammba iiadi-iiadi dikalu, kilamba kimoxi-kimoxi; anga a i bheka bhu kanga dia balaka." 
Numbers7:4 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers7:5 Maujitu iá a tambule, phala a kale ku kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena; u a bhane ku Jilevita, kala kia tokala kikalakalu kia ukunji uâ." 
Numbers7:6 Kienhiki Mozé anga u tambula o makalu, ni jingombe, hé u a bhana Jilevita." 
Numbers7:7 Makalu maiadi, ni ngombe jiuana, ua a bhana anʼa Ngelexone, iasoko mu kikalakalu kiâ;" 
Numbers7:8 makalu mauana, ni nake dia ngombe, ua a bhana anʼa Meladi, ia soko mu kikalakalu kiâ; o u talela iene ioso, Itamale dia Alá, o nganga." 
Numbers7:9 Anʼa Kohate-phe ka a bhana-ku kima, mukonda kikalakalu kiâ o dibhezelu; o imbamba ia tokala-ku a i ambatela bhu isuxi." 
Numbers7:10 Ilamba anga a bhana ue maujitu mû ku lumbila kalatódio, kizuua kia ka undu ni maji, ilamba a bhana maujitu mâ ku pholo ia kalatódio." 
Numbers7:11 Jihova anga u ambela, Mozé, uixi: A bhane ujitu uâ, kala muthu ni kizuua kiê, mu ku lumbila kalatódio." 
Numbers7:12 Ua tuama kubhana ujitu uê, kizuua kia dianga, Nasono dia Aminadaba ku muiji ua Juda;" 
Numbers7:13 ujitu uê ua bheka dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu, ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, ia tokala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:14 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:15 ni kangombe ka ndumbe ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:16 ni kisutu kia hombo phala sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:17 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe tua muvu umoxi tutanu; iú uene o ujitu ua bheka Nasono dia Aminadaba." 
Numbers7:18 Kizuua kia kaiadi ua bhana ujitu uê, Netanaiele dia Zuuale, kilamba kia Isakale;" 
Numbers7:19 mu ujitu uê ua bheka dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua makudia;" 
Numbers7:20 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:21 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:22 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:23 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; iú uene o ujitu ua bheka Netanaiele dia Zuuale." 
Numbers7:24 Kizuua kia katatu ua bhana ujitu uê, Eliiaba dia Helone, kilamba kia anʼa Nzebulone;" 
Numbers7:25 o ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:26 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:27 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:28 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:29 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene ujitu ua bheka Eliiaba dia Helone." 
Numbers7:30 Mu kizuua kia kauana ua bheka ujitu uê, Elizule dia Xedele, kilamba kia anʼa Lubene;" 
Numbers7:31 o uijitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni basiia iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote, (ia fina), iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:32 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:33 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:34 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi," 
Numbers7:35 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu, uene ujitu ua bheka Elizule dia Xedele." 
Numbers7:36 Mu kizuua kia katanu ua bheka ujitu uê Xelumiiele dia Nzudixadai, kilamba kia anʼa Ximinhá;" 
Numbers7:37 o ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni basiia ia phalata, kienemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni basiia iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:38 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:39 ni kamgombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe, ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:40 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:41 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu; isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; iú uene o ujitu ua bheka Xelumiiele dia Nzudixadai." 
Numbers7:42 Mu kizuua kia kasamanu ua bheka ujitu uê, Eliiazafu dia Deuele, kilamba kia anʼa Ngade;" 
Numbers7:43 O ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni basiia ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni basiia iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:44 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:45 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:46 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:47 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene ujitu ua bheka Eliiazafu dia Deuele." 
Numbers7:48 Kizuua kia kasambuadi ua bheka ujitu uê, Elixama dia Amihudi, kilamba kia anʼa Ifalaíme;" 
Numbers7:49 ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni basiia ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni basiia iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:50 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:51 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:52 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:53 o ia jisata ja mutululuku ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene ujitu ua bheka Elixama dia Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Kizuua kia kanake ua bheka ujitu uê, Ngamadiiele dia Pedazule, kilamba kia anʼa Manasa;" 
Numbers7:55 o ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni basiia ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni basiia iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:56 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:57 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe, ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:58 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:59 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene o ujitu ua bheka Ngamadiiele dia Pedazule." 
Numbers7:60 Kizuua kia kavua ua bheka ujitu uê, Abidani dia Ngidiioni, kilamba kia anʼa Bejamí;" 
Numbers7:61 ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:62 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:63 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:64 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:65 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene o ujitu ua bheka Abidai dia Ngidiione." 
Numbers7:66 Mu Kizuua kia kakuinhi ua bheka ujitu ué Ahiiezele dia Amixadai, kilamba kia anʼa Dane;" 
Numbers7:67 ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólumbe ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:68 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:69 ni kangombe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:70 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:71 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene o ujitu ua bheka Ahiiezele dia Amixadai." 
Numbers7:72 Kizuua kia kuinhi ni kamoxi ua bheka ujitu uê, Pajiiele dia Okolane, kilamba kia anʼa Asele;" 
Numbers7:73 o ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:74 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:75 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe, ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:76 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:77 o ia jisata ja mutululuku, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene ujitu ua bheka Pajiiele dia Okolene." 
Numbers7:78 Mu Kizuua kia kuinhi ni kiiadi ua bheka ujitu uê Ahila dia Inane, kilamba kia anʼa Nafitali;" 
Numbers7:79 ujitu uê ua bheka, dilonga dia phalata, kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, ni mbasinha ia phalata, kinemenu kiê makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ni dilonga ni mbasinha iezala fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni maji, phala mubhaku ua mákudia;" 
Numbers7:80 ni ngutu imoxi ia ulu, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, iezala uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers7:81 ni kangombe ka ndumbe, ni kilumbe kia mbudi, ni kambudi ka ndumbe, ka muvu umoxi, phala sata ia kuoha;" 
Numbers7:82 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi; 
Numbers7:83 o ia jisata ja paze, ngombe jiiadi, ilumbe itanu, isutu ia jihombo itanu, tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, tutanu; uene o ujitu ua bheka Ahila dia Inane." 
Numbers7:84 Iú uene ujitu ua kalatódio, ua ku lumbila, kizuua kia ka undu ni maji, ujitu ua bhana ilamba ia Izalaiele: Kuinhi dia malonga ni kiiadi a phalata, kuinhi dia jimbasinha ni kiiadi ja phalata, kuinhi dia ngutu ni jiiadi ja ulu;" 
Numbers7:85 dilonga dimoxi kinemenu kiê hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi atatu, mbasinha imoxi makuinhi sambuadi a xikulu; phalata ioso ia malonga ni jimbasinha, midi jiiadi ja xikulu ni hama jiuana, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu;" 
Numbers7:86 kuinhi dia ngutu ni jiiadi ja ulu, jezala uasu ua dizumba; ngutu imoxi, kinemenu kiê kuinhi dia xikulu, xikulu iene ia dibhezelu; ulu uoso ua jingutu ua tena hama ia xikulu ni makuinhi aiadi;" 
Numbers7:87 ngombe joso ja sata ia kuoha, kuinhi dia ngombe ni jiiadi, kuinhi dia ilumbe ni kiiadi, kuinhi ni kiiadi dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ni mubhaku uâ ua mákudia, ni isutu ia jihombo ia jisata ja kituxi, kuinhi ue ni kiiadi;" 
Numbers7:88 ni jingombe joso ja jisata ja paze, makuinhi aiadi a ngombe ni kiuana, ilumbe ia jimbudi makuinhi asamanu, o isutu ia jihombo makuinhi asamanu, tumbudi tua muvu umoxi ue, makuinhi asamanu. Uene ujitu ua kalatódio ua ku lumba, kia zubha ku ka unda ni maji." 
Numbers7:89 Mozé kioso kia bokona jinga mu balaka ia kutakanena mu kuzuela ni Jihova, uívua dízui di mu zuelesa, di tunda ku kibhuna kia kiadi kiala ku thandu dia álaka ia umbangi, bhu kaẋi ka xelube jiiadi; kienhiki kiene kia mu zuelesa jinga." 
Numbers8:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers8:2 Ambela Alá kuma, kioso ki u uika tundeia, sambuadi dia tundeia tu muikina bhuoso bhuemana o kaxtisale." 
Numbers8:3 Alá anga u ki bhanga; u uika tundeia, phala tu muikine ku pholo bhuoso bhuemana kaxtisale, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers8:4 Ufunu ua kaxtisale ua kusula, ulu uoso; tundé mbunda iê ia kutula bhoxi katé ku itulu iê, iene ioso ufunu ua kusula; ulungu uê uedikiza Jihova kua Mozé, uene ua kaiela mu kuiudika o kaxtisale." 
Numbers8:5 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers8:6 Katula Jilevita muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele, u a bonze." 
Numbers8:7 U a bhanga kienhiki mu ku a bonza: u a sangela menha ma dibônzo, a bhitisa phoko ia bhutu ku mukutu uoso, a sukule izuatu iâ, a dʼiẋike, a zele." 
Numbers8:8 A kuate-phe kangombe ka ndumbe, ni mubhaku uê ua mákudia, fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, ni kangombe kamukuá ka ndumbe, a ku bhane-ku mu sata ia kituxi." 
Numbers8:9 Jilevita anga a a bheka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena; anga u bhongolola kifuẋi kioso kia Izalaiele; 
Numbers8:10 anga u bheka Jilevita bhu pholo ia Jihova. Anʼa Izalaiele bhenhobho a tule maku mâ ku thandu dia Jilevita; 
Numbers8:11 Alá anga u bhukila Jilevita bhu pholo ia Jihova, kifua sata ia kubhukila anʼa Izalaiele a a bhakula, phala ki kala kia ene o kubhanga kikalakalu kia ukunji ua Jihova." 
Numbers8:12 Jilevita anga a tula maku mâ ku mítue ia tungombe tua ndumbe; kamoxi u ka bhana mu sata ia kituxi, kamoxi u ka bhana mu sata ia kuoha, a tu satela Jihova, phala Jilevita ku a bhuisa o ikuma," 
Numbers8:13 Jilevita anga u ji bhaka bhu pholo ia Alá ni bhu pholo ia anʼê, u ji bhakula kua Jihova kala sata ia kubhukila." 
Numbers8:14 Kiene ki u tungula Jilevitʼiki muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele; Jilevita-phe a kale ami. 
Numbers8:15 O ki u zubha kubhanga kiki, kiene kiua ki uehela Jilevita kubhanga kikalakalu kiâ mu balaka ia kutakanena; u a bonza, u a bhakula kala sata ia kubhukila." 
Numbers8:16 A ngi bhakuila-nâ kuala anʼa Izalaiele ni akuâ, bhu kididi kia ana oso a jikula divumu, bhu kididi kia ana oso a phande-kumbi; kiene muene ki nga a tambuila." 
Numbers8:17 Kuma ana oso a phande-kumbi muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele amiʼeme, ni ku athu ni ku ibhaku; tunde mu kizuua ki nga beta ana oso a phande-kumbi mʼoxi ia Ijitu, kiene ki nga di lumbila-nâ." 
Numbers8:18 Kala kiki, nga tambula Jilevita bhu kididi kia ana oso a phande-kumbi mua Izalaiele." 
Numbers8:19 Jilevita-phe nga ji bhana kala ujitu kua Alá ni kua anʼê, nga ji katula muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele, phala a kalakale bhu kididi kia anʼa Izalaiele mu kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena, phala a bhuise ikuma ia anʼa Izalaiele, phala ki mu kale dibhebhu muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele, kioso anʼa Izalaiele kia zukama bhu dibhezelu." 
Numbers8:20 Ni Mozé ni Alá ni kifuẋi kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, anga a bhanga kienhiki ku Jilevita; kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, ku mbandu ia Jilevita, anʼa Izalaiele kiene muene kia a bhange." 
Numbers8:21 Jilevita anga a di zelesa phala a bhue ituxi, a sukula izuatu iâ, Alá anga ua bhakula kua Jihova kala sata ia kubhukila; Alá anga ua satela mu ku a bhuisa o ikuma." 
Numbers8:22 Kia zubha ku a bhanga kiki, kiene kia bokona Jilevita mu kubhanga kikalakalu kiâ mu balaka ia kutakanena, bhu pholo ia Alá, ni anʼê; kioso kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, ku mbandu ia Jilevita, kiene muene kia a bhange." 
Numbers8:23 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers8:24 Kia tokala Jilevita kienhiki: Oso ala mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu ni itanu, mba a te-ku, ene a bokona ku ukuenze ua kukalakala mu balaka ia kutakanena;" 
Numbers8:25 tundé-phe kia bhiẋila mu makuinhi atanu a muvu, ku ukuenze ua kukalakala kaii-ku dingi, u nhoha-ku kiá," 
Numbers8:26 se uedi ukuatekesa akuâ, mu tambula konda ia imbamba mu balaka ia kutakanena, u ki bhanga, maji kia muxima uê, kala dingi ni kikalakalu kia mu tokala. Kiene ki u bhangʼiki mu kusokesa kikalakalu kia Jilevita." 
Numbers9:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé mu kikangalakata kia Sinai, bhu mbeji ia kamoxi, ku muvu ua kaiiadi, kia zubha kutunda mʼoxi ia Ijitu, uixi:" 
Numbers9:2 Anʼa Izalaiele a bhitise Phasu bhu kizuua kiê kioso kia i xindi. 
Numbers9:3 Kizuua kia kakuinhi ni kiuana kia mbeji ienʼii, mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, kiene kithangana kia tokala kia kubhitisa phasu; mu i kuata ni ijiia iê ioso, ni ubhitisilu uê uoso, kiene ki mu i bhitisa." 
Numbers9:4 Kienhiki Mozé u ambela anʼa Izalaiele kuma a bhitise o Phasu. 
Numbers9:5 Anga a bhitisa muene o Phasu, bhu mbeji ia kamoxi, kizuua kiê kia dikuinhi ni kiuana, mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, mu kikangalakata kia Sinai; kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, anʼa Izalaiele kiene muene kia bhange." 
Numbers9:6 Anga bhu kala mala a kexile ni kuxila mukonda dia kukuata kimbi kia muthu; kiene kia a fudisa kubhitisa Phasu kizuua kienhókio; anga eza kua Mozé ni kua Alá, kizuua kienhókio;" 
Numbers9:7 mala enhá a muambela, exi: Etu tuala ni kuxila mukonda dia kukuata kimbi kia muthu; phalahi-phe ki bhinga ki tu fudisa kubhitisa ujitu ua Jihova bhu kumbi diê dia tokala, kumoxi ni akuetu anʼa Izalaiele?" 
Numbers9:8 Mozé anga ua ambela, uixi: Kingenu, ngʼivue hanji kua Jihova kioso kia-ndu tuma, ku mi ambela." 
Numbers9:9 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers9:10 Tangela anʼa Izalaiele kuma, se bhu kala muthu ku muiji uenu u kala ni kuxila mukonda dia kukuata ku kimbi, mba u kamba kukala ku bhata mukonda dia kuenda njila ia dikanga, kiene kimoxi, ki ki mu fudisa kubhitisa Phasu ia Jihova." 
Numbers9:11 A i bhitisa kiá bhu mbeji ia kaiadi, bhu kizuua kiê kia kuinhi ni kiuana, mu kumbi dia ngoloxi; a i dia ni mbolo ia kambe kifulufulu kia felemendu, ni iangu ia lulu." 
Numbers9:12 Ka xie-ku kima katé ki kúkia, ka i bukule kifuba; a i bhitisa muene ni kukuata ijiia ia Phasu." 
Numbers9:13 Uoso-phe ua zedié, kai mu uenji, maji u fula kubhitisa Phasu, ió muthu ua ku mu batula mu kifuẋi kiê; mukonda ka bhitisa ujitu ua Jihova bhu kizuua kiê kia xindi; muthu ió kituxi ki kala ku thandu diê." 
Numbers9:14 Hé bhu kala nzuángiza ua tungu muʼaxaxi kenu, anga u sola, uixi: Ngi bhitisa uami o Phasu ia Jihova; kabasa u kuata ijiia iê ioso ni ubhitisilu uê uoso ua xindi ku i bhitisa; kijila kiene kimoxi ni ió nzuángiza, ni ió a mu vuala mukuaʼxi." 
Numbers9:15 Kizuua ki emika balaka, dituta dia tula ku thandu dia balaka, balaka iene ia umbangi; kutula mu ngoloxi-phe, ku thandu dia balaka ku diala, kubenha kuê kuila kala túbhia, katé mu kimene." 
Numbers9:16 Izuua ioso kiene; dituta di vungina balaka, ni kubenha kuê kala túbhia mu usuku." 
Numbers9:17 Kioso kia mona dituta dia zangumuka ku balaka, anʼa Izalaiele a di kaiela ni kuenda; kididi kioso ki emana dituta, anʼa Izalaiele bhene bhua a ta kibangu." 
Numbers9:18 Mu kitumu kia Jihova anʼa Izalaiele a katuka, mu kitumu kia Jihova a ta kibangu; kioso kia mona dituta dia tula ku balaka ene a xikama, kʼende." 
Numbers9:19 Né dituta dia tula ku balaka izuua iavulu, anʼa Izalaiele a tumaka kitumu kia Jihova, kʼende." 
Numbers9:20 Bhu kala ni bhabha dituta di bhanga ngó tuizuua tuofele ku balaka; ene-phe kia tumu Jihova a kala bhu kibangu, kia tumu Jihova a katuka ni kuenda." 
Numbers9:21 Bhu kala ni bhabha dituta di tula tundé mu ngoloxi katé mu kimene; se a di mono dia zangumuka mu kimene, a katuka; kixi mu muanha kixi mu usuku, se dituta dia zangumuka a katuka ni kuenda." 
Numbers9:22 Se dia tula ku balaka, né di bhanga izuua iiadi, mba mbeji, mba muvu, anga di kala ku thandu diê, anʼa Izalaiele a xikama muene bhu kibangu kiâ, kʼende; se dia zangumuka a katuka ni kuenda." 
Numbers9:23 Mu kitumu kia Jihova a tula, mu kitumu kia Jihova a katuka; a tumaka kioso ki andala Jihova, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers10:1 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers10:2 Iudika koloneta jiiadi ja phalata, u ji iudika ni ufunu ua kusula; ji kale ja kuxika mu kuixana kilômbo, ni kuxia kibangu mu kuenda," 
Numbers10:3 Ki u ji xika, kilômbo kioso ki bhongoloka kokué, bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers10:4 Se u xika ngó imoxi, kiókio o ilamba ngó iiza, adiakimi ku jimidi ja Izalaiele ene a bhongoloka kokué." 
Numbers10:5 Ki u xika nguzu, dízui dia kukatuka, ibangu iala ku mbandu ia thunda, ene a dianga kusuluka." 
Numbers10:6 Ki u xika dingi, dízui dia kukatuka, ibangu iala ku mbandu ia sulu, ene a katuka; a xika dízui dia kukatuka phala ibangu iende ni kusuluka." 
Numbers10:7 O ki uandala kilômbo ki bhongoloka, u xika dízui diengi, ku xike dia kukatuka." 
Numbers10:8 Anʼa Alá, jinganga, ene a xika jikoloneta; ki kala kijila kienu mu miji ienu ioso." 
Numbers10:9 O ki ki bhinga kuia ku ita mʼoxi ienu, mukonda dia nguma ueza ku mi bhondeleka, kienʼokio ue ni jikoloneta mu ji xika dízui dia suina, phala a mi lembalale bhu pholo ia Jihova, Nzambi ienu, ni a mi kudile ku jinguma." 
Numbers10:10 Kizuua ue kia kusanguluka, ni izomba ienu ia mi xindi, ni ki thethama mbeji, mu xika ue jikoloneta ku thandu dia jisata jenu ja kuoha, ni jisata jenu ja matululuku; ji kale ja ku mi lembalesa Nzambi: Kuma eme Jihova Nzambi ienu." 
Numbers10:11 Mu kukala-phe, muvu ua kaiadi, bhu mbeji ia kaiadi, kizuua kiê kia makuinhi aiadi, dituta di zangumuka ku balaka ia umbangi." 
Numbers10:12 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a katuka mu kikangalakata kia Sinai, enda ku kibuka-kibuka, katé dituta dia tula mu kikangalakata kia Palane." 
Numbers10:13 Kienhiki andeka kusuluka mu kuenda kuâ kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé. 
Numbers10:14 Kua tuamena ku katuka mvela ia Kibangu kia anʼa Juda ni ilombo iê, ua a kala ku pholo, Nasono dia Aminadaba." 
Numbers10:15 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Isakale, ua ki kala ku pholo, Netanaiele dia Zuuale." 
Numbers10:16 O kilômbo kia muiji ua Nzebulone, ua ki kala ku pholo, Eliiaba dia Helone." 
Numbers10:17 Balaka anga a i sokomona; anʼa Ngelexone ni anʼa Meladi, akua ku i ambata, a i zangula, hé a katuka." 
Numbers10:18 Anga ku kaiela o mvela ia kibangu kia anʼa Lubene, ni ilombo ié; kilômbo kiki ua ki kala ku pholo, Elizule dia Xedele." 
Numbers10:19 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Ximinhá, ua ki kala ku pholo, Xelumiiele dia Nzudixadai." 
Numbers10:20 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Ngade, ua ki kala ku pholo Eliiazafu dia Deuele." 
Numbers10:21 Bhenhobho, anʼa Kohate ambata imbamba ia dibhezelu, a suluka; a tuamena ni balaka, o iá, mu kutula, a sanga a i imika kiá." 
Numbers10:22 Anga ku kaiela mvela ia kibangu kia anʼa Ifalaime, ni ilombo iê; kilômbo kiki ua ki kala ku pholo Elixama dia Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼ a Manasa, ua ki kala ku pholo, Ngamadiiele dia Pedazule." 
Numbers10:24 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Bejamí, ua ki kala ku pholo, Abidani dia Ngidiione." 
Numbers10:25 Mvela ia kibangu kia anʼa Dane anga i katuka kiua, ene kiá a sukinina ku ibangu ioso, anga a suluka ni ilombo iê; kilombo kiki ua ki kala ku pholo, Ahiiezele dia Amixadai." 
Numbers10:26 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Asele, ua ki kala ku pholo, Pajiiele dia Okolane." 
Numbers10:27 O kilômbo kia muiji ua anʼa Nafitali, ua ki kala ku pholo, Ahila dia Inane." 
Numbers10:28 Kiene kiende anʼa Izalaielʼiki mu ilômbo-ilômbo; ki a katuka jinga. 
Numbers10:29 Mozé anga u ambela Hobabe monʼa Leuele mukua Midiiane, ukouakime ua Mozé, uixi: Tuala mu njila ia kuia ku kididi kia tu ambela Jihova, kuma: Ngi mi bhana-kiu; zá tuile kumoxi, tu ku bhange mbote; kuma Jihova ua tange kubhanga mbote kua Izalaiele." 
Numbers10:30 Muene-phe u mu ambela, uixi, ki ngiii-ku; inda ngiie kʼoxi ietu etuʼene ni ku jindandau jetu." 
Numbers10:31 Kuala muene: Kana ku tu xia, nga ku diondo; mukonda eie muene uejiia ididi iauabha kuta ibangu mu kikangalakatʼumu, u tu kale kala u mesuʼetu." 
Numbers10:32 O ki uila uia ni etu ki kala muene kuma mbote ioso ia kà tu bhanga Jihova, iene ue i tu ku bhanga eie." 
Numbers10:33 Anga a katuka bhu mulundu ua Jihova, enda dikanga dia izuua itatu; álaka ia kikutu kia Jihova anga ia tuamena ku pholo dikanga dia izuua itatu, mu ku a sotela kididi bhuoso bhua nhohena." 
Numbers10:34 Dituta dia Jihova anga di kala ku thandu diâ mu muanha, kia katuka bhu kibangu." 
Numbers10:35 Kioso-phe ki katuka álaka, Mozé u zuela, uixi: Zanguka, u Jihova, jinguma jé, u ji muanganese; oso a ku zembe ua bhese lusolo." 
Numbers10:36 O kia i tula, uila uixi: Vutuka, u Jihova, u tunge ni jimidi ni makuinhi a jimidi ja Izalaiele." 
Numbers11:1 Kifuẋi anga ki kala mu longolola, a zuela ima iaiibha mu mátui ma Jihova; Jihova-phe kia kʼivu njinda i mu kuata; túbhia tua Jihova anga tu uama muʼaxaxi kâ, o bhua suku kilômbo, hé enda ni kuaúka." 
Numbers11:2 Kifuẋi anga ki di kola kua Mozé; Mozé anga u sambela Jihova; túbhia anga tu jima. 
Numbers11:3 Kididi kiokio anga a kʼixana Tabeláhe mukonda dia túbhia tua Jihova tua uamene muʼaxaxi kâ. 
Numbers11:4 Mbutu ia iá ahuku a di lungu mu kifuẋi anga a kala ni uilu uavulu; ni anʼa Izalaiele ene a kala mu dila, exi: Nanhi u tu bhana xitu ia kúdia?" 
Numbers11:5 Tuinda-phe jimbiji ji tua kexi kudia jinga mu Ijitu, ja ngoho; ni ixibua, ni jimelá, ni jipolo, ni sabhola, ni jaiu;" 
Numbers11:6 o kiki-phe, bhu xingu bhua tu kukuta! Ima ioso ia tu kambe, o ku mesuʼetu tua mono ngó o maná ienhiʼii, kuabhu!" 
Numbers11:7 Kuma o maná i difuangana kala mbutu ia jikuendulu, o ku mesu ila kala uasu ua bidéliu." 
Numbers11:8 Athu anga a kala mu di muanga ni ku i nona, a i huha ku ditadi, mba a i zuka mu kinu, a i lamba mu jímbia, a i bhanga íkuanga; mu kanu uívua kala a i lungu ni maji a uisu." 
Numbers11:9 O kia sonoka jinga dimume bhu kilômbo mu usuku, ni maná i sonokena ue kumoxi." 
Numbers11:10 Mozé anga uívua kifuẋi, iá dila, kala muthu ni dibhata diê, bhu kanga dia fundu iê; Jihova njinda ia mu kuata kiavulu; ni Mozé kia muʼibhila." 
Numbers11:11 Mozé anga u zuela kua Jihova, uixi: Mubhikʼé ua mu bhangela-hi kiki? Ihi kia ngi kambesa kusanga kiadi ku mesu mé, ki ua ngi tuika kimbamba kia kifuẋi kioso kiki ku thandu diami?" 
Numbers11:12 Kifuẋi kiosuʼiki eme nga emita? Eme nga a vuala? Ki ua ngi tumuʼiki, uixi: A ambate bhu jihata kala kiledi, kífua mona hanji uala mu kuâmua, katé kia bhiẋila mʼoxi i ua lokela o jitata jâ?" 
Numbers11:13 Eme xitu ngi i sanga kuebhi ia kubhana kifuẋi kiosuʼiki? Kuma ala ku ngi didila, exi: Tu bhane xitu, tu die." 
Numbers11:14 Nga ki lémbua kuambata kifuẋi kioso kiki ubheka uami, kimbamba kiê kiavulu!" 
Numbers11:15 Hé kiene ki u ngi bhanga, ngi jibhe kiá, nga ku diondo, se nga sange kiadi ku mesu mé; ki ngi kale ngó ni ku ngi tatesa kiki!" 
Numbers11:16 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Ngi sotele makuinhi sambuadi a muthu ku adiakime a Izalaiele, oso ua ejiia kuma adiakime ku kifuẋi ni jifixiiadi jâ, u a bheka bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena, emana-bhu bhu mbandu ié." 
Numbers11:17 Eme ngi tuluka, ngi ku zuelesa bhenhobho; ngi katula ku Nzumbi iala ku thandu dié, ngi ta ku thandu diâ-ene; ene ue ambate-ku ku kimbamba, ki ki kale kia ubheka ué." 
Numbers11:18 Kifuẋi-phe a ambele: Di bônzienu phala o kizuua kia mungu, mua-nda kúdia xitu; kuma mua didila mu mátui ma Jihova, muixi: Nanhi u tu bhana xitu ia kúdia? Muixi: Inda mu Ijitu tua bhandulukile; Jihova-phe ua-nda ku mi bhana xitu, i mu dia." 
Numbers11:19 Ki mu i di ngó kizuua kimoxi, mba izuua iiadi, mba izuua itanu, mba kuinhi dia kizuua, mba makuinhi aiadi a kizuua;" 
Numbers11:20 mu i dia mu mbeji ia muvimba katé xitu i mi tundila mu mazulu, i mi bhekela fôkoso; mukonda Jihova mua mu tènde uala muʼaxaxi kenu, mua mu didila, muixi: Phalahi ua tu katula mu Ijitu?" 
Numbers11:21 Kuala Mozé: Athu ngala-nâ a tena hama jisamanu ja jimidi, o makuenze ngó enda bhoxi; eie ua zuela, uixi: Eme ngʼa bhana xitu, nʼa i di mu mbeji ia muvimba!" 
Numbers11:22 Kifua ua jibhila ilunga ia jimbudi ni ibhanga ia jingombe, ia a soka? Inga a a bhongoluela jimbiji joso muʼalunga phala ekute?" 
Numbers11:23 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eie ua fika lukuaku lua Jihova lua di koteka? Ua-nda mona se kizuelu kiami ki ku bhita, mba kana." 
Numbers11:24 Mozé anga u tunda, u tangela kifuẋi maka oso a Jihova; anga u bhongolola makuinhi sambuadi a muthu, adiakimi ku kifuẋi, u a ta mu jimbandu ja balaka." 
Numbers11:25 Jihova anga u tuluka mu dituta, u kala mu ku mu zuelesa, anga u katula ku Nzumbi iala ku thandu dia muene, u ta ku adiakimi, makuinhi sambuadi a muthu; anga ki bhita kuma kia tula Nzumbi ku thandu diâ, a kuata kuzambula ni uanji ua upolofeta, maji kithangana ngó bhenhobho, ka ki tona dingi." 
Numbers11:26 Bhu kilômbo-phe bhua xala kiiadi, iú dijina dié Eledade, iú dijina diê Medade; Nzumbi anga ia tula ku thandu; ene-phe a a soneka, maji a kambe kubhiẋila ni akuâ bhu balaka; anga a kala mu zuela ue ni uanji ua upolofeta, bhene bhu kilômbo bhuala." 
Numbers11:27 Anga bhu tunda munzangala, uiza u tudila Mozé, uixi: Ni Eledade ni Medade iá zuela bhu kilômbo ni uanji ua upolofeta." 
Numbers11:28 Josuué dia Nune, mukuenze ua Mozé ua mu sola tundé mu undenge, anga u kumuna, uixi: Muadi Mozé, a kidike." 
Numbers11:29 Mozé-phe, uixi: Uala ni dixinga mukonda diami eme? Eme nginda kifuẋi kioso kia Jihova a kale jipolofeta, Jihova nʼa te Nzumbi iê ku thandu diâ." 
Numbers11:30 Mozé anga u vutuka bhu kilômbo, ni muene ni adiakimi a Izalaiele." 
Numbers11:31 Anga ku tunda kitembu kua Jihova, ki tunda muʼalunga ni kubheka tungumbe, tua lalumukina mu jimbandu ja kilômbo, bhu tua suku kuku uenda kumbi dia kambàmba, bhu tua suku kuku ue kiene kimoxi, tua kondoloka kilômbo kioso, mu kitala kia kôvadu jiiadi tundé bhoxi." 
Numbers11:32 Athu anga a balumuka, kizuua kiosuʼokio ni usuku uê, ni kizuua kiê kia mungu, a kuata kubhongolola o tungumbe; uoso uala ndenge mu kukuata, kuinhi dia homele ki di kambe kutena; anga a tu aneka mbandu joso ja kilômbo." 
Numbers11:33 Kioso-phe ki ala hanji ku tu dia, kiluua ngó o xitu ibhua ku mazu, njinda ia Jihova i uama mu kubhesa kaxtiku ku kifuẋi, Jihova anga u a buidisa ni dibhebhu dia dikota." 
Numbers11:34 Kididi kienhókio anga a kʼixana Kiboloto-hatava, mukonda bhene bhua fundu akua uilu uavulu." 
Numbers11:35 Kutunda bhu Kiboloto-hatava kifuẋi kienda anga a tula bhu Hazelote; anga a bhanga izuua bhu Hazelote. 
Numbers12:1 Ni Midiiana ni Alá a di kuata ni Mozé Ni Midiiana ni Alá anga a di kuata ni Mozé mukonda dia muhatu, mukua Kuxi a mu sakana kuala Mozé, mukonda ua sakana ni muhatu mukua Kuxi." 
Numbers12:2 Anga a zuela, exi: Kifua Jihova ua zuelela ngó mua Mozé ubheka uê? Ka zuelela ue moʼmuetu? Jihova anga u kʼivua." 
Numbers12:3 Mozé-phe ua kexi muthu ua xididika, athu oso mu ngongo ndenge." 
Numbers12:4 Anga a tukumuka Jihova u zuela kua Mozé, ni kua Alá, ni kua Midiiana, uixi; Zenu, kitatu kienu, bhu balaka ia kutakanena. Anga a tunda, aia bhu balaka, kitatu kiâ." 
Numbers12:5 Jihova anga u tulukila mu philadi ia dituta, uimana bhu muelu ua balaka, anga uixana Alá ni Midiiana, anga a bhiẋila, emana, kiiadi kiâ." 
Numbers12:6 Uixi: Ivenu maka mami; hé mudienu mu kala polofeta, eme Jihova ngi dʼidikiza kua muene mu kisukila, ngi mu zuelesela ku nzoji." 
Numbers12:7 Ki kiene-phe ki ngi bhanga ni mubhikʼami Mozé; muene muthu uaiuka mu dibhata diami dioso. 
Numbers12:8 Muene ngi zuela-nê kanu ni kanu, ki jimbuluka muene, ki ki kala ngó mu ifika; kidifua kia Jihova u ki mona; enu-phe mua kambela-hi uoma ua kuâmba mubhikʼami, kuamba Mozé?" 
Numbers12:9 Njinda ia Jihova, ia a kuatela, anga i uama: anga u tunda-bhu, uié." 
Numbers12:10 Dituta anga di zangumuka ku thandu dia balaka; mu kutala-phe, Midiiana ua di bhange mukua dibhute, ua zele mukuâ ni kuzela kua neve; Alá uixi; sui, kua Midiiana, u mu mona uala kiá ni dibhute." 
Numbers12:11 Alá anga u zuela kua Mozé, uixi: Mozé tata! Ngana iami; kana ku tu tudika kituxi kiki ku thandu dietu, nga ku diondo, kuma tua bhange uoua, tua te kituxi." 
Numbers12:12 Nga ku diondo, ka kale mukuâ ni muthu ua fu kiá, ka kale kala muthu lelu-ke a mu vuala maji xitu iê ia diua kiá." 
Numbers12:13 Mozé anga u di kola kua Jihova, uixi: Nzambi, mu sake, nga ku diondo." 
Numbers12:14 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Se tatʼâ ngó ua mu ṗhamena mathe mu pholo, keju kala ni jisonhi mu sambuadi dia izuua? A mu tubhule bhu kibangu mu sambuadi dia izuua, o ki-bhua izuua a bokonedingi." 
Numbers12:15 Midiiana anga a mu tubhhula bhu kibangu, u kala kididi kimoxi mu sambuadi dia izuua; kifuẋi-phe ka katuka luua ni kuenda, katé Midiiana kia mu bheka dingi bhu kibangu." 
Numbers12:16 Kia zubha ku mu bheka, kifuẋi kiene kiua kia katuka bhu Hazelote, a ta kibangu mu kikangalakata kia Palane." 
Numbers13:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers13:2 Tuma mala a londe ixi ia Kanana, i nga-nda kubhana anʼa Izalaiele; kala muiji ua jitata mu katula-ku muthu, ene oso ilamba ku kifuẋi." 
Numbers13:3 Mozé anga ua katula mu kikangalakata kia Palane, kala kia mu tumu Jihova; ene oso mala ala ku pholo mua Izalaiele." 
Numbers13:4 Majina mâ-phe enʼiá: Ku muiji ua Lubene, Xamuua dia Zakule." 
Numbers13:5 Ku muiji ua Ximinhá, Safate dia Hodi." 
Numbers13:6 Ku muiji ua Juda, Kalebe dia Jefune." 
Numbers13:7 Ku muiji ua Isakale, Ingadi dia Zuze." 
Numbers13:8 Ku muiji ua Ifalaíme, Hoxeia dia Nune." 
Numbers13:9 Ku muiji ua Bejamí, Palate dia Lafu." 
Numbers13:10 Ku muiji ua Nzebulone, Ngadiiele dia Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Ku muiji ua Zuze, uene ua Manasa, Ngadi dia Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Ku muiji ua Dane, Amiiele dia Ngemali." 
Numbers13:13 Ku muiji ua Asele, Setulu dia Mikaiele." 
Numbers13:14 Ku muiji ua Nafitali, Nahibi dia Vofosi." 
Numbers13:15 Ku muiji ua Ngade, Jeuele dia Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Enʼiá o majina a mala a a katula kuala Mozé mu kulonda ixi. Hoxeia dia Nune, Mozé anga u muixana Josuué." 
Numbers13:17 Mozé anga u a tuma kulonda ixi ia Kanana, u a ambela, uixi: Mu bandela muenhumu, mu bokuena ku sulu, mu milundu iê," 
Numbers13:18 ixi mu i londe kiambote mba iala kiebhi; ni athu a tungu-mu se ala ni nguzu mba a bhuila, se a vulu mba a tolo;" 
Numbers13:19 ni ixi iene ia tungu, se iauabha mba iaiibha; ni jimbanza jâ, se jisanzala ngó mu kanga dia hatu, mba a ji xiti ni imbaka." 
Numbers13:20 Ni mavu se a nete mba a bhele, se muala tuixi mba kana. Mu kala muene ni uiala, ku ibundu ia ixi mu tu bhekela-ku. Izuua ienhoio-phe, izuua ia kumateka jiúva kúbhia." 
Numbers13:21 Ene anga a banda, a londa ixi, tundé mu kikangalakata kia Zini, katé ku Iehote, bhu dibokuenu dia Hamate." 
Numbers13:22 Ku mbandu ia Sulu a bhiti-ku, a bhikila mu Hebolone; mua tungu Ahimane, ni Xexai, ni Talamai, anʼa Anake. (Hebolone muene a dianga ku mu tunga, Zouane mu Ijitu ua xala kuema, bhu kaẋi bhua bhiti sambuadi dia muvu.)" 
Numbers13:23 A tula mu honga ia Xikole, a batula luthangu luala ni kilende kimoxi kia jiúva, anga a ki ta ku mukambu, a ki zenza mala kiiadi; ni ku jilomá ambata, ni ku jifiku." 
Numbers13:24 Kididi kienhokio kiene kia kʼixanena Xikole, mukonda dia kilende kia batula anʼa Izalaiele bhenhobho." 
Numbers13:25 Kia zubha kubhanga makuinhi auana a kizuua ni kulonda ixi, kiene kia vutuka." 
Numbers13:26 Anga a tula kua Mozé ni kua Alá, ni kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, mu kikangalakata kia Palane, bhu Kadexi; anga a tula njimbu, ni ku kilômbo kioso, a edikiza ibundu iaʼxi." 
Numbers13:27 A ambela, exi: Ixi tua i sange muene, ku ua tu tumu; i kunguluka lete ni uiki, ki makutu, o ibundu iê iene i tua bhekʼiii." 
Numbers13:28 Maji-phe akuaʼxi a tungu kuenhoko ala ni nguzu iavulu, jimbanza a ji te imbaka, ja makota muene; kua di te dingi ni anʼa Anake tua a sange kuenhoko." 
Numbers13:29 Akua-Maleke a tungu ku Sulu; Mahiti, ni Majebuzé, ni akua Amone, a tungu mu milundu; akua Kanana a tungu ku mbanduʼa kalunga, ni mu honga ia Njolodá." 
Numbers13:30 Kalebe anga u bateka mundu bhu pholo ia Mozé, uixi: Tu bandienu muene kindala, ixi tu i tambule; tua ki soko muene ku i tolola." 
Numbers13:31 Akuâ-phe ele-nâ kumoxi, exi: Ki tu tena kubanda mu kúlua ni kifuẋi kiókio; ene a tu tundu mu nguzu." 
Numbers13:32 Ixi iele mu kulonda, a kuata ku i bha fuma iaiibha ku anʼa Izalaiele, exi: Ixi i tuele kulonda ixi iaiibha, iala mu kúdia mienhu ia athu a tungu momo; akuaʼxi momo akua kitala kialebha." 
Numbers13:33 Tua mono-ko ni iiala, anʼa Anake, a tokala muiji ua Nefalimi; etu-phe bhu mbandu iâ tua di mono tu mahoho, ni ene uâ kiene kia tu mono." 
Numbers14:1 Kilômbo kioso anga a suina dízui ni kudikola; kifuẋi a kala mu dila usuku uenhó. 
Numbers14:2 Anʼa Izalaiele oso anga a longolola Mozé ni Alá: Kilômbo kioso anga a ambela, exi: Tamanu tua fuidile mʼoxi ia Ijitu! Mba tu fuila ngó mu kikangalakatʼumu!" 
Numbers14:3 Jihova ua tu bhekela-hi kʼoxi kunu, phala ni tu fuile ngó ku xibhata? Ni ahatuʼetu ni anʼetu nʼa di bhange mbole; manhi ki kota tu vutukila mu Ijitu?" 
Numbers14:4 Anga a di longesa mudiâ, exi: Tu sodienu kabhitangu, u tu kala ku pholo, tu vutuke mu Ijitu." 
Numbers14:5 Bhenhobho ni Mozé ni Alá a di bhala jipholo bhoxi, ku mesu a kionge kioso kia kilômbo kia Izalaiele." 
Numbers14:6 Ni Josuué dia Nune, ni Kalebe dia Jefune, ene ue a tokala mu ilolo iele mu londa ixi, a tandula izuatu iâ;" 
Numbers14:7 anga ambela kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, exi: Ixi i tua bhiti ni ku londa, ixi iauabha kiavulu." 
Numbers14:8 Jihova hé ua tu uabhela, muene u tu bheka mʼoxi muenhumu, u tu bhana-iu, ixi ia mu kunguluka muene lete ni uiki." 
Numbers14:9 Hé kima, kana kukitukila Jihova, kana kukala ni uoma ua akua-xi; kuma a kala mbolo ietu ia kúdia, kilembeketa kiâ kia tundu-ku, kala na-kiu dingi, etu-phe Jihova tuala-nê; ki mu kale ni uoma." 
Numbers14:10 Kilômbo kioso kia Izalaiele-phe amba, exi: A bubienu ni matadi. Kubenha kua Jihova anga ku dʼidikiza mu balaka ia kutakanena ku mesu a anʼa Izalaiele oso." 
Numbers14:11 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Mbambe bhebhi bhu suka kifuẋi kiki, ni ku ngi tènda? Katé bhebhi ni kukamba ku ngi xikana, ku thandu dia isuma ioso i nga kalakala muʼaxaxi kâ?" 
Numbers14:12 Nga-nda ku a beta ni kibuika, ngʼa ehelela, ngi ku bhange eie u kale u kifuẋi ki beta kuvula, ki beta uiala, ene ndenge." 
Numbers14:13 Mozé anga u ambela Jihova, uixi: Akua Ijitu-phe hinu a kʼivua, kuma kifuẋi kiki ua ki katula muʼaxaxi kâ ni undanda ué," 
Numbers14:14 akua-xi mumu a-nda ku a tangela-kiu. A kʼivu kiá kuma eie, Jihova, ua tungu muʼaxaxi ka kifuẋi kienhiki, a kʼivu ue kuma, eie Jihova, uala ku a tukulukila pholo ni pholo, dituta diê diemana ku thandu diâ, u mukua ku a tuamenena mu philadi ia dituta mu muanha, ni philadi ia túbhia mu usuku." 
Numbers14:15 O kiki-phe ki u buikisa kifuẋi kiki kala muthu umoxi ngó, ifuẋi ia athu evu fuma ié, a-nda kuila kuma: Ua lémbua!" 
Numbers14:16 Mukonda Jihova ua lémbua kubhiẋidisa kifuẋi kiki mʼoxi ia a lokela ku a bhana, kiene kia a jibhila mu kikangalakata." 
Numbers14:17 Inda, Ngana, nga ku diondo, kutena kué ku fumane, kala ki ua ki tanga, uixi:" 
Numbers14:18 Jihova u kokoloka ku njinda, u vudila henda, u loloka ikuma ni itondalu; ka ẋikina-phe kueha muedi, ikuma ia jitata i bhiẋika kuxixima ku ana ni alaula, katé ku muiji ua katatu ni ua kauana." 
Numbers14:19 Loloka, nga ku diondo, o ikuma ia kifuẋi kiki, mu henda ié iavulu kinéne, kala ki ueza ni kuloloka kifuẋi kiki tundé ku Ijitu katé bhabha." 
Numbers14:20 Jihova anga u zuela, uixi; Nga a loloka, nga xikina kizuelu kié." 
Numbers14:21 Ni kidi muene-phe, ki ngedi eme ngi muthu ua muenhu, ixi ioso hádia ia kèʼzala ni fuma ia Jihova;" 
Numbers14:22 mala enhá kia mono unene uami ni isuma i nga bhange mu Ijitu ni mu kikangalakata, maji a ngi bhumina lukuinhi luosʼulu, nguauâ kuívua dízui diami;" 
Numbers14:23 kidi kiene, ixi ka kà i mona dingi, i nga lokela jitata jâ, ene oso a ngi tènde ka kà i mona." 
Numbers14:24 Kale ngó mubhikʼami Kalebe, mukonda uala ni muxima uengi, ua ngi kaiela sè ngó kufula, muene ngó ngi mu bheka mʼoxi iele mu ku londa, an-ê a kà i lundula." 
Numbers14:25 Kiosuʼiki-phe kuma akua Amaleke ni akua Kanana a tungu mu njila mumu mu kaẋi ka milundu, mungu tunde nu-mu muie dingi mu kikangalakata, njila ia Kalunga kakusuka." 
Numbers14:26 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi;" 
Numbers14:27 Mbambe bhebhi bhu nga kà suka ni kuxididikila kilômbo kiki kiaiibha, a kuata ku ngi longolola? Ngevu kulongolola kua anʼa Izalaiele, kioso kiala ku ngi longolola eme." 
Numbers14:28 A ambedienu; Ki ngedi eme ngi muthu ua muenhu, eme ngi Jihova, kioso ki mua zuelenu mu mátui mami, kiene muene ki ngi mi bhanga;" 
Numbers14:29 imbi ienu ia-nda ku xalela mu kikangalakatʼumu; oso a a tele mu dialuilu, a kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu mba ku makuinhi aiadi a muvu a tele-ku kiá, oso muene mua ngi longolola," 
Numbers14:30 kidi muene, ki mua kà bokona dingi mʼoxi i nga lokela, ngixi: Ngi mi tungisa momo; kale ngó Kalebe dia Jefune ni Josuué dia Nune." 
Numbers14:31 Inda tuana tuenu-phe, tu mua tangele, muixi: A di bhange mbole, ene nga kà a bokuesa-mu, a kêjiia ixi i mua tènde, enu mua di tunu-iu." 
Numbers14:32 Enu bhobho-phe, imbi ienu i nengukina mu kikangalakata muenhumu." 
Numbers14:33 O anʼenu a kala abidi, a nhungana mu kikangalakatʼumu makuinhi auana a muvu, ambata kuxixima kua undumbu uenu, katé ki mua kà jila, imbi ienu ni i xalela mu kikangalakatʼumu." 
Numbers14:34 Ki kaiela mu izuua i mua bhangele mu kulonda ixi, makuinhi auana a kizuua, mu makuinhi auana a muvu, kizuua muvu, kizuua muvu, muambata mulonga uenu mu makuinhi auana a muvu, muijiie ki kala o kuẋimbuka kuami." 
Numbers14:35 Eme, ngi Jihova, nga zuela, kidi muene kiene ki ngi bhangʼiki, ku kilômbo kiaiibhʼiki kia ngi lungulukila; a kà jidila mu kikangalakatʼumu, muene mu a fuila." 
Numbers14:36 Mala enhó-phe oso a a tumine kuala Mozé kulonda ixi, oso kia vutuka a bhangesa kilômbo ku mu longolola, mukonda dia ixi ku i bhana fuma iaiibha," 
Numbers14:37 enhó muene a fumanesa ixi anga a fuila ku dibhebhu dia tundu kua Jihova. 
Numbers14:38 Inda-phe Josuué dia Nune, ni Kalebe dia Jefune ene ngó a xala ni muenhu ku mala oso ele mu londa ixi." 
Numbers14:39 Mozé anga u tangela anʼa Izalaiele oso o maka menhama; kifuẋi anga a dila kiavulu. 
Numbers14:40 Ki kúkia a di meneka ku thala dia mulundu, exi: Kiki, etu-ú, banda muene ku kididi kia tu tangela Jihova, kuma tua te kituxi." 
Numbers14:41 Mozé-phe u a ambela, uixi: Phalahi mu tondala dingi kitumu kia Jihova? Kuia ki ku xikina dingi." 
Numbers14:42 Kana kuia-ku; kuma kuia ngó, Jihova ki muala nê, a mi beta kuala jinguma." 
Numbers14:43 Mukonda akua Amaleke ni akua Kanana iá kuenhuku ku muia, mua kà fuila ku xibhata; kuma mua ditunu kukaiela Jihova, muene kʼàia dingi ku mi bheka." 
Numbers14:44 Sumbala a ambela kiki, a bhumu ni kubanda ku thala dia mulundu; álaka ia kikutu kia Jihova-phe, ni Mozé a xalʼâ bhu kibangu." 
Numbers14:45 Bhenhobho akua Amaleke a kulumuka, ni akua Kanana, a tungu mu mulundu muenhomo, anga a a bhesa lusolo, katé bhu Holoma." 
Numbers15:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi;" 
Numbers15:2 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele, kuma: Hinu ki mua kà bhiẋila mʼoxi ienu ia kutunga ni kusoma, ioso i nga-nda ku mi bhana," 
Numbers15:3 hé mua mesena Jihova mu mu satela ni túbhia, mba sata ia kuoha, mba sata ia mutululuku, mba mu bhanga hasa, mba mu bhanga ujitu ua kudifikixila, mba mu jifesa ja mi tumu, kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova ni kibhaku kia dikota mba kiofele;" 
Numbers15:4 uoso u bheka ujitu kala kiki, u bhana kua Jihova mubhaku ua mákudia, u kuata kakuinhi ka efah ia fuba ia kábhia (fina), iólunge ni mbandu ia kauana ia hine ia maji;" 
Numbers15:5 ni vinhu ia mubhaku, mbandu ia kauana ia hine, iene ia bheka sata ia kuoha, mba sata iene, ku kambudi kamoxi." 
Numbers15:6 Se kilumbe kia bheka, mubhaku uê ua makudia u kala tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah ia fuba ia kábhia, iólunge ni mbandu ia katatu ia hine ia maji;" 
Numbers15:7 o mubhaku uê ua mákunua u kale ua mbandu ia katatu ia hine ia vinhu, ia kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova." 
Numbers15:8 Se ngombe i u bheka, ia kuoha, mba sata ia mutululuku, mu ku tenesa hasa, mba mu ujitu ua mutululuku kua Jihova;" 
Numbers15:9 o kuta ku ngombe, mubhaku uê ua mákudia u bheka efah imoxi ia fuba ia uabha kiambote iólunge ni kaxaxe ka hine ia maji," 
Numbers15:10 o mubhaku ua mákunua, u kala ua kaxaxe ka hine ia vinu, ujitu ua túbhia, ua kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova." 
Numbers15:11 Ki bhinga kiene kia bhangʼiki, ku ngombe, ku kilumbe, mba ku tuibhaku tuofele, ku kambudi mba kahombo." 
Numbers15:12 Kioso kia soko o konda ia ibhaku, kala kibhaku, kiene muene kia bhangʼiki." 
Numbers15:13 Oso a a vualela ku bhata a bhanga kala kienhiki, mu kubhana ujitu ua túbhia, mu kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova." 
Numbers15:14 Hé bhu kala mzuángiza mua tungu-nê, mba uoso-uoso mu kala-nê ku miji ienu ioso, se ua mesena kubhana ujitu ua túbhia, kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova; kioso ki mu bhangʼenu ni muene ue kiene kia bhanga." 
Numbers15:15 Kima kia ngonge, ni enu ni nzuangiza muala-nê, kijila kiene kimoxi, kijila ki nanganena, ku miji ienu ioso; ki mualʼenu, kiala o nzuángiza, bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
Numbers15:16 Kitumu kimoxi, ukalelu umoxi, ni enu mu akua bhata ni nzuángiza muala-nê, uala kunhunganena muʼaxaxe kenu." 
Numbers15:17 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers15:18 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele, kuma: Kioso ki mu bokona mʼoxi mu nga-nda ku mi tula," 
Numbers15:19 ki mua kà dia kià o kúdia kuaʼxi koko, bhenhobho mua kà katula-ku munomo ua kubhakuila Jihova, mu ujitu ua kuzangumuna." 
Numbers15:20 Ku dikende dienu di dianga, mu bhanga-ku mbolo ia mubhaku ua kuzangumuna, kifua mubhaku ua kienda kia kuvundila." 
Numbers15:21 Ku dikende dienu dia dianga mu katula-ku munomo ua kubhakuila Jihova, ku miji ienu ioso." 
Numbers15:22 O ki mu tondala, mu kukamba kukuata ijiia ioso iii ia tange Jihova kua Mozé," 
Numbers15:23 iene ioso kiá ia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, tundé kizuua kia bhana Jihova ijiia, katé ku hádia ku miji ienu ioso;" 
Numbers15:24 se kia bhiti mu kutondala, ki kia kubhanga luelu, o kionge-phe ka kʼijiia, kionge kioso kibhinga a bheka ndumbe ia ngombe ia sata ia kuoha, kubhanga dizumba diambote kua Jihova, ni mubhaku ua mákudia ua tokala-ku, ni mubhaku uê ua mákunua, kala kia mi bhana kijila, ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia kituxi." 
Numbers15:25 Nganga anga ua bhangela kiluuluilu kia kubhuisa ikuma, kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, anga a a loloka; kuma a ki bhange ni kutondala, ki kia kubhanga luelu, ia a bheka ujitu ua, sata ia kuoha ni tubhia kua Jihova, ni sata iâ ia kituxi bhu pholo ia Jihova, mukonda dia kutondala kuâ." 
Numbers15:26 Kilombo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele anga a a loloka, katé ni nzuangiza muala-nê muaxaxe kenu, mukonda kima kia bhiti ni kutondala, o kifuẋi kioso ka kʼijiia." 
Numbers15:27 Hé muthu umoxi u ta kituxi kia kutondala, ki kia luelu, muene-phe u bheka hombo ia mukaji ia muvu umoxi ia sata ia kituxi." 
Numbers15:28 Nganga anga u mu bhangela kiamenga mu kubhuisa ikuma ia muthu ua te kituxi kia kutondala bhu pholo ia Jihova, kuma ka ki bhange luelu, bhu bhita kiluuluilu, anga a mu loloka." 
Numbers15:29 Ku kala kijila kimoxi kia ió ua te kituxi kia kutondala, ka ki bhange kiluelu, a kale muthu a mu vuala ku bhata, ku anʼa Izalaiele, a kale nzuángiza mua tungu-nê."
