Numbers15:30 Muthu uoso-phe u ta kituxi ku luelu, a kale mvàle, a kale nzuángiza, ua bhumina Jihova, muthu ua ku mu batula ku kifuẋi kiê." 
Numbers15:31 Mukonda ua tobhesa kizuelu kia Jihova, ua bulu kitumu kiê, muthu ió a mu batula muene ku kifuẋi; kituxi kiê ki kala muene ku thandu diê." 
Numbers15:32 Kioso-phe kiala anʼa Izalaiele mu kikangalakata, a sanga diiala ua kuẋanga jihuinhi kizuua kia sabhalu." 
Numbers15:33 Oso a mu kuata mu kanga, a mu bheka kua Mozé ni Alá ni kilombo kioso." 
Numbers15:34 Anga a mu kuika hanji, mukonda kiluua a kʼivua kiambote kioso kia tokala ku mu bhanga." 
Numbers15:35 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi; Muthu ió ua tokala ku mu jibha muene; kilômbo kioso a mu bube ni matadi ku kanga dia kibangu." 
Numbers15:36 Kilômbo kioso anga a mu bheka ku kanga dia kibangu, hé a mu buba ni matadi katé kiafu, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers15:37 Jihova anga uambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers15:38 Zuela ni anʼa Izalaiele, u ambela kuma: A sangunune ku mizumbu ia jithanga jâ, ki kale kijila ku miji iâ ioso, o ku a sangununʼuku ku sungu ni ku sungu a tunge-ku ni ngoji ia azulu;" 
Numbers15:39 ki kale kusangunuka kua kuila ki mu tala-ku mu banza jinga o ijiia ioso ia Jihova, mu i kuata, ki mu kaiele dingi ki mi tuma o muxima uenu, mba ki mu mona ni mesu; kuma kiene ku ki kaiela kiala ku mi bhangesa undumbu." 
Numbers15:40 Inda mu banza jinga kukuata o ijiia iami ioso, mu kale mu athu angene a Nzambi ienu." 
Numbers15:41 Eme Jihova, Nzambi ienu, nga mi katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu, phala ngi kale ngi Nzambi ienu, Eme ngi Jihova Nzambi ienu." 
Numbers16:1 Anga o Kola, monʼa Izahale, monʼa Kohate, monʼa Levi, ua zangula kumoxi-nê Datane ni Abilamu, anʼa Eliiaba, ni Hone, monʼa Pelete, anʼa Lubene," 
Numbers16:2 hé a balumuka bhu pholo ia Mozé ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhi atanu a muthu ku anʼa Izalaiele, adiakime a kionge, a a tumbula bhu dibhongolokelu, athu a majina muene." 
Numbers16:3 Anga a di bhongolola mu kuzoka ni Mozé ni Alá, hé a a tangela, exi: O kiki ue kia vulu kiá, kuma o kilômbo kioso kia Ngana, o ene oso athu a Ngana, o Jihova uala muʼaxaxe kâ; enu-phe mua di zangelekelaʼhi ku kionge kiangene kia Jihova?" 
Numbers16:4 Kuma o kienhiki Mozé ua kʼivu, ua di ṗhudika o pholo iê bhoxi," 
Numbers16:5 anga u zuelela Kola ni kionge kiê kioso, uixi: O mungu, mu kimenemene, o Jihova muene ua-nda kuijidisa uoso o uê ua mu tokala, ni ió uoso uazele, uoso Muene ua-nda ku mu bhiẋidisa kokuʼê." 
Numbers16:6 Bhangenu-phe kiki: Ni Kola ni kionge kiê kioso, a zangule o iomuenu ia uasu ua dizumba;" 
Numbers16:7 o mungu, bhu iomuenu ki mu ta-bhu o túbhia, takuilenu-bhu kiá o uasu ua dizumba, bhu pholo ia Jihova; kia kà kala-phe kuila, uoso kiá o muthu a mu sola-bhu kuala Jihova, muenhó muene o muthu ua zele; lu mi suke kiá, enu anʼa Levi." 
Numbers16:8 Mozé anga uambela dingi Kola, uixi: O kiki-phe ivuenu, enu mu anʼa Levi." 
Numbers16:9 Manhi enu kia mi tolela kia kuila o Nzambi ia Izalaiele ua mi uanununa ku kionge kia Izalaiele, phala ku mi bhangesa o kubhixila kokuê-muène, mbé muende ni kubhanga o kikalakalu kia balaka ia Jihova, ni kuimana bhu pholo ia kionge, phala kuenda ni ku mu bhangela o ukunji;" 
Numbers16:10 iú ua ku bhiẋidisa eie, kumoxi ni jiphange jê joso, o anʼa Levi; manhi hanji dingi ue mu sota o ukunji ua unganga?" 
Numbers16:11 Ki kia mi bhekesa dingi kuila ni eie ni kionge kié kioso mua di bhongolola mu kuzoka ni Jihova; o Alá, muene kima kiahi, muala ku mu longololʼenu?" 
Numbers16:12 Anga o Mozé u tuma kuixana Datane ni Abilamu, anʼa Eliiaba; maji ene-phe, exi; Etu, koko ki tu bande-ku." 
Numbers16:13 Manhi kia ku tolela, ki ua tu bhangesa o kutunda mu ixi izunzumuka lete ni uemba, phala ni u tu jibhile mu kikangalakata mumu, anga u mesena u di bhanga dingi u ngana ietu?" 
Numbers16:14 Mu ixi izunzumuka lete ni uemba, nêngó bhuòfele kua tu bheka-mu, mba u tu bhana kulundula mikáu ni mábhia a mivide, lémbue; manhi o athu iá eie ua-nda ku a ẋakula o mesu? Etu-phe, koko ki tua-nda kubanda-ku." 
Numbers16:15 Kienhókio Mozé o njinda i mu kuata kiavulu, anga uambela Jihova, uixi; Kana kusuua ku ujitu uâ; eme né ngó bulu imoxi ki ngi i tambula kokuâ, mba nga bhange kiaiibha ku muthu mudiâ." 
Numbers16:16 Mozé anga uambela dingi Kola, uixi: Ni eie ni kionge kié kioso imanenu bhu pholo ia Jihova, ni eie ni eme ni Alá, mungu." 
Numbers16:17 Anga mu zangula, muthu ni muthu, o kiómuenu kiê, o bhu iomuenu tenu-bhu uasu ua dizumba; o kala muthu a bheke o kiómuenu kiê bhu pholo ia Jihova, hama jiiadi ni makuinhi atanu a iomuenu; kumoxi ue ni eie ni Alá muthu ni muthu ni kiómuenu kiê." 
Numbers16:18 Anga muthu ni muthu u zangula o kiómuenu kiê, hé bhu iomuenu a ta-bhu túbhia iá a te o uasu ua dizumba bhenhobho, anga eza emana bhu muelu ua balaka ia dibhongolokelu kumoxi ni Mozé ni Alá." 
Numbers16:19 O Kola anga kilômbo kioso u ki bhongoluela bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena mu kuzoka-nâ; bhenhobho o kubenha kua Jihova anga ku tukulukila ku kilômbo kioso. 
Numbers16:20 O jihova anga u zuelesa Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers16:21 O mu kaẋi ka kifuẋi tundenu-mu, eme phala ngʼa buikise mu kapota-diesu." 
Numbers16:22 Maji-phe ene a di ṗhudikila o jipholo jâ bhoxi, anga ela exi: Uá! Nzambi, tata! Eie u Nzambi ia jinzumbi ja xitu ioso, abha mukonda dia muthu umoxi ua-te o kituxi, eie u thathamena kiavulu kiki o kilômbo kiosuʼiki?" 
Numbers16:23 Jihova anga u zuelela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers16:24 Ambela o kionge kioso kienhiki, kuila: Mu jimbandu ja jinzu ja Kola, ni Datane ni Abilamu, a tunde-mu." 
Numbers16:25 Kienhókio o Mozé u balumuka, hé uia kua Datane ni Abilamu; o adiakime oso a Izalaiele a mu kaiela." 
Numbers16:26 Muene hé uambela o kifuẋi, kuila: Nga mi diondo, o ku jibalaka ja athu iá a bhukumuka, sondolokenu-ku, ki mu babate ku kima kiâ kioso kia a tokala, mbebhu enu ue ki mu bhituke mu ituxi iâ ioso." 
Numbers16:27 Ene oso anga a katuka mu jimbandu ja jinzu ja Kola, ni Datane ni Abilamu. Ni Datane ni Abilamu anga a tunda, hé eza emana bhu mielu ia jibalaka jâ, kumoxi ni ahetuʼâ ni anʼâ ni tuana tuâ tuòfele-fêle." 
Numbers16:28 Bhenhobho-phe Mozé uamba, uixi: Bhene bhu mua-nda ku kʼijidila kuila o Jihova muene ua ngi tumu o kubhanga ima ioso ienhiʼii, ki ia mu di tundila ku muxima uami." 
Numbers16:29 Hé iá a fua muene kala kiene mu kúfua o athu oso, se a a kunda muene kala kiene mu ku kunda o athu oso, kuabhu-phe, o Jihova ki muene ua ngi tumu." 
Numbers16:30 Maji, se o Jihova u bhanga kima kiengi kia ubhe, anga o ixi i jikula o dikanu diê ni ia a habule, kumoxi ni ima iâ ioso ia a tokala, hé a tuluka ni muenhu uâ mu kina kia kalunga, kienhokio-phe kiene ki mua-nda ku kʼijiia kuma o athu iâ Jihova a mu thathamesa." 
Numbers16:31 Anga ki bhita-phe muene kuila, kioso muene kia zubha o kuzuela o maka oso iâ, o mavu a kexile bhoxi diâ a di zenge anga a jikuka." 
Numbers16:32 Anga oxi i jikula o dikanu diê, hé i a habula kumoxi ni jinzu jâ, ni athu oso kiá a tokalele Kola, ni jimbongo jê joso." 
Numbers16:33 Ni ene ni ioso kiá ia a tokalele, anga a tuluka ni muenhu uâ mu kina kia kalunga o mavu hé a a bhita ku thandu, a jikinina, o mu kaẋi ka kionge a tundu-mu." 
Numbers16:34 O ku mutendu uâ, Izalaiele ioso a a kexile mu jimbandu, a lenge; kuma exi: phala etu ue ki ki ta bhite kuila oxi i tu minha." 
Numbers16:35 Kuabhu-phe, anga ku tunda túbhia kua Jihova, anga tu jikinisa o hama jiiadi ni makuinhi atanu a muthu a kexi mu kuoha o uasu ua dizumba." 
Numbers16:36 O Jihova anga uamḃela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers16:37 Tangela Eliiazale, dia monʼa Alá, o nganga, kuila a katule o iomuenu mu kaẋi ka túbhia, o túbhia a tu sandele dikanga, kuma iomuenu ii ikôla kiá," 
Numbers16:38 o ku iomuenu ia ió a te o kituxi ku mienhu iâ-ène, ioso a i bhange izalelu ia kuzala ku thanduʼa kalatódio; kuma iòbheke bhu pholo ia Jihova; mu kienhiki-phe, ikôla kiá; ia kà kala kijimbuete ku anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers16:39 Anga Eliiazale, o nganga, u zangula o iomuenu ia utadi, iejile-na-iu ió a oha ku túbhia tua Jihova hé a i bhanga izalelu ia kuzala ku thandu dia Kalatódio," 
Numbers16:40 ni i kale dilembalelu phala ana a Izalaiele, mbé ki bhu kale dingi muthu uengi, ka tokala ku mbutu ia Alá, u bhumina o kubhiẋila phala kuoha uasu ua dizumba bhu pholo ia Jihova; mbé ka kale kala Kola ni kibuka kiê, kala kia mu tangelele Jihova ku dikanu dia Mozé." 
Numbers16:41 Maji mu kizuua kia kaiadi, o kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele a kuata o kulongolola Mozé ni Alá, exi: Enu mua jibha o mundu ua ngene ua Jihova." 
Numbers16:42 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, kioso o kilômbo kioso ki a di bhongoluela mu kuzoka ni Mozé ni Alá, mu kulunguluka ku balaka ia kutakanena, a mona kuila o dituta dia i vungina, o kubenha kua Jihova kua di muika." 
Numbers16:43 O Mozé ni Alá anga eza bhu pholo ia bhalaka ia kutakanena. 
Numbers16:44 Bhenhobho o Jihova anga uambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers16:45 Katukenu muʼaxaxe ka kionge kiki, nda eme ngi ki jimise mu kapota-diesu. Ene-ṗhe bhenhobho a di ṗhudikila o jipholo bhoxi," 
Numbers16:46 anga Mozé uambela Alá, uixi: Zangula o kiómuenu kié, u-te-bhu o túbhia tua kalatódio, u takuile-bhu o uasu ua dizumba, uie ni kunzunzuna kuala o kionge, ua kà a bhangele o kiamenga; mbata o njinda iavulu ia tundu bhu pholo ia Jihova; o dibhebhu-phe diandeka kiá." 
Numbers16:47 Alá anga u zangula o kiómuenu, kala kia mu tangela Mozé, hé uia ni lusolo mu kaẋi ka kilômbo; tala, o dibhebhu-phe diandeka kiá muʼaxaxe ka mundu; hé u takuila-bhu o uasu ua dizumba, anga u bhanga o kiamenga phala o ituxi ia mundu." 
Numbers16:48 O muene anga uimana bhu kaẋi ka imbi ni athu a muenhu; o dibhebhu anga di zumbuka kubhita. 
Numbers16:49 O afu ku dibhebhu dienhodio a tenene kuinhi ni kiuana dia midi ni hama sambuadi, o afu ku mulonga ua Kola engi." 
Numbers16:50 Alá anga u vutukila kua Mozé, bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena; o dibhebhu anga díbhua." 
Numbers17:1 Bhenhgobho-phe Jihova u zuelesa Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers17:2 Ambela anʼa Izalaiele, u tambule kua ene jimbangala, ku dibhata ni dibhata dia jitata, u tambula-ku mbangala, ku ilamba iâ ioso, kala kiala o mabhata ma jitata jâ, kuinhi dia mbangala ni kiiadi; hé uila o muthu dijina diê u di soneka ku mbangala iê." 
Numbers17:3 Maji o dijina dia Alá u di soneka ku mbangala ia Levi; mukonda kala mútue ua dibhata dia jitata jê, u kala ni mbangala iê." 
Numbers17:4 Hé ua kà ji tula mu balaka ia kutakanena, bhu pholo ia umbangi, bhu nga-nda kuijiia kokuenu." 
Numbers17:5 Hé kia kà kala-phe kuila, o mbangala ia muthu uoso ngi mu sola eme ia-nda kutuluka; mu kubhanga kiki ngi zubha-ku o makulongolola ma ana a Izalaiele a mu ngi longolola na-u eme, mu ku mi longolola enu." 
Numbers17:6 Mozé-phe anga u ki tangela anʼa Izalaiele; anga o ilamba iâ ioso a mu bhana jimbangala, kilamba ni mbangala imoxi, kala kiala o mabhata ma jitata jâ; kuinhi dia mbangala hi kiiadi; o mbangala ia Alá ia kexi ue mu kaẋi ka jimbangala jâ." 
Numbers17:7 O Mozé anga u tula o jimbanji bhu pholo ia Jihova, mu balaka ia umbangi." 
Numbers17:8 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, o ki kuákie, Mozé ua bokona mu balaka ia umbangi, tala-phe, o mbangala ia Alá, ia tela o dibhata dia levi, ia tûluka; mbata ia bhana itulu, ia sabhuluka tuthangu i iemi ibundu ia amêndoua." 
Numbers17:9 Mozé bhenhobho, o mbangala joso u ji katula bhu pholo ia Jihova anga uiza na-ju ku anʼa Izalaiele oso; o ene ia a di muena-kiu, anga muthu ni muthu u zangula-bhu o mbangala iê." 
Numbers17:10 Bhenhobho-phe Jihova uambela Mozé, uixi: Tona dingi ku ta o mbangala ia Alá bhu pholo ia umbangi, phala ku i bhaka, i kale kijimbuete phala o ana a ẋinuka; mu kubhanga kiki ua-nda ku a zubha o makulongolola mâ ene ku ngi longolola na-u, nʼa kambe o kúfua." 
Numbers17:11 Anga Mozé u bhanga kienhiki; kala kia mu tendelela Jihova, kiene muene kia bhange." 
Numbers17:12 Bhenhobho-phe, ana a Izalaiele a zuelesa Mozé, Exi; Tala-ze, etu tua mu fua, tua mu buila, etu tua mu buila-phe etuʼenʼoso." 
Numbers17:13 Ió uoso u zukama ku balaka ia Jihova, u fua; enu malʼenu, manhi tu jima o mbutu etuʼenʼoso?" 
Numbers18:1 Bhenhobho Jihova uambela Alá, O uixi: Ni eie, ni anʼê, ni dibhata dia tatʼenu kumoxi, kikuma kioso kia dibhezelu kia kà kala ku thandu dienu, ki kala ku thandu dié eie kumoxi ni anʼé." 
Numbers18:2 O jiphange jé, akua muiji ua Levi, muiji ua tatʼenu, u bhiẋila-na-u ue kumoxi, phala a ku bande, ende ni ku ku bhikila; maji eie-phe kiá kumoxi ni enʼé, mu nanga jinga bhu pholo ia balaka ia umbangi." 
Numbers18:3 Anga ene enda ni ku ku langidila, ni kulangidila o balaka ioso; maji o ku itutu ia dibhezelu ka bhiẋile-ku, mba ku kalatódio, mbé kʼafue, kutale ene, uixi enu." 
Numbers18:4 Maji a kà banda eie, nʼa kà bhanga o kilangidilu kia balaka ia kutakanena mu ukunji uoso ua tokala ku balaka; ki kua kà bhiẋile muthu uengi kokuenu." 
Numbers18:5 Enu-phe kiá, enu mua kà bhanga o kilangidilu kia dibhezelu ni kilangidilu kia kalatódio; mbebhu ki kuize dingi njinda lua mukuá ku thandu dia ana a Izalaiele." 
Numbers18:6 Tala-ze, kuma eme nga katula o jiphange jenu, o jilevita, muʼaxaxe ka ana a Izalaiele; iá a mi bhana-u enu, mu ujitu, kuala Jihova, nʼende ni kubhanga o kikalakalu kia ukunji ua balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers18:7 Maji eie-phe kiá kumoxi ni anʼê, muʼaluke o unganga uenu, mu ima ioso ia tokala ku kalatódio, ni ku ioio iala mu xilu dia mvéu, o ienhiʼii, iene o kikalakalu kienu; eme nga mi bhana o unganga uenu, u mi kale ujitu ua ukunji, o muthu uengi u bhiẋila-ku, u fua." 
Numbers18:8 Jihova anga uambela dingi Alá, uixi: Tala-phe, kuma eme nga ku bhakuila o kilangidilu kia maujitu ami oso a kuzangumuna, kumoxi kiá ni ima ioso ikôla ia anʼa Izalaiele; mukonda dia ku ku unda ni maji, nga ku bhana na-iu eie ni anʼê, mu kijila ki nangenena katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Numbers18:9 O ku ima ikôla kinéne, ia túbhia, eie u kala jinga-ku ni iii: o maujitu mâ moso, kumoxi ni maujitu mâ moso ma mákudia, ni jisata jâ joso ja kiamenga kia kituxi, ni jisata jâ joso ja kiamenga kia kuêla, ima ioso ia-nda ku ngi bhakuila, ia kà kala ima ikôla kinéne, phala eie ni añê." 
Numbers18:10 Bhu kididi kikôla kinéne bhene bhu u i dila jinga; mala oso ene a dia-ku; u ijiia-phe kuma ikôla. 
Numbers18:11 O ima ia mukuá iii ue i kala ié. O ujitu uâ ua kuzangumuna mu uthu uâ, ni mibhaku ioso ia kubhukila ia anʼa Izalaiele; nga i bhana kokué-eie, ni ku anʼê a mala, ni anʼé a ahetu u uala-nâ; nga i bhana i kale kijila ki nangenena; uoso ua di zelela uala mʼonzo ié muene udia-ku." 
Numbers18:12 Ku maji oso ambote, ni ku mákunua oso ambote, ni ku jimbundu joso jambote, ni ku ibundu ia ioso ia mutômo, ia bhakula kua Jihova, nga ku bhana-iu; eie." 
Numbers18:13 O ibundu ioso ia dianga, ku ima ioso i kala mungongo, ieza-na-iu kua Jihova, i kala ié; uoso ua di zelela uala mʼonzo ié, muene ua kà dia-ku." 
Numbers18:14 Kima kioso kiá kia lumbila Nzambi, mua Izalaiele, ki kala kié." 
Numbers18:15 Kioso ki jikula o divumu, ku xitu ioso ia bheka kua Jihova, kixi ia athu kixi ia ibhaku, i kala ié; maji, o jiphande-kumbi ja athu ua kà ji kula; o jiphande-kumbi ue ja ibhaku ia iibha ua kà ji kula." 
Numbers18:16 Oso-phe mudiâ a kala phala ku a kula, ua kà a kula, tundé kia kala hanji mu kitala kia mbeji imoxi, kioso eie-muène ki ua kâ a talela, hé u a xindila xikulu jitanu ja kitadi, kala kia soko o xikulu ia dibhezelu, ia makuinhi aiadi a jela." 
Numbers18:17 Maji o phande-kumbi ia ngombe-phe, mba phande-kumbi ia mbudi, mba phande-kumbi ia hombo, kana ku i kula; mbata ikôla; manhinga mâ u ma sangela ku kalatódio, o maji mâ u moha kuma sata ia kuoha, i tubhula dizumba diambote kua Jihova." 
Numbers18:18 O xitu iâ i kala ié; mukuá ni ku mubhaku ua kubhukila, o phetu i kala ié ni kinama kia taku kia mbandu ia kadilu." 
Numbers18:19 Maujitu oso a kôla, eza na-u ana a Izalaiele mu ku a bhakuila Jihova, nga ku bhana na-u eie kumoxi ni anʼé a mala ni anʼé a ahatu u uala-nâ, ia mi tokala katé ku hádia ni hádia; kiki kikutu kia môngua ki nangenena katé ku hádia ni hádia bhu pholo ia Jihova, phala eie ni muiji ué kumoxi." 
Numbers18:20 Jihova ue anga uambela dingi Alá, uixi: O mu ixi ié eie kua kà kala-mu ni undundu ua kima, o muʼaxaxe kâ ene ki mua kà ku kala dikânda; muʼaxaxe ka anʼa Izalaiele, emiʼeme ngi undundu ué, eme ngi dikânda dié." 
Numbers18:21 Uila kiki, o ana a Levi nga a bhana o mbandu ja kakuinhi joso mu Izalaiele, ji kale undundu uâ, ku kikalakalu kiâ kia ukunji kia mu bhanga, mu ukunji ua balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers18:22 O anʼa Izalaiele-phe ki mungu dingi a zukama ku balaka ia kutakanena, phala o kituxi ka kiambate ku thandu diâ hé a fua." 
Numbers18:23 Maji o jilevita ene a bhanga jinga o ukunji ua kikalakalu kia balaka ia kutakanena, o itondalu iâ ioso ia bhanga, ene kiá a ebhula; ki mi kale kijila ku miji ienu ioso katé ku hádia ni hádia; o muʼaxaxi ka ana Izalaiele ene uâ ka kala-mu ni undundu ua kima." 
Numbers18:24 Mukonda o mbandu ja kakuinhi ja anʼa Izalaiele, ja-nda ku bhakula kua Jihova mu ujitu ua kuzangumuna, nga ji bhana mu undundu ku jilevita; mbata eme nga a tendelela, ngixi: Muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele ene ka lundula-mu undundu ua kima." 
Numbers18:25 Jihova anga u zuelela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers18:26 Eie ue ua ka zuelela o jilevita, u a tangela, kuma: Kioso enu ki mu tambula o mbandu ja kakuinhi ku ana a Izalaiele, ji nga mi bhela enu kokuâ mu undundu uenu kienhókio mu bhakula-ku o ujitu uenu kua Jihova; jene o jimbandu ja kakuinhi ku mbandu ja kakuinhi ji mua tambula." 
Numbers18:27 Anga o ujitu uenu ua kuzangumuna a u kita muene kala jimbundu ja dizanzu dia kuvundila mba kusubhajaka kua ditangi dia kukamena. 
Numbers18:28 Kala kiki enu uenu mu bhana jinga kua Jihova ujitu ua kuzangumuna ku mbandu jenu joso ja kakuinhi ji mu tambula jinga ku ana a Izalaiele, kuenhoko kuene ku mu nomona o ujitu ua kuzangumuna ua Jihova anga mu u bhana kua Alá, o nganga." 
Numbers18:29 Ku ima ienu ioso i mu tambula kuene ku mu bhana o ujitu ua kuzangumuna kua Jihova; ku ima ioso ia beta o kuiuka kuene ku mu mu katuila o mbandu iê ikôla. 
Numbers18:30 Kala kiki-phe eie u a ambela, kuma: Kioso enu ki mu bhana o ujitu anga mu sola-bhu muene ioso ia beta hé mu i bhakula kala jimbundu ja tundu bhu dizanzu dia kuvundila mba ku ditangi dia kukamena, kienhiki-phe o jilevita a kà a tela-kiu ku mbandu iâ." 
Numbers18:31 Anga o ienu mu i dila bhu kididi kioso ki mnua mono, ni enu ni mabhata menu, mukonda kiene o kisakidilu kienu, mu kikalakalu kienu ku balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers18:32 Kala kiki, ki mu kala ni kituxi, se ku iene mu dianga kiá o kubhakula-ku ioso ia beta o kuiuka; o ima-phe ikôla ia ngi lumbila anʼa Izalaiele kana ku i sebulula phala ki mu fue." 
Numbers19:1 Jihova anga uambele dingi Mozé ni Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers19:2 Kiki kiene o kijilʼiki kia ngonge ia tendelela Jihova kuila: Ambela o anʼa Izalaiele, eze ni seseme ia ngombe ikusuka, ia kambe unema, mba i kala ni mabaka, ioio kiluua a i tula jungu ku thandu diê." 
Numbers19:3 Anga mu i bhana kua Eliiazale, o nganga; o muene hé uia na-iu ku kanga dia kibangu, anga a i batuila o xingu bhu pholo iê." 
Numbers19:4 Eliiazale dia nganga, u katula ku manhinga ni mulembu uê, hé u lunga ku pholo ia balaka ia kutakanena, nʼa sangela-ku lusambuadi." 
Numbers19:5 O seseme ia ngombe a i ohela muene bhu mesu mê; ni kibha kiê, ni xitu iê, ni manhingʼê, ni ditobe diê, iene ioso a i oha muene." 
Numbers19:6 O nganga anga ua kà zangula o muẋi ua musédulu, ni hisopo, ni jingoji ji kusuka, hé u i takuila mu kaẋi ka túbhia tuala mu kuoha o seseme ia ngombe." 
Numbers19:7 O nganga kia tunda bhobho, u sukula o izuatu iê, hé u dʼiẋika o mukutu uê mu menha, anga u bokona kiua mu kibangu; o nganga u kasana muene katé mu ngoloxi." 
Numbers19:8 Uoso ue uoha o seseme ia ngombe u sukula o izuatu iê mu menha, hé u dʼiẋika o mukutu uê mu menha, anga u kasana muene katé mu ngoloxi." 
Numbers19:9 Bhu kala muthu ua zele uongeka o uthôkua ua seseme ia ngombe, anga ua kà u tula ku kanga dia kibangu, bhu kididi kia zele, hé a u bhakela o kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, ene o menha a dibônzo; kienhókio o kiamenga kia kituxi." 
Numbers19:10 Uoso uomona o uthôkua ua seseme ia ngombe, u sukula o izuatu iê, hé u kasana katé mu ngoloxi; o kienhiki ki kala kijila ki nangenena ku ana a Izalaiele ni ku muthu uengi ua mu nhunganena muʼaxaxi kâ." 
Numbers19:11 Uoso u kuata ku file ioso-ioso, mba ku kimbi kia muthu, u kasana mu sambuadi dia kizuua." 
Numbers19:12 O mu kizuua kia katatu u di bonza ni menha enhá, ni mu kizuua kia kasambuadi, hé u zela kiua; maji se mu kizuua kia katatu ka di bonza, mu kizuua kia kasambuadi ka tena kuzela." 
Numbers19:13 Ió uoso u kuata ku file ioso-ioso, mba kimbi kioso-kioso kia muthu ua fu, hé u kamba o ku di zelesa ku dibônzo, ió u bhekesa lufuku ku balaka ia Jihova; O muenhu ió mu Izalaiele a kà u batula-mu; mbata o menha a dibônzo ka mu sangela-u ku thandu diê, ua kasana; o kukasana kuê iú-uê na-ku hanji momuʼê." 
Numbers19:14 Kienhiki kiene o kijila se kúfua muthu uoso-uoso mu balaka ioso-ioso: muthu uoso-uoso kiá u bokona mu balaka ioio, mba uoso-uoso kiá u kala mu balaka ienhoio, u kasana mu sambuadi dia kizuua." 
Numbers19:15 Ni kitutu ue kioso-kioso ki kala ni dikanu dia jikuka, anga a kamba o ku kutila-ku mulele ua kizuikiku, ki kasana." 
Numbers19:16 O ió ue uoso mu mukáu ua ngene ni ngene u babata kimbi kia muthu a mu jibha ni xibhata, mba kimbi kiengi, mba ku ifuba ia muthu uoso-uoso, mba ku mbila, u kasana mu sambuadi dia kizuua." 
Numbers19:17 Phala ió uoso ua kasana, a katula-phe ku utôka ua kiohela kia kiamenga kia kituxi, o ku thandu dia utôka uenhú a ta-ku menha a fema, mu kitutu." 
Numbers19:18 Anga bhu kala muthu ua zele u zangula hisopo, hé u i bonda mu menha enhô anga ua sangela ku balaka ioio, ni ku imbamba ioso, ni ku athu oso a kala momo; uixi ue kua ió uoso ua kuata ku ifuba, mba ku muthu uoso-uoso a mu jibha, mba ió uafu, mba ku mbila." 
Numbers19:19 O ua zele, u sangela menha kua iú ua xidi mu kizuua kia katatu ni kia kasambuadi; mu kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe u mu zelesa; o muenhó ua kexile kikásane u sukula o izuatu iê, hé u zoua mu menha, o ku kiemba nʼa zele kiua." 
Numbers19:20 Maji-phe, uoso u kasana anga u kamba o ku di bonza nʼa zele, o muenhu ió mu kaẋi ka kionge a u batula-mu; mbata ua bheka lufuku ku dibhezelu dia Jihova: o menha a dibônzo (a zelesa) ka mu sangela-nâ ku thandu diê; ua kasana." 
Numbers19:21 Kienhiki ki kala kijila kiâ ki nangenena; o uoso u sangela o menha a dibônzo, u sukula o izuatu iê; o uoso u kuata ku menha a dibônzo, u kasana katé mu ngoloxi." 
Numbers19:22 O uoso ua kasana, kioso kia kuata ki kasana ue; o uoso ue dingi u mu babata u kasana katé mu ngoloxi." 
Numbers20:1 Ana Izalaiele, kilômbo kiâ kioso, anga a bhiẋila mu kikangalakata kia Zini, bhu mbeji ia kamoxi; mundu anga a bhanga izuua bhu Kadexi; Midiiana anga u fuila bhobho, hé a mu funda bhenhobho." 
Numbers20:2 Anga o menha phala o kilômbo, hé a kamba; bhenhobho mundu anga a di bhongolola mu kubalukila Mozé ni Alá." 
Numbers20:3 O mundu anga a zoka ni Mozé, hé a zuela, exi: Tamanu tua fuile, kioso o jiphange jetu ki jafu, bhu pholo ia Jihova!" 
Numbers20:4 Phalaʼhi mua bheka o kilômbo kia ngene kia Jihova mu kikangalakatʼumu, ni tu fuile momo, ni etu ni ibhaku ietu?" 
Numbers20:5 Phala-hi mua tu bhangesa kutunda mu Ijitu ni kubanda kunu, phala ku tu bheka o kididi kia iibha kiki? Kididi ki ki moneka mbutu, ki ki moneka jifiku, mba mivide, mba jilomá, mba menha ngó a kúnua, lémbue." 
Numbers20:6 Bhenhobho, ni Mozé ni Alá a tunda bhu pholo ia kilômbo, hé aia bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena, anga a di ṗhudikila o jipholo bhoxi; hé o kubenha kua Jihova kua tukulukila." 
Numbers20:7 Jihova anga uambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers20:8 Katula mbangala, u bhongolole o kilômbo, ni eie ni phangʼié Alá, anga bhu mesu mâ, mu zuelela o ndangji o iene i bhane o menha mê; kienhiki mua-nda ku a katuila o menha mu ndanji, anga mua kà bhana kúnua ku kifuẋi ni ibhaku iâ." 
Numbers20:9 Kienhókio Mozé u katula o mbangala bhu pholo ia Jihova, kala kioso kia mu tendelela." 
Numbers20:10 Anga Mozé ni Alá a bhongoluela o mundu bhu ndanji, hé a a tangela, exi: Enu mua bhukumuka, kindala ivuenu: manhi o mu ndanjiʼumu ta tundisa-mu o menha phalʼenu?" 
Numbers20:11 Bhenhobho Mozé u zangula o lukuaku luê, hé u beta luiadi ku ndanji, ni mbangala iê, anga mu tunda ndumba ia menha; o kilombo anga a nua ni ibhaku iâ." 
Numbers20:12 Maji o Jihova uambela Mozé ni Alá, uixi; Tala, mukonda mua kambe ku ngi xikana eme, phala ku ngi kôlesa bhu mesu ma anʼa Izalaiele, mukonda dia kienhiki ki mua-nda kubokuesa dingi o kilombo kiki mu ixi i nga a bhana." 
Numbers20:13 O iá ene o menha a Mediba, mukonda o anʼa Izalaiele a zoko ni Jihova; iú ua di monekena momuʼâ kuma Ukôla." 
Numbers20:14 Kia bhiti imʼiii, Mozé u katula jiphunga bhu Kadexi, u a tuma kua sobha ia idomo, uexi: Phangʼié Izalaiele uambe kiki: Eie uejiia o jiphaxi joso ji tua mu bhita na-ju," 
Numbers20:15 ni kioso o jitata jetu kia kulumukine ku Ijitu, etuʼetu tua tungu ndumba dia izuua mu Ijitu; ni kioso akua Ijitu kia tu bhanga jinga o usuéia, ni etu ni jitata jetu." 
Numbers20:16 Etuʼetu tua di kola kua Jihova, o muene iú uevu o dízui dietu, iú ua tumikisa anju iê, i ia tu katula mu Ijitu; o kiki-phe tuala bhabha bhu Kadexi, dibhata diasu o mbambe ni ixi ié." 
Numbers20:17 Tuehele-phe kubhita mʼoxi ié; ki tua-nda kubhita ku mábhia, mba mu isoka ikokʼé-ikoka; ki tu bhambuka ku kadilu, mba tui bhambuka ku kiasu, katé mu jimbambe jé tua somboka-mu." 
Numbers20:18 Maji-phe Idomo ua mu vutuila, uexi: Kana kubhita mʼoxi, mbebhu eme ki ngi tunde mu ku ku kauidila ni xibhata." 
Numbers20:19 Kienhokio-phe anʼa Izalaiele a mu kumbulula, exi: Etu tua-nda kubanda mu ikoka iatu, o ki ki kala eme ni ibhaku iami tu nua ku menha mé, o suilu iê eme ngi i futa; ki nga-nda kubhanga dingi kima, ngehele ngó kuendelʼami bhoxi." 
Numbers20:20 Maji muene-phe, uexi; Ku bhiti-mu. Idomo bhenhobho anga u mu tundila ni ndumba dia mundu, ni nguzu iavulu." 
Numbers20:21 Kienhiki kia ditunu Idomo kuenzela Izalaiele kubhita mu ixi iê; mukonda dia kiki Izalaiele uela kuengi, ua mu xi." 
Numbers20:22 Kia bhiti imʼiii, a katuka bhu Kadexi; anga o anʼa Izalaiele, o kilômbo kiâ kioso, eza bhu mulundu ua Hole." 
Numbers20:23 Anga Jihova uambela Mozé ni Alá bhu mulundu ua Hole, mu jimbambe ja Idomo, uixi:" 
Numbers20:24 Alá a-nda ku mu bhongololuela kiá kuʼaia malembʼê, mukonda mu ixi i nga bhana anʼa izalaiele muene ka-nda ku bokona-mu, mbata mua xibhaka o kizuelu kiami bhu menha ma Mediba." 
Numbers20:25 Katula Alá ni Eliiazale, dia monʼê, uie-nâ ku thala ia mulundu ua Hole;" 
Numbers20:26 Anga u mu zula o izuatu iê, hé u i zuika Eleazale dia monʼê; mukonda o Alá a-nda ku mu bhongoluela kuʼaia malembʼê, ua-nda ku fuila kuenhoko." 
Numbers20:27 Mozé hé u bhanga kala kia mu tendelela Jihova; mukonda a bande ku thala ia mulundu ua Hole, bhu mesu muene a kilômbo kioso." 
Numbers20:28 Anga Mozé u zula Alá o izuatu iê, hé u i zuika Eleazale dia Monʼê; Alá anga u fuila kuenhoko, bhu zokozoko dia mulundu; o Mozé-phe ni Eleazale a tuluka ku mulundu." 
Numbers20:29 O kilômbo kioso-phe, kioso kia mono kuila Alá ua fu, a dila Alá, mu makuinhi a tatu a kizuua, kiene-phe, o dibhata dioso kiá dia Izalaiele, kia ididi o thambi ia Alá." 
Numbers21:1 Kiki mukua Kanana, sobha Alade, ua tungu mu Sulu, kievu kuila Izalaiele uala kuijiia mu njila mua bhitile ilolo, u tunda mu kulua-nâ, amukuá anga ua kuta, aia-nâ, hutile jê." 
Numbers21:2 Izalaiele anga a di hambelela kua Jihova, exi: Se kidi muene u ngi bhana kifuẋi kienhiki bhu maku mami, jimbonge jâ ngi ji buidisa muene." 
Numbers21:3 Jihova anga uívua dízui dia izalaiele, u bhana akua Kanana bhu maku mâ, anga a a buidisa muene ni jimbonge jâ; mukáu uenhó anga a u luka Holoma." 
Numbers21:4 Anga a katuka bhu mulundu ua Hole, éla ia Kalunga Kakusuka, phala ixi ia Idomo a i kondoloke; kifuẋi anga ki thathamana muxima mukonda dia njila." 
Numbers21:5 Kifuẋi anga a longolola Nzambi ni Mozé, exi: Mukonda diahi ua tu katula mu Ijitu, ni tu fuile ngó mu kikangalakatʼumu? Ki mu moneka mbolo, ki mu moneka menha; ima ia maná iii ia tu kumu!" 
Numbers21:6 Jihova anga u tumikisa jinhoka ja xixima kala túbhia; hé ji numata athu; ku Izalaeiele anga kúfua mundu uavulu. 
Numbers21:7 Kifuẋi anga eza kua Mozé, exi: Tua te kituxi, mukonda tua longolola Jihova ni eie; tu sambele kua Jihova, a tu katule jinhoka ja túbhia. Mozé anga u sambela o kifuẋi." 
Numbers21:8 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Iudika ue nhoka ia túbhia, u i tudike ku muẋi; ki bhita-phe kuma uoso a mu numata, kia tala-ku, u bhuluka." 
Numbers21:9 Mozé anga u iudika nhoka ia ngôndo, hé u i tudika ku muẋi; anga ki bhita muene; hé muthu a mu numata kuala nhoka, kia tala ku nhoka ia ngôndo, u bhuluka." 
Numbers21:10 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a katuka dingi; a ta kibangu mu Obote. 
Numbers21:11 Anga a tunda bhu Obote, a tula bhu Abhadimi a ta kibangu bhenhobho, mu kikangalakata, bhua lulama ni ixi ia Mouabhe, ku tundila dikumbi." 
Numbers21:12 Kutunda bhobho a tula mu honga ia Zelede. 
Numbers21:13 Kutunda bhobho, bhu Zelede, enda katé kia te kibangu kiâ ku sámbu dia Anone, mu kikangalakata ki tunda mʼoxi ia Mamodi; kuma mbambe honga ia None ni Mouabhe ni akua Amone." 
Numbers21:14 Kiene kia ki tela ku mukumbi ua ita ia Jihova, exi: Vehebe mu Sufale, Jihonga ja kutuka mu Anone," 
Numbers21:15 Dikenhe dia jihonga Di talela mu dibhata dia Hale, Di xamenena ku mbambe ia Mouabhe." 
Numbers21:16 Kutunda bhobho, a tula bhu Beele; bhene bhu kixima kia tange Jihova kua Mozé, uixi: Bhongolola kifuẋi kumoxi, eme ngʼa bhane menha." 
Numbers21:17 Bhenhobho Izalaiele emba mukumbi uâ, exi: Imbilenu-kiu! Fuafua, u kixima," 
Numbers21:18 Kixima kia kande ilamba, Adiakimi a vota o mavu, Mbasá bhu maku ni jimbangala ja ulamba uâ! Kutunda bhobho mu kikangalakata a tula bhu Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 kutunda bhu Matana, eza bhu Nahaliiele; kutunda bhu Nahaliiele eza bhu Bamote;" 
Numbers21:20 kutunda bhu Bamote, eza mu honga ia mukáu ua Mouabhe, bhu ditala dia mulundu ua Pixika, kifua bhene bhu thala-mu-ngongo." 
Numbers21:21 Izalaiele anga a tuma jiphunga kua Sihone, sobha ia akua-Amone, uixi:" 
Numbers21:22 Ngʼehele kubhita mʼoxi ié; ki tu abhuka mu mábhia, kana, mba mu isoka ia mivide; ku menha a ixima ki tu nu-ku; tuendela ngó mu ikoka iatu, katé mu mbambe ié tua somboka-mu." 
Numbers21:23 Sihone-phe nguê kuehela Izalaiele kubhita mʼoxi iê; Sihone anga u bhongolola mundu uê; uia mu sota kutakana ni Izalaiele mu kikangalakata; u a sanga bhu Jahaze; u kuata kulua-nâ. 
Numbers21:24 Izalaiele anga u mu kuama ni mazu a xibhata; a mu-bua ixi iê, tundé mu Anone katé mu Jaboke, ni ku mbambe ia anʼa Amone tule; kuma ku mbambe ia anʼa Amone kua kolo, mbata a xiti ku ni kimbaka." 
Numbers21:25 Izalaiele anga a tambula jimbonge josuʼiji; Izalaiele anga a tunga mu jimbonge ja akua Amone, mu Hexebone ni tusanzala tuê tuoso." 
Numbers21:26 Kuma Hexebone mbanza ia Sihone, sobha ia akua Amone, ua luile kiá ni sobha ia kexile ku Mouabhe, iú ua mu bu o ixi iê katé ku Amone." 
Numbers21:27 A kua kuzuela o jisabhu kiene ki ene mu kuila, exi: Zenu ku Hexebone, mu i tunge! Tunga, kolesa dingi ngundu ia Sihone!" 
Numbers21:28 Mbata ku Hexebone kua tundu túbhia, Mulengu mu mbanza ia Sihone. Hale dia Mouabhe uabhi, Ni jinganga ja matala ma Amone." 
Numbers21:29 Eie u Mouabhe, lamba dié! Mua bhondalala, enu mu akua hamba dia Kamu. Anʼé a mala a lenge, Anʼé a ahatu a a kutu, aii-nâ, Kua Sihone sobha ia akua Amone." 
Numbers21:30 Etu-phe tua ase muene; Hexebone ua jimi, Mbambe katé bhu Dibone, Tua a sengulula katé bhu Nofah, Túbhia tua bhiẋila mu Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Kala kiki Izalaiele a tungu mʼoxi ia Mamodi. 
Numbers21:32 Mozé anga u tuma nda Jazele, anga a i tolola ni tusanzala tuê; o Mamodi a a sange-mu a a kaie." 
Numbers21:33 Mu kutunda-ku, a bandela njila ia Basane; Hoke sobha ia Basane anga u tunda, ni muene ni kifuẋi kiê kioso, mu kuluila bhu Dilei." 
Numbers21:34 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Ku mu kale ni uoma, kuma nga mu bhana bhu maku mé, ni mundu uê uoso, ni ixi iê; u mu bhanga kala ki ua bhange Sihone, sobha ia Mamodi, ni mbanza iê ia Hexebone." 
Numbers21:35 Anga a mu jibha ni anʼê a mala, ni kifuẋi kiê kioso, katé ki kua mu xala muthu; anga a bhingana mʼoxi iê." 
Numbers22:1 Anʼa Izalaiele anga enda dingi, a ta kibangu mu dinhana dia Mouabhe, bhu mbandu ia Njolodá, sámbua dia lulama ni Jedikó." 
Numbers22:2 Balake monʼa Zipolo, kia zubha kumona ioso ia bhange Izalaiele ku akua Mamodi." 
Numbers22:3 Mouabhe u kala ni uoma uavulu mukonda dia kifuẋi kiki, kuma avulu; Mouabhe anga u bhondalala mukonda dia anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers22:4 Mouabhe anga u ambela makota ma Midiiane, uixi: Mua-nda kumona, kilômbo kiosuʼiki a-nda kulesa mu jimbandu jetu, kala ngombe ki i lesa iangu ku mukáu. Balake monʼa Zipolo muene sobha ia Mouabhe izuua ienhoio." 
Numbers22:5 Anga u tuma jiphunga kua Balamu monʼa Beola, bhu Petolo, bhu mbandu ia njila, iene ixi ia undundu uê, phala ku mu kolomona, uixi: Kunu-ze kueza kituxi kia tundu mu Ijitu; a tula ixi ioso, o bhua tula a ngi zukama kiá." 
Numbers22:6 Iza-phe, nga ku diondo, kituxi kiki u ngi tele-nâ mázui; kuma a ngi tundu mu nguzu; sumba ngʼa Ienda o ku a beta, ni ku a kaia mʼoxi; kuma ngejiia kuila eie uoso u mu zediuisa u kala ni kuzediua muene, uoso u mu ta mázui, mukua mázui muene." 
Numbers22:7 Makota ma Mouabhe, ni makota ma Midiiane, anga a suluka, ni mikolomono ia uanga a i ambata; anga eza kua Balamu a mu kunda maka ma Balake." 
Numbers22:8 Muene anga ua ambela, uixi: Zekenu hanji usuku ua lelu; ngʼijiie ku mi vutuila kioso ki ngʼivua eme kua Jihova; ilamba ia Mouabhe anga a zeka ni Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Nzambi anga uiza kua Balamu, uixi: Iá akua-hi uala-nâ mʼonzo?" 
Numbers22:10 Balamu anga u ambela Nzambi, uixi: Balake, monʼa Zipolo, sobha ia akua Mouabhe, ua ngi tumikisa-nâ, uixi:" 
Numbers22:11 Kunu-ze kueza kituxi kia tundu mu Ijitu, a tula ixi ioso; iza-phe u ngi tele-nâ mázui; sumba ngi lenda kulua-nâ, ni ngʼa a kaie." 
Numbers22:12 Nzambi anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Kana kuia-nâ; ni kituxi kiki kana ku a ta mázui; kuma ala ni kuzediua." 
Numbers22:13 Kúkia ni kimene Balamu u balumuka, u ambela ilamba ia Balake, uixi: Vutukenu kʼoxi ienu; Jihova ua ditunu ku ngehela kuia ni enu." 
Numbers22:14 Ilamba ia Mouabhe anga a balumuka, a vutuka kua Balake, exi: Balamu ua ditunué kuiza ni etu." 
Numbers22:15 Balake anga u tuma-ku ilamba iamukuá, a beta kuvula, a beta kijingu, akuâ a tuamene kuia, ndenge." 
Numbers22:16 Anga eza kua Balamu, a mu ambela, exi: Eme Balake dia Zipolo, uambe kuma, ki bhu kale kima ki ku fudisa kuiza kokuami, nga ku diondo," 
Numbers22:17 ngi ku bhanga ujitu uavulu, kioso ki u ngi xinda ngi ki bhanga; izá-phe, nga ku diondo, kituxi kiki u ngi tele-nâ mázui." 
Numbers22:18 Balamu anga u vutuila kua akalakadi a Balake, uixi: Balake né ua ngi bhana inzu iê iezala phalata ni ulu, ki ngi tena kusomboka kizuelu kia Jihova, Nzambi iami, mu bhanga kima kiofele mba kia dikota." 
Numbers22:19 Inda-phe zekenu usuku ua lelu, nga mi diondo, ngʼivue dingi kioso ki ngʼambela Jihova." 
Numbers22:20 Nzambi anga uiza kua Balamu mu usuku, u mu ambela, uixi: Mala iá hé eza ku kuixana, balumuka, uie-nâ; ki kale-phe kizuelu kioso ki ngi ku tangela, kiene ki u bhanga." 
Numbers22:21 Kúkia ni kimene, Balamu u balumuka, u zuika bulu iê ia mukaji, uila kumoxi ni ilamba ia Mouabhe." 
Numbers22:22 Njinda ia Nzambi anga i uama kia mu mono uaii; anju ia Jihova anga u mu batuila mu njila, ua di bhange nguma. Tala, Balamu hé uia ni kuenda mu njila, ua sambela ku bulu iê, ni abhikʼé kiiadi a muia-nê kumoxi." 
Numbers22:23 Bulu anga i mona anju ia Jihova uemana mu njila, xibhata iê ua i tomona, ua i kuata bhu lukuaku; bulu anga i xia mu njila iia mu iangu; Balamu anga u i beta phala ku i bheka dingi mu njila." 
Numbers22:24 Maji o anju ia Jihova phe anga uimana dingi bhua phophama o njila, mu kaẋi ka isoka ia mivide, bhuedi kuku lumbu, kuku lumbu." 
Numbers22:25 Bulu anga i mona o anju ia Jihova, hé i di xinina kulumbu, anga Balamu i mu xinina kinama ku lumbu; Balamu anga u i beta dingi." 
Numbers22:26 Anju ia Jihova anga uia dingi ku pholo, uimana kididi kia phophama, ki bhuala ngó bhu uebhela, né ku dilu né ku kiasu." 
Numbers22:27 Bulu anga i mona anju ia Jihova, anga i bulukutila mu njila muene; Balamu anga njinda i mu kuata; bulu u i beta ni mbangala." 
Numbers22:28 Bhenhobho Jihova anga u jikula o dikanu dia bulu anga i ambela Balamu, iexi: Nga ku bhange-hi, ua ngi beta lutatu luosʼulu?" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu anga u ambela o bulu, uixi: Mukonda ua mu ngi tonokena; tamanu nga kexile ni xibhata bhu maku, hinu ngeji ku ku jibha." 
Numbers22:30 O bulu anga i ambela Balamu, iexi: Mbebhu kʼeme muene ngi bulu ié ua ngi vu, uene ku ngi sambela kiá tundé okulu katé mu kizuua kia lelu? Ua ngi muene kiá ni ku ku bhanga kiki? Muene anga u vutula, uixi: Kana." 
Numbers22:31 Jihova anga u tonesa mesu a Balamu, u mona anju ia Jihova uemana mu njila, ua mu zengela xibhata iê; anga u bhetama, u ta pholo iê bhoxi." 
Numbers22:32 Anju ia Jihova anga u mu ambela, uixi: Bulu iê ua i betela-hi lutatu luosʼulu? Talesa, nga tundu mu ku ku fudisa, mukonda njila ié nga i mono ia kuxibhaka ku pholo iami." 
Numbers22:33 Bulu-phe ia ngi mono, ia ngʼebha kiá lutatu; hé ki iene ku ngʼebha, ni kidi kiene hinu nga ku jibha, bulu iene ieji kuxalé ni muenhu." 
Numbers22:34 Balamu anga u zuela, uixi: Nga te kituxi; kuma ki nga kʼijidile kuila eie ua ngʼimanena mu njila; kiki-phe hé kia ku iibhila, zá ngi vutuke ku nga tundu." 
Numbers22:35 Anju ia Jihova phe uixi: Ndeie kiá ni mala enhó; kikale-phe kizuelu kioso ki ngi ku ambela, kiene ki u zuela. Balamu anga uia ni ilamba ia Balake." 
Numbers22:36 Balake-phe ki evu kuma Balamu iú uiza, u tunda mu ku mu kauidila bhu mbonge ia Mouabhe, iala bhu mbambe ni Anone, bhene bhu suke ia mbambe iê." 
Numbers22:37 Balake anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Ki nga tumu makidikidi ku ku kolomona? Kuejila-hi ki nga kuixana? Manhi ki nga ki soko ku ku bhanga ujitu uavulu?" 
Numbers22:38 Balamu anga u vutila Balake, uixi: Ngeza-phe kiá muene; maji né ki ngezʼiki, ngala ni kutena kua kima kuila ngi zuela? Kioso kizuelu kia ngi te Nzambi mu kanu, kale kiene ki ngi zuela." 
Numbers22:39 Balamu anga uila kumoxi ni Balake, hé a bhiẋila bhu Kidiata-Huzote." 
Numbers22:40 Balake anga u satela-bhu jingombe ni jimbudi, u tumikisa makânda kua Balamu ni ilamba aia-nê kumoxi." 
Numbers22:41 Kúkia ni kimene, Balake u katula Balamu, u mu bheka bhu thala dia Baale; bhenhobho u mona ngó tumbalumbalu tua suku-ku ku kifuẋi." 
Numbers23:1 Balamu anga u uambela Balake, uixi; Ngi tungile bhabha sambuadi dia kalatódio, u ngi hingile sambuadi dia ngombe ni sambuadi dia ilumbe ia jimbudi." 
Numbers23:2 Balake anga u bhanga kala kia mu ambela Balamu, ni Balake ni Balamu anga a satela Kalatódio ngombe ni kilumbe, kalatódio ngombe ni kilumbe." 
Numbers23:3 Balamu anga u ambela Balake, uixi: Sata ié ia kuoha u i imanena kiá; eme ngiie bhobho; sumba Jihova ngi takana-nê; kioso-phe kia ngʼidikiza, ngi ku tangele. Anga uia bhu tala diengi." 
Numbers23:4 Nzambi anga u takana ni Balamu, o Balamu u mu ambela, uixi: Nga iudika sambuadi dia kalatódio, kalatodio ni kalatódio nga satela-ku ngombe ni kilumbe." 
Numbers23:5 Jihova anga u ta kizuelu mu kanu dia Balamu, uixi: Vutuka kua Balake, u zuele kienhiki." 
Numbers23:6 Anga u vutuka kua muene, u mu sanga iú uemanʼú bhu mbandu ia sata iê ia kuoha, ni muene ni ilamba ioso ia Mouabhe." 
Numbers23:7 Anga u kuata kifika kiê, uixi: Balake dia sobha ia Mouabhe ua ngi takana ku Alame, Mouabhe ua ngi kolomona muene ku milundu ia thunda, uixi: Zá u ngi bhubhidile Jakobo, uta muene mázui kua Izalaiele." 
Numbers23:8 Ngi bhubhidila kiebhi, Nzambi ka mu bhubhidila? Mázui a kuata kiebhi, Jihova ka a te?" 
Numbers23:9 Tundé ku thandu dia matadi nga mu mono, ku milundu ngi mu tala iuná; kifuẋi kiê, kifuẋi kia di tungidila, ka moneka akuâ a soko-nâ." 
Numbers23:10 Nanhi u alula Jakobo, avulu kala fufuta ia mavu? U tanga ngó mbandu ia kauana ia Izalaiele? Ngi fue ufuilu ua athu aiuka, dizumbukilu diami di soke ni dia muene." 
Numbers23:11 Balake anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Ua ngi bhange kiebhi? Nga ku kolomona phala jinguma jami u ngi tele-nâ mázui, mbé u a ta dingi kizediuise muene!" 
Numbers23:12 Muene anga u vutula, uixi: Manhi ngi kamba kukaiela kioso kia ngi te Jihova mu kanu?" 
Numbers23:13 Balake anga u mu ambela, uixi: Iza-ze, ngi ku bheke kididi kiamukuá, bhu ua muena; ua mona-phe ngó sungu ia kibangu kiâ, ku a mone ene oso; bhenhobho bhene bhu u ngi tela-nâ mázui." 
Numbers23:14 Anga u mu bheka mu mukáu ua Zofimi bhu thala ia Píxika, u tungila-bhu dingi sambuadi dia kalatódio, kalatódio ni kalatódio u satela-ku ngombe ni kilumbe." 
Numbers23:15 Anga u ambela Balake, uixi: Sata ié ia kuoha u i imanena bhenhabha, ngi takane ni Jihova koko." 
Numbers23:16 Jihova anga u takana ni Balamu, u mu ta kizuelu mu kanu, uixi: Vutuka kua Balake, u zuele Kienhiki." 
Numbers23:17 Anga u vutuka kua muene, u mu sanga iú uemanʼú bhu mbandu ia sata iê ia kuoha, ni ilamba ia Mouabhe emana-nê. Balake, uixi: Jihova ua zuela kiebhi?" 
Numbers23:18 Anga u kuata kifika kiê uixi: Balumuka, Balake, uívue; bhulakana, u Zipolo dia mona." 
Numbers23:19 Nzambi ki muthu, kuila u ta makutu. Ki monʼa muthu, kuila u zuela luiadi. Kima kiambe, u kamba ku ki bhanga? Kia mu bhiti bhu dimi, u aluluka?" 
Numbers23:20 Iala-ze, a ngi tumu kuta kizediuise; ua a zediuisa muene, ki ngi tena ku a vutula." 
Numbers23:21 Ka mono kubhukumuka kua Jakobo; ka mono ikuma kua Izalaiele; Jihova, Nzambi iê, ua tungu-nê, o muʼaxaxe ka uivua-mu nzôngo ia sobha ala ku mu kola." 
Numbers23:22 Nzambi ua a katula mu Ijitu; nguzu uala na-iu uila ia phakasa. 
Numbers23:23 Kua Jakobo uanga ki u tena-ku! Kua Izalaiele né a zambula, lémbue! Mu tumbula Jakobo ni Izalaiele, ela muene: Nzambi kukalakala kuahi!" 
Numbers23:24 Kifuẋi kiê a balumuka kala mama ia hoji, mba, ndumbe ia hoji kia lundumuka; ka zeka ngó sé kudia mbole, anga u nua manhinga ma tunda ku isasu." 
Numbers23:25 Balake anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Kalé kiá, kana ku a ta mázui, kana ku a ta kizediuise." 
Numbers23:26 Balamu-phe u vutuila Balake, uixi: Ki ngi ku tangela-kiu, ngixi: Kale kioso ki zuela Jihova, eme kiene ki ngi bhanga?" 
Numbers23:27 Balake anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Iza hanji, ngi ku bheke kididi kiamukuá; sumba ki uabhela Nzambi, u ngi tele-nâ mázui koko ku tuia." 
Numbers23:28 Balake anga u bheka Balamu bhu thala ia Peole, kua lulama ni kikangalakata." 
Numbers23:29 Balamu anga u ambela Balake, uixi: Ngi tungile-bhu sambuadi dia kalatódio, u ngi lungile bhabha sambuadi dia tungombe ni sambuadi dia ilumbe ia jimbudi." 
Numbers23:30 Balake anga u bhanga kala kia mu ambela Balamu, kalatódio ni kalatódio a satela-ku ngombe ni kilumbe." 
Numbers24:1 Balamu kia zubha kumona kuma Jihova kia mu uabhela kuzediuisa Izalaiele, kaii dingi kala mʼokulu kutala isuma, u lunga pholo mu kikangalakata." 
Numbers24:2 Balamu anga u bhetula mesu, u mona Izalaiele, kia te kibangu kiâ ku miji-miji; Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga i mu tula." 
Numbers24:3 U kuata kifika kiê, uixi: Zuela, u Balamu dia monʼa Beola, zuela, u mukua diesu dia kumona," 
Numbers24:4 u zuela, ió uevu maka ma Nzambi, u mona kisukila kia Muteni-a-ioso, uia ku kiambu, maji mesu a tono;" 
Numbers24:5 Kuuabha kuahi! Jibalaka jé, Jakobo! Kuiuka kuahi, mabhata ma Izalaiele!" 
Numbers24:6 Ma di zale kala jihonga jauisu, kala mabhia mazukamena ku ngiji, kala miẋi ia mixitu ia phaphe Jihova, kala miẋi ia misédulu bhu mbandu ia menha." 
Numbers24:7 Itabhu iê i subhajaka menha, mbutu iê a i kuua ku menha mavulu, sobha iê u tunda Akake mu kijingu, utuminu uê u zangalala." 
Numbers24:8 Nzambi ua mu katula mu Ijitu; uala ni nguzu kala phakasa; ifuẋi iamukuá u i dia, andala a bhânga-nê, ifuba iâ u i bukujula, u a asa muene mifula ié." 
Numbers24:9 Ua butama, ua zeka kala hoji, mamʼa hoji mukuâ; nanhi u mu lokalala? A-zediue oso a ku zediuisa, a a bhubhidile oso a ku bhubhidila." 
Numbers24:10 Bhenhobho Balake njinda i mu kuata ia Balamu, u beta makanda a maku; Balake anga u ambela Balamu, uixi: Nga ku kolomona phala jinguma jami u ngi tele-nâ mázui; ua mono-phe, ua a te kizediuise kioso, mu lutatu luosʼulu!" 
Numbers24:11 Muangana-phe kiá uie kʼoxi ienu ku ua tundu; eme ngʼambele ku ku bhanga ujitu uavulu, maji ua mono Jihova ua ku fudisa-u." 
Numbers24:12 Balamu anga u ambela Balake, uixi: Ki ngi ki tangelele ku jiphunga jé, jele ku ngi takana, ngixi:" 
Numbers24:13 Balake né u ngi bhana inzu iê iezala phalata ni ulu, ki ngi tena kusomboka kizuelu kia Jihova, mu bhanga kima kiauabha mba kiaiibha kia muxima uami; kioso kizuelu kia ngi bhana Jihova, ki kiene ki ngi zuela?" 
Numbers24:14 Kiki-phe, ngiia kiá koʼkuetu; imana-phe, ngi ku tangele kioso o kifuẋi kiki ki kia kà bhanga ku kifuẋi kié izuua ia hádia." 
Numbers24:15 Anga u kuata kifika kiê uixi: Zuela, u Balamu dia monʼ a Beola, Zuela, u mukua diesu dia kumona;" 
Numbers24:16 u zuela ió uevu maka ma Nzambi, uejiia ni uijidilu ua Suke-ku, u mona kisukila kia Muteni-a-ioso; uia ku kiambu, maji mesu a tono;" 
Numbers24:17 nga mu mono, maji ki lelu; bhu nga mu muena, ki bhabha; kua kà tunda théthembua mua Jakobo ku kala mbasá muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele, Mouabhe a ka mu beta mbandu ni mbandu, akua jimvunda a kà a xinina bhoxi, ana oso a Sete a kà a jikinisa" 
Numbers24:18 Idomo u di bhanga mbole iê, ni Siiele kiómuene, kua iá a mu kexile jinguma jê, kioso Izalaiele kia kà bhanga undanda." 
Numbers24:19 Mua Jakobo mua kà tunda ngûngu, u tumina, ua kà buidisa oso a subhuka mu jimbanza." 
Numbers24:20 Anga u tala kua Amaleke, u kuata kifika kiê, uixi: Amaleke ua kexile ku pholo, ku ifuẋi ioso; maji o ku dizubhilu kua kàia-phe, u buika." 
Numbers24:21 Anga utala akua Kene, u kuata kifika kiê, uixi: Bhua kolo muene bhu ua tungu, kikalanga mukuâ, ku ditadi dia kipena," 
Numbers24:22 kiene kimoxi, mukua Kene hinu a mu sengulula, hadia, Asula u ku kuta hé u ku ambata." 
Numbers24:23 Anga u kuata dingi kifika kiê, uixi: Aiué! Ebhi-phe a kà kala-ku, kizuua Nzambi kia kà bhanga kiki?" 
Numbers24:24 Kua kà tunda jinaviiu ku kibumu kia Kitimi, a kà tatesa Asula, a kà tatesa ue Ebele, kuma muene ue a kà mu buidisa." 
Numbers24:25 Balamu anga u balumuka-bhu, uenda, u vutuka ku bhata diâ; Balake ue uela ni njila iê." 
Numbers25:1 Izalaiele anga a kala bhu Xitimi; kifuẋi anga a kuata kubhanga undumbu ni anʼa ahatu a Mouabhe; 
Numbers25:2 kuma a exana ku jisata ja mahamba mâ; kifuẋi anga a dia, a fukamena nzambi jâ." 
Numbers25:3 Izalaiele kifua a di bande kua Baale-peole; njinda ia Jihova anga i uama ia kuatela Izalaiele. 
Numbers25:4 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Kuata Makota oso ku kifuẋi, a bhange kiki, u a nhenge bhu pholo ia Jihova, mu muanha uatu, phala njinda iavulu ia Jihova i ile kuengi." 
Numbers25:5 Mozé anga u ambela afundixi a Izalaiele, uixi: Jibhenu kala muthu athuʼê oso a di bande kua Baale-peole." 
Numbers25:6 Bhenhobho, bhu kala muthu ku anʼa Izalaiele, u bheka muʼaxaxi ka jiphange jê, muhatu mukua Midiiane, ku mesu muene a Mozé ni ku mesu a kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, kioso kiala kudila bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena." 
Numbers25:7 Finehase, monʼa Eleazale, monʼa nganga Alá, kia ki mono, ua balumuka muʼaxaxi ka kilômbo, u kuata ngumba bhu lukuaku luê;" 
Numbers25:8 u kaiela diiala dienhidi dia Izalaiele katé mu balaka, u toma kiiadi kiâ, ni diiala dia Izalaiele ni muhatu, mu mala muene. Kiene kia sukika kibhuika, kia kuatele kiá anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers25:9 Afu-phe ku kibuika kienhókio makuinhi aiadi a midi ni midi jiuana. 
Numbers25:10 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi;" 
Numbers25:11 Finehase, monʼa Eleazale, monʼa nganga Alá, muene uebhesa njinda iami iandekela kukuata Izalaiele, kuma kituxi muʼaxaxi kenu kia mu iibhila kala eme ki kia ngi iibhila, kiene kia ngi fudisa kubuikisa anʼa Izalaiele, kuma kia ngi iibhila kiavulu kia bhange." 
Numbers25:12 Kala kiki, u mu ambela; Nga bangana-nê kikutu kia uembu;" 
Numbers25:13 ki kala kia muene, ni anʼê a mu bhingana, kikutu kia unganga u nangenena; kuma ua kexile ni muanu ua kuzokela Nzambi iê, iú ua bhitisa kiamenga phala anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers25:14 Diiala dienhidi a mu jibhila kumoxi ni muhatu mukua Midiiane, dijina diê Nzidi, monʼa Salu, kilamba mu dibhata dia jitata ku muiji ua Ximinhá." 
Numbers25:15 Muhatu mukua Midiiane, dijina diê Kosbi monʼa Zule; tatʼâ kilamba ue mu dibhata dia jitata ku Midiiane." 
Numbers25:16 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers25:17 Akua Midiiane mu a tatesa, mu a kuame," 
Numbers25:18 kuma ene a mi tatesa ni midiangu iâ ia mi tobhesa na-iu mu mulonga ua Peole, ni mu mulonga ue ua Kosbi, monʼa kilamba kia Midiiane, phange iâ ia muhatu, a mu jibhile kizuua kia kibuika mu mulonga ua Peole." 
Numbers26:1 Mu kukala, kia zubha kubhita o kibuika kienhókio, Jihova u ambela Mozé ni Eleazale, monʼa nganga Alá, uixi:" 
Numbers26:2 Alula dingi kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, oso ala mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba ku makuinhi aiadi a muvu kua di te, ku mabhata ma jitata jâ, oso makuenze a Izalaiele a tena kuia ku ita." 
Numbers26:3 Ni Mozé-phe ni Eleazale, nganga, hé a zuela-nâ mu dinhana dia Mouabhe, bhu mbandu ia Njolodá, sámbua dia lulama ni Jedikó, exi:" 
Numbers26:4 Alulenu kifuẋi, ala mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu, mba kua di te; kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, ni ku anʼa Izalaiele, a tundu mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Numbers26:5 Lubene, muene phande-kumbi ia Izalaiele; anʼa Lubene a mala Hanoko ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hanoko; Palu ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Palu;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezelone ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hezelone; Kami ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Kami. 
Numbers26:7 Iá ene mabhata ma anʼa Lubene; o kialula-mu, a bhana makuinhi auana a midi, ni midi jitatu, ni hama sambuadi ni makuinhi atatu." 
Numbers26:8 Palu uavu anʼê a mala, Eliiaba:" 
Numbers26:9 Eliiaba, anʼê a mala, Nemuuele, ni Datane, ni Abilamo. Ene Datane ni Abilamu a di tungula mu kionge; a kitukila Mozé ni Alá kumoxi ni kibuka kia Kola, kia kitukila Jihova," 
Numbers26:10 mavu anga a jikuka, a a minha kumoxi ni Kola, kiafu kibuka kiókio; thembu iene imoxi kia bhi ku túbhia hama jiiadi ja mala ni makuinhi atanu, anga a di bhanga kijimbuete." 
Numbers26:11 Kienhiki-phe anʼa Kola kafu, kana." 
Numbers26:12 Anʼa Ximinhá a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Nemuuele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Nemuuele; kua Jamini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jamini; kua Jakini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jakini; 
Numbers26:13 kua Zelehe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zelehe; Saúlu ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Saúlu; 
Numbers26:14 enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Ximinhá, makuinhi aiadi a midi ni midi jiiadi ni hama jiiadi." 
Numbers26:15 Anʼa Ngade a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Zefoni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zefoni; kua Hangi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hangi; kua Suni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Suni. 
Numbers26:16 Kua Ojini ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ojini; kua Edi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Edi; 
Numbers26:17 kua Alodi, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Alodi; kua Adeli, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Adeli." 
Numbers26:18 Enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Ngade, a alula-mu a tena makuinhi auana a midi ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers26:19 Anʼa Juda a mala: Hele ni Onane; Hele ni Onane-phe, a fuila mʼoxi ia Kanana." 
Numbers26:20 Anʼa Juda a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Selahe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Selahe; kua Peleze ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Peleze; kua Zelehe ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Zelehe. 
Numbers26:21 Anʼa Peleze a mala: Kua Hezelone ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hezelone; Hamule ua bhanga dibhata dibhata dia akua Hamule. 
Numbers26:22 Enhá ene o mabhata ma Juda, a alula a tena makuinhi sambuadi a midi, ni midi jisamanu, ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers26:23 Anʼa Isakale a mala ku mabhata mâ: Kua Tola ua bhanga dibhata dia Tola; kua Puvah ua bhanga dibhata dia Puvah; 
Numbers26:24 kua Jasube ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jasube; kua Ximidiioni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ximidiioni; 
Numbers26:25 enhá ene mabhata ma Isakale, a alula a tena makuinhi asamanu a midi ni midi jiuana, ni hama jitatu." 
Numbers26:26 Anʼa Nzebulone a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Selede ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Selede; kua Elone ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Elone; kua Jaheleele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jaheleele. 
Numbers26:27 Enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Nzebulone, a alula a tena makuinhi asamanu a midi ni hama jitanu." 
Numbers26:28 Anʼa Zuze a mala ku mabhata mâ: Manasa ni Ifalaimi. 
Numbers26:29 Anʼa Manasa a mala: kua Makidi ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Makidi; Makidi u vuala Ngiliiade: kua Ngiliiade ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ngiliiade. 
Numbers26:30 Anʼa Ngiliiade a mala: kua Iezele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Iezele; kua Heleke ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Heleke; 
Numbers26:31 kua Axidiiele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Axidiiele; kua Xikeme ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Xikeme; 
Numbers26:32 kua Semida ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Semida; Hefele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hefele. 
Numbers26:33 Zelofadi-phe monʼa Hefele, ua diiala, anga u vuala ahatu oso, ka moneka monʼa diiala; anʼê a ahatu majina mâ Makala, ni Noué, Hokala, Midika, ni Tidiza." 
Numbers26:34 Enhá ene mabhata ma Manasa: A alula a tena makuinhi atanu a midi ni midi jiiadi, ni hama sambuadi." 
Numbers26:35 Enhá anʼa Ifalaimi a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Sutela ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Sutela; kua Bekele ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Bekele; Kua Tahane ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Tahane. 
Numbers26:36 Anʼa Sutela a mala enhá: Kua Elane ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Elane. 
Numbers26:37 Enhá ene mabhata ma anʼa Ifalaimi, a alula a tena makuinhi atatu a midi ni midi jiiadi, ni hama jitanu. Iá ene anʼa Zuze ku mabhata mâ." 
Numbers26:38 Anʼa Bejamí a mala, ku mabhata mâ: Kua Bela, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Bela; kua Haxibele, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Haxibele; kua Ahilamu, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ahilamu;" 
Numbers26:39 kua Sufami, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Sufami; kua Hufami, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hufami." 
Numbers26:40 Anʼa Bela a mala, Alede ni Naamane: kua Alede, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Alede; Naamane ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Naamane." 
Numbers26:41 Enhá ene anʼa Bejamí ku mabhata mâ; a alula a tena makuinhi auana a midi ni midi jitanu, ni hama jisamanu." 
Numbers26:42 Enhá anʼa Dane a mala ku mabhata mâ: Kua Xuhamu, ua bhanga dibhata dia Kua Xuhamu. Enhá ene o mabhata ma Dane, kala kia tokala mu kuvuadiua kuâ, mu mabhata mâ." 
Numbers26:43 Mabhata moso ma akua Xuhamu, a alula a tena makuinhi asamanu a midi ni midi jiuana, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers26:44 Anʼa Asele a mala ku mabhata mâ: Kua Imnahe, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Imnahe; kua Ixivi, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ixivi; kua Bediia, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Bediia." 
Numbers26:45 Anʼa Bediia, a mala: kua Hebele, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Hebele; kua Malakiiele, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Malakiiele." 
Numbers26:46 Monʼa Asele ua muhatu dijina diê Seia. 
Numbers26:47 Enhá ene o mabhata ma anʼa Asele, a alula a tena makuinhi atanu a midi ni midi jitatu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers26:48 Anʼa Nafitali a mala ku mabhata mâ: kua Jaziiele, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jaziiele; kua Nguni ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Nguni;" 
Numbers26:49 kua Jezele, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Jezele; kua Xileme ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Xileme." 
Numbers26:50 Enhá ene o mabhata a Nafitali, a alula a tena makuinhi auana a midi ni midi jitanu, ni hama jiuana." 
Numbers26:51 Iá ene a alula ku anʼa Izalaiele, a tena hama jisamanu ja jimidi ni midi imoxi, ni hama sambuadi ni makuinhi atatu." 
Numbers26:52 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers26:53 Enhá ene u u uanena ixi ia undundu uâ, u kaiela kioso kia bhana majina mu dialuilu." 
Numbers26:54 Ala kota mu kuvula ni undundu uâ u kala kota, ala ndenge mu kuvula ni undundu uâ, u kala ndenge; undundu a u sokesa ni dialuilu diâ." 
Numbers26:55 Maji-phe ixi a i uana ku muondona a lundula mu majina a mabhata a jitata jâ. 
Numbers26:56 Kulundula ku tunda mu muondona, kioso kia uanena iá avulu ni iá a tolo." 
Numbers26:57 Enhá ene a alula ku Jilevita, ku mabhata mâ: kua Ngelexone, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Ngelexone; kua Kohate, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Kohate; kua Meladi, ua bhanga dibhata dia akua Meladi." 
Numbers26:58 Enhá o mabhata ma Levi: akua Libini, akua Hebolone, akua Mahaline, akua Muxi, akua Kola. Kohate u vuala Analá." 
Numbers26:59 Analá, muhatuʼê dijina diê Jakobede, monʼa Levi ua muhatu; Levi ua mu vualela mu Ijitu; Jakobede, muhatu ua Analá, anga u mu vualela Alá, ni Mozé, ni Midiiana, phange iâ ia muhatu." 
Numbers26:60 Alá anga u vuala Nadabe ni Abihu, ni Eleazale, ni Itamale." 
Numbers26:61 Nadabe ni Abihu anga a fua ki ejiie ni túbhia tuengi bhu pholo ia Jihova. 
Numbers26:62 Kia alula a tena makuinhi aiadi a midi ni midi jitatu, mala oso ala mu mbeji imoxi, mba kua di te kiá; kuma ene ka alula mu anʼa Izalaiele ni akuâ, mukonda ene ka a bhana undundu ua kima mu anʼa Izalaiele." 
Numbers26:63 Enhá ene a alula kuala Mozé ni nganga Eleazale; alula anʼa Izalaiele, mu dinhana dia Mouabhe, bhu mbandu ia Njolodá, sámbua dia lulama ni Jedikó." 
Numbers26:64 Maji-phe mudiâ, ni muthu ngó kala-mu ua bokuene mu dialuilu dia bhangele Mozé ni Alá, kia alula anʼa Izalaiele mu kikangalakata kia Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Mukonda Jihova ua ki ambele, uixi: Enhá kidi muene a kà fuila mu kikangalakata. Ni muthu ngó ka subhuka-ku, kale ngó Kalebe dia Jefune ni Josuué dia Nune; ene ngó a subhuka." 
Numbers27:1 Bhenhobho ana a Zelofadi a ahatu eza, Zelofadi-phe muene monʼa Hefele, monʼa Ngiliiade, monʼa Makidi, monʼa Manasa, ku mabhata ma Manasa monʼa Zuze; ana ahatu enʼiá majina mâ: Makala, ni Noué, ni Hokala, ni Midika, ni Tidiza." 
Numbers27:2 Anga emana bhu pholo ia Mozé, ni bhu pholo ia nganga Eleazale, ni bhu pholo ia ilamba ioso ia kilômbo, bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena, hé a zuela, exi:" 
Numbers27:3 Tatʼetu ua fuila mu kikangalakata; ka di bandele-phe kua ió a bhukumukina Jihova, o kibuka kia Kola; ua di fuila ngó ni ituxi iê muene; ka xi monʼa diiala." 
Numbers27:4 Dijina dia tatʼetu-phe di jimukina-hi mu kaẋi ka dianda diê, mukonda dia kukamba monʼa diiala? Etu uetu tu bhane ue undundu uetu, kumoxi ni jiphange ja tatʼetu ja mala." 
Numbers27:5 Mozé anga u bheka maka mâ bhu pholo ia Jihova. 
Numbers27:6 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers27:7 Anʼa Zelofadi, a ahatu, a zuela kiambote; u a bhana muene kulundula kumoxi ni jiphange ja tatʼâ; undundu uoso ua xi tatʼâ, u bhite kua ene." 
Numbers27:8 Uá kambela ue anʼa Izalaiele kuma, hé bhu kala muthu uafu, ka xi monʼa diiala, undundu uê monʼê ua muhatu u u lundula." 
Numbers27:9 O kia kamba mona ua muhatu, undundu uê mu u bhana jiphange jê ja mala." 
Numbers27:10 O kia kamba jiphange jê ja mala, undundu uê mu u bhana jiphange ja tatʼâ, ja mala." 
Numbers27:11 O tatʼâ ue, kia kamba jiphange ja mala, undundu uê mu u bhana ndandu iê uoso ua mu tokala, uoso ua mu zukama mu undandu, muene u u lundula; ku anʼa Izalaiele ki kala kijila kia kutetutula milonga, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers27:12 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Eie u banda mu mulundu iú ua Abadimi, o ixi i ngi bhana anʼa Izalaiele u i muena ku sámbua." 
Numbers27:13 O ki u zubha ku i mona, eie ue a ku bhongolola ku malembʼê, kala phange ié Alá kia mu bhongolola." 
Numbers27:14 Mukonda mua kambe kutumaka kizuelu kiami mú kikangalata kia Zini, kia bhiti mvunda ia kilômbo, enu mua kambe ku ngi kôlesa ku mesu mâ, bhua fuafuela menha. (Ene o menha a Medibah, bhu Kadexi, mu kikangalakata kia Zini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mozé anga ua ambela Jihova, uixi:" 
Numbers27:16 Jihova, Nzambi ia jinzumbi ja xitu ioso, a xinde muthu, u xala mu kulanga o kilômbo," 
Numbers27:17 a a kale ku pholo mu kutunda ni mu kubokona, a a songuele mu njila, a a bhiẋidise kididi, mbebhu kilômbo kiangene kia Jihova ki ki kale kala jimbudi ja kambe mubidi." 
Numbers27:18 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi: Kuata Josuué dia Nune, diiala uala ni Nzumbi moxi diê, u mu tule lukuaku lué ku thandu;" 
Numbers27:19 u mu bheke bhu pholo ia nganga Eleazale, ni bhu pholo ia kilômbo kioso, u mu tendelele bhu pholo ia ene oso." 
Numbers27:20 Ku kijingu kié u katula-ku, u ta kua muene, phala kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele a mu tumake." 
Numbers27:21 Muene uimana bhu pholo ia nganga Eleazale, o ió u kala mu ku mu zambuila, muzambu ua Udimi kua Jihova, hé bhu kala kutunda, kizuelu ki tunda kua muene; hé bhu kala kubokona, kizuelu ki tunda kua muene; ni muene ni ana oso a Izalaiele kumoxi, kilômbo kiê kioso." 
Numbers27:22 Mozé anga u bhanga kala kia mu tumu Jihova; u kuata Josuué, u mu bheka bhu pholo ia nganga Eleazale, ni bhu pholo ia kilômbo kioso;" 
Numbers27:23 anga u mu tula maku u mu tendelela, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé." 
Numbers28:1 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers28:2 Tuma anʼa Izalaiele, ua a tangela, kuma: Ujitu uami, kúdia kuami kua jisata ja kuoha, ni dizumba diami diambote mu kala ni muanu ua ku ngi bhakuila-ju mu thembu ioso ia tokala." 
Numbers28:3 Ua kà a tangela kiki: Sata iami ia kuoha i mu satela Jihova, ienʼiii: Tumbudi tua jindumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka, kizuua tuiadi, kizuua tuiadi, mu sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso." 
Numbers28:4 Mbudi imoxi mu i sata mu kimene, mbudi ia mukuá mu i sata mu ngoloxi;" 
Numbers28:5 ni kakuinhi ka efah ka fuba ia kábhia, (ia uabha kiambote), ia sata ia mákudia, iólunge ni mbandu ia kauana ia hine ia maji ózunze." 
Numbers28:6 Kifua sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso, ia mi lekelela ku mulundu ua Sinai, dizumba diambote, ujitu a u bhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova." 
Numbers28:7 Sata iê ia kúnua, mbandu ia kauana ia hine mu mbudi imoxi; ua kà lundulula dikáu didi dia kúnua kua nguzu kua Jihova, bhu kididi kikôla mu lumbu lua balaka." 
Numbers28:8 Mbudi ia mukuá mu i sata mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, kala sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata ia kúnua, kiene kimoxi ni mu kimene, ujitu a u bhakula ni túbhia, ua dizumba diambote kua Jihova." 
Numbers28:9 Mu kizuua kia sabhalu-phe, tumbudi tuiadi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka, ni tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah tua fuba ia uabha kiambote, ia sata ia mákudia, iólunge ni maji, ni sata iê ia kúnua;" 
Numbers28:10 iene sata ia kuoha ia di te-ku ia kizuua kia sabhalu, o sata ia kuoha, ia izuua ioso ue ki i kambe." 
Numbers28:11 Ni mu kumateka jimbeji jenu, mu bhakula ue kua Jihova sata ia kuoha, tungombe tuiadi tua ndumbe, kilumbe kia mbudi, sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers28:12 ni tukuinhi tutatu tua efah tua fuba ia kábhia ia sata ia mákudia, iòlunge ni maji, tu di bandekeze ku kangombe kamoxi ka ndumbe; ni tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah tua fuba ia kábhia ia sata ia mákudia, iólunge ni maji, tu di bandekeza ku kilumbe kia mbudi;" 
Numbers28:13 ni mbandu ia kakuinhi ia fuba ia kábhia, iólunge ni maji, ia sata ia mákudia, ia kà di bandekeza ku mbudi ia muvu umoxi, mbudi kiene, mbudi kiene; iene ioso iii sata ia kuoha ia dizumba diambote, a i bhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova." 
Numbers28:14 O sata ia mákunua kaxaxi ka hine ka vinhu ku ngombe, mbandu ia katatu ia hine ku kilumbe kia mbudi, mbandu ia kauana ia hine ku mbudi ia muvu umoxi; sata iii, sata ia mbeji ia thethama, jimbeji joso ku muvu kiene." 
Numbers28:15 Ni kisutu kia hombo, kia sata ia ituxi, ia kusatela Jihova; kioso kia ki bhakula, kifua kiengi ue, ki di bandekeza ku sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso, ni sata iâ ia kúnua." 
Numbers28:16 O bhu mbehji ia kamoxi, kizuua kiê kia kakuinhi ni kiuana, Phasu iangene ia Jihova." 
Numbers28:17 Kizuua kia kakuinhi ni kitanu ki kala kia kizokola, mu dia jimbolo ja kambe kifulufulu kia kinanesa mu sambuadi dia izuua." 
Numbers28:18 Kizuua kiê kia dianga ki kala kionge kikôla; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso; 
Numbers28:19 kikale-phe mu bhana ujitu ua kubhakula ni túbhia, sata ia kuoha i mu satela Jihova: Tungombe tuiadi tua ndumbe, kilumbe kimoxi kia mbudi, ni sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, mu tu kuata tua kambe dixaka." 
Numbers28:20 Bhu kala ni sata ia mákudia, fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji; tukuinhi tutatu tua efah tuia ku ngombe, tukuinhi tua efah tuia ku kilumbe kia mbudi;" 
Numbers28:21 kakuinhi kamoxi ku mbudi, ia muvu umoxi, sambuadi dioso kiene;" 
Numbers28:22 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi, ia ku mu bhangela kiamenga." 
Numbers28:23 Ienhiʼii iene i mu bhakula, kifua ia di bandekeza; o sata ia kuoha, ia kimene, ia izuua ioso, ki i kambe." 
Numbers28:24 Kiene ki nga xindʼiki, kiene ki mu bhanga jinga mu sambuadi dia izuua, mu bhana kúdia ni kúnua kua kubhakula ni túbhia, ku bhana dizumba diambote kua Jihova; kifua ioso iii ia di te-ku, o sata ia kuoha, ia izuua ioso, ki i kambe." 
Numbers28:25 Kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe, mu kala ni kionge kikôla; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso." 
Numbers28:26 Kiene kimoxi ue dingi, kizuua kia ibundu ia kutomona, mu bhana kua Jihova sata ia mákudia, mu kutana kuenu kua jisemana, mu kala ue ni kionge kikôla, ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso." 
Numbers28:27 Benhobho-phe kiá, mu bhana sata ia kuoha, ia dizumba diambote kua Jihova: Tungombe tuiadi tua ndumbe, kilumbe kimoxi kia mbudi, sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi;" 
Numbers28:28 ni sata iâ ia mákudia, fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, tukuinhi tutatu tua efah ku ngombe, tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah ku kilumbe kia mbudi," 
Numbers28:29 kakuinhi kamoxi ku kambudi, ka muvu umoxi, kambudi kiene, kambudi kiene, ku sambuadi dioso;" 
Numbers28:30 kisutu kimoxi kia hombo, kia ku mi bhangela kiamenga." 
Numbers28:31 Iene ioso i di bandekeza ku sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso, ni sata iê ia mákudia, mu i bhana, ki i moneka dixaka, kumoxi ni sata ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:1 O mu mbeji ia kasambuadi, kizuua kiê kia kamoxi, mu kala ni kionge; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso; ki kala kizuua kienu kia kuxika jikoloneta;" 
Numbers29:2 anga mu bhakula sata ia kuoha, kuma dizumba diambote kua Jihova: Kangombe kamoxi ka ndumbe, kilumbe kimoxi kia mbudi, sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka:" 
Numbers29:3 ni sata iâ ia mákudia, fuba ia kábhia iólunge ni maji, tukuinhi tutatu tua efah ku kangombe, tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah ku kilumbe kia mbudi," 
Numbers29:4 kakuinhi kamoxi ku kambudi, ka muvu umoxi, sambuadi dioso kiene;" 
Numbers29:5 ni kisutu kimoxi kia hombo, kia sata ia ituxi, kia ku mi bhangela kiamenga." 
Numbers29:6 O jisata ja kuoha ja mbeji iathethama jengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata ia mákunua, iamukuá iii ia di bandekeza, iene ioso ni ijiia iê, mu dizumba diambote, ujitu a u bhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova." 
Numbers29:7 Kizuua-phe kia kakuinhi, kia mbeji ienhiʼii ia kasambuadi, mu kala ue ni kionge kikôla; mu tatesa mienhu ienu; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso;" 
Numbers29:8 maji-phe mu bhakula sata ia kuoha, ia Jihova, mu dizumba diambote: Kangombe kamoxi ka ndumbe, kilumbe kia mbudi, sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi; ki tu moneka dixaka; mu i kuata;" 
Numbers29:9 ni sata iâ ia mákudia, fuba ia kábhia, iólunge ni maji, tukuinhi tutatu tua efah ku kangombe, tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah ku kilumbe kia mbudi," 
Numbers29:10 kakuinhi kamoxi ku kambudi, ka muvu umoxi, sambuadi dioso kiene;" 
Numbers29:11 ni kisutu kia hombo, kimoxi, kia sata ia ituxi; kua di te sata ia ituxi ia kiamenga, kua di te sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia mákunua." 
Numbers29:12 Kiene kimoxi ue mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ni kitanu, mbeji iene ia kasambuadi, mu kala ue ni kionge kikôla; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso; mu bhanga fesa ia Jihova mu sambuadi dia izuua;" 
Numbers29:13 anga mu bhana sata ia kuoha, ujitu a u bhakula ni túbhia, u bhana dizumba diambote kua Jihova: Kuinhi niʼtatu dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe ia mbudi iiadi, kuinhi ni uana dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:14 ela-phe ni sata ia mákudia, fuba ia kábhia, iólunge ni maji, tukuinhi tutatu tua efah ku kangombe kamoxi, kuinhi dioso ni kitatu kiene, tukuinhi tuiadi tua efah ku kilumbe kimoxi, iiadi ioso kiene," 
Numbers29:15 kakuinhi kamoxi ka efah ku mbudi, ia muvu umoxi, kuinhi dioso ni kiuana kiene;" 
Numbers29:16 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; ienhiʼii ia di bandekeza, o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua, ki i kambe." 
Numbers29:17 Mu kizuua kia kaiadi, mu bhana kuinhi ni kiiadi dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe iiadi, kuinhi ni uana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:18 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata ia kúnua, ni ku tungombe, ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:19 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia mákunua." 
Numbers29:20 Mu kizuua kia katatu, kuinhi niʼmoxi dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilu-mbe iiadi, kuinhi niʼuana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:21 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata ia mákunua, ni ku tungombe, ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, kala kia soko o dialuilu diâ, sata iii mu i ta-ku kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:22 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:23 Mu kizuua kia kauana, kuinhi dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe iiadi, kuinhi niʼuana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:24 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata ia mákunua, ni ku tungombe ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:25 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata iâ ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:26 Mu kizuua kia katanu, dívua dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe iiadi, kuinhi niʼuana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:27 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata ia mákunua, ni tungombe, ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:28 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia mákunua." 
Numbers29:29 Mu kizuua kia kasamanu, nake dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe iiadi, kuinhi ni uana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:30 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata iâ ia mákunua, ni ku tungombe, ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:31 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:32 Mu kizuua kia kasambuadi, sambuadi dia tungombe tua ndumbe, ilumbe iiadi, kuinhi niʼuana dia tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:33 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata iâ ia mákunua, ni ku tungombe, ni ku ilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:34 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:35 Mu kizuua kia kanake, mu kala ni kionge kia dithoka; ki mu bhange kikalakalu kioso-kioso;" 
Numbers29:36 maji-phe mu bhana sata ia kuoha, ujitu a u bhakula ni túbhia, u bhana dizumba diambote kua Jihova: Kangombe ka ndumbe, kilumbe kia mbudi kimoxi, sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, tua muvu umoxi, ki tu moneka dixaka;" 
Numbers29:37 ela-phe ni sata iâ ia mákudia, ni sata iâ ia mákunua, ni ku tungombe, ni ku kilumbe, ni ku tumbudi, tua muvu umoxi, sata iii mu i ta-ku, kimoxi kiene, kimoxi kiene, kala kia mi bhana kijila;" 
Numbers29:38 ni kisutu kia hombo kia sata ia ituxi; o sata ia kuoha ia izuua ioso iengi, ni sata iê ia mákudia, ni sata iê ia kúnua." 
Numbers29:39 Ienhiʼii iene i mu satela jinga Jihova mu jifesa jenu ja mi xindi, o ia ku di hambelela enuʼenu iengi, ni ia kubhana mibhaku ia kudifikixila, ni sata jenu ja kuoha, ni jisata ja mákudia, ni jisata ja mákunua, ni jisata ja paze." 
Numbers29:40 Mozé anga utangela anʼa Izalaiele ima ioso iii kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé. 
Numbers30:1 Mozé anga u ambela adikime, o mítue ia miji ia anʼa Izalaiele, uixi: Kima kia tumu Jihova kienhiki:" 
Numbers30:2 Se diiala di ta hasa kua Jihova, mba u loka mulôko ua ku di kuta o muenhu uê ni kikutu, ka tena kualuluka bhu dimi; ki kale u kumbidila kioso kia mu tundu ku dikanu diê, kiene kia bhanga." 
Numbers30:3 O muhatu ue, se u ta hasa kua Jihova, anga u di kuta ni kikutu, o muene uala hanji mʼonzo ia tatʼâ, mu undenge uê," 
Numbers30:4 o tatʼâ nʼa kʼivu kia te hasa, kia di kutu o muenhu uê ni kikutu, tatʼâ anga uivué ngó hé u di xibhé, hasa iê-phe ia kuata, o ikutu ioso ia di kutu na-iu muenhu uê, iemana muene." 
Numbers30:5 O tatʼâ-phe kia muivua kuloka, se u mu kidika kuila ki kiene ki u zuela, jihasa jê ki ji kuata dingi, ni ikutu ioso ia di kutu na-iu muenhu uê, ia kutunuka; Jihova phe u mu loloka, mukonda tatâ ua mu kidika." 
Numbers30:6 Se uai-phe mʼonzo ia muadi uê, o ku dihambelela kuê, kua di hambelela na-ku, ku-kuê, ni kuzuela kua lusolo kua zuela ni mizumbu ie, iú ua di kutu muenhu uê," 
Numbers30:7 muadi uê kia kiʼvua, nʼa di xibhé kizuua kioso kia kʼivua; jihasa jê-phe ja kuata, ni ikutu ioso ia di kutu na-iu muenhu uê iemana." 
Numbers30:8 Maji muadi uê-phe kizuua kia kʼivua, hé u mu kidika kuila kana kuzuela kiokio, hasa iê iala na-iu ua i suikika, ni kuzuela kua lusolo kua mizumbu iê, kua kukuta o muenhu uê, ua mu fudisa-ku; Jihova phe u mu loloka-kiu." 
Numbers30:9 Muhatu-phe, hé mutudi, mba a mu senge, hasa iê i kuata muene, ikutu ioso ia di kutu na-iu muenhu uê iemana muene." 
Numbers30:10 Ki ki kala-phe hasa iê ua i tele mʼonzo ia muadi uê, anga u di kuta muenhu uê ni kikutu mba mulôko," 
Numbers30:11 muadi uê hé ua kʼivu, iú ua di xibhé, ka mu kidika, jihasa jê ja kuata, ikutu ioso ia di kutu na-iu muenhu uê, iemana." 
Numbers30:12 Muadi uê-phe hé ua i selula, kizuua kia ivua, ioso ia mu tundu ku mizumbu, ia jihasa, mba ia kikutu kia kukuta o muenhu uê, ki i kuata dingi; mukonda muadi uê ua i selula; Jihova phe u mu loloka-kiu." 
Numbers30:13 Hasa ioso mba mulôko uoso ua te, mu kutatesa muenhu uê, muadi ue u i kuatesa mba u i selula." 
Numbers30:14 Muadi uê-phe se ua di xibhé ku tunda kizuua kuiza kizuua, jihasa jê mba ikutu ioso ia mu kala ku thandu diê, ua i kuatesa muene; ua i kuatesa mukonda kizuua kia ivu ua di xibhé, ka mu kidika." 
Numbers30:15 O ki ela u i kidika, kia zubha ku ivua, kimbamba ki kala kiá kua muene muadi uê." 
Numbers30:16 Iá ene o mabatuilu a tumu Jihova kua Mozé, bhu kaẋi ka diiala ni muhatuʼê, bhu kaẋi ka tata ni monʼê ua muhatu, uala hanhi mu undenge uê monzo ia tatʼâ." 
Numbers31:1 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers31:2 Vutula phonzo ia anʼa Izalaiele kua akua Midiiane; o ki u zubha ku ki bhanga, a ku bhongolola kuàia malembʼé." 
Numbers31:3 Mozé anga u ambela kifuẋi, uixi: Makuenze muʼaxaxi kenu, a maneke kuia ku ita, kúlua ni akua Midiiane, ku a futa phonzo ia Jihova." 
Numbers31:4 Ku muiji kutunda midi, ku muiji kutunda midi, ku miji ioso ia Izalaiele, ni mu a tume ku ita." 
Numbers31:5 Kala kiki, a bhana athu a tundu ku jimidi ja Izalaiele, muiji midi, muiji midi, kifua ene oso a tena kuinhi dia midi ni midi jiiadi a maneka mu kuia ku ita." 
Numbers31:6 Mozé anga ua tuma ku ita, muiji midi muiji midi, ni Finehase dia Eleazale, nganga, uila-nâ kumoxi, uambata imbamba ia dibhezelu ni jikoloneta ja kuxika dízui dia kusolomoka, ua ji kuata bhu maku." 
Numbers31:7 Anga a lua ni Midiiane, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé, hé a jibha-ku mala oso." 
Numbers31:8 Jisobha ja Midiiane anga a ji jibhila kumoxi ni athu amukuá afu: ni Evi, ni Lekeme, ni Zule, ni Hule, ni Leba, jisobha jitanu ja Midiiane, ni Balamu dia Beola ue a mu jibha ni xibhata." 
Numbers31:9 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ambata ahatu a Midiiane ni anʼâ kuma jihutile ja ita; ambata ue ni ibhanga iâ, ni ilumbe, ni jimbongo jâ joso, kuma mbole ia ita." 
Numbers31:10 Jimbonge jâ joso ja tungu, ni mabhata mâ, ni ibangu iâ ioso, a ita mu túbhia." 
Numbers31:11 Anga a tambula imbamba ioso ia bhundu, ni jihutile joso ja athu ni ibhaku." 
Numbers31:12 Anga a i bheka, ni imbamba, ni athu, ni ibhaku, kua Mozé ni kua nganga Eleazale, ni ku kilômbo kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele, bhu kibangu mu dinhana dia Mouabhe, bhu mbandu ia Njolodá sámbua dia lulama ni Jedikó." 
Numbers31:13 Ni Mozé, ni nganga Eleazale, ni ilamba ioso ia kilômbo, a tunda bhu kibangu aia ku a batuila." 
Numbers31:14 Mozé anga u temena makesongo a kifuẋi, ni jithuame ja jimidi ni jithuame ja jihama, oso ala mu tunda ku kikalakalu kia ita." 
Numbers31:15 Mozé anga u a ambela, uixi: Kifua ahatu oso mua a bhake ni muenhu, kuambe?" 
Numbers31:16 Enʼiá-ze, ene a sendula anʼa Izalaiele, mu kaiula ka Balamu, mu kubhukumukina Jihova mu mulonga ua Peole, anga a bheka kibuika mu kilômbo kia Jihova." 
Numbers31:17 Kala kiki jibhenu ana oso a mala, ni ahatu oso ejiia kiá mala mu kuzeka-nâ." 
Numbers31:18 Ahatu oso-phe ala hanji ni undenge uâ kiluua ejiia mala mu kuzeka-nâ, ene mu a bhaka ni muenhu ni mu kale-nâ." 
Numbers31:19 Enu-phe, mu tula hanji mu kanga, ki muize luua mu kibangu, sambuadi dia kizuua; uoso-phe ua jibha muthu, mba ua kuata ku kimbi, kikale mu di bonza kizuua kia katatu ni kia kasambuadi, ni enu ni jihutile jenu." 
Numbers31:20 Ni izuatu ienu, ni kima kioso kia iudika ni kibha, ni ima ia ndemba ja hombo, ni ia muẋi, iene ioso mu i bonza." 
Numbers31:21 Nganga Eleazale anga uambela makuenze a ita, uixi: Kiene kijilʼiki kia kitumu kia bhana Jihova kua Mozé:" 
Numbers31:22 Ima-phe ia ulu, ni phalata, ni ngôndo, ni felu, ni xitanhu, ni ximbu," 
Numbers31:23 ioso i xikina kubhita mu túbhia sé kujila, mu i bhitisa mu túbhia ni i kale iazele; kienhiki-phe mu i bonza ue ni menha ma dibônzo; ima ioso ki i xikina ku i ta mu túbhia, mu i bhitisa mu menha." 
Numbers31:24 Kizuua kia kasambuadi mu sukula izuatu ienu ni mu zele; kiene kiua ki mu bokona mu kibango. 
Numbers31:25 Jihova anga u ambela Mozé, uixi:" 
Numbers31:26 Alula imbamba ia bhundu, ni athu ni ibhaku, ni eie ni nganga Eleazale, ni adiakime, o mítue ia mabhata ma jitata ku kilômbo;" 
Numbers31:27 imbamba ióbhunde-phe mu i uana mbandu jiiadi: mbandu iii ia makuenze a ita, ele mu kúlua, mbandu iii ia kilômbo a xedi bhu kibangu." 
Numbers31:28 U nomona-ku-phe lubhaku lua Jihova, ku makuenze a ita ele mu kúlua: Muenhu umoxi mu hama jitanu ja mienhu, ni ku athu, ni ku jingombe, ni ku jibulu, ni ku ilunga ia jimbudi," 
Numbers31:29 kioso ki u katula ku mbandu ia ene, mu ki bhana kua nganga Eleazale, uene ujitu uangene ua Jihova." 
Numbers31:30 O ku mbandu ia anʼa Izalaiele u katula-ku muenhu umoxi mu makuinhi atanu a mienhu, ni ku athu, ni ku jingombe, ni ku jibulu, ni ku ilunga, kifua ku ibhaku ioso, anga mu i bhana Jilevita ene mu langa balaka ia Jihova." 
Numbers31:31 Ni Mozé ni nganga Eleazale anga a bhanga kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé. 
Numbers31:32 O mbole-phe ieza na-iu makuenze ku bhata: jimbudi, hama jisamanu ja jimidi, ni makuinhi sambuadi a midi, ni midi jitanu;" 
Numbers31:33 jingombe, makuinhi sambuadi a midi ni midi jiiadi;" 
Numbers31:34 jibulu, makuinhi asamanu a midi ni midi imoxi;" 
Numbers31:35 o ku athu, makuinhi atatu a midi ni midi jiiadi, ahatu kejiia luua mala mu kuzeka-nâ." 
Numbers31:36 Mbandu-phe ia tokala ku makuenze a ita: jimbudi, hama jitatu ja jimidi, ni makuinhi atatu a midi, ni sambuadi dia midi ni hama jitanu;" 
Numbers31:37 o lubhaku lua Jihova: ku jimbudi, hama jisamanu ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kitanu." 
Numbers31:38 O jingombe, makuinhi atatu a midi, ni midi jisamanu; o lubhaku lua Jihova lu tunda-ku makuinhi sambuadi ni kiiadi." 
Numbers31:39 O jibulu, makuinhi atatu a midi ni hama jitanu; o lubhaku lua Jihova lu tunda-ku makuinhi asamanu ni kamoxi." 
Numbers31:40 Athu kuinhi dia midi ni midi jisamanu; o lubhaku lua Jihova lu tunda-ku, makuinhi atatu a muthu ni kiiadi." 
Numbers31:41 Mozé anga u bhana lubhaku lua ngene lua Jihova kua nganga Eleazale, kala kia tumu Jihova kua Mozé:" 
Numbers31:42 Ku mbandu ia tokala ku anʼa Izalaiele, Mozé ki edi u bhana-ku o makuenze a ita o mbandu iâ, athu ku bhata mbandu,"
