Joshua10:25 Josuué bhenhobho u a ambela, uixi: Ki mu kale ni kekénha, kana ue kukala ni kimbuua; kolenu muẋima, mu te-bhu ukuenze; mbata Jihova, jinguma jenu joso ji mu lua na-ju, ua-nda ku ji bhanga jinga kienhiki." 
Joshua10:26 Josuué anga u a nemeka kiua, u a jibha anga u a nhenga ku miẋi itanu; ananga ku miẋi kuenhoko katé mu ngoloxi." 
Joshua10:27 Mu kuila kumbi di toloka kiá, Josuué utuma kuila a a tulule kiá ku miẋi; hé a a takula mu dibânda mua suameneʼomo; ia a zukika-ku i-matadi iònene, ia xiti kuenhoko katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Joshua10:28 Mu kizuua kienhókio Josuué u tolola Makeda, oso ala-mu u a bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata; sobha ua mu jimisa mbutu, ni muene ni mienhu ioso iakexi-mu; ka xisa-mu kama ka subhuka; o sobha ia Makeda ua mu bhange kala kia bhangele sobha ia Jedikó." 
Joshua10:29 Bhenhobho Josuué ni Izalaiele ioso kumoxi-nê, a tunda ku Makeda anga aia mu Libina anga a bhânga ni Libina;" 
Joshua10:30 Jihova u mu bhakula ue bhu lukuaku lua Izalaiele, ni diembu ni sobha iê, iu ua mu bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata ni atu oso a kexi-mu; ka xisa-ku kama ka subhuka; o sobha iê ua mu bhange kala kia bhange sobha ia Jedikó." 
Joshua10:31 Bhenhobho Josuué ni Izalaiele ioso kumoxi-nê, atunda ku Libina aia mu Lakiji; a konda o mbonge, mvunda ia bambuka;" 
Joshua10:32 Jihova anga u bhakula Lakiji bhu lukuaku lua Izalaiele, ki kúkia iú bhu maku, anga, u mu bhitisa kiá ku mazu a mukuale ni muene ni athu oso a kexi-mu; kioso kia bhange mu Libina kiene ue kia mu bhange." 
Joshua10:33 Holane-phe, sobha ia Ngezele, ubanda mu kuatekesa Lakiji; Josuué-phe ua mu nemeka, ni muene ni kifuẋi kiê, ka mu xila-bhu muthu." 
Joshua10:34 Josuué ni Izalaiele ioso kumoxi-nê, a tunda ku Lakiji iá mu Engolone a mu kondoloka mu kúlua-nê;" 
Joshua10:35 anga a mu kuata maku (a mu tolola) kumbi dienhódio, anga a mu bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata; mienhu ioso ia kexi-mu, buí; ua i jikinisa mu kizuua kienhókio muene, xata-babá! kioso kia bhange mu Lakiji kiene ue." 
Joshua10:36 Kia zubha-phe, Josuué ni Izalaiele ioso kumoxi-nê, atunda ku Engolone a banda mu Hebolone, anga alua-nê." 
Joshua10:37 Hebolone a mu kuata, ia a mu bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata, ni sobha muene ni ji sanzala je mu jimbandu, ni athu oso a kexi-mu; ka xisa-mu muthu ni muenhu, ua a bhitisa ku xibhata kala mu Engolone; u a jikinisa muene, ni diembu ni mienhu ioso ia kexi-mu." 
Joshua10:38 Bhenhobho Josuué-phe, ni Izalaiele ioso kumoxi-nê, a vutukila kua Ndebile, hé a lua-nê." 
Joshua10:39 Iá a mu kuata ni sobha iê, ni jisanzala jé mu jimbandu, anga a a bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata, mienhu ioso ia kexi-mu a i buikisa muene, ka xisa-mu kima ki subhuka. Kiene kia bhange kua Hebolone kiene ue kia bhange Ndebile ni sobha iê, mukuâ ni kia bhangele kua Libina ni sobha ie." 
Joshua10:40 Kala kiki, Josuué oxi iosuʼoio ua i tolola ni mu milundu, ni oxi ioso ia sulu, ni mu iphenza, ni mu jihonga ja menha, ni jisobha jê, buí; ka xisa-ku kima ki subhuka ni muenhu; inda ima ioso ibhuima ua i jikinisa muene, kala kia mu tumu Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
Joshua10:41 Josuué ua andekela ku Kadexi-baneia ni ku a tolola kandú mu Ngaza; oxi ioso ue ia Ngozene, katé mu Ngibiione tulʼé." 
Joshua10:42 Jisobha josuʼojo Josuué ua ji kuatela-bhu kiá muene ni jixi jâ, mu kithangana kimoxi, mbata Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele muene ua kexi kuluila Izalaiele o ita." 
Joshua10:43 Euá, bhenhobho kia zubha kubhanga kiki, Josuué ni Izalaiele ioso muene, athu a ku vutukila kiua bhu kibangu bhu Jidingale." 
Joshua11:1 Mu kuila ima iii iabhiti, Jabine, sobha ia Hazole ua kʼivu, anga u tuma jiphunga kua Jobabe, sobha ia Mandone, ni kua sobha ia Ximilone, ni kua sobha ia Akezafa;" 
Joshua11:1 Mu kuila ima iii iabhiti, Jabine, sobha ia Hazole ua kʼivu, anga u tuma jiphunga kua Jobabe, sobha ia Mandone, ni kua sobha ia Ximilone, ni kua sobha ia Akezafa;" 
Joshua11:2 ni ku jisobha ja kexi ku kusuku, ku milundu, ni mu dinhana mu kuia ku sulu ia Kinelote, ni mu iphenza, ni mu Nafote-dole, ku nzènde ia kalunga, ku mubolokela-kumbi;" 
Joshua11:3 ni ku Makanana a thunda ni a luiji; ni ku Mamodi, ni Mahiti, ni Mapelezi, ni Majebuzi ku milundu; ni ku Mahivi mu betekete ia Helemone, mʼoxi ia Mispa." 
Joshua11:4 Ene osoʼá anga a tunda ni ilombo iâ ia ita, mundu uvula, o nzungule iâ mukua ni kisekele ku kibumu kia kalunga; jikabalu jivula, o makalu ue nzungule." 
Joshua11:5 Jisobha joso jiji jiza, anga ji ta kibangu kiâ bhu menha ma Melone, phala kubhânga ni Izalaiele." 
Joshua11:6 Jihova anga u ambela Josuué, uixi: Kana kukala ni uoma bhu pholo iâ; mbata mungu, bhu kumbi kala didi, ngʼa nemeka anga ngʼa bhakula kiua bhu pholo ia anʼa Izalaiele. Jikabalu jâ mu ji sènda o mixibha, o makalu mâ mu a oha mu túbhia." 
Joshua11:7 Josuué-phe ni makuenze oso-lolo a ita aia-nê kumoxi, a diʼambatesa lusolo anga jinguma a ji tukumuisa bhu menha a Melone; anga a di lukula muenhu umoxi ku thandu diâ." 
Joshua11:8 Jihova anga ua a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua Izalaiele, anga a a kuama muene, aia ni ku a bhesa lusolo katé ku Sidone iònene, ni ku Mijilefote-maine anga a somboluela mu dikôlo dia Mispa, ku mbandu ia thunda. Anga a a jibha-jibha muene katé abhu, ki bhua subhuka muthu." 
Joshua11:9 Josuué anga u a bhanga muene kala kia mu tumu Jihova: jikabalu jâ ua ji sende o mixibha, o makalu â ua oha mu túbhia." 
Joshua11:10 Kia zubha kubhita kiki, mu izuua muenhomo Josuué u vutukila-ku, u tolola Hazole anga sobha iê u mu bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata; kuma Hazole muenhú, mʼokulu muene uakexi o kilolo kiâ kia kutumina jimbanza josuʼiji." 
Joshua11:11 Mienhu ioso ia kexi-mu a i bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata, ia a i jikinisa muene, lalá! ima ioso ibhuima ka xi-mu kima, o sanzala iene ia Hazole a i oha mu túbhia." 
Joshua11:12 Josuué anga u tambula o jisanzala josuʼiji ni jisobha jâ, u a bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata, katé kia a jikinisa muene, kala kia tumine Mozé, selevende ia Jihova." 
Joshua11:13 Hé kima, jisanzala ngó ja kexi ku thala ia tumilundu, jene ngó anʼa Izalaiele ja kambele ku ji jikatesa mu túbhia; Josuué iu ua jikatesa-ku ngó Hazole muene." 
Joshua11:14 O madibhundila oso-phe a tundu mu jisanzala josuʼiji, ni ibhaku, anʼa Izalaiele a i bhûndu ni i kala iâ-ene; athu ene ngó a buikisa ku mazu a xibhata; ka xisa-ku muthu ni muenhu." 
Joshua11:15 Kioso Jihova kia tendelele kua mukalakadi ué Mozé, kiene ue Mozé kia tendelela Josuué; Josuué-phe, kiene muene kia bhange; Ka selula diba, né ngó, ku ima ioso Jihova ia tendelela kua Mozé." 
Joshua11:16 Kienhiki Josuué kia tambula oxi iosuʼoio, ni milundu, ni sulu ioso, ni oxi ioso ia Ngozene, ni manhana, ni jingânga, ni milundu ia anʼa Izalaiele ni manhana mê;" 
Joshua11:17 tundé ku mulundu ua Halake ua ku bandela ku Seíle katé ku Baale-ngadi, mu dikôlo dia Libano, mu betekete ia mulundu ua Helemone; jisobha jâ ua ji kuata ue, iu ua ji kuama muene, ua ji jibha." 
Joshua11:18 Josuué ua lu ita ni jisobha joso jenhihji mu izuua iavulu muene. 
Joshua11:19 Ki bhua kexi sanzala ia bhange paze ni anʼa Izalaiele, kale ngó o Mahivi a tungu mu Ngibiione, Sanzala joso muene ua ji tambuila mu mvunda ia kubhânga." 
Joshua11:20 Mukonda kia tundile kua Jihova kuene, o ku a kolesa muẋima, mbé a solomoke mu kauidila Izalaiele ni mvunda; ia a di bhange-kiu, oso muene buí, sé ngó dingi ku a kuatela henda; mbé o ku a jima mbutu ene oso, kala kia ki tendelela Jihova kua Mozé." 
Joshua11:21 Mu thembu muenhomo, Josuué uejile anga u buikisa ue o ilebha, anʼa Anake, ku milundu ia Hebolone, ni ia Ndebile, ni ia Anabe, ni mu milundu ioso ia Juda, ni mu milundu ioso ia Izalaiele. Josuué anga u a jikinisa muene ni madiembu mâ." 
Joshua11:22 Katé mu ixi ia anʼa Izalaiele ki mua subhukile kilebha, mukuá Anake, né ngó umoxi; a subhukile ngó mu Ngaza, ni mu Ngate ni mu Ajindode." 
Joshua11:23 Kienhiki-phe, Josuué oxi ioso iii ua i tambula; kia bhiti muene kala kioso kia tangele Jihova kua Mozé; Josuué iu ua i bhana anʼa Izalaiele mu ubhinganu, ku jimbambe-jimbambe, ni ku miji-miji. Oxi hé i zumbuka kiua o ku dílua ita." 
Joshua12:1 O munôno ua jisobha jaʼxi, ja buila bhu lukuaku lua anʼa Izalaiele, kia a tolola, anga á vua oxi ia sámbua diná dia Njolodá, ku mbandu ia mutundila-kumbi, uenhú: Tunde kiá ku kahonga ka Anone katé ku mulundu ua Helemone, ni dinhana dioso dia thunda." 
Joshua12:2 Moxi kiá Sihone, sobha ia Mamodi, ua tungile mu Hezebone, o utuminu uê kia kexi mu tumina, tundé ku Alouele ku mbandu ia kahonga ka Anone ni mu kiuanu kia kahonga kenhaka, tunde ue kaxaxi ka Ngiliiade ni ku kahonga ka Jaboke, mu mbambe ia anʼa Amone;" 
Joshua12:3 ngànga iosuʼoio katé ku musanza ua Kinelote ku thunda, katé ku musanza uala mu ngànga, o Kalunga ka Môngua ukexila ku thunda, mu kubhitila ku njila ia Bete-Jesimote, katé ku sulu, mu mbetekete ia Ajindode-pisga. Bhene bhua sukile o utuminu uê." 
Joshua12:4 Kadi, Hoke, sobha ia Basane, ua subhukile ku Jinefalime (o mazonda a fuma mʼukulu) iu ua tungile mu Jitalote ni mu Dilei." 
Joshua12:5 O utuminu uê ua bhitile mu mulundu ua Helemone, ni mu Salaka, ni mu Basane ioso, u di kunga ni mbambe ia akua-Jesule ni akua-Makata, ubhitula kaxaxi ka Ngiliiade, mu mbambe ni Sihone, sobha ia Hezebone." 
Joshua12:6 Enhá, Mozé, o ngunza ia Jihova, ni anʼa Izalaiele, ene a a jibhile; Mozé-phe, o ngunza ia Jihova, oxi ienhiʼii iu ua i bhana akua-Lubene, ni akua-Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, mu ubhinganu." 
Joshua12:7 Jiji ue, jene o jisobha jaʼxi, ja buikisa kuala Josuué ni anʼa Izalaiele, ku sámbua kunu dia Njolodá, ku luiji, tundé ku Baale-Ngadi, mu dikôlo dia Libano, katé ku mulundu ua Halake, ku njila ia kubandela ku Seíle; oxi Josuué iú ua i bhana o miji ia Izalaiele mu undundu uâ, ku jimbambe-jimbambe." 
Joshua12:8 Athu oso kiâ a kexi mu milundu ni mu manhana, ni mu jingànga, ni mu ibonda ia menha, ni mu kikangalakata, ku sulu kunhá, ni ku Nangebe, ixi ioso kiá ia Mahiti, ni Mamodi, ni Makanana, ni Mapelezi, ni Mahivi ni Majebuzi, iòtambule kuala anʼa Izalaiele." 
Joshua12:9 Moxi kiá, sobha ia Jedikó; mukuá o sobha ia Hai, bhu mbandu ia Betele;" 
Joshua12:10 mukuâ, o sobha ia Jeluzaleme; mukuâ, o sobha ia Hebolone;" 
Joshua12:11 mukuâ, o sobha ia Jalemute; mukuâ, o sobha ia Lakiji;" 
Joshua12:12 mukuâ, o sobha ia Engolone; mukuâ, o sobha ia Ngezele;" 
Joshua12:13 mukuâ, o sobha ia Ndebile; mukuâ, o sobha ia Njedele;" 
Joshua12:14 mukuâ, o sobha ia Holoma; mukuâ, o sobha ia Halade;" 
Joshua12:15 mukuâ, o sobha ia Libina; mukuâ, o sobha ia Adulame;" 
Joshua12:16 mukuâ, o sobha ia Makeda; mukuâ, o sobha ia Betele;" 
Joshua12:17 mukuâ, o sobha ia Tapuua; mukuâ, o sobha ia Hefele;" 
Joshua12:18 mukuâ, o sobha ia Afeke; mukuâ, o sobha ia Lazalone;" 
Joshua12:19 mukuâ, o sobha ia Mandone; mukuâ, o sobha ia Hazole;" 
Joshua12:20 mukuâ, o sobha ia Ximilone-Melone; mukuâ, o sobha ia Akezafa;" 
Joshua12:21 mukuâ, o sobha ia Tanake; mukuâ, o sobha ia Mejidu;" 
Joshua12:22 mukuâ, o sobha ia Fadexi; mukuâ, o sobha ia Jokeneame, mu Kalumelu;" 
Joshua12:23 mukuâ, o sobha ia Ndole, mu Nafate-Dole; mukuâ, o sobha ia akua-jixi mu Jidingale;" 
Joshua12:24 mukuâ, o sobha ia Tikiza; ene oso akexi makuinhi atatu a sobha ni umoxi." 
Joshua13:1 Anga Josuué u kuka, ua sunga-ku kiá ku izuua iê; Jihova anga u mu ambela uixi; Eie uakukʼó, ku izuua ua sunga-ku kiá; oxi-phe, iabhingi o ku i tambula, hanhi muene ia nzungule." 
Joshua13:2 Ngi ku londekeza oxi ioso ia sukamena hanji, ienhiʼii; Tala, kua subhuka hanji o jimbambe joso ja akua-Fidixia, ni Jesule ioso-lolo." 
Joshua13:3 Tunde ku Xihole ia lulamena ku thunda ia Ijitu, katé ku mbambe ia Ekolone, ku mbandu ia kusuku, iambe exi ia tokala Makanana; ni jingana jitanu josuʼojo, ja akua-Fidíxia; o mukua Ngaza, ni mukua Ajindode, ni mukua Axikelone, ni mukua Ngate, ni mukua Ekolone;" 
Joshua13:4 ni Mahivi oso tunde ku sulu, oxi ioso ia Makanana, ni Meiala, ia tokala akua Sidonha, katé ku Afeke, ni ku jimbambe ja Mamodi;" 
Joshua13:5 ni oxi ioso ue ia Mangibele, ni Libanu iosololo ku mutundila-kumbi, tundé ku Baale-ngadi, bhu kikota kia mulundu ua Helemone, katé bhu bokuenu dia Hamate;" 
Joshua13:6 ene-oso a tungu mu mulundu tundé Libanu bhu Mijilefote-maine, ni akua Sidonha osololo muene. Eme nga-nda ku a kaiesa muene mbé Izalaiele a mu bhue ku mesu. Hé kima, eie oxi iii uanena-iu anʼa Izalaiele mu jisorte i bhite muene ku ubhinganu uâ, kala ki nga ku ambelele kiá." 
Joshua13:7 Eie kindalʼiki oxi enda kiá ni ku i uana mu ubhinganu ua dívua dia miiji iii, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa." 
Joshua13:8 O kaxaxi kenhaka akuâ a tambuila kiá bhuamoxi ubhinganu uâ ni akua muiji ua Lubene ni akua Ngadi; Mozé muene ua a bhana-u ku sámbua diodio dia Njolodá, ku thunda; kala kia a xindilile Mozé, ngunza ia Jihova." 
Joshua13:9 Tunde ku Alouele uala ku kibumu kia kahonga kaná ka Anone, ni diembu diene mu kaẋi ka dikôlo diná, ngànga ioso ia Mendeba katé ku Dibone tulé." 
Joshua13:10 Ni madiembu oso a Sihone, sobha ia Mamodi, ua hingile mu Hezebone, katé ku mbambe ni anʼa Amone;" 
Joshua13:11 ni Ngiliiade, ni mbambe ioso ia akua Jesule, ni akua Makata, ni mulundu uoso ua Helemone, ni Basane ioso katé Sálaka;" 
Joshua13:12 Ni utuminu uoso ua Joke mu Basane, ua hingile usobha mu Jitalote ni mu Dilei; muene kiá ngó ua subhukile ku mazonda a xahulu (o Jinefalimi), ió a mu jibhile kuala Mozé iú ua mu muange-mu." 
Joshua13:13 Maji-phe anʼa Izalaiele ka kaiesele akua Jesule, né akua Makata, kienhiki Jesule ni Makata axalela muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele, ʼté ni mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Joshua13:14 O mu kuuana ubhinganu, Mozé o muiji ua Levi ka u bhana kima; mukonda o jisata ja kuoha, ja bhana kua Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele, diene o dikanda diâ dia ubhinganu, kala kia a ambelele kiá." 
Joshua13:15 Mozé-phe kia bhana ku muiji ua anʼa Lubene, ku majiku majiku kienhiki:" 
Joshua13:16 Mbambe iâ tundé ku Alouele, iene ku kibumu kia kahonga ka Anone, ni sanzala iene mu kaẋi ka dikôlo, ni ngànga ioso katé ku Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 ni Hezebone ni jisanzala jê josololo, jene mu ngànga: ni Dibone ni Bamote-Baale, ni Bete-Baale-meone;" 
Joshua13:18 ni Jaza, ni Kedimote, ni Mefate;" 
Joshua13:19 ni Kidiataimi, ni Sibima, ni Zefate-Sahale, mu mulundu ua dikota;" 
Joshua13:20 ni Mbete-peiole, ni Ajindode-pisga, ni Bete-jeximote;" 
Joshua13:21 ni jisanzala joso jala mu nganga, ni oxi ioso ia utuminu ua Sihone, sobha ia Mamodi, ua tumina jinga mu Hezebone, a mu toluele kuala Mozé, kumoxi ni jinganga ja Midiiana, ni Evi, ni Lekeme, ni Sule ni Hule ni Lebha o jinganga ja futa jinga lubhaku kua Sihone, kuma ene atungi aʼxi iê." 
Joshua13:22 Anʼa Izalaiele ue a jibhile Balamu, monʼa Beola, kimbanda kia kuzambula, ni amukuá dingi oso a a jibhile kuala ene." 
Joshua13:23 Kienhókio o mbambe-phe ia anʼa Lubene, ia bhiẋidile katé ku Njolodá ni tungiji tuê tuoso, iene o mbambe iê; iii iene o mbambe ia ʼxi ia anʼa Lubene, ku majiku-majiku, o jisanzala joso jenhojo ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua13:24 Muiji ua Ngadi-phe, ku majiku majiku, Mozé ua a bhana," 
Joshua13:25 mbambe kiá Jazele ni jisanzala joso ja Ngiliiade, ni kaxaxi ka ixi ia anʼa Amone, katé ku Alouele, bhua lulamena labá;" 
Joshua13:26 tunde ue ku Hezebone katé ku Lamate-mispa, kumoxi ni Betonime; tunde Mahanaime katé bhua suku o mbambe ia Ndebile;" 
Joshua13:27 o mu dikôlo ue, Bete-alama ni Bete-nimila, ni Sukote ni Safone ua subhukile-ku ku oxi ia utuminu ua Sihone, muenexi mu Hezebone, ni Njolodá ni mbambe iê, katé kua suku o musanza ua Kinelete mu Hezebone, ni Njolodá ni mbambe iê, katé kua suku o musanza ua Kinelete mu sámbua dia Njolodá ku mbandu ia thunda." 
Joshua13:28 Iú uene o ubhinganu ua anʼa Ngadi ua tambula ku majiku mê, o jisanzala joso jenhiji kiá, ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua13:29 O kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, ka uanunuka ku kaxaxi ka mukuá ka muiji ua anʼa Manasa, Mozé ua a bhana ue ubhinganu uâ, kioso kia soko o majiku mâ." 
Joshua13:30 Kienhiki-phe, mbambe iâ, tunde kiá ku Mahanaime, ni Basane iosuʼoio, utuminu uoso ua Hoke, muenexiʼa Basane, ni tumadiembu tuoso tua Jaile tuene mu Basane, makuinhi asamanu a jisanzala," 
Joshua13:31 ni kaxaxi ka Ngiliiade, ni Jitalote, ni Dilei, o jisanzala ja utuminu ua Hoke, mu Basane, a ji bhana phala anʼa Makidi, monʼa Manasa, kifua-phe uene o ubhinganu ua kaxaxi ka anʼa Makidi, ku majiku mâ moso." 
Joshua13:32 Kienhiki kiene Mozé kia uana-uana mu ubhinganu mu ngànga ia Mouabhe, ku sámbua koko dia Njolodá, ki u bhana dikunda ku Jedikó anga u lunga pholo ku mutundila-kumbi, ku thunda." 
Joshua13:33 Maji o muiji ua Levi phe Mozé ka u bhana ubhinganu; kuma o Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele, muene o ubhinganu uâ kala kia mu ambelele-kiu kiá kuala Jihova muene." 
Joshua14:1 Kiki-phe, kiene kia tambula anʼa Izalaielʼiki mu ubhinganu uâ, mʼoxi ia Kanana; nganga Eleazale ni Josuué monʼa Nune, ni makota oso ku jitata ja miiji ia anʼa Izalaiele, kiene kia a uanena, ku jisorte." 
Joshua14:2 Mu ibatu ia ubhinganu uâ, kala kia tumine Jihova, kiala-ku hanji Mozé, phala o dívua dia muiji ni kaxaxi kâ." 
Joshua14:3 Kuma kua tundu kiá miiji iiadi ni kaxaxi, a a bhele kiá undundu uâ kuala Mozé mu sámbua dia Njolodá; maji-phe jilevita ka a bhana undundu ua kima muʼaxaxi kâ." 
Joshua14:4 Anʼa Zuze, ene-ku a di bhange miiji iiadi, Manasa ni Ifalaimi. O jilevita ka ji bhele undundu, a a bhele ngó jisanzala, phala a tunge a some, ni mikáu iâ ku maxilu a mabhata mbé o ibhaku iâ ni uvuilu ua ilunga iâ." 
Joshua14:5 Kala kia tumine Jihova kua Mozé, kiene kia bhange anʼa Izalaiele, ia a uane oxi." 
Joshua14:6 Thembu ienhoio, anʼa Juda a bhongoloka kua Josuué bhu Jidingale, o Kalebe monʼa Jefune, mukua Kena, anga u mu ambela, uixi: Eie uejiia kiambote o kizuelu kia Jihova, kua Mozé muthu uangene ua Nzambi, kia tu tange ni eie ni eme bhu Kadexe-Banéia," 
Joshua14:7 Thembu ioio eme ngala mu makuinhi a uana a muvu, kia ngi katula Mozé, selevende ia Nzambi bhu Kadexe-Banéia anga u ngi tuma kulonda ixi, anga ngiza ngi mu tudila o kidi kioso kia ngi kala ku muẋima." 
Joshua14:8 Maji-phe, akuetu u ngele-nâ kumoxi, a bhangesa muẋima ua mundu kubotomoka; eme-phe nga jiji ni kukaiela Jihova Nzambi iami ni muẋima uami uoso." 
Joshua14:9 Mozé-phe ua ngi lokela kizuua kienhókio, uixi: Kidi kiene, mavu ió a diota kànda dié dia kinama, hinu à kala undundu ué ni ua anʼé katé ku mululu ni ku mulaula ʼté ku hádia ni hádia, mukonda eie ua jiji mu kaiela Jihova Nzambi iami ni muẋima ué uoso." 
Joshua14:10 O kiki-phe ua mono, Jihova ua ngi bhake hanji ku muenhu, kala kia ki tanga muene, makuinhi auana a mivu ni itanu ioso iii, tunde Jihova kia zuela o maka iá kua Mozé, mu thembu ioso iala hanji anʼa Izalaiele mu kuenda mu kikangalakata; leluʼidi-phe hanji eme-ami-ú, ngala kiá mu makuinhi nake a mivu nʼitanu." 
Joshua14:11 Nguzu iami-phe hanji ii-ié muene kala mu kizuua kienhókio kia ngi katula Mozé; kioso kia kexile nguzu iami mu kizuuʼokio, ni kiki kiene hanji ki iala, ni ia kúlua ita ni ia kutunda ni kubokona." 
Joshua14:12 Kiki-phe, ngi bhane o mulundu iú, uene ua tange Ngana kizuua kienhókio; eie uèvua kizuua kienhókio kia ki tànga, exi: Kuala iiala ia nguzu, anʼa Anake, o jimbonge jâ ja makota, ja bhiti imbaka; imoxi, kuma Jihova ngala-nê bhu mbandu iami, ngi tena ku a kaia, kala kia tànga Jihova." 
Joshua14:13 Josuué anga u mu ta kizediuise anga u bhana ixi ia Hebolone kua Kalebe monʼa Jefune, mu kala undundu uê." 
Joshua14:14 Ixi ia Hebolone anga i kala undundu uangene ua Kalebe monʼa Jefune, mukua Kena, katé mu kizuua kia lelu, mukonda muene ua jijile mu ku kaiela Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele ni muẋima uê uoso." 
Joshua14:15 Hebolone muenhú mʼokulu akexe ku mu ila Kidiate-Halaba, kuma Halaba iú uakexe kota dia muthu, muene ua sombokele akuâ oso muʼaxaxi ka akua Anake. Oxi tunde kienhókio anga i kala ni kunhoha, a zumbuka kúlua ita." 
Joshua15:1 Muondona-phe uabuila kibuka kia anʼa Judá, ku majiku-majiku, ia bhela katé mu mbambe ia Edomo, kikangalakata kia Zini kia xala ku sulu, katé kua sukila o mbandu ia sulu." 
Joshua15:2 O ku sulu-phe, mbambe iâ ia tula ku kahonga kaii mu Kizanga kia Môngua, ku hota ia kizanga ialungu ku sulu;" 
Joshua15:3 ii iaii ni kubandesa katé ku Akalabini, ni mu Zini, i tunda ku sulu i banda mu Kadexe-Banéia, i bhitila mu Hezelone, ibanda mu Adale, anga i kondoloka Kalaka," 
Joshua15:4 i bhitila mu Azemone, ʼijila ku kahonga ka Ijito, anga iia katé mu Kizanga kia Kalunga. Iii ia kà kala iene o mbambe ienu ku mbandu ia sulu." 
Joshua15:5 O mbambe ienu-phe ku mbandu ia thunda, o Kizanga kia Môngua, katé bhu masangano bhua kutukila Njolodá. O mbambe ku mbandu ia kusuku, i matekena mu Kizanga Kia Kalunga bhu masangu a Njolodá." 
Joshua15:6 Anga mbambe iii i bandela kuia ku Bete-hokala anga i bhita ku mbandu ia kusuku, ia Bete-Halaba, anga mbambe iii ienda muene ni kubanda katé bhu ditadi dia Bhoane, monʼa Lubene." 
Joshua15:7 I bande dingi muene katé ku Ndebile, mu kuandekela mu dikôlo dia Akole, ku mbandu ia Kusuku, mu kulunga ku Jidingale, bhu kálundu ka Adumimi, kene ku sulu ia kahonga, katé ku matabhu ma Ene-semexi, anga i tundila-phe ku kisambu kia Ene-Lojele." 
Joshua15:8 Mbambe iii, iie muene ni kubanda mu dikôlo dia monʼa Hinome, katé ki i bhixila kua kexila o Majebuzi a ku sulu; Iú Muene kiá Jeluzaleme. Anga i bandela bhu sungu ia mulundu uala mu kusomboka o dikôlo dia Hinome ku mbandu ia luiji bhua suku o dikôlo dia Malefaimi ku kisambu kia thunda." 
Joshua15:9 Anga o mbambe iii, ki i takuka bhulu dia mulundu, iia ditônono katé bhu kixima kia menha ma Nefetoua; anga itundidila katé ku jisanzala jala mu mulundu ua Efelone, i sombokela hé iia mu Baala; Baala-phe muene Kidiate-Jadimi." 
Joshua15:10 O kienhokio-phe i alukile mu luiji, Baala-phe uaxala, iene iia katé ku milundu ia Seíle, o mulundu ua Jeadimi a u bhitila mu betekete iê ku kisambu kia kexila ku thunda; iú-phe muene Keselone. Anga i kulumuka kiá ku Bete-seme, i bhitila mu Timina," 
Joshua15:11 hé i di kunga dingi ni betekete ia mulundu ua Ekolone ku mbandu ia thunda iê, anga mbambe iii iia muene katé ku Xikelone, i matuke o mulundu ua Baala, i kutukile mu Jabiniiele, phale o masukilu ma mbambe iii ma kutukile mu musanza ua Kalunga." 
Joshua15:12 Maji-phe o muxinda ua mbambe, ku mbandu ia luiji, mbambe iê o Kizanga kia Kalunga ka dikota, bhene bhua suku o mbambe iê; ʻienhiʼii iene o mbambe ia tokala anʼa Judá, mu jimbandu, ku majiku-majiku." 
Joshua15:13 O Kalebe-phe, monʼa Jefune, ua mu bhana undundu uê, muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Judá, kala kioso kia ki tanga Jihova kua Josuué, kiene muene kia bhange; ua mu bhesa sanzala ia Halaba, tata ia anʼa Anake; iene-phe sanzala i exana exi, Hebolone." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebe-phe anga u kaia-mu ana kitatu a Anake, enhó: Sesai, ni Ahimane, ni Talamai, a a vuala kuala Anake." 
Joshua15:15 Mu kutunda bhobho u banda ku akua-bhata mu Ndebile. Ndebile-phe mʼokulu a mu lukile Kidiate-sefele. 
Joshua15:16 Kuala Kalebe: Uoso u tolola Kidiate-sefele, na mu tambula, nganda ku mu bhana monʼami ua muhatu, Akeza, a kale muhatuʼê." 
Joshua15:17 Otiniiele, monʼa Kenaze, phangʼia Kalebe, muene-phe ua tolola. Kalebe iú ua mu bhana Akeza dia monʼê ua muhatu, ku mu sakana." 
Joshua15:18 O kieza-nê mʼonzo, Otiniiele u mu longesa, uixi: Bhinga mukáu ua mavu kua tatʼenu. Muene anga u tuluka ku bulu iê. Kuala Kelebe: Kiebhi?" 
Joshua15:19 Muene-phe uixi: Ngi bhe dibhandulukilu, kuma oxi i ua ngi bhana ia thothuena, ngi bhe-ku ue ndunga ja menha. Muene bhenhobho ua mu bhana jindunga ja majiia, ni jindunga ja tufukufuku." 
Joshua15:20 O iú uene o ubhinganu ua muiji ua anʼa Juda, ku majiku mâ." 
Joshua15:21 O madiembu a muiji ua anʼa Juda a di ambatesa kienhiki katé mu mbambe ia Idomo ku sulu: ene a Kabizeiele, Edele, Jangule," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, ni Adada," 
Joshua15:23 ni Kadexe, ni Hazole, ni Itenana," 
Joshua15:24 ni Zife, ni Teleme, ni Baialote," 
Joshua15:25 ni Hazole-Hadiata, ni Kidiote-Hezelone (muene Hazole)," 
Joshua15:26 ni Amane, ni Sema, ni Molada," 
Joshua15:27 ni Hazalekada, ni Hazemone, ni Bete-palete," 
Joshua15:28 ni Hazale-suale, ni Beleseba, ni Baziotiia," 
Joshua15:29 ni Baala, ni Jimi ni Ezeme," 
Joshua15:30 ni Eletolade, ni Kesile, ni Hóloma," 
Joshua15:31 ni Xikalake, ni Madimaná, ni Sanzana," 
Joshua15:32 ni Lebaiote, ni Silimi, ni Aime, ni Dimone, ni jisanzala kiá ni tumadiembu konda ia makuinhi aiadi niʼvua." 
Joshua15:33 O mu manhana sanzala jiji: Xitaole, Zola, Axina," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoua, Hene-Nganimi, Tapuua, Ename," 
Joshua15:35 Jalemute, Adulame, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Sahalaime, Aditaimi, Ngedela, Ngedelataime, jala kuinhi dia sanzala ni kiuana ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:37 Zanane, Hadasa, Mingidalengadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dilane, Míxipa, Joketele," 
Joshua15:39 Lakiji, Bozekate, Engolone," 
Joshua15:40 Kabone, Lamase, Kitiliji," 
Joshua15:41 Ngedelote, Bete-dangone, Nahama, kuaii Makeda; Jala kuinhi dia sanzala ni jisamanu ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:42 Libina, Etele, Asane," 
Joshua15:43 Ifitale, Axina, Nezile," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akexibe, Malesa; dívua dia sanzala ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:45 Ekolone, ni sanzala jê ni tumadiembu muene kutumina." 
Joshua15:46 Tunde mu Ekolone, tulé ku musanza ua kalunga mabhata oso ala ku mbandu ia Ajindode, ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:47 Ni Ajindode, ni sanzala jê ni tumadiembu muene kutumina; ni Naza, ni sanzala jê ni tumadiembu muene kutumina, tunde ku honga ia Ijitu, katé ni ku Kalunga kadikota (o musanza uonéne) iene o mbambe iê kiá." 
Joshua15:48 O ku milundu-phe, Xamidi, Jatile, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kidiate-sana, (muene Ndebile)," 
Joshua15:50 ni Anabe, Xitemó, Anime," 
Joshua15:51 Ngozene, Holone, Ngilo; kuinhi dia sanzala ni imoxi ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:52 Alabe, Duma, Esane," 
Joshua15:53 Janime, Bete-tapuua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Hunda, Kidiate-hálaba (a mu edi Hebolone), Sihole; dívua dia sanzala ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:55 Maone, Kalumelu, Zife, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jezeleiele, Jokediame, Zanoua," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Ngibeia, Timina; kuinhi dia sanzala ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:58 Halule, Bete-sule, Ngedole," 
Joshua15:59 Mabhata, Bete-anote, Eletekone; sanzala jisamanu ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:60 Kidiate-baale (a mu edi Kidiate-jadimi), ni Laba; sanzala jiiadi ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:61 Mu kikangalakata-phe: Bete-Halaba, Midine, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibisane, ni sanzala ia kangu-dia-môngua, ni Engedi; sanzala jisamanu ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua15:63 Maji anʼa Juda ka tenene kumuanga Majebuzi a tungile mu Jeluzaleme; Majebuzi katé muene kizuua kia lelu axalela momo kumoxi ni anʼa Juda, mu Jeluzaleme." 
Joshua16:1 Kua tundu kiuua o hasa iamukuá iabuila anʼa Zuze, tunde kiá ku Njolodá bhu dikaẋi dia Jedikó, honga iâ ienhoio, ni mu thunda (ku mutundila-kumbi), mu kubanda ni kikangalakata kia Jedikó mu ku di tela ku milundu ia Betele;" 
Joshua16:2 mbambe ibhitila ku Betele anga iʼjiia mu Luze, ii ku jimbambe ja Alaki, katé mu Atalote;" 
Joshua16:3 anga i kulumukina ku luiji ku mbambe ia Jafete, katé mua suku Mbetolone, hé iia mu luiji, i somboluela ku Ngazele, matundilu mê o musanza ua kalunga." 
Joshua16:4 Anʼa Zuze, Manasa ni Ifalaíme, kienhiki kia tambula o undundu uâ." 
Joshua16:5 O mbambe-phe ia anʼa Ifalaime, ku majiku-majiku, mu ku a uanuina o ubhinganu uâ, ienhiʼii: Ku thunda, mbambe iâ Atalote-Dale katé ku Mbetolone ia thunda;" 
Joshua16:6 anga mbambe iii ilungila ku luiji anga ituta ku Makemeta, kuenhoko-phe iia katé kiá ku mbambe ia kusuku, anga ialukila dingi mu thunda i lunga ku mutundila-lumbi katé ku Tanate-Silu, anga i somboluela, i bhita mu thunda ia Janoua;" 
Joshua16:7 anga i kulumuka tundé mu Janoua, ii mu Atalote ni mu Nahalate, hé i tuta Jedikó bhobho, ni mu Njolodá tulé." 
Joshua16:8 Ku mbandu ia mutudila-kumbi-phe, mbambe ii i tunda dingi mu Tapuua anga iia ku luiji ku kahonga ka Kana, katé bhua kutukila kahongʼaka mu Kalunga. Iú uene o ubhinganu ua kibuka kia anʼa Ifalaíme, ku majiku-majiku mâ." 
Joshua16:9 Sai dingi jisanzala-phe ja uanuna-ku phale anʼa Ifalaíme ja kexe mu kaẋi ka ubhinganu ua anʼa Manasa; sanzala jene josuʼojo muene ni tumadiembu tuâ. 
Joshua16:10 O Makanana-phe a tungile mu Ngezele ka a muangene-mu; kienhókio, Makanana-phe enhó katé kizuua kia lelu axalela muʼaxaxi ka akua Ifalaíme; maji-phe enda ni ku a bhikila, ni ku a bhana lubhaku." 
Joshua17:1 Mu kuta jihasa kiki, kua tubhuka kiua ia muiji ua Manasa, mbata muene o phande-kumbi ia Zuze. Makidi, phande-kumbi ia Manasa, muene tatʼa Ngiliiade, kuma uakexe dizonda dia ita, iu ua tambula Ngiliiade ni Basane." 
Joshua17:2 O ana a mukuá a Manasa a a tela ue hasa iâ, ku majiku-majiku, kala kiki; ku anʼa Abiiezele, ni anʼa Heleke, ni anʼa Axidiiele ni anʼa Xikeme, ni anʼa Hefele, ni anʼa Semida; iá ene anʼa mala a Manasa, monʼa Zuze, ku majiku-majiku." 
Joshua17:3 Zelofadi-phe, monʼa Hefele, monʼa Ngiliiade, monʼa Makidi, dia Manasa, ka kexi ni ana a mala, maji anʼa ahatu ngó; majina ma anʼê a ahatu enhá: Makala, Noua, Hokala, Midika ni Tikiza." 
Joshua17:4 Enhá ejiie bhu pholo ia nganga Eleazale, ni bhu pholo ia Josuué monʼa Nune, ni bhu pholo ia ilamba, exi: Jihova ua tendelela Mozé o ku tu bhana uetu ubhinganu muʼaxaxi ka jiphange jetu ja mala; kienhiki, kuma kiene kizuelu kia Jihova kia ki ambe, ua a bhana ue ubhinganu muʼaxaxi ka jiphange ja tatʼâ." 
Joshua17:5 Mueza-phe kuinhi dia makanda phala Manasa ngó, katu-ku dia Ngiliiade ni Basane ala mu sámbua dia Njolodá;" 
Joshua17:6 mbata anʼa ahatu a Manasa, a tambula uâ ubhinganu muʼaxaxi ka anʼê a mala; oxi ia Ngiliiade-phe iabhiti ku anʼa amukuâ a Manasa." 
Joshua17:7 O mbambe-phe ia Manasa tundé kiá kua Asele katé ku Mikameta, ia lulama ni Xikeme ualela ku mbandu ia thunda; anga mbambe ienhiʼii itembukila ku kadilu katé ku jithungi-a-diembu mu Ene-tapuua." 
Joshua17:8 Oxi ia Tapuua iabhiti kua Manasa, maji o mbandu iamukuâ ia Tapuua, mu mbambe ni Manasa, iabhiti kua anʼa Ifalaime," 
Joshua17:9 o mbambe-phe anga ikulumuka ku muxinji ua menha ma honga ia Kana, iia ku sulu ia muxinji uenhó; anga ki bhinga-phe kuila o jisanzala ja Ifalaíme ja di soma muʼaxaxi ka jisanzala ja Manasa; kienhókio o mbambe ia Manasa, kua tundu o muxinji, ilungila ku sulu anga i kutuka mu musanza ua Kalunga." 
Joshua17:10 Ifalaime iú ku sulu, o Manasa-phe iú ku kusuku, mbambe iê o musanza ua Kalunga; ia edile o ku kusuku a tuta muene kua Asele, o ku thunda atuta kua Isakale." 
Joshua17:11 Kuma mu Isakale ni mu Asele, Manasa ua tambula-mu Bete-Sane ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ni Ibeleiamu ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ni iá a tunga mu Ndole, ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ni iá atunga mu Ene-Ndole ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ni iá atunga mu Tanake ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ni iá atunga mu Mejido ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê; Kifua ibhuna itatu ia kufundila." 
Joshua17:12 Anʼa Manasa-phe ka tenene ku kaia mundu ua tungu mu jisanzala jenhojo; mbata o Makanana ajijidile kutunga mʼoxiʼomo. 
Joshua17:13 Mu kuila-phe anʼa Izalaiele eza mu kuvula nguzu, ajijidika Makanana kubhita ku lubhaku lua kua bhakuila luánda, maji ene oso o ku a kaia, kana." 
Joshua17:14 Bhenhobho anʼa Zuze ambela Josuué, exi: Kia bhiti kiebhi-phe o ku ngi bhana ngó mu ubhinganu hasa imoxi ni dikânda dimoxi, eme ngi muthu nga di bhange kifuẋi kionène kiki; oko o Jihova ue uala ku ngi zediuisa muene?" 
Joshua17:15 Josuué ua mu ambela uixi: Se ua di mono u kifuẋi kionène, banda ku muxitu, batula ku ixi ia Mapelezi ni ku Malefaíme phala eie, kuma-phe o milundu ia Ifalaime ia ku tolela." 
Joshua17:16 Anʼa Zuze, anga a zuela, exi: O milundu ia tu tolo muene, maji o Makanana a tunga muʼkôlo ala ni makalu ma jifelu, akua Bete-Sane enhó ni jimbambe ja utuminu uê, ene ue aia-nâ; ni iá ue atunga muʼkôlo dia Jizeleiele." 
Joshua17:17 Bhenhobho Josuué-phe uambela dibhata dia Zuze, Ifalaime ni Manasa, uixi: U kifuẋi kionène muene, uala ue ni nguzu iavulu; hasa imoxi ki ia mi soko;" 
Joshua17:18 o milundu tambula-iu muene; o muxitu, u u solala, kioso ki tunda-mu, ki kale kiê; Makanana ua kà a kaia muene, sumbala akua makalu a jifelu, anʼa mazonda muene." 
Joshua18:1 Kionge kioso-phe kia anʼa Izalaiele anga ki bhongoloka bhu Silu. O balaka ia kutakanena anga a i oleka bhenhobho, kioso kia a tolokela kiá oxi." 
Joshua18:2 O muʼaxaxi-phe kʼanʼa Izalaiele hanji mua subhuka sambuadi dia miiji kiluua, a tambula ubhinganu uâ." 
Joshua18:3 Josuué iu uambela anʼa Izalaiele, uixi: Mu landuka katé bhebhi, ni ku kamba kuia mu kúvua oxi ia mi bhana kuala Jihova Nzambi ia jitata jenu?" 
Joshua18:4 Ku muiji ni muiji a sole-ku mala atatu, nda ngʼa tume, aie mu londa oxi, a i tongolole kiambote kala kia tokala o ku i uana mu ma-ubhinganu mâ, nda alukile kokuami." 
Joshua18:5 A i uane mu lusambuadi: Juda a mu xa ku Sulu mu mbambe iê, o dibhata dia Zuze ni mbambe iê dikale ku mbandu ia ku suku." 
Joshua18:6 Enu-phe mu xinda oxi mu sambuadi dia mbandu, o kixindu ki mua xindi mu ngi bhekela na-kiu bhabha; eme nda ngi te hasa jê, ja ku mi uanena na-iu bhu pholo ia Jihova Nzambi ietu." 
Joshua18:7 Jilevita-phe (anʼa Levi) ka-nda kutambula kibatu muʼaxaxi kenu, kikale undundu uâ ene o kubhanga kikalakalu kia unganga uangene ua Jihova. O Ngadi, ni Lubene ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, a tambula kiá ubhinganu uâ ku sámbua dia Njolodá, ku thunda, ua a bhele Mozé, o mukalakadi ua Jihova." 
Joshua18:8 Kienhiki o mala enhó abalumuka anga akatuka; Josuué-phe ua tumine oso aia kulonda oxi, uixi: Sulukenu, mu londe oxi, mu i xinde kiambote kioso ki iala, mualuke kokuami, eme nda ngi mi tele-iu jihasa (jisorte) bhu pholo ia Jihova, mu Silu." 
Joshua18:9 Athu ió endele, anhunga oxi, a i bhanga konda kioso ki iala, anga ku jisanzala jê, a i ta mu sambuadi dia mbandu mu divulu; iá avutuka eza kua Josuué, bhu kibangu, mu Silu." 
Joshua18:10 Josuué anga ua tela-iu jihasa mu Silu, bhu pholo ia Jihova; bhenhobho bhene bhua uanena oxi phala anʼa Izalaiele, mu ibatu iê." 
Joshua18:11 Kua tomboka-phe o hasa ia muiji ua anʼa Bejamí, ku majiku mâ; bhuʼaxaxi ka anʼa Juda ni anʼa Zuze bhene bhua bhela dikaẋi dia mu tokala muene," 
Joshua18:12 Mbambe iê anga i bhela ku mbandu ia kusuku tundé ku Njolodá; mbambe iii hé i di kunga ni Jedikó ni ku kusuku, i bandela ku mulundu i lunga ku luiji mu kikangalakata kia Bete-avene." 
Joshua18:13 Mu kutunda bhobho mbambe iii ibhita mu Luze, maji i di kunga ni Luze (a muedi Betele) ku sulu; mbambe iii anga ikulumuka mu Atalote-adale, bhu mbanduʼa mulundu uene ku mbandu ia sulu ia Mbetolone ia honga." 
Joshua18:14 Anga iia kienhiki ni ialukila ku mbandu ia luiji, iza ku sulu ia mulundu ualulama ni Mbetolone, ku sulu, i tombolokela mu Kidiate-bale (muene Kidiate-Jadimi), sanzala ia anʼa Juda; mumu muene mu i suka ku mbandu iê ia luiji." 
Joshua18:15 O mu i bhita-phe ku mbandu iê ia sulu, mbambe o thungi ia Kidiate-Jadimi; anga mbambe iii i di tela ku luiji i kutukila ku fixi ia menha ma Nefetoua." 
Joshua18:16 Mbambe ii iza ni ku kulumuka tulé bhu thungi ia mulundu uene kuxitila dikôlo dia Hinome, mu dikôlo dia anʼa mazonda, ii ku suku, i tulukila mu dikôlo dia Hinome kualela o Majebuzi, anga ilunga ku sulu; hé i tulukila kiá bhu fixi ia Lojele;" 
Joshua18:17 mu kutunda bhobho ilungulukila kiá ku kusuku hé i di tela bhu Ene-semexe; o ki itunda bhobho, iia mu Jedilote, ia lulamena bhu kalundu ka Adumimi, anga ikulumuka bhu ditadi dia Bouane, monʼa Lubene;" 
Joshua18:18 anga isombokela katé ia lungu mu kuia ku Halaba ku kusuku, anga ikulumuka mu Halaba;" 
Joshua18:19 mbambe ienhiʼii i somboka dingi katé ku maxilu ma Bete-Hokala ku kusuku, o matubhukilu mê ku mulebhetète ua kizanga kia môngua ku kusuku; kua suku Njolodá mu kuia ku sulu; iii iene o mbambe ia sulu." 
Joshua18:20 O ku mbandu ia thunda Njolodá muene o mbambe; iú uene o ubhinganu ua anʼa Bejamí mu mbambe jê mbandu ni mbandu, ku majiku-majiku." 
Joshua18:21 O jisanzala ja muiji ua anʼa Bejamí, kioso kiende ku majiku mâ, jenhihi: Jedikó, ni Bete-Hokala, ni Emekesiji," 
Joshua18:22 ni Bete-Halaba, ni Zemalaíme, ni Betele," 
Joshua18:23 ni Havime, ni Pala, ni Hofila," 
Joshua18:24 Kefala-hamonai, ni Ofini, ni Ngaba; kuinhi dia sanzala ni jiiadi, ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua18:25 Ngibiione, ni Lama, ni Belote," 
Joshua18:26 Mixipa ni Kefila, ni Moza," 
Joshua18:27 ni Lekeme, ni Idipele, ni Talala," 
Joshua18:28 ni Zela, ni Elefe, ni Jebusi (muene Jeluzaleme), ni Ngibeia, ni Kidiate; kuinhi dia sanzala ni jiuana ni tumadiembu tuâ; iú uene o ubhinganu ua anʼa Bejamí, ku majiku-majiku." 
Joshua19:1 Kuatomboka hasa ia kadi phala Ximinhá, mbe o muiji ua anʼa Ximinhá, ku majiku-majiku mâ, ubhinganu uá ua kutuka muʼaxaxi ka ubhinganu ua anʼa Juda," 
Joshua19:2 Mu ubhinganu uâ atambula: Bele-seba, ni Seba, ni Molada," 
Joshua19:3 kuexi Hazale-suale, ni Bala, ni Ezene," 
Joshua19:4 ni Eletolade, ni Betule, ni Háloma," 
Joshua19:5 ni Xikalake, ni Bete-makabote, ni Hazale-susa," 
Joshua19:6 ni Bete-lebaote, ni Saluene, kuinhi dia sanzala ni jitatu ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:7 Aime, ni Dimone, ni Etele, ni Asane; sanzala jiuana ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:8 Ni tumadiembu tuoso tua kexe mu jimbandu ja jisanzala jenhiji, katé ku Balate-bele, a mu edi Lama, ku sulu; iú uene ubhinganu ua anʼa Ximinhá, ku majiku-majiku-mâ." 
Joshua19:9 Ubhinganu ua anʼa Ximinhá u u sanga muʼaxaxi ka dikânda diangene dia anʼa Juda; mbata o ubhinganu ua anʼa Juda uavulu; kiene kia bhela-mu anʼa Ximinhá ubhinganu uâ, kumoxi ni ene." 
Joshua19:10 Kutomboka-phe o hasa ia katatu, itundila anʼa Nzebulone, ku majiku-majiku-mâ; ubhinganu uâ-phe uaii katé ku Salide." 
Joshua19:11 Anga ubanda mu kuila ku mbandu ia luiji u bhita mu Malala, anga ubhiẋila ku Dabesete, u bhixila ue ku kahonga ka lulamena ku Jokeneame." 
Joshua19:12 Kutunda bhu Saíle ualukila ku mbandu ia thunda, ku tundila dikumbi, katé mu mbambe ia Kixilote-tabola, i tubhukila ku Dabelate iia ni kubandesa katé ku Jafiia." 
Joshua19:13 O koko i sombokela ku mbandu ia thunda, kutundila o dikumbi hé iia ku Ngatefele, ni mu Etekasine, i tundidila ku Kimone-Metuala a mu edi Neia." 
Joshua19:14 Mbambe iii ialukila ku mbandu ia kusuku katé ku Hanatone ibhitila mu dikôlo dia Ifitaiele," 
Joshua19:15 ni Katate, ni Bahalale, ni Ximilone, ni Idala, ni Beleme; kuinhi dia sanzala ni jiiadi ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:16 Iú uene ubhinganu ua anʼa Nzebulone, ku majiku mâ, o jisanzala jenhiji ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:17 Hasa ia kauana iatundila Isakale; ku anʼa Isakale, ku majiku-majiku." 
Joshua19:18 Mbambe iâ-ene bhobho Jizalaiele, Kesulote, ni Suneme," 
Joshua19:19 ni Hafalaime, ni Siione, ni Anakalate," 
Joshua19:20 ni Labite, ni Kixione, ni Ebe," 
Joshua19:21 ni Lemete, ni Ene-ngaíme, ni Enehada, ni Bete-pazeji." 
Joshua19:22 Anga mbambe ienhiʼii bhiẋila ku Tabola, ku Sakaxima ni ku Bete-seme; matundilu mê katé ku Njolodá; kuinhi dia sanzala ni jisamanu ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:23 Iú uene ubhinganu ua muiji ua anʼa Isakale, ku majiku-majiku, ni jisanzala jenhiji ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:24 Sorte ia katanu i tundila muiji ua anʼa Asele, kala kia tokala ku majiku-majiku-mâ." 
Joshua19:25 Mbambe iâ-ene Helekate, ni Hali ni Betone, ni Akezafa." 
Joshua19:26 Ni Alameleke, ni Amadi, ni Misale; anga i bhixila ku Kalumelu ku luiji, ni ku Sihole-libenate;" 
Joshua19:27 anga i alukila ku mbandu ku tundila dikumbi iia mu Bete-dangone, i bhixila mu Nzebulone, ni mu dikôlo dia Ifitailele, ku mbandu ia ku suku ia Bete-meke ni ia Neiele, anga i tubhukila ku kiasu kia Kabule," 
Joshua19:28 ibhita mu Ebolone ni Lehobe, ni Hamone, ni Kana, katé mu Sidone ionène." 
Joshua19:29 Mbambe ienhiʼii-phe i alukila mu Lama, katé ku mbonge ia kolo ia Tilu; hé i bilukila mu Hosa, anga iia mu kutundila ku musanza ua kalunga kua zukamena o mikáu ia ixi ia Akezibe;" 
Joshua19:30 ni Uma, ni Afeke, ni Lehobe, a a bhitisa ue kuenhoko; kienhiki a tenesa makuinhi aiadi ni iadi a jisanzala ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:31 Uenhú uene o ubhinganu ua muiji ua anʼa Asele, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, o jimbanza jenhiji ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:32 Sorte ia kasamanu i tundila-phe anʼa Nafitali; ku anʼa Nafitali, ku majiku-majiku-mâ." 
Joshua19:33 Mbambe iâ-ene tunde ku Helefe, kuandekela bhu mukaluvalu ku Alone mu Zananíme, ni Adami-Nekebe, ni Jabineiele, katé ku Lakumi, anga i kutuka mu Njolodá." 
Joshua19:34 Mbambe ienhiʼii-phe ialukila ku luiji, iia mu Azenote-tabole, hé isomboluela mu Hukoke; o ku mbandu ia sulu, ituta Nzebulone, o ku luiji ituta ku Asele, ni Juda ku mbandu ia mutundila-kumbi, ku mbambe ni Njolodá." 
Joshua19:35 Jimbonge jê jakolo kiambote: Sidime, Zele, Hamate, Labate, Kinelete," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Lama, Hazole," 
Joshua19:37 Kadexe, Dilei, Ene-hazole," 
Joshua19:38 Hone, Midale, Holeme, Bete-nate, ni Bete-seme; kuinhi dia jimbanza nʼivua ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:39 Uenhú uene o ubhinganu ua muiji ua anʼa Nafitali, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, o jimbanza jienhiji ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:40 Hasa ia kasambuadi-phe itundila anʼa Dane, ku majiku-majiku-mâ." 
Joshua19:41 O mbambe ia ubhinganu uâ, Zola, Xitaole, ni Idi-semexi," 
Joshua19:42 Sahalebine, Ajalone, Itila," 
Joshua19:43 Elone, Timinate, Ekolone," 
Joshua19:44 Eleteke, Ngibitone, Balate," 
Joshua19:45 Jehudi, Bene-belake, ni Ngate-Dimone," 
Joshua19:46 Ni Mejakome, Lakome, a a tela-ku dingi oxi ia lungu ni Jope;" 
Joshua19:47 anʼa Dane hanji a bhânga ni Leseme, a mu bhitisa ku mazu a xibhata, a mu tambula mbonge ia Leseme, anga a tunga muenhomo; Leseme muenhú anga a mu luka Dane, kifua aluku tatʼâ-ene." 
Joshua19:48 Uenhú uene o ubhinganu ua muiji ua anʼa Dane, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, o jimbanza jenhiji ni tumadiembu tuâ." 
Joshua19:49 Mu kuzubha-phe kuuana o ixi mu ubhinganu, ku jimbambe-jimbambe, anʼa Izalaiele, mudiâ, a bhana ue kibatu kia ubhinganu kua Josuué, monʼa Nune, muʼaxaxi kâ." 
Joshua19:50 Kala kia tangele Jihova, a mu bhana sanzala ia bhingile muene, a mu bhana Timinate-sela, ku mulundu ua Efalaime; anga Josuué sanzala u i soma dingi kiambote, u tunga muenhomo." 
Joshua19:51 Iá ene o ma-ubhinganu, nganga Eleazale, ni Josuué, monʼa Nune, ni makota ku jitata mu majiku mâ, a uane ku jisorte phale ubhinganu ua miji ia anʼa Izalaiele, bhu Silu bhu pholo ia Jihova, bhu muelu ua balaka ia kutakanena. Kienhiki oxi iabhu kiua o ku i uana." 
Joshua20:1 Jihova anga uambela dingi Josuué, uixi;" 
Joshua20:2 Anʼa Izalaiele a tangele, uixi: A uanune-ku jimbonge ja fuama kulengela, kala ki nga mi ambela kiá mu izuua ia ukunji ua Mozé;" 
Joshua20:3 muene mu lengela muthu, uoso u jibha mukuá, sé ku ki kana, kifua kima kia kitukumuise; bhu kale-phe dilengelu mbé o muzokedi-a-manhinga." 
Joshua20:4 Kioso-phe kia lengela ku jimbonge jenhojo, mbonge ioso ia tudila, u tula bhu muelu ua mbonge anga u tanga o mulonga uê ku adiakime a mbonge ienhoio; ene-phe nʼa mu bokuese mu mbonge, nʼa mu bhane-mu kididi, a tunge-nâ kumoxi." 
Joshua20:5 Muzokedi-a-manhinga hé ua mu kaiela, kana ku mu bhana-nê; mbata kijibha kia te, ki kia ku bhanga kiluelu, kana, ka diangele ku di zemba-nê." 
Joshua20:6 Inda a tunge mu mbonge muenhomo, katé kia funda bhu pholo ia kionge o mulonga uê, a kadiê-phe muenhomo katé kia kà fua o nganga iadikota uoso uala-ku mu izuua ienhoio. Kiene kia kà vutuka kiua o mukua mulonga ku bhata diê, ku sanzala iâ kuoso kua tundile, kia lengele." 
Joshua20:7 Bhenhobho ene a tungula Kadexe, mu Ngalileia, ku mulundu ua Nafitali, ni Xikeme ku mulundu ua Ifalaíme, ni Kidiate-Halaba, muene Hebolone, mu mulundu ua Juda." 
Joshua20:8 O mu sámbua dia Njolodá, mu ku tunda bhu Jedikó ni ku lunga ku mbandu ia thunda, a uanununa-ku Bezele, mu kikangalakata, mu dinhana dia muiji ua Lubene, ni Lamote mu Ngiliiadi, ku muiji ua Ngadi, ni Ngolane, mu Basane, ku muiji ua Manasa." 
Joshua20:9 Jiji jene o jimbonge ja tunguile-ku phala anʼa Izalaiele oso, ni phala ue o nzuángiza uatunga muʼaxaxi kâ, mbé ji kale dilengelu dia uoso u jibha muthu sé ku ki kana; phala kʼafue bhu maku a muzokedi-a-manhinga, katé ki a kala ni kithangana kia ku funda o mulonga uê bhu pholo ia kionge." 
Joshua21:1 Kienhiki ku jitata ja jilevita ku tunda makota anga eza kua Eleazale, o nganga, ni kua Josuué, monʼa Nune, ni ku makota matokala ku jitata ja anʼa Izalaiele;" 
Joshua21:2 anga a a zuelesa bhu Silu, mʼoxi ia Kanana, exi: Mu thembu ia Mozé, Jihova ua tumine kuila mu tu bhana jisanzala ni tu tunge uetu, ni mikáu iê ku maxilu, mbé o ibhaku ietu." 
Joshua21:3 Bhenhobho anʼa Izalaiele a katula ku ubhinganu uâ, kala kiambele Jihova, jisanzala jâ ni mikáu iâ ku maxilu." 
Joshua21:4 Muondona-phe u tunda, ua tokala anʼa Kohate ku majiku-majiku-mâ: anʼa Alá, nganga, atokala ku jilevita, hasa iâ ia buila kuinhi dia jisanzala ni jitatu phala ene, maji jitunda ku konda ia muiji ua Juda, ni ku muiji ua Ximinhá, ni muiji ua Bejamí." 
Joshua21:5 Ana amukuá a Kohate, hasa iâ ia buila dingi kuinhi dia jisanzala, ji tunda ku konda ia jifamília ja muiji ua Ifalaíme, ni ku muiji ua Dane, ni ku kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa." 
Joshua21:6 O ku anʼa Ngelexone hasa iâ ia tundila ku konda ia jifamilia ja muiji ua Isakale, ni ku muiji ua Asele, ku muiji ua Nafitali, ni ku kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, mu Basane; kuene kua tundu kuinhi dia jisanzala ni jitatu." 
Joshua21:7 Anʼa Meladi-phe, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, a a tambuila kuinhi dia sanzala ni jiiadi ku konda ia muiji ua Lubene, ni ku muiji ua Ngadi, ni ku muiji ua Nzebulone." 
Joshua21:8 Anʼa Izalaeiele a bhana o jisanzala jiji ku jilevita kumoxi ni mikáu ia jimbalelu jâ, kala kia xinda jinga o hasa jâ, kioso kia a tumine Jihova mu izuua ia Mozé, kiene." 
Joshua21:9 Muiji-phe ua anʼa Juda, ni muiji ua anʼa Ximinhá a beta kubhana mu katula o jisanzala jiji kala kia ji tange ni majina mê." 
Joshua21:10 A ji bhana ku anʼa Alá, ku majiku ma Kohate, anʼa Levi; mukonda ene adiangela kutomboka ku hasa iâ." 
Joshua21:11 Kienhiki a a bhana ue sanzala ia Kidiate-Halaba, o Halaba-phe muenhú muene tata ia Anake, o mbanza iii muene Hebolone, mu mulundu ua Juda, ni jimbambe jê ja mbalelu ia mu kondoloka." 
Joshua21:12 Maji o mukáu ua mbonge ienhiʼii ni tumabhata tuê tuofele a u bhana kua Kalebe, monʼa Jefune, mu ubhinganu uê." 
Joshua21:13 Kienhiki, anʼa nganga Alá a a bhana Hebolone, o mbonge ia disuamenu, mu suamena uoso uajibha, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Libina ni mbalelu iê," 
Joshua21:14 ni sanzala ia Jatile, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Xitimoua, ni mbalelu iê," 
Joshua21:15 ni sanzala ia Holone, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Ndebile ni mbalelu iê," 
Joshua21:16 ni sanzala ia Aime, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Juta, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Beteseme, ni mbalelu iê; miji iiadi iii ia bhana dívua dia sanzala." 
Joshua21:17 O muiji ua Bejamí ua bhana Ngibiione, ni mbalelu iê, Jeba, ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:18 Anaióte, ni mbalelu iê, Alumone, ni mbalelu iê; sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:19 Sanzala joso ja jinganga mu jinganga, anʼa Alá, kuinhi dia sanzala ni sanzala jitatu, ni jimbalelu jâ, ku maxilu mâ." 
Joshua21:20 O jifamília-phe ja anʼa Kohate, o jilevita, a subhukile ku anʼa Kohate, iá ala ngó jilevita, hasa iâ ia a nomuena jisanzala ku konda ia muiji ua Efalaime." 
Joshua21:21 Anga a a bhana Xikeme ni mbalelu iê, iene o mbonge iâ ia disuamenu, mu suamena uoso ua jibha; o mu mulundu ua Ifalaime, a bhana ue Ngezele, ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:22 ni Kibisaíme, ni mbalelu iê, ni Mbetomone, ni mbalelu iê; jisanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:23 O ku muiji ua Dane kua tundu sanzala ia Eliteke, ni mbalelu iê, ni sanzala ia Ngibetone ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:24 Ajalone, ni mbalelu iê, Ngate-Dimone, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:25 O ku kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, kua tundu Tanake, ni mbalelu iê, Ngate-dimone, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiiadi." 
Joshua21:26 Konda ia jisanzala joso phala madianda a Kohate a xalele-ku kuinhi dia jisanzala, ni jimbalelu jâ." 
Joshua21:27 Anʼa Ngelexone, muʼaxaxi ka jilevita, a a bhana Ngolane, mu Basane, kuala kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, ni mbalelu iê, iene o mbonge ia disuamenu dia uoso uta kijibha; ia a a bhana ue Betela, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiiadi." 
Joshua21:28 O ku muiji ua Isakale, Kijó, ni ikanzu iê; Ndabelate, ni kanzu iê;" 
Joshua21:29 Jalemute, ni mbalelu iê, Hene-Nganime, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:30 O muiji ua Asele ua bhana Misale, ni mbalelu iê, Abidone, ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:31 Helekate, ni mbalelu iê, ni Lehote, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:32 O muiji ua Nafitali ua bhana Kadexe, mu Ngalileia, ni mbalelu iê, iene o mbonge ia disuamenu dia uoso uta kijibha kia kujibha mukuâ; ni Hamote-dole, ni mbalelu iê, ni Kaditane ni mbalelu ié; kia bhange sanzala jitatu;" 
Joshua21:33 konda ia jisanzala joso phala Mangelexone, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, a bhange kuinhi ni tatu dia jisanzala, ni jimbalelu jê." 
Joshua21:34 O jifamília-phe ja anʼa Meladi, mu (axaxi ka jilevita) ja subhukile-ku, a a bhele kiki: muiji ua Nzebulone, ua bhe Jokeneame, ni mbalelu iê, Kata, ni mbale-lu iê," 
Joshua21:35 Dimina, ni mbalelu iê; Nahalale, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:36 Muiji ua Lubene ua bhe Bezele, ni mbalelu iê, ni Jaza, ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:37 Kedimote ni mbalelu iê, ni Mefahate ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:38 O muiji ua Ngadi ua bhe Lamote, mu Ngiliiadi, mbonge ia disuamenu dia uoso uta kijibha, ni mbalelu iê, ni Mahanaíme, ni mbalelu iê;" 
Joshua21:39 ni Hexebone, ni mbalelu iê, ni Jazele, ni mbalelu iê; kia bhange konda ioso sanzala jiuana." 
Joshua21:40 O sanzala joso jiji a ji bhana anʼa Meladi, ku majiku-majiku-mâ, oso a subhukile hanji mu jifamília ja jilevita; hasa iâ ia a bhele kuinhi dia sanzala ni jiiadi." 
Joshua21:41 Jisanzala joso ja jilevita, muʼaxaxi ka undundu ua anʼa Izalaiele, jakexi makuinhi auana ni nake dia ʼsanzala, ni ikanzu iê." 
Joshua21:42 Sanzala ni sanzala ni mbalelu iê ku maxilu moso; sanzala joso muene kienhiki. 
Joshua21:43 Jihova, mu ku bhanga kiki, ua bhana muene oxi ioso kua anʼa Izalaiele, ia lokelele o ku i bhana ku jitata jâ, o ene anga a i ívua muene, a tunga momo." 
Joshua21:44 Jihova anga u a bhana o kunhoha, kala kioso kia lokelele ko jitata jâ; mukonda ku jinguma jâ joso ki kua subhuka muthu ua tena kuimana bhu pholo ia ene; Jihova ua a bhana jinguma jâ joso muene bhu maku mi" 
Joshua21:45 Maka moso muene ma mbote ma zuelele Jihova ku dibhata dia Izalaiele, ki kua sonoka kima, kana; ioso muene ua i kumbidila." 
Joshua22:1 Bhenhobho Josuué uixana akua Lubene, ni akua Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa," 
Joshua22:2 anga ua ambela, uixi: Ima ioso ia mi tumine Mozé, o mukalakadi ua Jihova, mua i kumbidila muene; o dízui diami ue mua di tumaka jinga muene, mu ima ioso i nga mi tumina." 
Joshua22:3 Phange jenu mua ji bande muene, tundé bhuoso bhanha, katé lelu; inda ngonge iangene ia Jihova Nzambi ienu, mua i aiuka muene ni muanu uoso." 
Joshua22:4 Leluʼidi-phe kuma Jihova Nzambi ienu ua bhana kiá o thungu ni somo ku jiphange jenu, ia a nhoha kala kia ambelele muene, vutukilenu-phe kiá ku jibalaka jenu, ndé-nu kiá kʼoxi ia ubhinganu uenu, ua mi bhele Mozé, selevende ia Jihova, ku sámbua dia Njolodá kunhá." 
Joshua22:5 Kima kimoxi-phe, kia mi fuama: kuatenu muanu ua kualuka kiambote o ngonge ni kitumu kia mi lekelela Mozé, ngunza ia Jihova; uixi; Zolenu Jihova Nzambi ienu, mu endele jinge mu jinjila jê muene, jingonge jê mu ji lange, mu zuame kua Muene, mu kuate jinge ku mu bhikila ni muẋima uenu uoso ni muenhu uenu uoso." 
Joshua22:6 Kienhiki Josuué ua a te o kizediuise bhenhobho, iú ua a sulula, ia aii mu jibalaka jâ." 
Joshua22:7 Kuma-phe o kaxaxe ka muiji ua Manasa, Mozé ua a bhele kiá o ubhinganu uâ mu Basane, o kaxaxi ka mukuá-phe, Josuué ua a bhana o uâ muʼaxaxe ka jiphange jâ, ku sámbua kunu dia Njolodá, ku luiji; enió, Josuué ua a te kizediuise, iu ua a sulula;" 
Joshua22:8 hé u a ambela, uixi: Vutukilenu kiá ku jibalaka jenu ni jimbongo javulu, ni jinzungule ja ibhaku, ni phalata, ni ulu, ni utadi ua ngôndo, ni felu ni izuatu iandumba; ene o mabhundile u mua bhundu ku jinguma jenu, uanenu kumoxi ni akuenu." 
Joshua22:9 Kienhiki anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, a vutuka kiá, hé a tunda ku Silu, a xa anʼa Izalaiele, mu ixi ia Kanana; anga aia ku ixi ia Ngiliiade, kʼoxi ia ubhinganu uâ, ua a lunduixile, mu ngonge ia Jihova bhu thembu kiala-ku hanji Mozé ku ukunji." 
Joshua22:10 Anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, kia zubha kubokona mu jimbambe ja Njolodá, mʼoxi ia Kanana, a tunga kalatódio ku Njolodá; kikalatódio kiʼonène, mu ku ki tala ni mesu!" 
Joshua22:11 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe hé a kívua, kuila: Anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, atungu kalatódio ka zukamena ku oxi ia Kanana, mu jimbambe ja Njolodá, ku kisambu kiatokala anʼa Izalaiele." 
Joshua22:12 Kienhiki kia zubha ku kʼivua, anʼa Izalaiele a di phopha kumoxi, kionge kiâ kioso muene, bhu Silu, a di bhànga kilômbo kia ita mbé kuia kulua-nâ." 
Joshua22:13 Anga anʼa Izalaiele a tuma jiphunga kua anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, kʼoxi ia Ngiliiade, jiphunga-phe Finehase, nganga, monʼa Eleazale;" 
Joshua22:14 ni kuinhi dia ilamba kumoxi-nê; ku muiji ni muiji kua tundu kilamba, miji ioso ia Izalaiele mu kilamba-kilamba, ilamba ienhiʼii ene o adiakimi mu jitata-jitata, a a sola mu jimidi ja Izalaiele." 
Joshua22:15 Enhá o kieza, a sanga anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, mʼoxi ia Ngiliiade, anga a di kunda-nâ, exi:" 
Joshua22:16 Kionge kioso kia Jihova azuela kiki, exi: Kituxi kiosuʼiki kiahi ki mu tondala na-kiu, hé mu ta mulonga kua Nzambi ia Izalaiele, anga mu ta kíá dikunda kua Jihova leluʼidi, hé mu di tungila kiá kalatódio kenu mu ku kitukila Jihova anga mu zoka-nê muene?" 
Joshua22:17 Kifuá kituxi kiatolo ki tua te bhu Peiole kia bhingi katé leluʼidi hanji tua xidi-na-kiu sumbala bhua bhitile kiá kaxitiku muʼaxaxi ka kionge kia Jihova. 
Joshua22:18 Lelu mu batuka dingi kua Jihova? Mua-nda kuila-phe mu zubha ku kitukila Jihova lelu, o mungu ki kua-nda kúkia, phônzo-phe ia tuluka ku thanduʼa kionge kioso kia anʼa Izalaiele." 
Joshua22:19 O ki kala-phe mua mono kuila oxi ia mi bhana mu ubhinganu iezala lufuku luoso, ia kasana, sembele-phe mu bhite kunu kʼoxi ia undundu, ua Jihova, Zaúkenu kunu, kua phaphe o balaka ia Jihova, mu tambule ubhinganu muʼaxaxi ketu; maji kana ku kitukila Jihova, etu ue né ngó bhuofèle ki mu tu kitukile, anga mu di tungila ni kalatódio kenu, anga muila enu ni kalatódio kenu, Jihova Nzambi ietu, ni kalatódio kê." 
Joshua22:20 Akane monʼa Zela ua tele kituxi, kia ku minha ima iókidike; o mulonga uê ki uejile ku thandu dia kionge kioso kia Izalaiele? Muthu umoxi ua te kituxi, kuabhingi kia bhitula mienhu ia ndumba!" 
Joshua22:21 Bhenhobho anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni Kaxaxi ka muiji ua Manasa, a vutuila ilolo ia tundu ku jimidi ja Izalaiele, exi:" 
Joshua22:22 Nzambi ia jinzambi, Muteni-a-Ioso, Jihova, ua kʼijiia; Nzambi ia jinzambi, Muteni-a-Ioso, Jihova muene a tume ku kʼijiia, ni Izalaiele ki mu tetulukile muene; se o ki tua bhangʼiki, kukituka kua tu bhangesa-kiu, mba kutulumbila Jihova kua tu kuata, ka tu ehele kukola muenhu lelu!" 
Joshua22:23 Se tua tungu kalatódio phala kuta dikunda kua Jihova, mba-phe phala ku tela-ku jisata ja kuoha ni mubhaku ua musa, mba tua-nda ku bhakuila-ku mubhaku ua paze, Jihova muene ki tua bhangʼiki a tuʼibhule-kiu!" 
Joshua22:24 Inda kia tu bhangesa-kiu, kiki: Hádia anʼenu a-nda kuâmba anʼetu, exi: Enu muala dingi ni kima kiahi ni Nzambi ia Izalaiele-á?" 
Joshua22:25 Kuma Jihova muene ua tu uanuna kiá nʼenu, iú ua te Njolodá bhu kaẋi o mbambeʼoio enu anʼa Lubene, nʼenu anʼa Ngadi; kua Jihova ki kua mi kala dingi kima. O kienhokio-phe anʼenu, se a ki âmba anʼetu, anʼetu kifua a a zumbula ku uoma ua kuxila Jihova." 
Joshua22:26 Tuexi-phe: Kiosuʼiki, sembele tu tunge-bhu kalatódio; ki ka ku tela jisata ja kuoha, kana, ki ka ku tela ue mubhaku." 
Joshua22:27 Maji phala umbangi bhu kaẋi kʼetu, mbé ku pholo ku tuia nʼetu, nʼenu, ni miji ietu ioso hádia i tu bhingana, mbé o ku tu enzela phala tu kuatienu kumoxi o kikalakalu kia Jihova bhu pholo iê, ni kubhana jisata jetu ja kuoha, ni mibhaku ietu, ni maujitu etu a kudifikixila. Mbé hádia, anʼenu ka kakule anʼetu, kuila: Enu Jihova ki muala-nê ni kima." 
Joshua22:28 Kienhiki-phe tuexi: Né hádia kia tu âmba kiki, nʼetu ni miji ietu, etu-phe tua kà ambela, tuexi: Talesenu kalatódio kʼaxi adietu, ka di fué ngó ni kalatódio ka Jihova; Ene ka ka bhangela mibhaku ia kuoha, kana, mba kubhela-ku sata; maji a ka bhangele mu kúxia umbangi phala etu nʼenu." 
Joshua22:29 Ki tualʼiki, Jihova ki tu tena ku mu baluka, mba ku mu ta dikunda, ni tu tunge kalatódio kengi, tuexi kuie mubhaku ua kuoha, mba ua musa, mba sata, anga o kalatódio kangene ka Jihova Nzambi ietu, kala bhu pholo ia balaka iê, tu ka ta dikunda!" 
Joshua22:30 Finehase phe o nganga, ni ilamba ia kionge, ni adiakimi ku jimidi ja Izaleiele, kia zubha ku kʼivua, kia vutula anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni anʼa Manasa, kia a ximbakatesa o muẋima mʼoxi, kuma a ki mono kia iuka." 
Joshua22:31 Nganga Finehase, monʼa Eliazale uambela anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, ni anʼa Manasa, kuamba: Leluʼidi tua kiʼjiia muene, kuila Jihova iú muʼaxaxi ketu, kuma Jihova ki mua mu te kituxi. Anʼa Izalaiele-phe mua a bhulula bhu lukuaku lua Jihova." 
Joshua22:32 Bhenhobho Finehase, monʼa Eleiazale, o nganga, iú ua vutuka, ni ilamba, a xi anʼa Lubene, ni anʼa Ngadi, mʼoxi ia Ngiliiade, anga eza mʼoxi ia Kanana, ku anʼa Izalaiele; hé a a tudila mahezu." 
Joshua22:33 Mahezu enhá anʼa Izalaiele a a uabhela ue, anʼa Izalaiele anga a tanesa Nzambi. O ita ieji kubalumuna phala kubanda mu lua oxi mua tungu anʼa Lubene ni anʼa Ngadi, iabhu-bhu." 
Joshua22:34 Anʼa Lubene ni anʼa Ngadi anga aiuka kalatódio kaka exi: Ede. Mbata ambe exi: Inda kalatódio kaka ka tu kale Umbangi muʼaxaxi ketu, kuma Jihova muene Nzambi." 
Joshua23:1 Anga kibhita kuila, tunde Jihova kia nhohesa Izalaiele, ku jinguma jâ joso mu jimbandu, a kuata kiá muene ndumba dia izuua mu ixi, kienhókio Josuué uakuka, uasunga-ku kiá ku izuua iê," 
Joshua23:2 Josuué anga uixana Izalaiele ioso, ni ikulakaji iâ, ni ilôlo iâ, ni afundixi, ni jifixiiadi, anga ua ambela, uixi: Eme nga kuka, o izuua ii i ngi-bhua kiá." 
Joshua23:3 Enu-phe mua di muena kiá o ima ioso-lolo Jihova Nzambi ienu ia bhange ku ifuẋi iii, mu ku mi banda enu; mbata Jihova Nzambi ienu, muene ua mi luila o ita." 
Joshua23:4 Talesenu kioso ki nga mi uanena o ifuẋi ioso iasubhukile tundé ku Njolodá, ni ifuẋi ioso i nga tolola, katé ku musanza uonène, kuene ku tundila o dikumbi; eme ngedi, o mu uana, kala muiji mudienu kioso kia mu xindi o hasa iê." 
Joshua23:5 Jihova Nzambi ienu ua kà mi sondoluela o ifuẋi ienhoio; ua kà mi kaiela-iu, anga i mi bhua ku mesu; enu oxi iâ hé mua kà ívua muene, kala kia mi ambela kiá Jihova Nzambi ienu." 
Joshua23:6 Mua bhingi-phe mu di suinisa kinène muene, mbé o kulunda ni kubhanga ima ioso iòsoneke mu divulu didi dia ngonge ia Mozé; kana ku i abhuka, mu kuila ku kadilu, mba ku kakiasu;" 
Joshua23:7 mbé ki mu kuate ku di fungisa ni ifuẋi iii ia mi xikamena hanji. Kana kuila jinga o majina a mahamba mâ enu mu a tumbula, mba muenda ni kulokela mu mahamba enhá. Ene kana, kana ku a bhikila, kana ku a fukamena ni ku a bheza." 
Joshua23:8 Inda enu mu naminina kua Jihova Nzambi ienu, kala ki mua bhange kiá katé bhu kizuua kia lelu." 
Joshua23:9 Mukonda enu Jihova ua mi kaiesela muene jinzungule ja ifuẋi ionène; enu-phe ki bhuala luua uatena kuimana bhu pholo ienu, katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Joshua23:10 Muthu umoxi mudienu, uasoko-bhu ku kaiesa midi; mbata o Jihova Nzambi ienu, muenʼié-muène u mi luila jinga o ita, kala kiene ku mi ambela kiá." 
Joshua23:11 Kala kiki-phe, mienhu ienu langenu-iu muene kiambote, nda mu zole jinge Jihova Nzambi ienu." 
Joshua23:12 Mukonda, hé mua sanduka kua Nzambi, anga mu di banda ku ifuẋi ia subhukʼei, mu ku tanga-nâ undandu, enu anga mua a sakana, ene ue a mi sakana," 
Joshua23:13 tumenu-phe ku kʼijiia, kuma Jihova Nzambi ienu, ka kà mi kaiesela dingi o ifuẋi iii ia mi kala ku mesu; inda ia kà mi kala kiá mubhetu, mukàla, kibetu mu jimbanji jenu, i di bhanga mukua ni mínha mu mesu enu; katé ki mu jima o mbutu, o ixi ia uabha kiki ia mi bhana Jihova Nzambi ienu, anga mu i xa muene." 
Joshua23:14 Mua mono-phe kuila, lelu eme nga lungu kiá muʼalunga muene ku di tutila oxi ioso; enu-phe mua kʼijiia ni muẋima uenu uoso, ni muenhu uenu uoso, kuila ima ioso ia mi dielelesele Jihova Nzambi ienu, ki kua sonoka kima; iene ioso ia mi bhiti muene, ki bhuala kizuelu kia sukamena." 
Joshua23:15 O kiedi-phe, ima ioso ia uabha kiki mua i tambula muene, ioso ia mi ambelele Jihova Nzambi ienu, kiene ue kimoxi, Jihova ua kà mi bhekela ue o mabhebhu oso a ima ia iibha katé ua mi jimi mbutu, o ixi ia uabha ia mi bhele Jihova Nzambi ienu, anga mu i xa muene." 
Joshua23:16 Kioso ki mu matuka o kikutu kia Jihova Nzambi ienu, kia mi tendelela, anga muia, mu kuata kubheza nzambi jengi, ni ku ji fukamena, kiene kia kà mi uamena o njinda ia Jihova ku thandu dienu, anga mu tukumuka mua jimi o mbutu, o ixi ia uabha ia mi bhele mua i xi." 
Joshua24:1 O ki kia bhiti, Josuué ua bhongolola miji ioso ia Izalaiele bhu Xikeme; anga uixana ikulakaji ia Izalaiele, ni ilôlo iâ, ni afundixiʼâ, ni jifixiiadi. Ene oso anga a di bheka bhu pholo ia Nzambi." 
Joshua24:2 Josuué-phe anga uambela o kifuẋi kioso, uixi: O Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Mu xahulu, ku dimatekenu, o malembʼenu, a Tela, phaiʼa Malahamu, ni Naholo a tungile ku sámbua dia ngijiʼoko, anga a kuata kubheza jinzambi jengi." 
Joshua24:3 Eme-phe nga tungula-bhu tatʼenu Mbalahamu, ku sámbua dia ngijiʼoko eme nga mu katula-ku, eme nga mu endesa ni kunhunga-nê mʼoxi ioso ia Kanana; mbutu iê nga i sokolola ue, mu ku mu bhana Izake." 
Joshua24:4 Izake ue nga mu bhana Jakobo ni Izaú; o Izaú-phe nga mu bhana mulundu ua Seíle phala muene kiá; o Jakobo-phe ni anʼê a kulumukine mu Ijitu. 
Joshua24:5 Kiene-phe ki nga tumikisina Mozê ni Alá, anga Ijitu ngi mu kuama ni mabhebhu, u nga bhange muʼaxaxi kâ; o ki kia bhiti, ku Ijitu nga mi katula-ku." 
Joshua24:6 O ki nga zubha kutundisa adienu mu Ijitu, mueza ku musanza ua kalunga. Akua Ijitu-phe a zuididika jitata jenu, ni makalu ni akua kumondala jikabalu, katé ku musanza ua Kalunga-Kakusuka." 
Joshua24:7 Ene anga a di kola kua Jihova, muene iú ua te kitombe bhuʼaxaxi kenu ni akua Ijitu, usunga kiua o musanza ua kalunga ku thandu diâ, anga ua vunga; enu-phe mesu enu a di muena kioso ki nga bhange ku akua Ijitu. O ki kia bhiti, mua nakina ndumba ia izuua mu kikangalakata." 
Joshua24:8 Kiene kiua ki nga mi bheka mʼoxi ia Mamodi, a tungile ku sámbua koko dia Njolodá. Enhá-phe a bhangele nʼenu, maji eme-phe nga mi tula-u bhu lukuaku luenu, enu anga mu vua o ixi iâ, ene ia nga a buikisa ku mesu enu." 
Joshua24:9 Balaki-phe, monʼa Zipolo, sobha ia Mouabhe, uafundumuka ue, mu kúlua ita ni Izalaiele. Anga u tuma kukolomona Balamu, monʼa Beola, phala a mi bhubhidile ni mázui." 
Joshua24:10 Eme-phe nga ditumu kuívua Balamu; kia mu bhangesa ku mi ta kizediuise anga ngi mi bhulula bhu lukuaku luê. 
Joshua24:11 O ki muà zaúka Njolodá enu mueza mu Jedikó, akua-bhata mu Jedikó a lu mvunda nʼenu. Kiene ue kimoxi kia bhange o Mamodi, ni Mapelezi, ni Makanana, ni Mahiti, ni Jijidingaze, ni Mahivi, ni Majebuzi; eme-phe nga a bhakula bhu lukuaku luenu." 
Joshua24:12 Eme nga tuamekesa imadimbuende ku pholo ienu, enhá ene a mi kaiela lusolo o jinguma bhu pholo ienu, kiòmuene ue ni sobha jiiadi ja Mamodi; xibhata ié-eie ki iene ia ki bhange, o mufula ué ki uene ue ua ki bhange." 
Joshua24:13 Hé ngiia o ixi nga mi bhana-iu, maji kʼenu mua kalakala-mu o ima ioso i mua sange-mu, mabhata nga mi bhana-u, maji kʼenu mua a tungile; enu mua tungu mu mabhata muenhomo, muadi ku milenga iâ ia mivide ni ia midiva, maji enu kʼenu mua i phaphe." 
Joshua24:14 Kiki-phe Jihova mu kuatedienu uoma, muende ni ku mu bhikila ni muẋima ua tenena ni kidi. Texenu o mahamba oso a xingidisa jinga o jitata jenu mu sámbua dia ngiji ia Ufalate ni ku Ijitu, nda mu bhikile Jihova." 
Joshua24:15 Maji-phe, se kia mi ibhila ku mesu menu o kubhikila Jihova, leluʼidi-phe Solenu kiá uoso mua fuama o ku mu bhikila: se muedi mu xingidisa o mahamba a xingidisa jinga o jitata jenu kia kexi mu sámbua dia ngiji ia Ufalate, mba-phe mu xingidisa o mahamba ma akua Mamodi avu o ixi iii mu mua tungʼumu, enu kiá! Maji eme-phe ni dibhata diami, tu bhikila Jihova." 
Joshua24:16 Benhobho kifuẋi a vutula, exi: Etu nguetu kuila ki tu bhita kuxa Jihova, anga tu bhikila Nzambi jengi," 
Joshua24:17 Mukonda Jihova muene Nzambi ietu. Muene ngó ua tu katula nʼetu ni jitata jetu kʼoxi ia Ijitu, mʼonzo ia ubhika, iu uabhange o ijimbuete ionène ioso iii ku mesuʼetu a kutala, iu ua tu ingi mu uenji uoso mu tua bhiti, ni muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi mu tuejila." 
Joshua24:18 Jihova iu ua tu kaiesela o matumbu osoʼâ bhu pholo ietu, katé ni Mamodi a tungile oxi iâ iii. Lémbue! Etu uetu tu bhikila jinga Jihova, mbata muene o Nzambi ietu." 
Joshua24:19 Josuué-phe uambela o kifuẋi, uixi: Kana, ki mua-nda kutena kubhikila Jihova, mbata muene Nzambi ia kuzela ni kuiuka, Nzambi ia difuba, muene ikuma ienu ka kà i loloka, ka kà loloka ituxi ienu." 
Joshua24:20 Mukonda o ki mua-nda kuila muene mua mu xi, mua di te mu bhikila nzambi jengi, ua-nda kulunguluka anga u mi bhanga usuéia, u mi jikinisa, ku thandu dia kuzubha kiá o ku mi bhanga mbote ioso kala iii." 
Joshua24:21 Kifuẋi-phe kiambela Josuué, exi: Lémbue, inda tu bhikila Jihova muene." 
Joshua24:22 Eme Josuué, uixi: Kalenu-phe mu jimbangi, kuma enu-enu mua solo Jihova, phala ku mu bhikila. Kuala ene, exi: Tu jimbangi muene!" 
Joshua24:23 Texenu-phe, kindala, o jinzambi joso ja idijila jala muʼaxaxi kenu; tenu muẋima uenu kua Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
Joshua24:24 Kifuẋi kia vutuila Josuué, exi: Etu tua-nda kubhikila muene Jihova Nzambi ietu, tu tumaka o dízui diê." 
Joshua24:25 Kienhiki Josuué, bhu kizuua kienhókio, mu Xikeme, kikutu ua ki kuatesa kiambote ni kifuẋi, iu ua ki xindi kuila kikale kijila ki nanganena." 
Joshua24:26 Josuué iu ua soneka o maka oso iá mu divulu dia ngonge ia Nzambi; anga u katula kiditadi kiònene u ki phapha bhenhobho mu kilembeketa kia muẋi ua kaluvádio ua zukama ni dibhezelu dia Jihova. 
Joshua24:27 Josuué anga uambela o kifuẋi kioso, uixi: Ditadi didi hádia di tu kala mbangi; mukonda diene dievu o maka oso a tu ambela Jihova; hádia di mi kala ue ku umbangi ua ku mi kuzala, phala Nzambi ienu ki mu mu tele makutu." 
Joshua24:28 Kia bhiti ima iosuʼiii Josuué anga u sulula o mundu, ene hé aia muthu ku dibhata diê, muthu ku dibhata diê." 
Joshua24:29 Anga kibhita-phe kuila, imʼii ki ia bhiti, Josuué, monʼa Nune, mukalakadi uangene ua Jihova, uafu; mivu ia Josuué ia tenene kiá hama ia mivu ni kuinhi." 
Joshua24:30 Anga a mu funda mu jimbanmbe ja ubhinganu uê-muène, mu Timinate-sela, kididi kiene mu mulundu ua Ifalaime, ku mbandu ia kusuku ia mulundu ua Ngahaxi." 
Joshua24:31 Mu izuua ioso ia Josuué, Izalaiele-phe ua bhikila jinga muene Jihova, ni mu izuua ioso ia ikulakaji, o adiakime, oso akolele hanji muenhu kuema dia Josuué, ia ejidile o kikalakalu kioso kia bhangele Jihova kua Izalaiele." 
Joshua24:32 O ifuba ia Zuze a i fundile ue mu Xikeme, kuma anʼa Izalaiele a tundile na-iu ku Ijitu, hé a i funda mu mukáu iunhá uasumbile Jakobo kua anʼa Hamolo, tata ia Xikeme, mu hama ia itadi ia phalata; kuma ue o mikáu ioio iene iabhiti ku mbandu ia ubhinganu ua anʼa Zuze." 
Joshua24:33 Eleiazale ue, monʼa Alá anga ufua, hé a mu funda mu Jibeia bhu kalundu ka Finehase, monʼê, ka mu bhele ku mulundu ua Ifalaíme." 
Judges1:1 Mu kukala-kukala, Josuué kia zubha kúfua, anʼa Izalaiele ebhula kua Jihova, exi: Nanhi u tu kalela ku pholo mu kubanda ku Makanana, ni kúlua-nâ?" 
Judges1:2 Jihova-phe, uixi: Juda muene u banda; talesenu, ixi ioso iii nga i bhakula bhu lukuaku luè." 
Judges1:3 Juda anga u ambela phangʼiê Ximinhá, uixi: Ndoko, u bandele kumoxi ni eme mu kibatu kiami kia ngi bhana ku muondona, tu lue ni Makanana; eie ue hinu ngi ku bheke mu kibatu kiê." 
Judges1:4 Juda anga u banda; Jihova anga u bhakula Makanana ni Mapelezi bhu lukuaku luâ; anga a beta-ku mu Bezeke, kuinhi dia midi dia muthu." 
Judges1:5 Anga a sanga Adoni-bezeke, mu Bezeke, anga a lua-nê, anga a beta Makanana ni Mapelezi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-bezeke anga u lenga; anga a mu kaia, a mu kuata, a mu batula milembu ia ikota ia maku ni ia inama." 
Judges1:7 Adoni-bezeke anga u zuela, uixi: Makuinhi sambuadi a sobha a kumbuka milembu ia ikota ia maku ni ia inama, a kexi mu nona jisesekenha mʼoxi a meza ami; kioso ki nga bhangele eme, Nzambi ua ngi futu-kiu. Anga a mu bheka mu Jeluzaleme, hé u fuila momo." 
Judges1:8 Mbata anʼa Juda a lua ni Jeluzaleme anga a i tambula, a i beta ni mazu a xibhata, mbonge iene a i ta mu túbhia." 
Judges1:9 Kia zubha ku ki bhanga, anʼa Juda a kulumuka mu kúlua ni Makanana a tungu mu milundu ni mu sulu, ni mu jixi ku luiji." 
Judges1:10 Juda anga uia mu kúlua ue ni Makanana a tungu mu Hebolone (Hebolone-phe dijina diê mʼokulu Kidiata-Halaba); anga a beta Sesai, ni Ahimane, ni Talamai." 
Judges1:11 Ku tunda bhobho uia mu kúlua ni akua Ndebile. (Ndebile-phe dijina diê mʼokulu Kidiata-sefele). 
Judges1:12 Kalebe anga u zuela, uixi: Uoso u beta Kidiata-sefele nʼa mu tambula, ngi mu bhana monʼami ua muhatu, Akaza, mu kala muhatuʼê." 
Judges1:13 Otoniiele monʼa Kenaze, ndenge ia Kalebe, anga u mu tambula; anga u mu bhana Akaza, monʼê ua muhatu, mu kala muhatuʼê." 
Judges1:14 Kia zubha ku mu bhenga-phe, muene u mu longesa kubhinga díbhia kua tatʼâ; muhatu anga u tuluka ku bulu iê, Kalebe anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Ohi i ua mesena?" 
Judges1:15 Monʼa muhatu anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngi bhane kizediuise; kuma ua ngi tungisa mʼoxi ia thothuena, ngi bhane ue ni majiia a menha. Kalebe anga u mu bhana ni majiia ma thala ni majiia ma luiji." 
Judges1:16 Anʼa Kene, ukouakime ua Mozé, anga a tunda bhu Mbonge ia Maie, a bandela kumoxi ni anʼa Juda katé mu kikangalakata kia Juda, kiakexila mu sulu ia Halade; anga aia a tunga kumoxi ni akuaʼxi." 
Judges1:17 Juda anga u ila kumoxi ni phangʼiê Ximinhá, anga a beta Makanana akua Zefate, dibhata dioso a di buidisa. Mbonge ioio anga a ixana dijina diê Hóloma." 
Judges1:18 Juda anga u tambula dingi Ngaza ni jisanzala jê, ni Axikilone ni jisanzala jê, ni Ekolone ni jisanzala jê." 
Judges1:19 Jihova anga u kala kumoxi ni Juda, u kaia athu a tungu ku milundu, a tungu ku luiji-phe mu dikôlo ua lémbua ku a kaia, mukonda ala ni makalu a felu." 
Judges1:20 Hebolone anga a i bhana Kalebe, kala kia zuela Mozé; muene anga u kaia-mu ana atatu a Anake." 
Judges1:21 Anʼa Bejamí-phe anga a lémbua kukaia o Majebuzi mu Jeluzaleme; Majebuzi-phe ió, a kala mu tungila kumoxi ni anʼa Bajamí mu Jeluzaleme katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Judges1:22 Dibhata dia Zuze anga di banda mu kúlua ni Betele; Jihova anga u kala-nâ kumoxi. 
Judges1:23 Dibhata dia Zuze anga a tuma ilolo kulonda mu Betele. (Mbonge ióio-phe mʼokulu dijina diê Luze). 
Judges1:24 Ala mu londa anga a mona muthu iú tunda mu mbonge, anga a mu ambela, exi: Tua ku diondo, tu idikize bhuoso bhu tu bokuena mu mbonge, eie tu ku bhange mbote." 
Judges1:25 Muene anga u a edikiza dibokuenu dia kubhiẋila mu mbonge; mbonge anga a i kuama ni mazu a xibhata; muthu iú-phe a mu eha ni família iê. 
Judges1:26 Muene-phe uia ku ixi ia Mahiti, u tunga-ku mbonge, u i luka dijina dia Luze; diene dijina diê katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Judges1:27 Manasa-phe u kamba kukaia akua Bete-Sane ni jisanzala jê, ni Taanake ni jisanzala jê, ni akua Ndole ni jisanzala jê, ni akua Ibeleiamu ni jisanzala jê, ni akua Mejidu ni jisanzala jê; Makanana-phe ia a jijila hanji kutunga mʼoxi ioso ioio." 
Judges1:28 Ku izuua-izuua-phe, Izalaiele kia sunga dingi nguzu, u bhangesa makanana ku kala abhika a kuenda ni ku futa lubhaku, kuma enʼoso ka a kaie katé kia a zubha." 
Judges1:29 Ifalaime ue u kamba kukaia Makanana a tungu mu Ngezele; o Makanana-phe anga a tungʼâ mu Ngezele ni ene kumoxi. 
Judges1:30 Nzebulone ue u kamba kukaia akua Kitolone, ni akua Nahalole; Makanana-phe anga a tunga-nâ kumoxi, a kala mu ubhika, ua kukalakala, ni kufuta dijimu." 
Judges1:31 Asele ue u kamba kukaia akua Haku, ni akua Sidone, ni akua Akalabu, ni akua Akezibe, ni akua Heliba, ni akua Afeka, ni akua Lehobo;" 
Judges1:32 akua Asele-phe a kala mu tunga ni Makanana kumoxi, kuma ene akua ʼxi; ka a kaie, kana." 
Judges1:33 Nafitali ue u kamba kukaia akua Bete-seme, ni akua Bete-Anate; u tunga-phe kumoxi ni Makanana kuma ene akuaʼxi a tungile-mu; maji-phe akua Bete-seme ni akua Bete-Anate a kala mu ubhika ua kukalakala, ni kufuta madijimu ku anʼa Izalaiele." 
Judges1:34 O akua Mamodi anga a bhinjika anʼa Dani kusuka mu milundu; mukonda ka ehela, ni ngó kuiza mu luiji mua tungu ene." 
Judges1:35 Akua Mamodi-phe a jijila ue kutunga mu mulundu ua Helese, ni mu Ajalone, ni mu Salabimu; maji ue kiene kimoxi, lukuaku lua dibhata dia Zuze lua a lende, katé kia kala mu ubhika ua kukalakala, ni kubhana lubhaku lua dijimu." 
Judges1:36 O mbambe ia Mamodi (akua Idumeia) anga i tunda mu phaka ia jimbalanganza mu kubanda bhu Akalabini, anga i bhita bhu ditadi, iia muene ni kubanda ku pholo." 
Judges2:1 Mukunji ua Jihova anga u tunda bhu Jidingale u banda ku Betele. Uixi: Eme nga mi katula mu Ijitu, nga mi bheka mʼoxi i nga lokela ku jitata jenu, ngixi; Kikutu kiami kioso, ki nga te ni enu, ki ngi ki tondala kana, kate ku miji ni miji." 
Judges2:2 Enu-phe uenu, kana kuta kikutu ni akuaʼxi ienhiʼii, kalatódio jâ mu ji bula. Enu-phe ki mua ngʼivu dízui diami; mua ki bhangela-hi kienhiki?" 
Judges2:3 Mukonda dia kiki, eme uami ngambe kuma: Nguami dingi ku a kaia bhu pholo ienu; a xale muene kienhokio, a kale mínha mu jimbanji jenu, jinzambi jâ ji mi kale mubhetu ua ku mi kuata." 
Judges2:4 Kia zubha mukunji ua Jihova kuzuela makʼama kua ana oso a Izalaiele, mundu uoso uta nzôngo, a suina dízui ni kudila." 
Judges2:5 Kididi kienhiki anga a ki luka dijina dia Bokimu; Jihova anga a mu satela bhenhobho. 
Judges2:6 Kiki kia zubha Josuué muanganesa mundu, anʼa Izalaiele aia muthu ni muthu ku undundu uê, phala oxi i kale kiá iâ ene mu ku i tunga." 
Judges2:7 Mundu anga a bhikila Jihova izuua ioso ia Josuué, ni izuua ioso ue ia adiakimi kia kolo hanji o muenhu, kia zubha Josuué kúfua, oso a muene kukalakala kuavulu kua Jihova mu bhângela Izalaiele." 
Judges2:8 Josuué monʼa Nune, selevende ia Jihova, anga u fua, kuma uala mu hâma ia muvu ni kuinhi." 
Judges2:9 Anga a mu funda bhu mbambe ia undundu uê mu Timinate-Helese, mu milundu ia Ifalaime, ku mbandu ia kusuku ia ʻmulundu ua Ngahaxi." 
Judges2:10 Ni muiji uoso uenhó a a bhongolola kuʼaia jitata jâ; anga kuiza muiji uengi úa kulu bhu kididi kiâ, a kambe kuijiia Jihova, a kambe kuijiia ue ikalakalu iê ia bhange mu bhângela anʼa Izalaiele." 
Judges2:11 Bhenbhobho anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhanga kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova, a kala mu bhikila Jibaale." 
Judges2:12 Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ, ua a katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu, a mu xi; a kaiela jinzambi jengi, o jinzambi ja mundu uamukuá ua a kala mu jimbandu, a kala mu ji fukamena; Jihova anga a mu thathamesa." 
Judges2:13 Kuma a xisa muene Jihova, hé a kala mu bhikila Baale ni Jitalote." 
Judges2:14 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uamena Izalaiele, Muene hé u a bhakula bhu maku a ingumba i kala mu ku a bhûnda; anga u a tambuisa bhu maku a jinguma jâ, ja a kala mu jimbandu, katé ka tena dingi kuimana mu kubhânga ni jinguma jâ." 
Judges2:15 Kuoso-kuoso ku a di tela a sanga lukuaku lua Jihova luala ku a bhanga kiaiibha, kaia Jihova muene kia a zuelelele ni kia a lokela, anga a kala mu tata kiavulu, kuma ku mbandu joso a a phopheka." 
Judges2:16 Jihova anga u bhangesa kuila ku moneka afundixi, a kala mu ku a kudila bhu lukuaku lua ió oso ene ku a bhûnda." 
Judges2:17 Maji ene hanji-phe, nguauâ né ngó kuívua afundixiʼâ; kuma a kala mu bhanga undumbu ni jinzambi jengi, a ji fukamena; kindala a bhambuka kiá mu njila mua kexile kuenda o jitata jâ, ia kutumaka o ijila ia Jihova; ene-phe a bhanga kiengi, a lémbua kubhanga kia bhanga jinga o jitata jâ." 
Judges2:18 Jihova kia a zangelekela jinga afundixi, Jihova u kala ni mufundixi uoso uala-ku, u a kudila bhu lukuaku lua jinguma jâ, izúua ioso ia mufundixi muenhó; kuma Jihova u a kuatela henda mukonda dia kukema kuâ, mukonda hadi ia iá ala ku a bhikisa ni ku a zukutisa." 
Judges2:19 Anga aia ni kuila ku izúua-phe, kuila mufundixi uafu, a vutuka dingi kudima, a vula dingi kubhanga ufusa, jitata jâ ndenge, mu kukaiela jinzambi jengi ni ku ji bhikila ni ku ji fukamena; ka xikina kubatuka ku imbamba iâ iene kubhanga, ni ku uendelu uâ ua kuxibhaka." 
Judges2:20 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uama ku thandu dia Izalaiele, uixi: Mukonda dia mundu uenhú kutondala kikutu kiami, kioso ki nga lekela o jitata jâ, ni kukamba kuívua dízui diami;" 
Judges2:21 eme uami ku pholo ku tuia, nguami dingi kukaia akuaʼxi oso a xala-ku tunde kiʼáfua Josuué," 
Judges2:22 a kale, nda ngi lole-nâ o muẋima ua Izalaiele, mba a xikina kukuata njila ia Jihova ni kuendela-mu, kala kia i kuatele o jitata jâ, mba kana." 
Judges2:23 Kala kiki Jihova u xia-ku ku akua ʼxi, ka zubha ku a kaia lusolo kindala, ka a bhakula dingi ene oso bhu lukuaku lua Josuué." 
Judges3:1 Enhá ene akua ʼxi a xala-ku, a a xi kuala Jihova mu kulola-nâ muẋima ua Izalaiele, oso ku Izalaiele a kambe kuijiia ita ioso ia Kanana;" 
Judges3:2 mbé miiji ia anʼa Izalaiele a kʼijiie, a di longe kúlua ita, oso mʼokulu kejidile luua kúlua;" 
Judges3:3 sobha jitanu ja akua Fidíxia, ni akua Kanana oso, ni akua Sidónia, ni akua Hivi a tungu mu mulundu ua Libano, tundé mu mulundu ua Baale-helemone katé bhu phaka ia Hamate." 
Judges3:4 Iá a xala, mu kulola-nâ o muẋima ua Izalaiele, phala kuijiia mba a xikina kuívua ijila ia Jihova, ioso ia bhele ku jitata jâ, mu ukunji ua Mozé." 
Judges3:5 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe anga a tunga kumoxi ni Makanana, ni Mahiti, ni Mamodi, ni Mapelezi, ni Mahivi, ni Majebuzi;" 
Judges3:6 anga a bhenga anʼâ a ahatu mu kala ahatuʼâ, a bhana ue anʼâ a ahatu kua anʼâ-êne a mala, hé a bhikila o jinzambi jâ." 
Judges3:7 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhanga kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova, kuma Jihova, Nzambi iâ, a mu jimbi hé a bhikila Jibaale ni iteka ia Jitalote." 
Judges3:8 Mukonda dia kiki, njinda ia Jihova i uama ku thandu dia Izalaiele, anga u a sumbisa bhu lukuaku lua Kuxane-Lesataime muenexi ku Mezopotâmia; anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhikila Kuxane-Lesataime mu nake dia muvu." 
Judges3:9 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a dikola kua Jihova, Jihova anga u a zangelekela mubhuludi uâ, u bhulula anʼa Izalaiele: Muene Otoniiele, monʼa Kenaze, ndenge ia Kalebe." 
Judges3:10 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga iiza ku thandu diê, u kala mu fundisa Izalaiele; anga u tunda mu kúlua ita, Jihova anga u bhakula Kuxane-Lesataime, sobha ia Sídia, bhu lukuaku luê; lukuaku luê anga lu lenda o kutolola Kuxane-Lesataime." 
Judges3:11 Ixi anga i tululuka hanji mu makuinhi auana a muvu. Otoniiele monʼa Kenaze anga ufua. 
Judges3:12 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha mu mesu a Jihova; Jihova anga u bhana kutena kua Engolone, sobha ia Mouabhe, mu butula Izalaiele, mukonda ene a bhange kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova." 
Judges3:13 Muene anga u bhongolola ni anʼa Amone ni Amaleke; hé uia, u nemeka Izalaiele, u tambula mbonge ia máie." 
Judges3:14 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhikila sobha ia Mouabhe mu kuinhi dia muvu ni nake. 
Judges3:15 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe anga a di kola kua Jihova, Jihova anga u a zangelekela mubhuludi uâ, muene Ehudi monʼa Jela, mukua muiji ua Bejamí, mukua kiasu. Anʼa Izalaiele anga a mu katula kuia mu kubheka ujitu kua Engolone sobha ia Mouabhe." 
Judges3:16 Ehudi anga u iudika xibhata iê ia mazu aiadi, kulebha kuê kóvadu, anga u i maneka moxi dia kizuatu kiê, ku ditabela dia mbandu ia kúdia." 
Judges3:17 Anga u bhakula ujitu kua Engolone sobha ia Mouabhe; Engolone-phe u neta kiavulu. 
Judges3:18 Kia zubha kubhakula o ujitu ueza na-u, u sulula jingamba jejile-nê ku mu bheka ni ujitu." 
Judges3:19 Muene anga u vutukila bhu matadi a iteka ia kusonga, bhu Jidingale, anga u mu ambela, uixi: Sobha ngala ni njimbu ia ku ku tudila, i tokala bhua kondama ku ubheka. Muene anga u tuma, uixi: Dixibhe. Ene oso a mu imanena anga a tunda bhu kanga." 
Judges3:20 Ehudi anga u bokona muoso muala sobha; u mu sanga ua xikama u bheka uê mu tambula mulenge mu sala ku thandu. Ehudi anga u zuela, uixi: Ngala ni njimbu ia ku ku tudila ia tundu kua Nzambi." 
Judges3:21 Muene anga u balumuka mu kialu muala. Ehudi anga u sunga lukuaku luê lua kiasu, u fomona xibhata ia maneka ku ditabela dia kúdia, u mu toma na-iu mu mala;"
