Judges3:22 o mubhinhi anga u kaiela o phoko ma bokona, ua naminina mu banha; xibhata ka i fomona dingi mu mukutu uê, ia tundidila ku kunda. Anga u xidisila bhobho." 
Judges3:23 Ehudi anga u tundila mu mbalanda, mabhitu a xilu, a kuartu ia ku thandu, ua a jika, hé u ta-ku sabhi." 
Judges3:24 Kia zubha kutunda, akua mbèle eza, a sanga mabhitu a xilu dia thandu, òte sabhi; exi-phe: Kidi kiene uala ku di futa inama mu xilu." 
Judges3:25 Anga a kinga katé kia a kumu, muene-phe ka xikina kujikula, a katula sabhi, a jikula-ku, a sanga ngana iâ ua dibhale, iú bhoxi, uafu." 
Judges3:26 Kioso-phe kia laleka kiki, Ehudi uaii dikanga, bhu matadi a iteka ia kusonga ua somboka-bhu, anga a mu lémbua, u bhixila mu Seíle." 
Judges3:27 Kia zubha kutula koko, u xika koloneta mu milundu ia Ifalaime; anʼa Izalaiele anga a kulumuka-nê kumoxi, a tundu mu milundu, muene ua a tuamenena ku pholo." 
Judges3:28 Uixi: Ngi kaiedienu; kuma Jihova ua bhakula jinguma jenu ja akua Mouabhe bhu lukuaku luenu. Anga a kulumuka ku kunda dia muene, a kuata matabhu oso a kuvúua mu Njolodá, mu batuila akua Mouabhe, kehela muthu kuzáuka." 
Judges3:29 Ku akua Mouabhe-phe anga a beta-ku kuinhi dia midi ia muthu kithangana kienhokio, uoso diiala dia nguzu, uala dizonda dia kubhânga, ki bhuala muthu ua a xi bhu maku, ni muthu umoxi ngó." 
Judges3:30 Kienhiki Mouabhe ua toloka kizúua kienhókio, bhoxi dia lukuaku lua Izalaiele. Ixi anga i tululuka mu makuinhi nake a muvu." 
Judges3:31 O kua muene ku kaiela Sangale monʼa Anati, hé u beta ku akua Fidíxia hâma jisamanu ja muthu ni ngiiada ia kukombuela jingombe; muene ue u bhulula Izalaiele." 
Judges4:1 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova, kia zubha Ehudi kúfua." 
Judges4:2 Jihova anga u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua Jabine, sobha ia Kanana, u kala ni mbanza iê ku Hazole, o kabhitangu ka kifuẋi kiê Xixela, ua tungile bhu Halosete ia matumbu." 
Judges4:3 Bhenhobho anʼa Izalaiele anga a dikola kua Jihova, kuma Jabine muene u kala ni hâma ʼvua ia makalu a felu; anga u suína kiavulu ni kubhikisa anʼa Izalaiele mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu." 
Judges4:4 Kiki-phe Debola, polofeta ia muhatu, ua sakana ni Lapidote, u kala mu fundisa Izalaiele thembu ienhoio." 
Judges4:5 Muene anga u tunga bhu diie dia Debola, bhu kaẋi ka Lama ni Betele, mu milundu ia Ifalaime; anʼa Izalaiele anga a kala mu banda bhu bhata diê mu ku a fundisa." 
Judges4:6 Muene anga u tuma kuixana Balake monʼa Abinouamu, bhu Kadexi ka Nafitali, anga u mu ambela, uixi; Ku kʼijiia kuma Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele ua ku tumu kuila: Ndeie u bhongoluele athu ku mulundu ua Tabola, u katule kuinhi dia midi dia mala ku anʼa Nafitali ni anʼa Nzebulone?" 
Judges4:7 Eme-phe ngi bhangesa kuila Xixela, kabhitangu ka kifuẋi kia Jabine, ni makalu-mê ni mundu uê, ngʼa bheka mu honga ia Kixone, hé ngi mu bhakula bhu lukuaku lué." 
Judges4:8 Balake anga u vutuila Debola, uixi: Eie ue se uia mu ngi bheka, ngiia; eie-phe ki u kamba kuia, eme uami ki ngiʼii-ku." 
Judges4:9 Debola, uixi: Ngiia muene, ngi ku bheka; maji-phe njila iii i ua-nda kuendiʼii, eie kua-ndu katula-ku kijingo phala eie, kuma Jihova ua-nda kubhakula Xixela bhu lukuaku lua muhatu. Debola anga u balumuka, uila kumoxi ni Balake katé bhu Kadexe." 
Judges4:10 Balake bhenhobho anga u kasa Nzebulone ni Nafitali, anga a bhongolokela bhu Kadexe; anga u banda ni kuinhi dia midi dia mala kumoxi ni muene, ni Debola ue u ila-nê kumoxi." 
Judges4:11 Tala, Hebele-phe, mukua Kene, ua di abhula mu akua Kene ni akuâ, anʼa Hobabe uko-ua-kimi ua Mozé, iú ua ximbika balaka jê makanga engi, katé bhu muẋi ua dikota ua mukaluvádiu mu Zananime, bhua zukama mu Kadexe." 
Judges4:12 Anga a ki tangela Xixela kuila Balake monʼa Abinouamu, ua bande ku mulundu ua Tabola." 
Judges4:13 Xixela anga u bhongolola makalu mê moso, hâma vua ia makalu ma felu, ni mundu uoso uala-nê tunde bhu Halosete ia matumbu, anga a kulumuka mu honga ia Kixone." 
Judges4:14 Debola bhenhobho anga u ambela Balake, uixi: Balumuka kiá; mukonda o kizuua kia lelu kiene kia ku telekala Xixela bhu lukuaku lué kuala Jihova; manhi kua kʼijiia kuma Jihova muene ua ku tuamena kiá? Kienhiki Balake u kulumuka mulundu ua Tabola, ni kuinhi dia midi ia mala aia-nê kumoxi." 
Judges4:15 Jihova anga u dimbula Xixela, ni makalu mê moso, ni kifuẋi kiê kioso, ku mazu a xibhata bhu pholo ia Balake; Xixela muene anga u tuluka mu dikalu diê, hé u lenga lusolo ni inama bhoxi." 
Judges4:16 Balake-phe uia ni kukaia makalu, ni kukaia kilombo kioso kia kifuẋi kia Xixela katé bhu Halosete ia matumbu; kifuẋi kioso kia Xixela anga a ki leleka ku mazu a xibhata; ki bhuala diiala dia xala-bhu, né umoxi ngó." 
Judges4:17 Maji-phe Xixela muene u lenga ni inama bhoxi katé bhu balaka ia Jaiele, mukajiʼa Hebele, mukua Kene; kuma Jabine sobha ia Hazole, uala ku paze ni dibhata dia Hebele, mukua Kene." 
Judges4:18 Jaiele anga u tunda mu kauidila Xixela, u mu ambela, uixi: Tu sange, ngana iami, tu sange! Bokona mu balaka iami, kana kukala ni hele. Muene anga u bokona mu balaka iê, muhetu anga uzangula dibeka hé u mu futa." 
Judges4:19 Xixela anga u mu ambela, uixi: Nga ku diondo, ngi bhane-ku tuménha, ngi nue; dinhota dia ngi kuata. Muene anga u jikula kisudi kia lete, u mu bhana kúnua, anga u mu futa dingi ni dibeka." 
Judges4:20 Xixela, anga u mu ambela, uixi: Imana bhu muelu ua balaka, o ki kala bhu iza muthu u ku ibhula, kuila: Momo ki muala diiala? Eie ua kèla: Ki muala." 
Judges4:21 Bhenhobho, Xixela kiaii ku kilu, Jaiele, mukajʼa Hebele, u katula phapha ia balaka, ni martelu ia kubatela na-iu, hé u i kuata bhu lukuaku luê, u mu zombela bhuoso bhuala, u mu batela phapha mu mútue, phapha anga i tundidila i kuata mu mavu, kuma uaii ku kilu kiavulu; anga u ambukila bhobho, u fua." 
Judges4:22 Kubhanga kithangana Balake ue u tula, uala kuiza ni kukaiela Xixela. Jaiele anga u tunda mu ku mu kauidila, u mu ambela, uixi: Izá, ngi ku idikize diiala uala ku mu sota. Anga u bokona-nê, u sanga Xixela iú ua zekʼú, uafu kiá, ni phapha ia balaka ia mu kubu mu mútue." 
Judges4:23 Kienhiki, Nzambi ua sokomona Jabine, sobha ia Kanana, bhu pholo ia anʼa Izalaiele, kizúua kienhokio." 
Judges4:24 Lukuaku lua anʼa Izalaiele anga lu nema dingi kiavulu ku thandu dia Jabine, sobha ia Kanana, katé anʼa Izalaiele kia buidisa Jabine sobha ia Kanana." 
Judges5:1 Debola ni Balake monʼa Abinouamu, anga emba muimbu uâ, kizúua kienhókio, exi:" 
Judges5:2 Kuma atuameneni a tuamena mua Izalaiele, kuma o mundu a di bheka ni vondadi mu kúlua ita, sakidilenu Jihova." 
Judges5:3 Ivenu, enu mu jisobha; bhanenu mátui enu mu anʼa jinganga; ngimba, eme bhabha ngimbila muene Jihova, ngimba mu ximana Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
Judges5:4 Há! Eie u Jihova, ki ua tundile ku Seíle, ki ua kuata kuenda mu mukáu ua Edomo, oxi ia tunguta, katé ni maúlu ma zenzama ni kumbomba menha, o matuta mavundu ma sonona menha." 
Judges5:5 Milundu ia botomoka bhu pholo ia Jihova, katé ni ua Sinai, kia mu tukulukila Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
Judges5:6 Mu izúua ia Sangale monʼa Anate, ni mu izúuua ia Jaiele, madiendu ma batukile mu ikoka, jingenji jendela jinga mu tunjila tua bhengalala." 
Judges5:7 Jisanzala ilombo jingûndu mua Izalaiele, ki mu moneka jinga athu a tunga-mu! Ni muene: Loloó! katé ki nga balumuka eme ngi Debola, nga balumuka mu kukala ngi kivuadi mua Izalaiele." 
Judges5:8 Izalaiele kiedile a sola jinzambi jengi; ku mabhitu a imbaka kua a tukuluka ita; ni ngubu ngó ni sosa ki i moneka dingi, mu makuinhi auana a midi ia akua Izalaiele." 
Judges5:9 Muẋima uami-phe ua lungu ku ilolo ia Izalaiele a tuamena ilolo ia Izalaiele, a di bheka ni vondadi mu kúlua, sakidilenu ni kuximana Jihova." 
Judges5:10 Enu mua sambela ku jibûlu jizela, enu mua xikama ku jixalemanda ja iuka kinéne, enu mua-lu bhita mu jinjila, ambenu-kiu." 
Judges5:11 Tangenu-kiu bhua kondama, kolenu o kikoue kia Jihova tangenu-kiu bhu matabhu bhuene mu tekela o menha, bhuene bhua kà tela o maka ma uzonda ua Jihova, mu kubhângela mabhata mê ma Izalaiele; mundu ua Jihova ua bhongoloka dingi, emba o kikoue kia Jihova bhu mielu ia imbaka!" 
Judges5:12 Phaphumuka, phaphumuka, eie Debola! Phaphumuka, Phaphumuka, u kuate kuimba muimbu, balumuka, eie Balake, monʼa Abinouamu, u kute enhó a ku kutile eie!" 
Judges5:13 Mundu ua Jihova bhenhobho a tundu, ni ikuinda iê, oso a xala-ku, a tundu mu bhânga, mazonda ni mazonda." 
Judges5:14 A tundu mua Ifalaíme, a kulumuka mu honga kúlua ni Amaleke, ki kua tundu monʼa kilumba Debola, a mi kaiela ku kunda, o mala a Bejamí ni kilombo kiâ mua Makidi mua tundu ilolo ejiia kutumina, mua Nzebulone muene mua tundu o jikabhitango;" 
Judges5:15 makuenze a Isakale a zuama kua Debola, akuʼâ Isakale a bande Balake, a di lukula muene mu honga, mu kaiela o hoka ia manhanhu mê ku mabhata ma Lubene, bhu mbanduʼa Jihonga, a di kuatela-bhu jiphata ja kàka kinene!" 
Judges5:16 Eie-phe ua xikamena-hi mu ibhanga ia ibhaku, ua landukila o mbendu ia tufunga tua jimbudi? Ku mabhata ma Lubene jiphata ja muẋima, ja vulu ja di kuatela bhu mbanduʼa jihonga!" 
Judges5:17 Ngiliiade ua xala kiá ku sámbua dia Njolodá, Dane u suua jinaviiu jê; Asele ua di nenga bhu ndundu ia kibumu kia musanza ua kalunga. Iu ua dixibhê bhu kuakelu dia jinaviiu, ka xikina kutunda mu jihonga jê." 
Judges5:18 O Nzebulone-phe mundu uê ua zemba o muenhu, kumoxi ni Nafitali a tunda mu kanga; kuala o mvunda iavulu, ka xikina kulenga." 
Judges5:19 Jisobha bhenhobho ji tula mu kubhânga a bhângela bhenhobho, jisobha ja Kanana, a bhángela bhu Taanake, bhu ménha a Mejidu, bhua tundu-phe kubhanduluka kuahi? Ka bhundu-bhu kitadi kia phalata mba ulu." 
Judges5:20 Katé ni jithéthembua ku diulu ja di te-mu, jithéthembua mu ʼnjila jâ jala kúlua ni Xixela." 
Judges5:21 Honga ia Kixone ia a kungulula, honga iókulʼoio, honga ia Kixone. Muenhu uami-phe enda, ki ngi kala ni uoma!" 
Judges5:22 U ivua ikoto ia jikabalu ii titila bhoxi, ja mazonda a ita aia ni ku di kaia-kaia." 
Judges5:23 Mezolo mu bhubhididienu, Anju ia Jihova ua kiambe, akua-bhata dienhodio a bhubhididienu kiaiibha muene, mukonda ka tundile mu banda Jihova, mu banda Jihova kumoxi ni makuenze mê." 
Judges5:24 Mu ahtu ni akuâ, Jaiele a tane-ku, mukaji a Hebele ua tokala mu Kene; mu ahatu a tunga mu jibalaka, muene a tane-ku!" 
Judges5:25 Kuma ua mu bhingi menha, muene u mu bhana lete; lete ia di kuata, mu nganza ia ungana, u mu tela-iu muene katé ki aia ku kilu." 
Judges5:26 U sunununa lukuaku lua kiasu, u kuata o phapha; lukuaku lua kúdia lu kuata o martelu; u ṗhuṗha Xixela, u mu bulʼo mútue; mútue u budika katé bhu phapha ia dítue." 
Judges5:27 U bulukutila bhu inama iê, ua tandelela muene, u zeka, koto-koto! Bhua bulukutila bhu inama iê, ua sunanana muene, bhene bhua zeka, uafu." 
Judges5:28 Mama ia Xixela u zongola bhu njanena, u talesa-phe mu kanga, u ialela mu mazungu, uixi: Dikalu diê dia kokolokela-hi? Malola-mê ki tu mʼevila-hi mu kuiza? O jikabalu jê ja kokolokela-hi mu kuenda?" 
Judges5:29 Ilumba iala-bhu i mu vutuila kiambote, muene ue u di vutuila dingi muenié-muene:" 
Judges5:30 Hinu iá uana imbamba ia bhûndu mu ita; diiala dimoxi a mu bha kahatu, mba tuhatu tuiadi, Xixela hinu divunga diê dióteke ku idífua-idífua. Divunga dióteke ku idífua-idífua, ku mizumbu iê a di bolodala. Eme-phe xalemanda, kuia divunga dioteke, kuia dingi kamusanga mba tuiadi, tua kuzuata mu xingu." 
Judges5:31 Nguma jé, u Jihova, ji buike kienhiki, oso-phe a ku zola, a benhe kala dikumbi, kioso ki di tunda ni nguzu iê ia kumuika." 
Judges5:32 Ixi anga i tululuka mu makuinhi a uana a mivu. 
Judges6:1 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha ku mesu ma Jihova; o Jihova anga u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Midiiana mu sambuadi dia muvu. 
Judges6:2 Lukuaku lua Midiiana, anga lu lenda Izalaiele ni kusuina kuavulu; mukonda dia uoma ua Midiiana anʼa Izalaiele anga a di iudikila jingenda mu milundu, ni mabanda, ni imbaka." 
Judges6:3 Anga a kala mu kuila, Izalaiele kia zubha kudima ni kukuna, akua Midiiana eza, ni akua Amaleke, ni ana amukuá ku thunda-mbulu, eza mu ku a sota;" 
Judges6:4 anga a ta ibangu iâ, enda ni kúdia ioso ia sabhuka mu mavu, katé bhu mbambe ia kubhiẋila mu Ngaza; o mua Izalaiele ka xi-mu idima, mba mbudi, mba ngombe, mba bulu." 
Judges6:5 Kuma eza jinga ni ibhaku iâ, ni jibalaka jâ; eza mukuâ ni kihoho mu kuvula; ni ene ni jikamelu jâ mu lémbua ku a kuata konda; anga a di zala mʼoxi ioso mu ku i buidisa." 
Judges6:6 Anʼa Izalaiele anga eza mu uadiama uavulu mukonda dia akua Midiiana; anʼa Izalaiele anga a dikola kua Jihova. 
Judges6:7 Kioso-phe kia kuata anʼa Izalaiele kudikola kua Jihova, mukonda dia akua Midiiana," 
Judges6:8 Jihova muene u tuma polofeta kua anʼa Izalaiele, u a ambela, uixi: Eme Jihova, ngi Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ngambe kiki: Eme muene nga mi katula mu Ijito, nga mi katula mu dibhata dia ubhika," 
Judges6:9 nga mi kudila bhu lukuaku lua akua Ijitu, ni bhu lukuaku lua athu oso a mi bhikisa, eme ngʼa kaie bhu pholo ienu, nga mi bhana o kubhingana mʼoxi iâ;" 
Judges6:10 Eme nga mi ambela ngixi: Eme Jihova, Nzambi ienu; enu ki mu kale ni uoma ua jinzambi ja akua Mamodi a vuile oxi iâ, lelu i mua tungu enu. Enu-phe, ki mua ngʼivu dízui diami." 
Judges6:11 Anju ia Jihova anga iiza, i xikama moxi a mukaluvalu ua kexile mu Ofila, ua tokala kua Jouaji mukua Abi-ezele; o monʼê ua diiala, Ngidiione, anga u kala mu vunda tiliku mu ditangi dia kukamena vinhu, phala akua Midiiana ka i mone." 
Judges6:12 Anju ia Jihova anga i mu tukulukila, i mu ambela, ixi: Jihova uala ni eie, u dizonda dia nguzu." 
Judges6:13 Ngidiione anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngana iami tata, Jihova se uala ni etu, ima ioso iii ia tu ijila-hi? o ikalakalu iê ia madiuanu ii kuebhi, ia kexi mu tu kunda adiʼetu, exi: Manhi ki Jihova muene ua tu katula mu Ijitu? Kikiphe Jihova ua tu ambudisa, iu ua tu bhakula bhu lukuaku lua Midiiana." 
Judges6:14 Bhenhobho Jihova anga u mu ila, sui, uixi: Ndeie mu uzonda uê uenhú, u kudile Izalaiele bhu lukuaku lua Midiiana; manhi ki eme muene nga ku tumu?" 
Judges6:15 Muene anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngana, tata, eme Izalaiele ngi mu kudila ni kima kiahi? O kibuka kia vumu dia tatʼetu, kiene kiala ndenge mu muiji ua Manasa, o mu bhata dia tatʼetu, eme-eme ngala ngi kasule kâ." 
Judges6:16 Jihova anga u tuma dingi ku mu ambela, uixi: Eme ngi kala ni eie sé kufula, akua Midiiana-phe ua kà a nemeka kala muthu umoxi ngó." 
Judges6:17 Muene anga u mu ambela, uixi: Se nga sange kiadi bhu mesu mé, ngi bhane kijimbuete kuila eie muene u Jihova ua-lu zuela ni eme." 
Judges6:18 Bhu ualʼobho, nga ku diondo, ku tunde-bhu, katé ki ngi ku bhekela ujitu uami, ni ngi ku tudila-u. Uixi: Ngi ku kinga katé ki uiza dingi." 
Judges6:19 Ngidiione anga uia mʼonzo u kuata xitu ia mona hombo, ni jimbolo ja kambe o kifulufulu kia felemendu ji bhinga efa ia fuba; xitu anga u i ta mu ngalu, o muzonge u u ta mʼombia, anga u tunda uiza na-u moxi a mukaluvalu, u mu bhana-u." 
Judges6:20 Anju ia Nzambi anga i mu ambela, uixi: zangula o xitu ni jimbolo u i tule bhu ndánji bhabha, o muzonge u u lundulule ku thandu, Muene anga u ki bhanga." 
Judges6:21 Bhenhobho anju ia Jihova u sunununa o dikoue dia mu kala bhu lukuaku luê, u tula o sungu iê ku xitu, ni ku jimbolo ja kambe kifulufulu kia kinanesa; bhu ndánji anga bhu fuáfua túbhia, ni xitu ni jimbolo anga ijokota; anju ia Jihova anga i mu jimbila ku mesu." 
Judges6:22 Ngidiione anga u mu mona kuma anju ia Jihova; Ngidiione uixi: Aiué, Jihova Nzambi, tata! Manhi anju ia Jihova nga di mono-nê pholo ni pholo." 
Judges6:23 Jihova anga u mu ambela, uixi: Tululuka; ku kale ni uoma; ku fu, kana!" 
Judges6:24 Ngidiione anga u tunga bhenhobho kalatoídio ka Jihova, u kexana uixi: Jihova muene Paze; ka-ké hanji katé mu kizuua kia lelu mu Ofala dia akua Abiiezele." 
Judges6:25 Anga ki bhita kuma, usuku uenhó Jihova u ambela Ngidiione, uixi: Kuata ndumbe ia ngombe ia tatʼenu, iene ngombe iê ia kaiadi, ia sambuadi dia kiubha, u bula-bule kalatódio ka Baale, kala na-ku tatʼenu, u kokele bhoxi ditutu diala bhu mbandu iê;" 
Judges6:26 u tunge kalatódio ka Jihova Nzambi ié, ku thala bhu kididi kiki kia di fikidila bhuoso bhua tokala, u ka iudika kiambote ka sokelele, u kuate o ngombe ia kaiadi, u i bhane mu sata ia kuoha, o ditutu di ua-ndu kokela bhoxi, diene di kala jihuinhi." 
Judges6:27 Bhenhobho Ngidiione anga u katula kuinhi dia muthu ku akua mbèle iê, u bhanga kioso kia mu ambela Jihova. Maji mukonda-phe dia kukala ni uoma ua ndandu ja tatʼâ, ni mala amukuá a akua bhata diê, ka tena ku ki bhanga mu muânha, maji u ki bhanga-phe mu usuku." 
Judges6:28 Kukia ni kimene, akua bhata kia balumuka ku kilu, a sanga kalatódio ka Baale a ka bulu, muxitu bhu mbandu ié a u kokela bhoxi, ngombe ia kaiadi a i satela ku thandu dia kalatódio kengi ka tungu-bhu." 
Judges6:29 Anga a di ibhula mudiâ, exi: Nanhi muene ua bhange kiki? Kia zubha kuibhula ni kutokuesa kiambote, exi: Ngidiione, monʼa Jouaji, muene ua bhange kienhiki." 
Judges6:30 Akua bhata bhenhobho anga ambela Jouaji, exi: Monʼé mu tubhule bhu kanga, phala afue, mukonda muene ua bulu kalatódio ka Baale, iú ua koka muxitu ua kexile bhu mbandu ié." 
Judges6:31 Jouaji anga u ambela enhá oso a mu bhongolokela, uixi: Kifua Baale mu mu bhângela enu? Enu mua-nda ku mu bhulula? Uoso uambe ku mu bhângela, a-nda ku mu jibha kimene kia lelu kienhiki. O ki kala Baale nzambi iene, a di bhângele muene, mukonda sai muthu ua mu budila kalatódio kê." 
Judges6:32 Tunde mu kizúua kienhokio Ngidiione a mu luka Jelubaale, kuma Jouaji uedi, uixi: Baale muene a bhânge ni ió uoso ua bulu kalatódio kê." 
Judges6:33 Kienhokio akua Midiiana oso, ni akua Amaleke, ni ana amukuá mu thunda-mbulu, a di bhongolola kumoxi, anga Njolodá a mu zaúka, a ta kibangu mu honga ia Jezeele." 
Judges6:34 Nzumbi ia Jihova phe i tula kua Ngidiione, muene anga u xika koloneta; akua Abi-ezele anga a bhongoloka mu ku mu kaiela." 
Judges6:35 Anga u tuma jiphunga mʼoxi ioso ia Manasa; ene uâ anga a bhongoloka mu ku mu kaiela. Anga u tuma ue jiphunga mua Asele, ni mua Nzebulone, ni mua Nafitali; anga eza mu kutakana-nê." 
Judges6:36 Ngidiione-phe u ambela Nzambi, uixi: Hé Izalaiele ua-nda ku mu bhuluila muene bhu lukuaku luami, kala ki ua ki tange," 
Judges6:37 talesa, lelu ngi zala kibha kia mbudi ni kindemba kiê bhu kanga dia kubhiatela; se bhu kala dimune ku kindemba ngó, bhoxi bhuoso bhua kukuta, ngi kʼijiia kuma eie ua-nda bhuluila Izalaiele bhu lukuaku luami, kala ki ua ki tange." 
Judges6:38 Anga ki bhita kuma ki kúkia, u balumuka mu kimene, u futa kibha kia kindemba, hé u kama dimume diala-mu, ditijela diezala menha." 
Judges6:39 Ngidiione anga u ambela dingi Nzambi, uixi: Njinda ié Ngana, ki i ngi uamene, ngi zuele ngó lumoxiʼulu; ngi fikise-ku dingi, nga ku diondo, ngi te kindemba lumoxi ngó; kiki-phe o kindemba ngó ki kukuta, bhoxi bhuoso bhu kala dimume." 
Judges6:40 Nzambi anga u ki bhanga usuku uenhó; kuma kindemba ngó kiene kia kukuta, bhoxi bhuoso bhuala dimume." 
Judges7:1 Bhenhobho Jelubaale, (muene Ngidiione), ni mundu uoso aia-nê kumoxi, a di meneka anga a ta kibangu bhu dijiia dia Halodi; o kilômbo kia akua Midiiana kia a kala ku mbandu ia kusuku tundé bhu kalundu ka Mbolé katé mu honga." 
Judges7:2 Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione, uixi: O mundu-ze u uala-nâ ua vuluʼé ngó, kuila eme ngi bhana akua Midiiana bhu lukuaku luâ. Sumba Izalaiele u ngi tela nzabala, kuila: Lukuaku luami eme-muène lua ngi bhulula." 
Judges7:3 Kiki-phe bhana ngolokela mu mátui ma mundu, kuila: Uoso uala ni uoma, uala mu teketa, a vutuke lusolo, mu mulundu ua Ngiliiade a muangane-mu. Ku mundu anga ku vutuka makuinhʼiadi a midi ni midi jiiadi; anga bhu xala ngó kuinhi dia midi." 
Judges7:4 Jihova anga u ambela dingi Ngidiione, uixi: Mundu hanji uavulu. A bheke ku menha, ngi ku tunguile-nâ kuenhoko. Mu kutula koko, oso ngi ku ambela, ngixi: Enhá ene uia-nâ, ene-phe muene aia; oso ngi ku ambela, ngixi: Enhá ka ii-ku, ene-phe a xala." 
Judges7:5 Kienhiki Ngidiione u bheka mundu ku menha. Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione, uixi: Uoso uala kukabula menha ni lukuaku kala ki bhanga ímbua ni dimi, a di kalele; uoso ue u fukama ku jiphuna mu kúnua, a di kalele." 
Judges7:6 Ia-phe oso a kabula menha, o lukuaku luene luala kubhiẋidisa menha mu kanu, a tena hâma jitatu ja mala; mundu ua mukuá ene oso a fukama ku jiphuna mu kúnua." 
Judges7:7 Jihova anga u ambela Ngidiione, uixi: Hâma jitatu ja mala iá a kabula menha ni lukuaku, ene ngi mi bhulula-nâ, kua ene ku ngi bhakuila akua Midiiana bhu lukuaku luê; mundu ua mukuá a muangane, ene oso aie ku ididi iâ." 
Judges7:8 Ngidiione anga u tambula o huta ia kúdia ni jibuzina bhu maku a mundu hé u ji bhaka; akua Izalaiele oso muene anga u a muanganesa kala muthu ku balaka iê, u xala ngó ni hâma jitatu ja mala; kilômbo kia Midiiana anga ki mu kala bhoxi, mu honga." 
Judges7:9 Mu kukala-pe usuku uenhó, Jihova u ambela Ngidiione, uixi: Balumuka, u kulumuke mu kúlua kilômbo; kuma nga ki bhakula bhu lukuaku lué." 
Judges7:10 O ki u kala-phe hanji ni uoma ua ku a lundumuna, kulumuka hanji ngoho eie muene ni kibese kié Pula, mu bhixile bhu kilômbo kiâ;" 
Judges7:11 u ivue kioso kiala kuzuela; phala maku a ku kale kiua ni nguzu ia ku vubuka bhu kilombo. Muene anga u kulumuka, ni Pula kibese kié, hé a bhixila bhua suku jifundu ja alangidi a kilombo." 
Judges7:12 Akua Midiiana bhenhobho, ni akua Amaleke, ni ana a mukuá mu thunda-mbulu, a di zale mu honga kala kihoho mu kuvula, ni jikamelu jâ u lémbua ku ji tanga, mukuâ ni kisekele bhu ndundu ia kalunga mu kuvula." 
Judges7:13 Ngidiione kia zubha kutula bhu kilômbo kia akua Midiiana, u ivua muthu uala mu kunda mukuá nzoji iê ianjiua, uixi: Ivua nzoji i ngʼanjiua, ngi mona dikende dia mbolo ia sevada di dʼiza ni kumbolomoka mu kilômbo kia Midiiana, di di vunda ku balaka ia komandande, balaka anga i di bhala i di vudimika, ia xala bhoxi, ia buexuka." 
Judges7:14 Mukuá anga u mu kumbulula, uixi: Kienhiki, ki kima kiengi, kana; ki tokala o xibhata ia Ngidiione monʼa Jouaji, mukua Izalaiele. Mukonda Nzambi ua bhakula Midiiana ni kifuẋi kioso bhu lukuaku luê." 
Judges7:15 Anga ki bhita, kuila, kia zubha Ngidiione kuívua nzoji ia tange ialʼó, ni mukuá kia mu jimbuila-iu, u samba; anga u vutuka ku kibangu kia Izalaiele, uixi: Balumukenu, kuma Jihova ua bhakula kifuẋi kia Midiiana bhu maku metu." 
Judges7:16 Anga u uanununa o hâma jitatu ja mala mu ibuka itatu, anga u a kuatesa ene oso jibuzina ni masanga bhu maku; mu masanga-phe ki muala kima, u tesa-mu imakôngolo ia uama túbhia." 
Judges7:17 Anga u a ambela, uixi: Mu ngi tala eme, mu kaiela ioso i ngi bhanga; mu kuila nga bhixila bhua suku o kilômbo, kioso ki ngi bhanga eme, enu uenu kiene ki mu bhanga." 
Judges7:18 Eme ngʼila ngi xika mbungu kumoxi ni iá oso ala ni eme, enu uenu xikenu jimbungu mu mbandu joso ja kilômbo, mu kole, muexi: Xibhata ia Nzambi ni ia Ngidiione." 
Judges7:19 Kala kiki, Ngidiione ni hâma ia mala aia-nê, a bhixila bhua suku o kilômbo, bhu ola ia kumatekena kilangidilu kia mu kaẋi dia usuku, kuila kindala kia te-ku athu engi ku kilangidilu. Anga a xika jimbungu hé a bula o masanga bhu maku." 
Judges7:20 Ibuka itatu ioso anga a xika jimbungu, a bula masanga, a kuata makôngolo ma túbhia bhu lukuaku lua kiasu, o lukuaku lua kúdia lua kuata mbungu ia kuxika. Anga a kola exi: Ku xibhata ia Nzambi ni ia Ngidiione," 
Judges7:21 Anga emana kala muthu bhu kididi kiê, kilômbo a ki bhake mu kaẋi; kifuẋi kioso-phe kia akua Midiiana anga ki lundumuka ni lusolo, a dikola-kola, anga aia ni kulenga." 
Judges7:22 A xiki kia kuata kuxika o hama jitatu ja jimbungu, Jihova u bhangesa kuila mu kifuẋi muthu ni muthu xibhata iê u i fomuena mukuá, anga kifuẋi kioso (kia akua Midiiana) a kala mu di ta mudiâ ni ku di jibha-jibha. Kifuẋi kioso anga ki lenga katé bhu Bete-xita, ala kuila njila ia Zelela, katé mu jimbambe ja Abele-mehola bhua lulama ni Tabate." 
Judges7:23 Bhenhobho mala ma akua Izalaiele, anga a di kasa, ni mua Nafitali, ni mua Asele, ni Manasa ioso, hé a kuata kukaia akua Midiiana." 
Judges7:24 Ngidiione muene ue anga u tuma jiphunga mu milundu ioso ia Ifalaime, uixi: Kulumukenu mu batuile akua Midiiana, mu a diangele ku kuata o matabhu a kuzaukila, katé bhu Bete-bala, mu matabhu a Njolodá. Kala kiki mala a Ifalaime oso a di kasa, anga a kuata matabhu katé bhu Bete-bala, o matabhu a kuvuua mu Njolodá." 
Judges7:25 Anga a kuata jingana jiiadi, anʼa jisobha ja Midiiana, Olebe, ni Ziiebe; Olebe anga a mu jibhila bhu ndánji ia Olebe; o Ziiebe a mu jibhila bhu ditangi dia Ziiebe; anga aia kiua ni kukaia akua Midiiana; o mitue ia Olebe ni Ziiebe, anga a i bhekela Ngidiione ku sambua dia Njolodá." 
Judges8:1 Akua Ifalaime anga ambela Ngidiione, exi: Mbebhu-ohi eie ua bhange kiki? Ua kambe ku tu kasa ki uaii kúlua ni Midiiana? Anga a zoka-nê mvunda, a tangelela muene kiavulu." 
Judges8:2 Muene anga u a ambela, uixi: Eme-phe nga bhangeʼhi, ku ki fika ni kiki ki mua bhange enu? Manhi o kuangulula, kuangulula akua Ifalaíme ki kualʼé kota, o kumuna kua munu akua Abiiezele, ki ndenge?" 
Judges8:3 Nzambi ua bhakula bhu lukuaku luenu anʼa jisobha ja Midiiana, Olebe ni Ziiebe. Eme-phe kima ki nga tena kubhanga kima kiahi, ki soka ni ki mua bhange enu? Njinda iâ ia mu kuatelele, anga i sosoloka, kia zubha ku a zuelela kiki." 
Judges8:4 Ngidiione anga u tula ku Njolodá hé u zaúka, ni muene ni hâma jitatu ja mala aia-nê kumoxi, a bhuila, maji hanji iá kaia akua Midiiana." 
Judges8:5 Anga u ambela akua Sukote, uixi: Nga mi diondo, bhanenu kúdia ku mundu ala ku ngi kaiela; kuma a bhuila ni nzala, eme-phe ngala kukaia Zeba ni Zalumuna, jisobha ja Midiiana." 
Judges8:6 Jingana ja Sukote-phe, exi: Manhi maku a Zeba ni Zalumuna ua a kuata kiá bhu lukuaku lué, phala etu tu bhane kúdia ku kifuẋi ki uala kuenda-na-kiu?" 
Judges8:7 Ngidiione-phe, uixi: Dixibhienunu! Jihova kia-ndu ngi bhakuila Zeba ni Zalumuna bhu lukuaku luami, ngi mi aza xitu ienu ni minha ia muxitu ni kathathala." 
Judges8:8 Anga u tunda bhenhobho, u banda ku Penuuele, anga u a zuelesa ue kiene kimoxi; akua Penuuele anga a mu vutuila kala kia vutula akua Sukote." 
Judges8:9 Muene anga u ambela ue akua Penuuele, uixi: Kioso ki ngʼiza, kuila nga tululuka kiá, o kathôndo ka mbonge ienu iii ia matala, ngi ka bula." 
Judges8:10 Kienhokio-phe Zeba ni Zalumuna a bhixila bhu Kadikodi, ni ifuẋi iâ iala kuenda na-iu kumoxi, kuinhi dia midi ni midi jitanu ja mala, ene ngó a subhuka-ku ku kifuẋi kia anʼa thunda-mbulu-uanga-ua-kisongo. Mukonda kuafu kiá hama ni makuinhi aiadi a midi ia mala, oso a tena kufomona xibhata ia kubhanga." 
Judges8:11 Ngidiione anga u bandela mu njila ia jisanzala ja jibalaka, mu kuia ku Noba ni Jongibeia, ene ua a xi ku luiji, kifuẋi anga u ki beta, kuma ua a sange a di jimbi, exi ki kuiza kima." 
Judges8:12 Ni Zeba ni Zalumuna-phe anga a lenga; muene-phe anga u a kaia; jisobha jiiadi ja Midiiana Zeba ni Zalumuna, ua kuata, kifuẋi kioso u ki muanga-muanga ni ku ki kaia-kaia." 
Judges8:13 Ngidiione monʼa Jouaji anga u vutuka ku ita, kuila kumbi kiluua di tunda, u ijila njila ia kalundu ka Helese." 
Judges8:14 Anga u kuata munzangala múkua Sukote, u mu tokuesa ni ku mu ibhula kiambote; muene hé u mu bhana o majina ma jingana joso ja Sukote ni adiakime oso, makuinhi sambuadi a muthu ni sambuadi." 
Judges8:15 Ngidiione anga u tula kua akua Sukote, uixi: Talenu Zeba ni Zalumuna mua a tumbuila mu ku ngʼâmba eme ni ku ngi nongena, muixi: Manhi maku a Zeba ni Zalumuna ua a kuata kiá bhu lukuaku lué, phala etu tu bhane kúdia ku mala a ku tokala a bhuila ni nzala?" 
Judges8:16 Muene anga u kuata adiakime, akua bhata dia Sukote, anga u a bhana kibetu kiambote ni minha ia muxitu ni kathathala, phala ku a longa." 
Judges8:17 O kathondo mu mbonge ia Penuuele ua ka bula-bula, o mala oso a tungile mu mbongeʼomo ua a jibha-jibha." 
Judges8:18 Muene anga u ambela Zeba ni Zalumuna, uixi: Athu a kidifua kiahi, u mua jibhila bhu Tabolo? Ene a mu vutuila, exi: Kiene ki ualʼeiʼiki ene ue kiene; ene oso edi kala anʼa sobha." 
Judges8:19 Muene-phe uixi: Enhó jiphange jami, anʼa mamʼetu! Ni kidi kiene, nga lokela mua Jihova uene ni muenhu, kuila se enhó mua a xile ni muenhu, eme uami ue ki ngeji ku mi jibha enu." 
Judges8:20 Anga u ambela Jetele, monʼê ua phande-kumbi iê, uixi: Balumuka u a jibhe! Munzangala-phe ka fomona xibhata iê, kuma uala ni uoma, mukonda hanji mona ndenge." 
Judges8:21 Ni Zeba ni Zalumuna anga ambela Ngidiione, exi: Balumuka eie muene u tu jibhe; kuma diiala diiala kiá, ni nguzu iê. Ngidiione anga u balumuka, u jibha Zeba ni Zalumuna, hé u tambula o makembu óiudike mu kidífua kia mbeji, a zuika jikamelu jâ mu xingu." 
Judges8:22 Kia bhiti imʼiii, akua Izalaiele ambela, Ngidiione, exi: Eie muene u tu tumina, ni eie, ni monʼé, ni mulaulʼé; mukonda eie muene ua tu bhulula bhu lukuaku lua akua Midiiana." 
Judges8:23 Ngiddiione anga u ambela, uixi: Eme ki ngi mi tumina, ne bhuofele ue monʼami ka mi tumina; kikala u mi tumina Jihova." 
Judges8:24 Ngidiione anga u a ambela, uixi: Inda eme ngi mi bhinga kima kimoxi: Mu ngi bhana enu oso o jibixa ji mua bhundu ku jinguma. (Kuma o jinguma ja akua Ijimaiele, ja bhange na-ju Ngidiione, kifua kiâ a zuata jinga malenge a ulu ni jibixa ja ulu.)" 
Judges8:25 Ene a mu vutuila, exi: Tu ji bhana muene ni muẋima uoso ni vondadi ioso. Anga a zala thanga bhoxi, ene oso anga a takula-bhu o jibixa ja bhûndu ku jinguma, mu imoxi-imoxi." 
Judges8:26 O jibixa ja uluʼiji ja bhingi muene, anga a ji pezala, o kunema kuê kifua kimbamba ki bhinga ngamba, kuma ja tenene midi ni hama sambuadi ja xikulu ia ulu; kua di te o makembu a kidifua kia jimbeji, ni makoladi, ni izuatu i kusuka ia zuatele o jisobha ja Midiiana, kua di te dingi ue o malubhambu ma kexile mu jixingu ja jikamelu jâ." 
Judges8:27 Ngidiione anga u iudika na-u efodi, u kala na-iu bhu bhata diê, bhu Ofila; Izalaiele ioso anga i sendukila bhu bhata diê bhenhobho; anga ki di bhanga kutondala kua Ngidiione, ni kua dibhata diê." 
Judges8:28 Kala kiki, akua Midiiana kienhokio a toloka bhu pholo ia anʼa Izalaiele, ka zangula dingi mítue iâ mu kusota kuvua Izalaiele. Ixi anga i kala ni kutululuka mu makuinhi auana a muvu, mu izúua ia Ngidiione." 
Judges8:29 Jelubaale monʼa Jouaji, anga uia u tunga bhu bhata dié." 
Judges8:30 Ngidiione anga u kala ni makuinhi sambuadi a mona, a mu tundu ku miogo iê; mukonda muene ua kexi ni ahatu avulu." 
Judges8:31 A nga u kala ni mukama uê bhu Xikeme, u mu vualela ue monʼa diiala, hé u mu luka dijina dia Abimeleke." 
Judges8:32 Ngidiione monʼa Jouaji anga u fua, kia zubha kubhiẋila mu mivu iavulu, ua kuka muene; anga a mu funda mu mbila ia Jouaji tatʼâ, mu Ofila ia akua Abi-ezele." 
Judges8:33 Mu kukala-phe, kia zubha Ngidiione kúfua, anʼa Izalaiele a di bhange dingi jindumbu mu kukaiela Jibaale, anga a ta-bhu Baale-belite mu kala nzambi iâ." 
Judges8:34 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a fula kuxinganeka Jihova Nzambi iâ, ua a kudila jinga bhu lukuaku lua jinguma jâ, ku mbandu ni mbandu;" 
Judges8:35 a fula ue kuidikiza henda ku dibhata dia Jelubaale, a muedi Ngidiione, kala kia tokalele mu mbote ioso ia bhanga jinga muene kua Izalaiele." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleke, monʼa Ngidiione anga uia bhu Xikeme, ku jindandu ja mamʼâ, u kala mu zuela-nâ kumoxi ni família ioso ia kukuʼâ ku umama uâ, uixi:" 
Judges9:2 Zuelenu, nga mi diondo, mu mátui ma akua Xikeme oso muexi kiki: Ki mi kala kota kiebhi? O kuila ana oso a Jelubaale, ala makuinhi sambuadi a muthu a mi tumina? Inga kota umoxi u mi tumina? Xinganekenu ue kuma eme ngala ngi kifuba kienu ngi xitu ienu." 
Judges9:3 Jindandu ja mamʼâ anga a mu tumbula muene kala kiambe muene mu mátui ma akua Xikeme oso; miẋima iâ anga i sola kukaiela Abimekele, exi: Muene Phangʼietu." 
Judges9:4 Anga a mu bhana makuinhi sambuadi a itadi ia phalata, ia katula mʼonzo ia Baale-belite, Abimeleke anga u futa na-iu iiala ia bhumu, ia di kake, i kala mu ku mu kaiela muene." 
Judges9:5 Anga uia ni enhá bhu bhata dia tatʼâ, bhu Ofila, jiphange jê anʼa Jelubaale, o makuinhi sambuadi a muthu, u a jibhila bhu ditadi dimoxi. Ua subhuka-bhu ngó Jotamu, kasule ka Jelubaale, kuma ua suama." 
Judges9:6 Bhenhobho akua Xikeme oso, ni akua dibhata dia Beta-Milo, anga a di bhongolola, Abimeleke anga a mu unda ku ungana ua usobha bhu mukaluvalu ua dikota ua kexile mu Xikeme." 
Judges9:7 Jotamu kia zubha ku mu kunda-kiu, uia bhu thala ia mulundu ua Ngedizine, u kala mu ku a kolelela ni dízui dia suina, uixi: Ngʼivienu, enu mu akua Xikeme, phala Nzambi a mʼivue enu." 
Judges9:8 Sai kizuua o miẋi iele mu kuunda sobha iâ; anga ambela mudiva, exi: Hinga ungana ua ku tu tumina etu." 
Judges9:9 Kuala mudiva-phe, uixi: Kifuá ngi xia maji mami ma fumana ni kua Nzambi ni kua athu, ni ngiie mu kubhekela ngó ku thandu dia miẋi?" 
Judges9:10 Miẋi anga i ambela mufiku, exi: Izá eie, u hinge ungana ua ku tu tumina." 
Judges9:11 Kuala mufiku-phe, uixi: Kifuá ngi xia ibundu iami iatouala, ni ngiie mu kubhekela ngó ku thandu dia miẋi?" 
Judges9:12 Miẋi anga i ambela muvide, exi: Izá eie, u hinge ungana ua ku tu tumina." 
Judges9:13 Kuala muvide-phe, uixi: Kifuá ngi xia o vinhu iami i bhekesa kusanguluka ni Nzambi ni athu, ni ngiie mu bhekela ngó ku thandu dia miẋi?" 
Judges9:14 Kia zubha kuzuela kiki, miẋi ioso i ambela musonge, iexi: Izá eie, u hinge ungana ua ku tu tumina." 
Judges9:15 Kuala musonge: Se kidi kiene mu ngʼunda eme mu kala sobha ienu, izenu mu di kondele mu kilembeketa kiami; o ki mu ila kana, ku musônge ku tunde túbhia tu buidise ni misedulu ia muxitu ua Libanu." 
Judges9:16 Kiki-phe enu se ki mua bhange kia kidi, kia ujitu, mu kuta Abimeleke ku usobha, se mua bhange kiambote kua Jelubaale ni dibhata diê, se mua bhange kia fuama mu imbamba ia bhangele muene." 
Judges9:17 Kuma tatʼetu ua mi bhángela ku ita, ua texi o muenhu uê, iu ua mi kudila bhu lukuaku lua akua Midiiana." 
Judges9:18 Enu-phe kizúua kia lelu mua balukila dibhata dia tatʼetu, enu mua jibha anʼê, makuinhi sambuadi a muthu ku thandu dia ditadi dimoxi, enu mua kuata Abimeleke, monʼa mukamʼê mua mu hingisa ungana ua Xikeme, mukonda dia kukala phangʼienu;" 
Judges9:19 o ki tualʼiki-phe se mua bhange muene kia kidi, kia ujitu, kua Jelubaale ni dibhata diê, sangulukenu ni Abimeleke, o muene ue a sanguluke ni enu." 
Judges9:20 O ki kala-phe makutu, hinu ku tunda túbhia kua Abimeleke, tu buidisa akua Xikeme, ni dibhata dia Beta-Milo; ku tunde ue túbhia kua akua Xikeme ni ku dibhata dia Beta-Milo tu buidise Abimeleke." 
Judges9:21 Jotamu anga u tunda-bhu, u lengela ku Beele u tunga koko, mukonda dia uoma ua phangʼiê Abimeleke." 
Judges9:22 Kioso Abimeleke kia kala mu tumina Izalaiele mu mivu itatu," 
Judges9:23 Nzambi anga u bheka unguma bhuʼaxaxi ka Abimeleke ni akua Xikeme; akua Xikeme anga a bhanga ufe kua Abimeleke. 
Judges9:24 Kienhiki kia bhiti mbebhu o ujibhanganga ua bhange muene (Abimeleke) kua anʼa Jelubaale, o makuinhi sambuadi a muthu, kituxi kia manhinga mâ phala kʼize ku thandu dia phange iâ Abimeleke ua tenene ku a jibha, ni ku thandu dia akua Xikeme a mu suinisa mu kujibha jiphange jê." 
Judges9:25 Akua Xikeme anga a tuma ingumba, mu batamena ku matala ma milundu, anga a kala mu bhûnda athu oso a bhita mu ikoka. Kienhiki anga bhu kala athu a tuma ku ki tangela Abimeleke." 
Judges9:26 Bhu kaẋiʼabha ue, Ngahale monʼa Hebede, u taúla ni jiphange jê, hé eza a tunga mu Xikeme; akua Xikeme-phe anga a kala mu ku mu dielela jinga muene." 
Judges9:27 Anga aia ku mábhia, a muna mivide iâ, a titidila jiuva mu ditangi, a keta vinhu anga a kala mu bhanga kizokola, a bokona mʼonzo ia nzambi iâ, o mu fesa, Abimeleke enda ni ku mu longolola ni ku mu xinga." 
Judges9:28 Ngahale monʼa Hebede anga u zuela, uixi: Abimeleke muene mukua-hi, phala etu tu akua Xikeme tu kale mu ku mu bhikila? Manhi ki monʼa Jelubaale? Kadifele kê ki Zebule? Mʼokulu ka kexile mu bhikila família ia Hamolo, ua tunga o dibhata dia Xikeme? Etu-phe mbebhuʼohi tu kala mu mu bhikila muene?" 
Judges9:29 Auá! Tamanu mundu iú a dʼivile ni eme, Abimieleke ngeji ku mu katula-ku. Ngeji ku mu ambela, kuila: Ka di bande dingi ni akuenu, muize tu bhânge." 
Judges9:30 Zebule-phe, a mu bhana kutumina o dibhata dia Xikeme kievu kiala kuzuela Ngahale monʼa Hebede, njinda i mu kuata." 
Judges9:31 Anga mu kasuekele u tuma jiphunga, kua Abimeleke bhu Aluma, uixi: Kunuze Ngahale monʼa Hebede ni jiphange jê eza mu Xikeme, ala mu kitukisa o mundu, phala eie a ku lunguluka." 
Judges9:32 Zanguka-phe mu usuku, ni eie ni makuenze oso u uala-nâ, mu a batamene mu mukáu;" 
Judges9:33 o ki kúkia, dikumbi dʼila di tunda, dibhata mu di tukumuise; o muene ni makuenze-mê ki a-nda kutunda mu kubhânga, eie phala uijiie ku a bhanga kioso ki ua tena." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleke anga u balumuka ni makuenze mê moso, enda ni usuku, a batamena dibhata dia Xikeme, a di bhanga ibuka iuana, dibhata a di ta mu kaẋi." 
Judges9:35 Mu kimene Ngahale monʼa Hebede anga u kala mu kuimajana bhu muelu ua kimbaka; Abimeleke ni makuenze-mê kia mu mono, a balumuka mu iangu." 
Judges9:36 Ngahale anga u a mona, u ambela Zebule, uixi: Ianhá athu ala mu kulumuka ku thala dia milundu. Zebule-phe u mu ambela ni ku mu ta kixanga, uixi: Ua mono ilembeketa ia milundu iedi kala athu." 
Judges9:37 Ngahale u zuela lua mukuá, uixi: Athu muene ala kutuluka bhu thala dia mulundu, kibuka kia mukuá kiala kuijiia ku njila ia Mulemba ua Azambuidi." 
Judges9:38 Bhenhobho Zebule u mu ambela, uixi: Dikanu-phe kiá dia kukala kuebhi? Ua kexi mu kuila, uixi: Abimeleke mukua-hi, phala etu tu kale mu ku mu bhikila? Ki enhá ua kexi mu a tobhesa? Nga ku diondo, tunda-ze kiá u bhânge-nâ." 
Judges9:39 Ngahale anga u tuamenena akua Xikeme mu kutunda phala kubhânga ni Abimeleke. 
Judges9:40 Abimeleke anga u mu bhesa lusolo, u mu kaia, anga ku buika athu avulu a a kuama bhenhobho, katé bhu muelu ua kimbaka." 
Judges9:41 Abimeleke anga u xala bhu Aluma; Zebule anga u kaia Ngahale ni jiphange jê, phala ka tunge dingi mu Xikeme." 
Judges9:42 Ki kúkia mundu anga a tunda dingi aia mu mukáu; Abimeleke anga a mu tangela-kiu. 
Judges9:43 Muene anga u katula mundu uê, u a uana mu ibuka itatu, u a batemena mu mukáu; mu kutala anga u mona mundu ala kutunda mu sanzala, anga u balumuka, u di zangula-nâ, u a kuama." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleke ni kibuka kié aia-nê kumoxi anga a lenga a batuila akua bhata bhu muelu ua kimbaka kiâ; ibuka iiadi ia mukuá a solomona iá ala mu mukáu, a a nemeka uê." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleke anga u lua ni dibhata kizuua kioso kienhókio, dibhata anga u di tambula, u jibha mundu uoso uala-mu; dibhata dioso anga u di sengulula, u di kuua môngua." 
Judges9:46 Kienhiki-phe akua kathondo mu mbonge ia Xikeme kia zubha ku kʼivua, ene oso a di kondela mu kinjandanjanda kia inzo ia dihamba dia Belite." 
Judges9:47 Anga bhu kala athu a ki tangela Abimeleke, exi-ze akua mbonge ia Xikeme ene oso a di kondela mu kinjandanjanda." 
Judges9:48 Abimeleke anga u banda bhu thala ia mulundu ua Zalamone, ni muene ni mundu uoso aia-nê. Abimeleke muene uambata kisesu bhu maku, anga u ximba kisasa kia muẋi mu ditutu, u u zangula, u u ta bhu kisuxi kiê; anga u ambela mundu uoso uala-nê kumoxi, uixi: Lengulukenu! Kioso ki mua ngi mono eme kubhanga, enu uenu kiene ki mu bhanga." 
Judges9:49 Ene oso anga a fikisa kia bhange muene, kala muthu u ximba muẋi uê, hé a kaiela Abimeleke, miẋi ioso anga a i lumala ku thandu dia dikungu dia kubokuena mu kinjandanjanda, anga a i ta túbhia. Mundu uoso ua akua mbonge ia kathôndo ka Xikeme anga a fuila momo, midi ia muthu i tena, ni mala ni ahatu." 
Judges9:50 Mu kutunda-bhu, Abimeleke uia bhu Tabeze, dibhata u di ta mukonda, u di lua, anga u di tambula." 
Judges9:51 Muʼaxaxi ka dibhata anga mu kala mbonge ia matala ia lebha kipena, akua bhata oso muene mua lengela ni mala ni ahatu, a di jikila momo, anga a banda ku thandu dia kipena kia mbonge ienhoio." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleke anga u bhixila bhu mbonge ienhiʼii, u kuata ku i lua, anga u zukama ku dibhitu diê phala ku di ta túbhia." 
Judges9:53 Anga bhu kala muhatu ku thandu, u laula ditadi dia kuhuhila mu mútue ua Abimeleke, hé u mu bula o katutu ka uôngo mu kaẋi." 
Judges9:54 Muene anga u ixana lusolo kibese kiê ua mu ambatela ibakatu ia ita, uixi: Fomona xibhata ié nda u ngi zubhidise, athu ka kale mu kuila exi: muhatu ua mu jibha. Kibese kiê anga u mu toma mu muẋima, u fuila bhobho." 
Judges9:55 Mala oso a akua Izalaiele kia mono kuma Abimeleke a mu jibha, a muangana kala muthu ni muthu ku bhata diê." 
Judges9:56 Kala kiki Nzambi ua bheka dingi ku thandu dia Abimeleke o kituxi kiê kia tele kua tatʼâ, mu jibha o jiphange jê makuinhi sambuadi a muthu!" 
Judges9:57 Kiene ue kimoxi o kituxi kia akua Xikeme Nzambi ua ki bheka dingi ku thandu diâ. Mázui ma a kuata ma a tele Jotamu monʼa Jelubaale. 
Judges10:1 Kutunda mu izúua ia Abimeleke, u zangalala mu kudila Izalaiele Tola monʼa Puua, monʼa Dodo, mukua muiji ua Isakale; dibhata diê ua tungile mu Xamidi, ku milundu ia Ifalaime." 
Judges10:2 Anga u fúndisa Izalaiele mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu ni itatu, anga u fua, hé a mu funda mu Xamidi." 
Judges10:3 Kutunda kua muene, kua zangalala Jaile mukua Ngiliiade, anga u tundisa Izalaiele mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni mivu iiadi." 
Judges10:4 U kala ni anʼê a mala, makuinhi atatu a muthu, a kala mu mondala makuinhi atatu a bulu, anga a kala ue ni jisanzala jâ, makuinhʼatatu a sanzala, a jʼixana Jisanzala ja Jaile katé mu kizúua kia lelu, u ji sanga mʼoxi ia Ngiliiade." 
Judges10:5 Jaile muene anga u fua, hé a mu fûnda mu Kamone." 
Judges10:6 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha mu mesu a Jihova, a kala mu bhikila Jibaale, ni Jitalote, o iteka, ni jinzambi ja Sídia, ni jinzambi ja Sidone, ni jinzambi ja Mouabhe, ni jinzambi ja anʼa Amone, ni jinzambi ja akua Fidíxia, Jihova anga a mu baluka, a mu xa, ngua-uâ ku mu bheza." 
Judges10:7 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uama ku thandu dia Izalaiele, anga u a sumbisa bhu lukuaku lua akua Fidíxia, ni bhu lukuaku lua akua Amone." 
Judges10:8 Ene anga a kala mu bhana malebhu ku anʼa Izalaiele ni ku a bhondeleka, a kala mu ku a tatesa ni ku a bhikisa, muvu uenhó. O anʼa Izalaiele ene ku sámbua dia Njolodá, mʼoxi ia Mamodi mu Ngiliiade, a a bhikisa muene mu kuinhi dia muvu ni nake." 
Judges10:9 Anʼa Amone anga a zaúka Njolodá, mu kúlua ue Juda, ni Bejamí, ni muiji ua Ifalaime. Izalaiele anga u kala mu tata kiavulu." 
Judges10:10 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a di kola kua Jihova, exi: Tua te kituxi ko kué, kuma tua ku baluka eie u Nzambi ietu, etu tua bhikila Jibaale." 
Judges10:11 Jihova anga u vutuila anʼa Izalaiele, uexi: Manhi ki eme nga mi kudila ku akua Ijitu, ni ku Mamodi, ni ku anʼa Amone, ni ku akua Fidíxia?" 
Judges10:12 Ni kia mi bhikisa akua Sidone, ni Mamaleke, ni Mamodi, kienhokio enu ki mu di kola kó-kuami anga ngi mi kudila bhu makuʼâ?" 
Judges10:13 Sumbala kiene, maji eme mua ngi baluka, muala kubhikila nzambi jengi; kala kiki-phe eme uami nguami dingi ku mi kudila." 
Judges10:14 Ndenu, ka di kodienu ku nzambi jojo ji mua solo, jene ji mi kudile mu thembu ienu ia kubhondalala." 
Judges10:15 Anʼa Izalaiele-phe anga ambela Jihova, exi: Tua te ituxi; tu bhange kioso ki ua mono kia ku uabhela; maji tua ku diondo, tu kudile ngó kizuua kia lelu." 
Judges10:16 Anga a tubhula o jinzambi ja jixi jengi muʼaxaxi kâ, a kala mu bhikila Jihova; muene anga u kala ni muẋima ua kuxinganeka o kusebuluka kua Izalaiele anga u kala ni henda iâ." 
Judges10:17 Thembu ienhoio anʼa Amone a di bhongolola a ta kibangu kiâ mu Ngiliiade. Anʼa Izalaiele anga a di bhongolola uâ, a ta kibangu kiâ mu Mixipa." 
Judges10:18 Bhenhobho ni mundu ni anʼa jingana mu Ngiliiade, a di ambela mudiâ, exi: Nanhi muene u tu kala ku pholo mu kúlua ni anʼa Amone? Muenhó muene u kala mútue ua akua bhata oso mu Ngiliiade." 
Judges11:1 Kiki-phe Jefete mukua Ngiliiade u kala kindanda, dizonda ku ita, mamʼâ-phe ua mu vuala, muhatu ua kidianzunga, tatʼâ muene Ngiliiade." 
Judges11:2 O muhatuʼa Ngiliiade muene anga u mu vualela ue dingi ana mala; anʼa muhatuʼê enhá kia zubha kukula, a kaia Jefete, a mu ambela, exi: Eie ku tena kulundula mu dibhata dia tatʼetu; kuma eie u mona ua muhatu uengi." 
Judges11:3 Jefete bhenhobho u lenga o jiphange jê, u tunga mʼoxi ia Tobe; anga bhu kala iiala ia bhumu a di banda kua Jefete, a kala mu baluka ni muene." 
Judges11:4 Kubhanga izuua, anʼa Amone eza mu kúlua ita ni Izalaiele." 
Judges11:5 Kia zubha kuiza anʼa Amone kúlua ni Izalaiele, adiakimi a Ngiliiade aia kutakana Jefete mʼoxi ia Tobe." 
Judges11:6 Anga ambela Jefete, exi: Izá, u kale u kilolo kietu, phala tu lue ni anʼa Amone." 
Judges11:7 Jefete anga u ambela adiakimi a Ngiliiade, uixi: Manhi enu ki mua ngi zembe, enu mua ngi kàia mu dibhata dia tatʼetu? Leluʼidi ki muala bhu kibhidi kiene kiua ki muiza ku ngi sota?" 
Judges11:8 Adiakimi a Ngiliiade anga ambela Jefete, exi: Kiene muene ki tua ku kanena, phala uize u tu bande, mu kúlua ni anʼa Amone; eie muene u kale u mútue ua akua bhata oso mu Ngiliiade." 
Judges11:9 Jefete anga u ambela adiakimi a Ngiliiade, uixi: Se mu ngi bheka dingi ku bhata mu kúlua ni anʼa Amone, Jihova anga u ngi bhana-u ku a tolola, manhi eme ngà kala ku pholo ia ku mi tumina kifua ngi mútue uenu?" 
Judges11:10 Adiakimi-phe a Ngiliiade anga ambela Jefete, exi: Jihova muene u kala mbangi bhuʼaxaxi ketu nʼeie; kuila kidi muene, kioso ki u zuela kiene ki tu bhanga, hé ki kiene, Nzambi a tu bete." 
Judges11:11 Bhenhobho Jefete anga uia ni adiakimi a Ngiliiade, mundu anga a mu bhanga muene mútue uâ, kifua muene sobha iâ; Jefete anga u zuela dingi bhu pholo ia Jihova, bhu Mixipa, o maka mê moso ma tele ni adiakimi." 
Judges11:12 Jefete anga u tuma jiphunga kua sobha ia anʼa Amone, uixi: Etu tualʼadi ni mvunda iahi, i ku bheka eie mu kúlua nʼeme kiki mʼoxi iami;" 
Judges11:13 Sobha ia anʼa Amone anga u vutuila jiphunga ja Jefete, uixi: Mukonda Izalaiele a ngi tambula ixi iami, kia tunda mu Ijitu, tundé ku Anone katé ku Jaboke, ki bhene ngó bhua suku, maji aii muene katé ku Njolodá; kiki-phe jixi jiji ngi bhane-ju sé mvunda." 
Judges11:14 Jefete anga u tuma jiphunga jê lua mukuá dingi kua sobha ia anʼa Amone; 
Judges11:15 anga u mu ambela, uixi: Kia zuela Jefete kienhiki: Izalaiele ka tambula ixi ia Mouabhe, ka tambula ue ixi ia anʼa Amone." 
Judges11:16 Kuma kioso-phe Izalaiele kia tundile mu Ijitu, ua bhitile mu kikangalakata bhu Musanza Ukusuka, katé bhu Kadexi." 
Judges11:17 Bhenhobho Izalaiele anga a katula jiphunga jiia kua sobha ia Edomo, exi: Tua ku diondo, u tuʼehele kubhita mʼoxi ié, sobha ia Edomo-phe ka xikina ku a evua. Kiene kimoxi u tuma kua sobha ia Mouabhe, muene-phe ue ka xikina; Izalaiele anga a xikama bhu Kadexi." 
Judges11:18 Ku izuua anga a vutukila mu kikangalakata, ixi ia Edomo a i kondoloka, ni ixi ia Mouabhe; o ixi ia Mouabhe anga a i kunga ku mbandu ia thunda, eza a ta kibangu kiâ ku sámbua dia Anone; mbambe-phe ka i bokona ia ixi ia Mouabhe, kuma Mouabhe mbambe iê Anone." 
Judges11:19 Izalaiele hé a tuma jiphunga kua Sihone, sobha ia Mamodi, u kala ni mbanza iê ia Hexebone; Izalaiele anga a mu ambela, exi; Tua ku diondo, u tuʼehele kubhita, mʼoxi ié, mu kuia bhu kididi kietu." 
Judges11:20 Sihone-phe ka xikina kuʼehela Izalaiele kubhita mu mbambe iê; inda Sihone-phe ua bhongolola mundu uê uoso, u ta kibangu mu Jahaza, u kuata kúlua ni Izalaiele." 
Judges11:21 O Jihova phe, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, u bhakula Sihone ni mundu uê uoso bhu lukuaku lua Izalaiele, anga a a nemeka; Izalaiele anga a tambula ixi iii ku Mamodi ió a kexile ene akua ʼxi iâ." 
Judges11:22 Anga a bhingana mʼoxi ioso ia Mamodi katé bhu mbambe iê, tundé ku Anone katé ku Jaboke, tundé mu kikangalakata katé ku Njolodá." 
Judges11:23 Kala kiki Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, muene ua tubhula Mamodi bhu pholo ia mundu uê ua Izalaiele, kifua ua tokala kubhingana-mu, eie?" 
Judges11:24 Eie ku bhingana ixi ioso i ku bhana nzambi ié Kemoxi ku i bhingana? Oso phe a a tubhula kuala Jihova Nzambi ietu, a a kaie bhu pholo ietu, etu tu a bhingana." 
Judges11:25 Eie manhi ua tundu Balake, monʼa Zipolo, sobha ia Mouabhe? Muene mua mu ivua kuila ua kuatele mvunda ni Izalaiele? Mba ua luile-nâ ita?" 
Judges11:26 Tundé bhuoso bhaná, bhua tunga Izalaiele mu Hexebone ni jisanzala jê, ni mu Alouele ni jisanzala jê, ni mabhata moso ku sámbua kunu dia Anone, hâma jitatu kiá ja mivu jitena; tundé kizuuʼokio ixi iii ki mu i tambuila-hi kiá okulu?" 
Judges11:27 Eme-phe ki nga te kituxi ko kué, eie muene ua ngi lokalala ku ngi lua ita; Jihova mukua kubatula milonga, a batule lelu bhuʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele, ni anʼa Amone." 
Judges11:28 Kiene kimoxi, sobha ia anʼa Amone ka xikina kuívua maka ma tumu Jefete ku mu ambela." 
Judges11:29 Nzambi ia Jihova u tula kua Jefete, muene anga u bhita mu Ngiliiade ni mu Manasa, u bhita mu Mixipa ia Ngiliiade, o kutunda bhu Mixipa ia Ngiliiade, u sambuka kua anʼa Amone." 
Judges11:30 Jefete anga u di hambelela kua Jihova, uixi; Se kidi muene u ngi bhakuila anʼa Amone bhu lukualu luami," 
Judges11:31 hinu-phe kioso ki tunda mʼonzo iami, mu ku ngi kauidila, kizuua ki ngi bhongoloka ku paze nga tundu ku anʼa Amone, ki kala kia Jihova, ngi mu satela-kiu, ki kale sata ia kuoha mu túbhia." 
Judges11:32 Kienhiki Jefete u sambuka kua anʼa Amone mu kúlua-nâ; Jihova anga ua bhakuila bhu lukuaku luê. 
Judges11:33 Muene anga u a beta ni kijibha kionéne tundé mu Alouele katé mu kuia bhu Minite, makuinhi aiadi a mabhata, katè bhu Abele-helami, kihaẋi kia dikota. Kala kiki anʼa Amone a toloka bhu pholo ia anʼa Izalaiele." 
Judges11:34 Jefete anga u vutuka bhu Mixipa bhu bhata diê; bhenhobho-ze monʼê ua muhatu u tunda mu ku mu kauidila ni isaka ni kukina; muene-phe muene monʼê ngó umoxi-elèle, ka moneka dingi mona, né ua diiala, mba ua muhatu." 
Judges11:35 Mu kuiza-ku-phe, kia zubha ku mu mona, u tandujula o izuatu iê, uixi: Aiué! monʼami, tata! ua ngi bheka mu kubhondalala, ua di bhange mukua ni ió ene ku ngi tatesa! kuma nga jikula dikanu diami kua Jihova, ki ngi tena-phe dingi kualuluka." 
Judges11:36 Muene-phe u mu ambela, uixi: Tatʼetu, se eie ua jikula dikanu dié kua Jihova, ngi bhange kioso kia tundile mu kanu dié, kabasa Jihova ua ku toluela jinguma jé, anʼa Amone enhó." 
Judges11:37 Muene anga u ambela tatʼâ, uixi: Ngi bhange ngó kiki: Ngʼehele mu mbeji jiiadi, ngiie mu nhunga mu milundu ni ku dila o undenge uami, ni eme ni ilumba ni akuetu." 
Judges11:38 Uixi-phe, Ndeie. Anga u mu ehela mu mbeji jiiadi; muene anga uia ni ilumba ni akuâ, a kala mu dila undenge uê mu milundu." 
Judges11:39 Kia zubha-phe kubhanga mbeji jiiadi, muene u vutuka kua tatʼâ, anga tatʼâ u mu bhanga kioso kia tangele mu ku di hambelela kuê; monʼê-phe uafu kejiia luua diiala. Kienhiki anga ki xalela kífua mua Izalaiele," 
Judges11:40 mukonda ana a ahatu mivu ioso aia jinga mu dila monʼa Jefete mukua Ngiliiade. Ku muvu ilumba ioso a mu dila mu izuua iuana. 
Judges12:1 Akua Ifalaime anga a di bhongolola, a zaúka ku tunda bhu Zafone, anga ambela Jefete, exi: Phala-hi eie uaii mu kúlua ni anʼa Amone, etu ua kambe ku tu ixana? Dibhata dié tu di ta mu túbhia ni eie muene." 
Judges12:2 Jefete anga u a ambela, uixi: Ni eme ni mundu uami tua kexile mu mvunda ia dikota ni anʼa Amone; enu nga mʼixana, maji ki mua ngi kudila bhu lukuaku luâ." 
Judges12:3 O ki nga mono enu mua kambe ku ngi kudila, nga te o muenhu uami bhu lukuaku luami nga sambuka mu kúlua ni anʼa Amone, Jihova-phe ua a bhakula bhu lukuaku luami; o ki tualʼiki-phe kima kiahi ki mi bhangesa ku ngi sanga kiki ni jimvunda?" 
Judges12:4 Jefete anga u bhongolola mala oso a akua Ngiliiade anga a beta Ifalaíme, mukonda a âmbela, exi: Enu mu akua Ngiliiade mua lenge mu Ifalaíme, mu jinzuangiza muʼaxaxi ka Ifalaime ni Manasa." 
Judges12:5 Akua Ngiliiade anga a kuata matabhu oso a kuzaúka ni kuvuua, a Njolodá, mu batuila akua Ifalaime a mesena kulengela ko kuâ. Bhenhobho akua Ifalaime ala kulenga, ela a tula bhu tabhu, uoso uedi: Ngandala ngi zauka; akua Ngiliiade a mu ibhula hanji, exi: U mukua Ifalaime?" 
Judges12:6 Hé uedi: Kana, a mu ambela dingi exi: Tumbula hanji Xibolete; muene-phe uila: Sibolete, mukonda ene mu tumbula kiki ka tena kubatulula kiambote; bhenhobho-phe a mu kuata, a mu jibhila bhu tabhu dia Njolodá. Thembu ienhoio anga ku buika makuinhi auana a midi ia akua Ifalaime, ni midi jiiadi." 
Judges12:7 Jefete anga u fundisa Izalaiele mu mivu isamanu. Jefete mukua Ngiliiade anga a fua, a mu fûnda ku bhata diâ mu sanzala ia tokala ku madiembu ma Ngiliiade." 
Judges12:8 Kutunda mu izuua ia Jefete, Ibizani mukua Beleme u kala mu fúdisa Izalaiele." 
Judges12:9 Muene u kala ni makuinhi atatu a mona, a mala; anga u bhana makuinhi atatu a mona, a ahatu mu kusakana ku mabhata mengi, o ku mabhata mengi u bhenga-ku ue makuinhi atatu a mona, a ahatu phala kusakana ni anʼê a mala. Anga u fundisa Izalaiele mu sambuadi dia mivu." 
Judges12:10 Ibizani anga u fua, a mu fûnda mu Beleme." 
Judges12:11 Kutunda mu thembu ia muene, Elone mukua muiji ua Nzebulone u kala mu fundisa Izalaiele. Muene anga u fundisa Izalaiele mu kuinhi dia muvu." 
Judges12:12 Elone mukua muiji ua Nzebulone anga u fua, a mu fûnda mu Haijalone, mʼoxi ia Nzebulone." 
Judges12:13 Kutunda mu thembu ia muene, Abidoni monʼa Hilele, mukua bhata bhu Pilatone, u kala mu fundisa Izalaiele." 
Judges12:14 Muene u kala ni makuinhi auana a mona, a mala; ni makuinhi atatu a mulaula a mala; enhá anga a kala mu sambela makuinhi sambuadi a bulu. Muene anga u fundisa Izalaiele mu nake dia muvu." 
Judges12:15 Abidoni monʼa Hilele, mukua bhata bhu Pilatone, anga u fua, a mu fûnda bhu Pilatone, mʼoxi ia Ifalaime, ku mulundu ua Amaleke." 
Judges13:1 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a tona dingi kubhanga kiaiibha ku mesu a Jihova; Jihova anga u a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Fidíxia mu makuinhi auana a muvu. 
Judges13:2 Hé bhu kala muthu, mukua bhata dia Zola, mukua muiji ua Dani, dijina diê Manoua, muhatuʼê mbaku, ka vuala." 
Judges13:3 Anju ia Jihova anga i tukulukila o muhatu muenhú, u mu ambela, uixi: Talesa, eie uala u mbaku, ua kambe kuvuala; kiki-phe ua-nda kuimita, hinu u vuala monʼa diiala." 
Judges13:4 Kienhiki-phe di lange, nga ku diondo, kana kúnua vinhu, mba kúnua kuoso-kuoso ku kodiuisa, ku die ue kima kiabolo." 
Judges13:5 Mukonda-ze, eie ua-nda kuimita, hinu u vuala monʼa diiala, mona-phe ua bhingi ki ku mu tula phoko ia bhutu ku mútue uê, mbata muene ua-ndu kala Nazilé ia Nzambi, a mu lumbila Nzambi tunde mu divumu dia mamʼâ; muene hinu ua kà kula Izalaiele bhu lukuaku lua akua Fidíxia." 
Judges13:6 Muhatu anga uiza u tangela muadi uê, uixi: Kua ngi sange muthu ua Nzambi, o pholo iê iila kala pholo ia anju ia Nzambi; ku mu tala uoma u kuata; ki nga mu ibhula kuoso kua tundu, dijina diê ue ka ngi tangela-diu." 
Judges13:7 Muenhú ua ngi tangela-phe, uixi: Talesa eie ua-nda kuimita, hinu u vuala monʼa diiala; kienhiki-phe ku nue vinhu, mba kúnua kuoso-kuoso ku kodiuisa, ku die ue kima kiabolo; kuma mona ió u kala Nazilé a mu lumbila Nzambi tunde mu divumu dia mamʼâ katé bhu kizuua kia ufuilu uê." 
Judges13:8 Bhenhobho Manoua usamba u dionda Jihova, uixi: Aii! Ngana, tata! nga ku diondo, muthu ua Nzambi ió uoso ua mu katuile, eze dingi bhu tuala, a tu longese kioso ki tu sasa o mona uoso hinu tu mu vuala." 
Judges13:9 Nzambi anga u ívua dízui dia Manoua, anju ia Nzambi anga i sanga dingi muhatu uala ku mábhia; muadi uê Manoua-phe kala-nê." 
Judges13:10 Muhatu anga u bhanga lusolo, uia ni kunzunzuna u lengela kua muadi uê, uixi: Muthu-ze ua ngi tukulukilile kizuʼokio, lelu ueza dingi." 
Judges13:11 Manoua anga u balumuka, u kaiela mukajiʼê, u sanga muthu iú, u mu ambela, uixi: Eie muene u muthu ua zuelesa muhatu iú? Uixi: Eme muene." 
Judges13:12 Kuala Manoua: Tamano ki bhita muene kioso ki ua zuela; tu bhane-phe kijila kioso ki tu sasa o mona, ni ioso muene ia kà bhanga." 
Judges13:13 Anju ia Jihova anga i ambela Manoua, uixi: Muhatu aluke ngó kioso ki nga mu ambela." 
Judges13:14 Ka die kima ki tunda ku muvide, ka nue vinhu, mba kúnua kuoso-kuoso ku kodiuisa, ka die ue kima kiabolo; ioso i nga mu tendelela, a i aluke muene." 
Judges13:15 Bhenhobho Manoua anga u ambela anju ia Jihova, uixi: Nga ku diondo, tu kinge hanji tu ku telekele kahombo." 
Judges13:16 Anju ia Jihova anga i ambela Manoua, ixi: Né ua ngi kingisa ki ngi di kúdia kué ku u ngi bhana; se uedi-phe u bhana sata ia kuoha, kale u i satela Jihova. Kuma Manoua ka kʼijiia kuila anju ia Jihova." 
Judges13:17 Manoua anga u ambela anju ia Jihova, uixi: Dijina dié eie nanhi, mbé kizuua kioso ki bhita o kizuelu kié, tu ku bhange ujitu?" 
Judges13:18 Kuala anju ia Jihova, u ngʼibhuila-hi dijina diami, oko dijina di kôla?" 
Judges13:19 Kala kiki Manoua u kuata kahombo, ni fuba ue ia tokala ku sata, iene ioso anga u i satela Jihova ku thandu dia ditadi; bhenhobho anga bhu bhita madiuanu, ni Manoua ni muhatuʼê a ki mona mesu." 
Judges13:20 Kuma mulengu ki ua kuata kulekujuka ku thandu dia kalatódio, u kala mu banda bhulu, ni anju ia Jihova ua bandela kumoxi mu mulengu ua túbhia u tunda ku kalatódio; ni Manoua ni muhatuʼê a ki mona mesu; anga a di bhala, a ta jipholo mu mavu." 
Judges13:21 Anju ia Jihova phe ki i tukulukila dingi Manoua mba muhatuʼê. Manoua anga u kʼijiia kuma anju ia Jihova. 
Judges13:22 Manoua anga u ambela mukajiʼê, uixi: Tua-ndu fua, mukonda Nzambi tua mu mono mesu." 
Judges13:23 Mukajiʼê-phe u mu ambela, uixi: Se Jihova uandalele ku tu jibha, keji kuxikana sata i tua mu satela ia kibhaku ni fuba, keji ku tu idikiza ima ioso iii, keji ku tu ambela maka kala iá." 
Judges13:24 Muhatu iú anga u vuala monʼê ua diiala, u mu luka dijina dia Sansau; mona anga u kula, Jihova u mu bhana kuzediua." 
Judges13:25 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga i mateka ku mu vunza moxi ku izuua ni izuua, bhu Kibangu kia Dani, bhuʼaxaxi ka Zola ni Xitaole." 
Judges14:1 Sansau anga u kulumuka ku Timinate; ku Timinate-phe anga u mona-ku muhatu ua tokala ku mbutu ia akua Fidíxia. 
Judges14:2 O kia zubha kutunda-ku, u ambela tatʼâ ni mamʼâ, uixi: Nga mono muhatu ku Timinate, ua tokala ku mbutu ia akua Fidíxia; ngi bhengedienu-nê a kale muhatuʼami." 
Judges14:3 Tatʼâ-phe u mu vutuila, ni mamʼâ, exi: Kifua ku akua muiji uenu kunu, mba ku mbutu ietu ioso, kua kambe muhatu, kuila uia mu kubhenga muhatu ku akua Fidíxia, o muiji ua akua mabolo? Sansau-phe u ambela tatʼâ, uixi: Ngi bhengele-nê, kuma muene ua ngi uabhela." 
Judges14:4 Tatʼâ-phe ni mamʼâ ka kʼijiia kuila kia tundu kua Jihova; mukonda Sansau uala kusota bhuoso bhua kuatela mvunda ni akua Fidíxia. Mbata thembu ienhoio akua Fidíxia ene ala mu tumina Izalaiele. 
Judges14:5 Ku izúua Sansau u kulumuka ku Timinate, ni tatʼâ ni mamʼâ, anga u tula bhu mivide ia Timinate; kiedi-phe u bhixila bhenhobho u takana ni munzangala ua hoji, i kala mu ku mu zumina." 
Judges14:6 Nzumbi ia Jihova anga iza ni nguzu kua Sansau, u di takuila ku hoje anga u i kuata, u i sauna kala monʼa hombo a mu kuata; o bhu maku-phe muene ka kuata kima, uala ngó maku a hatu. O kia bhange-phe kiki, ka ki tangela ue tatʼâ mba mamʼâ." 
Judges14:7 Kia zubha-phe kukulumuka, u ta maka ni muhatu ua mu uabhela muene." 
Judges14:8 Ku izúua-phe, mu kuvutukisa phala kubhenga kiá muhatu, u bhambuka mu tala bhua xile o kisasu kia hoji; hé u sanga kiunda kia jinhuki ja tungu mu kisasu kia hoje, muala kiá uiki." 
Judges14:9 Anga u katula-mu uiki bhu makuʼê anga uia ni kúdia mu njila muala kuila; u tula ue bhuala tatʼâ ni mamʼâ, u a bhana-ku, ene ue a dia; ka a tangela-phe kuila uiki ua u katula mu kisasu kia hoji." 
Judges14:10 Tatʼâ kia zubha ku kulumuka kuala muhatu, Sansau-phe anga u bhangela-bhu fesa, kuma kiene kiene mu bhanga o minzangala ioso ia mala." 
Judges14:11 O kia mu mono ua mu kuiza, a mu bhana makuinhi atatu a munzangala nʼakuá kukala-nê kumoxi." 
Judges14:12 Sansau anga ua ambela, uixi: Iza ngi mi tele nongonongo iami; se mu tena ku ngi lombuelela-iu mu sambuadi dia izuua ia fesa, hé mu i fokola muene kiambote, eme ngi mi bhana makuinhi atatu a malasola a linhu, ni makuinhi atatu a izuatu ia kukemba;" 
Judges14:13 o ki kala-phe mua i lémbua ku ngi lombuelela-iu, enu mu ngi bhana makuinhi atatu a malasola a linhu, ni makuinhi atatu a izuatu ia kukemba. Kuala ene; Nongojoka, tu kuívue." 
Judges14:14 Muene anga u a ambela, uixi; Moxi dia mukua kúdia, mua tundu kudia; o moxi dia mukua nguzu, mua tundu kutouala. Ene-phe a bhanga izuua itatu, nongonongo a lémbua ku i lombolola." 
Judges14:15 Kutula mu kizúua kia mukuá, ambela muhatuʼa Sansau, exi: Muadi uê mu bhombe a ku lomboluele nongonongo iê; o ki u kamba ku ki bhanga, ni eie muene ni dibhata dioso dia tatʼenu, tu di ta mu túbhia. Kifua kiene manhi ki mua tu ixanena-bhu, phala ku tu tambula o izuatu ietu, kuambe?" 
Judges14:16 Muhatuʼa Sansau anga u kala mu kudila bhu pholo iê, uixi: Ua ngi zembe, ku ngi zolo kana. Kuma nzangi bhu bhata dietu ua a tela nongonongo, eme-phe kua ngi tangela-iu luua. Muene-phe u ambela muhatuʼê, uixi: Ni tatʼetu ni mamʼetu ki nga a tangela, kifua ngi ku tangela—iu eie?" 
Judges14:17 Muhatu-phe u jijila kudila bhu pholo ié mu sambuadi dia izuua ioso ia ubhanga (fesa); kutula-phe kizuua kia kasambuadi muene u mu tangela, mukonda ua mu tatesa kiavulu; muhatu-phe uia, nongonongo ié u i tangela nzangi ia akua bhata diê." 
Judges14:18 Ene-phe akua bhata eza kua Sansau kizúua kia kasambuadi, kioso dikumbi kiluua di tula, exi: Mu kutouala ihi ki tunda uiki? Mu nguzu ihi ki tunda o hoji? Muene-phe u a vutuila, uixi: Hé ki seseme iami ia ngombe ia mi sungila ditemu, hinu ki mua fokola nongonongo iami." 
Judges14:19 Nzumbi ia Jihova bhenhobho iza ni nguzu kua Sansau, u kulumuka ku Axikilone, u jibha-ku makuinhi atatu a mala, u a tambula izuatu iâ anga u bhana makuinhi atatu a izuatu kua iá oso a lombolola o nongonongo iê. Njinda anga i mu kuata, u banda ku bhata dia tatʼâ." 
Judges14:20 Muhatu a Sansau-phe a mu bhana diiala dia mukuá ua kexile kuphatele kuê, ua tokala mu imbalambi." 
Judges15:1 Anga ki bhita kuila ku izuua-phe, bhu makumbi a kumuna tiliku, Sansau uia kukunda muhatuʼê ua mu ambatela kakisutu kahombo, uixi: Ngi bokona kua muhatuʼami katé mʼonzo ia hama. Tatʼâ-phe ka mu ehela kubokona. Tatʼâ anga u mu ambela, uixi:" 
Judges15:2 Eme nga fika muene kuma eie ua mu zembela-ku kiá; kiene ki nga mu bhela kuphatele kué; maji muene uala ni ndengʼiê-phe uala kota mu kuuabha. Tambula-ze kiá o ndenge u sakane-nê bhu kididi kia dikota. 
Judges15:3 Sansau anga u a ambela, uixi: Lelu kiá ngi lunga ku mulonga uami ni akua Fidíxia, se ngʼa bhanga kima kia kuiibha." 
Judges15:4 Sansau anga uia, u kuata hâma jitatu ja mikenge u i kuikila mu kiiadi kiiadi, ia di bhana mikila, hé u ta sama ia túbhia bhu kaẋi ka mikila." 
Judges15:5 O kia zubha kubambula jisama, u i ehela mu tiliku ia akua Fidíxia, iene ioso anga i bhia, ni iii ia kutu ita ia lunjika ia munu kiá, ni iii kilúua a i muna, ni mivide ni midiva ue ia tambula túbhia." 
Judges15:6 Akua Fidíxia anga a zuela, exi: Nanhi muene ua bhange kiki? Exi-phe: Sansau holomeʼa mukua Timinate, muene ua bhange kiki, mukonda ua mu tambula muhatuʼê, iú ua mu bhana kamba diê. Akua Fidíxia anga a banda, muhatu muene a mu oha mu túbhia ni tatʼâ." 
Judges15:7 Sansau anga u a ambela, uixi: Se kiene ki mua bhangʼiki, eme uami ngi mi vutuila muene phonzo lua mukuá, mvunda ki ngi i tula luua, katé ku muẋima kua ngi zele." 
Judges15:8 Anga u a kuama kiaiibha, u a bhesa lusolo, u jibha-ku mundu ua vulu bhenhobho amoxi-mu ku a bukujula inama; kia zubha ku ki bhanga, u kulumuka hé u kala mu dibanda bhu ndánji ia Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Akua Fidíxia anga a banda, a ta kibangu mua Juda phala ku mu lua, hé a di zala katé mu Leki." 
Judges15:10 Akua Juda-phe anga a ebhula, exi: Ihi kia mi bheka mu ku tu sota kiki? Kuala ene: Kia tu bheka o kukuta Sansau, phala ni tu mu bhange kioso muene kia tu bhange etu." 
Judges15:11 Bhenhobho midi jitatu ja akua Juda a kulumuka ku dibanda bhu ndànji ia Etamu, ambela Sansau, exi: Kua kʼijiia kuma akua Fidíxia ene jingana jetu a mu tu tumina? Eie kiki ua tu bhange kiebhi? Muene uixi: Kioso kia ngi bhange ene, eme ue kiene ki nga a bhange ene." 
Judges15:12 Kuala ene: Tueza-phe ku ku kuta, phala tu ku bhakule ku akua Fidíxia. Sansau uixi: Ngi lokedienu kuila enu-enu ki mua-nda ku ngi jibha." 
Judges15:13 Ene hé a mu ambela, exi: Kana; etu tu ku kuta ngó kiakolo, hé tu ku bhakula bhu lukuaku luâ; etu-phe ki tu ku jibha, kana. Anga a mu kuta ni mikolo iiadi ia ubhe, a tunda-nê bhu ndánji, a banda hé aia-nê." 
Judges15:14 O kia tuia-nê mu Leki, akua Fídixia a solomoka mu ku mu kauidila, hé a dikola ni kusanguluka kia zubha ku mu mona. Maji o Nzumbi ia Jihova anga iza ni nguzu kua Sansau, o mikolo ia mu kala mu maku i di bhanga kala jingoji ja linhu ja jokota mu túbhia, iene ioso ia mu zuluka mu maku." 
Judges15:15 Anga u mona-bhu kifuba kia lunga nzuánzua lua bulu, u sunununa lukuaku hé u ki kuata, anga u jibha na-kiu midi ia muthu." 
Judges15:16 Sansau anga u zuela, uixi: Lunganzuánzua lua bulu lua bhange jilumu-jilumu, Lunganzuánzua lua bulu nga nemeka na-iu midi ia muthu." 
Judges15:17 Kia zubha kuzuela kienhiki, kifuba kia kuata bhu lukuaku u ki texi; kididi kienhiki anga ki xala ni dijina dia Lamate-leki." 
Judges15:18 Bhenhobho anga u kala ni dinhota dia vulu, hé u dikola kua Jihova, uixi: Ku lukuaku lua mubhikʼé, Eie Ngana kuene ku ua bhela o kubhuluka kua dikota kuosʼuku; kiki-phe ngi fua kiá ku dinhota, o akua-inhunga iá lelu nʼa ngi kuata dingi?" 
Judges15:19 Nzambi anga u bhangesa kuila o dikungu dia kexi mu Leki muenhomo, di ditandula anga mu fuáfua menha; o muene kia zubha kúnua, muenhu uê ueza dingi bhu kididi, uala dingi ni nguzu. Mukonda dia kiki, exana-bhu, exi: Ene-hakole, ndunga iê iii hanji bhobho mu Leki katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Judges15:20 Sansau anga u fundisa Izalaiele mu izúua ia akua Fidíxia, mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu." 
Judges16:1 Sansau anga uia ku Ngaza, u mona-ku muhatu kuenhoko ua kidianzunga, u bokona muoso muala." 
Judges16:2 Hundu iê anga i di muangena mu mbonge ioso. Akua Ngaza anga a kʼivua, exi: Sansau ueza kunu. Anga a mu kondela, a mu batamena bhu muelu ua kimbaka usuku uoso; a di xibha usuku uoso, exi: Ki kúkia tu mu kuata, tu mu jibha." 
Judges16:3 Sansau anga u zeka katé mu kaẋi ka usuku, mu kaẋi ka usuku-phe u balumuka, u kuata ku mabhitu a kimbaka, u a tukula ni jingunji jê, ni mulangaji kiá kumoxi, u a ta bhu isuxi iê, u a bheka bhu thala ia mulundu ua lulama ni Hebolone." 
Judges16:4 Kia zubha o kubhanga kiki, u zola dingi muhatu mu honga ia Soleke, dijina diê Dalila." 
Judges16:5 Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia anga jiza ku muhatu muenhú, exi: Mu bhombe katé ki u kʼijiia kioso kia mu bhana o nguzu iê iavulu, mba tu mu bhanga kiebhi mu ku mu tolola, ni ku mu kuta phala ku mu talesa hanji hadi; hé u ki bhanga, tu ku bhana kala muthu midi ni hama ia itadi ia phalata." 
Judges16:6 Dalila anga u ambela Sansau, uixi: Ngi tangele hanji, nga ku diondo, kioso kia ku bhana o nguzu ié iavulu kiki, mba a ku kuta nʼihi nʼa tena ku ku talesa hadi?" 
Judges16:7 Sansau anga u mu ambela, uixi: Se a ngi kuta ni sambuadi dia ngoji ja jimbamba ja uisu, kilúua ji kukuta, ngi bhuila muene nguzu i ngi bhua, hé ngi kala ngó muene kala kiala akuetu oso." 
Judges16:8 Bhenhobho jisobha ja akua Fidíxia a mu bhekela sambuadi dia ngoji ja jimbamba ja uisu kiluua ji kukuta, muene anga u mu kuta na-ju." 
Judges16:9 Kienhokio-phe sai athu a suama mu xilu dia muhatu muenhú, ala mu kinga kioso kia-nda kubhita. Muhatu anga u mu ambela, uixi: Akua Fidíxia a ku tula, Sansau! Muene anga u batula jingoji kala dínha ia kidinhaji ia tula ku túbhia. Kala kiki nguzu iê ka ijiia lúua kuoso ku iala." 
Judges16:10 Dalila anga u ambela Sansau, uixi: Ua ngi bhange kasekelu, ua ngi tangela makutu; kiki-phe ngi tangele muene, nga ku diondo, kioso kia tena ku ku kuta na-kiu." 
Judges16:11 Muene-phe u mu ambela, uixi: Se a ngi kuta muene kiambote ni mikolo ia ubhe, kilúua a bhanga na-iu kikalakalu kioso-kioso, ngi bhuila-phe kiá, nguzu i ngi bhua ngi kala ngó kala kiala akuetu oso." 
Judges16:12 Kienhiki Dalila u katula mikolo ia ubhe, hé u mu kuta na-iu, anga u dikola u mu ambela, uixi: Akua Fidíxia a ku tula, Sansau! Athu-phe iá mu xilu, ala mu kinga kioso kia-nda kubhita. Muene-phe u batula mikolo mu maku mê kala jidínha." 
Judges16:13 Dalila anga u ambela Sansau, uixi: Tunde bhuoso bhanhá ni ku ngi bhanga kasekelu ua mu ngi tangela makutu; ngi tangele-phe kiá kioso kia tena ku ku kuta-na-kiu. Muene u mu ambela, uixi: Kikale o sambuadi dia jingindu dia ndemba iami ku mútue u ji lekela kumoxi ni jingoji ja thanga ku mulongo, anga u ji kuikila ku phapha i ua kubu ii ia kolo kiambote bhoxi." 
Judges16:14 Muhatu anga u ki bhanga muene, jindemba u ji bhila-bhila mu jingoji ja mulongo u ji kolesa ni phapha, u mu ambela u dikola, uixi: Akua Fidíxia a ku tula, Sansau! Muene anga u thathumuka ku kilu, ni mulongo ni thanga u i vuzila kumoxi." 
Judges16:15 Muhatu anga u mu ambela, uixi: Uala ku ngʼila kiebhi kuma ua ngi zolo, maji o muẋima ué ki uala kumoxi nʼeme? Ua ngi bhange kiá kasekelu lutatu luosʼulu, kua ngi tangela kima kioso kia mu ku bhana o nguzu ié iavulu kiki." 
Judges16:16 Ku izuúua-phe, mukonda ua mu bhinjika kiavulu ni kuzuela izuua ioso, ua mu jijidika kinéne, Sasangu kia mu kumu kiavulu katé u sola kúfua." 
Judges16:17 Anga u mu tangela ni muẋima uê uoso, uixi: Kilúua mu ngi bhita phoko ia bhutu mu mútue uami, kuma ngi Nazilé ia ngene ia Nzambi, a ngi lumbila Nzambi tunde mu divumu dia mamʼetu. Se kuila a ngi bhuta, nguzu i ngi bhua, ngi bhuila kala kiala akuetu oso." 
Judges16:18 Dalila kia mono kuma ua mu tangela ni muẋima uê uoso, u tuma kuixana jisobha ja akua Fidíxia, uixi: Bandenu kunu lumoxiʼulu kiá ngó, kuma ua ngi tangela kiá ni muẋima uê uoso. Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia-phe anga ji banda kua muene, ni kitadi eza na-kiu bhu maku." 
Judges16:19 Dalila anga u mu isa ku kilu, ni ku mu njunjana ni ku mu ta ifunhe, ua bhetuila ku jiphuna jê. Anga u ixana muthu u mu bhuta o sambuadi dia jingindu ja jindemba jê ja kexi na-ju mu mútue; nguzu-phe anga i mu sosoloka ua tobhoʼê kiá, kuma katé ni Dalila muene kia mu teza ngó ua mu lende kiá." 
Judges16:20 Muhatu anga u dikola u mu ambela, uixi: Akua Fidíxia a ku tula, Sansau! Muene anga u thathumuka ku kilu, uixi: Ngi tunda, kala ki ngene kubhanga kiá, ngi di kukumuna mu kudibhangela. Mukonda muene ka kʼijidile kuila Jihova ua mu ehelela kiá," 
Judges16:21 Akua Fidíxia anga a mu kuata, a mu tufula mesu, a mu bheka ku Ngaza, a mu kuika ni jingidinhá ja ngondo; u kala mu nhungisa matadi a kuzukila fuba mu kaleia." 
Judges16:22 O jindemba jê-phe ja mu bhutu mu mútue, ja kuata dingi o kukula." 
Judges16:23 Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia-phe anga ji bhongoloka mu bhana sata ia dikota kua Dangoni nzambi iâ, ni kubhanga fesa; kuma ambe, exi: Nzambi ietu ua tu bhakuila nguma ietu Sasangu bhu lukuaku luetu." 
Judges16:24 Mundu ue kia zubha ku mu mona, a ximana nzambi iâ, exi: Nzambi ietu ua bhakula bhu lukuaku luetu ngumʼoio ua kexi mu kubuikisa ixi ietu, ua jibha jinga athu avulu ku mundu uetu." 
Judges16:25 Mu kubhanga kiki, kia a bhekela kusanguluka kua vulu mu muẋima, exi: Sasangu muene eze tu mu mone hanji kiaia ni kutonoka phala a tu zubhe ngunzu. Anga a takana Sasangu mu kaleia, u kala mu tonoka bhu pholo iâ. Hé a mu imanesa bhu kaẋi ka jiphiladi." 
Judges16:26 Sasangu anga u ambela kaiala ka mu kuata mu lukuaku, uixi: Ngʼidikize jiphiladi ja fikidila inzu ioso, ngi xamenene-ku hanji." 
Judges16:27 Inzu-phe bhenhobho iezala athu ni mala ni ahatu; ni jisobha joso ja akua Fidíxia ji bhobho; athu ngó ala ku thandu dia ʼnzu a tena midi jitatu ja muthu, ni mala ni ahatu, ila mu tala kioso kiala kutonoka Sasangu." 
Judges16:28 Sasangu anga u dikola kua Jihova, uixi: Ngana iami, Jihova, tata! ngi xinganeke, nga ku diondo, u ngi bhane dingi nguzu mu lumoxi ngohʼulu, Nzambi iami, phala akua Fidíxia ngʼa futise diesu dimoxi ngó ku mesu ami aiadi." 
Judges16:29 Sasangu anga u kuata philadi jiiadi ja kaẋi, jene ja fikidila inzu ioso, anga u xamenena-ku, iii ua i kuata ni lukuaku lua kúdia, o iii ua i kuata ni lukuaku lua kiasu." 
Judges16:30 Sasangu anga u amba, uixi: Ngi fuile kiá kumoxi ni akua Fidíxia. Kia zubha kuzuela kiki inzu u i nhikisa ni nguzu ioso katé ia di bula-bula imisula, inzu anga i lundumuka, ni jisobha ni mundu uoso ala-mu ia a xina. Kala kiki athu a jibha mu ufuilu uê kota mu kuvula, a a jibha jinga ku muenhu uê ndenge." 
Judges16:31 O ki kia zubha kubhita, jiphange jê ni dibhata dioso dia tatʼâ a kulumuka, a mu zangula, a banda-nê, hé a mu fûnda bhuʼaxaxi ka Zola ni Xitaoli, mu jimbila ja tatʼâ Manoua. Muene-phe ua fundisa izalaiele mu makuinhi aiadi a muvu." 
Judges17:1 Kua kexile muthu, mukua bhata ku milundu ia Ifalaime, dijina diê Mika." 
Judges17:2 Muene anga u ambela mamʼâ, uixi: Kitadi kié kia ku nhanene, o midi ia xikulu ia itadi ia phalata ni hâma, kia ku bhangesele kuila mu mátui mami muene, u mu bhubhidila uoso ua ki nhana, talesa, eme ngala na-kiu, eme muene nga ki nhana. Mamʼâ anga u mu ambela, uixi: Jihova a ku zediuise monʼami." 
Judges17:3 Mona anga u vutula kitadi kua mamʼâ, midi ia xikulu ia itadi ia phalata ni hâma; mamʼâ-phe anga u amba, uixi: Phalata ienhiʼii nga i lumbila Jihova, i tunda kiá bhu lukuaku luamu mu dijina dia monʼami kuma muene nga mu bhela-iu mu kuiudika kiteka kiósonge mba kióuiẋike; kala kiki kitadi kiki ngi ku bhana-kiu dingi." 
Judges17:4 Mona kia zubha kuvutula itadi ia phalata, u i bhana mesene ia kuzunza, muene anga u iudika na-iu kiteka kia kuseta kióuiẋike. Kiteka anga a ki bhaka mʼonzo ia Mika." 
Judges17:5 Diiala dienhidi, Mika, anga u kala ni inzu iê ia jinzambi; u iudika ni efodi ni jitelafini, u xingidisa monʼê umoxi ua diiala mu ku kala nganga iê." 
Judges17:6 Mu izúua ienhoio ki muala sobha mua Izalaiele; kala muthu-phe u bhanga kioso kia mu uabhela, kia mu iukila mu mesu mê." 
Judges17:7 Anga ku kala munzangala ua diiala u tunda mu Beleme ia Juda, mukua muiji ua Juda maji u kala levita, ueza mu nakina bhu bhata bhenhabha." 
Judges17:8 Kuma muthu iú ua tundile kokuâ, ku Beleme ia Juda, mu nakina kuoso kua-nda kumona kididi kiambote; anga u bhixila mu milundu ia Ifalaime, u tula bhu bhata dia Mika, uala kutunda mu kuenda mu uenji uê." 
Judges17:9 Mika anga u mu kunda, uixi: Ua tundu kuebhi? Muene anga u vutula, uixi: Ngi levita, nga tundu mu Beleme ia Juda, ngala kuia mu nhunga kuoso ku ngi mona kididi kiambote." 
Judges17:10 Mika-phe anga u mu ambela, uixi: Tunga kiá bhabha ni eme kumoxi, u ngi kale u tata, u nganga iami, eme ngi ku bhane kuinhi dia xikulu ia itadi ia phalata ku muvu, ni kuzuata, ni kúdia kuasoko. Kala kiki levita anga u bokona mʼonzo ia Mika." 
Judges17:11 Levita anga ki mu uabhela kutunga ni muthu iú, o munzangala muenhú anga u kala mukuâ ni monʼê." 
Judges17:12 Mika anga u xingidisa levita muenhú, munzangala iú anga u kala nganga iê, anga u xikama mu dibhata dia Mika." 
Judges17:13 Mika anga u amba, uixi: Kiki nga kʼijiia kiá kuma Jihova ua-nda ku ngi bhanga mbote, kuma ngala ni levita u kala nganga iami." 
Judges18:1 Mu izuua muenhomo ki muala sobha mua Izalaiele; mu izuua muenhomo-phe ue muiji ua akua Dani a kala mu sota ixi ia undundu uâ ia kutungila; kuma katé kizuua kienhokio undundu uâ ka u tambuile luua mu miiji ia Izalaiele. 
Judges18:2 Anʼa Dani anga a katula ku jindandu jâ, malʼatanu a a nona mu kaẋi ka mundu, mazonda ma kubhânga, a a katula bhu Zola ni bhu Xitaoli, a a tuma kulonda ixi ni kusota-bhu kididi kia ku tunga; anga a ambela, exi: Ndenu ka londienu ixi ioso. Enhá anga a bhixila bhu bhata dia Mika, mu milundu ia Ifalaimi, a zekela-bhu usuku." 
Judges18:3 Kioso kiala bhu inzu ia Mika, evua dízui dia munzangala, o levita, kuma a muʼijiia; anga a mu kana, a mu ibhula, exi: Nanhi ua ku bheka kunu? Uala kubhanga-hi bhu bhata bhabha? O bhene eie uala-bhu ni kima kiahi?" 
Judges18:4 Muene anga u a ambela, uixi: Kiki ni kiki kia ngi bhange Mika, mukonda uala ku ngi futa, eme ngala ngi nganga iê." 
Judges18:5 Ene anga a mu bhomba, exi: Tu zambuile hanji kua Nzambi, tua ku diondo, phala tu ijiie se njila i tuala kuia mba i kala ia kubhanduluka." 
Judges18:6 Nganga anga u a ambela, uixi: Endenu kiambote; njila ioso i muala kuila iala bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
Judges18:7 Kia zubha kubhanga kiki, malʼatanu enhá a katuka, a bhixila mu Laixi, a sanga athu a tungu-mu kala ni hele ia kima, ukalelu uâ uene umoxi ni akua Sidone, a dixibhʼâ, ki bhuala kima kia a zukutisa. Mʼoxi iâ ki muala muthu u kuata kutumina, mba u a kuatesa jisonhi ja kima kioso-kioso mu ixi momo; o akua Sidónia ue a di sanduka-nâ a a kalela dikanga; athu engi ka di tambulula-nâ mu ima ioso-ioso." 
Judges18:8 Mala iá anga a vutuka ku akuâ, o jiphange jâ a xala bhu Zola ni bhu Xitaoli; akuá anga a ebhula, exi; Kuambe, o ku muele muedi kiebhi?" 
Judges18:9 Kuala ene: Balumukenu, tuienu ku a solomona; kuku ku tuele, o ixi tua i sange, iauabha muene; kifuá mu xikamenunu kunu, kuambe? Kana kukala ni usudi ua kuia kutambula ixi ioio, ni ku i bhingana." 
Judges18:10 O ki muia, mua kà sanga athu kala ni hele ia kima, ixi iene ia kulu muene, Nzambi-phe ua mi bhana-iu enu ku i vua, ixi ia bhingi ima iene ioso iii momo, kana kima kia kambe-mu." 
Judges18:11 Kienhokio anga kukatuka athu ku muiji ua akua Dani, a tundu bhu Zola ni bhu Xitaoli, hâma jisamanu ja mala, a maneka ibhakatu ia ita." 
Judges18:12 Mu kubanda anga a ta kibangu kiâ bhu Kidiate-jadimi, mu Juda; mukonda dia kiki kididi kiókio a kʼixana Kibangu kia Dani, katé mu kizúua kia lelu; ʼkí kuema dia Kidiate-Jadimi." 
Judges18:13 Mu kutunda bhobho a bhita mu milundu ia Ifalaimi, a tula bhu bhata dia Mika." 
Judges18:14 Bhenhobho malʼatanu a diangele kuia kulónda ixi ia Laixi, ambela akuâ, exi: Mua kʼijiia kuma mu jinzu jojo muala efodi, muala telafini, muala ue ni kiteka kia iudika mesene ia kuzunza; o ki tualʼiki xinganekenu kioso ki mua tokala kubhanga." 
Judges18:15 Anga a bhambuka, a bhixila bhu kanga dia munzangala, o levita, bhene bhu bhata dia Mika, anga a mu menekena." 
Judges18:16 O hâma jisamanu ja mala a maneka ibhakatu ia ita, ene o anʼa Dani, emana bhu muelu ua kithâdi." 
Judges18:17 Malʼatatu a diangele kuia kulónda ixi, anga a bokona mʼonzo, a katula-mu o kiteka kia kuseta, kióuiẋike, ni efodi, ni jitelafini, kioso nganga muene kiemana bhu muelu ua kithâdi kumoxi ni hâma jisamanu ja mala a maneka ibhakatu ia ita." 
Judges18:18 Enhá-phe kia bokona mʼonzo ia Mika iá a katula-mu o kiteka kia kuseta kióuiẋike, ni efodi, ni jitelafini, nganga u a ebhula, uixi: Muala kubhanga-hi?" 
Judges18:19 Ene-phe a mu vutuila, exi: Di xibhe! Xita lukuaku lué ku dikanu, uile kumoxi ni etu, u tu kale u tata, u nganga ietu; kuma eie ki ku kala kota o kukala u nganga ia dibhata dia muthu umoxi, inga o kukala u nganga ia mundu, ia muiji ua dikota mua Izalaiele?" 
Judges18:20 Nganga u sanguluka mu muẋima uê, u ambata ni efodi, ni jitelafini, ni kiteka kia iudika mesene, u di ta mu kaẋi ka mundu u ila-nâ kumoxi." 
Judges18:21 Kala kiki a tunda bhenhobho, a: suluka, ni anʼâ ni ibhaku, ni imbamba iâ, a i tuamekesa ku pholo." 
Judges18:22 O ki edi dibhata dia Mika a di xi kiá dikanga, akua bhata a di zukama ni inzu ia Mika, a di bhongolola, anga a kaiela anʼa Dani, a a kuata." 
Judges18:23 Anga a kuata kukola-kola anʼa Dani. Ene anga a sakuka, hé ambela Mika, exi: Ihi kia ku kuata? Ua tu kaielela-hi ni mundu uosʼú u ua bhongolola kiki?" 
Judges18:24 Muene-phe, uixi: Mua ngi tambula jinzambi jami ji nga iudika, kumoxi ni nganga, iene ioso muaii na-iu; eme kua ngi xala-hi? Muala kuila kiebhi; uandala-hi, mba ihi kia kukuatʼá?" 
Judges18:25 Anʼa Dani a mu ambela, exi: Kana kubhanga dingi jibuia bhabha! O mbimbi ié ki tuandala ngó ku ivua; imoxi bhu kala ni iiala iasaluka mudietu i ku lundama, anga u ta-mu ni muenhu ué, ni mienhu ia mukuá ia bhata dié." 
Judges18:26 Anʼa Dani kia zubha kuzuela kiki, a suluka anga aia ni kuenda njila iâ; o Mika kia mono kuila mala ió a mu tundu nguzu, u batuka-ku, u vutuka ku bhata diê." 
Judges18:27 Ene-phe, o hama jisamanuʼojo ja muthu, anga ambata ioso ia iudika Mika, ni nganga iê ia kexile na-iu, hé a bhixila na-iu ku Laíxi. A sanga mundu koko a dixibhâ, kala ni hele ia kima, anga a a buikisa ku mazu a xibhata, mbonge iâ a i ta mu túbhia." 
Judges18:28 Akuaʼxi ki bhuala ua tena ku a kudila, mukonda ku Sidone kua a kexile dikanga, o athu engi ue ka di tambulula-nâ. Mukáu uâ, o honga ia zukama mu Bete-lehobo. Akua Dani anga a tunga dingi o mbonge ienhoio, ene kiá hé a bhingana-mu."
