Judges18:29 Mbonge ioio anga a i luka dijina dia Dani, diene dijina dia tatʼâ Dani a mu vuala kuala Izalaiele; mʼokulu-phe mbonge ioio dijina diê Laixi." 
Judges18:30 Anʼa Dani anga a bhaka muenhomo o kitekʼokio kia iudika mesene ia kuzunza; o Jonatane monʼa Ngelexone, monʼa Manasa ni muene ni anʼê hé a kala jinganga ja muiji ua Dane katé bhu kizúua kieza ixi ioso mu ku i balakala." 
Judges18:31 Kienhiki-phe o kitekʼokio kia Mika kia iudikile, a ki bhaka kididi, anga ki kala muenhomo thembu ioso iala o inzu ia Nzambi mu Silu." 
Judges19:1 Mu kukala-kukala anga ki bhita mu izúua ienhoio kuila, kia kexi hanji mua Izalaiele kuila ki mu moneka sobha, bhu kala levita, nzuangiza ku bolo dia mulundu ua Ifalaime, u lumba mukamʼê mu Beleme ia Juda." 
Judges19:2 Mukamʼê anga u ta phanda, u di kuata-nê mvunda, u tunda mʼonzo iê, u vutuka ku bhata dia tatʼâ mu Beleme ia Juda, u xikama koko mbeji jiuana." 
Judges19:3 Muadi uê anga u balumuka, u mu kaiela, mbé kuzuela-nê kiambote, ni ku mu bheka dingi mʼonzo; u enda ni kaiala kê, ni bulu jê jiiadi. Anga u sanga muhatu, o muhatu muene u mu bheka mʼonzo ia tatʼâ; o uavu monʼê ua muhatu kia mu mono, u mu tambula kiambote." 
Judges19:4 Ukouakime, phaiʼa muhatuʼê, anga u mu xikamesa hanji, u bhanga-nê izúua itatu; mu iuzúua ienhiʼii a dia, a nua, a zeka." 
Judges19:5 Kúkia ni kimene, mu kizúua kia kauana, a di meneka, muene uixi: Ngi katuka kiá. Ukouakime-phe, u ambela holomʼié, uixi: Diáula hanji kakúdia, u sunge nguzu u katuke kiua." 
Judges19:6 Kala kiki, a xikama dingi kiiadi kiâ, a kala mu kúdia ni kúnua; muenhú uavu monʼê ua muhatu anga u ambela diiala, holomʼiê, uixi: Ku di suke, nga ku diondo, tu kadietu hanji, u zeke, tuinduluke-ku dingi kizuua kia lelu." 
Judges19:7 Diiala-phe ua balumukine kiá mu katuka, ukouʼê-phe ua mu jijidika, anga u xikama u zeka-bhu dingi kizuua kienhokio." 
Judges19:8 Kúkia ni kimene, kizuua kia katanu, u balumuka dingi phala ku katuka; maji o tata ia muhatuʼê-phe u mu ambela, uixi: Diáula-phe hanji, nga ku diondo, u sunge nguzu, u kiese; o ku kiemba, kuila kumbi dia sembuluka kiá, u katuke kiua. Anga a dia hanji kiiadi kiâ; hé ela o nangʼé ni dikumbi dia lembe." 
Judges19:9 Kia balumuka-phe o diiala mu katuka, ni muene ni mukamʼê ni kaiala kê kala na-ku, ukouakimi, tata ia muhatu, u mu ambela, uixi: Kua mono kuila kumbi dia lembe kiá, tu kadietu dingi usuku ua lelu; kumbi diaii kiá, zeka dingi, u induluke; mungu mu di meneke kiua, muie ku bhata dienu." 
Judges19:10 Diiala-phe nguê dingi kuzekela-bhu usuku uenhó, anga u zangula, u katuka, u bhixila bhua lulama mu Jebuzi (muene Jeluzaleme); uala kuenda ni bulu jê jiiadi, a ji zuika makombola, ni mukamʼê uala kuila-nê kumoxi." 
Judges19:11 Kia bhixila bhu Jebuzi, kumbi dia lembe kiá, kaiala kê anga u ambela muadiʼê, uixi: Tu bhambuke bhabha, nga ku diondo, tu zekele bhu bhata didi dia Majebuzi." 
Judges19:12 Muadiʼê-phe u mu ambela ixi: Kana, ki tu bhambukile bhabha, mu zekela bhu bhata dia athu engi, bhua kambe anʼa Izalaiele; tuie ku pholo bhu Ngibeia." 
Judges19:13 Anga u ambela kaiala kê, uixi: Ndoko, enda lusolo tu bhiẋile ku mabhata ma mukuá ku pholo; tua kà zekela bhu Ngibeia mba bhu Lama." 
Judges19:14 Anga a somboka, aia ku pholo; dikumbi anga dia a fuila mu bhixila bhu Ngibeia, bhua tokala akua Bejamí." 
Judges19:15 Anga a bhambukila bhenhobho, aia kuzekela bhu Ngibeia; o kia zubha kutula-bhu, a xikama ngó bhu kitanda mu nzunga, mukonda kana-bhu muthu u a tambulula, ni ku a bhana kizalu mʼonzo iê." 
Judges19:16 Bhenhobho anga bhu kala muadiakime, ua-lu tunda mu kalakala ku mábhia, mu kumbi dia ngoloxi; muenhú kokuâ kua tokala, ku mulundu ua Ifalaime, o kunu ku Ngibeia kifua uala-ku ngó nzuángiza, kuma akua bhata-phe akua muiji ua Benjamí." 
Judges19:17 Mu kuzambula mesu anga u mona ngenji ua tula, bhu kitanda mu nzunga ia dibhata; muadiakime anga u mu kunda, uixi; Uia kuebhi? O ku ua tundu kuebhi?" 
Judges19:18 Muene u mu vutuila, uixi: Tuala kubhita njila; nga tundu mu Beleme ia Juda, ngala kuia ku bolo dia mulundu ua Ifalaimi; kuene ku bhata dietu, kua ngi vualela, ngele ku Beleme ia Juda, o kiki-phe ngala kuia ku inzu ia Jihova; maji ki bhuala-phe muthu ua tu zalela mʼonzo iê." 
Judges19:19 Sumbala iangu-phe ia ngènda sai ni masa ma jibulu kúdia, sai; sai ue mbolo ni vinhu ia kúdia kuami eme, ni kahatu ké kaka, ni kaiala kala kuia ku tu bheka, etu tu abhikʼé; ki bhuala ukambu ua kima." 
Judges19:20 Muadiakime anga u a ambela, uixi: Ki mu tale hadi; ioso ia tokala ia kambe eme muene ngi soka na-iu; inda kana kutula dingi ngoho mu nzunga ia hatu mumu mu kuzekela-mu." 
Judges19:21 Kala kiki, u a bheka mʼonzo iê, jibulu anga u ji bhana kúdia; ene anga a sukula inama iâ, hé a dia, a nua." 
Judges19:22 Kioso-phe kiala mu di tambulula kiki, miẋima iâ ia sanguluka, bhu kala iiala iasekala ku akua bhata, a bhongoloka bhu kanga, a kala mu ṗhuṗha ni nguzu ioso ku dibhitu; muadiakime mukua ʼnzu anga a mu ambela, exi: Tubhula diiala dia tula mʼonzo ié, mbe tu mu ijiie." 
Judges19:23 Muene mukua ʼnzu anga u tunda bhu kanga bhuala ene, uixi: Kana tata, phange jami, nga mi diondo, kana kubhukumuka kala kiki; phala-hi musonhi uami ua ngi tula mʼonzo, mu mu bhanga ufusa?" 
Judges19:24 Inda monʼami ua muhatu iú, muzeletete, ni mukama ua muene, izenu nga a tubhule bhu kanga, mu a sebulule ene, mu a bhange kioso ki mua mesena; o diiala-phe didi kana ku mu bhanga ufusa." 
Judges19:25 Mala iá-phe nguauâ ku mu ivua; diiala mʼonzo anga u kuata mukamʼê u mu tubhula bhu kanga bhuala ene; anga a mu ijiia, a mu bhanga ufusa usuku uoso katé kuáki; o kia mono kuma kú kúkia, kiene kiua kia mu eha." 
Judges19:26 Muhatu kienhokio, mu kafukufuku, uiza ni ku dibhala-bhala bhu muelu ua ʼnzu muala muadi uê, u kala bhenhobho katé kuma kuakie, anga ufila bhobho." 
Judges19:27 Muadi uê anga u balumuka mu kimene-mene, u jikula mabhitu a ʼnzu, u tunda mu katuka njila iê. Anga u sanga muhatu, o mukamʼê, ua dibhale bhu muelu uaʼnzu, makuʼê ua a tula ku lunzalu lua muelu." 
Judges19:28 Muene kuma ka kʼijiia kuila uafu, anga u mu ambela, uixi: Balumuka, tu ietu kiá! Maji muhatu-phe ka kumbulula. Bhenhobho u mu zangula-bhu, u mu longa ku bûlu iê, anga uia u bhixila ku bhata diê." 
Judges19:29 O kia zubha kutula mʼonzo iê, u sunga phoko, u kuata mukamʼê, u mu sesa, u mu bhanga idiandu, u iudika kuinhi dia makanda ni kiiadi, u a tumikisa katé ku maẋokololo a Izalaiele." 
Judges19:30 Athu-phe, kia zubha ku ki mona, ene oso, exi: Kilúua tu di uana kisunji kala kiki, tundé kia tunda anʼa Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu, katé kizuua kia lelu; enu mu mundu tumenu ku kʼijiia, mu xinganeke, mu te kaiula." 
Judges20:1 Kienhokio ana Oso a Izalaiele hé a tunda, kilombo kioso anga ki bhongoloka kala muthu umoxi ngó, tundé ku Dani katé ku Bele-seba, ni ixi ia Ngiliiade kumoxi, a bhongoloka kua Jihova bhu Mixipa." 
Judges20:2 Makotʼathu ku mundu, ni miiji ioso ia Izalaiele, a diʼongolola bhu kionge kia mundu ua Nzambi, hâma jiuana ja midi ia mala, akua kuendela bhoxi, a tena kufomona mukuale ua kubhânga." 
Judges20:3 Anʼa Bejamí anga a kiʼvua kuila anʼa Izalaiele a bande bhu Mixipa. Anʼa Izalaiele anga a zuela, exi: Tu tangedienu, mba kubhukumuka kuenhuku kua bhiti kiebhi?" 
Judges20:4 Levita, munumeʼa muhatu a mu jibha, u kumbulula, uixi: Nga tudile bhu Ngibeia bhua tokala mua Bejamí, ni eme ni mukamʼami, mu ku zekela-bhu." 
Judges20:5 Mala ma akua Ngibeia anga a ngi balukila, inzu a i kondoloka mu usuku; eme muene andalele ku ngi jibha, o mukamʼami a mu bhange undumbu ni kusuina kuoso, katé uafu muene!" 
Judges20:6 Bhenhobho ngi kuata mukamʼami, eme nga mu bhange ku idiandu-idiandu, eme nga mu tumukisa katé ku maẋokololo a ixi ia undundu ia Izalaiele; kuma ene a te kituxi, a bhange ufusa mua Izalaiele." 
Judges20:7 Talesenu-phe, o kiki enu oso mu anʼa Izalaiele muala bhabha, mu bhana-bhu kizuelu kienu, tu mone kioso kia tokala ku ki bhanga." 
Judges20:8 Mundu uoso anga a balumuka kala muthu umoxi ngó, exi: Ki bhu kale muthu uia ku balaka iê, ki bhu kale muthu u vutuka ku bhata diê." 
Judges20:9 Ngibeia-phe tu i bhanga kiki: tu di tungula mu hasa, kioso ki tuia ku a solomona." 
Judges20:10 Kala hâma ku tunda kuinhi dia muthu, miiji ioso ia Izalaiele; ku midi ku tunda hâma, ku kuinhi dia midi ku tunda midi, mu sota huta ia kifuẋi kioso ki bhinga kuia kubeta Bejamí kala kia tokala mu kituxi kia ufusa uê kia bhange ene mua Izalaiele." 
Judges20:11 Kala kiki, mala oso a akua Izalaiele a di bhongolola kala muthu umoxi ngó mu bhesa kaxtiku ku dibhata diodio, anga a takana muene miẋima kala muthu umoxi ngó." 
Judges20:12 Miiji ia Izalaiele anga a tuma athu kuibhula mu muiji uoso ua Bejamí, exi: Kuku kubhukumuka kuahiʼuku, kua bhiti muʼaxaxi kenu?" 
Judges20:13 Kiki-phe mala enhó a sekala, ala mu Ngibeia, tu bhakuidienu-nâ, tu a jibhe, phala kituxi kiki tu ki bhuise mua Izalaiele. Bajamí-phe ka xikina kuivua o dízui dia akuâ, o phange jê anʼa Izalaiele." 
Judges20:14 Inda anʼa Bejamí a tunda ku mabhata mâ, a bhongolokela bhu Ngibeia, mu kuia mu kúlua ni anʼa Izalaiele." 
Judges20:15 Anʼa Bejamí anga a alula kizuua kienhokio, ku mabhata mâ moso kua tundu makuinhi aiadi a midi ni midi jisamanu ja mala a tena ku fomona xibhata phala kubhânga. Akua bhata ene bhu Ngibeia engi, kuma o a tungula-bhu ngó a tena hâma sambuadi ia mala a mazonda ósole kiambote." 
Judges20:16 O muʼaxaxi ka mundu uosʼú anga mu kala athu òtungule, hâma sambuadi ia mala ónone, ene oso akua kiasu, enhá o mu kutakula matadi ni mbalafunda, né lundemba ka lu lueza." 
Judges20:17 O mala ma akua Izalaiele oso a alula ue a tena hâma jiuana ja midi ia mala, a tena kufomona xibhata phala kubhânga; ene osoʼâ mazonda a ita; a kambe-mu ngó akua Bejami a di katula-mu." 
Judges20:18 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a balumuka, hé a banda aia bhu Betele, mù kuibhula phangu kua Nzambi, exi: Nanhi u tu tuamenena ku ita mu kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí? Jihova anga u zuela, uixi: Juda muene u tuamena." 
Judges20:19 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a di meneka, aia mu ta kibangu kiâ bhua zukama, mu solomona akua Ngibeia." 
Judges20:20 Akua Izalaiele anga a tunda mu kúlua ni Bejamí; a di ta ku mikalatata mu mukáu ua Ngibeia, mvunda anga i matekena bhu mbandu ia sanzala bhene." 
Judges20:21 Anʼa Bejamí anga a tunda mu Ngibeia, hé a buikisa ku mundu ua Izalaiele, kizuua kienhokio, makuinhi aiadi a midi ia mala, ni midi jiiadi." 
Judges20:22 Mundu uoso ua ana a Izalaiele anga a di phopha a di suinisa phala kubhânga dingi, a di ta dingi ku mikalatata bhuoso bhua di tele ku mikalatata mu kizuua kia dianga." 
Judges20:23 Anʼa Izalaiele anga aia hanji mù dila bhu pholo ia Jihova, katé mu ngoloxi; anga ebhula kua Jihova, exi: O kiki tu vutuka dingi mu kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí, o phange jetu? Jihova uixi: Ndenu muene, mua kà a lue." 
Judges20:24 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a bhixila dingi kua anʼa Bejamí mu kúlua-nâ kizuua kia kaiadi. 
Judges20:25 Akua Bajamí anga a tunda mu Ngibeia mu takana-nâ, anga a buikisa dingi ku anʼa Izalaiele kuinhi dia midi ni nake dia midi ia mala, ene oso mala a tena kufomona xibhata mu kubhânga." 
Judges20:26 Bhenhobho ana oso a Izalaiele, mundu uoso, a banda ku Betele, a dila, a xikama bhu pholo ia Jihova, hé a jila kizuua kioso kienhókio, ki bhua kúdia ki bhua kunua katé mu ngoloxi; a bhana ni jisata ja kuoha ni jisata ja paze bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
Judges20:27 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ebhula kua Jihova. (Kuma izuua ienhoio o álaka ia kikutu kia Nzambi ii bhobho ni Finehase monʼa Eleazale, monʼa Alá, uemana bhu pholo ia álaka mu dibhezelu izuuʼoio.)" 
Judges20:28 Exi: O kiki-phe tuia dingi lua mukuá mu kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí, o phange jetu, inga tu batuka-ku kiá? Jihova uixi: Ndenu-ku dingi; kuma mungu nga-nda ku a bhakula bhu lukuaku luenu." 
Judges20:29 Izalaiele bhenhobho anga a bhaka athu mu ididi ia kubatamena mu jimbandu ja Sanzala ia Ngibeia. 
Judges20:30 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a banda dingi kúlua ni anʼa Bejamí, kizuua kia katatu, a di ta dingi ku mikalatata kala kia diangele kubhanga jinga mu izuua ia mukuá." 
Judges20:31 Anʼa Bejamí anga a tunda ue mu kúlua ni mundu, aia ni kusuetuka ku kanga, dibhata diâ ala kuenda ni ku di xia dikanga; anga a kuata kubeta ni kujibha ku mundu ua Izalaiele kala kia diangele kubhanga mu izuua ia mukuá, mu ikoka ia jiphambu jiia mu kubanda ku Betele, ni kubanda ku Ngibeia, ni mu mukáu; hé a jibha-ku makuinhi atatu a muthu ku mala ma akua Izalaiele." 
Judges20:32 Anʼa Bejamí-phe anga amba, exi: A bhi-ku dingi, ala ku tu lenga kiá kala kia bhangele kizuua kia mukuá. Maji anʼa Izalaiele-phe, exi: Tuende ni kusuetuka, mbé ku a sungila mu ikoka, o dibhata diâ a di xie dikanga." 
Judges20:33 Mala oso a Izalaiele anga a balumuka kiua mu ididi iâ, a di ta ku mikalatata bhu Diie dia Bahale; o iá ue akua Izalaiele ala mu batamena mu jimbandu ja mbonge ia Ngibeia, a fusumuka mu ididi iâ mu Kiphenza kia Ngibeia mua kexi." 
Judges20:34 Kuinhi dia midi ia muthu a a nona oso mua Izalaiele, a tulukila bhu Ngibeia, ita anga i vula, ene-phe akua Bejamí, ka kʼijiia kuila divuua dia a tula." 
Judges20:35 Jihova anga u nemeka Bejamí bhu pholo ia Izalaiele, anʼa Izalaiele anga a buikisa ku akua Bejamí kizuua kienhókio makuinhʼaiadi a midi ni midi jitanu ja muthu ni hama; ene oso mala a mazonda a tena kufomona xibhata mu kubhânga." 
Judges20:36 Kala kiki anʼa Bejamí a mona kuma abhi-ku. Mbata akua Izalaiele a dianga kuenda ni kuila kala ala kulenga Bejamí, mukonda a dielela akuâ a a bhake mu ididi ia kubatamena mu jimbandu ja mbonge ia Ngibeia." 
Judges20:37 Enhá a batama-phe, anga a tunda lusolo mu ididi iâ, a di lukula mu Ngibeia, hé a di zela, anga a beta dibhata dioso ku mazu a xibhata." 
Judges20:38 Akua Izalaiele, ni iá a kexi mu ididi ia kubatamena, a di bhele kijimbuete, kia kuxikitisa dituta dia dikota dia dixi mu dibhata." 
Judges20:39 Akua Izalaiele anga aluluka ku ita kala ala kulenga, kioso kia mateka Bejamí ni kubeta ni kujibha ku akua Izalaiele, anga a jibha-ku kiá makuinhi atatu a muthu osuʼá; kuma akua Bejamí ambe, exi: Akua Izalaiele ábhi-ku muene, ala ku tu lenga kiá kala ku ita ia kizuuʼokio" 
Judges20:40 Maji kioso-phe kia mateka dituta kubanda mu dibhata, dixi diemana kala philadi, akua Bejamí kia sakuka kuema a mona dibhata diâ diala mu tuka dixi dia bhixila katé mu diulu." 
Judges20:41 Akua Izalaiele-phe aluluka, akua Bejamí anga a diuana, kuma a mono divuua dia a tula!" 
Judges20:42 Bhenhobho anga a lunguluka mu kulenga a bhana makunda anʼa Izalaiele, hé a di tela mu njila ia kuia mu kikangalakata; ita-phe i iza ni ku a bhesa lusolo, ni iá a tundu mu dibhata a a bhake mu kaẋi; o a xala mu mbonge ala kuenda ni ku a buikisa ue kala muthu bhu kididi kiê bhene." 
Judges20:43 Kuene kuoso akua Bejamí a a kondela, ni ku a kaia-kaia, a a titidila muene kioso kiandala, katé kuoso kua lengela ku mbandu ku tundila dikumbi, bhua lulama mu Ngibeia." 
Judges20:44 Ku akua Bejamí anga ku buika kuinhi dia midi ia muthu, ni nake dia midi; ene oso mazonda a kubhânga mu ita." 
Judges20:45 Kia mono kuila ki ki xikina, a lunguluka anga a lengela mu kikangalakata bhu Ndànji ia Dimone; o mu jinjila muejila, a nemeka-mu dingi jimbalu-mbalu ji tena midi jitanu ja muthu; anga aia dingi ni ku a kaia katé bhu Ngidome, a nemeka-bhu dingi midi jiiadi." 
Judges20:46 Kia di bhange konda, oso a buika mu kizuua kienhókio ku muiji ua Bejamí, makuinhi aiadi a midi ia muthu, ni midi jitanu; ene oso mala a tena kufomona xibhata, mazonda a kubhânga mu ita." 
Judges20:47 Bhu kala-phe Ndànji ia Dimone, anga a kala kuenhokio bhu Ndànji ia Dimone mbeji jiuana." 
Judges20:48 Maji akua Izalaiele-phe anga alulukila dingi anʼa Bejamí oso a subhuka-ku a a nemeka ku mazu a mukuale, ni dibhata diene dioso, ni ibhaku iâ ni ima ioso ia sange-mu a i jikinisa muene nzaká; o jisanzala jâ joso hé a ji ta mu túbhia." 
Judges21:1 Akua Izalaiele-phe a lokelele bhu Mixipa, exi: Ki bhu kale muthu mudietu u bhana monʼê ua muhatu mu sakana mu akua Bejamí." 
Judges21:2 Mundu anga eza bhu Betele, a xikama bhenhobho bhu pholo ia Nzambi katé mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, anga a suina mázui ni kudila kiavulu." 
Judges21:3 Exi: Aiué, Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, tata! kia bhiti kiebhi, Ngana mua Izalaiele? kuila leluʼidi mua Izalaiele mua kambe kiá muiji umoxi?" 
Judges21:4 Bhenhobho anga ki bhita kuila ki kúkia ni kimene, mundu a di meneka, anga a tunga-bhu kalatódio, a bhana jisata ja kuoha, ni jisata ja kubhandulula." 
Judges21:5 Anʼa Izalaiele, anga a zuela, exi: Mu miiji ioso ia Izalaiele, nanhi muene ua kambele kuiza bhu kionge kia Jihova? Kuma a lokele muloko ua dikota, exi: Uoso u kamba kuiza bhu pholo ia Jihova bhu Mixipa, u kala muthu ua ku mu jibha." 
Judges21:6 Anʼa Izalaiele anga a diela mukonda dia phangʼiâ Bejamí, exi: Lelu kua Izalaiele kua batuka kiá muiji umoxi." 
Judges21:7 Ki tualʼiki, a subhuka-bhu-phe tu bhanga-nâ kiebhi mu ku a sotela ahatu, etu tua loka kiá mu dijina dia Jihova kuma anʼetu a ahatu ki tu xikina ku a bhana-nâ mu kusakana?" 
Judges21:8 Anga a zuela, exi: Muiji kuxi-phe, ku miiji ia Izalaiele, ua kambele kubanda kua Jihova bhu Mixipa? Mu kuibhula-phe anga a mona kuila bhu kibangu ki bhuala muthu ua tundu bhu Jabezi dia Ngiliiade iu ueza bhu kionge." 
Judges21:9 Mukonda kialula o mundu, akua-bhata bhu Jabezi dia Ngiliiade ki bhuala muthu." 
Judges21:10 Kilombo anga ki katula kuinhi dia midi ni midi jiiadi, ja mala a tundu akuâ oso mu uzonda, anga a a tuma, exi: Ndenu ka nemekienu akua-bhata bhu Jabezi dia Ngiliiade ku mazu a xibhata, katé ni ahatu ni ana-ndenge." 
Judges21:11 Mua kà bhanga-phe kiki: Mala oso mua kà a buidisa, ni ahatu oso a zeka kiá ni mala." 
Judges21:12 Anga aia a sanga muʼaxaxi ka akua-bhata bhu Jabezi dia Ngiliiade hâma jiuana ja ana a ahatu, hanji anʼandenge, kejiia luua mala mu kuzeka-nâ; enhá anga eza-nâ bhu kibangu mu Silu, mʼoxi ia Kanana." 
Judges21:13 Kilômbo kioso anga ki tuma kuzuelesa anʼa Bejamí ala bhu Ndànji ia Dimone a di tambulula-nâ anga a a kolela paze. 
Judges21:14 Akua Bejamí anga a vutuka thembu ienhoio, eza ku bhata, anga a a bhana ahatu, oso kiá a a bhulula ni muenhu ku ahatu a Jabezi dia Ngiliiade; maji hanji kiene kimoxi, ka soko." 
Judges21:15 Mundu anga a diela, henda ia a kuata mukonda dia Bejamí, kuma Jihova ua tebhununa-ku athu mu miiji ia Izalaiele." 
Judges21:16 Adiakime bhu kilômbo anga amba, exi: Enhá-phe a subhuka-ku tua kà a sotela kuebhi ahatu, ki alʼiki ahatu oso mua Bejamí a buila?" 
Judges21:17 Exi: Oso a bhuluka kua Bejamí ki bhinga tu a iudikila dingi o undundu uâ, o kulengesa kuila muiji uâ uoso ki u jime o mbutu muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele." 
Judges21:18 Etu-phe ki tu tena ku a bhana ahatu ku anʼetu; kuma anʼa Izalaiele a lokele, exi: Uoso u bhana muhatu ku akua Bejamí, muenhó a mu bhubhidile." 
Judges21:19 Anga a a longesa, exi: Talesenu, kuala fesa ia Jihova, ene ku i bhanga mivu ioso mu Silu. Silu u kala ku kusuku, o Betele u xala ku sulu, o ikoka i tunda mu Betele i banda ku Xikeme mu i xia ku kiasu, o Libona ku pholo." 
Judges21:20 Anga a tuma anʼa Bejamí, exi: Ndenu, ka suamienu mu mivide, mu kale mu tala;" 
Judges21:21 o ki mu mona anʼa ilumba mu Silu a tundu mu kukina mu fesa, enu-phe mu tunda mu mivide, kala diiala u kuata-bhu muhatuʼê ku anʼa ilumba ia akua Silu, muie-nâ ku ixi ienu ia Bejami." 
Judges21:22 O ki kala a-tatʼâ, ni phange jâ ja mala, eza kudikola kókuetu, tua kà ambela, kuma: Tu bhanienu-nâ mu henda; kuma ene ka tenene ku ahatu oso a a kuatela mu ita mumu, enu uenu ki enu mua a bhana-nâ mu vondadi; kuma se enu mua a bhele-nâ mueji kukala ni kuêla." 
Judges21:23 Anʼa Bejamí anga a ki bhanga; a kuata ahatuʼâ ku ana ilumba ala mu kina, katé ene oso a sokelà-ku. Anga aia-nâ a vutuka mu undundu uâ, a bhanga dingi mabhata, hé a tunga momo." 
Judges21:24 Anʼa Izalaiele ue anga a muangana kiua, aia thembu ienhoio, kala muthu ku muiji uê, ni ku dianda diê; ene oso anga a muanganena mu maundundu mâ." 
Judges21:25 Izuua ienhoio mua Izalaiele ki mu kexile sobha, kala muthu-phe u bhanga kioso kia mono kuila kiene kia mu iukila ku mesu-mê." 
Ruth1:1 Anga ki bhita kuma, mu izuua kia kexile afundixi kufundisa mu Izalaiele, mʼoxi mu kala nzala ia dikota; Anga bhu kala muthu, mukua Beleme ia Juda, uia kunakina mʼoxi ia Mouabhe, ni muene ni mukajiʼê ni anʼê kiiadi a mala." 
Ruth1:2 Diialʼidi dijina diê Elimeleke, mukajiʼê dijina diê Nouemi, anʼê majina mâ Mahalone ni Kidiione, ene oso akua Efrata mu Beleme ia Juda. Anga eza mʼoxi ia Mouabhe, a tunga momo." 
Ruth1:3 Mu kubhanga izuua, Elimeleke, munumeʼa Nouemi anga ufua; o Nouemi muene anga u xala ni anʼê kiiadi." 
Ruth1:4 Anʼê anga a sakana ahatu a akua Mouabhe, umoxi dijina diê Olofa, mukuá dijina diê Lute. Anga a tunga muenhomo kifua kuinhi dia mivu di tena." 
Ruth1:5 Ni Mahalone ni Kidiione anga afua ue kiiadi kiâ. Muhatu Nouemi anga u xala ngó, ua fundu anʼê kiiadi a mala ni munumeʼê." 
Ruth1:6 Nouemi anga u balumuka ni akaji a anʼê mu kutunda mʼoxi ia Mouabhe nʼa vutukise ko kuâ, kuma uevila mʼoxi ia Mouabhe kuila Jihova ua xinganeka mundu uê, iu ua a bhana kia kúdia." 
Ruth1:7 Anga a katuka bhu kididi bhuoso bhuala, ni akaji a anʼê kiiadi aia-nê kumoxi, a mu xinjikila mu kuvutuka kʼoxi ia Juda." 
Ruth1:8 Mu njila kioso kia muia ni kuenda, Nouemi anga u ambela akaji a anʼê, uixi; Ndokuenu kiá, mu vutuke kala muthu ku bhata dia manhʼâ; o Jihova a mi bhange o mbote, kala enu ki mua i bhange o madifundu, kala ue ki mua ngi bhange-iu eme." 
Ruth1:9 Jihova a mi bhese kidimba, kala muthu monzo ia diiala diê Anga u a bhana jinzóbole, anga a zangula mázui mâ, ni kudila." 
Ruth1:10 Anga a mu ambela, exi: Kana, etu uetu tuandala tuia kumoxi ni eie, ua-lu vutuka ku kifuẋi kienu." 
Ruth1:11 Nouemi-phe uixi: Ndokuenu! Vutukenu tata, anʼami! Mu ki bhangela-hi o kuia kumoxi ni eme? Mua fika kifua ngala dingi ni anʼa mala mu divumu diami, kuila hinu mu sakana-nâ?" 
Ruth1:12 Vutukenu anʼami tata, nga mi diondo, mu di tele kuoso ku mua mono; kuma eme nga kuka kiá kiavulu, ki ngi tena dingi kusakana diiala. Né ngedi ngi dielela, hé ngi sakana diiala usuku ua lelu, ngi vuala dingi anʼa mala," 
Ruth1:13 enu kifua mu a xikamena katé kia kula? kifua ene a mi fudisa kukala ni malʼenu a kusakana? Kana tata, anʼami! Kuma kubhondalala kuami eme kota, kuenu-enu ndenge, mukonda eme ngedi kala lukuaku lua Jihova luene luala ku ngi bha kaxtiku." 
Ruth1:14 Anga a zangula dingi mázui mâ a ta kibúlukutu ni kudila. Olofa anga u bhana ukouʼê jibeju, u di lekela-nê; Lute-phe ua mu naminina muene," 
Ruth1:15 Muene anga u mu ambela, uixi: Talesa huedʼiê iú-uió, ua-lu vutuka ku kifuẋi kiê ni ku nzambi jê; eie ue vutuka, kaiela-ze mukuenu." 
Ruth1:16 Lute-phe, uixi: Kana ku ngi bhomba ni ngi ku xie, anga ngi ku sondoloka hé ngi fula ku ku kaiela; mukonda kuoso ku uia eie, eme ue kuene ku ngiia; bhuoso bhu ua kà tudila eie o usuku, eme ue bhene bhu ngi tula; o mundu ué u kala mundu uami, Nzambi ié Nzambi iami." 
Ruth1:17 O ixi ioso i ua ká fuila eie, kididi bhuoso bhu ufuilʼeie, eme ue bhene bhu ngi fuila, o bhua ku fundʼeie bhene bhua ngi funda. Jihova a ngi bhange-kiu, a ngi tele-kiu dingi, se nga xikina kuuanunuka nʼeie, mukonda kikale ki tu uanuna o kúfua." 
Ruth1:18 O kia mu mono ua jiji muene, muẋima ua mu tetuluka kiavulu mu kuia-nê, maka ua ma tula, kala ku mu fudisa dingi." 
Ruth1:19 Kienhiki anga ela kumoxi kiiadi kiâ, katé kia bhixila mu Beleme. Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha-phe kutula mu Beleme, dibhata dioso di salumuka mukonda diâ, ahatu anga a di ambela mudiâ, exi: Manhi ki muenʼiú Nouemi?" 
Ruth1:20 Muene-phe anga uenda ni ku a ambela, uixi: Kana ku ngʼila Nouemi, kale mu ngʼila Mala, mukonda Muteni-a-ioso muenhu uami ua u ludisa kiavulu muene lokoso!" 
Ruth1:21 Ngele ni maku ezala, kiki Jihova-phe ua ngi bhangesa kuvutuka ni maku ahatu; Phalahi ngoho mu ngʼila Nouemi ki ngalʼiki, mua mono Jihova ua ngi tundila kala ngi nguma iê, o Muteni-a-ioso ua ngʼizalesa ni dilamba?" 
Ruth1:22 Kala kiki Nouemi ua vutuka ku bhata diâ, kumoxi ni Lute mukua Mouabhe, mukaji a monʼê, ua tundu mʼoxi ia Mouabhe. Anga a bhixila bhu Beleme mu izuua ia kumateka kumuna sevada." 
Ruth2:1 Nouemi anga u kala ni ndandu ia munumeʼê, muadiakimi mukua jimbongo, ua tokala ku muiji ua Elimeleke; dijina diê Bouaji." 
Ruth2:2 Lute-phe mukua Mouabhe anga u ambela ukoué Nouemi, uixi: Ngehele, ngiie ku mábhia, ngi none tu ixina tua sevada tua laúka kua iá ala kumuna, mu kaiela uoso u ngi kala ni henda nʼa ngi tambula mʼobhia diê. Nouemi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ndé kiá, monʼami." 
Ruth2:3 Muene anga uia, u kuata kunona mu díbhia, ni kukaiela ku dima dia jingunza jala kumuna. Kuzediua kuê-phe o kutukulukila mu díbhia dia Bouaji, ua tokala ku muiji ua Elimeleke." 
Ruth2:4 Bhenhobho-phe Bouaji u tunda mu Beleme, anga uiza ku menekena o jingunza jala kumuna, uixi: Ngana a mi kuatekese. Ene ue a mu kumbulula, exi: Eie ue Ngana a ku bhane dibesá." 
Ruth2:5 Bouaji anga u ibhula selevende iê uala mu kalakesa o jingunza, uixi: Kilumba kiki monʼa nanhi?" 
Ruth2:6 Selevende uala mu kalakesa jingunza, u vutula, uixi: Muene kilumba mukua Mouabhe, uejiia kumoxi ni Nouemi kia tundu ku Mouabhe." 
Ruth2:7 Ua ngʼambela, uixi: Ngʼehe ngende ni kunona tu ixina tua lauka mua bhiti o jingunza ni kumuna, ni mu jimbandu ja ita iókute kiá. Hanji-phe kieza mu kimene uala kuenda ni kunona tunde kienhokio katé mu kumbiʼumu; ua xikamene ngó kathangana kofele mʼonzo." 
Ruth2:8 Bouaji anga u ambela Lute, uixi: Uevu-ze, monʼami? Kana kuia kunona mu dibhia diengi, bhabha kana kusondoloka-bhu nʼu-ii kuengi; inda, u kala muenhumu, u xale kumoxi ni ilumba iami." 
Ruth2:9 U langa ngó díbhia dioso diala kumuna ene, u di nhenge-nâ kumoxi; kuejiia kuila minzangala nga a tendelela phala ka ku bhange kima? Dinhota se dia ku kuata, bhixila ku jimbinda ja teke minzangala, mbé u nue." 
Ruth2:10 Lute anga u di ṗhudikila bhoxi u bhetama pholo katé mu mavu, anga u mu ambela, uixi: Kia bhiti kiebhi, ngana, nga bongo kiadi ku mesu mé, phala ku ngi suua kiki, eme ngi mukua ʼxi iengi?" 
Ruth2:11 Bouaji anga u mu ambela, uixi: A ngi kundu-kiu kiambote kioso ki ua bhange ukouʼé tunde kia fu muadi ué; ni kioso ki ua xi tatʼenu ni mamʼenu, ni ixi ia ku vualela, eie ueza kutunga ni mundu uengi kua ejidile luua." 
Ruth2:12 Jihova a ku futé-kiu kioso ki ua bhange; o kisakidilu kié ki kale kia dikota ki ku bha Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ua bhingi moxi a mabhabha-mê muene mu ueza kusota kididi kia kukala." 
Ruth2:13 Lute anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngi bonge kisangu-sangu ku mesu mé, ngana iami, mukonda ua ngi bhuisa hele, ngi kahatu ké; kuma ua ngi zuelesa ni henda, sumbala o ilumba ié iamukuá eme ki ngi di fika-nâ." 
Ruth2:14 O mu kithangana kia zumbuka kukalakala phala aie mu kúdia, Bouaji u mu ambela, uixi: Bhixila kunu udie ku mbolo, u mame mbolo ié mu vindangele. Muene anga u xikama kumoxi ni jingunza, hé a mu tambuisa o jimbundu jʼokange, u dia, hé uikuta, hanji kua subhuka." 
Ruth2:15 O kia balumuka mu kunona dingi, Bouaji u ambela minzangala iê, uixi: Muehienu a none ni muʼaxaxi ka ita iókute kiá, enu-phe ki mu mu bazele se muene kiene kiandala." 
Ruth2:16 Mu enda ni ku mu fomuena tuixina mu ita, mu mu xile bhoxi, mbé a none muene, enu kana ku mu fudisa." 
Ruth2:17 Kienhiki uia ni kunona mu díbhia muenhomo katé mu ngoloxi; o ixina ioso ia nona-mu anga u i vunda, mu tunda kinda kia sevada ia jimbundu." 
Ruth2:18 Anga u i zangula, uia ku bhata; ukouʼê anga u mona sevada ia tundu mu kunona kuê; ni ku jimbundu jʼókange ja subhuka bhuadi muene, Lute ua mu bhekela-ku ue." 
Ruth2:19 Ukouʼê anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Lelu ua nonena kuebhi? Kuebhi ku ua kalakalela? A tane-ku, uoso ua ku suu kiki. Muene anga u tangela ukouʼê kuoso kua kalakalela, u mu ambela ioso ia bhiti, uixi: Muadiakimi nga kalakala-nê lelu mu díbhia diê, dijina diê Bouaji." 
Ruth2:20 Nouemi bhenhobho anga u ambela mukaji a monʼê, uixi: A tane-ku muenhó uoso ua ku tambulula! A kale ni dibesá dia Jihova! Manhi o henda ia Jivova ii-ié hanji, kiluua i batuka kua iá ala ku muenhu ni ku ma difunduʼetu afu kiá! Nouemi anga u zuela dingi, uixi: Diialʼodio ndandu ietu, ndandu ia zukama muene! Muene ue muthu ku malembʼetu a fuama o ku tu kula ni kubhanga ndundula." 
Ruth2:21 Lute dia mukua Mouabhe anga uzuela dingi, uixi: Kidi muene, ua ngʼambela dingi, uixi: U nhenganana jinga o nzangi ia jingunza jami, katé bhuoso bhua kà zubhila kumuna o mábhia mami oso." 
Ruth2:22 Nouemi anga uambela dingi mukajiʼa monʼê Lute, uixi: Kia uabha muene, monʼami, u ile kumoxi ni ilumba iê, kana kuia mu díbhia dia muthu uengi sumba ka ku tambulula kiambote." 
Ruth2:23 Kienhiki Lute anga u nhenganana o ilumba ia Bouaji ni kunona, katé ene kia zubha kumuna sevada, ni kumuna ue dingi o tiliku. Lute anga u tunga-phe ni ukouʼê." 
Ruth3:1 Kienhokio, Nouemi dia ukouʼê anga u mu ambela, uixi: Monʼami ki ngi fuama ku ku sotela kidímba, phala u kale kiambote?" 
Ruth3:2 Ki tualʼiki, Bouaji ki ndandu ietu, uavu ilumba ié i ua kexe kuenda-na-iu? Lelu-phe mu usuku iú ua-nda kubhiata sevada bhu kienda kiê kia kuvundila." 
Ruth3:3 Kiki-phe, eie dʼiẋike, u di uese maji a dizumba, u zuate o izuatu ié iamboteʼoio, uie bhu kienda kia kuvundila; muene-phe eie ku mu bhite luua ku mesu nʼa ku mono, katé kia kà zubha kúdia ni kúnua." 
Ruth3:4 Kioso-phe kia kʼaia mu kuzeka, eie u tongolola kiambote o kididi bhuoso bhua zeka; uia u mu vulumuna ku inama, u zangula o divunga dia di futu hé u zeka-bhu; muene-phe u ku tangela dingi kioso ki u bhanga." 
Ruth3:5 Lute anga u mu ambela, uixi: Kioso ki ua ngi tangela kiene ki ngi bhanga." 
Ruth3:6 Anga u kulumuka bhu kienda, u bhanga kioso kia mu longesa ukouʼê." 
Ruth3:7 Anga ki bhita kuila, Bouaji kia zubha kúdia ni kúnua, muẋima uê ua sanguluka, uia kuzeka bhu mbandu ia lumu ia sevada ia jimbundu. Lute anga uiza ni kuzonza, u vulumuna bhu inama ié, anga u zeka-bhu." 
Ruth3:8 Kutula mu kaii ka usuku, diiala di sasumuka ku kilu, u bhetuka; mu kutala, u mona bhu inama iê bhua zeka muhatu," 
Ruth3:9 Anga u ibhula, uixi: Eie nanhi? Kuala muene: Eme Lute, ngi kahatu ké; ngi vungine-phe ni dibhabha dia vunga dié, eme ngi kahatu ké, kuma eie u dilemba, eie u ndandu iazukama ua fuama o ndundula." 
Ruth3:10 Kuala Bouaji: Jihova a ku bhane dibesá, monʼami! Mukonda o mbote iii i ua sukidila kubhanga iala kota, o i ua diangele kubhanga iala ndenge; kuma eie kua kaiela mala a minzangala, a kale jingadiama, mba a kale akua itadi, ki ene u ua suu." 
Ruth3:11 Kiki-phe, monʼami, ku kale ni hele, eme ngi ku bhanga kioso ki ua tange; mukonda akua bhata dietu oso a ku ijiia kuila eie u muhatu ua ujitu." 
Ruth3:12 Kidi muene eme ngi ndandu iazukama, ki ngi di tunu-kiu; maji hanji sai-phe mukuetu ua beta kuzukama eme ndenge." 
Ruth3:13 Nhohena hanji bhenhabha usuku iú lelu, o ki kúkia muene se u xikina ku ku bhanga kia tokala o ndandu iazukama, a ki bhange kia undandu uazukama; o ki kala udituna ku ku bhanga kia tokala o undandu uazukama, eme kiá ngi ku bhanga-kiu. Nga loka muene mu dijina dia Jihova. Eie zeka kiá bhenhabha katé ki kúkia." 
Ruth3:14 Muene anga u zeka bhu inama iê katé kuáki. O ki kuákie u balumuka-phe mu kafukufuku, kuila muthu ku tena luua ku mu mona kiambote." 
Ruth3:15 Anga u mu ambela dingi uixi: Beka dilasola dié di ua di futu, u di kuate kiambote; Lute anga u kuata dilasola, muene u mu zongela-bhu izongelu isamanu ia sevada, u mu tuika-iu; anga Lute uia ku bhata." 
Ruth3:16 Kia zubha kutula mʼonzo kua ukouʼê, ukouʼê uixi: Kuambe, monʼami, kia ku bhiti kiebhi? Muene anga u mu tangela kioso kia bhange o diiala dienhodio." 
Ruth3:17 Uixi: Ua ngi bhana izongelu isamanu iii ia sevada, uixi: Kuie maku ahatu kua ukouʼé." 
Ruth3:18 Nouemi bhenhobho u mu ambela, uixi: Xikama monʼami, kinga u tale kioso kia-nda kubhita mba ima i kala kiebhi; kuma diialʼodio ka-nda kunhoha, katé maka a ma zubha lelu muene dienhidi." 
Ruth4:1 Bouaji anga u banda ku bhata, u tula bhu muelu ua kimbaka, u xikama. Mu nanga kathangana, ndandu iazukama u tena kukala mukudi ua kubhanga undundula kua Lute, kala kiambele Bouaji, u kala mu bhita. Muene anga u mu handekela, uixi: Xeie, ngânji! Iza hanji kunu, u xikame bhabha." 
Ruth4:2 Anga u ixana dingi kuinhi dia muthu, ku adiakimi akua-bhata, uixi: Xikamenu hanji bhabha; ene anga a xikama." 
Ruth4:3 Anga u ambela ndandu iazukama, uixi: Nouemi ueza dingi ku bhata, ua tundu mʼoxi ia Mouabhe, uala mu sumbisa mavu a kexile a Phangʼietu Elimeleke." 
Ruth4:4 Ngixi-phe ngi ku kunda-kiu, imoxi u a sumba bhu pholo ia adiakimi akua bhata iá a xikama bhabha, ni bhu pholo ia mundu uoso. Ki uila-phe u a kula, kula-u-phe kiá; o ki uila kana, zuela-kiu, phala ngi kʼijiie; kuma kana-ku dingi ua tokala o ku a kula, kala eie ngó, ni eme nga kaiela ku kunda dié." 
Ruth4:5 Muene uixi: Ngʼa kula. Kuala Bouaji: Kizuua-phe ki u sumba mavu kua Nouemi, ki bhinga uê u bhenga Lute mukua Mouabhe, mukaji a difundu, phala kuxalesa o dijina dia difundu mu undundu uê." 
Ruth4:6 Ndandu iazukama anga u zuela, uixi: Bhobho nga lémbua-phe kiá ku a kula; kuma se ngi ki bhanga, nga-nda kuselula o undundu uami eme-muène; kula kiá eie, undandu uami uazukama ua ngi fuamene kubhanga u bhite ko kué, kuma eme nga lémbua-ku kiá." 
Ruth4:7 Mʼokulu-phe mua Izalaiele, kifua kia kexi-ku mu kukula, ni mu ta mauenji, ni mu kuzubha maka moso, muthu u zula sabhatu iê, u i tambuisa mukuâ; kifua kijimbuete mua Izalaiele kuma maka a batuka muene, abhu." 
Ruth4:8 Ndandu iazukama anga u ambela Bouaji, uixi: Mavu sumba-u kiá eie, anga u zula sabhatu ié u mu tambuisa-iu." 
Ruth4:9 Bouaji anga u ambela adiakimi, ni mundu uoso, uixi: Enu-ze mu jimbangi, kizuua kia lelu, kuma mbongo joso ja tokalele kua Elimeleke, ni ja tokalele Kidiioné ni Mahalone, nga ji sumbu kua Nouemi." 
Ruth4:10 Ni Lute mukua Mouabhe, mukaji a Mahalone, nga mu lembe lelu kukala mukaji ami, phala ngi xalese dijina dia difundu mu undundu uê, phala dijina dia difundu ki di bhue-mu ni di jime mu jindandu jê, ni bhu kanga dia dibhata diê. Enu-phe mu jimbangi kizuua kia lelu." 
Ruth4:11 Mundu uoso a xikama bhu muelu ua kimbaka, ni adiakimi, bhenhobho exi: Tu jimbangi muene. O Jihova a bhangese kuila muhatu iú ueza mʼonzo ié a soke ni Lakele ni Liia, a tenene kiiadi kiâ kubhanga o dibhata dia muiji ua Izalaiele. Eie muene ue Bouaji, kala u dikuenze, o Nzambi a ku bhane kuzediua mu Efrata, ni kujinga o dijina mu Beleme." 
Ruth4:12 O dibhata diê di kale mukua ni dibhata dia Peleze, a mu vuala kuala Tamale kua Juda, dibhata dié di sokoloke ku mbutu ia-nda ku ku bhana Jihova kua mona muhatu muenʼiú." 
Ruth4:13 Kienhiki Bouaji u bhenga Lute, anga u kala mukajiʼê. Anga u bokona kua muene, Jihova u mu bhana kuimita, hé u vuala mona ua diiala." 
Ruth4:14 Ahatu anga ambela Nouemi, exi: Jihova a tane-ku! lelu ua ku bhana ndandu iazukama u tena kukala dilemba ni ku ku kula, mbé difundo o dijina diê di kale jinge mua Izalaiele." 
Ruth4:15 A kale mona u ku bhana muenhu uobhe, u ku bhana dingi nguzu mu kukuka kué; kuma mukajiʼa monʼé ua ku zola, muene ua mu vuala; o mukajiʼa monʼé umoxi muenhú sambuadi dia ana a mala ala ndenge." 
Ruth4:16 Nouemi anga u tambula mona, u mu akata bhu jihata, u mu kala kiledi kiê." 
Ruth4:17 Ahatu nʼakuá akua-bhata a di zukama-nê, mu kutana kumoxi ni muene anga a kuata ku mu ila, exi: Nouemi a mu vualela monʼê, anga a mu luka Obede. Muene tata ia Jese, tatʼâ Davidi." 
Ruth4:18 Ingo ia vumu-phe ia Peleze ienhiʼii: Peleze u vuala Hezeloni," 
Ruth4:19 Hezeloni u vuala Halane, Halane u vuala Aminadaba." 
Ruth4:20 Aminadaba u vuala Nasono, Nasono u vuala Salumono," 
Ruth4:21 Salumono u vuala Bouaji, Bouaji u vuala Obede," 
Ruth4:22 Obede u vuala Jese, Jese u vuala Davidi." 
1Samuel1:1 Ku kala muthu mukua Lamataimu dia Zofi, mukua ʼxi ku milundu ia Ifalaime, dijina diê Elikana, monʼa Jelohamu, monʼa Elihu, monʼa Tohu, monʼa Zufu, mukua Ifalaime." 
1Samuel1:2 Muenhú anga u kala ni akajiʼê aiadi; umoxi dijina diê Hana, o mukuá dijina diê Penina. Penina u kala ni anʼê, Hana-phe ka moneka mona." 
1Samuel1:3 Diialʼidi mukua kuila muvu ni muvu uia kubheza Jihova dia ifuẋi, ni ku mu bhakuila jisata mu Silo. O jinganga ja Jihova-phe ia bhobho. Anʼa aiadi a Eli, Hofini ni Finehase, jinganga ja Jihova, bhene bhuala." 
1Samuel1:4 Anga ki bhita kuila, kutula bhu kizuua ki bhana Elikana o sata iê, u uanena Penina ni anʼê a mala ni a ahatu o makânda mâ." 
1Samuel1:5 O Hana-phe u mu bhana mbandu ia mbote; mukonda ua zola Hana, maji-phe Jihova ua mu jika divumu." 
1Samuel1:6 Mukajinʼê anga uia ni ku mu ondolola kiavulu phala ku mu ẋinuna nʼa kale ni dilamba, mukonda Jihova ua mu jika o divumu iu ua lémbua kuvuala." 
1Samuel1:7 O diiala kia kala mu kubhanga kiki mivu ioso, o muhatu u kala ue mu tatesa mukuâ ki aia kʼonzo ia Jihova: mukonda dia kiki muene u kala mu dila, u fula kúdia." 
1Samuel1:8 Bhenhobho-phe Elikana munumiʼê anga u mu ambela, uixi: Eie Hana ua mu didila-hi? ua mu fudila-hi kúdia? ihi kia ku kate ku muẋima? manhi eme ki nga ku kala kota, kuinhi dia mona ndenge?" 
1Samuel1:9 Kienhiki Hana u balumuka mu Silo, kia zubha ene kúdia ni kúnua. Eli-phe, o nganga, bhenhobho, ua xikama bhu kialu kiê bhu ngunji ia tembulu ia Jihova." 
1Samuel1:10 O muhatu mukonda kia mu ludila ku muẋima, u kala mu sambela Jihova, anga u kala mu dila kiavulu." 
1Samuel1:11 Anga u di hambelela, uixi: Jihova dia ifuẋi, se ni kidi kiene u ngi tala o kutata kuami eme ngi mubhikʼé, se u ngi ta muẋima, nʼu kambe ku ngi jimba eme ngi mubhikʼé, phala ki ngalʼiki ngi mubhikʼé u ngi bhane monʼa diiala, eme-phe ngi mu bhana kua Jihova izuua ioso ia muenhu uê, ki kua bhita phoko ia bhutu ku mútue uê." 
1Samuel1:12 Bhenhobho kiala kuenda ni kusamba kiki bhu pholo ia Jihova, Eli ua mu tongolola ku dikanu." 
1Samuel1:13 Kuma Hana uala kuzuela ni muẋima uê, mizumbu ngó iala kuzamba, ki muala kutunda dízui mu kanu diê; mukonda dia kiki, Eli ua mu fika ua kodiua." 
1Samuel1:14 Eli anga u mu ambela, uixi: Mbambe bhebhi, eie bhu ua-nda kusuka ni kukodiua? Vinhu ié tula-iu. I ku bhue kiá ku mesu." 
1Samuel1:15 Hana-phe anga u vutula, uixi: Kana, ngana iami, tata! Ngi muhatu ua mukua malamba; ki nga nu, né ngó vinhu, mba kúnua kuengi kuoso-kuoso ku kodiuisa; maji nga mu lunduluila o muenhu uami bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
1Samuel1:16 Mubhikʼé ua muhatu ku mu fike-phe uixi monʼa kadia-phemba; mukonda dia ku di tenda kuami kuavulu, ni kutata kua ngi tatesa kinene, kuene ku nga kuata kuzuelela kiki katé kindala." 
1Samuel1:17 Bhenhobho Eli u mu kumbulula, uixi: Ndeie ni kutululuka, Nzambi ia Izalaiele a ku bhane ujitu uoso u ua mu bhingi," 
1Samuel1:18 Hana anga u mu vutuila, uixi: Ngi sange kiadi ku mesu mé, eme ngi mubhikʼé ua muhatu. Muhatu anga u ila njila iê, u kala mu kudia kiá; pholo iê ki ia di suuata dingi ni malamba." 
1Samuel1:19 Ki kúkia a di meneka, a bheza bhu pholo ia Jihova, anga a vutuka ku bhata diâ ku Lama. Elikana anga u ijiia mukajiʼê Hana, Jihova phe anga u ta muẋima kua Hana u mu lembalala dingi," 
1Samuel1:20 kubhiẋila bhu thembu iê, Hana anga u imita u vuala monʼa diiala; anga u mu luka dijina dia Samuuele, uixi: Mukonda nga mu bhingi kua Jihova." 
1Samuel1:21 Diialʼidi, Elikana, ni dibhata diê dioso, anga a banda kua Jihova mu ku mu satela, kala ki ene mu banga mivu ioso, ni kukumbidila o polomesa iê." 
1Samuel1:22 Hana-phe u fula kubanda; kuma uambela munumʼie, uixi: Eme ki ngi bande luua, katé mona kia sumuka; o kia sumuka-phe kiene ki ngi mu ambata phala ni ngi mu bhakule bhu pholo ia Jihova, nʼa kalelè-ku kiá kuenhoko." 
1Samuel1:23 Elikana munumʼiê anga u mu ambela, uixi: Bhanga kioso kia ku uabhela ki ua mono kia beta kuiuka; xala kunu katé kioso ki u mu sumuna; Jihova phe a kolese ngó o kizuelu kié ki ua zuela. Muhatu anga u xala ku bhata, u amuisa monʼê katé kia mu sumuna." 
1Samuel1:24 Kia zubha ku mu sumuna anga u banda ni mona, ni ngalote jitatu ja ngombe ja kiubha, ni kinda kia fuba, ni kisudi kia vinhu, anga u mu bheka ku inzu ia Jihova mu Silo; kienhokio kambonga kene, hanji ala monʼa uisu." 
1Samuel1:25 Anga a jibha ngalote ia ngombe, hé mona a mu bheka kienhiki kua Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Ana anga u zuela, uixi: Eué! Ngana iami kia kidi kiene kala eie ki uala ni muenhu ué moxi, kuma eme-muene ngi muhatu ió ua kexile bhabha ni eie mù sambela Jihova." 
1Samuel1:27 Nga sambelele ku ngi bhana mona muenʼiú; Jihova iú ua ngi bhana ujitu uoso u nga mu bhingile. 
1Samuel1:28 Mukonda dia kiki, eme uami nga mu lumbila Jihova, katé bhuoso bhua kà suka o muenhu uê. Ukala muthu uangene ua Jihova, mukonda ko kuê kuene ku nga mu bhingi. Anga u bheza Nzambi bhenhobho." 
1Samuel2:1 Hana bhenhobho anga u samba, uixi: Muẋima uami ua tanena kua Jihova; pholo iami ia zangalala mua Jihova; dikanu diami u sanga dia kulu mu kuolela o jinguma jami; mukonda nga sangulukila mu kubhuluka ku tunda kokuê." 
1Samuel2:2 Ua kambe ituxi kala Jihova ka moneka, kuma eie u Nzambi ku moneka mukuenu a ku fika-nê; kana-ku ndánji iengi i soka ni Nzambi ietu." 
1Samuel2:3 Kana kuvudisa dingi kuzuela kuenu kua ukumbu, ki mu tunde dingi ima ia izala mu kanu dienu, kuma Jihova muene Nzambi ia unjimu ni kuijiia, ima i bhanga athu Muene uene ku i pezala ku dipezalelu" 
1Samuel2:4 Mifula ia mazonda i bukujuka, a kexile kiá mu ku di bhukajana-phe a a zuika ni nguzu iengi." 
1Samuel2:5 Oso ekutile lelu ʼidi aii ku di umba mu sota kia kúdia, a kexile ni nzala a nhoha-ku kuma ekuta. Katé ni kisula uavuala sambuadi dia mona, o kivadi kia ana avulu leluʼidi ua zoza," 
1Samuel2:6 Jihova muene u katula o muenhu, muene u bhana o muenhu; u tulula athu katé mu mbila, anga u balumuna athu kuʼalunga." 
1Samuel2:7 Jihova u bheka muthu mu uadiama, o ngadiama u mu bheka mu umonhi; u sebukisa muthu, u bhana muthu kijingo." 
1Samuel2:8 U zangumuna o ngadiama mu mavu, u katula phulungu bhu dixita nʼa mu xikamesa ni anʼa jingana phala a lundule kiandu kia fuma; kuma o jiphiladi ja ixi, jangene ja Jihova, o Ngongo ua i xikika ku thandu diâ." 
1Samuel2:9 Muene u langa inama ia athuʼê abhu o ituxi; o a ta ituxi-phe u a bheka muʼalunga mua vundu, anga muenhomo a di xibha muene hudi! kuma nguzu ki iene i lendesa muthu nʼa tundu akuâ." 
1Samuel2:10 Oso a bhânga ni Jihova a kà tolojoka; muene u a numinina tunde mu diulu. Jihova uà fúndisa maẋokololo a jixi. Sobha iê ua kà mu bhana o nguzu ni kutumina ua kà zangeleka o kutena kua muthu uê ua mu undu ni maji. 
1Samuel2:11 Kiabhiti imʼiii Elikana anga uia ku Lama ku bhata diê. O mona u xala mu xibhidila Jihova bhu pholo ia Eli, o Nganga." 
1Samuel2:12 Anʼa Eli-phe, a mala, anga a sekala kiavulu kuma a kexile anʼa kadiaphemba; a lembua kuijiia ngó Jihova." 
1Samuel2:13 Mukonda o kífua kia kexileku ni jinganga ni mundu, muthu uoso kia bheka sata, selevende ia nganga u tula, kioso kiala kufuluka o xitu mʼombia, ni ngalufu iê ia mazu atatu bhu lukuaku luê," 
1Samuel2:14 anga a toma na-iu mu mbasinha, mba mombia, mba mu kalelá, mba mu kienga mualu kanga o xitu, ioso kiá ia zaula ni ngalufu iii, nganga u i tambula, i kala iê. Kiene kia kexi mu bhanga bhu Silo, ku akua Izalaiele oso a kexi mu kuiza-bhu." 
1Samuel2:15 Kioso ue kiluua a ximika o banha, selevende ia nganga uiza ku muthu uoso ua sate, uixi: Beka xitu iii phala nganga, iê ia kuzuza; mukonda muene kokué ka mesena-ku xitu iólambe, ua mesena ia uisu." 
1Samuel2:16 Muthu-phe se u kumbulula, uixi; A diange hanji kuximika o banha, phala u katule kiua kioso kia Seme o muẋima ué; muene-phe uila, uixi: Kana, nguamiʼ ʼami! U ngi bhane-iu kiá kindala muene, o ki uila kana, ngi i tambula mu nguzu." 
1Samuel2:17 O kituxi kia minzangala iii anga ki vula dingi kinéne bhu pholo ia Jihova, kuma mala enhá a tobhesa jinga o sata ia Jihova." 
1Samuel2:18 Samuuele anga u kala mu xibhidila bhu pholo ia Jihova, hanji monandenge muene, ua zuata efodi ia linhu." 
1Samuel2:19 Manhʼiâ anga u mu tungila kambinza, uia ni ku mu bhekela-ku, kuiza muvu kiene, kuiza muvu kiene, kieza jinga ni munumʼiê ku sata iene mu bhana ku mivu ioso." 
1Samuel2:20 Eli anga u benzela Elikana ni mukajiʼê, uixi: Jihova a ku bhane mbutu ku muhatu iú, bhu kididi kia ujitu ua bhingile muene kua Jihova. Anga aia ku bhata diâ." 
1Samuel2:21 Jihova anga u bhana dibesá kua Hana, muene u imita, anga u vuala anʼatatu a mala, ni anʼaiadi a ahatu. Kamona Samuuele anga u kala mu kudila bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
1Samuel2:22 Kiki-phe Eli ua kuka kiá kiavulu; anga u ivua ioso iala mu bhanga anʼê ku akua Izalaiele oso, ni kioso anʼê ki ala mu zeka ni ahatu ene mu bhongoloka bhu muelu ua balaka ia ditakanenu mu kubhanga kikalakalu." 
1Samuel2:23 Anga ua: ambela, uixi: Enu mua-lu bhangela-hi ima kala iii? Mukonda o ima iaiibha i mua-lu bhanga, ngala ku ivua ku mundu uoso." 
1Samuel2:24 Kana tata, anʼami! Fuma iii i ngala ku mʼivua na-iu ki ia uabha; mundu uangene ua Jihova muala ku a tondalesa." 
1Samuel2:25 Muthu se u ta kituxi kua mukuâ, Nzambi u mu fundisa; muthu-phe se u ta kituxi kua Jihova, u mu zuelela nanhi? Sumbala tatâ ua zuela kiki, maji ene kʼevu dízui dia tatʼâ, mukonda Jihova ua mesena kiá ku a jibha." 
1Samuel2:26 Mona Samuuele anga uia ni kukula, ni kuuabhela Jihova, ni kuuabhela ue athu." 
1Samuel2:27 Anga kuiza muthu mukua Nzambi kua Eli, uixi: Eme Jihova uambe kiki: Kifua, ni kidi muene, ki nga di tukuluile ku dibhata dia tatʼenu, kia kexile hanji mu Ijitu mu ubhika ku mbanza ia Falaó?" 
1Samuel2:28 Kʼeme nga mu solo muene mu miiji ioso ia Izalaiele mu ku kala nganga iami ia kubanda bhu kalatódio kami, ni kubhanga fumasa ia uasu ua dizumba, ni kuzuata efodi bhu pholo iami? Kʼeme nga bhana dibhata dia tatʼenu o jisata joso ja anʼa Izalaiele ja kuoha mu túbhia?" 
1Samuel2:29 Muala kudiotela-hi bhoxi ni kutitidila jinga o jisata jami ni ilumbu iami, ia kijila ki nga bhana kubhangela mʼonzo iami, anga ki bhinga anʼé eie u beta ku a xila, eme ndenge, hé mu di netesa enʼuenu ni kutuama kutambula jixitu jambote ku jisata joso ja mundu uami ua Izalaiele." 
1Samuel2:30 Mukonda dia kiki Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele uambe, uixi: Nga ki ambele muene ngixi o dibhata dié ni dibhata dia tatʼenu, dià xalela-ku kiá mu kuimajana jinga ni kubhanga ujitu bhu pholo iami; maji kiki-phe, eme Jihova, ki ngʼambeleʼokio nga ki texi dikanga; kuma oso a ngi xila eme, ene uâ eme ngʼa xila, oso-phe a ngi tènde, a kà jingunuka katé kia sebuluka muene." 
1Samuel2:31 Talesa, kua-nda kuiza izuua, nga kà ku batula lukuaku lué, ni lukuaku lua dibhata dia tatʼenu, mu bhata dié ki mua moneka dingi muadiakimi ua kuka." 
1Samuel2:32 Ua kà mona divuua mʼonzo ié, anga uà kala ni luimbi muʼaxaxi ka jimbote joso ji ngi bhanga Izalaiele; maji eie ku izuua ioso mu bhata dié ki mua kà moneka muadiakimi." 
1Samuel2:33 Uoso diiala momué nga kà kamba ku mu batula bhu kalatódio kami, ua kà kala muthu ua ku ku jidisa mesu, ni ku ku tatesa muẋima moxi; oso a sokoloka mu bhata dié, a kà fuila mu kubhiẋila ngó ku ukota." 
1Samuel2:34 Kijimbuete kiki kia ku idikiza, kia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia anʼé aiadi Hofini ni Finehase; a kà fuila kizuua kimoxi ene oso kiiadi kiâ." 
1Samuel2:35 Nga kà zangeleka nganga iami iengi ia fiiele, uà kala muthu ua kukumbidila ioso ia ngi kala ku muẋima ni mu kilunji kiami; muene nga ka mu tungila dibhata diakolo, uà kala mu kuenda jinga bhu pholo ia muthu uami nga mʼundu ni maji sé dizubhilu." 
1Samuel2:36 Kia kà bhita-phe kuma, uoso uà kà subhuka mu dibhata dienu, uà keza ku mu fukamena muene, mu ku mu bhinga kakitadi ka phalata ni kadikende ka mbolo; hé ua kèla kuma: Nga ku diondo, ngi te bhu kididi kia kukalakala ku unganga, phala eme ue ngi tene kumona-ku kakibhasu ka mbolo, ngi die ka dikoka." 
1Samuel3:1 Mona Samuuele anga u kala mu xibhidila Jihova bhu pholo ia Eli. Kizuelu kia Jihova ki kia vudile ku kʼivua mu izuuʼomo; kana-ku ue kisukila kia di monekena jinga luavulu. 
1Samuel3:2 Thembu ienʼoio-phe ki bhita kuila, kioso kia zeka Eli bhu kididi kiê, kuma mu mesu mua mu kala kiá kavunda, kala kumona dingi kiambote;" 
1Samuel3:3 kioso kandeia ka Nzambi kiluua ka jima, Samuuele-phe ua zeka kiá bhu kididi kiê mu tembulu ia Jihova, bhuala álaka ia Nzambi;" 
1Samuel3:4 Jihova u ixana Samuuele; muene-phe anga u itaia, uixi: Emʼiú." 
1Samuel3:5 Anga u lengela kua Eli, uixi: Emʼiú; kuma ua ngʼixana. Kuala Eli: Ki nga ku ixana; kazekié dingi. Muene anga uia, u zeka." 
1Samuel3:6 Jihova anga u mu ixana luamukuá, uixi: Samuuele. Samuuele anga u balumuka, uia kua Eli, uixi: Emʼiú; kuma eie uaʼngʼixana. Kuala muene: Ki nga ku ixana, monʼami; ka zekié dingi." 
1Samuel3:7 Samuuele-phe kejidile luua Jihova, kuma katé kienhókio kiluua kizuelu kia Jihova ki mu tukulukila." 
1Samuel3:8 Jihova anga u ixana Samuuele lua katatu. Anga u balumuka, uia kua Eli, uixi: Emʼiú; kuma ua-lu ngʼixana. Eli anga u tongolola kuma Jihova muene uala kuixana mona." 
1Samuel3:9 Kienhiki Eli u ambela Samuuele, uixi: Ndeie, kà zekié; o ki kala-phe u ivua ua ku ixana dingi, ua kèla: Zuela, Jihova; mubhikʼé iú uivʼú. Bhenhobho Samuuele uia, u zeka bhu kididi kiê." 
1Samuel3:10 Jihova anga uiza, u imana, u ixana Samuuele kala kia bhangele kiá lutatu lua dianga, uixi: Samuuele, Samuuele. Samuuele bhenhobho uixi: Zuela, Ngana, mubhikʼé iú uivʼú." 
1Samuel3:11 Jihova anga u ambela Samuuele uixi: Talesa nga-nda kubhanga kima mu Izalaiele, kia bhinga uoso u kʼivua mátui mê maiadi moso ma mu titila." 
1Samuel3:12 Kuma bhu kizuua kienʼokio ngà kumbidila kua Eli ioso i nga mu tangela ia dibhata diê, tunde bhu ngi mu andekela katé bhu ngi mu zubhila." 
1Samuel3:13 Mukonda nga mu tangela kiá kuila dibhata diê ngi di êlesa ku mivu sé dizubhilu, mukonda dia kutondala kuejiia muene, mbata anʼê a di bhange ifusa, muenephe ua tokoka o ku a bazela ni kua fudisa." 
1Samuel3:14 Mu kienhiki nga lokela o dibhata dia Eli, kuma o kutondala kua dibhata dia Eli kà ka tena ku ku bhuisa ni jisata ni ilumbu mu mivu ni mivu sé dizubhilu." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuuele anga u zeka katé kuáki, anga u jikula mabhitu a inzo ia Jihova. Samuuele anga ukala ni uoma ua kutangela Eli kioso kia di uana." 
1Samuel3:16 Eli anga u ixana Samuuele, uixi: Samuuele, monʼami. Muene uixi: Emʼiú." 
1Samuel3:17 Uixi: Kima kiahi kia ku tangela Jihova? Nga ku diondo, kana ku ngi suekela-kiu; Nzambi a ku bhange-kiu, a ku tele-ku dingi ku kaxitiku, se eie u ngi suekela kima, anga u kamba ku ngi tangela ioso ia ku ambela muene." 
1Samuel3:18 Samuuele anga u mu tangela maka moso, ka xi-ku dingi kima. Eli anga u zuela, uixi: Muene Jihova, a bhange kiá kioso kia mono kiauabha ku mesu mê." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuuele anga uia ni ku kula, Jihova anga u kala-nê, kehela maka-mê moso-moso kuláuka bhoxi." 
1Samuel3:20 Izalaiele ioso anga a tuma ku kʼijiia, tunde ku Dani katé ku Beele-seba, kuma Samuuele a mu xikika mu kukala polofeta ia Jihova." 
1Samuel3:21 Jihova anga uenda ni kumoneka jinga dingi mu Silo; kuma Jihova ua di tukuluila jinga kua Samuuele, mu kizuelu kiê kia mu zuelesa jinga na-kiu Jihova muene." 
1Samuel4:1 Izalaiele-phe anga a tunda mu kúlua ita ni akua Fidíxia, anga a ta kibangu kiâ bhu mbandu ia Ebenezele; akua Fidíxia-phe a ta kibangu kiâ bhu Afeke." 
1Samuel4:2 Akua Fidíxia anga a di ta ku minonono mu kúlua ni Izalaiele; o kia salumuka o ita, Izalaiele a a kaia kuala akua Fidíxia; kuma o ku kilômbo kiâ a jibha-ku midi jiuana ja mala." 
1Samuel4:3 O mundu kia zubha kubhongoloka dingi bhu kibangu kiâ, adiakime a Izalaiele, exi: Phala-hi Jihova ua tu beta lelu bhu pholo ia akua Fidíxia? Tu takanienu álaka ia kikutu kia Jihova ku Silo, tu i bheke kunu muʼaxaxi ketu, phala i tu bhulule bhu maku ma jinguma jetu." 
1Samuel4:4 Kienhiki mundu a tuma athu ku Silo, anga a takana kuenhoko o álaka ia kikutu kia Jihova dia ifuẋi, uene kuxikama muʼaxaxi ka jixelube; anʼ aiadiphe a Eli, Hofini ni Finehase, anga ejiia kumoxi ni álaka ia kikutu kia Nzambi" 
1Samuel4:5 Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha álaka ia kikutu kia Jihova kutula bhu kibangu, Izalaiele ioso a sanguluka kiavulu anga a dikola ni nguzu, mu ngongo ioso anga mu dʼitaia dingi!" 
1Samuel4:6 Akua Fidíxia ki evu o kudikola, exi: Kuku kudikola kuahi kuavulu kuala kutunda bhu kibangu kia Jihebeleu? Anga a kʼivua kuma álaka ia Jihova ieza bhu kibangu." 
1Samuel4:7 Akua Fidíxia anga a kala ni uoma, kuma exi: Nzambi ueza bhu kibangu. Anga ela, exi: Kokolo dietu! Kiluua ku kala kima kala kiki!" 
1Samuel4:8 Kokolo dietu! Nanhi u tu kudila bhu maku a jinzambi jiji jasuina? Jiji jene o jinzambi ja betele akua Ijitu ni mabhebhu moso mu kikangalakata. 
1Samuel4:9 Kolenu maku, mu bhange ukuenze, mu akua Fidíxia, phala ki mu kale mu abhika a Jihebeleu, kala ene kia kexile abhikʼenu; uene-phe kiá o uialʼú, bhângenu muene." 
1Samuel4:10 Akua Fidíxia anga a bhânga ni nguzu ioso, a beta Izalaiele, ene anga a lengela kala muthu ku bhata diê. Anga bhu bhita kihaẋi kia dikota, kuma ku mbandu ia Izalaiele kua dibhale makuinhi atatu a midi ia muthu akua kuenda bhoxi." 
1Samuel4:11 Alaka ia Nzambi anga a i tambula; anʼaiadi a Eli, Hofini ni Finehase, anga a a jibha." 
1Samuel4:12 Anga bhu kala diiala mukua muiji ua Bejamí, ua tundu ku ita, u bhixila ku Silo kizuua kienhokio, izuatu iê ua i tandujula, ua di te mavu mu mútue." 
1Samuel4:13 Kia zubha kutula, ua sange Eli ua xikama mu kialu kiê bhu mbanduʼa njila, uala mu kinga; kuma muẋima uê uala mu teketa mukonda dia kulalamena o álaka ia Nzambi. Kia tula o diialʼidi bhu sanzala, anga u a kunda imʼii, sanzala ioso ia di te muzonga ua kudila." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli ki evu o dízui dia kudila, uixi: Kima kiahi kia bheka o kudila kuosʼuku? O diialʼidi anga uiza ni lusolo, u lenguluka kubhiẋila bhuala Eli, anga u mu tudila jimene joso." 
1Samuel4:15 Eli-phe kiene kialʼiki, uala kía mu makuinhʼivua a mivu ni nake; mesuʼê akolo kiá, muene ka-lu tena kumona dingi." 
1Samuel4:16 O diialʼidi anga u jimbuila Eli, uixi: Eme muene nga tundu ku ita, lelu muene eme nga lenge ku ita." 
1Samuel4:17 Eli uixi-phe: Kia bhiti kiebhi, monʼami? Uoso ueza kutula njimbu anga u kumbulula, uixi: Kua tema! Izalaiele a a kaie lelu kuala akua Fidíxia; kua bhiti kihaẋi kia dikota ku mundu, o anʼé aiadi Hofini ni Finehase a a jibha, álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula." 
1Samuel4:18 Bhenhobho anga ki bhita kuila, kia mu ivu kujimbula kuila álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula, Eli u di bhala ni dima ku kialu kua xikama bhu mbandu ia muelu; anga u toloka o xingu, ufua; kuma ua kuka kiá muene kiavulu, iú ua neme. Muene ua fundisa Izalaiele mu makuinhi auana a mivu." 
1Samuel4:19 Mukajiʼa monʼê-phe, muhatuʼa Finehase, u kala ni divumu, kua mu kambe ngó kudisanza; muene ki evu njimbu kuila álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula, ukouʼé uafu, munumeʼê uafu, u bulukuta hé u vuala, kuma mika iê ia mu kuatela muʼanzanzʼumu bhenhobho." 
1Samuel4:20 Kithangana kia kala mu kúfua, ahatu nʼakuá a mu kondoloka a mu ambela, exi: Ku kale ni kikote, ua disanze monʼé ua diiala. Muene-phe ka vutula, mukonda ka ki suu dingi kuma uaii kiá ku kiambu." 
1Samuel4:21 Mona anga u mu luka Ikabode, kuma uixi: Kijingo kia tundu kiá mu Izalaiele, mukonda ue dia álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula, ni mukonda ue dia ukouʼê ni munumeʼê." 
1Samuel4:22 Xi! Uixi: Mukonda álaka ia Nzambi a i tambula, kijingo kia tundu kiá mua Izalaiele ki kiala-mu dingi." 
1Samuel5:1 Kiki-phe akua Fidíxia a tambula álaka ia Nzambi, a tunda na-iu bhu Ebenezele, hé a i bheka ku Ajindode." 
1Samuel5:2 Akua Fidíxia anga a kuata álaka ia Nzambi, ai ta mʼonzo ia Dangoni, hé a i tula bhu mbandu ia Dangoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Ki kúkia ni kimeme, akua Ajindode kia balumuka, a sanga Dangoni ua dibhale pholo bhoxi, bhu pholo ia álaka ia Jihova. Anga a bhetula Dangoni, a mu imika dingi bhu kididi kiê." 
1Samuel5:4 Kia balumuka dingi mu kimene, kizuua kia mukuá a sanga Dangoni ua dibhale pholo bhoxi, bhu pholo ia álaka ia Jihova; ni mútue ua Dangoni, ni makanda mê ma maku a batukila bhu phidika ia muelu bhua di bhalela, Dangoni ua subhuka ngó ni mbunda iê." 
1Samuel5:5 Mukonda dia kiki jinganga ja Dangoni, ni athu oso a bokona mʼonzo ia Dangoni, mu Ajindode, kene mu diota bhu phidika ia muelu uê, katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
1Samuel5:6 O lukuaku lua Jihova phe anga lu nemena ku thandu dia akua Ajindodi, anga ua buikisa ni mabhumbu a bheka jifidila ku mataku, kutale mu Ajindodi, uixi mu mabhata mê moso." 
1Samuel5:7 O mala ma akua Ajindode kia zubha ku ki mona, exi: Alaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele ki i kale dingi bhu bhata dietu, kuma o lukuaku luê lua xixima ku thandu dietu ni ku thandu dia Dangoni nzambi ietu." 
1Samuel5:8 Anga a tuma kubhongolola o jisobha joso ja akua Fidíxia, a ambela, exi: Tu bhanga kiebhi ni álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele? Jisobha anga ji vutula, exi: A i sondolole, a ibheke bhu Ngate." 
1Samuel5:9 Anga a bheka álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele kuenhoko. Kia zubha-phe ku i sondolola, lukuaku lua Jihova lu nemena ku thandu dia akua dibhata koko ni kibuika kia dikota ki kuata uoma; anga Jihova u beta akua bhata, ni jindenge ni makota, aia ni ku tunda mabhumbu ku mukutu mu ididi ia jisonhi." 
1Samuel5:10 Kienhiki a tumikisa álaka ia Nzambi ku Ekolone. Mu kubhiẋila-phe ni álaka ia Nzambi ku Ekolone, akua Ekolone a dikola, exi: A tu bhekela kunu o álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele, mu ku tu jibha etu ni mundu uetu uoso!" 
1Samuel5:11 Mukonda dia kiki a tuma kubhongolola dingi jisobha joso ja akua Fidíxia, exi: Alaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele i tunde mʼoxi ietu, tumenu ku i bheka dingi bhu kididi kiê, kuma o kukamba ku ki bhanga, i tu jibha muene ni mundu uetu uoso. Mukonda o kibuika kia kalunga kia sambuka mu mbanza ioso kia kuata uoma uavulu; lukuaku lua Nzambi lua a nemena ni nguzu ioso." 
1Samuel5:12 Oso a kambe kúfua, a tunda mabhumbu aiibha mu mukutu; anga a bhondalala kinéne, o ngololo iâ anga i banda katé ku diulu." 
1Samuel6:1 Alaka ia Jihova anga i kala mʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia sambuadi dia mbeji. 
1Samuel6:2 Akua Fidíxia anga exana jinganga jâ ni azambuidi, exi: Tu bhanga kiebhi ni alaka ia Jihova? Tu longesienu kioso ki tu i tumikisa ku kididi kiê." 
1Samuel6:3 Ene exi: Se mu tumikisa álaka ia Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ki mu i tumikise ia hatu; ki bhinga muene mu mu vutuila mubhaku ua kudiẋikina mulonga; se mua ki bhange, mu iluka; hé mu kʼijiia kioso kia mu kambesa kukatula luluaku luê ku thandu dienu." 
1Samuel6:4 Ene-phe, exi: Mubhaku ua kudiẋikina mulonga u kala kiebhi, uoso u tu mu vutuila? Exi: Mu iudika mabhumbu matanu ma ulu, ni tundôndo tutanu tua ulu, kifua mu sokesa mu sobha jitanu ja akua Fidíxia, kuma o dibhebhu diene dimoxi dia kexile ku thandu dienu oso ni kuthandu dia jisobha jenu." 
1Samuel6:5 Kienhiki-phe bhangenu idifua ia mabhumbu menu, ni idifua ia tundôndo tuenu kuma jene o jiphuku jala ku mi zangela o ixi; mu bhane o fuma kua Nzambi ia Izalaiele; amoxi se enu mu bhanga kiki, o muene u tebhununa-ku ku kinemenu kia lukuaku luê ku thandu dienu, ni ku thandu dia nzambi ienu, ni ku thandu dia ixi ienu." 
1Samuel6:6 Mu kolela-hi muxima kala kia kolele muxima ua akua Ijitu ni Falaó a kolesele muxima uâ? Muene Nzambi ia Izalaiele, kia bhangele isunji ni madiuanu muʼaxaxi kâ, manhi o mundu uê ka ehele nʼaiá?" 
1Samuel6:7 Kiki-phe mu kuata hé mu iudika dikalu dia ubhe, ni mama jiiadi ja jingombe jala mu kuamuisa, kiluua a ji zuika jungu mu xingu; mua kà kuika jimama ja jingombe ku dikalu, mu a katula anʼâ hé mu a jikila ku bhata mu kibhanga." 
1Samuel6:8 Anga mu katula álaka ia Jihova, mu i tule ku thandu dia dikalu; o makembu ma ulu u muala ku mu vutuila mu mubhaku ua kudiẋikina mulonga, mu ma bhaka mu ngonga bhu mbandu iê; mu i sulule, phala iiê." 
1Samuel6:9 Anga mu tala kiá; se i bandela njila ia mbámbe iê muene katé bhu Bete-seme, tu kʼijiia kuma muene ua tu bhange kiaiibha kiosoʼiki; o ki i kamba kuila njila ioio, tu kʼijiia ue kuma lukuaku lua muene ki luene lua tu kuama, maji kima kiezé ngó kibhûku." 
1Samuel6:10 Mala enhó anga a ki bhanga, a kuata mama jiiadi ja ngombe jala kuamuisa, a ji kuika ku dikalu, a jika anʼâ mu kibhanga ku bhata." 
1Samuel6:11 Anga a ta álaka ia Jihova ku thandu dia dikalu, ni ngonga kumoxi muala tundôndo tua ulu, ni idifua ia mabhumbu mâ kumoxi." 
1Samuel6:12 Jingombe anga ji kuata njila iaiuka ditônono, njila ia Bete-seme; jela muene mu ikoka, ji jʼenda ji dila, né ku kiasu né ku kúdia ki ja bhambukila bhuma; jisobha ja akua Fidíxia anga jiia ni kukaiela katé bhu mbámbe ia Beteseme." 
1Samuel6:13 Ene-phe akua Bete-seme a kala mu muna tiliku iâ mu honga izuua ienhoio; o kia zambula mesu, a mona álaka iala mu kuiza, anga a sanguluka mu ku i mona." 
1Samuel6:14 Dikalu anga di bhixila mu díbhia dia Josuué mukua Beteseme, anga dʼimana-phe bhenhobho bhuala ditadi dia dikota. Anga a bhasa dikalu, a di bhanga jihuinhi hé a jibha jingombe, a ji oha mu túbhia, mu ku ji satela Jihova." 
1Samuel6:15 Jilevita anga ji tulula álaka ia Jihova, ni ngonga iala na-iu kumoxi, muala ima ia ulu, anga a i tula ku ditadi dia dikota dienhodio; akua Bete-seme anga a bhana jisata ja kuoha, a bhakula ni ilumbu iamukuá kizuua kienhokio kua Jihova," 
1Samuel6:16 O jisobha jitanu ja akua Fidíxia, kia zubha ku ki mona mesu, a vutuka kizuua kienhokio ku Ekolone." 
1Samuel6:17 Ene o mabhumbu ma ulu ma vutula akua Fidíxia, mu kudiẋikina mulonga kua Jihova a ma bhana Ajindodi dimoxi, Ngaza dimoxi, Axikilone dimoxi, Ngata dimoxi, Ekolone dimoxi;" 
1Samuel6:18 ni tundôndo tua ulu, a tu sokesa ni konda ia jimbanza ja akua Fidíxia, ja tokala o sobha jâ jitanu, ni jimbanza jóxite ni imbaka, ni jisanzala jâ ku matutu, katé bhu ditadi dia dikota bhua tula álaka ia Jihova; o ditadi diene didié hanji katé mu kizuua kia lelu, mu díbhia dia Josuúé mukua Bete-seme." 
1Samuel6:19 Muene Jihova anga u beta akua Bete-seme, mukonda a zongola moxi dia álaka ia Jihova; ku mundu anga u betaku makuinhi sambuadi a muthu, ene oso makota mʼathu; mundu anga a kala mu dila mukonda Jihova ua a beta ni kibetu kiavulu." 
1Samuel6:20 Akua Bete-seme anga a zuela, exi: Nanhi u tena kuimana bhu pholo ia Jihova Nzambi i kôla kiki? O muene kutunda bho-bhuetuʼabha, uia kua nanhi?" 
1Samuel6:21 Anga a tuma jiphunga ku akua Kidiate-jadime a ambela, exi: Akua Fidíxia-ze a bheka dingi álaka ia Jihova; kulumukenu kunu, mu i takane, iie bhu bhata dienu." 
1Samuel7:1 Kienhokio mala a akua Kidiate-Jadime anga eza, a takana álaka ia Jihova, a i bheka mʼonzo ia Abinadabe bhu kalundu mu Ngabahe, anga a lumbila monʼê Eliiazale phala kulanga o álaka ia Jihova." 
1Samuel7:2 A nga ki bhita kuila, tunde kizuua kia tula álaka mu Kidiate-Jadime, thembu iê i lebha, kuma bhua bhiti makuinhi aiadi a mivu; muiji uoso ua Izalaiele aia ni ku ditata anga akala mu didila Jihova." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuuele anga u zuela ni muiji uoso ua Izalaiele, uixi: Se muedi mu vutuka kua Jihova ni muẋima uenu uoso, hé mu tubhula jinzambi ja matumbu ni Axitalote muʼaxaxi kenu, ni mu lunge mixima ienu kua Jihova, ni mu mu bhikile muene ngó ubheka uê; muene-phe u mi kudila bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel7:4 Kienhokio anʼa Izalaiele anga a tubhula ni Jibaale ni Axitalote, a kala mu bhikila ngó Jihova ubheka uê." 
1Samuel7:5 Samuuele anga u zuela dingi, uixi: Bhongololenu Izalaiele ioso bhu Mixipa, phala eme ngi mi sambele kua Jihova." 
1Samuel7:6 Anga a bhongoloka bhu Mixipa, a teka menha, a ma lunduluila bhu pholo ia Jihova, a fula kúdia kizuua kienhókio, a fisala, exi: Tua te ituxi kua Jihova. Samuuele anga u kala mu fundisa anʼa Izalaiele bhu Mixipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Akua Fidíxia-phe ki evu kuila anʼa Izalaiele a bhongolokela bhu Mixipa, jisobha ja akua Fidíxia ji tunda mu kúlua ni Izalaiele. Anʼa Izalaiele kia kʼivu a kala ni uoma ua akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel7:8 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ambela Samuuele, exi: Kana kuzumbuka ku tu kolela kua Jihova Nzambi ietu, phala a tu bhulule bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel7:9 Samuuele anga u kuata kambudi hanji kala mu kuámua, u ka bhana mu sata ia muvimba ia kuoha kua Jihova; Samuuele anga udikola ubhingila Izalaiele kua Jihova; Jihova anga u itaia." 
1Samuel7:10 Anga ki bhita kuila, kiosuʼiki Samuuele kiala kubhana o sata ia kuoha, akua Fidíxia a tula, eza mu kúlua ni Izalaiele; Jihova-phe u numina kizuua kienokio ni kinuminu kia dízui diê dia dikota ku thandu dia akua Fidíxia, hé ua dimbulula ni uoma uavulu a lenga malusolo; anga a toloka bhu pholo ia akua Izalaiele." 
1Samuel7:11 Mala ma Izalaiele-phe anga a tunda bhu Mixipa a kaia akua Fidíxia, a a beta, katé mu honga, mu luiji lua Betekale." 
1Samuel7:12 Samuuele anga u katula ditadi u dʼimika bhu kaẋi ka Mixipa ni Sene, anga u di luka dijina dia Ebenezele, kífua uixi: Katé bhu tuezʼabha, Jihova muene ua tu kuatekesa." 
1Samuel7:13 Kienhiki akua Fidíxia a toloka, ka somboka dingi mbámbe ia Izalaiele; o Lukuaku lua Jihova anga lu kala ku thandu dia akua Fidíxia izuua ioso ia Samuuele." 
1Samuel7:14 Mabhata moso ma Izalaiele ma tambuile kuala akua Fidíxia, anga a ma vutula eza dingi kua Izalaiele, tunde ku Ekolone katé ku Ngata; mbámbe iê ioso Izalaiele ua i tambula dingi bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia. Anga bhu kala kutululuka ni kubatama muʼaxaxi ka Izalaiele ni akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuuele anga u kala mufundixi ua kufúndisa Izalaiele izuua ioso ia muenhu uê. 
1Samuel7:16 Mivu ioso ua kexe mu kuila u kondoloka ku Betele ni ku Jidingale ni ku Mixipa; anga u fúndisa Izalaiele mu ididi ioso ioio. 
1Samuel7:17 Mu kuvutuka-phe uiza bhu Lama, kuma bhene bhu bhata diê bhua kexi Inzu iê; anga u fundisa jinga Izalaiele bhenhobho; anga u tungila-bhu kalatódio kua Jihova." 
1Samuel8:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, ku izuua iavulu-phe, Samuuele kuila ua kuka kiá, u bhangesa anʼê kukala afundixi a Izalaiele." 
1Samuel8:2 Thungunu iê dijina diê Jouele, o kiúbha kiê Abiia; anga a kala afundixi mu Beleseba." 
1Samuel8:3 Anʼé-phe anga a fula kuendela mu njila jê, a bhambukila mu luimbi lua kuinda nganhu ia mangonha, a tambula kitadi kia a felesela jinga, milonga anga aia ni ku i bhengelekela muengi." 
1Samuel8:4 Kienhokio adiakimi oso a Izalaiele a di bhongolola kumoxi, hé eza kua Samuuele bhu Lama;" 
1Samuel8:5 anga a mu ambela, exi: Talesa, eie ua kuka kiá, o anʼê-phe kala kuendela mu njila jê. Tu ialesele sobha ietu, i kala mu tu fúndisa kala mu jixi jamukuá." 
1Samuel8:6 Hundu ienhiʼii-phe i iibhila Samuuele, ki edi, exi: Tu bhane sobha ietu i tu fundise. Samuuele anga u samba kua Jihova." 
1Samuel8:7 Jihova anga u ambela Samuuele, uixi: A evue; dízui dia mundu ku di tènde, mu ioso ia ku ambela; kuma ki eie a ku ditunu, a ngi ditunu Eme, mbé ki ngi kale dingi ngi sobha iâ." 
1Samuel8:8 Kia kaiela mu imbamba iâ ioso iene kubhanga, tunde kizuua ki nga a katula mu Ijito katé kizuua kia lelu, kuma a ngi baluka, a bhikila nzambi jengi, eie ue kiene kiala ku ku bhanga." 
1Samuel8:9 Kiki-phe a evue dizui diâ; maji eie-phe ua a ambela kidi kioso, u a lomboluela ni muanu kioso kia-ndu kala o utuminu ua sobha iâ, uoso anda ku mu hingisa." 
1Samuel8:10 Samuuele anga u kunda mundu uoso a mu bhingi sobha, o maka mosuʼama ma Jihova." 
1Samuel8:11 Anga uamba, uixi: Sobha mua-nda ku mu hingisa, utuminu uê uà kala kiki: U mi tambula anʼenu a mala, ua a bhanga makuenze ma makalu mê ma ita, ni ma jikabalo jê, a kala makuenze mê ma kusonguela o makalu mê ma ita." 
1Samuel8:12 Momuenu ua kà tumbika-mu jikabhitangu jitumina jimidi, ji tumina makuinhi atanu; amoxi ua a tuma kudima mavuʼê, ni kumuna jimbutu jê, kusula jifelu jê ja ita, ni jifelu jê ja makalu." 
1Samuel8:13 Anʼenu a ahatu ue ua kà a tambula mu kala jikidiiada jê ja kuiudika nguendu ia dizumba, ni ja ku mu lambela, ni ja ku mu bhangela jimbolo." 
1Samuel8:14 Ni mábhia menu, ni mivide i mua phaphe, ni midiva, ioso ia uabhabhu u i tambula u i bhana jiselevende jê." 
1Samuel8:15 Ni jimbutu jenu, ni mivide ienu, u mi tambula-ku dijimu diê, hé u bhana ku jikabhitangu jê ni jiselevende jê." 
1Samuel8:16 U mi tambula ue abhikʼenu a mala ni abhikenu a ahatu, ni minzangala ienu iadisanze-mu kiambote, ni jibûlu jenu, hé u a tuma mu sedivisu iê." 
1Samuel8:17 Ku ibhaku ienu u tambula-ku dijimu; enʼuenu mu kala mu kala mu abhikʼê. 
1Samuel8:18 Mua kà dikola kizuua kienokio, mukonda dia sobha ienu mua mu solele; Jihova-phe ka kà mi vutuila kizuua kienokio." 
1Samuel8:19 Mundu-phe aditunu dízui dia Samuuele; exi: Kana; tu kala muene ni sobha i tu tumina," 
1Samuel8:20 phala tu sokele ni akua jixi jamukuá, sobha ietu nʼa kale mu tu fundisa, a tu kale ue ku pholo, a tu bhângele mu ita." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuuele anga u ivua maka mosoʼama, u ma kundila mu mátui ma Jihova." 
1Samuel8:22 Jihova anga ambela Samuuele, uixi: A évue dízui diâ, u a ialesele sobha, i kale mu ku a tumina. Samuuele anga u ambela mala ma Izalaiele, uixi: Muanganenu kala muthu ku bhata diê." 
1Samuel9:1 Kienhiki ku kala muthu, mukua Bejamí, dijina diê Kiji, monʼa Abiiele, monʼa Zelodi, monʼa Bekolate, monʼa Afiia, mukua muiji ua Bejamí, diiala dia nguzu." 
1Samuel9:2 Muenhú anga u kala ni monʼê ua diiala, dijina diê Saúlo, munzangala ua uabha iu uadisanze kiambote; muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Izalaiele kanamu muthu ua mu tundu mu kuuabha ni kudisanza, o mu kitala mundu uoso a mu suku ngó bhu isuxi." 
1Samuel9:3 Tatʼâ Kiji anga u kala ni jibûlu ja mu jimbila. Kiji anga u ambela monʼê Saúlo, uixi: Katula muthu ku akua mbèle, uie-nê, mu kulumuke, mu-ie mu sota o jibûlu." 
1Samuel9:4 Anga u bhita mu milundu mu ixi ia Ifalaime, u bhita mʼoxi ia Saliza, maji ka ji mono; anga a bhita dingi mʼoxi ia Salime, maji ue ki ja moneka-mu; anga u bhita dingi mʼoxi ia Bejamí, maji a ji tokoka." 
1Samuel9:5 O kieza mʼoxi ia Sufe, Saúlo u ambela mukuambèle uala-nê uixi: Ndoko tu vutula kiá; se tu kamba kuvutuka tatʼetu u eha o kuxinganeka jibûlu, hé u kala ni hele ietuʼetu." 
1Samuel9:6 Mukua-mbèle anga u mu ambela, uixi: Talesa-ze bhu bhata bhabha bhuala mukua Nzambi, muthu a mu kala ni ujitu uavulu; muene kioso kia tanga ki ki kambe kubhita; tuie-bhu hanji, imoxi muene u tu ambela ioso njila ietu ia tokala i tu kuata." 
1Samuel9:7 Saúlo-phe u ambela mukua mbèle iê, uixi: Se tuedi tuia-bhu, tu mu bhekela-hi? Huta ia tu bhu, o ujitu ua tu kambe ua kubhana ku mukua Nzambi, ihi dingi ia tu xala-ku?" 
1Samuel9:8 Mukua-mbèle anga u kumbulula, uambela Saúlo, uixi: Talesa-ze bhu lukuaku luami nga kuata hanji kuarto ia xikulu ia phalata; kitadi kiki kiene ki ngi bhana ku mukua Nzambi phala a tu jimbuile o njila." 
1Samuel9:9 Mʼokulu-phe mu Izalaiele, muthu se uedi uia kuzambula kua Nzambi, uila uixi: Tuie ku mumoni; kuma uoso kiki a mu ixana Polofeta, mʼokulu a kexe ku mu ila Mukua kumona." 
1Samuel9:10 Saúlo bhenhobho u ambela mukua-mbèle iê, uixi: Ua zuela kiambote; tuie-bhu. Anga aia mu mbonge mua tungu o muthu ua Nzambi." 
1Samuel9:11 Mu kubanda-phe bhu thala ia mbonge, a takana ni ana ilumba ala kuia kuteka menha, anga a ebhula, exi: Mumoni iú koko?" 
1Samuel9:12 Anʼa ilumba a kumbulula, exi: Iú koko; uala ku pholo ienu kuenhoko; endelenu-ku, kuma lelu muene ua bhixila bhu bhata bhabha, mukonda akua bhata ala ni sata lelu ku thala kuná." 
1Samuel9:13 Mua-nda kuila mu tukuluka ngó mu nzunga, mu takana-nê kindala kioso kiluua a banda ku thala mu kúdia; kuma akua bhata ka xikina luua kúdia katé muene kia benzela o sata; kiene kiua ki adia, oso a a kuvitala. Bandenu kiá, kiki kiene o kithangana kia kutakana-nê." 
1Samuel9:14 Anga a banda mu mbonge; o kia zubha kutula mu mbonge, a mona Samuuele iú, muene u takana-nâ mu kutunda phala kuia ku thala." 
1Samuel9:15 Jihova-phe ua diangele kulongesa Samuuele, kizuua kia kuila Saúlo mungu ua-nda kuiza, uixi:" 
1Samuel9:16 Mungu mu kumbi kala mumu nga-nda ku ku tumikisa muthu, mukua ʼxi ia Bejamí, eie-phe u mu unda ni maji, phala a kale mutuameneni ua mundu uami Izalaiele; muene uà bhulula o mundu uami bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia; kuma mundu uami nga a zambuila dingi mesu, eme nga a tongolola dingi, o ngololo iâ ia ngi bhixila." 
1Samuel9:17 Samuuele-phe kioso kia mono Saúlo, Jihova ua mu ambela, uixi: Muthu iú muene nga ku tangela-nê! Muene ua tokala, ua-nda kutumina o mundu uami." 
1Samuel9:18 Bhenhobho Saúlo anga u zukama kua Samuuele bhu dibokuenu dia bhata, uixi: Ngi tangele hanji, nga ku diondo, o inzo ia mumonhi iala kuebhi?" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuuele anga u vutuila Saúlo, uixi: Eme muene ngi mumonhi; ngi tuamenenienu ku thala, kuma enu lelu mua-nda kúdia ni eme; o mungu kiene kiua ki ngi mi sulula, kioso ki ngi ku tangela ioso ia ku kala ku muxima." 
1Samuel9:20 O jibûlu-phe jedi lelu tatu tunde ki ja jimbila, ku ji te dingi muxima; kuma a ji bongo kiá. O ima ioso ia beta kuuabha mu Izalaiele-phe ia tokala kua nanhi? Oko eie muene, ni dibhata dioso dia tatʼenu." 
1Samuel9:21 Saúlo anga u kumbulula, uixi: Eme ki ngi mukua muiji ua Bejamí, o kasule ka miiji ioso ia Izalaiele? O família iami ue ki iene kasule ka jifamília joso ja muiji ua Bejamí? Eie-phe u ngi zuelesela-hi kiki?" 
1Samuel9:22 Samuuele anga u tambulula Saúlu, ni mukua mbele iê, u a bheka mu sala ia usonhi, hé ua xikamesa mu ididi ia ukota ia tundu ia akuá oso a a kuvitala; o ene ala makuinhi atatu a muthu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuuele anga u ambela mulambi ua kexi kulamba, uixi: Bheka xitu i nga ku bhele, i nga ku ambelele, ngixi: Bhaka-iu hanji bhu mbandu." 
1Samuel9:24 Mulambi anga u katula kinama kia thulu ni xitu iala-ku, anga u ki tudila Saúlu. Samuuele anga u zuela, uixi: Ienhoio o mbandu iê i tua ku bhakelele! Tambula-iu u i die, mukonda eie muene a ku bhakela-iu, phala mu kumbi didi di tua xindi, kuila diene dia ku kuvitala o mundu. Kala kiki, Saúlu u dia kumoxi ni Samuuele kizuua kienhokio." 
1Samuel9:25 Kia zubha kutunda ku thala kuenhoko, eza dingi bhu bhata, anga Samuuele u di kunda ni Saúlu bhu thandu diaʼnzo bhua xikama." 
1Samuel9:26 Ki kúkia mu kimenemene, Samuuele anga u di meneka u ixana Saúlo ku thandu dia ʼnzo, uixi: Balumuka, ngi ku xinjikile. Saúlo ua balumuka, anga kiiadi kiâ a tunda." 
1Samuel9:27 O kia zubha kukulumuka katé bhua suku o dibhata, Samuuele u ambela Saúlo, uixi: Mukua-mbèle ié mu tume a tu tuamenene ku pholo, mukua-mbèle anga u tuamena. Uixi-phe: Eie muene imana hanji, phala ngi kuivise o kizuelu kia tange Nzambi." 
1Samuel10:1 Bheneʼobho Samuuele anga u sunga thenda ia maji, u ma lunduluila ku mútue ua Saúlo, u mu bhana nzóbole, uixi: Nga ki bhangela mukonda Jihova ua ku undu mu kukala u muenexi mu undundu ué." 
1Samuel10:2 Ki ua-nda ku ngi xia bhabha lelu, ua ka takana ni malʼaiadi bhu mbila ia Lakele, bhu mbámbe ia Bejamí bhu Zeliza; ene a kà ku ambela, kuma: Jibûlu ji uele mu sota, a ji bongo kiá; tatʼenu ua zumbuka kiá muẋima uê kukatela jibûlu, uala kiá ni hele ié eie, uixi:" 
1Samuel10:3 Monʼami olʼiii a mu bhange kiebhi? Mu Kutunda bhobho, mu kuia dingi ku pholo, ua kà tula bhu mulemba ua Tabola, bhenhobho ua kà takanena-bhu ni malʼatatu ala mu banda kua Nzambi bhu Betele, iú u ambata tuana tutatu tua jihombo, iú u ambata makende matatu ma jimbolo, iú u ambata kisudi kia vinhu." 
1Samuel10:4 A kà ku menekena, hé a kà ku bhana makende maiadi ma jimbolo; eie-phe ua kà ji tambula bhu maku mâ." 
1Samuel10:5 Kutunda bhobho ua kà bhita kalundu ka Nzambi, bhuala o kibangu kia akua Fidíxia; kia kà bhita-phe kuila, mu kutula bhu bhata bhobho, ua ka takana ni kibuka kia jipolofeta, ala mu tunda ku thala ni kuxika kakoxi, ni ngoma, ni mbéndu, ni mbanza, a kà kala mu zuela ni uanji ua upolofeta." 
1Samuel10:6 Bheneʼobho-phe Nzumbi ia Jihova ua kà tula ni nguzu ku thandu dié, eie ua kà zuela ue ni uanji ua upolofeta, ua kà biluka kiá u muthu uengi." 
1Samuel10:7 Ki ua kà mona-phe kuma ijimbuete iii ia ku bhiti, bhanga kiá kioso ki ua mono kia tokala; kuma Nzambi u kala bhu mbandu ié." 
1Samuel10:8 Ua kà ngi tuamenena mu kulumuka ku Jidingale; nga kà ku sanga kuenhoko, mu bhana jisata ja kuoha ni jisata ja kutululuka; eie ua kà kinga sambuadi dia izuua, katé ki ngi ku sanga, ngi ku tangele kioso ki u bhanga." 
1Samuel10:9 Anga ki bhita kuila, muene kia lunguluka dikunda mu kutunda bhuala Samuuele, Nzambi ua mu bhana muẋima uengi. O ijimbuete ioso iii anga i bhita muene kizuua kienʼokio." 
1Samuel10:10 O kia bhixila bhu kalundu, kibuka kia jipolofeta kiki, anga u takana na-kiu; Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga uiza ni nguzu ku thandu diê, muene hé u kala mu zuela ni uanji ua upolofeta muʼaxaxi kâ." 
1Samuel10:11 Bhenhobho athu a mu ijiia mʼokulu kia mu mono, kuma iú zuela ni uanji kumoxi ni jipolofeta, mundu a di ambela mudiâ, exi: Monʼa Kiji, ihi kia mu bhiti? Saúlo manhi ua di bundu ue kumoxi mu jipolofeta?" 
1Samuel10:12 Mukua-bhata uamukuá anga u kumbulula, uixi: O tatʼâ-phe mukuahi? Kienhiki kia xalela mu Sabhu, exi: Manhi Saúlo ua di bundu ue mu jipolofeta?" 
1Samuel10:13 O Saúlo kia zubha kuzuela ni unanji ua upolofeta, u bhixila kiua ku thala." 
1Samuel10:14 Sekulu a Saúlo anga u mu ibhula, ni mukua-mbele iê, uixi: Muele kuebhi? Muene uixi: Mu sota jibûlu; o ki tua lémbua ku ji mona, tua bhixila kua Samuuele." 
1Samuel10:15 Sekuluʼê anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ngi tangele-phe hanji, nga ku diondo, mba Samuuele ua mi zuelesa kiebhi?" 
1Samuel10:16 Saúlo anga u ambela sekuluʼê, uixi: Ua tu tangela muene kidi kuma jibûlu a ji bongo kiá. Maka mamukuá-phe ma ungana, ma mu kundu Samuuele, muene ka mu jimbuila-nâ." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuuele anga u bhongolola mundu uoso kua Jihova, bhu Mixipa;" 
1Samuel10:18 angu u ambela anʼa Izalaiele, uixi: Eme Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe, kiki: Nga katula Izalaiele mu Ijitu, nga mi kudila bhu maku ma akua Ijito, ni bhu maku ma maungana moso mamukuá ma kexe ku, mi bhikisa," 
1Samuel10:19 Enu-phe kizuua kia lelu mua ditunu Nzambi ienu uene ku mi kudila mu mavuua menu moso ni mu malamba menu; mua mu ambela, muixi: Kana, tu bhane sobha i tu tumina. Kiki-phe di tienu ku minono bhu pholo ia Jihova, mu di tungule kala kioso ki mua di kaiejela mu miji ienu ni mu jimidi jenu." 
1Samuel10:20 O Samuuele anga u zukamesa miiji ioso ia Izalaiele, anga a kuata-bhu o muiji ua Bejamí." 
1Samuel10:21 Anga u zukamesa muiji ua Bejamí mu jifamília jê, anga a kuata-bhu Saúlo monʼa Kiji; o kia mu soto-phe, ka moneka." 
1Samuel10:22 Kienhiki ebhula dingi kua Jihova, exi: Muthu iú manhi kiluua eza bhabha? Jihova anga u vutula, uixi: Muene ió, ua suama mu imbamba ieza na-iu athu." 
1Samuel10:23 Anga a lenga, a mu takana momo, o kiemana mu axaxi ka mundu, ku kitala ene oso a mu suku ngó mu isuxi," 
1Samuel10:24 Samuuele anga u ambela mundu uoso, uixi: Mu tadienu, mueneʼó a mu solo kuala Jihova. Mu mundu uoso ki muala muthu uedi kala muene. Mundu uoso anga a dikola, exi: Muenexi a kole muenhu!" 
1Samuel10:25 Samuuele anga u ambela mundu kioso kia tokala kuenda o utuminu ua sobha, anga u ki soneka mu divulu, hé a di lunda bhu pholo ia Jihova. Samuuele anga u muanganesa mundu, kala muthu ku bhata diê, kala muthu ku bhata diê." 
1Samuel10:26 Saúlo ue anga uia ku bhata diê bhu Ngibeia; anga ku mu kaiela kibuka kia mala, Nzambi ua a babata mu miẋima iâ." 
1Samuel10:27 Bhu kala-phe ue ni anʼa Kadiaphemba, exi: Iú ue muthu uahi? Manhi utena ku bhulula? Anga a mu tènda, a fula ku mu bhekela maujitu. Muene-phe ua di xibhʼê kala ka kʼivu." 
1Samuel11:1 Kioso ki bhua bhiti mbeji, Nahaxi mukua Amone anga uiza u konda Jabezi-Ngiliiade ni kilômbo kiê; mala ma akua Jabezi anga ambela Nahaxi, exi: Tu bangane kioso kia tokala, phala tu ku bhikile." 
1Samuel11:2 Nahaxi mukua Amone anga ua vutuila, uixi: Eme o kubangana nʼenu, nga mi xindi kima kimoxi: Ngi mi totola diesu dia kadilu enu oso, phala ki mi kale dilebhu di nga te kua Izalaiele ioso." 
1Samuel11:3 Adiakimi akua Jabezi anga a mu ambela, exi: Tu ehele hanji sambuadi dia izuua, tu tume jiphunga jiie ni jingolokela mʼoxi ioso ia Izalaiele; kibhua izuua, se tua lémbua kumona athu a tu kudila, kiene ki tu tunda hé tu di bhakula kokué." 
1Samuel11:4 Jiphunga anga ji tula bhu Ngibeia dia Saúlo, anga a kunda maka enhá mu mátui a mundu, mundu uoso anga a zangula mázui ni kudila." 
1Samuel11:5 Talesa-phe, ola ienhoio Saúlu iú uiza ni kukaiela jingombe jê, uala kutunda ku mábhia; Saúlu anga uila, uixi: Mundu ihi kia a kuata, ala mu dila kiki? Anga a mu kunda o maka ma akua Jabezi." 
1Samuel11:6 Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga u tula ni nguzu ku thandu dia Saúlo kievu makʼama, njinda iê anga i mu kuata kiavulu." 
1Samuel11:7 Anga u kuata phadi ia jingombe, u ji bhanga ku jithumba-jithumba anga u ji tumikisa ku maẋokololo Izalaiele bhu maku ma jiphunga, uixi: Uoso u kamba kutu nda mu ku banda Saúlo ni Samuuele, kiene kia mu bhanga o jimgombe jêʼiki. Uoma ua Jihova anga u kuata o mundu uoso, anga ene oso a tunda kala muthu umoxi." 
1Samuel11:8 Anga u a kuata konda bhu Bezeke; anʼa Izalaiele a tena hâma jitatu ja jimidi, akua Juda a tena makuinhi atatu a midi." 
1Samuel11:9 Anga ambela jiphunga jeza, exi: Mua kà tangela akua Jabezi-Ngiliiade, kiki: Mungu katé bhu tuila muanha, mua kà bhanduluka. Jiphunga anga jiza ji kundila akua Jabezi, ene anga a sanguluka." 
1Samuel11:10 Akua Jabezi anga a zuela, exi: Mungu tu di bhakula kokuenu, mu tu bhange kioso kia mi kala ku muẋima."
