1Samuel25:28 Loloka, nga ku diondo, o kutondala kua kahatu ké; kuma ni kidi muene, Jihova ua-nda ku ku tungila dibhata dinanga, ngana iami: mukonda ngana iami, jimvunda ji uene kuzoka, jimvunda ja Jihova; ka ku kuate ni kikuma izuua ié ioso." 
1Samuel25:29 Sumbala se bhu kala muthu ua balumuka mu ku ku landameka, ua bhindamena ku ku tambula o muenhu ué, ngana iami, muenhu ué a u kutila kumoxi mu kita kia athu a muenhu ala ni Jihova Nzambi ié; maji o mienhu-phe ia jinguma jé a ka i zabujula kala ditadi ki di tunda mu kaẋi ka mbala-fundu." 
1Samuel25:30 Hádia-phe ki kia kà bhita, Jihova kia kà zubha ku ku bhanga, ngana iami, mbote ioso ia tange muene ku thandu dié, kia kà zubha ku ku tumbika mu kukala u mutuameneni ku pholo ia Izalaiele," 
1Samuel25:31 ki kia kà kala-phe dingi kima kia kudielesa, mba lamba dia muẋma, kuila ua bhubhisa manhinga sé kikuma, mba ua di vutuila phonzo ni lukuaku lué eʼmuene, ngana iami. Kioso-phe Jihova kia kà zubha ku kubhandulula, ngana iami, kienʼokio eme ue ngi xinganeke, ngi kahatu ké." 
1Samuel25:32 Kienhókio Davidi anga u ambela Abingaile, uixi: Nga sakidila Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ua ku tumu kizuua kia lelu ku ngi batuila." 
1Samuel25:33 Nga ku sakidila ue eie-muène ni kilunji kié, kuma ua ngi fudisa lelu kubhubhisa manhinga, ni ku vutula phonzo ni lukuaku luami eme-muène." 
1Samuel25:34 Kuma ni kidi muene kala Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele kiala ku muenhu iú ua ngi fudisa ku ku kuama, se eie ua kambele ku lenguluka kuiza ku ngi batuila, katé ki kúkia, eme ki ngeji kuxila Nabale ku muenhu, né ngó monʼumoxi ua diiala uòfele-fele." 
1Samuel25:35 Kienhiki Davidi anga u tambula ku lukuaku luê, o ima ioso ia mu bhekela muhatu anga u mu ambela, uixi: Suluka kiá ni kutululuka ku bhata dié, ndeie ni paze. Ua mono, nga ku ivu dízui dié, eme nga ku xikina o pholo ié, ki uezʼiki." 
1Samuel25:36 Abingaile anga uiza dingi kua Nabale, u mu sanga ua-lu bhanga fesa ia dikota mʼonzo iê, kala kizokola kia sobha. Nabale muene muẋima uê moxi ua mu tana, kuma ua kodiua kiavulu; mukonda dia kiki muene ka mu tangela kima, né kiofele né kionéne, katé ki kuákie." 
1Samuel25:37 Anga ki bhita kuila ki kúkia ni kimene, Nabale kia mu bhu o uhólua uê, mukajiʼê u mu kunda ima ioso iii, muẋima uê anga u mu fua moxi, ukala mukuâ ni ditadi." 
1Samuel25:38 Kubhita dingi kuinhi dia izuua, Jihova u mu zubhidisa, anga u fua." 
1Samuel25:39 O ki evu Davidi kuila Nabale uafu, u zuela uixi: Nga sakidila Jihova ua ngi fúndila mulonga ua dilebhu diami di nga tambuile kua Nabale, ua ngi fudisa kubhanga kiaiibha eme ngi mubhikʼê. O phulu ia bhangele Nabale, Jihova ua mu vutuila-iu mu mútue uêmuène. Davidi anga u tuma kuta maka kua Abingaíle, phala ku mu sakana, nʼa kale mukajiʼê." 
1Samuel25:40 Imbalambi ia Davidi kia zubha kutula kua Abingaile ku Karmelo, a mu kunda, exi: Davidi ua tu tumu ko kué, phala ku ku ambata ni ku ku bheka kua muene, nʼu kale u mukajiʼê." 
1Samuel25:41 Muene anga u balumuka, u bhetama pholo iê bhoxi, uixi: Emʼiú, ngi kahatu kê, ngi kale ngi mubhika ua kusukula inama ia akua mbèle ia muadiʼami." 
1Samuel25:42 Abingaile anga u lenguluka, u katuka, uendela ku bûlu, ni ilumba iê itanu ela-nê kumoxi. Anga u kaiela imbalambi ia Davidi, u kala mukajiʼê." 
1Samuel25:43 Davidi ue anga u bhenga dingi Akinoama mukua Jezeleele; ene oso kiiadi kiâ anga a kala akajiʼê. 
1Samuel25:44 Saúlophe, monʼê Mikala, muhatuʼa Davidi, ua mu bhana Palati monʼa Laiji, mukua Ngalime." 
1Samuel26:1 Akua Zifi anga eza kua Saúlo ku Ngibeia, exi: Manhi Davidi ka suama mu mulundu ua Hakila, ua zukama mu mikáu ia hatu ia kikangalakata kia Jesimone?" 
1Samuel26:2 Saúlo anga u balumuka, u kulumuka ku ditutu dia Zifi, ni midi jitatu ja mala ua a nona mu Izalaiele, ela-nê kumoxi, mu kusota Davidi mu ditutu dia Zifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Saúlo anga u ta kibangu mu mulundu ua Hakila, uazukamena mu kikangalakata kia Jesimone, mu mikáu ia hatu, bhu mbandu ia njila. Davidi-phe ua kala mu ditutu, anga u mona kuma Saúlo ueza muene ku mu sotela mu ditutu." 
1Samuel26:4 Davidi anga u katula ilôlo iê phala kuia mu kulonda, anga a mu ijidisa kididi bhuoso bhua tula Saúlo." 
1Samuel26:5 Davidi anga u balumuka, uiza ni kuzomba bhu kididi bhuoso bhua te Saúlo kibangu kiê. Davidi anga u talesa kididi bhua zeka Saúlo, ni Abinele monʼa Nedi, kabhitangu ka kifuẋi kiê. Saúlo muene ua zeka mu axaxe ka kibangu bhu kididi kia makalu, mundu uoso a mu bhake bhu ʼaxaxe." 
1Samuel26:6 Bhenhobho Davidi anga u ambela Ahimeleke mukua Hiti, ni Abisai monʼa Zeluia, phange ia Jouabhe, uixi: Nanhi u ngi bheka, ni tu kulumuka bhu kibangu bhobho bhua Saúlo? Abisai uixi: Eme ngi ku bheka." 
1Samuel26:7 Kienhiki Davidi ni Abisai eza mu usuku muʼ axaxi ka mundu. Anga a sanga Saúlu iú ua zekʼú mu kaẋi ka kibangu bhu kididi kia makalu, ni sosa iê ua i kubu bhoxi bhu mutuelu uê. Ni Abinele, ni mundu uoso, a zeka mu jimbandu, muene a mu te mu kaẋi." 
1Samuel26:8 Abisai anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Nzambi ua ku thelekala nguma ié bhu lukuaku kizuua kia lelu. Kiki-phe ngehele, nga ku diondo, ngi mu tome ni dionga, ngi mu phaphele mu mavu; ngi mu ta ngó lumoxi luene, ki ngi mu tona dingi." 
1Samuel26:9 Davidi anga u ambela Abisai, uixi: Kana ku mu jibha; kuma nanhi u tena: kuzengela muthu Jihova ua mu undu ku ungana nʼa kambe kuêla?" 
1Samuel26:10 Davidi anga u zuela, uixi: Kalé-ku Jihova ku muenhu, kuma muene Johova hinu u mu ta; mba u bhixila bhu kizuua kiê kia kúfua, mba uia mu ita nʼa mu jibhe," 
1Samuel26:11 Ngana ka ngehele; kuma ki kala kisunji se eme ngi mu zengela lukuaku, hé ngi sota kukuama muthu a mu undu kuala Jihova. Eie-phe katula ngó, nga ku diondo, o sosa iala bhu mutuelu uê, ni mudingi ua menha, tuende ni kuietu." 
1Samuel26:12 Kala kiki, Davidi ua katula ngó o sosa ni mudingi ua menha bhu mutuelu! ua Saúlo, anga a tunda-bhu. Ki bhuala-phe muthu ua ki mono, ki bhuala ua kʼijiia, ki bhuala ue ua phaphumuka nʼa tono; kuma ene oso aii ku kilu kia muioko-ioko, mukonda kilu kia a kuata kiavulu kia tundu kua Jihova." 
1Samuel26:13 Davidi anga uia ku sámbua, u banda bhu thala ia mulundu mu kanga, bhu kaẋi ua te-bhu muene dikanga." 
1Samuel26:14 Davidi anga u kuata kuhandekela mundu ni Abinele, monʼa Nedi, uixi: Xeie! Abinele, ku itaia? Abinele anga u kumbulula, uixi: Eie nanhi, muenexi uala ku mu bhangela jibuia?" 
1Samuel26:15 Davidi anga u ambela Abinele, uixi: Abinele u diiala, kuambe? Eie mu Izalaiele ku moneka mukuenu. Muadiʼé muenexi-phe, ku mu langela-hi? Tala, kuma bhejile muthu kujibha muadiʼé muenexi." 
1Samuel26:16 Ki ki uabha, kiki ki ua bhange! Nga lokela mua Jihova uala ku muenhu, kuila mu athu mua tokala ku mi jibha, enu mua fulu kulanga muadiʼenu, muthu a mu undu kuala Jihova. Talesenu hanji mba sosa ia muenexi ii kuebhi, ni mudingi uê ua menha ua kexile bhu mutuelu?" 
1Samuel26:17 Saúlo anga u ijiia dízui dia Davidi, uixi: O dízui diéʼodio, monʼami Davidi? Davidi uixi: Kùku, ngana, dízui diami eme muene." 
1Samuel26:18 Davidi uixi dingi: Phala-hi, ngana iami, ua-lu ngi sota kiki, ngi mubhikʼé? Eme kima kiahi ki nga bhange? Kituxi kiahi ki ua ngi mono na-kiu kia ngi kala bhu maku mami?" 
1Samuel26:19 Bhenhabha-phe, kùku, nga ku diondo, ngʼívue hanji o kuzuela, ngi mubhikʼé: O ki kala Jihova muene ua ku vunza ku ngi zukutisa, ngi mu satele, a ngi tambulule; o ki kala-phe anʼ athu ngó a ka vunza, Jihova a a bhubhidile bhu pholo iê, kuma a ngi kaie, kizuua kia lelu, phala ngi kambe kididi mu undundu ua Jihova, mukua ni kuila, exi: Ndeie, ka bhikile nzambi jengi." 
1Samuel26:20 Kikiphe manhinga mami ka bhubhile ngó bhoxi ku makanga mengi, mukonda dia ku ngi kaia bhu pholo ia Jihova. Kuma muenexi a Izalaiele ua di te ni ku ngi kenga kala ueza mu sota mbuanana, ua soko ni dinhanga u seia nguadi mu milundu!" 
1Samuel26:21 Saúlo bhenhobho anga u zuela, uixi: Nga bhange kiaiibha! Vutuka monʼami Davidi, kuma ki nga-nda ku ku bhanga dingi phulu; mukonda muenhu uami eie lelu ua u kiti kima kikôla. Ni kidi muene nga bhange uoua, nga tondala kiavulu muene." 
1Samuel26:22 Davidi anga u mu kumbulula, uixi: Kùku, sosa ié iii bhabhʼiii. Tumikisa dikuenze, eze a i takane." 
1Samuel26:23 Jihova u bhana futu mu vutuila muthu uoso kala kiatokala mu uiukilu uê ni mu ufiiele uê. Mukonda Jihova ua ku thelekalele lelu bhu lukuaku luami, eme-phe ki ngi xikina ku ku zengela lukuaku, eie u muthu a ku undu kuala Jihova." 
1Samuel26:24 Talesa, kala o muenhu ué ki ua kôlele mu mesu mami, kiene kimoxi muenhu uami ue u kole mu mesu ma Jihova, muene a ngi kudile mu kutata kuami kuoso-kuoso ku ngi kala na-ku." 
1Samuel26:25 Saúlo anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Diebhe-diebhe, monʼami Davidi! Mu kubhânga, u dizonda, mu ku lenda ki bhuala u tena ku ku fudisa! Kienhiki Davidi u ila njila iê, Saúlu anga u vutuka ku bhata." 
1Samuel27:1 Davidi anga u amba ku muẋima uê, uixi: Hinu bhu kala kizuua ngi buila ku lukuaku lua Saúlo. Ki ngalʼiki kota ngi lengela kʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia; koko-phe Saúlo-phe u ngi lémbua kiá, ka kala dingi mu ku ngi sota mu jimbámbe ja Izalaiele, o miẋima uê ki u dielela dingi ku ngi kuata; kiene ngó ki ngi ẋangumuka bhu lukuaku luê." 
1Samuel27:2 Kienhókio Davidi anga u zanguka, ni muene ni hâma jisamanu ja mala aia-nê kumoxi, hé a sambuka kua Akiji, monʼa Maoka, sobha ia Ngate." 
1Samuel27:3 Davidi anga u tunga ni Akiji bhu Ngate, ni muene ni makuenze mê, kala muthu ni dibhata diê, Davidi muene ue ni ahatuʼê aiadi, Akinoama mukua Jezeleele, ni Abingaíle mukua Karmelo, mutudi ua Nabale." 
1Samuel27:4 Anga a ki tangela Saúlo kuila Davidi ua lengela ku Ngate; muene anga u zumbuka o ku mu sota. 
1Samuel27:5 Davidi anga u ambela Akiji, uixi: Se eme nga sange ngalasa, ku mesu mê, a ngi bhese kididi ku jisanzala ku matutu, ngi tunge-ku; eme ngi mubhiké ngi kalela-hi mu mbanza mu ualʼeie u sobha?" 
1Samuel27:6 Akiji anga u mu bhana Zikilake kizuua kienʼokio; tunde kienhiki Zikilake ia tokala ku jisobha ja Juda katé mu kizuua kia lelu. 
1Samuel27:7 Izuua-phe ia bhange Davidi ni kutunga ku matutu ma akua Fidíxia, i tena muvu ni mbeji jiuana." 
1Samuel27:8 Davidi ni makuenze mê anga aia ni kutunda mu kúlua ni akua Ngesula ni akua Ngelesita, ni akua Amaleke; kuma ene akuaʼxi a kexile-mu, mʼokulu, tunde ku Sule, katé ku ixi ia Ejito." 
1Samuel27:9 Davidi anga uia ni ku beta ixi ioso ienhoio, ka xi-mu né diiala né muhatu, anga u ambata jimbudi, ni jingombe, ni jibûlu, ni jikamelo, ni izuatu, anga u vutuka, u tula na-iu kua Akiji." 
1Samuel27:10 Akiji-phe anga u ibhula, uixi: Akua-hi mua a balukila lelu? Davidi uixi: Tua balukila o sulu ia Juda, ni akua Jelamiiele, ni akua Kene." 
1Samuel27:11 Davidi-phe ka xi-ku muthu ni muenhu, né diiala mba muhatu, ualengesa kuila uiza-nâ ku Ngate, kulengesa kuila: A tu tanga, ela: Kiene kiene kubhanga Davidiʼiki, kiene kífua kiê, thembu ioso ia tungu ku matutu ma akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel27:12 Akiji anga u xikina Davidi, uixi: Ua di zembesa ku muiji uê ua Izalaiele; mukonda dia kiki, ua xalela dikuenze diami." 
1Samuel28:1 Anga ki bhita mu izuuʼomo kuma akua Fidíxia a di bhongolola ilombo iâ mu kuia ku ita, phala kúlua ni Izalaiele. Akiji anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Ijiia na-kiu kuma uia ni eme mu kilômbo sé kufula, ni eie ni makuenze mé." 
1Samuel28:2 Davidi anga u ambela Akiji, uixi: Ua-ndu ngi mona kioso ki ngi bhânga, ngi mubhikʼé. Akiji anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Kiene ki nga ku solela phala u kale izuua ioso u dikuenze diami dia ku ngʼinga mútue." 
1Samuel28:3 Kienhiki kala Samuuele uafua kiá okulo, Izalaiele dioso a mu didile, iá a mu fûnda kiá mu Lama, bhu bhata diê bhene. Saúlu-phe oso akua kuxingidisa, ni akua kuzambula ua a kaiesa, mʼoxi iâ a tundu-mu." 
1Samuel28:4 Akua Fidíxia anga a di bhongolola, eza a ta kibangu kiâ bhu Suneme. Saúlo ue u bhongolola Izalaiele ioso, a ta kibangu kiâ mu Jiliboua." 
1Samuel28:5 Saúlo-phe kia mono kilômbo kia akua Fidíxia, u kala ni uoma, muẋima u mu teketa kiavulu." 
1Samuel28:6 Saúlo-phe ki ebhula kua Jihova, Jihova ka mu vutuila, né ku nzoji, né ku Udimi, né ku jipolofeta." 
1Samuel28:7 Saúlo anga u ambela akua mbèle iê, uixi: Ngi sotedienu muhatu u kala muxingidi-a-ngòmbo, ngiie kuoso kuala, ngʼibhule kua muene. Akua mbèle iê anga a mu ambela, exi: Sai-ze muhatu muxingidi-a-ngòmbo ua tungu bhu Endolo." 
1Samuel28:8 Saúlo anga u di kitula, u di ta izuatu iengi, anga uia, ni muene ni malʼaiadi endela-nê kumoxi, a kana muhatu muenʼiú mu usuku. Anga u mu ambela, uixi: Nga ku diondo, xingila ngombo ié, u ngʼixanene uoso ngi ku tumbuila-nê dijina diê." 
1Samuel28:9 Muhatu anga u mu ambela, uixi: Eie uejiia-phe kioso kia bhange Saúlo, kuma oso akua kuxingila ni akua kuzambula ua a bhuisa mʼoxiʼmu; u ngi lungila-hi-phe mubhetu ua kukuata muenhu uami, ni ku ngi fuisa ngó?" 
1Samuel28:10 Saúlu anga u mu lokela mu dijina dia Jihova, uixi: Kalè-ku Jihova ku muenhu, ku kale ngó ni uoma, ki kuiza mulonga mukonda dia kimʼiki." 
1Samuel28:11 Muhatu uixi: Nzumbi ia nanhi ngi mu ixana ni u mu ivu? Uixi: Ngʼixanene Samuuele. 
1Samuel28:12 Muhatu-phe kia mono Samuuele, ua dikola ni dízui dia suina. Muhatu anga u ambela Saúlo, uixi: Ua ngi bhombelahi? Manhi eʼmuene Saúlo!" 
1Samuel28:13 Muenexi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ku kale ni uoma; maji-phe, ua monohi? Muhatu anga u ambela Saúlo, uixi: Nga mono nzambi iala kutunda mu mavu." 
1Samuel28:14 Muene u ambela muhatu, uixi: Uala ni kidifua kiahi? Muhatu, uixi: Kikulakaji muene kiala mu tunda; ua di futu dibeka. Saúlo anga u tongolola kuma Samuuele muene, anga u bhetama pholo iê katé mu mavu, u mu diundila." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuuele anga u ambela Saúlo, uixi: Ua ngi fudisila-hi kunhoha kuami, o ku ngi fukununa kiki eme ngeza bhabha? Saúlo anga u vutuila Samuuele, uixi: Nga tate kiavulu; kuma akua Fidíxia eza ku ngi lua ita, Nzambi phe ua ngi xi, kala ku ngi vutuila dingi, né ku jipolofeta, né ku jinzoji. Kiene ki nga ku ixanena eie, phala u ngʼijidise kioso ki ngi bhanga." 
1Samuel28:16 Samuuele uixi: U ngʼibhuila-hi-phe eme, se Jihova ua ku xi, ua biluka kiá nguma ié?" 
1Samuel28:17 Jihova ua ku bhange kioso kia zuelele kó kuami: kuma Jihova ua tambula ungana bhu lukuaku lué, ua u bhana mukuenu uengi, muene Davidi," 
1Samuel28:18 Mukonda eie ua kambe kutumaka dízui dia Jihova, ua kambe ku mu zubhila njinda iê iatema ia kuatelele Amaleke, kiene Jihova kia ku bhangela kiki kizuua kia lelu." 
1Samuel28:19 Kua di te dingi kia-nda kubhanga Jihova, u bhakula Izalaiele ni eie kumoxi bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia. Mungu muene ni eie ni anʼé muà kala ni eme ku ngala; o kilômbo kia Izalaiele Jihova u ki bhakula bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia." 
1Samuel28:20 Bhenhobho Saúlo udibhala, utandelela bhoxi, u kala ni uoma uavulu mukonda dia maka ma Samuuele; nguzu ioso anga i mu bhua, mukonda ka di kima kizuua kiosuʼokio ni usuku uê." 
1Samuel28:21 Muhatu anga u iza kua Saúlo, u mu mona kuma ua bhuuama kiavulu, u mu ambela, uixi: Talesa-ze, ngana, ngi kahatu ké nga ku ivu dízui, muenhu uami kifua nga u te bhu lukuaku, eme ngʼevu o maka oso u ua ngʼambela." 
1Samuel28:22 Kiki-phe, nga ku diondo, eie ue ngʼivue-ku eme, ngi kahatu ké, ngi ku bhangele kakudia bhenhabha, u die; phala u kale ni nguzu, mbé ki ua-ndu kuata dingi mu njilʼmu." 
1Samuel28:23 Maji muene-phe u dituna, uixi: Nguami kúdia. Akua mbèle iê-phe, ni muhatu kumoxi, a mu bhinjika, anga u ivua kiua dízui diâ. Anga u balumuka bhoxi, u xikama bhu hama." 
1Samuel28:24 Muhatuphe u kala ni kangombe kanete mʼonzo iê; anga u bhanga lusolo, u ka jibha. U katula ue fuba ia tiliku, u i masana, hé u kanga jimbolo ja kambe felemendo." 
1Samuel28:25 Anga uiza ni kúdia kuê u zalela Saúlo, u zalela ue akua mbèle iê, anga a dia ene oso. Kia zubha kúdia, a balumuka, a katuka, ni usuku uenhó." 
1Samuel29:1 Akua Fidíxia anga a bhongolola ilômbo iâ ioso i tenena bhu Afeke; akua Izalaiele-phe anga a ta kibangu kiâ bhu dijiia dia Jezeleele. 
1Samuel29:2 Jisobha ja akua Fidíxia anga a tuamenena ni ilômbo iâ iouane ku ibuka ia jihâma ni jimidi. O Davidi-phe ni makuenze mê a kala ue mu kaiela, a sukidila ku dima ni Akiji." 
1Samuel29:3 Jingana ja akua Fidíxia anga a zuela, exi: O jihebeleuʼiji, jala kubhanga-hi bhabha? Akiji anga u ambela jingana ja akua Fidíxia, uixi: Ki muene Davidi-ú dikuenze dia Saúlo, sobha ia Izalaiele, nga bhange-nê izuua ni mivu, sé ku mu mona ni kikuma, tunde kizuua kia sambuka kunu kokuami katé lelu?" 
1Samuel29:4 Jingana ja akua Fidíxia-phe anga a mu kuatela njinda iavulu. Jingana ja akua Fidíxia anga a mu ambela, exi: Muenhú mu vutule, aie bhu kididi kiê kioso ki ua mu bhana; kʼaie ku ita ni etu, amoxi ku ita u kituka, u kala nguma ietu. Mukonda ialʼú u di luulula kiebhi ni ngana iê, oko u ki bhanga ni mitue ia malʼ etu enhá?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ki muene Davidi-ú a mu tele ku mukûmbi mu kuimba ni kukina, exi: Saúlo ua jibha jimidi? Davidi-phe makuinhi a jimidi?" 
1Samuel29:6 Akiji u ixana Davidi, u mu ambela, uixi: Nga loka mua Jihova uala ku muenhu, kuila eie u muthu uaiuka, ni kutunda kué ni kubokona kué mu kilômbo kiami, kua ngi uabhela muene; kuma kinga ku mono ni kikuma tunde kizuua ki uà ngi sana katé lelu; maji o jingan a jiji-phe kia mu ku mona, ki kia a uabhela." 
1Samuel29:7 Kala kiki-phe, vutuka, uie ni paze phala jingana ja akua Fidíxia ka ku iibhile ngó." 
1Samuel29:8 Bhenhobho Davidi anga u ambela, Akiji, uixi: Kima kiahi ki nga bhange? Ua ngi mono nʼihi, ngi mubhikʼé, thembu ioso i nga bhange bhu pholo ié katé lelu, ki bhinga ki ngi fudisa kuia kúlua ni jinguma ja muadiʼami, o muenexi?" 
1Samuel29:9 Akiji anga u vutuila Davidi, uixi: Nga kʼijiia muene kiambote. Eme ku mesuʼami, eie ua ngi uabhela kiavulu kala u mukunji ua Nzambi. Maji-phe o jingana ja akua Fidíxia ene a di tunu, exi: Ku ita kaii-ku ni etu." 
1Samuel29:10 Kala kikiphe mungu di meneke, mu balumuke kimene ni makuenze a muadiʼé u uezanâ; kúkia ngó, kuma ki kuandeka kuzela, mu suluka kiá." 
1Samuel29:11 Kienhiki Davidi ua balumuka mu kimenemene, ni muene ni makuenzemê, hé a di meneka mu vutuka kʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia. Akua Fidíxia-phe anga a banda ku Jezeleele." 
1Samuel30:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha-phe Davidi ni makuenze-mê kubhiẋila ku Zikilake, mu kizuua kia katatu, a sanga akua Amaleke a vubuka mʼoxi ioso ia sulu, ni sanzala ia Zikilake a i beta; a i oha mu túbhia," 
1Samuel30:2 ahatu oso a a kutu, ni athu oso a xedi ku bhata, makota ni jindenge, ka jibha-ku muthu, maji ene oso a a kutu aii-nâ kuoso kuala kuila." 
1Samuel30:3 Davidi-phe ni makuenze-mê kia zubha kutula ku bhata, a sanga dibhata diabhi mu túbhia; o akajiʼâ, ni anʼâ a mala ni a ahatu, aii-nâ ku mikolo, a di bhange jihutile." 
1Samuel30:4 Bhenhobho ni Davidi, ni mundu aia-nê kumoxi, exi bulukutu ni kudila anga a dila katé kala dingi ni nguzu, kingumba o kudila, mukonda a tokoka-ku." 
1Samuel30:5 Ni akaji a Davidi aiadi, Akinouama mukua Jezeleele, ni Abingaíle, mukua Karmelu, a a kutu uâ." 
1Samuel30:6 Davidi anga u tata kiavulu, kuma mundu a tele maka a ku mu bûba ni matadi, mukonda muẋima ua mundu uoso uala ni malamba, kala muthu uala mu kuxinganeka anʼê a mala ni a ahatu. Maji Davidi-phe u di kolesa muẋima mua Jihova Nzambi iê." 
1Samuel30:7 Davidi anga u ambela nganga Abiiatale, monʼa Ahimeleke, uixi: Nga ku diondo, efodi ngi bhekele-iu kunu. Abiiatale anga u bheka efodi kua Davidi." 
1Samuel30:8 Davidi anga u ibhula kua Jihova, uixi: Kibuka kiki, se ngi ki kaiela manhi ngʼa kuata? Anga Jihova u mu vutuila, uixi: Kaiela, u a kuata muene, iene ioso u i tambula dingi." 
1Samuel30:9 Kienhiki Davidi hé u katuka, ni hâma jisamanu ja mala aia-nê kumonxi, anga a tula bhu honga ia Besolo bhua xala amukuá oso a lémbua kuia ku pholo." 
1Samuel30:10 Davidi-phe, ni muene ni hama jiuana ja mala, a kaiela o jinguma; kuma hâma jiiadi a xala bhenhobho, mukonda dia kubhuila, a lémbua kuzauka o honga ia Besolo." 
1Samuel30:11 Anga a sanga mukua Ijito mu mukáu, a mu bheka kua Davidi, a mu bhana mbolo, u dia; a mu bhana menha a kúnua, hé u nua." 
1Samuel30:12 Anga a mu bhana uê mbandu ia muthadi ua jifiku, ni isaka iiadi ia jiuva; o kia zubha kudia, muenhu uê ueza dingi bhu kididi, kuma kadi kima, kanu menha, mu makumbi atatu ni mausuku atatu." 
1Samuel30:13 Davidi anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Eie ua tokala kua nanhi? O ku ua tundu, kuebhi? Muene, uixi: Ngi mukua Ijito, ngi mubhika ua mukua Amaleke, ngana iami-phe, lelu tatu tunde kia ngi xi ku dima, mukonda dia kukata kua ngi kuata." 
1Samuel30:14 Tua balukidile kúlua ita mu sulu ia Makelete, ni mu mbandu ia tokala kua Juda, ni mu sulu ia Kalebe; Zikilake tua mu oha mu túbhia." 
1Samuel30:15 Davidi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Manhi, se tu kulumuka u ngi bheka bhuala masoladi a kibuka kienhiki? Muene uixi: Se u ngi lokela kua Nzambi kuma eie muene ku ngi jibha, ni bhu maku a ngana iami ku ngi bhakulabhu dingi, ngi ku bheka muene bhuala kibuka kiâ." 
1Samuel30:16 Anga u a kulumuisa. Kia zubha ku mu bheka, u sanga a di zanze mu mukâu uoso uenhó, ala mu kúdia ni mu kúnua, ni mu kina, mukonda dia imbamba iavulu ia bhûndu mʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia, ni mʼoxi ia Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Davidi anga ua beta tunde mu mixinda ia maku katé mu ngoloxi ia kizuua kiamukuá; ki bhuala diiala ua tundu-bhu, kikale ngó hâma jiuana ja minzangala a mondala jikamelu, ene ngó a lenge." 
1Samuel30:18 Davidi anga u tambula dingi imbamba ioso ia mu bhûndile akua Ameleke; Davidi anga u tambula ahatuʼê aiadi. 
1Samuel30:19 Ki bhuala kima kia a kambe-ku, né kia dikota né kiofele, né anʼa mala, né anʼa ahatu, né o imbamba ioso ia a bhundile; Davidi ua i tambula iene ioso, ueza na-iu." 
1Samuel30:20 Davidi anga u kuata ilunga ioso iamukuá ia jimbudi ni jingombe, anga eza ni ku i kombola bhu pholo iê ni kukola, exi: Iii iene o ibhaku iangene í ia Davidi ia tambula." 
1Samuel30:21 Davidi anga uiza u sanga hâma jiiadi ja mala, a lembuele kukaiela Davidi mukonda dia kubuila, ia a xedi bhu honga ia Besolo. Ene anga a tunda mu kauidila Davidi, ni mu kauidila ue o mundu aia-nê. Davidi kia zubha kuzukama bhuala mundu, u a menekena muene kiambote ni kutululuka kuoso." 
1Samuel30:22 Bhenhobho akua phulu-phe ni iá oso abhukumuka mu ʼaxaxi ka iá ele ni Davidi andeka kuzuela, exi: Mukonda enhá a lembuele kubhiẋila bhu tuediʼetu, kana ku a bhana-ku ku madibhundila u tua tambula ku ita, inda tu a bhana ngó kala muthu muhatuʼê ni anʼê kuabhu; a a tambule, a muangane." 
1Samuel30:23 Davidi-phe u a ambela bhenhobho, uixi: Ki kiene ki mu bhanga, phange jami, ni imbamba ia tu bhana Jihova. Muene ua tu bhake ni muenhu, iu ua thelekala bhu lukuaku luetu o kibuka kiejile ku tu bhûnda." 
1Samuel30:24 Nanhi muene u mʼivua o hundu ienu i muala na-iu iii? Mukonda kioso ki tambula iú uele ku ita, kiene ue ki tambula iú ua xedi bhu imbamba. Ene oso a soka mu kuuana." 
1Samuel30:25 Tunde-phe kizuua kienhókio muene, kia ki zuela Davidi, kia di bhange kijila kiâ ni kifua kiâ mu Izalaiele, katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
1Samuel30:26 Davidi anga u bhixila bhu Zikilake, ku ibhaku ia tambula anga u tumikisa-ku ku adiakimi a Juda, o makambʼê, uixi: Ujitu-ze iú u nga mi tumikisa, ua tundu ku ibhundile i tua bhûndu ku jinguma ja Jihova." 
1Samuel30:27 U tumikisa-ku ue akua bhata mu Betele, ni akua bhata mu Lamote ia Nengebe ku sulu, ni akua bhata mu Jatile," 
1Samuel30:28 ni ku akua bhata mu Alouele, ku akua bhata mu Sifimote, ni ku akua bhata mu Estemoua," 
1Samuel30:29 ni ku akua bhata mu Lakele, ni ku akua bhata mu jisanzala ja Majelamele, ni ku akua bhata mu jisanzala ja Makènene," 
1Samuel30:30 ni ku akua bhata mu Hóloma, ni ku akua Kolaxane, ni ku akua Ataka," 
1Samuel30:31 ni ku akua bhata mu Hebolone, ididi ioso kiá kua kexe mu suama Davidi ni makuenzemê." 
1Samuel31:1 Kioso Davidi kia-lu bhita ni imʼiii, koko-phe akua Fidíxia a di kuata ku ita ni Izalaiele. Akua Izalaiele anga a lenga akua Fidíxia, hé a di bhala-bhala ni ku a jibha-jibha mu mulundu ua Jiliboua." 
1Samuel31:2 Akua Fidíxia-phe anga a landameka Saúlo ni anʼê. Akua Fidíxia anga a jibha Jonata, ni Abinadabe, ni Malaki-xuua, anʼa Saúlo." 
1Samuel31:3 Ita anga i nemena Saúlo, akua mifula a mu mono anga a mu asa mu divumu, anga u tata kiavulu mukonda dia akua mifula." 
1Samuel31:4 Saúlu anga u ambela kibese kiê, uixi: Fomona xibhata u ngi tome-iu u ngi kube-iu mu mixima; sumba akuamabôlo enhá eza, a ngi zubhidisa, a ngi bhanga kasekelelu. Kibese kiê-phe nguaiʼê ku ki bhanga, kuma uala ni uoma uavulu. Mukonda dia kiki, Saúlu muene u sunga o xibhata u di kuba ku pondo iê." 
1Samuel31:5 Kibêse kiê kia zubha ku ki mona kuma Saúlo uafu, muene u di bhalela ue ku pondo ia xibhata iê, anga u fuila-nê kumoxi." 
1Samuel31:6 Kala kiki ni Saúlo muene uafu, ni anʼê atatu, ni kibêse kiê, ni makuenze mê ene oso afu kizuua kiâ kimoxi." 
1Samuel31:7 Akua Izalaiele a tungu ku sámbua koko dia kibota, ni akua sámbua diodio dia Njolodá, kia mono kuma akua Izalaiele a a tolola ia a lenge, ni Saúlu ni anʼê afu, mu mabhata mâ a tunda-mu, a lenga; akua Fidíxia-phe anga eza, a bhingana mu mabhata mâ." 
1Samuel31:8 Kúkia ni kimene, ki eza akua Fidíxia mu zula imbi, a sanga Saúlo ni anʼê atatu a dibhalela mu mulundu ua Jiliboua." 
1Samuel31:9 Anga a mu batula mútue, a mu zula ibhakatu iê, a i tumikisa kʼoxi ia akua Fidíxia, mu kutula na-iu jingolokela ku inzo ia iteka iâ, ni ku mundu." 
1Samuel31:10 Ibhakatu iê anga a i bhaka mʼonzo ia Axitalote; kimbi kiê anga a ki nhenga ku kimbaka kia Bete-Sane. 
1Samuel31:11 Akua Jabezi mu Ngiliiade-phe, kia kʼivu kioso kia bhange akua Fidíxia kua Saúlu," 
1Samuel31:12 mala oso a nguzu-phe a balumuka, enda usuku uoso, hé a katula kimbi kia Saúlo, ni imbi ia anʼê, ku kimbaka kia Bete-Sane; eza na-iu bhu Jabezi, a i ohela bhobho." 
1Samuel31:13 Anga omona ifuba iâ, hé a i funda bhu kota dia muxi ua mutamadixi mu Jabezi. Anga a fula kúdia, a jila mu sambuadi dia izuua." 
2Samuel1:1 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, kia bhiti o kúfua kua Saúlo, ni kia vutuka Davidi mu kujibha akua Amaleke ku ita, kuila ua bhange kiá izuua iiadi mu Zikilake;" 
2Samuel1:2 mu kizuua kia katatu bhu tula muthu ua tundu mu kilômbo kia Saúlo, ni izuatu iê ia tandujuka ni mavu a di kuu mu mútue; o kia zubha kubhiẋila bhua Davidi, u di takuila mu mavu anga u diunda." 
2Samuel1:3 Davidi anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Ua tundu kuebhi? Muene u mu vutuila, uixi: Mu kilômbo kia Izalaiele mu nga lenge." 
2Samuel1:4 Davidi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Kia bhiti kiebhi? Ngi tangele hanji, nga ku diondo. Muene u vutula, uixi: Mundu a lenge mu ita, avulu muene a dibhale, iá afu; ni Saúlu ni monʼê Jonata afu ue." 
2Samuel1:5 Davidi anga u ambela munzangala ua mu mu tangela kiki, uixi: Eie ua kʼijiia kiehhi, kuila Saúlo ni monʼê Jonata afu?" 
2Samuel1:6 Munzangala ua mu mu tudila njimbu, uixi: Mu kuenda kibhuku ngi kala mu bhita ku mulundu ua Jiliboua, anga ngi sanga Saúlo iú ua di kubu ku sosa iê, o makalu a ita ni akua jkikabalu a-lu mu kaia, iá eza ni ku mu zukama." 
2Samuel1:7 Kia sakuka u ngi mona eme, anga u ngʼixana." 
2Samuel1:8 Ngixi-phe, Emʼiú. Muene u ngʼambela, uixi: Eie nanhi? Ngixi: Ngi mukua Amaleke." 
2Samuel1:9 Uixi: Ngi bhiẋile, nga ku diondo, u ngi jibhe; kuma nga bhondalala ni misusu, mukonda muenhu uami uoso moxi hanji iu-é." 
2Samuel1:10 Kienhokio ngi mu bhixila, anga ngi mu jibha, mukonda nga mu ijiia, kuila ka tena dingi kubhuluka se ua di bhale kiá. Eme nga katula o kitundu kia mu kala ku mútue, ni dilenge dia mu kala mu lukuaku, eme nga ku bhekela-iu eie, ngana iami." 
2Samuel1:11 Bhenhobho Davidi u kuata ku izuatu iê, u i tandujula; ni mala oso aia-nê kumoxi kiene." 
2Samuel1:12 Anga a bhanga kibulukutu, a ta jingololo ni kudila, a fula kudia katé mu ngoloxi, mukonda dia Saúlo, ni mukonda dia Jonata monʼê, ni mukonda dia mundu uangene ua Jihova, ni dibhata dia Izalaiele, mbata a dibhale ku mazu a xibhata." 
2Samuel1:13 Davidi anga u ambela munzangala ua mu tudila mjimbu, uixi: Eie ua tundu kuebhi? Muene u vutula, uixi: Ngi monʼa nzuá-ngiza, mukua Amaleke." 
2Samuel1:14 Davidi u mu ambela, uixi: Uoma-phe ua ku kambela-hi, ua kuzenga lukuaku lué mu kujibha muthu ua Jihova ua mu undu ni maji?" 
2Samuel1:15 Davidi anga u ixana-bhu munzangala umoxi ku makuenze mé, uixi: Mu bhiẋile, u mu te. Muene anga u mu ta, u fuila bhenhobho." 
2Samuel1:16 Davidi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Manhinga mé ma kale ku thandu dia mútue ué eʼmuene, kuma dikanu dié muene diene dia ku bhela umbangi ua kuêla, uixi: Eme-muène nga jibha muthu a mu undu kuala Jihova ku ungana." 
2Samuel1:17 Davidi anga u dila ni mukûmbi uenhú ku thandu dia Saúlo, ni ku thandu dia monʼê Jonata," 
2Samuel1:18 anga u tuma kulonga anʼa Juda mukûmbi ua Mufula: uene-ze a u soneka mu Divulu dia Jaxadi: 
2Samuel1:19 Kijîngo kié, u Izalaiele, kia buila ku matala ma milundu! Mazonda, tata, a dibhale!" 
2Samuel1:20 Kana ku ki tangele mu Ngate, kana ku ki fumanesa mu nzunga ia Axikilone; sumba anʼahatu ku akua Fidíxia a sanguluka, sumba anʼahatu a matumbu a kola kikoue." 
2Samuel1:21 Enu milundu ia Jiliboua! ki ku laukile dimume ku thandu dienu, ku thandu dienu ki kuaʼà noke mvula, ki ku kale mábhia ma bhana maujitu kua Jihova! Kuma ngubu ia dizonda kuenhoko kua i texi ufusa, o ngubu ia Saúlo, kala ua kambele ku mu unda ni maji!" 
2Samuel1:22 Mu kúnua manhinga ma akueta, mu kúdia banha ia iiala ia ita, mufula ua Jonata ki ua kexe mu vutuka kuema! Xibhata ia Saúlo ki ia kexe mu kubeta kingoho!" 
2Samuel1:23 Saúlo ni Jonata mu kukola muenhu o kuuabha, o ku di zola, ka di uanununa-phe, kixi ku muenhu kixi mu kufua kuâ, mu kulenga lusolo a somboka jiholokoko, mu kusuina kinéne a tunda jihoji," 
2Samuel1:24 Enu anʼahatu a Izalaiele dilenu Saúlo, ua mi zuikile jinge ikusuka ia dísese, ua mi uabhesele izuatu ni makembu ma ulu." 
2Samuel1:25 Mazonda, tat, a dibhale mu kaẋi ka ita! Jonata ua fuila ku matala ma milundu." 
2Samuel1:26 Kia ngi kate, phangʼiami Jonata, tata! Uthu u ua ngʼidikiza jinga ua vulu; henda i ua ngi kuatelele ia madiuanu! henda ié ia tundu o henda ia ahatu." 
2Samuel1:27 Mazonda, tata, a dibhale! Ibhakatu ia ita ia di boto!" 
2Samuel2:1 Kia bhiti iene ioso iii, Davidi u ibhula kua Jihova, uixi: Ki ngalʼiki, ngi banda ku mabhata ma Juda, inga kana? Jihova anga u mu ambela, uixi: Banda. Davidi uixi: Ngi kana dibhata diebhi? Ngana, uixi: Uia ku Hebolone." 
2Samuel2:2 Kala kiki Davidi u banda kuenhoko, ni ahatu ê aiadi, Ahinouama mukua Jezeleele, ni Abingaíle mukaji a Nebale mukua Karmelo." 
2Samuel2:3 Ni makuenze mê, ene mu di nhenga-nê, Davidi u bandelanâ kumoxi; kala muthu ni dibhata diê, anga a tunga mu jisanzala ja Hebolone." 
2Samuel2:4 Akua Juda anga eza bhenhobho, a unda Davidi mu kala sobha ia muiji uâ ua Juda. Davidi anga a mu kunda, exi: Akua Jabezi-Ngiliiade ene a fûnda Saúlo." 
2Samuel2:5 Davidi anga u katula jiphunga, ua tuma ku akua Jabezi-Ngiliiade, uixi: Jihova a mi benzele, kuma muedikiza ujitu kua muadiʼenu Saúlo, mua mu fûndu!" 
2Samuel2:6 Kiki-phe Jihova a mi sakidile o henda ienu, a mi bhange kidi; eme uami ngi mi sakidila o henda ienu, ki mua tena kubhanga kienhiki." 
2Samuel2:7 O ki tualʼiki-phe, kolenu maku, mu bhange undanda; kuma muadiʼenu Saúlo uafu, o muiji ua Juda a ngʼundu eme mu kala sobha iâ." 
2Samuel2:8 Kiosuʼiki-phe imiʼiii ki iala kubhita, Abinele monʼa Nedi, Kabhitangu ka kifuxi kia Saúlo, ua katula Ixi-bozete monʼa Saúlo, u zaúka-nê ku Mahanaimi," 
2Samuel2:9 Anga u mu hingisa ungana ua kutumina Ngiliiade, ni akua Axudi, ni Jezeleele, ni Ifalaíme, ni Bejamí ni Izalaiele ioso." 
2Samuel2:10 Ixi-bozete, monʼa Saúlo, u kala mu makuinhi auana a mivu kia hingi ungana ua Izalaiele, anga u bhanga mivu iiadi ku ungana. Muiji ua Juda-phe u di tuma ni Davidi." 
2Samuel2:11 Thembu ia bhange Davidi ku ungana ua Juda mu Hebolone, sambuadi dia mivu ni mbeji jisamanu." 
2Samuel2:12 Abinele, monʼa Nedi, ni makuenze ma Ixi-bozete, monʼa Saúlo, a tunda ku Mahanaimi, eza bhu Ngibeione." 
2Samuel2:13 Jouabe, monʼa Zeluia, ni makuenze ma Davidi, a tunda ue, a takana kumoxi bhu dijiia dia Ngibeione; anga a xikama bhenhobho, iá ala ku sámbua kunu dia dijiia, iá ala ku sámbua koko." 
2Samuel2:14 Abinele anga u ambela Jouabe, uixi: Minzangala a balumuke, nga ku diondo, a fikise hanji kubhanga bhu pholo ietu. Jouabe uixi: A balumuke-phe." 
2Samuel2:15 Bhenhobho a balumuka, konda iâ iene imoxi, ku akua Bejamí, makuenze a Ixi-bozete, kuinhi dia muthu ni kiiadi, ku makuenze a Davidi ue kuinhi dia muthu ni kiiadi." 
2Samuel2:16 Ene oso-phe, kala muthu ni muthu u kuata mukuâ mu mútue, anga kala muthu u kuba mukuâ mu jimbanji ni mukuale uê; ene oso anga a di bhalela bhobho, ki bhuala ua subhuka. Kididi kienhokio anga a ki luka, Kididi kia Jiphoko Jatu, mu Ngibeione." 
2Samuel2:17 Mvunda anga i vula kizuua kienhokio; Abinele anga a mu tolola, a mu kaia ni mala a Izalaiele, bhu pholo ia makuenze ma Davidi." 
2Samuel2:18 Ana atatu a Zeluia anga a kala-bhu bhenhobho, ni Jouabe, ni Abisai, ni Azaiele. Azaiele-phe u lenguluka inama kala mbâmbi mu iangu." 
2Samuel2:19 Azaiele anga uia ni kukaia Abinele; mu kukaia ka ẋkina kuabhuka ku kiasu mba ku kúdia, ua jijila Abinele muene." 
2Samuel2:20 Abinele anga u sakuka u talesa ku dima, uixi: Eie-muène Azaiele? U vutula, uixi: Eme muene." 
2Samuel2:21 Abinele anga u mu ambela, uixi: Abhuka ku kúdia mba ku kiasu, u kuate-bhu munzangala umoxi, u mu tambule o imbamba iê. Azaiele-phe ka xikina kuabhuka, hanji ua mu nhenganana." 
2Samuel2:22 Abinele anga u ambela dingi Azaiele, uixi: Batuka-ku-ze o ku ngi kaiela eme. Inga uandala ngi ku kuama, ni u di vunde bhoxi? Hinu eme-phe ngi bhetuka kiebhi o pholo kua kota dié Jouabe?" 
2Samuel2:23 Muene-phe kuma ka xikina ku mu batuka, Abinele anga u mu ẋuka ni muxixi ua dionga diê bhu lumbanji lua katatu, mukutu uê anga u kubuka, sosa ia tundidila kuema; anga u dibhala, u fuila bhu kididi kienhokio. Bhenhobho-phe oso a tula kididi bhua dibhalela Azaiele, bhua fuila, emana hanji ni ku mu tala." 
2Samuel2:24 Jouabe-phe ni Abisai aia ni kukaia Abinele. Dikumbi anga di a fuila mu kubhiẋila bhu kalundu ka Ama, mu kuila o Ngiia ualela ku mbandu ia thunda mu njila iia ku kikangalakata kia Ngibiione." 
2Samuel2:25 Anʼa Bejami anga a di bhongolola oso bhuala Abinele, hé a di bhanga kibuka kimoxi, anga emana bhu thala ia kalundu." 
2Samuel2:26 Abinele anga u kola, u handekela Jouabe, uixi: Kifua xibhata ié ki i zumbuka dingi mu kúnua manhinga? Mbé kua kʼijiia kuma dizubhilu diê di lula? Manhi u di xibhé, ngué ku tumina o mundu phala a batuke mu kaia o phange jâ?" 
2Samuel2:27 Jouabe uixi: Nga loka muene kala Jihova kiala ku muenhu, kuma eie se ua kambele kuzuela mu kimene, hinu mundu ua muangana, keji kukaia jiphange jâ." 
2Samuel2:28 Jouabe anga u xika koloneta; mundu uoso anga emana, hé a batuka mu kukaia Izalaiele, mvunda iabhu, mukonda ka bhânge dingi." 
2Samuel2:29 Abinele-phe ni makuenze mê, enda usuku uosuʼó mu honga ia Alaba, anga a zaúka Njolodá, a bhita mu Bitilone a bhixila ku Mahanaimi." 
2Samuel2:30 Jouabe anga u vutuka mu kukaia Abinele; o kia zubha kubhongolola o mundu, ku makuenze a Davidi kua kambe kuinhi dia muthu nʼivua, kua di te Azaiele." 
2Samuel2:31 Maji o makuenze a Davidi-phe a beta Bejamí, ni makuenze a Abinele, katé kuafu hâma jitatu ja mala ni makuinhi asamanu." 
2Samuel2:32 Anga a zangula Azaiele, a mu fûnda mu mbila ia tatʼâ ia kexe mu Beleme. Jouabe-phe ni makuenze mê enda usuku uoso uenhó, anga a bhixila bhu Hebolone, kuma ki kuandeka kúkia." 
2Samuel3:1 Anga ku kala muene ita ia thembu iavulu, bhu kaẋi ka dibhata dia Saúlo ni dibhata dia Davidi; o nguzu ia Davidi anga iia ni ku di bandekeza, maji o ia dibhata dia Saúlo-phe iia ni kutebhunuka." 
2Samuel3:2 David anga u vuala anʼê bhu Hebolone: thungunu iê Aminone, monʼa Ahinouama mukua Jezeleele;" 
2Samuel3:3 kaiadi Kileiabe, monʼa Abingaile mukaji a Nebale, mukua Kalumelo; katatu Abisalone, monʼa Mahaka, uavu tatʼâ Talamai, sobha ia Ngexule;" 
2Samuel3:4 O kauana Adoniia, monʼa Hajiti;" 
2Samuel3:5 katanu Sefatiia, monʼa Abitale; kasamanu Iteleiamu, monʼa Ekala, mukaji a Davidi. Ene oso iá anʼa Davidi a a vualela bhu Hebolone." 
2Samuel3:6 Kioso kiki hanji ita ia jiji ni dibhata dia Saúlo ni dibhata dia Davidi, Abinele u suina mu bhângela dibhata dia Saúlo." 
2Samuel3:7 Anga bhu kala mukama ua Saúlo, dijina diê Dízipa, monʼa Aiia; Ixi-bozete anga u ambela Abinele, uixi: Phala-hi eie ua bokona kua mukama ua tatʼetu?" 
2Samuel3:8 Abinele bhenhobho u kala ni njinda iavulu, mukonda dia kuzuela kua Ixibozete, uixi: Kifua ua ngi mono ngi mútue uaʼmbua nga kalakalela bhata dia Juda? Katé mu kizuua kia lelu, hanji ngala mu kuidikiza henda ia kukalakela o dibhata dia tatʼenu Saúlo, ni jiphange jé, ni makamba mé, eie muene nga kambe ku ku thelekala bhu lukuaku lua Davidi, maji ki bhinga u ngi tatela kikuma mukonda dia muhatu muenhú?" 
2Samuel3:9 Nzambi a ngi bhange-kiu, eme ngi Abinele, a ngi tele-ko dingina, se kia lokela Jihova kua Davidi eme ngi kamba ku ki kumbidila," 
2Samuel3:10 kia kusondolola o utuminu, u tunde mu dibhata dia Saúlo, ni kukuatesa o kiandu kia Davidi mu ku tumina Izalaiele ni Juda, tunde ku Dane katé Beleseba." 
2Samuel3:11 Ixi-bozete anga u lémbua kuvutuila Abinele, né ngó dízui dimoxi, kuma ua mu kala ni uoma." 
2Samuel3:12 Abinele anga u tuma jiphunga kua Davidi mu dijina diê muene, uixi: Ixi iangene ia nanhi? Uixi dingi; Ndoko, u te kikutu kia ukamba ni eme, phala eme uami ngi kale kumoxi ni eie, nda ngi bheke Izalaiele ioso mu utuminu ué." 
2Samuel3:13 Muene-phe uixi: Kiauabha; ngi ta kikutu ni eie; maji nga ku xindi kima kimoxi: Kumona pholo iami, kikale u dianga ku ngi bhekela Mikala monʼa Saúlo, kioso ki uiza ku ngi mona pholo." 
2Samuel3:14 Davidi anga u tuma jiphunga kua Ixibozete monʼa Saúlo, uixi: Ngi bhane mukajiʼami Mikala, nga mu lembele hâma ia inhûnga ia akua Fidíxia." 
2Samuel3:15 Ixibozete anga u tuma, hé a mu tambula kua munumiʼê, muene Palatiiele monʼa Laíji." 
2Samuel3:16 Munume uê anga u ijila-nê kumoxi iu uenda iu dila, iu uenda iu dila, hé u mu kaiela katé bhu Bahudimi. Bhenhobho Abinele u mu ambela, uixi: Ndeie kiá, vutuka ku bhata dié; muene anga u vutuka." 
2Samuel3:17 Abinele-phe kienhokio ua tumine kiá kukunda adiakimi a Izalaiele, uixi: Mu thembu ia bhiti enu mu endile kiá Davidi kukala sobha ienu ia ku mi tumina." 
2Samuel3:18 Ndokuenu-phe kiá, mu ki bhange kindala; kuma Jihova muene ua tumbula Davidi, uixi: Ku lukuaku lua selevende iami Davidi kuene ku ngi bhuluila o mundu uami ua Izalaiele bhu lukuaku lua akua Fidíxia, ni bhu lukuaku lua nguma jâ joso." 
2Samuel3:19 Abinele anga u ki zuela ue mu mátui ma akua Bejami oso. Abinele anga uia ue kuzuelela mu mátui ma Davidi bhu Hebolone, kioso kia uabhela Izalaiele, ni dibhata dioso dia Bejamí." 
2Samuel3:20 Kienhiki Abinele u bhiẋila kua Davidi mu Hebolone, ni makuinhi aiadi a muthu endela-nê kumoxi. Davidi anga ua a bhangela fesa, ni muene Abinele ni athuʼê eza-nê kumoxi." 
2Samuel3:21 Abinele anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Ki ngi tunda bhenhabha, nga kà bhongolola Izalaiele ioso bhu kinama kié u muenexi, phala a te kikutu ni eie, eie u kale mu ku a tumina kioso kia mesena muẋima ué. Davidi anga u sulula Abinele; o muene anga u muangana ni paze, ku muẋima kua mu uabha." 
2Samuel3:22 Bhu kaxiʼabha-phe, makuenze a Davidi kumoxi ni a Jouabe, a tula ku mbanza, a tundu mu kúlua, eza ni imbamba iavulu ia bhûndu; Abinele-phe a sange kala-bhu dingi bhu bhata dia Davidi mu Hebolone; kuma muene ua mu sulula kiá, iu ua muangana ni paze." 
2Samuel3:23 Kia zubha-phe Jouabe kutula ni kifuxi kioso kiala-nê, a ki kunda Jouabe, exi; Abinele monʼa Nedi uejile kua muenexi, iú ua mu sulula kiá, ua muangana kiá ni paze." 
2Samuel3:24 Jouabe anga u bhixila kua muenexi, uixi; Eie ua bhange kiebhi? Abinele manhi uejile ko kué; eie eie ua mu sulula kiebhi, nʼaiê ngó kienhiki?" 
2Samuel3:25 Eʼmuene Abinele, monʼa Nedi, ua mu ijiia kiambote, uejile ngó ku ku bhomba, uejile ue mu lónda o kutunda kué ni kubokona kué ni ima ioso i uala kubhanga." 
2Samuel3:26 Jouabe, kia zubha kutunda kua Davidi, u tuma jiphunga kukaiela Abinele ni ku mu vutula, anga a mu kuatela bhu kixima kia Sila; Davidi-phe ka kʼijiia." 
2Samuel3:27 Abinele-phe kia zubha ku vutuka bhu Hebolone, Jouabe u takananê bhu muelu ua kimbaka, anga u abhuka-nê bhu mbandu, kala phala kuzuela-nê maka bhu ubheka, bhenhobho anga u mu toma iene ia jimbanji, u fuila bhobho, mukonda dia ku mu vutuila o phonzo ia manhinga ma Azaiele ndengʼiê." 
2Samuel3:28 Ki kia zubha kubhita, Davidi anga u kʼivua, uixi: Ni eme ni utuminu uami, ki ki kale kituxi kietu bhu pholo ia Jihova, ku mivu sé dizubhilu, kiki kia manhinga ma Ahinele monʼa Nedi." 
2Samuel3:29 Kikuma kiki ki nemene ku mútue ua Jouabe, ni ku dibhata dioso dia tatʼâ; mu bhata dia Jouabe ki mua kamba dingi mukua kibhubhe kia manhinga, mba mukua dibhute, mba uenda ni mbangala, mba u fuila ku xibhata, mba mu kamba muthu uenda ni kubhinga jimola." 
2Samuel3:30 Kienhiki ni Jouabe, ni Abisai phangʼiê, a jibha Abinele, mukonda muene ue ua jibha ndengʼiâ Azaiele bhu Ngibiione ku ita." 
2Samuel3:31 Davidi anga u ambela Jouabe, ni athu oso ala ku mbèle iê, uixi: Tandujulenu izuatu ienu, mu di kute idinhaji, mu dile Abinele. Muenexi Davidi anga uia ni ku kaiela ku ditumba." 
2Samuel3:32 Anga a fûnda Abinele bhu Hebolone; muenexi anga u zangula o dízui ni kudila bhu mbila ia Abinele; ni mundu uoso a dilanê kumoxi. 
2Samuel3:33 Muenexi anga u ta mbûndu mukonda dia Abinele, uixi: Abinele, tata, kífua ufua ufuilu ua kiôua?" 
2Samuel3:34 Ka ku kutu maku, ka ku te inama mu jingidinhá, maji mukuâ ni muthu a mu bûba ngó kualʼ o isuéia, kiene ki ua dibhale. Mundu uoso anga a ta jingololo a dila dingi kiavulu ku thandu diê." 
2Samuel3:35 Mundu uoso anga eza kua Davidi ku mu bhomba kudia mu muanha hanji; maji Davidi-phe u loka, uixi: Nzambi a ngi bhange-kiu, a ngi tele-ku, se ngi lola kúdia kuoso-kuoso katé ki tula o dikumbi." 
2Samuel3:36 Mundu uoso anga a ki tongolola, hé ki a uabhela; kuma kioso kiene kubhanga muenexi, mundu uoso kiene mu ku a uabhela muene." 
2Samuel3:37 Kienhiki, mundu uoso, ni Izalaiele ioso, mu kizuua kienhokio a xala ni ku kʼijiia kuma muenexi ki muene ua ki bhange kia kujjibhisa Abinele monʼa Nedi." 
2Samuel3:38 Bhenhobho muenexi anga u ambela akua mbèle iê, uixi: Kifua ki mua kʼijiia kuma mona-ngana, muadiakimi, ua dibhale lelu mu Izalaiele?" 
2Samuel3:39 Eme lelu hanji nga kambe nguzu sumbala a ngʼundu ku ungana; mala enhá, anʼa Zeluia o kuẋinuka kuâ kua ngi bhonzo; Jihova-phe muene u futa o kisuéia, kioso kia tokala mu usuéia uê." 
2Samuel4:1 Ixi-bozete, monʼa Saúlo, ki evu kuila Abinele ua fuila ku Hebolone, ua botomoka, mu maku mua mu bhuila; akua Izalaiele oso a kumbikinha." 
2Samuel4:2 Ixi-bozete, monʼa Saúlo, anga u kala ni malʼaiadi, jikabhitango ja ibuka; iú dijina diê Bahana, o mukuá dijina diê Lekabe, ene oso anʼa Dimone mukua Belote, anʼa Bejamí (kuma Belote ia tokala ue kua Bejamí." 
2Samuel4:3 Suke akua Belote-phe a lengela ku Ngitaímu, ia a biluka jinzuàngiza koko katé mu kizuua kia lelu)." 
2Samuel4:4 O Jonata-phe, monʼa Saúlo, u kala ue ni monʼê ua diiala, ua nemana inama iê iiadi. Monʼú u kala mu mivu itanu kioso ki ejiie o njimbu ja Saúlu ni Jonata ja tundu ku Jezalele; kiledi kiê anga u mu zangula, u lenga-nê; kioso-phe kiala kubhanga lusolo lua kulenga, mona ua laúka, anga u xala ni unema, Monʼú dijina diê Mefi-bozete." 
2Samuel4:5 Anʼa Dimone mukua Belote, Lekabe ni Bahana, anga eza, mu muanha uatu, a tula bhu kanga dia Ixibozete kioso kiala kunhoha mu kumbi dia mediia." 
2Samuel4:6 Anga a bokona mʼonzo, kala a-ndu katula tiliku; muene anga a mu ta mukuale mu jimbanji; Lekabe ni phangʼiê Bahana anga a lenga." 
2Samuel4:7 Kuma kia bokona mʼonzo a sange ua zeka bhu hama mu xilu, anga a mu toma, a mu jibha, hé a mu batula mútue, mútue uê a u ambata, ela njila ia honga ia Halaba, anga enda usuku uoso." 
2Samuel4:8 Anga a bheka mútue ua Ixibozete kua Davidi bhu Hebolone, ambela muenexi, exi: Talesa mútue iú ua Ixibozete, monʼa Saúlo, nguma ié, ua sota jinga ku ku tambula o muenhu ué; Jihova phe ua ku zokela mvunda ié, u muenexi, kua Saúlo ni mbutu iê." 
2Samuel4:9 Davidi anga u vutuila Lekabe ni Bahana phangʼiê, anʼa Dimone mukua Belote, uixi: Jihova a nangenene! Ua ngi kudila o muenhu uami mu jiphaxi, kuma kia ngi sangele muthu, uixi:" 
2Samuel4:10 Talesa Saúlo uafu, ku muẋima uê ua fikile kuila njimbu iambote ia ngi tudila, maji nga mu kuatela bhenhobho, eme nga mu jibhila bhu Zikilake; kiene kisakidilu ki nga mu bhana kia njimbu iê." 
2Samuel4:11 Kuambe dingi o athu iá, o isuéia a jibhila o muthu ua iuka mʼonzo iê, bhu hama iê bhua zeka; manhi o manhinga mê ngi kamba ku mʼebhula bhu lukuaku luenu, ni ku mi jimisa ue o mbutu mu ngongo?" 
2Samuel4:12 Davidi anga u tuma makuenze mê, kuila a a jibhe, anga a a batula maku ni inama, hé a a nhengena bhu dijiia, mu Hebolone. Mútue ua Ixibozete-phe a u tambula, hé a u fûnda mu mbila ia Abinele bhu Hebolone." 
2Samuel5:1 Thembu ioso-phe miji ioso ia Izalaiele anga eza kua Davidi bhu Hebolone, exi: Etu-ze tu kifuba kié, tu xitu ié." 
2Samuel5:2 Mu thembu iabhiti, kia kexi hanji Saúlo ku ungana, eie muene ua kexe mu tuamenena Izalaiele mu kutunda ni mu kubokona; Jihova ue ua ku ambelele, kuma: Eie uà kala u mubidi ua mundu uami Izalaiele, eie uà kala u mutuameneni ua Izalaiele." 
2Samuel5:3 Kienhiki adiakimi oso a Izalaiele anga eza kua muenexi bhu Hebolone, muenexi Davidi anga u ta-nâ kikutu bhu Hebolone bhu pholo ia Jihova; Davidi anga a mu unda ku ungana ua Izalaiele." 
2Samuel5:4 Davidi u kala mu makuinhi atatu a mivu kia hingi ungana, anga u bhanga makuinhi auana a mivu ku ungana." 
2Samuel5:5 Mu Hebolone ua bhange sambuadi dia mivu ni mbeji jisamanu ku ungana ua Juda; mu Jeluzaleme ua bhange makuinhi atatu a mivu ni itatu ku ungana ua Izalaiele ioso ni Juda kumoxi. 
2Samuel5:6 Muenexi ni makuenze mê anga a katuka aia ku Jeluzaleme, kúlua ni akua Jebuzi ene akua ʼxi mʼokulu. Ene anga ambela Davidi, exi: Ki u kamba kutolola hanji o ifôfo ni inema, mumu kutena kubokona-mu. Kuma a fika Davidi u lémbua kukobona." 
2Samuel5:7 Sumbala kiene, maji Davidi mbonge iâ ia Ziione, ua a tambula-iu; iene kiá o mbânza ia Davidi." 
2Samuel5:8 Kizuua kienhokio Davidi u zuela, uixi: Uoso u beta akua Jebuzi, a bandele ku njila ia mulombo ua menha, a bete o inema ienhoio ni ifôfo ia di kuma ni muẋima ua Davidi. Kiene ki kia xalela mu Sabhu, exi: Ifôfo ni inema ii bhobho, ka tena kubokona mʼonzo." 
2Samuel5:9 Davidi anga u tunga kiá mu mbonge ienhiʼii, hé u i luka uixi: Mbânza ia Davidi. Davidi anga u bhitisa-bhu lumbu tunde bhu Milo hé uia ni kutunga katé moxi." 
2Samuel5:10 Ukota ua Davidi anga uia ni ku di bandekeza ni kukula; kuma o Jihova, Nzambi ia ifuẋi, uala-nê." 
2Samuel5:11 Hilamu, sobha ia Tilu, anga u tuma jiphunga kua Davidi, ni miẋi ia misédulu, ni jikalupindelu ni jipedelelu, Davidi anga a mu tungila inzo." 
2Samuel5:12 Davidi anga ki mu tongolokela kuma Jihova ua mu kuatesa bhu kididi mu ku tumina Izalaiele, kuma ua fumanesa ungana uê mukonda dia henda ia mundu uê Izalaiele." 
2Samuel5:13 Davidi anga u lumba dingi akama, u bhenga ue dingi ahetuʼê mu Jeluzaleme, kia zubha kutunda mu Hebolone; anga a vuala dingi anʼa mala ni anʼa ahatu a Davidi." 
2Samuel5:14 Majina a anʼê a a vualela mu Jeluzaleme, enhá: Ni Samuua, ni Sobabe, ni Natane, ni Solomá," 
2Samuel5:15 ni Ibhale, ni Elixuua, ni Nefeke, ni jafiia," 
2Samuel5:16 ni Elixama, ni Eliiada, ni Elifelete." 
2Samuel5:17 Akua Fidíxia-phe kia kʼivu kuila Davidi a mu undu ku ungana ua Izalaiele, akua Fidíxia oso eza mu sota Davidi phala ku mu kuta; Davidi kia kʼivu u kulumuka ku mbonge ia kimbaka." 
2Samuel5:18 Akua Fidíxia-phe a diangele kuiza, ia a di zale mu honga ia Jilefaime." 
2Samuel5:19 Davidi anga u ibhula kua Jihova, uixi: Ngi banda mu kúlua ni akua Fidíxia, inga kana? Manhi ua-nda ku ngi thelekala-nâ bhu lukuaku luami? Jihova anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Banda, kuma ni kidi kiene akua Fidíxia nga kà a thelekala muene bhu lukuaku lué." 
2Samuel5:20 Davidi anga uiza bhu Bahalepelazimi anga u a betela bhenhobho; anga u zuela, uamba, uixi: Jihova ua muanganesa jinguma jami kala kixitu kia menha kia baze. Kiene kia lukila-bhu dijina dia Bahale-pelazimi." 
2Samuel5:21 Iteka iâ anga a i xia bhoxi bhenhobho; Davidi ni makuenze-mê a i zangula aia na-iu. 
2Samuel5:22 Akua Fidíxia-phe anga a banda dingi luamukuá, a di zala mu honga ia Jilefaími." 
2Samuel5:23 Davidi-phe ki ebhula kua Jihova, Jihova uizi: Kana kubanda; inda u ta honda, hé u a kondela ku dima, ua a zombela bhu miẋi ia jimolela." 
2Samuel5:24 Kioso-phe eie ki uivua mulokoso mu mafue ma jimolela kala athu a mu kuenda, kienhokio kiá eie mateka kúlua, kuma kithanganʼokio Jihova ua ku tuamenena muene ku pholo mu kubeta kifuxi kia akua Fidíxia." 
2Samuel5:25 Davidi anga u bhanga kala kioso kia mu tumu Jihova, anga u beta akua Fidíxia tunde bhu Ngibeia katé bhu Ngezele." 
2Samuel6:1 Bhenhobho Davidi anga u bhongolola athu, o makota a jingana mu Izalaiele, a di tungula mu akuâ, makuinhi atatu a midi ia muthu." 
2Samuel6:2 Davidi anga u zanguka ni mundu uoso uala-nê kumoxi, aia bhu Bahale ia Juda, mu kutakana kuenhoko o álaka ia Nzambi, ia ku fumanesena o Dijina, dijina dia Jihova dia Ifuẋi, ua xikama muʼaxaxi ka jixelubini." 
2Samuel6:3 Anga a xikika álaka ia Nzambi mu dikalu dia ubhe, kia zubha ku i katula mʼonzo ia Abinadabe, bhu kalundu ka Ngibeia. Ni Uza ni Ahiio anʼa Abinadabe ene a kexi mu kombola o dikalu dia ubhe." 
2Samuel6:4 Mu kutunda mʼonxo ia Abinadabe bhu kalundu, Uza u kala bhu mbandu ia álaka ia Nzambi, o Ahiio ua tuamena ku pholo." 
2Samuel6:5 Ni Davidi-phe, ni dibhata dioso dia Izalaiele, a kala mu sanguluka ni ku xikila bhu pholo ia Jihova, o idifua ioso ia jimuzika ióiudike ni muxi ua mufaia, ni jimbànza ni tukoxi, ni jingoma, ni misaxi, ni jingonge." 
2Samuel6:6 Kutula-phe bhu dibhiatelu dia Nakome, Uza u sunununa lukuaku mu kukuata álaka ia Nzambi, mukonda jingombe ja di bhukana, iene iii ia zendalala." 
2Samuel6:7 Njinda ia Jihova anga i uamena Uza; Nzambi anga u mu betela bhenhobho mukonda dia kutondala kuê; u fuila bhobho bhu mbandu ia álaka ia Nzambi. 
2Samuel6:8 Davidi anga ki mu iibhila mukonda Jihova ua jikula Uza muʼaxaxe; kididi kienhokio anga u ki luka Peleza-Uza, katé mu kixuua kia lelu." 
2Samuel6:9 Davidi anga u kala ni uoma uavulu ua Jihova kizuua kienhokio, uixi: Álaka ia Jihova ia-nda kuiza kiebhi bhu ngalʼeme?" 
2Samuel6:10 Kienhiki Davidi hé u kamba kubhiẋila ni álaka ia Jihova bhu bhata diê mu mbanza ia Davidi; maji Davidi u abhuka na-iu, anga u i bheka mʼonzo ia Obede-Edomo, mukua Ngate." 
2Samuel6:11 Álaka ia Jihova anga i xala mʼonzo ia Obede-Edomo mukua Ngate mbeji jitatu, Jihova anga u zediuisa Obede-Edomo ni dibhata diê dioso." 
2Samuel6:12 Anga a ki kunda muenexi Davidi, exi: Jihova-ze ua zediuisa dibhata dia Obede-Edomo, ni ioso ia mu tokala, mukonda dia álaka ia Nzambi. Davidi anga uia hé u takana álaka ia Nzambi mʼonzo ia Obede-Edomo, u i bheka mu mbânza ia Davidi ni kusanguluka." 
2Samuel6:13 Mu ku ki bhanga-phe, oso akua kuzenza álaka ia Jihova, kia te-ku ngó makanda masamanu, u satela-bhu ngombe ni mbudi ia sevado." 
2Samuel6:14 Davidi anga u kina, bhu pholo ia Jihova ni nguzu ioso; Davidi ua zuata efodi ia linhu." 
2Samuel6:15 Kienhiki, Davidi ubanda ni dibhata dioso dia Izalaiele, a bheka álaka ia Nzambi ni kudikola kua kusanguluka, ni kuxika koloneta." 
2Samuel6:16 Mu ku ki bhanga-phe, kioso kiala kubokona álaka ia Jihova mu mbânza ia Davidi, Mikala, monʼa Saúlo ua muhatu, u zongola bhu njanena, anga u mona muenexi Davidi uala mu tuka-tuka, uala mu kina bhu pholo ia Jihova: muene anga u mu tobhesa mu muẋima uê." 
2Samuel6:17 Álaka ia Jihova anga a i bhiẋidisa, a i tula bhu kididi kiê mu kaẋi ka balaka ia iudika Davidi phala ku i bhakela-mu; Davidi anga u bhakula jisata ja kuoha, ni jisata ja kubhandulula kua Jihova." 
2Samuel6:18 Kia zubha Davidi kubhakula sata ia kuoha ni sata ia paze, Davidi u benzela mundu mu dijina dia Jihova dia Ifuẋi." 
2Samuel6:19 Muene anga u uanena mundu uoso ua Izalaiele, ni mala ni ahatu, kala muthu dikende dia mbolo, ni thumba iambote ia xitu, ni mutadi ua ji-uva jakukuta. Mundu anga a muangana, kala muthu ku bhata diê." 
2Samuel6:20 Davidi anga uia kubenzela dibhata diê-muène. Mikala, monʼa Saúlo ua muhatu, anga uiza kukauidila Davidi, uixi: Muenexiʼa Izalaiele kujinga kuahi lelu, u di vungununa bhu pholo ia tuhatu tua abhikʼé, mukuâ ni muthu uoso-uoso ngó ua kambe sonhi!" 
2Samuel6:21 Davidi anga u ambela Mikala, uixi: Nga ki bhangela o kusanguluka bhu pholo ia Jihova, ua tenene ku ngi tungula eme mu ku tùnda tatʼenu ni dibhata dioso, ni ku ngi tumbika kukala ku pholo ia mundu uangene ua Jihova, uene ua Izalaiele; kiene ki nga tonokena bhu pholo ia Jihova." 
2Samuel6:22 Ngi di sebulula muene dingi, kiki ndenge, ngi di tolesa muene ku mesu mami eme-muène; o tuhatu-phe tu ua tangeʼoto, ene a ngi bhana jinga kijingu." 
2Samuel6:23 Mikala-phe, monʼa Saúlo ua muhatu tunde kienhokio ánga u kamba mona katé kiá bhu kizuua kia ufuilu uê." 
2Samuel7:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, Sobha Davidi kia zubha kukala kiá mʼonzo iê, Jihova ue ua mu bhana kunhoha, ku jinguma ja tokala ku mbandu joso;" 
2Samuel7:2 Muenexi u ambela polofeta Natane, uixi: Talesa, eme nga tungu mʼonzo ia musédulu, o álaka ia Nzambi phe hanji ia tungu mu jilona ja balaka." 
2Samuel7:3 Natane anga u ambela muenexi, uixi: Ndeie, u bhange kioso kia ku kala ku muẋima, kuma Jihova uala nʼeie." 
2Samuel7:4 Anga ki bhita usuku uenhó, kizuelu kia Jihova kʼiza kua Natane, uixi:" 
2Samuel7:5 Ndeie, kà tangele selevende iami Davidi: Eme Jihova uambe kiki: Manhi eie u ngi tungila inzo mu ngi kala?" 
2Samuel7:6 Kuma kiluua ngi tunga mʼonzo tunde kizuua ki nga katula anʼa Izalaiele mu Ijito, katé kizuua kia lelu, ngene kukala-phe mu balaka ni mu fundu." 
2Samuel7:7 Mu ididi ioso mu nga nhungana ni anʼa Izalaiele, ua ngiʼvua ni ku ki zuela ku miji ia Izalaiele ioso i nga tuma jinga kuinga mundu uami ua Izalaiele, kuila: Mua kambela-hi ku ngi tungila inzo ia misédulo?" 
2Samuel7:8 Ki tualʼiki-phe, kà tangele selevende iami Davidi, uixi: Eme Jihova dia Ifuẋi, uambe kiki: Nga ku katula mu kuinga ibhaku mu iangu, mu kombola jimbudi, phala u kale ku pholo mu tambula konda ia mundu uami ua Izalaiele." 
2Samuel7:9 Eme ngende ni eie kuoso-kuoso ku ua di tela jinga, jinguma jé nga ji buikisa bhu pholo ié; nga ku jîngisa o dijina, kala o majina ma athu ónene a fumana mu ngongo." 
2Samuel7:10 Mundu uami ua Izalaiele nga a bhana kididi, nga-nda ku a phapha phala a tunge a some, ka bhingi dingi kutáula; isuéia ki i kala dingi mu ku a tatesa kala mʼokulu," 
2Samuel7:11 kala mu izuua i nga tumine afundixi kutambula konda ia mundu uami ua Izalaiele. Eie ngi ku bhana kunhoha-ku ku izudidiku ia jinguma jé joso. O Jihova ue, ua te-ku dingi o ku ku tangela, kuma, Jihova muene ua-nda ku ku tungila eie o inzo." 
2Samuel7:12 O kia kà tenena izuua ié, ki ua kʼàia ku kilu ni a-tatʼenu, nga kà zangeleka o mbutu ié i ku bhingana ku dima, i tunda mu divumu dié muene, o utuminu uê ngi u kuatesa, u kola kiambote." 
2Samuel7:13 Muenhú muene hinu u ngi tungila inzo ia dijina diami, o kiandu kia utuminu uê ngi ki kolesa bhu kididi, anga kia kà xalela." 
2Samuel7:14 Eme ngi mu kala ngi tata iê, o muene u ngi kala monʼami. Se u bhukumuka anga u tondala, ngi mu beta ni mbangala ia kubeta athu, ngi mu bha jixikote ja anʼa athu." 
2Samuel7:15 Maji o henda iami-phe ki ngi mu katula-iu, kala ki nga i katula kua Saúlo, eme nga mu katula-ku bhu pholo ié." 
2Samuel7:16 Dibhata dié-phe ni utuminu ué uà kola ku pholo ku uia, kiandu kié kià xala sé dizubhilu." 
2Samuel7:17 Kala kioso kia mu ambela Ngana mu maka mosoʼama, ni kioso kia a mono mu kisukila kiki, kiene muene kia tangela Natane kua Davidi." 
2Samuel7:18 Davidi, muenexi, bhenhobho u bokona hé u xikama bhu pholo ia Jihova, uixi: emeʼeme nanhi, Ngana iami, Jihova, tata! dibhata diami akuahi, phala u ngi bheke ditala kala didi?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kienhiki ue ua ki mono kima kiofele, Ngana iami, Jihova, tata! Maji hanji ua tange ue ni dibhata dia mubhikʼé uixi di xalela katé ku hádia ni hádia! Kifua athu kiene kiene kubhangʼokio Jihova, Ngana iami, tata!" 
2Samuel7:20 Eme-phe ngi Davidi, ngi zuela dingi kiebhi ko kué? kuma eie ua ngʼijiia ngi mubhikʼé, Ngana iami, Jihova!" 
2Samuel7:21 Mukonda dia kizuelu kié, mukonda kia ku kala ku muẋima ué, kiene ki ua kalakela ima iónene ioso iii, ni ku i ijidisa mubhikʼé." 
2Samuel7:22 Kala kiki, eie ukôla, Ngana iami, Jihova! ku moneka mukuenu u soka-nê, ki kuene dingi Nzambi iengi, kala ki tua mu kʼivua jinga mu mátui metu." 
2Samuel7:23 Mundu uahi ue mu ngongʼumu u soka ni mundu ué ua Izalaiele, ene ngó ubheka uâ ku mundu, a bhingi Nzambi iâ uia ni ku a kudila, ni ku a bhangesa kukala mundu uê uangene, muene, nʼa di bhangela dijina, nʼa mi bhangela ue ima iónene, ni ima i kuatesa uoma mʼoxi ienu, bhu pholo ia mundu ué katé ki ua a kula mu Ijito ku akuaʼxi iengi ni ku nzambi jâ, hé u a bheka dingi ku mukutu uê." 
2Samuel7:24 Mundu ué ua Izalaiele anga u a tungisa mu kala mundu ué ua di kalela mu mivu ia kambe dizubhilu; eie muene Jihova, ua di bhange u Nzambi iâ." 
2Samuel7:25 O kiki-phe, u Jihova Nzambi, kizuelu kié ki ua bhana, kia tokala kua mubhikʼé, ni kia tokala ku dibhata diê, kumbidila-kiu mu mivu ia kambe dizubhilu, u bhange muene kioso ki ua tange." 
2Samuel7:26 Dijina dié di fumane jinge sé dizubhilu, phala aie ni ku ki tanga kuma: Jihova dia Ifuẋi, muene Nzambi ia tambula konda ia Izalaiele; o dibhata dia mubhikʼé Davidi dià tungiua bhu pholo ié." 
2Samuel7:27 Kuma eie, u Jihova dia Ifuẋi, u Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ua kʼivisa mu mátui ma mubhikʼé, uixi; Eme nganda ku ku tungila dibhata; kiene ki nga ki sangela mu muẋima, ngi mubhikʼé, o ku ku sambela musambu uenhú." 
2Samuel7:28 Kiki-phe, u Ngana, Jihova, eiemuène u Nzambi imoxi, o maka mé ma kidi, eie-muène ua bangana ni mubhikʼé o kima kiambote kiki." 
2Samuel7:29 Kiki-phe ki ku uabhele, Ngana Nzambi, o kuzediuisa dibhata dia mubhikʼé, phala di xalele ni di nangenene bhu pholo ié, mu mivu ia kambe dizubhilu; kuma eie-muène Ngana, u Jihova, ua ki tange. O dibhata dia mubhikʼé nda di zediue ni dibesá dié mu mivu iakambe dizubhilu." 
2Samuel8:1 Kia bhiti imʼii, Davidi u beta akua Fidíxia, hé u a tolola; o kijingo kia kutumina mbanza iâ ia dikota, u ki tambula bhu maku ma akua Fidíxia." 
2Samuel8:2 Anga u beta akua Mouabhe ni ku a zonga ni mukolo; u a zekesa bhoxi, anga u zonga mikolo iiadi ia ku jibha, mukolo umoxi ua ku a xisa ni muenhu. Akua Mouabhe anga a kala mu bhikila Davidi, enda ni ku mu bhakuila madijimu." 
2Samuel8:3 Davidi anga u beta ue Hadadezele, monʼa Lehobo, sobha ia Zoba, kia sotele kusambukisa utuminu uê katé ku ngiji ia Eufalate." 
2Samuel8:4 Davidi anga u mu bua midi ia muthu ni hâma sambuadi, akua kumondala jikabalo, ni makuinhi aiadi a midi, makuenze akua kuenda bhoxi; Davidi anga u batula mixibha ia jikabalo, u xia-ku ngó ji tokala mu hâma ia makalu." 
2Samuel8:5 Akua Sídia ue, mu Damasku, ki eza mu ku banda Hadadezele, sobha ia Zoba, Davidi u buidisa ku akua Sídia makuinhi aiadi a midi ia mala, ni midi jiiadi." 
2Samuel8:6 Davidi anga u ta jipoxto mu Sídia ia Damasku, akua Sídia anga a kala mu bhikila Davidi, enda ni ku mu bhakuila madijimu. Jihova anga u bhana uzonda kua Davidi, kuoso-kuoso kuambe kulunga ni kúlua, u kala mu tolola." 
2Samuel8:7 Davidi anga u tambula jingubu ja ulu, ja zakelele o makuenze a Hadadezele, anga u ji bheka mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Samuel8:8 Ni ku Beta, ni ku Belotai, o jisanzala ja Hadadezele, sobha Davidi u tambula-ku ue ngôndo ia nzungule muene." 
2Samuel8:9 O ki evu Toi, sobha ia Hamate, kuila Davidi ua beta kifuxi kia Hadadezele," 
2Samuel8:10 Toi u katula monʼê Jolamu, u mu tuma kua sobha Davidi, ku mu kunda, ni ku mu tanesa, mukonda ualu ni Hadadezele, iu ua mu beta; kuma Hadadezele ua kexile izuua ioso mu kúlua ni Toi. Jolamu anga u mu bhekela malonga a phalata, ni malonga a ulu, ni malonga a ngôndo." 
2Samuel8:11 Malonga enhá Davidi anga u a lumbila Jihova, anga u mu lumbila ue ni phalata ni ulu ia tambula ku jixi jamukuá joso ja tolola, o jixi kala jiji:" 
2Samuel8:12 ni ku Sídia, ni ku Mouabhe, ni ku anʼa Amone, ni ku akua Fidíxia, ni ku Amaleke, kumoxi ni iii ia tambula madibhundila kua Hadadezele, monʼa Lehobo, sobha ia Zoba." 
2Samuel8:13 Davidi anga u fumana dingi o dijina kiavulu, kuma o kia vutuka mu beta akua Sídia, mu Kibota kia honga ia Môngua, ua beta-mu ue dingi kuinhi dia midi ni nake dia midi ia muthu akua Edomo." 
2Samuel8:14 Anga u ta jipoxto mu Edomo, akua Edomo oso anga a kala mu bhikila Davidi." 
2Samuel8:15 Davidi anga u kala mu tumina Izalaiele ioso; Davidi u batula milonga, u kumbidisa o kidi muʼaxaxi ka mundu uê uoso." 
2Samuel8:16 O Jouabe, monʼa Zeluia, muene o komanande u tumina o kifuxi kioso kia makuenze a ita; Jozafate, monʼa Ahiludi, u kala musoneki a jindunda ja malunda;" 
2Samuel8:17 o Zadoko, monʼa Ahithube, ni Ahimeleke, monʼa Abiiatale, a kala jinganga;" 
2Samuel8:18 o Selaia u kala kidivá; o Benaia, monʼa Jehoiada, muene komanande u tumina o masoladi ene kulangidila muenexi, o Makeleti ni Mapelete; anʼa Davidi anga akala ue ene o makota ku mbanza." 
2Samuel9:1 Davidi anga u ibhula, uixi: Hanji kua xala muthu ku dibhata dia Saúlo, phala ni ngi mu idikiza henda mukonda dia Jonata?" 
2Samuel9:2 Tala, ku dibhata dia Saúlo anga ku kala mukua-mbèle, dijina diê Nziba. Anga a mu ixana kuiza kua Davidi; muenexi anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Eie muene Nziba? Uixi; Eme-muène, Muadi, ngi mubhikʼé." 
2Samuel9:3 Muenexi uixi: Ku dibhata dia Saúlo hanji kua xala muthu, ni ngi mu idikize henda ia Nzambi? Nziba anga u ambela muenexi, uixi: Sai hanji monʼa Jonata ua diiala, ua nemana inama iê iiadi ioso." 
2Samuel9:4 Muenexi anga u mu ambela, uixi: Muene, iú kuebhi? Nziba anga u ambela muenexi, uixi: Iú monzo ia Makidi, monʼa Amiiele, bhu Lodebale." 
2Samuel9:5 Muenexi Davidi anga u tuma ku mu takana mʼonzo ia Makidi, monʼa Amiiele bhu Lodebale." 
2Samuel9:6 Mefibozete monʼa Jonata, monʼa Saúlo, anga uiza kua Davidi, u dibhala pholo bhoxi, u diunda. Davidi uixi: Mefibozete! Muene uixi: Emʼiú, Ngana, ngi mubhikʼé!" 
2Samuel9:7 Davidi hé u mu ambela, uixi: Ku kale ni uoma; kuma ngi ku idikiza henda muene, mukonda dia Jonata, tatʼenu; ngi ku bhana dingi mikáu ioso ia kukuʼenu Saúlo; eie-muène u kala jinga mu kúdia mbolo ku meza mami izuua ioso." 
2Samuel9:8 Muene anga u bhetamena bhoxi, u diunda, uixi: Eme muene nga soko kiebhi, ngi mubhikʼé, kuila eie u ngi ta mesu kiki, ngedi kala ímbua ia di fuila?" 
2Samuel9:9 Bhenhobho muenexi anga u ixana Nziba, mukua-mbèle ia Saúlo, hé u mu ambela, uixi: Ioso ia tokalele kua Saúlo, ni dibhata diê dioso, nga i bhana kua monʼa muadiʼé." 
2Samuel9:10 Eie u mu dimina jinga mábhia ê, ni eie, ni anʼé, ni abhikʼé; u mu bhekela jinga ku idima, phala monʼa muadiʼé a kale ni kúdia; maji Mefibozete muene-phe, monʼa muadiʼé, u dia jinga ku meza mami. Nziba muenhú anga u kala ni kuinhi dia mona ni kitanu, ni makuinhi aiadi a abhika." 
2Samuel9:11 Nziba anga u ambela muenexi, uixi: Kùku, kioso ki ua tange, ngi ki bhanga muene, ngi mubhikʼé. Muenexi-phe, uixi: Eie u Mefibozete, udia jinga ku meza mami, kala kiene kúdia anʼa sobha." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibozete anga u kala ni monʼê muene, hanji mona-ndenge, dijina diê Mika. Ene oso-phe mu dibhata dia Nziba a kala mu bhikila Mefibozete." 
2Samuel9:13 Mefibozete anga u tunga kienhiki mu Jeluzaleme; u kala mu kúdia jinga ku meza a muenexi. Muene-phe ua nemana inama iê iiadi ioso. 
2Samuel10:1 Kia zubha kubhita ima iii, o sobha ia anʼa Amone úfua, o monʼê Hanuni anga u mu bhingana ku ungana." 
2Samuel10:2 Davidi anga u zuela, uixi: Eme ngʼidikiza henda kua Hanuni monʼa Nahaxi, kala tatʼâ kia ngʼidikiza eme o henda. Davidi anga u katula athu ku mbèle iê, u a tuma ku mu hindula ni ku mu konda malamba mukonda dia kúfua kua tatʼâ. Akua mbèle ia Davidi anga a bhixila moxi ia anʼa Amone." 
2Samuel10:3 O makota-phe ma jitata ja anʼa Amone, ambela Hanuni, muadiʼâ, exi: Eie ua fika Davidi ua ki bhangela ujitu ua tatʼenu, kia tumu ku ku konda malambʼiki? Manhi Davidi ka tumikisa akua mbèle iê mu ku ku lónda o mbànza, ni ku i ijiia kiambote, phala ku i lundumuna?" 
2Samuel10:4 Kienhiki Hanuni u kuata akua mbèle ia Davidi, ua bhuta miezu ku mbandu imoxi, izuatu iâ u i butulula mu kaẋi, hé a xala mataku mu kanga, anga u a kaia." 
2Samuel10:5 Kia ki kundu Davidi, muene u tuma athu ku a batuila mu njila; kuma mala enhá ala ni jisonhi javulu ja a kuata. Muenexi, uixi: Kalenu hanji bhu Jedikó katé miezu ienu ki i sabhuka dingi, mu ize kiua ku bhata." 
2Samuel10:6 Anʼa Amone kia mono kuila a di nuhisa zumba diaiibha kua Davidi, anʼa Amone a tuma kukasa akua Sídia bhu Bete-Lehobo ni akua Sídia mu Zoba, makuinhi aiadi a midi ia muthu, akua kuenda bhoxi, ni sobha ia Mahaka ni midi ia muthu, ni akua Tobu kuinhi dia midi ni midi jiadi." 
2Samuel10:7 Kia kʼivu Davidi, u katula Jouabe kumoxi ni kifuxi kioso kia masoladi a indanda, hé u a tuma kuia kúlua-nâ." 
2Samuel10:8 Anʼa Amone anga a tunda, hé a di ta ku munono phala kúlua ita bhu muelu ua kimbaka kiâ; akua Sídia-phe ku Zoba ni ku Lehobo, ni akua Tobu ni akua Mahaka, a di kalela ni kilômbo kiâ mu mukáu ku kanga." 
2Samuel10:9 Jouabe-phe kia mono kuma ita ia mu lungila ia kala ku pholo ni ku dima, u sola o mala a indanda a di tungula mu akuá mu Izalaiele, hé ua ta ku munono phala kúlua ni akua Sídia." 
2Samuel10:10 O mala amukuá a xala-ku, ku mundu, ua a bhana kua phangʼiê Abisai, anga u a ta ue ku musanga phala kúlua ni anʼa Amone." 
2Samuel10:11 Uixi: Se ngi sanga akua Sídia a ngi tundu mu nguzu, eie uiza mu ku ngi banda; o ki kala-phe anʼa Amone ene a ku tundu eie mu nguzu, eme-phe ngiza mu ku ku banda." 
2Samuel10:12 Tu kodienu maku ni mixima, tu bhange undanda mu bhângela o mundu uetu ni mabhata ma Nzambi ietu; o Jihova a tu bhange kioso muene kia mu uabhela ku mesu mê." 
2Samuel10:13 Kienhiki Jouabe, ni mundu uoso aia-nê kumoxi, a bhixila kua akua Sídia mu kúlua, o akua Sídia anga a toloka hé a lenga bhu pholo iâ." 
2Samuel10:14 Anʼa Amone ue kia mono akua Sídia a lenge, ene uâ a lenga bhu pholo ia Abisai anga oso a bokona mu mbonge iâ. Jouabe-phe anga u tunda-ku kua anʼa Amone, anga u iza ku Jeluzaleme." 
2Samuel10:15 Akua Sídia kia mono kuma a a tolola, abhi-ku bhu pholo ia Izalaiele, a di bhongolola dingi." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezele anga u tuma kukasa akua Sídia ku sámbua dia Ngiji, anga eza bhu Helamu; ni Sobaki kabhitangu ka kifuxi kia Hadadezele, muene ua a kalela ku pholo," 
2Samuel10:17 Anga a ki tangela Davidi; muene anga u bhongolola Izalaiele ioso, hé u zaúka ku sámbua dia Njolodá, anga u bhixila bhu Helamu. Akua Sídia-phe anga a di ta ku muxinda bhu pholo ia Davidi, a lua-nê." 
2Samuel10:18 Maji akua Sídia-phe a lémbua-ku anga a lénga, Izalaiele ua a kaie; Davidi anga u jibha ku akua Sídia athu a tokala mu hâma sambuadi ia makalu, ni makuinhi auana a midi ia muthu ia akua jikabalu; o Sobaki, muene kilolo, kabitangu ka kifuxi kiâ, anga u mu ta, hé u fuila bhenhobho." 
2Samuel10:19 O jisobha joso ja kexe mu bhikila Hadadezele, kia mono kuma abhi-ku bhu pholo ia Izalaiele, a bhanga paze ni Izalaiele, a di tambulula-nê anga a kala mu mu bhikila. Kienhokio akua Sídia anga a kala kiá ni uoma ua kukuatekesa dingi anʼa Amone." 
2Samuel11:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, ki bhua bhiti o muvu, bhu thembu bhene kutunda o jisobha mu kúlua ita, Davidi u katula Jouabe ni makuenze mê kumoxi, ni Izalaiele ioso, anga a buidisa anʼa Amone, o mbânza ia Labá a i kondoloka, hé a a batuila momo. Davidi-phe ua xala mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Samuel11:2 Kizuua kia mukuá, kutula ku kiemba, Davidi u balumuka bhu hama iê, anga u kala mu kuimajana ku thandu dia inzo iê ia mbanza; o ku thandu diaʼnzo kuala, u mona muhatu uala ku dʼiẋika; o muhatu ku mu tala mesu ua uabha kiavulu." 
2Samuel11:3 Davidi anga u tuma kuibhula muhatu muenʼiú. Exi-phe: Ki muene Bete-seba, monʼa Eliiamu, mukajiʼa Udiia mukua Hiti?" 
2Samuel11:4 Davidi anga u tuma jiphunga, kuia ku mu ixana; muhatu anga uiza mʼonzo iê, muene u zeka-nê (kuma muhatu ua di zelesa ua tundu kiá mu ijila); kienhokio muhatu anga u vutuka kiua mʼonzo iê." 
2Samuel11:5 Muhatu anga u imita; hé u tuma kutangela Davidi, uixi: Ngala-ze ni divumu." 
2Samuel11:6 Davidi anga u tuma kua Jouabe, uixi: Udiia, mukua Hiti, ngi tumikisenê. Jouabe anga u tumikisa Udiia kua Davidi." 
2Samuel11:7 Kia zubha Udiia kutula, Davidi u mu ibhula mba Jouabe ua zekele kiebhi, o mundu uala kiebhi, ni ita mba ala ku i lua kiebhi." 
2Samuel11:8 Davidi anga u ambela Udiia, uixi: Kulumuka ku inzo ié, u di sukule inama. Udiia anga u tunda mʼonzo iá muenexi, anga ku mu kaiela kúdia kua ujitu kua tundu kua muenexi." 
2Samuel11:9 Udiia-phe anga u zeka bhu kanga dia inzo ia muenexi kumoxi ni makuenze a muadiʼê, ku inzo iê muene ka kulumuka-ku." 
2Samuel11:10 O kia ki tangela Davidi, kuila Udiia, ku inzo iê ka kulumuka-ku, Davidi u ambela Udiia, uixi: Manhi eie kua tundu mu kuenda njila? Kua kulumukina-hi-phe ku inzo ié?" 
2Samuel11:11 Udiia anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: O álaka, ni Izalaiele, ni Juda ala ngó mu jifundu; muadiʼami Jouabe, ni makuenze a muadiʼami, a te kibangu mu mukáu ua hatu; eme-phe phala-hi ngiia mʼonzo iami mu kúdia ni kúnua ni kuzeka ni mukajiʼami? Ki kôla, Ngana, eie muenexi, kikôla ni muenhu ué moxi! Eme kima kienhiki nga ditunu ku ki bhanga!" 
2Samuel11:12 Davidi anga u ambela Udiia, uixi: Nanga hanji lelu, mungu ngi ku sulule ngi ku ehele kuvutuka. Kienhiki Udiia u nanga mu Jeluzaleme kizuua kienʼokio, katé mu kizuua kia kaiadi." 
2Samuel11:13 O kienhokio Davidi anga u mu ixana, Udiia hé u dia, u nua bhu pholo iê, anga u mu kodiuisa; mu ngoloxi-phe uia bhu kanga u zeka bhu muanza uê kumoxi ni makuenze a muadiʼê, ku inzo iê-muène-phe nguê kukulumuka-ku." 
2Samuel11:14 Kúkia ni kimene-phe Davidi u soneka mukanda kua Jouabe, hé u mu tumikisa-u bhu lukuaku lua Udiia." 
2Samuel11:15 Mu mukanda anga u soneka kiki, uixi: Udiia mu tienu ku pholo kuoso kua temanana o ita, enu mu vutuke ni dima, mu mu ehele-kiu ubheka uê, phala a mu kuame, a fue." 
2Samuel11:16 Mu kukala-phe, Jouabe anga u langa o mbanza kiambote, u tongolola bhuoso bhuala o mala a nguzu, Udiia anga u mu ta ku pholo bhenhobho." 
2Samuel11:17 Akua mbânza anga a tunda mu bhânga ni Jouabe; ku mundu amoxi a dibhale, ku makuenze a Davidi; ni Udiia mukua Hiti uafu ue." 
2Samuel11:18 Edi ki bhita, Jouabe u tuma kukunda Davidi ima ioso ia tokala ku ita;" 
2Samuel11:19 anga u tendelela phunga iê, uixi: Kioso ki ua kà zubha kukunda muenexi o ima ioso ia tokala ku ita," 
2Samuel11:20 ki u mona muenexi njinda ia mu kuata, kia kèla: Mua zukamena-hi kiavulu ku mbanza mu kúlua? Enu ki mua kʼijiia kuila ala ku lumbu a mi asa?" 
2Samuel11:21 Abimeleke, monʼa Jelubesete, nanhi ua mu jibha? Ki muhatu ku thandu dia lumbu ua mu lauila ditadi dia kuhuhila, iú ua fuila bhobho mu Tebeze? Enu mua zukamena-hi kiavulu ku lumbu? Eie-phe ua kèla: Ni dikuenze dié Udiia, mukua Hiti, uafu ue." 
2Samuel11:22 Phunga anga i katuka, uiza kua Davidi, u mu tudila hundu ioso ia mu katula na-iu Jouabe." 
2Samuel11:23 Phunga anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Mala kuenhoko a tundile ni kusuina, anga a tu sanga mu mukáu, etu-phe tua a kaie katé bhu muelu ua lumbu." 
2Samuel11:24 Akua mifula-phe ku thandu dia lumbu hé a tu asa tu makuenze mé; amoxi ku makuenze a muenexi afu, kuinhi dia muthu ni nake, ni dikuenze dié Udiia, mukua Hiti, uafu ue." 
2Samuel11:25 Davidi anga u ambela phunga, uixi: Jouabe ua kà mu kunda kiki, uixi: Kimʼiki ki ki ku iibhile kiavulu, kuma xibhata se i dia iú, i dia ue mukuâ; ita-phe i kolokote dingi ku mbandu joso ja mbanza, katé ki mu i sengulula; ua kà mu suinisa muene kienhiki." 
2Samuel11:26 Mukaji a Udiia-phe ki evu kuila Udiia munumiʼê uafu, u kala mu dila munumiʼê." 
2Samuel11:27 O kia bhiti izuua ia kudila o thambi, Davidi u tuma ku mu takana, u mu bheka mʼonzo iê, anga u kala mukajiʼê, hé u mu vualela mona ua diiala. Kima kiki-phe, kia bhange Davidi, Jihova kia mu iibhila." 
2Samuel12:1 Jihova phe anga u tuma Natane kua Davidi. Anga u bokona mʼonzo iê, u tula, hé u mu ambela, uixi: Sai malʼaiadi a tunga bhata dimoxi; o iú mvuama, o iú ngadiama." 
2Samuel12:2 Mvuamʼiii u kala ni ilunga iê iavulu ia ibhaku ia jimbudi ni jingombe; 
2Samuel12:3 maji ngadiama-phe kala ni kima, kibhaku kiala-na-kiu kamona kamoxi ka mbudi ka mukaji, ua ka sumbu, iu ua ka sase; anga u kala na-ku, ka kudila kumoxi ni anʼê; ka dia ku kakudia koso ka dia muene, ka nua ku nganza ioso i muina muene, ka zeka bhu jihata jê, kifua ka di bhange kala kamona kê ka muthu." 
2Samuel12:4 Anga bhu kala musonhi u tula kua mvuama, muene anga u xia kilunga kiê-muène kukuatamu kibhaku, nʼa ki telekela o musonhi ua mu tula, hé u tuma-phe kutambula kambudi kamoxi ka kuata mukuâ, o ngadiama, kene ka telekela musonhi uê." 
2Samuel12:5 Davidi anga njinda i mu kuata kiavulu ia muthu muene a mu tangeʼó; anga u ambela Natane, uixi: Nga loka muene kua Jihova uene ni muenhu, kuma muthu ua tena kubhanga kiki, ua tokala kúfua!" 
2Samuel12:6 O kambudi u ka futa luuana, mukonda dia kubhanga kala kiki, ni kukamba henda ia mukuâ." 
2Samuel12:7 Natane anga u ambela Davidi, uixi: Eie-muène u muthu ua bhange kiki! Kuala Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki, uixi: Eme-muène nga ku undu ku ungana ua Izalaiele, ememuène nga ku kudila bhu lukuaku lua Saúlo;" 
2Samuel12:8 nga ku bhana o dibhata dia muadiʼé, ni akaji a muadiʼé eie-muène ua a kuata bhu maku mé, nga ku bhana ue dibhata dia Izalaiele ni Juda; o ki kala-phe iene ioso iii ia tolo, ngeji ku ku tela-ku dingi ioso ia tokala." 
2Samuel12:9 Kiki-phe, phala-hi u tènda kizuelu kia Jihova, mu kubhanga kima kia mu iibhila ku mesuʼê? Kuma Udiia, mukua Hiti, ua mu jibha ku xibhata, o mukajiʼê eie ua mu bhange mukajiʼé eie; o muene eie ua mu bhange ujibhanganga ku xibhata ia anʼa Amone." 
2Samuel12:10 O kiki-phe, xibhata mʼonzo ié ki i batuka-mu dingi, mukonda eme ua ngi tènde, mukaji a Udiia mukua Hiti ua mu tambula mu ku kala mukajiʼé." 
2Samuel12:11 Kala kiki, Jihova uixi: Ngi ku balumuina ufe mu dibhata dié muene; ngi ku tambula akajiʼé ku mesu mé, anga ngʼa bhana mukuenu uengi, muene uà kà zeka-nâ mu muanha uatu." 
2Samuel12:12 Kuma eie ua ki bhangela mu kusuama ni ku di vudimika, eme-phe ngi ki bhangela bhu pholo ia Izalaiele ioso, mu muanha uatu." 
2Samuel12:13 Davidi anga u ambela Natane, uixi: Nga te kituxi kua Jihova. Natane anga u ambela ue Davidi, uixi: Kidi, maji Jihova ua ku loloka kiá kituxi kié, kua-nda kufua, kana." 
2Samuel12:14 Suke kiene, maji mukonda-phe kima ki ua bhangʼiki, kia suinisa jinguma mu tanga kiaiibha kua Jihova, o mona ua mu vuala ua-nda kúfua muene, sé kufula," 
2Samuel12:15 Natane anga u tunda-bhu, uia ku bhata diê. Jihova anga u kuama mona, a mu vualela Davidi kuala mukajiʼa Udiia, mona anga u kata kiavulu." 
2Samuel12:16 Kienhiki Davidi u kala mu diondela o mona ni ku samba kua Nzambi; Davidi anga u fula kúdia, u kala muia mu xilu, ni kuzeka bhoxi usuku uoso, uzuata kidinhaji." 
2Samuel12:17 Adiakimi a dibhata anga a mu imanena, a sota ku mu balumuna bhoxi bhua zeka; maji muene-phe ngué kubalumuka, ni kúdia-nâ kumoxi ka xikina." 
2Samuel12:18 Edi a kala kienhiki katé mu sambuadi dia izuua, o mona uafu. Akua mbèle ia Davidi anga a kala ni uoma ua ku mu tangela kuila mona uafu; kuma ambe, exi: Sumbala kia kexile mona ku muenhu, tuila tu mu zuelesa, ka xikina ku tu ivua dízui, o ki tu mu tangela kuila mona uafu, ua-nda ku di bhanga kiebhi?" 
2Samuel12:19 Davidi-phe kia mono akua mbèle iê ala mu di fuetela, u tongolola kuma mona uafu; Davidi anga u ibhula akua mbèle, uixi: Mona manhi uafu, kuambe? Exi: Xi, uafu, ngana!" 
2Samuel12:20 Behnhobho Davidi u balumuka bhoxi, u di sukula, u di uesa maji, u di ta izuatu iengi; anga u bokona mʼonzo ia Jihova, u samba; o kia zubha kubhanga kiki kiene kia bokona kiua mʼonzo iê muene, o kia bhingi, a mu tela kúdia, anga u dia." 
2Samuel12:21 Akua mbèle iê anga a mu ambela, exi: Ki ua bhangʼiki, uabhange kiebhi? Mona kia kexile ku muenhu, ua mu fudila kúdia, ua mu didi; mona-phe kia zubha kúfua, eie u balumuka bhoxi, hé uia mu kúdia?" 
2Samuel12:22 Muene-phe uixi: Mona kia kexile ku muenhu, ngi fula kúdia, ngi dila, kuma ngambe, ngixi: Nanhi ua kʼijiia mba Jihova u ngi kuatela henda, phala mona a bhuluke?" 
2Samuel12:23 Kiki-phe uafu, ngi fudila-hi dingi kúdia? Né nga ki bhange, mona uiza dingi? Eme hádia nga kʼàia kuaii muene, maji muene keza dingi kunu ku ngalʼeme." 
2Samuel12:24 Davidi anga u konda malamba kua mukajiʼê Bete-seba, u bokona muoso muala, hé u zeka-nê; muene anga uimita hé u vuala mona ua diiala, u mu luka dijina dia Solomá. Jihova anga u mu zola." 
2Samuel12:25 Jihova anga u tuma ku mu ijidisa-kiu kua polofeta Natane, polofeta anga u mu luka dijina dia Jedediia, mukonda dia jihenda ja Jihova." 
2Samuel12:26 Jouabe-phe anga u lua ni Laba, mbanza ia anʼa Amone, hé u tolola mbanza ia ungana uâ, o Mbonge ia menha." 
2Samuel12:27 Jouabe anga u tuma jiphunga kua Davidi, uixi: Laba nga i lu; o mbonge ia menha nga i tolola." 
2Samuel12:28 Kiki-phe eie bhongolola o mundu a xala ku bhata, uize, u te kibangu kunu, u zubhe kutolola mbanza iâ; ki ki kale eme ngi zubha kutolola mbanza, nʼa i luku o dijina diami." 
2Samuel12:29 Davidi anga u bhongolola mundu uoso, uia ku Laba, u i lua, hé u i tolola." 
2Samuel12:30 Anga u tambula o kitundu ku mútue ua sobha iâ; ki pezala talendu ia ulu, a sokejeka-ku matadi ma te kitadi kiavulu; anga a ki ta ku mútue ua Davidi. Anga mu mbongeʼ omo ambata-mu ima iavulu ia kubhunda." 
2Samuel12:31 Hé a kuata o mundu uoso ua xalamu, anga a u balakala; o kuaiiʼoko, iá a a te mu kuselala ni Sela ia felu, o iá ku pikeleta, o iá mu kukoka ni makuua a felu, o iá ku fólono ia kuiudika matijolo. Kienhiki Davidi kiene kia bhange ku jimbonge joso ja anʼa Amone. Kia zubha kubhanga kiki, Davidi ni mundu uê uoso ua masoladi a vutuka kiua mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Samuel13:1 Kia zubha kubhita kiki, Abisalone monʼa Davidi u kala ni phangʼiê ia muhatu ua uabha, dijina diê Tamala; Aminone monʼa Davidi anga u mu uabhela kiavulu." 
2Samuel13:2 Aminone anga u tata, mukonda dia hânji ia phangʼiê Tamala; katé kia mu bhekela kukata, kuma Tamala kilumba hanji; Aminone iu ua ki mono kuila kiabhonzo ku mu bhanga kima kioso-kioso." 
2Samuel13:3 Aminone-phe hé u kala ni kamba diê, dijina diê Jonadabe, monʼa Siméia phangʼiâ Davidi; Jonadabe muenhú muthu uadimuka." 
2Samuel13:4 Anga u ambela Aminone, uixi: Abha-phe, eie u monʼa muenexi, ua mu bhelela-hi kiki izuua ioso? Ku ngi tangela-kiu kioso ki uala na-kiu? Aminone u mu tangela, uixi: Mukonda Tamala ndenge ia phangʼiami Abisalone, nga mu uabhela." 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadabe anga u mu ambela, uixi: Zeka bhu hama ié, u di bhangese kukata; o tatʼenu kia-nda kuiza ku ku kunda, u mu ambela kuila: Nga ku diondo, phangʼiami ia muhatu Tamala eze, a ngi bhangele kúdia ku mesu mami muene, ngi ki mone, ngi dile ku lukuaku luê." 
2Samuel13:6 Kienhiki Aminone u zeka, u di bhangesa kukata; o kieza muenexi ku mu kunda, Aminone u ambela muenexi, uixi: Nga ku diondo, tatʼetu, ambela phangʼiami ia muhatu Tamala eze, a ngi bhangele tumbolo tuiadi bhu mesu mami, ngi die ku lukuaku luê." 
2Samuel13:7 Bhenhobho Davidi u tuma ku bhata kua Tamala, uixi: Ndeie ku inzo ia phangʼié Aminone, u mu bhangele kúdia." 
2Samuel13:8 Tamala anga uia ku inzo ia phangʼiê Aminone, u mu sanga ua zeka. Anga u kuata fuba iólunge ni felemendu, u i masana ku mesu mé, hé u kanga jimbolo." 
2Samuel13:9 Anga u kuata o kienga, u mu lunduluila-ju bhu dilonga bhu pholo iê; muene-phe ka xikina kúdia. Aminone anga u zuela, uixi: Athu oso a a tubhule a ngi tundile bhu kanga. Ene oso anga a tunda, a mu xia ngó." 
2Samuel13:10 Aminone anga u ambela Tamala, uixi: Beka kúdia mu xilu, ngi die ku lukuaku lué. Tamala anga u kuata jimbolo ja kange, u ji bheka mu xilu kua Aminone phangʼiê." 
2Samuel13:11 O kia zubha ku mu bhekela-ju bhua zukama phala a die, muene u mu kuata, hé u mu ambela, uixi: Izá tu zeke kumoxi, phangʼiami." 
2Samuel13:12 Muene u mu vutuila, uixi: Kikôla, phangʼiami! Kana ku ngi bhanga kusuina! Kuma ka tokala kubhanga kala kiki mua Izalaiele; tula-kiu, kana kubhanga kisunji ki kala kiki!" 
2Samuel13:13 Mukonda eme o jisonhi nga-nda ku di tela na-ju kuebhi? Eie-phe ue ua-nda ku di sokesa ni jihábhu ja malaji mua Izalaiele! Nga ku diondo-phe, zuela hanji kua muenexi; muene ka-nda kudituna ku ngi bhana ko kué." 
2Samuel13:14 Muene-phe ka xikina ku mu ívua dízui; mukonda-phe uala mu nguzu, u mu bhanga kusuina, u zeka-nê hé u mu katula undenge uê."
