2Chronicles12:12 Kioso muene kia di bhombo, o njinda ia Jihova ki i mu tula dingi phala ki i mu sengulule nʼa jimina-ku; mukonda hanji mu Juda mua kexile ima ia mbote." 
2Chronicles12:13 Mu Jeluzaleme-phe, sobha Lebouamu u di xitila ni ima ia nguzu anga u kuata kutumina. Kieneʼokio Lebouamu ua kexi mu makuinhi a uana a mivu ni umoxi kioso kiandeka kutumina; anga u tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni sambuadi mu Jeluzaleme, mbonge ia solo Jihova mu miji ioso ia Izalaiele phala o ku ta dijina diê momo; o manhʼâ sobha dijina diê Nahama, mukua Amone." 
2Chronicles12:14 Sobha anga u bhanga kia ibha, mukonda ka iukisa muẋima uê mu kusota Jihova." 
2Chronicles12:15 O ima ia mukuá-phe dingi ia bhange Lebouamu ku tale ia dianga uixi ia sukidila, mbé ka i soneka mu madivulu ma Semaia, dia polofeta, ni ma Idu, mukua lumono, mu jindunda ja Uvuadiue? Lebouamu ni Jelobouamu álua jinga ita izuua iâ ioso." 
2Chronicles12:16 Lebouamu anga uzeka ni jitata jê anga a mu funda mu mbonge ia Davidi; o Abiia dia monʼê anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê. 
2Chronicles13:1 Mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni nake ua utuminu ua Jelobouamu, kiene Abiia kia hingi ungana ua Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles13:2 Mu Jeluzaleme ua tumina mivu itatu; o mamʼâ dijina diê Mikaia, monʼa Udiiele, mukua Jibeia; anga ku kala ita, Abiia ni Jelobouamu a zoka." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiia anga u tumina kubhânga, o kifuẋi kiê kia kexile mala a ilolo ia ita, ua a nona hama jiuana ja midi ia athu; o Jelobouamu ue ua a nona, mazonda oso, hama nake ia midi ia athu, anga ua a ta kiambote mu ididi iê phala kúlua-nê ita." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiia anga uiza, uimana bhu thala ia mulundu ua Zemadaimi, uala mu milundu ia Ifalaimi, hé u zuela: Ngʼivienu, eie Jelobouamu ni Izalaiele ioso." 
2Chronicles13:5 Manhi ki kia mi fuama ku kʼijiia, kuila Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, o ungana ua Izalaiele ua u bhana kua Davidi, ni muene ni anʼê, ku mivu ni mivu, mu kikutu kia môngua?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Sumbala kiene, maji Jelobouamu, monʼa Nebate, mubhikʼa Solomá, monʼa Davidi, ua balumuka iú ua ẋinukina ngana iê." 
2Chronicles13:7 Kokué-muène kua di bande anʼa kadiaphemba, athu ka moneka kia kubhanga; ia a suína mu kúlua ni Lebouamu, monʼa Solomá, kioso Lebouamu kiala hanji mona-ndenge, ua nengana muẋima, anga u a lémbua mu nguzu." 
2Chronicles13:8 O kiki hanji mua te muẋima ua kuhandamena kúlua ni utuminu ua Jihova, uala bhu maku ma anʼa Davidi; kiene muene, enu muala mu kifuẋi kia dikota, o tungombe tua ulu tua mi bhangela Jelobouamu, ni tu kale jinzambi jenu, muala na-tu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Enu ki mu kaie o jinganga ja Jihova, anʼa Alá ni jilevita, enu mua di bhangela jinganga jenuʼe-nuenu, kala akua jixi jengi? Uoso-uoso uiza mu ku di lumba ni kamona ka ngombe ni sambuadi dia ilumbe ia jimbudi, kithangana kieneʼokio u di bhanga kiá nganga ia ió ki jinzambi ja kima." 
2Chronicles13:10 Maji etu-phe, Jihova muene Nzambi ietu, nuka tua mu xile; o jinganga a a bhana ukunji ua Jihova, ene anʼa Alá ni Jilevita ala ku kikalakalu kiâ." 
2Chronicles13:11 Ala mu kuohela Jihova, imene ioso ni ngoloxi joso, sata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova, ni uasu ua dizumba, ni kutula kiambote ku meza ma zele o jimbolo ja kutela, ni di tudilu dia jikandeia dia ulu ni jikandeia jê, mbé o ku ji uika mu ngoloxi joso, mukonda etu tuala ni muanu ua kikalakalu kia Jihova, Nzambi ietu; maji enu-phe mua mu xi." 
2Chronicles13:12 O kiki-phe Nzambi uala ni etu ku pholo ia ita, kumoxi ue ni jinganga jê, ala mu kuxika jikoloneta, phala ku ta nzongo ia kúlua nʼenu, enu mu anʼa Izalaiele! Ki mu lue-phe ni Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jenu, kuma ki mua-nda kuzediua." 
2Chronicles13:13 Maji-phe Jelobouamu ua a batamena mu mbandu joso phala ku a tukumuisa ku dima; iá edile ene ala ku pholo ia Juda, o ia a suama ala ku dima diâ." 
2Chronicles13:14 O Juda phe kia tale, ua mono kuila kua mu bhingi kubhânga ni ku pholo ni ku dima; anga a di kola kua Jihova; o jinganga ue a xika jikoloneta." 
2Chronicles13:15 Akua Juda hé a di kola; anga ki bhita kuila, kia dikola akua Juda, Nzambi ua kuama Jelobouamu ni Izalaiele ioso bhu pholo ia Abiia ni bhu pholo ia Juda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Anʼa Izalaiele hé a lenga kia mono Juda, Nzambi phe u a bhakula bhu lukuaku luâ." 
2Chronicles13:17 Katé Abiia ni kifuẋi kiê a bhange unzangi ua vulu muʼaxaxi kâ; mukonda mua Izalaiele, ku athu a ita òsole, ene a jibhile-ku hama jitanu ja midi ia muthu." 
2Chronicles13:18 Kienʼiki anʼa Izalaiele a di zangelekele mu thembuʼomo, a a tululula; anʼa Juda a tolola mukonda a dielela kua Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ." 
2Chronicles13:19 O Abiia hé u landameka Jelobouamu; u mu tambula Betele ni tumbonge tuê mu jimbandu, ni Jesama ni tumbonge tuê mu jimbandu, ni Efelone ni tumbonge tuê mu jimbandu." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jelobouamo ue ka tena dingi kusunga nguzu mu izuua ia Abiia maji a mu kuama kuala Jihova iú uafu. 
2Chronicles13:21 Abiia-phe ua di bhange kindanda iú ua sakana kuinhi dia muhetu ni kiuana anga u vuala makuinhi aiadi ni kiiadi kia anʼa mala ni kuinhi dia mona ni kisamanu kia ahetu. 
2Chronicles13:22 Ima ia mukuá dingi ia Abiia, ku tale jinjila jê uixi o maka mê a i soneka mu dilunda dia polofeta Idu." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abiia anga u zeka ni jitata jê, hé a mu funda mu mbanza ia Davidi; o Aza, monʼê, anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê; o mu izuua iê, ixi anga i kala ni kutululuka mu kuinhi dia mivu." 
2Chronicles14:2 Aza anga u bhanga kia iuka, kia fuama, bhu mesu ma Jihova, Nzambi iê." 
2Chronicles14:3 Kuma jikalatódio ja jinzambi jengi ua ji katula, o matala mâ ua ma sengulula; o iteka iâ ua i bula-bula, o mixitu iâ ua i kokela bhoxi." 
2Chronicles14:4 Iú ua tendelela Juda kuila, a sote Jihova, dia Nzambi ia jitata jâ; o kitumu ni kijila a ki aluke." 
2Chronicles14:5 Ua muange ue matala ni iteka ia dikumbi mu jisanzala joso ja Juda, anga u mona kuila ixi ioso ia utuminu uê ia tululuka muene kiambote." 
2Chronicles14:6 Anga u tunga jisanzala ja nguzu mua Juda; mbata ixi ia tululukile kiambote, kuma mu mivu ieneʼoio ki kua kexile uoso u lua-nê ita; mukonda a mu bhana kunhoha kuala Jihova." 
2Chronicles14:7 Anga uambela Juda, uixi: Tu tunge jimbonge jiji, tu ji kondoluese imbaka ni jinzu ja matala, ni mabhitu ni jiphapha, kiosuʼiki ixi iala hanji ni kutululuka bhu pholo ietu, mukonda tua soto Jihova, dia Nzambi ietu; tua mu sota, muene iú ua tu bhana o kutululuka mu jimbandu joso. Anga a tunga, a soma, a kala ni kuzediua." 
2Chronicles14:8 Aza anga u kala-mu ni kifuẋi kia hama jitatu ja midi ia masoladi mua Juda a bhakata ngubu jʼonene ni jisosa; ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhi nake a midi ia masoladi mua Bejamí a bhakata ngubu jʼofèle ejiia o kuasa ni mifula; ene oso iâ, mala muene a mazonda." 
2Chronicles14:9 O Zela-phe, mukua Itiiópia, anga u a tundila ni kifuẋi kia midi ia jimidi ja masoladi, ni hama jitatu ja makalu, anga u bhixila katé bhu Malesa." 
2Chronicles14:10 Bheneʼobho Aza ue anga u tunda mu kutakana-nê; anga ita a i kuatela mu dikôlo dia Zefata, bhua zukama ni Malesa." 
2Chronicles14:11 Aza anga u dikola kua Jihova, Nzambi iê, uixi: Jihova, o kukuatekesa, phala eie, ki kima; kixi o mukua nguzu, kixi ió kala ni nguzu ia kima; tu kuatekese-phe, eie u Jihova, dia Nzambi ietu, mukonda tua dielela kokué, o mu dijina dié muene mu tuejila mu kúlua ni kifuẋi kiki; Jihova, tata! Eiʼeie u Nzambi ietu! Ka ku tolole kuala o muthu." 
2Chronicles14:12 Jihova anga u nemeka akua Itiiópia, bhu pholo ia Aza ni bhu pholo ia Juda, akua Itiiópia anga a lenga." 
2Chronicles14:13 Aza-phe ni kifuẋi kia kexile na-kiu, anga a a landameka muene katé bhu Jelale, anga kúbua ndumba ia akua Itiiópia, mukonda ene ka kexile dingi ni kanguzu né kòfele ngó; mbata a a iokojola bhu pholo ia Jihova ni bhu pholo ia Kifuẋi kiê; bhenʼiobho o ana a Izalaiele ambata-bhu ndumba dia ibongele." 
2Chronicles14:14 Anga a tolola jimbonge joso ja kexile mu jimbandu ja Jelale, mukonda o kimbuua kia Jihova kia kexile ku thandu diâ; anga mbonge joso a ji bhunda mukonda mua kexile mbole ia vulu." 
2Chronicles14:15 A nemeka ue ku ilunga ia ibhaku; anga ambata-ku ndumba dia jimbudi ni jikamelu hé a vutuka kiua mu Jeluzaleme. 
2Chronicles15:1 Kieneʼokio, o Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga iza ku thandu dia Azadiia, monʼa Obede." 
2Chronicles15:2 Muenʼiú anga u tunda, uia mu kutakana ni Aza, u muʼambela, uixi: Enu Aza, ni Juda dioso ni Bejamí ngʼivienu! O Jihova uala ni enu, kiosuʼiki enu muala ni muene; se mu mu sota, mua-nda ku mu sanga; o ki muʼila mu mu xa, muene ue ua-nda ku mi xa." 
2Chronicles15:3 O Izalaiele-phe ua kexile muene ndumba dia izuua, ka monekene Nzambi ia kidi, ka monekene nganga i fuama ku mu longa, ka monekene kitumu." 
2Chronicles15:4 Maji-phe, mu dilamba diâ, kiela jinga a diela anga a bilukila kua Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, anga a mu sota, a mu sanga jinga muene." 
2Chronicles15:5 O mu izuua mueneʼomo, ki ku kexile kubatama né kua iá oso a tunda, mba kua iá oso a bokona, maji mavuua ngó mu mavuua kua iá oso a tungile mu jixi jeneʼojo." 
2Chronicles15:6 Mbata athu a di lungulukila mudiâ, o sanzala i lungulukila sanzala ia mukuá, aia ni ku di jibha-jibha; mukonda Nzambi ua a bhondeleka ni mukondo uoso uavulu o matelu." 
2Chronicles15:7 Maji-phe suinenu muene, makuʼenu ka botomoke; mukonda o kikalakalu kienu kiala ni futu iê." 
2Chronicles15:8 O Aza kioso kievu o maka iá ni upolofeta ua tange o polofeta, monʼa Obede, ua suína dingi, iú ua katula imbamba ioso ia insunji mʼoxi ia Juda ni ia Bejamí ni mu jimbonge joso ja tambuile mu milundu ia Ifalaimi, anga u bhangulula dingi o Kalatódio ka Jihova, ka kexile ku pholo ia dibhitu dia lumbu lua dikota lua Jihova." 
2Chronicles15:9 Anga u bhongolola Juda ioso ni Bejamí ni ene kiá kumoxi ni jinzuangiza a tungu mua Ifalaíme ni mua Manasa ni mua Ximinhá; kuma mua Izalaiele a vulu a kexi mu ku tunda-mu eza kua muene, kia mono kuma Jihova, dia Nzambi iâ, uala ni muene." 
2Chronicles15:10 Anga a di bhongoluela mu Jeluzaleme, ku mbeji ia katatu, mu muvu ua kakuinhi ua utuminu ua Aza." 
2Chronicles15:11 Mu kizuua kieneʼokio anga a bhakula kua Jihova, ujitu ku ima ia bhundu, ieza na-iu, hama jisamanu ja jingombe ni midi jisamanu ja jimbudi." 
2Chronicles15:12 Hé a bokona mu kikutu kia kusota Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ, ni muẋima uâ uoso, ni muenhu uâ uoso." 
2Chronicles15:13 Ni kuila uoso ngué kusota Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, u fua, tunde ku mona-ndenge tule ku muadiakime, tunde ku diiala tule ku muhatu." 
2Chronicles15:14 Anga a di lokela kua Jihova, ni dízui dia suina, ni kutana ni kuxika jimbungu ni jikoloneta." 
2Chronicles15:15 Juda ioso hé a sanguluka ni mulôko uenʼiú; mukonda a loka muene ni muẋima uâ uoso, ia a mu sota muene ni hânji ioso, ia a mu bongo. Anga Jihova ua bhana dinhohenu ku jimbandu joso." 
2Chronicles15:16 O Mahaka ue, mamʼa sobha Aza, muene ua mu tulula ue ku kiandu, mbé ka kale dingi mu kutumina ku usobha; mukonda ua bhangele Aselah, kiteka kia ibha kiavulu; o kiteka kienʼiki, kia ibha kiavulu, Aza u ki muanga-muanga, hé u ki bula-bula, anga u kiʼohela bhu mbanduʼa ngiji ia Kidelone." 
2Chronicles15:17 Maji o matala-phe mua Izalaiele ka a katulamu; sumbala kiene, maji o muẋima ua Aza ua iukile jinge izuua ioso ia muenhu uê." 
2Chronicles15:18 Hé u bheka kʼonzo ia Nzambi, ima ioso ia lumbile tatʼâ ni iii ia lumbile muene-muéne: ni phalata, ni ulu, ni itutu dingi ia fuama." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ki ku kexile ita kale ngó mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni kitanu ua utuminu ua Aza. 
2Chronicles16:1 Ku muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni kisamanu, kia utuminu ua Aza, kiene kia bande Bahasa, sobha ia Izalaiele, mu kúlua ni Juda, anga u tunga mbonge ia Lama, mbé ki bhu kale muthu, uehela Aza, sobha ia Juda, kutunda mba kubokona." 
2Chronicles16:2 Kieneʼokio-phe, Aza u katula phalata ni ulu, mu dibhakelu dia jimbongo ja inzu ia Nzambi, ni ja inzu ia sobha, anga u u tumikisa kua Bene-Hadade, sobha ia Sídia, ua tungile mu Damasku, uixi:" 
2Chronicles16:3 Bhu kaẋi kami nʼeie bhuala kikutu, kala ki kia kexile bhu kaẋi ka tatʼetu ni tatʼenu; tala, nga ku tumikisa phalata ni ulu, eie nda uie, ua kà fuise o kikutu kiala bhu kaẋi kê-eie ni Bahasa, sobha ia Izalaiele, phala muene a ngi sondoloke." 
2Chronicles16:4 Bene-Hadade anga uívua kia zuela sobha Aza, hé u tumikisa jikabhitangu ja ifuẋi ia masoladi ia kexile naiu, mu kúlua ni jimbonge ja Izalaiele, hé a kuama o mbonge ia Inzone, ni ia Dane, ni ia Abele-Maíno; ni jimbonge joso ja mabhakelu ma iselengenhe ia ita mu ixi ia Nafitali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Anga ki bhita kuila, Bahasa kia kʼivu, ueha kutunga Lama; kikalakalu kiê ua lémbua kiá o kuia na-kiu ku pholo." 
2Chronicles16:6 Kieneʼokio sobha Aza u ambata Juda dioso, ene anga eza ni matadi ma Lama, ni miẋi iê ia mu tungile na-iu Bahasa; ima ienʼiii hé u tunga na-iu Jeba ni Mispa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Mu kithangana kieneʼokio muene, Hanani mukua lumono ueza kua Aza, sobha ia Juda, uixi: Kuma eie ua dielela kua sobha ia Sídia, o kudielela Jihova, Nzambi ié, kana, kuabhu-phe o kifuẋi kia masoladi ma sobha ia Sídia kia ku sutunuka bhu maku." 
2Chronicles16:8 Manhi akua Itiiópia ni akua Líbia ka kexile kifuẋi kia dikota ni jinzungule ja makalu ni akua kusambela jikabalu? Maji-phe eie mu kudielela Jihova, muene ua a bhakula bhu maku mé." 
2Chronicles16:9 Mukonda-phe o Jihova mesu mê ma bhita mu ngongo ioso, phala ku di londekeza o kusuína kuê mu ku kudila ió oso ala ni muẋima ua tenena kua muene; mu kiki-phe eie ua bhange ulaji mukonda tunde lelu ua-ndu kala jinga ni ita iza kokué." 
2Chronicles16:10 Maji Aza u thathamena mumoni anga u mu ta bhu ditolongo mu dikuikilu; mukonda kienʼiki kia mu thathamesa kiavulu muene; Aza ue mu izuua mueneʼomo uandeka kiá kutatesa amoxi-moxi-mu ku kifuẋi. 
2Chronicles16:11 Tala, ima ioso ia bhange Aza, ku tale ia dianga uixi ia sukidila, a i soneka mu divulu dia jisobha ja Juda ni ja Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles16:12 Aza anga úbua ni uhaxi ua inama, mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu nʼivua, a utuminu uê; o uhaxi uê anga u vula kinéne muene, maji mu mahaxi mê ua lembuele kusota Jihova anga u dielela ngoho o imbanda." 
2Chronicles16:13 Aza hé u zeka ni jitata jê; anga u fua mu muvu ua makuinhi a uana ni kamoxi, a utuminu uê." 
2Chronicles16:14 Inga a mu funda mu mbila iêmuène, ia di kandeia mu mbonge ia Davidi, anga a mu zekesa bhu hama iezalesa ni ima ia mazumba ni ima iate kiavulu, iò iudike kuala jimesene ja ima ia mazumba ma mbote; anga a mu bhangela kiohela kionène ni ima ienʼiii." 
2Chronicles17:1 Jozafate, monʼê, anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê; muene hé u di xitila ni nguzu kua Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles17:2 Mu jimbonge joso ja nguzu mua Juda, u ta-mu athu a lua ita, ixi ioso ia Juda u i ta masoladi, kumoxi ue ni mu jimbonge ja Ifalaíme, ja tambuile Aza, tatʼâ." 
2Chronicles17:3 Jihova anga u kala ni Jozafate; mukonda uende mu jinjila ja dianga ja Davidi, tatʼâ, nguê kusota Bale." 
2Chronicles17:4 Kota muene ua sota o Nzambi ia tatʼâ, iú uende mu ijila iê, kana mu ibhangelu ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles17:5 O Jihova iú ua kuatesa o ixi ia utuminu uê bhu maku mê, ni Juda dioso dia bhana jinga maujitu kua Jozafate, anga u kala ni matunda avulu." 
2Chronicles17:6 Anga muẋima uê u zangalela mu jinjila ja Jihova, anga u ta-ku dingi o kukatula o matala ni mixitu mua Juda." 
2Chronicles17:7 O mu muvu ua katatu, ua utuminu uê, muene ua tumikisa ilamba iê kua Benehaile, ni kua Obadiia, ni kua Natanele, ni kua Mikaia, phala ende ni kulonga mu jimbonge ja Juda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Ni ene kiá, kumoxi ni jilevita, Semaia, ni Netaniia, ni Zebadiia, ni Azaiele, ni Semilamote, ni Jonata, ni Adoniia, ni Tobiia ni Tobadoniia, o iá, o jilevita; kua ene kua di te o jinganga, Elizama ni Jolamu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Anga a longa mua Juda; o divulu dia kitumu kia Jihova ene a kexile na-diu; anga a nhunga jisanzala joso ja Juda ni kulonga muʼaxaxe ka mundu. 
2Chronicles17:10 Anga uoma ua Jihova u tuluka ku thandu dia mautuminu moso mu jixi ja kexile mu jimbandu ja Juda; ka bhange ita ni Jozafate. 
2Chronicles17:11 Amoxi-mu hanji ku jifilisteu eza jinga ni maujitu kua Jozafate, ni kitadi kia lubhaku; o akua Alábia ue a mu bhekela ku imuna iòfele, sambuadi dia midi ni hama sambuadi ia ilumbe ia jimbudi, ni sambuadi dia midi ni hama sambuadi ia isutu ia jihombo." 
2Chronicles17:12 Anga Jozafate u kula, u kula muene kinène; anga u tunga imbaka ni jimbonge ja mabhakelu a ibhakatu ia ita mua Juda." 
2Chronicles17:13 Ua kexile ni ikalakalu ia vulu mu jisanzala ja Juda, ni athu a ita, ni mala a nguzu mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles17:14 O dialuilu diâ dienʼidi, kala kioso kiá kiala o mabhata ma jitata jâ; mua Juda a kexile atumini a jimidi eneʼá: Mutumini Adana; o kua muene a te-ku hama jitatu ja midi ia mala a nguzu." 
2Chronicles17:15 O ki kua tundu muene, kua kaiela mutumini Nzuanana; kua muene a te-ku hama jiiadi ni makuinhi nake a midi." 
2Chronicles17:16 O ki kua tundu iú, kueza Amaziia, mona Zikidi, ua di bhakula muene mu vondadi iê kua Jihova, ku thandu diê a te-ku hama jiiadi ja mala a nguzu." 
2Chronicles17:17 O mua Bejamí, Eliiada, iala dia nguzu, o ku thandu diê, hama jiiadi ja midi ia mala a bhakata jingubu ni mifula." 
2Chronicles17:18 O kuema diê kua kaiela Jozabade ni hama ni makuinhi nake a midi a zuatela o ita. 
2Chronicles17:19 Ene oso iá, a kexile mu ku kalakela sobha; mu dialuilu didi ka kexile-mu ene oso a a tele mu jimbonge joso ja nguzu mua Juda kuala sobha." 
2Chronicles18:1 Jozafate anga u kala ni umvuama ni fuma iavulu; muene anga u tanga undandu ni Akabe. 
2Chronicles18:2 O ki bhua bhiti tu mivu, uia mu ku kunda Akabe ku Samaria. Akabe inga u jibha jimbudi ni jingombe ja vulu muene phala muene ni mundu uê ueza na-u; hé u mu bhomba kubanda-nê ku Lamote-Ngiliiadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Mukonda Akabe, sobha ia Izalaiele, uambela Jozafate, sobha ia Juda, kuila: Eie uia nʼeme ku Lamote-Ngiliiadi? Muene anga u muʼambela, uixi: Kioso ki uala eie, kiene ue ki ngi kala eme; o mundu uami ela kala o mundu ué; mu ita iii tu kala nʼeie kumoxi." 
2Chronicles18:4 Jozafate anga uambela dingi sobha ia Izalaiele, uixi: Lelu, nga ku diondo, ibhula hanji o kizuelu kia Jihova." 
2Chronicles18:5 Bheneʼobho-phe o sobha ia Izalaiele u bhongolola, jipolofeta joso, hama jiuana ja athu, ua ebhula, uixi: Tuia ku ita mu kúlua ni Lamote-Ngiliiadi, inga ngi muʼehʼê? Ene-phe exi: Banda; kuma Nzambi ua-nda ku mu bhana bhu lukuaku lué, sobha." 
2Chronicles18:6 Jozafate-phe uixi: Bhabha kana-bhu dingi polofeta ia Jihova, ni tu mu ibhule?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Sobha-phe ia Izalaiele uambela Jozafate, uixi: Sai-ku hanji muthu ku tu fuama kubhuila Jihova, maji-phe eme ua ngi ibhila; mukonda kia zambuila mu upolofeta eme ka ngi zambuila mbote, lémbue, kale ngó phulu mu phulu; o dijina diê Mika, monʼa Ila. Anga Jozafate u vutula, uixi: Sobha, ku zuele kiókio!" 
2Chronicles18:8 Sobha ia Izalaiele bheneʼobho uixana ngolambole imoxi, u mu ambela, uixi: Mika, monʼa Ila, ngi bhekele-nê bhabha ni lusolo." 
2Chronicles18:9 Sobha ia Izalaiele ni Jozafate, sobha ia Juda, a xikama, íú mu kiandu kiê, iú kiandu kiê, a zuata izuatu iâ, iá a xikama mu nzunga, bhua lulama ni dibhitu dia Samádia; o jipolofeta joso anga a kala mu kuzambuila bhu pholo iâ." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekiia, monʼa Kanana ua di iudikila jimbinga ja utadi ua felu, uixi: Jihova uambe kiki: Akua Sídia ua kà a kuama ni jimbinga jenʼiji, katé ki u zubha ku a jikinisa." 
2Chronicles18:11 Jipolofeta joso ue a zambula kienʼiki, kuila: Banda ku Lamote-Ngiliiadi, ua-nda ku tolola; mukonda Jihova ua-nda ku mu bhana bhu lukuaku lué, sobha." 
2Chronicles18:12 O mukunji uai mu kuixana Mika, ua mu ambela, uixi: Tala, o izuelu ia jipolofeta, uila mu kanu dimoxi, iene ioso iambote muene phala sobha; eie ué kizuelu kié kile kala kia muthu momuʼâ, ni u zuele kioso kia uabha." 
2Chronicles18:13 Maji-phe Mika, uixi: Ki kôla! Jihova a laie! Kuma kioso ki ngi tangela Nzambi iami, kiene ki nga kà zuela." 
2Chronicles18:14 O kieza-phe kua sobha, sobha ua muʼambela, uixi: Mika, etu tuia ku ita, ku Lamote-Ngiliide inga ngi muʼehe? Muene-phe, uixi: Bandenu, mua ka tolola. A kà mi bhana-nâ bhu maku menu." 
2Chronicles18:15 Sobha-phe u muʼambela, uixi: Ngi kuambela lukuxi luosʼulu, phala eie ku ngi tangele, ki kale ngoho o kidi mu dijina dia Jihova?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Muene-phe uixi: Nga mono Izalaiele ioso ia di muangena mu milundu kala jimbudi ja kambe kabhila; Jihova iú uambe: Iá kala ni ngana iâ; kala muthu a vutuke monzo iê ni kutululuka. 
2Chronicles18:17 Bheneʼobho, sobha ia Izalaiele, uambela Jozafate, uixi: Ki ngi kuambela-kiu, kuila o iú ka tena ku ngi zambuila mbote mu upolofeta, ki kale phulu ngó?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Muene uixi dingi: Ivuenu-phe o kizuelu kia Jihova: Nga mono Jihova ua xikama bhu kiandu kiê, o kifuẋi kioso kia diulu kiemana ku mbandu iê ia dilu ni kumbandu ia kiasu." 
2Chronicles18:19 Anga Jihova, uixi: Nanhi muene uia mu kubhomba Akabe, sobha ia Izalaiele, nʼa bande bhu Lamote-Ngiliiadi nʼa buile bhobho. Anga uamba dingi, uixi: Edi iú u zuela kiki, ió u zuela kiókio." 
2Chronicles18:20 Bheneʼobho phe kua tundu kilulu anga kʼiza bhu pholo ia Jihova, kixi: Eme nga kà mu bhomba." 
2Chronicles18:21 Jihova u kumuna, uixi: Ua ka mu bhomba nʼihi? Muene uixi: Eme nga-nda kutunda; hé nga kà kala ngi nzumbi ia makutu mu kanu dia jipolofeta jê joso. Kuala Jihova: Eie ua kà mu bhomba, ua kà mu tolola uê; tunda, ua kà mu bhange kieneʼokio." 
2Chronicles18:22 Kiki-phe, tala, Jihova ua te nzumbi ia makutu mu kanu dia jipolofeta jé jenʼiji; Jihova iú ua zuela muene kia ibha ku mbandu ié." 
2Chronicles18:23 Bheneʼobho phe Zedekiia, monʼa Kanana, ua di sunga anga u bhana huxi ku dikanu dia Mika, uixi: Nzumbi ia Jihova ia bhitila njila iebhi, mu ku ngi somboka eme, í ia ku zuelela eie?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mika-phe, uixi: Tala, ua-nda ki mona, mu kizuua kiná, ki ua kèla u tunda dixilu u bokona dixilu, mu ku di sueka." 
2Chronicles18:25 Kieneʼokio phe sobha ia Izalaiele u tanga, kuila: Mika mu kuatienu, mu muʼambate dingi kua Amone, nguvulu ia mbonge, ni kua Johaji, monʼa sobha." 
2Chronicles18:26 Mua kèla: Sobha uambe kiki: Muthu iú mu tienu mʼonzo ia dikuikilu; mu mu dikile ni mbolo ia dilamba, ni menha a dilamba, katé eme ki ngi vutuka ni kutululuka." 
2Chronicles18:27 Kuala Mika: Sʼeie u vutuka muene ni kutululuka, Jihova-phe ki kale kene mu zuelela momuʼami. Anga uamba dingi uixi: Ivuenu-kiu, enu mu mundu uoso!" 
2Chronicles18:28 Sobha ia Izalaiele, ni Jozafate, sobha ia Juda, anga a banda muene ku Lamote-Ngiliiadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Sobha ia Izalaiele anga u tangela Jozafate, kuila: Ni kudimbikiza, eme nga-ndo di ta mu kubhânga, eie-phe u zuata izuatu ié. Sobha ia Izalaiele ua di dimbikiza hé a bokona mu mvunda." 
2Chronicles18:30 Sobha ia Sídia-phe ua bhele ngonge ku jikabhitangu ja makalu mê, kuila kana kubhânga ni ua tolo mba ua kulu, kale ngoho sobha ia Izalaiele muene." 
2Chronicles18:31 Anga ki bhita kuila, o jikabhitangu ja makalu, kia mono Jozafate, exi: Iú muene sobha ia Izalaiele; anga a mu kondoloka phala kubhânga-nê; maji Jozafate ua dikola, Jihova iú ua mu kudila. Nzambi ua a isa kuengi." 
2Chronicles18:32 Mbata edi kiki: Jikabhitangu ja makalu kia mono kuila ki muene sobha ia Izalaiele, eha ku mu kaiela." 
2Chronicles18:33 Anga bhu kala muthu uoleka mufula uê, o kia uʼase, ua kuama sobha ia Izalaiele, mua takanena o ibhakatu iê ia ita ni ngubu. Hé uambela mukua dikalu diê uixi: Lungulula kuaku lué u ngi katule mu ita, kuma a ngi kuama kinéne." 
2Chronicles18:34 Mu kizuua kieneʼokio, mvunda anga i nana, maji-phe sobha ia Izalaiele ua diʼakela muene mu dikalu diê, uemanena ku pholo ia akua Sídia katé mu ngoloxi; o kia fu dikumbi, muene ue uafu." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jozafate, sobha ia Juda, anga u vutuka kubhata diê ni kutululuka, ku Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles19:2 O Jehu, monʼa Hanani, mukua lumono, hé u tunda mu ku mu tumbidila, uambela sobha Jozafate, uixi: Eie ueji ku kuatekesa muthu ua ibha, ni kuzola ió a zembe Jihova? Kiene njinda ia dikota ia Jihova ki iejila ku thandu dié." 
2Chronicles19:3 Sumbala kiene, maji a sange hanji ima ia mbote momué; mukonda o mixitu eie ua i katula mu ixi, eie ua iudika muẋima ué phala kusota Nzambi." 
2Chronicles19:4 Jozafate anga u tunga mu Jeluzaleme; u tona dingi kubhita ni ku tala o mundu tunde bhu Beleseba tule ku milundu ia Ifalaimi, iú ua a bhangesa kuvutukila dingi Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ." 
2Chronicles19:5 Iú ua te afundixi mu ixi, mu jimbonge joso ja nguzu, mbonge ni mbonge." 
2Chronicles19:6 Anga uambela afundixi, kuila: Talenu kiambote; ioso i mu bhanga kuma o kufundisa kuenu ki kua tundu ku muthu, maji kua tundu kua Jihova; o Muene-phe uala ni enu mu uenji uenʼiú ua kufundisa." 
2Chronicles19:7 O kiki-phe, uoma ua Jihova u kale ni enu; alukenu-kiu, mu ki bhange; kuma kua Jihova, Nzambi ietu, ki ku moneka kituxi, mba kusuua jipholo ja athu, mba kuẋikina maujitu." 
2Chronicles19:8 Ku difundixilu dia Jihova ni ku batuilu dia milonga, Jozafate ua te-ku ue amoxi-mu ku jilevita, ni ku jinganga, ni ku iá o mítue ia jitata mua Izalaiele; anga a vutuka kiua mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles19:9 Anga u a tendelela, kuila: Muenda kienʼiki, mu uoma ua Jihova, ni ujitu, ni muẋima ua muvimba." 
2Chronicles19:10 O mu ima ioso ia katungu iza kokuenu, ia tundu ku jiphange jenu, a tungu mu jimbonge jâ, bhu kaẋi ka mahâẋi ni mahâẋi, ni bhu kaẋi ka itumu ni ijila, ni bhu kaẋi ka jingonge ni mabatuilu, muenda ni ku a bazela mbé ka kale ni mulonga kua Jihova, phala ki kuize njinda ia dikota ku thandu dienu, ni ku thandu dia jiphange jenu; bhangenu kienʼiki, mu kambe ku kala mu akua mulonga." 
2Chronicles19:11 Talesenu, Amadiia, nganga ia dikota, muene ua-nda ku mi kexila ku pholo mu ima ioso ku mbandu ia Jihova, o Zebadiia, monʼa Ijimaiele, o kikuna mu dibhata dia Juda, u mi kexila ku pholo mu ima ioso ku mbandu ia sobha; o jifixiiadi ue, o jilevita, iá ku pholo ienu; suinenu-phe, mu ki bhange; Jihova uanda ku kala ni oso a iuka." 
2Chronicles20:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha kubhita ima iii, anʼa Mouabhi, ni anʼa Amone, kumoxi ni akua Amone a mukuá, eza mu kúlua ita ni Jozafate." 
2Chronicles20:2 Anga kuiza athu amoxi-mu ku ki ambela Jozafate, exi: Kú kuiza kifuẋi kia dikota, kia mu tunda ku sámbua dia kalunga ni ku ixi ia Sídia, a mu kuiza mu kúlua nʼeie; kiki-phe iá kiá bhu Hazazotamale, bhuʼela: Enjedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Bheneʼobho Jozafate uoma ua mu kuata, hé u di ta mu kusota Jihova, anga u tuma o kujila, mu Juda ioso." 
2Chronicles20:4 Akua Juda oso hé a di bhongolola mu kubhinga dikuatekesu kua Jihova; o mu jimbonge joso ja Juda ue mua tundu athu eza mu kusota Jihova. 
2Chronicles20:5 Jozafate anga uimana mu kaẋi ka kionge kia Juda ni kia Jeluzaleme, mʼonzo ia Jihova, bhua lulama ni lumbu lua ubhe," 
2Chronicles20:6 anga uila, uixi: Àuá! Jihova, tata! Nzambi ia jitata jetu, kifua kʼeie muene u Nzambi mu diulu? Kʼeie muene u Mutumini ku thandu dia mautuminu moso ma akua jixi? O bhu lukuaku lué bhuene bhuala o nguzu ni kutena, ki kuala u tena kubhânga nʼEie." 
2Chronicles20:7 Manhi, Eie u Nzambi ietu, akua ixi iii, a tungile-mu, Eie ku a kaiela kuengi, bhu pholo ia mundu ué ua Izalaiele, eie ua bhana ixi iâ ku mbutu ia Mbalahamu, kamba dié, ku mivu ki iene kúbhua?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Ene iá a tungu momo; o dijina dié ia a di tungila kididi kikôla, exi:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Se ku tuiza kioso-kioso kia ibha, xibhata, milonga, kipheku mba nzala, etu-phe tua-nda kuiza ku pholo iaʼnzu iii ni ku pholo ié; kuma dijina dié diala mʼonzo mumu; mu kutata kuetu, tua kà di kola kokué, eie-phe ua kà tuivua, hé u tu kudila." 
2Chronicles20:10 Tala-phe kindala o anʼa Amone, ni anʼa Mouabhi, ni akua milundu ia Seíle, u ua fudixile Izalaiele kubhita mu kaẋi kâ, kia kexe mu kuiza, a mu tunda mʼoxi ia Ijitu, anga a a kunga muene, a bhita kuengi, hé a fula o ku a jikinisa," 
2Chronicles20:11 o kiki-phe a tu bhe o futu, iá a mu kuiza phala ku tu kaia, mu ixi ia undundu ué, i ua tu lunduisa." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ai! Nzambi ietu, tata! Manhi hádia eie kua kâ a fundisa? Mukonda momuetu sé-mu nguzu, mu kumona o kifuẋi kiosuʼiki kia mu tuʼendelʼetu. Ni kia kubhanga tua lémbua ku kʼijiia! Kuabhu! Maji-phe o mesu metu tua ma te kokué." 
2Chronicles20:13 O Juda ioso-phe kienhokio emana bhu pholo ia Jihova, kumoxi ni tumbonga tuâ ni ahetuʼâ, ni anʼâ." 
2Chronicles20:14 Bhenhobho Nzumbi ia Jihova iza mu kaẋi ka kionge ku thandu dia Jehaziiele, monʼa Zakadiia, monʼa Benaia, monʼa Jehiiele monʼa Mataniia, levita, ku anʼa Asafo." 
2Chronicles20:15 Anga uila: Enu Juda ioso bhanenu mátui, ni enu mua tungu mu Jeluzaleme, nʼeie sobha Jozafate: Jihova uambe kiki: ki mu kale ni uoma mba mu sasumuka mukonda dia kifuẋi kiki kia dikota, mukonda o mvunda ki ienuʼenu, maji ia Nzambi." 
2Chronicles20:16 Mungu mu kulumuka mu ku zoka-nâ; tala, ene anda kubandela ku mbanjidilu ia mulundu ua Ziji, mua ka di bongela-nâ kua suku o dikôlo, ku pholo ia kikangalakata kia Jeluuele." 
2Chronicles20:17 Mu mvunda iii, enu ki mua-nda kubhânga; mu sukila ngó mu kanga, hé muʼimana, nda mu mone kiá o ubhulukilu ua-nda ku mi bhana Jihova, eie Juda ni Jeluzaleme, ki mu kale ni uoma bha mu sasumuka; mungu muene ndé-nu mu kutakana-nâ, mbata Jihova ua kà kala ni enu." 
2Chronicles20:18 Bheneʼobho-phe o Jozafate u di bhala ni pholo bhoxi mu ku diunda; ni Juda ioso ue ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme, anga a di takula bhoxi mu kubheza Jihova." 
2Chronicles20:19 Jilevita, ku anʼa Kohate ni ku anʼa Kola, anga a balumuka phala kuximana Jihova Nzambi ia Izalaiele ni dízui dia suina kinène." 
2Chronicles20:20 Mu kimenemene kia selu anga a balumuka, hé a tunda mu kuia ku kikangalakata kia Tekoua; kioso ene kia mu tunda, Jozafate u nzongamana hé u handekela, uixi: Ngʼivienu, eie Juda, ni enu mua tunga mu Jeluzaleme; xikanenu kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu, nda mu kale bhua kondama; xikanenu ku jipolofeta jê mua kà zediue." 
2Chronicles20:21 Anga u di longesa ni mundu, iú ua tungula akua kuimbila Jihova, phala aie ni kuximana Ngana Ukôla, mu kutunda ene a songuela ió abhakata, ni kuila: Ximanenu Jihova, mukonda o kulenduka kuê kua kalelà-ku." 
2Chronicles20:22 O kithangana kiandeka ene ni kutana ni kuximana, Jihova ua te madibatamenu a kubatamena anʼa Amone, ni anʼa Mouabhi ni akua milundu ia Seíle eza mu kúlua ni Juda, anga a a tolola." 
2Chronicles20:23 Mukonda anʼa Amone, ni anʼa Mouabhi a bilukila akua milundu ia Seíle phala ku a jikinisa ni ku a jimisa o mbutu; ene kia zubha o kujikinisa o akua milundu ia Seíle, a di kuatekesa dingi ene mudiâ o kudijikinisa." 
2Chronicles20:24 Kieneʼokio-phe ue, Juda ua bhixila bhu kilangidilu kia kikangalakata; o kia tale ku kifuẋi, a mono kuila mikutu ngó ia imbi ia fu, ia zeka bhoxi, ni umoxi ngó ka subhuka." 
2Chronicles20:25 Jozafate anga uiza ni kifuẋi kiê mu kubhunda o madibongela anga a sanga ndumba dia jimbongo ni nzungule ia imbi, ni ima iate kiavulu, hé a di katuila ndumba dia ima ia bhingi kuila ia mukuá a lémbua ku iʼambata; anga a bhanga izuua i tatu ni kubhunda o ibongèle, kuma ia vudile." 
2Chronicles20:26 O ku tula mu kizuua kia kauana, anga a di bhongoluela mu Dikôlo dia Belaxa, mbata mueneʼomo muene mua ximanena Jihova, kiene kididi kiokio kia kʼixanena dijina dia Dikôlo dia Belaxa katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
2Chronicles20:27 Kieneʼokio mala oso a Juda ni Jeluzaleme, a vutuka ni kusanguluka, ala mu kuiza mu Jeluzaleme; o Jozafate ua a tuamenena ku pholo; kuma Jihova ua a bhana kusanguluka ku mbandu ia jinguma jâ." 
2Chronicles20:28 Anga eza mu Jeluzaleme kʼonzo ia Jihova ni kuxika tukoji ni jimbânza ni jikoloneta. 
2Chronicles20:29 O uoma ua Nzambi anga u tulukila ku thandu dia mautuminu moso mu jixi jeneʼojo, kioso ene kievu kuila Jihova ua bhângela Izalaiele ku jinguma jê." 
2Chronicles20:30 O ixi ia utuminu ua Jozafate anga ila muene hudí; Nzambi ua mu bhana kunhoha ku jimbandu joso. 
2Chronicles20:31 O Jozafate anga u tumina mua Juda. Kioso kiʼandeka kutumina, ua kexile ngó mu makuinhi atatu a mivu ni kitanu; anga u tumina makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia manhʼâ, Azuba, monʼa Sili." 
2Chronicles20:32 Muene uende mu njila ia Aza, tatʼâ, ka tundumu; ua bhanga jinga kia iuka ku mesu ma Jihova." 
2Chronicles20:33 Sumbala kiene, maji o matala ka ma katula, mukonda o mundu muẋima uâ ka u iudikile luua mu ku di tuma ni Nzambi ia jitata jâ." 
2Chronicles20:34 Abha o ima ia mukuá ia bhange Jozafate, kutale ia dianga, uixi ia sukidila, manhi ki iòsoneke mu mikanda ia Jehu, monʼa Hanane, ua i lunduluila mu divulu dia jisobha ja Izalaiele?" 
2Chronicles20:35 O kia zubha kubhita ima iosuʼiii, Jozafate, sobha ia Juda ua kuata ukamba ni Akaziia, sobha ia Izalaiele, ua bhange ima ia vulu ia ibha." 
2Chronicles20:36 Ua kuata-nê ukamba phala kubhanga jinaviiu ji tena kuia ku Talxixi; jinaviiu anga a ji bhangela bhu Enzone-Ngabele. 
2Chronicles20:37 Maji-phe o Eliiezele, monʼa Dodova, mukua Malesa, ua zambula mu upolofeta, ku mbandu ia Jozafate, uixi: Mukonda eie ua di bundu ni Akaziia, Jihova ua bulu ue o ikalakalu ié. O jinaviiu anga ji budika muene, hé a lémbua kuia ku Talxixi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Kia bhiti ima iosuʼiii, Jozafate ua zeka ni jitata jê, anga a mu funda ni jitata jê mu sanzala ia Davidi; o Jolá, monʼê anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles21:2 Anga u kala ni phange jê, anʼa Jozafate; eneʼâ: Azadiia, ni Jiiele, ni Zakadiia, ni Asadiia, ni Mikaiela, ni Sefatiia; ene oso iá a kexile anʼa Jozafate, sobha ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles21:3 Tatʼâ ua a bhana maujitu ma vulu ma phalata, ni ulu, ni ima ia te kiavulu, kumoxi ni jimbonge ja nguzu mua Juda; maji o kutumina ixi ua kubhana Jolá, kuma muene monʼê ua phandekumbi." 
2Chronicles21:4 Kioso Jolá kia zubha kubanda bhu kiandu kia ungana ua tatʼâ, o kia mono kiá kuila ua di kuatenena kiá kiambote, phange jê joso ua a jibha ni xibhata, kumoxi ni adiakimi amoxi-mu mua Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jolá kioso kia mateka kutumina ua kexile mu makuinhi a tatu a mivu ni iiadi; ua tumina dinake dia mivu mu Jeluzaleme. 
2Chronicles21:6 Iú uende mu jinjila ja jisobha ja Izalaiele kala kia bhanga jinga dibhata dia Akabe; mukonda monʼa Akabe muene ua kexile mukajiʼê; anga uenda ni kubhanga kia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova. 
2Chronicles21:7 Maji-phe o Jihova kʼandalele ku muanga dibhata dia Davidi, mu kuxinganeka o kikutu kia tele ni Davidi; mukonda ue muene ua kiʼambele kuila ua-nda ku mu bhana jinga mu izuua ioso, dimuikinu, ni muene ni anʼê." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mu izuua ié, kiene akua Idumeia kia kitukila utuminu ua Juda, anga a di hingisila o sobha iâ." 
2Chronicles21:9 Anga ki bhangesa Jolá kubhita ku pholo ni jikabhitangu jê ni makalu moso uai na-u; hé u fundumuka mu usuku, anga u nemeka akua Idumeia oso a mu kondele mu jimbandu kumoxi ni jikabhitangu ja makalu mâ." 
2Chronicles21:10 Sumbala kiene, maji akua Idumeia a dituna ku a tumina kuala ungana ua Juda, katé ni mu kizuua kia lelu; mu thembu ieneʼoio ue Libina ua kexile bhoxi dia utuminu uê, ua ẋinukʼê uê; mukonda o muene ua xisa Jihova, dia Nzambi ia jitata jê." 
2Chronicles21:11 Iu ua bhange ue matala mu milundu ia Juda; ua bhangesa akua Jeluzaleme kutondala ni akua Juda ua a bhangesa kukaiela kienhiki. 
2Chronicles21:12 Anga ku muiza kisoneke kia tundu kua Elija, polofeta, kuila: Jihova, Nzambi ia tatʼenu Davidi, uambe kiki: Kuma eie ua fulu kuenda mu jinjila ja tatʼenu Jozafate, ni mu jinjila ja Aza, sobha ia Juda," 
2Chronicles21:13 Maji eie uende mu njila ia jisobha ja Izalaiele, ua bhangesa Juda kubokona mu ufusa kumoxi ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme, kala kiene ufusa uene kiá ua dibhata dia Akabe, eie ua té-ku dingi o kujibha phange jé akua dibhata dia tatʼenu, athu a beta o kuiuka o mixima eie ndenge." 
2Chronicles21:14 Kiki-phe Jihova mundu ué ua-nda ku u kuama ni dibhebhu dia dikota, ni ku anʼé, ni ku ahetuʼé ni ku jimbongo jé joso." 
2Chronicles21:15 Eʼmuene ue ua-ndu kala ni uhaxi ua dikota; kukata kua-nda ku ku kuatela mu mala, anga kuia ni kunana kizuua ni kizuua katé mídia ki i ku tundila ku kanga." 
2Chronicles21:16 Jihova anga u phaphumuna o nzumbi ia jifilisteu ni ia akua Alábia, ala ku mbandu ia Itiiópia, phala kuzoka ni Jolá." 
2Chronicles21:17 Eneʼá hé a banda ku Juda, a di lukuila-mu, anga ambata jimbongo joso ja sange mʼonzo ia sobha, kumoxi ue ni anʼê ni ahatuʼê, katé ka muxila-bhu mona, kikale ngoho Jouakaji, o kasule ku anʼê." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ima iosuʼiii ki ia zubha o kubhita, Jihova u mu kuama mu mala ni uhaxi ki u xikina ku u saka." 
2Chronicles21:19 Anga kibhita kuila, kia zubha ndumba dia izuua, kia bhixila muene ku dizubhilu dia mivu iiadi, mídia ia mu tundu muene ku kanga ni uhaxi; anga úfua ni mahaxi a ibha kiavulu; o akuaʼxi iê ka muʼohela ima ia mazumba ma mbote, kala kia iʼohele ku jitata jê." 
2Chronicles21:20 Muene kiandeka o kutumina, ua kexile hanji mu makuinhi a tatu a mivu ki kiiadi; iú ua tumina dinake dia mivu mu Jeluzaleme; iú uendelela, ka xisa ngùnzu ia kima kuema diê; a mu fundu mu sanzala ia Davidi, maji kana mu jimbila ja jisobha." 
2Chronicles22:1 Ià oso a tungu mu Jeluzaleme, anga a ta Akaziia ku usobha, monʼê ua kasule, bhu kididi kiê, mukonda o anʼa makota oso, a a jibhile kuala o masoladi ejiie ni akua Alábia bhu kibangu; kienhiki Akaziia, monʼa Jolá, kia hingi o ungana ua Juda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ua kexile mu makuinhi a uana a mivu ni kiiadi, kioso kia mateka o kutumina, ua tumina muvu umoxi mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia mamʼâ, Ataliia, monʼa Holí." 
2Chronicles22:3 Muenhú ue uende mu jinjila ja dibhata dia Akabe; mukonda o manhʼâ ua kexile, muene mukua ku mu bhana o kaiula, mu kubhanga ima ia ibha." 
2Chronicles22:4 Anga u bhanga muene kia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova, kala akua dibhata dia Akabe, mukonda ene a kexile ku mu bhana o kaiula, kioso kia fu tatʼâ, phala o dibuikilu diê." 
2Chronicles22:5 Muene ue uende mu phangu jâ iú uai kumoxi ni Jolá, monʼa Akabe, sobha ia Izalaiele, mu kubhâla ni Hazaiele, sobha ia Sídia, bhua zukama ni Lamote-Ngiliiade; Jolá anga a mu kuama kuala akua Sídia." 
2Chronicles22:6 Muene anga u vutuka bhu Jizelele mu ku di tumba italakanha ia mu totela bhua zukama ni Lama, kioso kia kexe mu kúlua ni Hazaiele, sobha ia Sídia; anga Azadiia, monʼa Jolá, sobha ia Juda, u kulumuka mu kuhindula Jolá, monʼa Akabe, bhu Jizelele, mukonda ua kexile mu ku kata." 
2Chronicles22:7 O kiki ue, kifua kia vondadi ia Nzambi muene, kia Akaziia kuiza mu kuhindula Jolá, mukonda muene kioso kieza, kiene ue Jolá kia tundu mu kubhânga ni Jehu, monʼa Nisi, a mu undu kuala Jihova phala kujimisa muene nzaká o dibhata dia Akabe." 
2Chronicles22:8 Anga-phe ki bhita kiki: Kioso Jehu kia mu kumbidila o kizuelu kia Jihova kia tange ku dibhata dia Akabe, ua sange ue o ilamba ia Juda ni anʼa a jiphange ja Akaziia, a kexile mu kixibhidila Akaziia, anga ua jibha." 
2Chronicles22:9 Anga u sota kiua Akaziia, (kuma muene ua suamene mu mbonge ia Samádia) anga a mu bonga, hé a mu bheka kua Jehu, anga a mu jibha, a mu funda, kuma, exi; Monʼa ngene a Jozafate, muthu ua sotele Jihova ni muẋima uê uoso ua muvimba. O mu dibhata dia Akaziia ki mua kexile dingi muthu u kala ni nguzu ia kutumina." 
2Chronicles22:10 O Ataliia, manhʼâ Akaziia, kioso ki a mono kuila monʼê a mu jibha, ua fundumuka iú ua jimisa o mbutu ioso ia sobha, mu dibhata dia sobha ia Juda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Maji-phe Jozabate, monʼa sobha, ua muhatu, ua kuata Jouaji, monʼa Akaziia, iu ua mu katula mu kaxi ka anʼa sobha a kexile mu ku a jibha, iu ua mu te kumoxi ni kilédi kiê, mu xilu dia kuzeka; kienʼiki Jozabate, monʼa sobha Jolá, muhatu ua nganga Joiada (kuma ua kexile phangʼia sobha Akaziia) ua mu sueka ku mesu ma Ataliia, iu ua subhuka muene, ka mu jibha." 
2Chronicles22:12 Anga u kala ni ene a mu sueka mʼonzo ia Nzambi mivu isamanu; Ataliia anga u kala mu kutumina mu ixi. 
2Chronicles23:1 O ku tula ku muvu ua kasambuadi, Joiada u sunga nguzu, anga u ta kikutu ni atumini a jihama, ene a Azadiia, monʼa Jolá, ni Ijimaiele, monʼa Nzuanana, ni Azadiia, monʼa Obede, ni Mahaseia, monʼa Adaia, ni Elizafate, monʼa Xikidi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Eneʼâ anga a kondoloka Juda, hé a bhongolola o jinganga jala mu jimbonge joso ja Juda ni ió o mítue ia jitata mua Izalaiele, anga eza mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles23:3 O kionge kioso kieneʼokio anga a ta kikutu ni sobha mʼonzo ia Nzambi. Joiada anga ua ambela, uixi: Talenu, o kiki monʼa sobha ua-nda kuhinga ungana, kala kia tanga Jihova ku anʼa Davidi." 
2Chronicles23:4 O kima ki mua-nda kubhanga, kienʼiki: Mbandu imoxi ia jinganga ni jilevita, ene mu ku bokona jinga mu sabhalu, à kala alangidi a mabhitu." 
2Chronicles23:5 Mbandu ia mukuá a kà kala monzo ia sobha; o mbandu ia katatu ia kà kala bhu Dibhitu dia Dixikikilu; O kifuẋi kioso kia kà kala mu malumbu ma inzu ia Jihova. 
2Chronicles23:6 Maji-phe ki bhu kale muthu u bokona mʼonzo ia Jihova, kikale ngó o jinganga ni jilevita akua kubhanga ukunji; iá a tena kubokona mbata athu a kôla; maji o athu oso a kà kumbidila o kijila kia Jihova." 
2Chronicles23:7 O jilevita a kà kondoloka sobha a kà mu ta mu kaẋi, o muthu ni muthu ni mata mê bhu maku; uoso-uoso u bokona monzo a kà mu jibha; maji enu-phe mua kà kala ni sobha, kioso kia tunda ni kioso kia bokona." 
2Chronicles23:8 Ni jilevita ni Juda ioso a bhange muene kala kioso kia a tendelela Joiada, o nganga; ià a zangula muene muthu ni athuʼê, ku tale iá a bokona mu sabhalu, uixi iá a tunda mu sabhalu, kuma nganga Joiada o ibuka ka i muangene luua." 
2Chronicles23:9 Joiada, o nganga, ua bhana ue ku atumini a jihâma o matoma ni jingubu ja makota ni jingubu jʼòfele ja tokalele sobha Davidi, ja kexile mʼonzo ia Nzambi." 
2Chronicles23:10 Iú ua zeleka mundu uoso kia mbote, muthu ni mata mê bhu maku, tunde ku mbandu ia Kalatódio ni ku mbandu ia inzu, sobha a mu kondoloka." 
2Chronicles23:11 Anga a katula-phe kiá o monʼa sobha, a mu bheka bhu kanga, hé a mu ta o kitundu ku mútue; a mu bhana umbangi inga a mu bhanga sobha. O Joiada ni anʼê, a mʼundu, anga ela: Sobha, a tunge a some!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ataliia-phe kioso kiʼevu o kudikola kua kifuẋi, ala kulenga kuia mu kuximana sobha, uiza ku kifuẋi mʼonzo ia Jihova," 
2Chronicles23:13 anga u kengelela, u mona sobha iú muene bhu mbandu ia philadi ia zukama na-iu muene, bhu muelu, o atumini ni akua jikoloneta ala bhu mbandu ia sobha; o mundu uoso mu ixi a sanguluka anga a kala mu kuxika ku ima iâ ia kuxikila o mimbu, mbé o kuijidisa kuila kia fuamene o kuimbila diximanu; bheneʼobho Ataliia u tandula o izuatu iê anga u dikola, uexi: Usuéia, enu malʼé! Usuéia, enu malʼé!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Maji o nganga Joiada, u katula jikabhitangu a a tele mu kutumina o kifuẋi kia masoladi anga u tunda na-u bhu kanga, u a ambela, uixi: Mu katudienu muie-nê kuema dia kilômbo, uoso-uoso u sota ku mu kaiela muene, mu jibhienu ni xibhata; kuma nganga ua ambelele, kuila: Kana ku mu jibhila mʼonzo ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles23:15 Ene hé a mu ta maku, muene-phe ua di tela ia dibokuenu dia jikabalu, uia mʼonzo ia sobha; ene anga a mu jibhila mueneʼomo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Joiada anga u ta kikutu bhu kaii kê-muène ni kifuẋi ni sobha, kuila a kala mundu uangene ua Jihova." 
2Chronicles23:17 Kia zubha ku ta kikutu, mundu uoso a bokona mʼonzo ia Bale anga dihamba a di bula-bula, a bula-bula ue jikalatódio jene." 
2Chronicles23:18 O ima ia tokala kubhanga, mʼonzo ia Jihova, Joiada ua i te mu ididi iê, bhoxi dia lukuaku lua jinganga, o jilevita, a a solele kuala Davidi phala ukunji ua inzu ia Jihova, nʼende ni ku bhana o maujitu ma kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova, ni kusanguluka ni kuimba, kala kia ki soneka mu kitumu kia Mozé kala kia ki longo ue Davidi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Anga u ta alangidi a mabhitu, bhu mielu ia inzu ia Jihova, phala ki mu bokone muthu ua di kasanesa ni kima kioso-kioso kia bolo." 
2Chronicles23:20 Hé a katula jikabhitangu, ni makota ma jinganga, ni ió a tumina mu kaẋi ka mundu, ni mundu uoso a tokala mu ixi, anga endesa sobha mu kutunda mʼonzo ia Jihova, hé a bokuena bhu muelu ua dikota, mʼonzo ia sobha, anga a xikamesa sobha ku kiandu kia ungana." 
2Chronicles23:21 Akuaʼxi ene oso anga a sanguluka; o mbonge i kala ni kutululuka tunde kia jibha Ataliia ku xibhata. 
2Chronicles24:1 Jouaji ua kexile ngó mu sambuadi dia mivu kioso kiandeka o kutumina, iú ua tumina makuinhi auana a mivu mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia mamʼâ Zíbia, mukua Beleseba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Jouaji anga u bhanga ima ia kuiuka bhu pholo ia Jihova, mu izuua ioso ia nganga Joiada." 
2Chronicles24:3 Joiada anga u mu sotela ahatu kiiadi; hé u vuala anʼa mala ni anʼa ahatu. 
2Chronicles24:4 Anga kibhita kuila, kia zubha kubhita imʼiii, ku muẋima ua Jouaji kua muʼiza o kutungulula inzo ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles24:5 Hé u bhongolola o jinganga ni jilevita, uixi: Ndokuenu muie mu jimbonge ja Juda, mu bhongolole kitadi mu Izalaiele ioso, mbé o kuenda ni kutungulula o inzu ia Nzambi ienu, muvu ni muvu; enu-phe mu bhanga lusolo ni kima kienʼiki. Maji o jilevita ka bhange lusolo." 
2Chronicles24:6 Anga sobha uixana Joiada, o muadiakime uâ, hé u mu tangela, kuila; Eie kuibhudixilaʼhi mu jilevita mba ihi kia fudisa o kuiza ni lubhaku lu tunda mua Juda ni Jeluzaleme, lua xindi Mozé, ngunza ia Jihova, ni kionge kioso kia Izalaiele, ku balaka ia umbangi?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Kuma Ataliia mukonda dia kukala muthu ua ibha, o anʼê a sengulula o inzu ia Nzambi, katé ni ima ikôla iaʼnzo ia Jihova a i kitula ia Bale." 
2Chronicles24:8 Sobha anga u bhana ngonge, hé a iudika mbaúlu hé a i tula bhu kanga bhu muelu ua inzu ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles24:9 Anga a ki kola mua Juda ni mu Jeluzaleme kuila, a bheke mubhaku ua Jihova, ua xindi Mozé, ngunza ia Nzambi, ku anʼa Izalaiele oso, mu ixi ia kisekele." 
2Chronicles24:10 Kienhokio adiakimi oso ni mundu uoso a kala ni kusanguluka, eza ni mubhaku hé a u takuila jinga mu mbaúlu katé kia bhu o kikalakalu." 
2Chronicles24:11 Anga aia ni kuila, mu kithangana kia kuiza ni mbaúlu a i ambata bhu maku ma jilevita, kioso ki tumina sobha, kuila ua i mono muala kiá kitadi kiavulu, kuiza musoneki ua sobha ni kibese kia nganga ia dikota, anga a lundulula o mbaúlu, hé a i katula a i vutula bhu kididi kiê. Kiene kia bhanga jingʼiki kizuua ni kizuua; anga a bhongolola ndumba ia kitadi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Kia kexe mu kuila ni Joiada ni sobha, a ki bhana kua oso ala ku pholo ia kikalakalu kia inzu ia Jihova; anga a futila jipedelelu ni jikalupindelu phala kutungulula dingi onzo ia Jihova; a sota ue ni akua kusula ni ió a kalakala ku utadi mbebhu o kuiudika inzu ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles24:13 Oso a kexile ku pholo ia kikalakalu, a kexi mu kubhangesa kuila o kikalakalu kia kutungulula o inzu ia Jihova kiia ni ku di bandekeza dingi ku maku mâ; anga inzu ia Nzambi a i bheka dingi bhu ditala diê diʼòkulu, ia kuata, ia kolo." 
2Chronicles24:14 Kioso kia zubha o kukalakala, o kitadi kia subhuka-ku, eza na-kiu kua sobha ni kua Joiada, anga a ki bhanga itutu phala inzu ia Jihova, itutu phala ukunji ni ku bhela jisata, ni uasu ua dizumba, ni itutu muene ia ulu ni phalata. Izuua ioso anga a kala mu kubhana jisata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova, mʼonzo ia Nzambi, mu izuua ioso ia Joiada kulu-dia-mundu." 
2Chronicles24:15 Joiada anga u kuka muene kiavulu, ni izuua ia mu kumu, kioso kia fu; kulu-dia-Mundu ua bhange-ku hama ia mivu ni makuinhi a tatu, iú uafu-ke." 
2Chronicles24:16 Anga a mu funda mu sanzala ia Davidi, mu jimbila ja jisobha, mukonda muene ua bhangele mbote, ni kua Izalaiele, ni kua Nzambi, ni ku dibhata diê." 
2Chronicles24:17 Maji kioso kia fu Joiada, o adiakimi a Juda eza anga a fukamena sobha, sobha anga ua evua." 
2Chronicles24:18 Hé a xa inzu ia Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ, aia mu kuxibhidila mahamba mu mikáu, ni kubhikila iteka. Kienhokio-phe, ku thandu dia Juda ni Jeluzaleme, anga kutuluka njinda ionéne, mukonda dia kikuma kiâ kienhiki." 
2Chronicles24:19 Maji-phe, mu kaẋi kâ ua tumikisa-mu ni jipolofeta, phala kuenda ni ku a vutuila kua Jihova; ene anga aia ni ku a dimuna, maji ene nguâ-uâ kubhana mátui." 
2Chronicles24:20 O Nzumbi ia Nzambi anga uizalesa Zakadiia, monʼa nganga Joiada, muene anga uimana mu kaẋi ka mundu, hé u zuela kuila: Nzambi uambe kiki: Phalaʼhi mua mu tondala o ijila ia Jihova? Kuabhu-phe ki mua-nda kuzediua. Kuma enu mua xisa Jihova, o muene ue ua-nda ku mi xa." 
2Chronicles24:21 Ene anga a mu ta kikutu kia ufe, hé a mu bûba ni matadi, mu lumbu lua inzu ia Jihova, kala kia ki tumina sobha." 
2Chronicles24:22 Mu kubhanga kiki, sobha Jouaji ka lembalala dingi o mbote ia mu bhangele Joiada, tatʼa Zakadiia, maji ua mu jibhila monʼê, ua bhingi mu kufua iú tenda, uixi: Jihova ua-nda ku ki mona, hé ua kà ku ibhula na-kiu." 
2Chronicles24:23 Anga ki bhita kiki: o kuila muvu ki ua tena luua, kifuẋi kia masoladi ma Sídia kia bande mu kúlua ni Jouaji; anga eza mua Juda ni mu Jeluzaleme; o mu kaẋi ka mundu, a jibha-mu ngoho o makota oso a kifuẋi; o ima iâ ioso ia a bhundu, o masoladi a i tumikisa kua sobha ia Damasku." 
2Chronicles24:24 Mukonda, sumbala o kifuẋi kia akua Sídia kieza ni athu ófele, maji-phe Jihova ua bhakula muene o kifuẋi kia mundu ua vulu bhu maku mâ kuma ene a xisa Jihova dia Nzambi ia jitata jâ. Kienhiki kia bhiti o mafundisilu ma Jihova kua Jouaji." 
2Chronicles24:25 Kia mu xisa akua Sídia (kuma a mu xile ni mauhaxi mʼonène), abhikʼê a mu ta kikutu kia usuéia, anga a mu jibhila bhu hama, u fua, mukonda dia manhinga ua Zakadiia, monʼa nganga Joiada; hé a mu funda mu mbanza ia Davidi, maji ka mu fundu mu jimbila ja jisobha." 
2Chronicles24:26 A mu tele o kikutu kia ufe, eneʼá: Zabadi, monʼa Simiiate, mukua Amone, ni Jozabate, monʼa Silete, mukua Mouabhi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Ku mbandu ia anʼê ni unéne ua kikalakalu kia mu bhele, ni ukalelu ua inzu ia Nzambi, ima ioso a i soneka mu dilunda dia divulu dia jisobha. O monʼé Amaziia muene ua hingi ungana bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziia anga u kala mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu, kioso kia mateka o kutumina, anga u tumina makuinhi aiadi a mivu nʼivua, mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia manhʼâ Nzuanadane, mukua Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles25:2 Anga u bhanga ima ia iuka ku mesu ma Jihova, maji ka i bhange ni muẋima ua muvimba." 
2Chronicles25:3 Anga ki bhita kuila, o kia mono kuma o ixi ioso ia utuminu ue ia mu kala kiá bhu maku, u jibha abhika oso a jibhile phaiʼâ, o sobha." 
2Chronicles25:4 Maji anʼâ ka a jibha; ua bhange kala kioso kia soneka mu kitumu, mu divulu dia Mozé, kala kia ki tendelela Jihova, kuila: Kana kujibha jitata mukonda dia ana; mba mu jibha ana mukonda dia jitata, maji muthu ni muthu u fuila kikuma kiêmuène." 
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziia anga u bhongolola akua Juda oso, u a ta ku ibuka ia mabhata ma jitata mu Juda ioso ni mua Bejamí u ta-mu atumini a jimidi, ni atumini a jihama, ua-aleka ene oso tunde mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ʼte bhulu dingi, anga u sanga-mu hama jitatu ja midi iʼòsole a tena kuia mu usoladi, ambata jinga dionga ni ngubu." 
2Chronicles25:6 Ua futila ue mua Izalaiele, anga u tambula-mu hama ia midi ia mala a indanda, mu hama ia jitalendu ja phalata." 
2Chronicles25:7 Maji-phe kueza muthu ua Nzambi, u muʼambela, uexi: Eie sobha, kifuẋi kia Izalaiele ku kiʼehele kuia nʼeie: mukonda Jihova ka di te ni Izalaiele, o anʼa Ifalaimi." 
2Chronicles25:8 O ki uila-phe uia, bhanga-kiu, maji mu kubhânga u suína muene; Nzambi uanda ku kubhangesa ku dibhala bhu pholo ia nguma jé; mukonda Nzambi uala ni nguzu ia kukuatekesa ni nguzu ia kubhalesa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziia anga uambela o muthu ua Nzambi, uixi: Tua-nda kubhanga-phe kiebhi, o hama ia jitalendu ja phalata ji nga bhe ku masoladi a Izalaiele? Muthu ua Nzambi anga u vutula uixi: Jihova uala ni kiavulu kia ku ku bhana, o kiki ndenge." 
2Chronicles25:10 Amaziia anga uabhula o kibuka kia masoladi a mu tumikixine ku Ifalaíme phala a vutuke ku kididi kiâ; ene anga a kuatela Juda njinda iavulu, hé a vutuka kieneʼokio ni njinda ku bhata diâ." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amaziia anga u di bhanga kindanda, uendesa kifuẋi kiê, anga aia mu dikôlo dia môngua; hé a jibha kuinhi dia midi ku anʼa Seíle." 
2Chronicles25:12 Anʼa Juda ue hé a kuta dingi kuinhi dia midi ni muenhu uâ, anga eza na-u bhu zokozoko dia ditadi dia dikota; o bhu dizokozoko dia ditadi bheneʼobho, aia ni ku a lundumuina bhoxʼèlele katé ene oso kia sasujuka." 
2Chronicles25:13 Maji-phe, mala ió, o masoladi a vutula Amaziia, eji kuia-nê ku ita, a di lunduluila mu jimbonge ja Juda, tunde mu Samádia ndú mu Mbetolone; anga a kuama-ku midi jitatu ja muthu; a bhunda nzungule dia ima." 
2Chronicles25:14 Anga ki bhita kuila, kioso Amaziia kia vutuka kuele mu kujibha akua Idumeia, ueza ni jinzambi ja anʼa Seíle, ua ji kiti nzambi jê, iú ua ji fukamena, iú ua jiʼohela uasu ua dizumba." 
2Chronicles25:15 Bheneʼobho, Amaziia njinda ia Jihova i uama ku thandu diê, anga u mu tumikisa polofeta ia mu ambela, exi: Kikuma kiahi ki ua sotela jinzambi ja mundu, ja lémbua kubhulula o mundu uê bhu lukuaku lué-eie?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kiosuʼiki hanji polofeta iu u mu zuelela, muene u vutula, uixi; Eie a ku te phala kubhana kaiula kua sobha? Dixibhe! Phalaʼhi a ku kuama ngó? Polofeta anga u dixibha, maji, uixi: Nga ki mono muene, kuila Jihova ua te kiá hundu ia ku ku sengulula; mukonda dia kiki ki ua bhange; eie ua ditunu kubhana mátui ku kaiula kami." 
2Chronicles25:17 O kia di longesa mudiâ, Amaziia, sobha ia Juda, u tuma Jouaji, sobha ia Izalaiele, monʼa Jouakaji, monʼa Jehu, uixi: Eze tu di mone pholo ni pholo." 
2Chronicles25:18 Maji Jouaji, sobha ia Izalaiele, u tuma kuambela Amaziia, sobha ia Juda, kuila: O mungènhe uà tunga ku muxitu ua Libanu, ua tumu kuambela musédulu uà tunga ku muxitu ua Libanu, kuila: Bhana monʼé ua muhatu, a sakane ni monʼami ua diiala; maji-phe o iama ia mukáu ià tunga mu muxitu ua Libanu, ia bhiti anga i diotela o mungènhe bhoxi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Eie uambe: Nga kuama akua Idumeia; o muẋima ue iú ua zangalala ni ku di ta nzabala; o kikiphe, kalʼé mʼonzo ié; u sotela-hi divuua nʼu dibhale, eie ni Juda kumoxi?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Maji-phe Amaziia nguê ku muʼivua, mukonda ue o kienʼiki kia tundu kua Nzambi, phala ku mu bhakula bhu lukuaku lua jinguma jê; kuma a takana jinzambi ja akua Idumeia." 
2Chronicles25:21 Anga Jouaji, sobha ia Izalaiele, u banda; ni muene ni Amaziia, sobha ia Juda, anga a di mona pholo ni pholo bhu Beteseme, ixi ia tokala mua Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Juda anga a mu kuama kuala Izalaiele; ene oso hé a muanganena mu jibalaka jâ. 
2Chronicles25:23 Amaziia, sobha ia Juda, monʼa Jouaji, monʼa Jouakaji, anga a mu kutila bhu Beteseme, kuala Jouaji, sobha ia Izalaiele hé uiza-nê mu Jeluzaleme; anga u bula o lumbu lua Jeluzaleme, tunde bhu muelu ua Ifalaimi katé bhu muelu ua Thungi, hama jiuana ja jikóvado." 
2Chronicles25:24 Ua katula ue o ulu uoso ni phalata ni itutu ioso ia sange mʼonzo ia Nzambi, kumoxi ni Obede-Edomo, ni jimbongo joso ja dibhata dia sobha, ni jihutile anga u vutuka kiua ku Samádia." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amaziia, monʼa Jouaji, sobha ia Juda, anga u laia hanji kuinhi dia mivu ni kitanu, tunde bhu ufilu ua Jouaji, monʼa Jouakaji, sobha ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles25:26 Ki tuʼamba dingi ku ima ia bhange Amaziia kutale ia dianga, uixi ia sukidila, manhi ka i soneka mu divulu dia jisobha ja Juda ni Izalaiele?" 
2Chronicles25:27 O mu Jeluzaleme-phe, tunde kiá Amaziia kia xisa o ku kaiela Jihova, a mu te kikutu kia ku mu jibha, muene hé u lengela ku Lakiji; maji a tumikisa athu a mu kaiela kuema diê anga a mu jibhila kueneʼoko." 
2Chronicles25:28 Hé eza-nê ku thandu dia jikabalu, anga a mu funda ni jitata jê bhu sanzala ia Juda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Bhenhobho mundu uoso a kuata Uziia uala hanji mu kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu, anga a mu bhanga sobha bhu kididi kia phaiʼâ, Amaziia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Muene anga u tunga Elote, hé u mu vutuila kua Juda, kioso sobha kia zeka ni jitata jê." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziia kioso ki andeka kutumina, ua kexile hanji mu kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu, anga u tumina makuinhi a tanu a mivu ni kitanu mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia manhʼâ Jekodiia, mukua Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles26:4 Anga u bhanga ima ia iuka ku mesu ma Jihova, kala ima ioso ia bhanga jinga Amaziia, tatʼâ." 
2Chronicles26:5 Mukonda ua di bhana mu kusota Nzambi mu izuua ia Zakadiia, muthu ua kexile mbâmba mu iusukila ia Nzambi; o mu izuua mua sota jinga Jihova, Ngana Nzambi ue ua mu zediuisa." 
2Chronicles26:6 Mbata ua tundu, iú ualu ni jifilisteu, anga u bula o kimbaka kia Ngate, ni kimbaka kia Jabina, ni kimbaka kia Ajindode; anga u tunga jimbonge mu Ajindode ni mu kaii ka jifilisteu." 
2Chronicles26:7 Ngana Nzambi iu ua mu kuatekesa ku jifilisteu ni ku akua Alábia a tungile mu Ngulu-bale, ni ku jimeunita." 
2Chronicles26:8 Akua Amone anga a bhana maujitu kua Uziia; o fuma iê anga iia katé mu ku bokona mu Ijitu, kuma ua di jingisa kinéne." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uziia ua tungile ue jinzu ja matala mu Jeluzaleme bhu muelu ua Thungi, ni bhu muelu ua Dikôlo, ni mu jihota, anga u ji kolesa kiambote." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ua tungile ue jinzu ja matala mu kikangalakata anga u kandesa-mu ndunga ja vulu; kuma ua kexile ni ibhaku ia vulu, kutale mu makôlo uixi mu manhana; o idimakaji ni akuni a mivide ua a uanena mu milundu ni mu mikáu ia uabha o kudima; mukonda muene ua uabhelele o kudima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uziia ua kexile ue ni kifuẋi kia athu, masoladi ejiia kiambote o ku kuata mata, aia ni kutunda phala kuia ku ita kala kia a soneka mu ditangelu diʼòbhange ku lukuaku lua Jeiele, o musoneki, ni Mahaseia, fixiiadi, ala bhoxi dia lukuaku lua Hananiia, umoxi ku ilamba ia sobha." 
2Chronicles26:12 O mítue ia mabhata, athu a mazonda, ku a kuata o konda, atena midi jiiadi ni hama jisamanu ja muthu." 
2Chronicles26:13 Anga a kala mu kutumina kifuẋi kia masoladi ma ita, kia kexile hama jitatu ni sambuadi dia midi ni hama jitanu ja athu, a kexile mu kúlua ita ni nguzu ia vulu, mbé o ku kuatekesa sobha kúlua ni jinguma jê." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziia anga u bhanga jingubu phala o kifuẋi kioso, ni madionga, ni jikapasete ni ivunga-thulu, ni mifula; katé ni jimbalafunda mbé o kutakula o matadi." 
2Chronicles26:15 Anga u bhanga jimákina mu Jeluzaleme, ja iudika kuala athu ejiia o ufunu, a ji iudikila phala ji kale mu jinzu ja matala ni bhu jithungi ja imbaka phala ni jʼende ni kuasa misongo ni kutakula imatadi ionéne; anga o fuma iê iia muene ku mabhabha katé ku makanga kinéne; mukonda a mu kuatekesa ni isunji ni madiuanu katé kia di bhange dizonda dionéne." 
2Chronicles26:16 Maji Uziia-phe kia zubha kiá o ku kituka dizonda, o muẋima uê ua di zangeleka katé ki ua zangiua; anga u tondalela Jihova, Nzambi iê, mbata ua bokona muene mʼonzo ia Jihova phala kuoha uasu ua dizumba ku thandu dia kalatódio ka uasu ua dizumba." 
2Chronicles26:17 Kienhokio-phe ue, nganga, Azadiia, ua mu kaiela kuema, anga u bokona ni makuinhi nake a jinganga ja Jihova, makuenze oso a nguzu." 
2Chronicles26:18 A fudisa sobha Uziia, anga a muʼambela, exi: Eie Uziia ki ki ku fuama, kuoha o uasu ua dizumba bhu pholo ia Jihova, maji kia a fuama o jinganga, anʼa Alá, athu a a lumbu, mbebhu o kuoha uasu ua dizumba; mu kididi kikôla tunda-mu, kuma ua tondala; kuma kienhiki ue ki ki tena ku kukala ujitu ué-eie, ku mbandu ia Jihova Nzambi." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziia bhenhobho njinda i mu kuata; o muene ua kuata bhu maku o kienga kia kuohela uasu ua dizumba phala kuoha; muene-phe kia thathamena jingangʼiki, dibhute di mu tundila bhu dibhomo, mʼonzo ia Jihova, bhu mbanduʼa Kalatódio ka uasu ua dizumba, bhu mesuʼa jinganga bhene." 
2Chronicles26:20 O nganga ia dikota Azadiia kioso kia lunguluka mu ku mu tala kumoxi ni jinganga ja mukuá, a mu mona kuila dibhute dia mu tundila kiá bhu dibhomo diê, anga a mu tubhula bhu kanga ni makidikidi; katé ni muene ue ua tundu lusolo, kuma ua mono kuila Jihova ua mu kuama." 
2Chronicles26:21 Kienhiki sobha Uziia kia kituka mukua dibhute katé mu kizuua kiê kia kufua; iú ua kexile kiá, mukonda dia kukala mukua dibhute, mu kanzu ku mbandu kuengi, kuma a mu tubhula mu kisangela kia inzu ia Jihova; anga monʼê Jotamu u kala ni kikalakalu kia inzu ia sobha, ni kufundisa o mundu mu ixi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Kuambe dingi ima ia mukuá ia bhange Uziia, kixi ia dianga mba ia sukidila, polofeta Izaia, monʼa Amoji, muene ua i soneka." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uziia anga u zeka ni jitata jê, anga a mu funda ni jitata jê mu mukáu ua mbila ia jisobha; mukonda edile, exi: Mukua dibhute. O monʼê Jotamu anga u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles27:1 Kioso Jotamu kia mateka o kutumina, ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu, iu ua tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia mamʼâ Jelusa, monʼa Zadoke." 
2Chronicles27:2 Anga u bhanga kia iuka bhu pholo ia Jihova, kala ioso ia bhanga jinga tatʼâ Uziia, kana-phe o kubokona mu Thembulu ia Jihova. Maji hanji o mundu ua kexile mu kutondala." 
2Chronicles27:3 Muene anga u bhanga muelu ua thala ua inzu ia Jihova, anga u tunga ue kiavulu ku thanduʼa kimbaka kia Ofele." 
2Chronicles27:4 Ua tungu ue jimbonge mu milundu ia Juda; o mu mikáu ua te-mu jimbonge ni jinzu ja matala. 
2Chronicles27:5 Muene ualu ita ni sobha ia anʼa Amone, iu ua a lende; mukonda dia kieneʼokio, mu muvu uenʼió, anʼa Amone a mu bhekela hama ia talendu ja phalata, kuinhi dia midi ia isudi ia tiliku, ni kuinhi dia midi ia isudi ia sevada; ima ienʼiii iene ia mu bhekela jinga anʼa Amone mu muvu ua kaiadi ni ua katatu ue." 
2Chronicles27:6 Kienhiki Jotamu anga u kituka dizonda, mukonda o jinjila jê ua ji bhangesa kutalela kua Jihova, Nzambi iê." 
2Chronicles27:7 O ima ia kamukuá dingi ia di te-ku, ia bhanga jinga Jotamu, ni ita iê ioso ni jinjila jê, tala, a i soneka mu divulu dia jisobha ja Izalaiele ni ja Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Muene ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu kioso kiandeka o kutumina; iu ua tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu mu Jeluzaleme. 
2Chronicles27:9 Jotamu anga u zeka ni jitata jê, anga a mu funda mu sanzala ia Davidi; o Akaji, monʼê, anga u hinga usobha bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles28:1 Akaji ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu kioso kiandeka o kutumina; ua tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni kisamanu mu Jeluzaleme; hé u lémbua kubhanga jinga kia iuka bhu pholo ia Jihova, kala kia ki bhanga jinga Davidi, tatʼâ." 
2Chronicles28:2 Kia mu kexi kota, o kuenda mu jinjila ja jisobha ja Izalaiele, anga u ta-ku dingi o kuiudika iteka ia utadi ua kuzunza kua Bale." 
2Chronicles28:3 Mu dikôlo dia monʼa Hinono, muene uohela-mu ue o uasu ua dizumba; anʼê-muène ue, ua oha mu túbhia, kala o maufusa ua matumbu ma kaiesa Jihova bhu pholo ia anʼa Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles28:4 O ku milundu ue, ni ku ididi ia dileka, ni moxiʼa miẋi ioso ia uisu, ua bhela-mu ue jisata, ni kuoha uasu ua dizumba." 
2Chronicles28:5 Mukonda dia kienhiki, Jihova, Nzambi iê, ua mu bhakula ue bhu lukuaku lua sobha ia akua Sídia, ene anga a mu tolola ku ita, hé a muʼambata kifuẋi kionène kia jihutile anga eza na-kiu ku Damasku; a mu bhakula ue dingi bhu lukuaku lua sobha ia Izalaiele, muene anga u mu kuama ni ukuamenu ua dikota." 
2Chronicles28:6 Kuma Peka, monʼa Demaliia, mu kizuua kimoxi, ua jibha hama ni makuinhi aiadi a midi ia muthu mua Juda, makuenze oso a ita; mukonda a xisa Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ." 
2Chronicles28:7 O Zukidi, diiala dia dizonda mua Ifalaíme, ua jibha Mahasiia, monʼa sobha, ni Azidikanu, o kimbadi, ni Elekana, muthu ua kaiela kua sobha." 
2Chronicles28:8 Anʼa Izalaiele anga ambata ku jiphange jâ, akua Juda, hama jiiadi ja midi ia athu, a a kutu, ni ahetu, ni anʼa mala ni anʼa ahetu; anga a bhunda ue ndumba dia ima, hé eza na-iu mu Samádia." 
2Chronicles28:9 Muenhomo-phe mua kexile polofeta ia Jihova, dijina diê, a muʼila; Odele. Muenʼiú anga u tunda mu ku kauidila o kifuẋi kia masoladi, kia mu kuiza mu Samádia, anga uʼambela, kuila: Talenu, kioso Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jenu kia thathamena akua Juda, ua a bhakula bhu lukuaku luenu, enuʼenu mua a jibha kiabhu ni njinda ia bhingi kuila ia bhixila katé mu diulu." 
2Chronicles28:10 O kiki-phe enu mua-lu xinganeka kuila anʼa Juda ni Jeluzaleme a kala abhikʼenu, kuma ala jihutile ja mala ni ja ahetu; manhi kʼenuʼenu muene amoxi ni enhó, ala ni kikuma mu kaẋi kâ, kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Kala kiki-phe, ngʼivienu, mu vutule dingi iá, o jihutile ji mua kutu, ku jiphange jenu akua Juda, enu mueza na-u; kuma o kuuama kua njinda ia Jihova kuala ku thandu dienu." 
2Chronicles28:12 Bhenhobho ku adiakimi a mu tumina mu kaẋi ka anʼa Efalaimi, ku balumuka athu: Azadiia, monʼa Nzuanana, Belekiia, monʼa Mesilemote, Jezikiia, monʼa Salume ni Hamasa, monʼa Hadilai, anga a lungulukila iá a mu tunda ku ita." 
2Chronicles28:13 A ambela, exi: O iá u mua kutuʼâ, ki mua-ndu tena ku a bokuesa mumu, mukonda o ku kituxi ni kikuma kietu ki tuala na-kiu kiá kua Jihova, enu mua mesena mu ta-ku dingi ku ituxi ietu ni ku ikuma ietu, sumbala o kikuma ki tuala na-kiu kia vulu kiá, o kualala kua njinda ia Jihova kuala kiá ku thandu dia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles28:14 Bhenhobho o masoladi a tundu mu ita, a maneka, a jituna iá oso a a kutile, ni ima ioso ia a bhundile bhu mesu muene ma adiakime ni ma kionge kioso." 
2Chronicles28:15 O athu ió a a tange mu majina mâ, anga a balumuka, a zangula jihutile, o ku ima ia a bhundu a katula-ku kioso kia tokala anga a zuika amoxi-mu a kexile ni tuẋi; hé a a zuika, a a ta jisabhatu ku inama, a a bhana kia kúdia ni kia kúnua anga a a uesa ni maji; o ió ene oso a lémbua o kuenda, a bulukuta mukonda dia kihongo mu mukutu, a ambatela ku jibulu hé a a bheka mu Jedikó, ku jiphange jâ, mu mbonge ia maie; ene anga a vutuka kiua ku Samádia." 
2Chronicles28:16 Mu thembu muenhomo, sobha Akaji u tuma kuambela jisobha ja Asídia phala ku mu kuatekesa." 
2Chronicles28:17 Mukonda ue akua Idumeia, eza ue ia a lu Juda, ia ambata jihutile (o jikuikile) ku ubhika." 
2Chronicles28:18 O akua Fidíxia ue a di lukula ku jimbonge ja kiphenza ni jiji jala ku mbandu ia Sulu ia Juda, ia a tambula Bete-Seme, ni Ajalone, ni Jedelote, ni Soko kumoxi ni ididi ia utuminu uê; ni Timina ni tusanzala tua utuminu uê; anga a tunga momo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Mbata Juda a mu tununa, a mu katula o ujitu kuala Jihova, mukonda dia Akaji, sobha ia Izalaiele; kuma muene ua jimbidisa Juda, o Juda ue iu ua di bhakulʼé kiá muene mu kubhanga kia ibha ni kutondalela Jihova." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tiglate-Pilinesele, sobha ia Asídia, anga u muʼendela; muene-phe ua fikile kuma ueza ku ma kuatekesa, manhi ueza mu ku mu bhondeleka ni ku mu phopheka dingi." 
2Chronicles28:21 Mukonda ue Akaji ua zangula ku ima ia subhukile mʼonzo ia Jihova, ni mʼonzo ia sobha ni ia ilamba, iú ua i bhana kua sobha ia Asídia; maji muene-phe ka mu kuatekesa." 
2Chronicles28:22 O mu kithangana kia mu bhondeleka sobha ia Asidia, muene ue ua beta dingi o ku tondalela Jihova, ni kubhanga kia ibha; kienhiki o kikexilu kia sobha Akaji;" 
2Chronicles28:23 mukonda ua bhana jisata ku jinzambi ja akua Damasku, a mu tolola muene, uixi: Mukonda jisobha ja Sídia o jinzambi jâ ja mu a kuatekesa, eme uami nga-nda ku ji bhakuila jisata phala ni ji ngi kuatekese uami, Maji-phe jinzambi jenʼiji ja zubha dingi o ku mu bheka mu hadi, ni muene ni Izalaiele ioso." 
2Chronicles28:24 Akaji anga u bhongolola o itutu ioso ia inzu ia Jihova, anga o itutu ioso ia inzu ia Nzambi u i bulabula, anga u jika mabhitu ma inzu ia Jihova, anga u bhanga jikalatódio phala muene mu jihota joso ja Jeluzaleme," 
2Chronicles28:25 O mua Juda ue, sanzala ni sanzala, ua bhange-mu matala ma kuohela uasu ua dizumba ku jinzambi jengi. Mu kubhanga kienʼiki, ua lokalala o njinda ia Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jê." 
2Chronicles28:26 O ima-phe dingi ia mukuá ia bhange Akaji ni ia jinjila jê joso, kixi ia dianga kala ia sukidila, tala, a i soneka mu divulu dia jisobha ja Juda ni ja Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles28:27 Akaji anga uzendalala ni jitata jê, anga a mu funda mu mbonge, mu Jeluzaleme, maji ka mu te mu jimbila ja jisobha ja Izalaiele. Anga Ezekiia, monʼê u hinga ungana bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles29:1 Ezekiia ua kexi mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni kitanu kioso kiandeka o kutumina, iu ua tumina makuinhi aiadi a mivu nʼivua mu Jeluzaleme; dijina dia mamʼâ, a muʼixana jinga exi Abiia, monʼa Zakadiia." 
2Chronicles29:2 Anga u bhanga ima ia kuiuka bhu pholo ia Jihova, kala ioso kiá ia bhanga jinga Davidi, tatʼâ." 
2Chronicles29:3 Muene, mu muvu ua dianga ua utuminu uê, ku mbeji ia dianga, kiene kia jikula o mabhitu ma inzu ia Jihova, anga u ma iudikisa." 
2Chronicles29:4 Anga uiza ni jinganga ni jilevita, u a bhongoluela bhu kitanda kia mutundila-kumbi." 
2Chronicles29:5 U a tangela, uixi: Enu mu jilevita, ngʼivienu. Dizelesienu kindala. Zelesenu ue o inzu ia Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jenu, o dixidilu katulenu-diu mu kididi kikôla." 
2Chronicles29:6 Kuma jitata jetu a tondala, ia a bhange muene kiaibha ku mesu ma Jihova, Nzambi ietu, kuma a mu xisa; mesu mâ a ma katula ku dilombe dia Jihova, ia a mu bhana dikunda." 
2Chronicles29:7 O mabhitu ma kitelembe ue a ma jika; o tundeia a tu jimi; ka mu kʼoha dingi uasu ua dizumba, mba kubhana jisata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova, mu kididi kikôla kia Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles29:8 Kí kia bhekesa njinda ia dikota ia Jihova ku thandu dia Juda ni Jeluzaleme, iu ua a bhakula ku kikènene, ni ku dibuikilu, ni ku a xikila jisupiia, kala enuʼenu ki mua lu di muena-kiu ni mesu menu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Mukonda, talenu kuma jitata jetu ja buila ku xibhata, kiene kia bhangesa kuila ni anʼetu a mala, ni anʼetu a ahetu, ni ahetuʼetu, a kexile ku ubhika." 
2Chronicles29:10 Kindala-phe mu muẋima mua mu ngi bhita kuila tu ta kikutu ni Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele; phala o kutêma kua njinda iê ku tu somboke ni kuie kuengi." 
2Chronicles29:11 Kiki-phe, enu mu anʼami, ki mu kale ni kaxixi mba usudi; mbata Jihova ua mi sola, nda mu kale bhu pholo iê mu ku mu xibhidila, ni mu kale mu akunjiʼê, muie ni kuoha o uasu ua dizumba." 
2Chronicles29:12 Bheneʼobho jilevita a balumuka: Mahate, monʼa Amasai, ni Jouele, monʼa Azadiia, ku anʼa Kohate; o ku anʼa Meladi, Kiji, monʼa Abidi, ni Azadiia, monʼa Jehalelele; o ku akua Ngelexone, Nzoua, monʼa Zima, ni Edene, monʼa Nzoua;" 
2Chronicles29:13 o mu kaẋi ka anʼa Elisafu a katula-mu Sidi, ni Jeiele; o mu kaẋi ka anʼa Azafo, a katula-mu Zakadiia ni Mataniia." 
2Chronicles29:14 O mu kaẋi ka anʼa Hemane, Jehiiele ni Simei; o muʼaxaxi ka anʼa Jeditunu, Semaia ni Uziiele." 
2Chronicles29:15 Anga a bhongolola o jiphange jâ, hé a di lumbila kua Jihova, anga eza kala kioso kia tumu sobha, ku maka ma Jihova, phala a zelese o inzu ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:16 O jinganga anga a bokona mʼonzo ia Jihova, phala kuzelesa-mu, ni kutubhula ku kanga, mu lumbu lua inzo ia Jihova, o dixidilu dioso dia sange mu Tembulu ia Jihova; o jilevita anga a di tambula, nʼai mu ku di texe ku kanga, mu honga, mu ngiji ia Kidolone." 
2Chronicles29:17 Mu kizuua kia dianga ku mbeji ia dianga kiene kiandeka o kuzelesa; o mu kizuua kia kanake ku mbeji, eza mu kitelembe kia Jihova, inzo ia Jihova anga a i zelesela mu nake dia izuua; o mu ku bhixila mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ni kisamanu, ku mbeji ia dianga iene, a zubha kiua." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bheneʼobho a bokona mʼonzo kua sobha Ezekiia, a muʼambela, exi: Inzu ioso ia Jihova tua i zelesa kiá, kumoxi ue ni kalatódio ka jisata jakubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova ni itutu iê ioso, ni meza ma jimbolo ja ku tela, ni itutu iê ioso." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ni itutu ioso ue, ia texile sobha Akaji bhu kanga, mu kutondala kuê, kioso kiala muene mu kutumina, tua i ludika kiá, etu tua i lumbila; tala, iii kiá ku pholo ia kalatódio ka Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:20 Kienhokio sobha Ezekiia anga u balumuka mu kimenemene anga u bhongolola adiakime oso mu mbonge, há u banda kʼonzo ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:21 Anga eza ni sambuadi dia tuana tua jingombe, ni sambuadi dia ilumbe ia jimbudi ni sambuadi dia tumbudi tua ndumbe, ni sambuadi dia isutu ia jihombo mbebhu o sata ia kilumbu kia ituxi, ni ku utuminu, ni ku kididi kikôla, ni kua Juda kuene, anga u tangela anʼa Alá, o jinganga, kuila a ji bhakuile ku thandu dia kalatódio ka Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:22 Ene anga a jibha o jingombe; o manhinga mê a ma tambula kuala o jinganga a ma sangela ku thandu dia kalatódio; o ilumbe ia jimbudi a i jibha ue, anga manhinga mê a ma sangela ku thandu; tumbudi ue a tu jibha kiomuène, o mahaxi mê hé a ma sangela ku thandu dia kalatódio." 
2Chronicles29:23 Anga eza ni isutu ia jihombo, ia sata ia kilumbu kia kituxi, bhu pholo ia sobha ni mundu uoso, ene anga a i tula o maku mâ bhu thalʼa mítue." 
2Chronicles29:24 O jinganga hé a i jibha, o manhinga mê hé a bhanga na-mu o sata ia kilumbu kia ituxi ku thandu dia kalatódio phala o kuluulula Izalaiele ioso; mbata sobha ua tumine kuila a bhange ujitu ió ua kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova ni sata ia kilumbu kia ituxi, bhu kididi kia Izalaiele ioso." 
2Chronicles29:25 Anga u ta o jilevita mʼonzo ia Jihova ni jingoma ja ngondo, ni jikakoxi ni jimbanza kala kia tuma Davidi ni Ngade, ua kexe mu ku zambuila sobha ni polofeta Natane; mukonda kiene kia tumina Jihova, ku lukuaku lua jipolofeta jê." 
2Chronicles29:26 O jilevita-phe emana ni ima ia maxikile ma Davidi, o jinganga ja kuata jikoloneta." 
2Chronicles29:27 Anga Ezekiia u a ambela kubhana o sata ia kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova ku thandu dia kalatódio. O kiene ngó kia mateka o kusatela, a mateka ue ni muimbu ua Jihova, ni jikoloneta ni ima dingi ia kuxikila o mimbu, ia Davidi, sobha ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles29:28 Kifuẋi kioso anga a dibhala jipholo bhoxi kioso kiala mu kuimba o muimbu ni kuxika o jikoloneta; anga a bhanga kienʼiki katé kiabhu o kubhana o sata ia kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova. 
2Chronicles29:29 O kia zubha kubhana o sata ni sobha ni ene oso a kexile ni muene, a di bhale jipholo bhoxi, anga a bheza Nzambi." 
2Chronicles29:30 Bheneʼobho sobha Ezekiia, kumoxi ni makota, ambela o jilevita kuila Jihova a mu ximane ni izuelu ia Davidi ni Asafo, o muzambuidi. Anga a mu ximana muene ni kusanguluka kuoso, a bhetama, a mu bheza." 
2Chronicles29:31 Ezekiia anga u kumbulula, uexi: o kiki-phe mua di lumbila enuʼenu muène kua Jihova; bhiẋilenu-phe, muize ni jisata ni maujitatu ma kisakidilu, kuma diximanu ku inzu ia Jihova. O kifuẋi anga ki bheka jisata ni maujitu ma kisakidilu kia diximanu; o ene oso a kexile na-kiu ku muẋima, a bheka jisata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:32 Okieza mu kualula o jisata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova, jeza na-ju o kifuẋi, ja tena makuinhi sambuadi a ngombe; hama ia ilumbe ia jimbudi; hama jiiadi ja tumbudi tua ndumbe; iene iosuʼiii phala sata ia kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ku ima iòlumbile kua Jihova, kua kexile dingi hama jisamanu ja ngombe ni midi jitatu ja mbudi." 
2Chronicles29:34 O jinganga-phe a kexile òfele muene kiavulu; o ku katula ibha ku jisata joso, kia a bhonzele; kí kia bhingile o kua a kuatekesa kuala o jiphange jâ, o jilevita, katé kiabhu o kikalakalu, kifua katé kioso kia di zelesa dingi o jinganga ja mukuá; mukonda o jilevita a betele o kuiuka muẋima mu ku di zelesa o jinganga, ndenge." 
2Chronicles29:35 O jisata ja kubhakula ni túbhia kua Jihova anga ji kala nzungule ni ndumba dia maji ma jisata ja uembu, ni jisata ja makúnua mbé o jisata ja dizumba dia mbote. Kienhiki kia vutula dingi o ukunji ua inzo ia Jihova bhu kididi kiê." 
2Chronicles29:36 Ánga Ezekiia ni kifuẋi kioso a sanguluka mukonda o Nzambi muene-muène ua bhangesa o kifuxi kiê o ku di iudika kiambote, mbata o kikalakalu kiki a ki bhange lusolo." 
2Chronicles30:1 Kia bhiti iosuʼiii, Ezekiia ua tumikisa jiphunga mua Izalaiele ioso ni mua Juda, iu ua soneka ue mikanda kua Ifalaimi ni Manasa, kuila eze kʼonzo ia Jihova mu Jeluzaleme phala kuimununa o Phasu ia Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele." 
2Chronicles30:2 Mbata sobha ua tele kaiula ni makota mê moso kumoxi ni kionge kioso mu Jeluzaleme, phala o kuimununa o Phasu bhu mbeji ia Kaiadi." 
2Chronicles30:3 Mukonda mu thembuʼomo ka tenene ku imunuina kiá kumoxi ni ima ia mukuá, kuma ki kua kexidiʼê luua jinganga ja vulu a di zelesa, o mundu ue ki ua di bhongoluele hanji mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles30:4 O ienhiʼiii, ku mesu ma sobha, anga u i mona kuila ia iuka, ni ku mesu ma kifuxi kioso." 
2Chronicles30:5 Anga a ki bhela ngonge kuila a ki boke muene mu Izalaiele ioso tundé bhu Beleseba katé ku Dane, kuila eze mu Jeluzaleme mu kuimununa o Phasu ia Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele; mukonda a vulu muene ka imunuine kala kioso kia i soneka" 
2Chronicles30:6 O mikanda ia lukuaku lua sobha ni lua ilamba iê, hé a i ambata kuala o jingambateʼa-mikanda mua Izalaiele ioso ni mua Juda, kala kia tumu sobha, kuila: Enu mu anʼa Izalaiele, Vutukilenu kua Jihova, Nzambi ia Mbalahamu, ia Izake ni ia Izalaiele, phala o muene ue a talele o pholo kua ió oso momuenu a bhulaka, ia a subhuka ku lukuaku lua jisobha ja Asídia." 
2Chronicles30:7 Ki mu kale kala o jitata jenu, mba muʼila kala o jiphange jenu a tondalela Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ, o mukonda dia kienhiki, muene iu ua a tula mu kibuika, kala ki mua mu ki monʼiki;" 
2Chronicles30:8 o kiki-phe kana ku tundisa kakunda kenu, kala o jitata jenu; tolokenu kua Jihova, muize bhu kididi kiê kikôla, kia kolesa muene katé ku hádia, nda mu bhikile Jihova, Nzambi ienu, phala o kutêma kua njinda iê ki ku mi tule enu." 
2Chronicles30:9 Mukonda kioso enu ki mu lungulukila kua Jihova, o jiphange jenu ni anʼenu a mala a-ndu bonga kiadi ku mesu ma ió oso a ambata ene ku ubhika, anga a kà vutuka dingi mu ixi iii; mbata Jihova, Nzambi ienu, mukua kiadi ni henda, o pholo iê kà tena ku mi suekela-iu, se enu mu bilukila kua muene." 
2Chronicles30:10 O ió ambata o mikanda, anga aia muene ni kubhita sanzala ni sanzala mu ixi ia Ifalaimi ni Manasa kandú ku Nzebulone; maji-phe a olèla anga a a bhanga kasekelu." 
2Chronicles30:11 Sumbala kiene, maji amoxi-mu, ku akua Asele, ni ku akua Manasa, ni akua Nzebulone, a toloka, ia eza mu Jeluzaleme." 
2Chronicles30:12 Lukuaku lua Ngana Nzambi phe lua kexile mua Juda, lu lua a bhana muẋima umoxi ngó, mu ku bhanga ioso ia tumu sobha ni makota mê, kala kioso kia tange o kizuelu kia Jihova." 
2Chronicles30:13 Mu Jeluzaleme anga mu di bhongoluela ndumba dia athu, phala kuimununa o kizokola kia jimbolo ja ususu, bhu mbeji ia kaiadi; kionge kia dikota muene." 
2Chronicles30:14 Há a fundumuka, anga a katula jikalatódio joso ja kexile mu Jeluzaleme; a katula ue dingi o itutu ioso ia uasu ua dizumba anga a i takuila mu ngiji ia Kidolone." 
2Chronicles30:15 Kieneʼokio anga a satela o Phasu mu kizuua kia kuinhi ni kiuana ku mbeji ia kaiadi; o jinganga ni jilevita anga jiosonhi ja a kuata, eza ni jisata ja kuoha ku inzo ia Jihova." 
2Chronicles30:16 Anga a di ta bhu kididi kiâ, kala kiene o kífua kiâ, ni kiene mu kitumu kia Mozé, muthu uangene ua Nzambi; o jinganga anga a kuata ku sangela o manhinga, aia ni ku ma tambula bhu maku ma jilevita." 
2Chronicles30:17 Mukonda kua kexile athu a vulu mu kionge a kambele o ku di zelesa kiene kia bhekelele kuila o Jilevita ene a kexile mu ku jibha o tumbudi tua Phasu phala ió oso a kambele o ku di zelesa, phala a di zelese kua Jihova." 
2Chronicles30:18 Mbata kifulu kia dikota kia athu, ndumba muene akua Ifalaíme, ni Manasa, ni Isakale, ni Nzebulone, sumbala ka di zelesele, maji o Phasu a i di muene, oko ki kiene kia ki soneka; Ezekiia-phe anga u a sambela ene, uixi;" 
2Chronicles30:19 Eie u Jihova uene o mbote, bhanga diluuluilu ni uoso ua iudika o muẋima uê mu kusota Jihova Nzambi, o Nzambi ia jitata jê, né-mbe ka di zelesa luua o udizeleselu uendi o kididi kié kikôla." 
2Chronicles30:20 Jihova anga uívua o kusamba kua Ezekiia, hé uilula o muenhu ua kifuẋi." 
2Chronicles30:21 Anʼa Izalaiele a kexile mu Jeluzaleme, anga emununa o kizokola kia jimbolo ja ususu mu sambuadi dia kizuua ni kusanguluka kua dikota; o jilevita ni jinganga aia ni kuximana Jihova kizuua ni kizuua, ni ima ia kuxikila o mimbu ni dízui dia suína kua Jihova." 
2Chronicles30:22 Ni kulenduka kuoso, Ezekiia anga u zuelesa jilevita joso a kexile ni kilunji mu kuijiia kiambote Jihova. O maujitu ma fesa anga a ma dia mu sambuadi dia kizuua, ni kubhakula maujitu ma uembu, ni kuximana Jihova, Nzambi ia jitata jâ." 
2Chronicles30:23 O kia di longesa o kionge kioso mudiâ kubhanga dingi sambuadi dia mukuá dia izuua, emununa dingi muene, ni kusanguluka kuoso, sambuadi dia mukuá dia izuua." 
2Chronicles30:24 Mukonda Ezekiia, sobha ia Juda, kionge ua ki bhakuila midi ia tungombe tua ndumbe, ni sambuadi dia midi ia jimbudi; o makota ma jinganga ue kionge a ki bhakuila midi ia tungombe tua ndumbe, ni kuinhi dia midi ia jimbudi; o jinganga ue ndumba a di lumbila."
