Ezra10:25 Mua Izalaiele, ku anʼa Phaluji: Lamiia, ni Jeziia, ni Makiia, ni Miiamini, ni Eliiezele ni Makiia, ni Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Ku anʼa Elame: Mataniia, Zakadiia, Jiiele, Abidi ni Jelemote, ni Ilija." 
Ezra10:27 Ku anʼa Zatu: Eliehoeni, Eliiasene, Mataniia, Jelemote, Zabadi ni Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Ku anʼa Bebai: Nzuanane, Hananiia, Zabai ni Atalai." 
Ezra10:29 Ku anʼa Bani: Mezulane, Maluke, Adaia, Jasube, Seiale ni Jelemote." 
Ezra10:30 Ku anʼa Pahate-Mouabhe: Adina, Kelale, Benaia, Mahaséia, Mataniia, Bezaliiele, ni Binui ni Manasa." 
Ezra10:31 Ku anʼa Hadimi: Eliiezele, Joziia, Makiia, Semaia ni Ximinhá," 
Ezra10:32 ni Bejamí, ni Maluke, ni Semadiia." 
Ezra10:33 Ku anʼa Hasune: Mathanai, Mathatha, Zabadi, Elifelete, Jelemai, Manasa, Ximei." 
Ezra10:34 Ku anʼa Bani: Mahadai, Halane ni Uele," 
Ezra10:35 ni Benaia, ni Bediia, ni Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniia, Melemote, Eiiiasibe." 
Ezra10:37 Mataniia, Matenai, Jahasai," 
Ezra10:38 Bani, Binui, Ximei," 
Ezra10:39 Selamiia, Natane, Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadibai, Sasa, Salai," 
Ezra10:41 Azadiiele, Selamiia, Semadiia." 
Ezra10:42 Salume, Amadiia ni Zuze." 
Ezra10:43 Ku anʼa Nebu: Jiiele, Matitiia, Zabadi, Zebina, Jadai, Jouele, ni Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Ene osoʼâ a sakanene ahetu a jixi jengi; amoxi-mu a vuala-nʼâ, muene, ana." 
Nehemiah1:1 Maka ma Nehemiia, monʼa Hakaliia. Anga ki bhita bhu mbeji ia kijileu, ku muvu ua makuinhiʼa iadi, eme kioso ki ngala mu mbonge ia Suzane," 
Nehemiah1:2 kuma phangʼiami umoxi, Hanani uiza, ni muene ni akuá a tundunâ mu Juda; anga eme nga ebhula o jijudé ja subhukile, a xalele kuiza ku ubhika, ni kikexilu kia Jeluzaleme." 
Nehemiah1:3 Anga ene a ngi tangela, exi; A xala koko, ku sengu, a kambele kuiza ku ubhika, ala mu hadi iavulu ni dilebhu; o kimbaka kia Jeluzaleme a ki bulu, o mabhitu mê a mʼoha mu túbhia." 
Nehemiah1:4 Anga ki bhita kuma, eme mu kuívua o maka iá, nga xikama hanji anga ngi dila, anga ngi bhita izuua muene ni dilamba; anga ngi kuata kujila ni kusamba bhu pholo ia Nzambi ia diulu." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ngixi; Ngana tata, u Nzambi ia diulu, Nzambi ia dikota, u kuatesa uoma! Uene mu bhaka o kikutu ni kulendukila ió oso a kuzola anga a bhaka o ijila ié;" 
Nehemiah1:6 jikula-phe, Ngana, o mátui mé, ni mesu mé ma jikuke, mu kuívua o musambu ua mubhikʼé, u nga mu samba lelu bhu pholo ié, mʼusuku ni mu muanha, mu diondela abhikê, o anʼa Izalaiele; ni ku diẋikina kutukulula kokué o ituxi ia anʼa Izalaiele, i tua ku tela eie; mukonda eme uami ni dibhata dia tatʼetu ituxi tua i te." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tua ku bhangela ima ia bolo muene kinéne, ni ijila ié ki tua i kuata; ni itumu ié, ni jiphangu ja mabatuilu mé, ji ua tumine kua ngunza ié Mozé, ki tu ji aiuka." 
Nehemiah1:8 Xinganeka-phe o kizuelu ki ua tumine kua ngunza ié Mozé, uixi; Enu se mua kà xibhaka, eme ue nga kà mi muangena mu madiembu." 
Nehemiah1:9 Maji se enu mua kà diela anga mua kà biluka ko kuami, anga mu bhaka o ijila iami, ni ku i bhanga, eme bhenhobho, né hanji jihutile jenu ja kà kala kua suku o diulu, kueneʼoko nga kà a bhongolola anga ngiza-nâ bhu kididi ki nga solo phala kubhanga-bhu nangu dia dijina diami." 
Nehemiah1:10 Athu iá-phe ene hanji abhikʼé, ni kifuxi kié ki ua kula mu kutena kué ni lukuaku lué lua nguzu." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ngana, tata, mátui mé-phe, ma jikukile o musambu ua mubhikʼé, kumoxi ni musambu ua abhikʼé ala kuinda kuxila o dijina dié; mubhikʼé, lelu, anga u mu zediuisa, nʼu mu bhana o kiadi bhu pholo ia muthu iú. Bhenhobho-phe eme ngala ngi mukuati a nganza ia sobha." 
Nehemiah2:1 Anga ki bhita kuila, ku mbeji ia nisane, ku muvu ua makuinhiʼa iadi, ua sobha Artaxexe, kuma eme ngi bheka vinhu bhu pholo iê, eme anga ngi katula vinhu, anga ngʼi bhana sobha; hanji-phe kienhokio eme kiluua ngi kala ni ku di suuata bhu pholo iê." 
Nehemiah2:2 Anga sobha u ngʼambela, uixi: Pholo ié ia di suuatelaʼhi kiki, eie-muène kua mu kata? Kiki ki kima kiengi, dilamba dia muẋima dia ku kuata. Bhenhobho eme anga ngi kala ni uoma uavulu." 
Nehemiah2:3 Anga ngʼambela sobha ngixi: Sobha lola muenhu ué ni ku hádia ni hádia! Abha eme ki ngi di suuata kiebhi o pholo, se o sanzala iala o kidindu kia jimbila ja jitata jami ia senguluka, ni mabhitu mê a mʼoha mu túbhia?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Anga sobha u ngʼambela, uixi: Kiki phe kima kiahi ki u ngi bhinga; eme bhenhobho ngi sambela Nzambi ia diulu," 
Nehemiah2:5 anga ngi tangela sobha, ngixi: Sobha se kiene kia ku uabhela, se o kiandala mubhikʼé ki uabha bhu pholo ié, nga ku bhingi kuila u ngi tumikisa ku Juda, mu sanzala ia jimbila ja jitata jami, nga ka i tunge dingi luamukuá." 
Nehemiah2:6 Bhenhobho sobha u ngʼambela, ni Na Mvuale hanji kia xikama bhu mbandu iê, uixi: Njila ié i nanga izuua ikuẋi, kumbi kuii di u vutuka? Anga sobha ki mu uabhela ku ngi tumikisa, kioso ki nga mu tangela o kithangana kia kuvutuka." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ngi tangela dingi sobha, ngixi: Sobha, se kia ku uabhela, a ngi bhane mikanda ia jinguvulu ku sámbua dia ngiji, sembele a ngʼehele kuzáuka, katé ki ngi bhixila mu Juda." 
Nehemiah2:8 A ngi bhane ne mukanda ua Asafe, o kimbadi ua mu langa o míkáu ia sobha, phala a ngi bhane miẋi ia kuiudika na-iu o mabhitu ma dizemba dia sobha, ni kimbaka kia sanzala, ni ma inzo mu nga kà bokona. Sobha anga u ngi bhana-iu, kala kia ngi xindi o lukuaku lua mbote lua Nzambi lua ngi tudile ku thandu." 
Nehemiah2:9 Bhenhobho ngʼeza ku jinguvulu ja sámbua dia ngiji ia Ufalate, anga ngʼa bhana mikanda ia sobha; sobha muene ua tumukisine ue atumini a kifuxi ni makuenze ku jikabalu ejiie kumoxi ni eme phala ku ngi xinjikila." 
Nehemiah2:10 Sambalate, mukua Holone ni Tobiia, mukua mbele ku Amone, ki a ibhila muene kiavulu kuívua kuila kueza muthu mu kusota mbote ia anʼa Izalaiele." 
Nehemiah2:11 Eme anga ngi bhixila mu Jeluzaleme, hé ngi bhanga-mu izuua itatu ni kunhoha." 
Nehemiah2:12 Anga ngi balumuka mʼusuku, eme ni athu ofele nga kexi-nâ, kana muthu nga mu tetuila kia ngi bhake Nzambi iami ku muẋima ku ki bhanga mu Jeluzaleme; ki nga kexile ue ni kiama kioso-kioso, kiama kikale o kiama ngó, ku nga sambelele, kuabhu!" 
Nehemiah2:13 Anga ngi tubhuka mʼusuku bhu Muelu ua Dikôlo, ku mbandu kualela o Fixi ia Mudikixi, ni ku Muelu ua Dixita, anga ngi tala imbaka ioso ia Jeluzaleme, ngi mona ia budijika, ni mabhitu mê, ma jikata, a mʼoha mu túbhia." 
Nehemiah2:14 Anga ngi bhita o Muelu ua Fixi, ni bhu Mumba ua sobha; anga ngi lémbua o kididi bhu bhitila o kabalu ku nga xikama." 
Nehemiah2:15 Bhenhobho ngi banda ni kuvuua kangiji mʼusuku, ni kutala o kimbaka; anga ngʼaluluka, ngi bokuena dingi bhu Muelu ua dikôlo, anga ngi tunda-ku." 
Nehemiah2:16 Anga makota ma jingana a kamba kuijiia kuoso nga ile ni kioso ki ngendele mu bhanga-ku; mbata katé kithangʼokio akua Juda, ni jingana, ni makota, ni akua dingi a kexi mu bhanga o kikalakalu, ki ngʼa tangelele luua kima kioso-kioso." 
Nehemiah2:17 Bhenhobho-phe anga ngʼa tangela kiua, ngixi: Enu mua mono kiambote o uíndua mu tuala, kuma Jeluzaleme ua budijika, ni mabhitu mê ma jikata kuma a mʼoha mu túbhia; ndokuenu-phe tu tunge dingi imbaka ia Jeluzaleme, ki tu xikame kiki mu dilebhu." 
Nehemiah2:18 Hé nga a jimbuila kiua kia ngi kuatekesele o lukuaku lua henda ia Nzambi iami, nga a tudila ue o maka moso ma sobha, ma ngi tangelele. Kuala ene: Ndokuenu, tu balumuke, phala tu tunge! Anga abhua uoma, hé a kolokotesa maku mâ mu kubhanga kiambote o kikalakalu." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kia kivu Sambalate, mukua Holone, ni Tobiia, mukua mbele ku Amone, ni Ngeseme, mukua Alábia, a tu mona ulalu anga a tu bhanga kasekelelu, exi: Enu mua mu bhanga kima kiahi? Muandala mu kitukila sobha, kuambe?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Bhenhobho nga a kumbulula, ngixi: Nzambi ia diulu muene ua-nda ku tu kuatekesa; etu tu abhikʼê tu balumuka ngoho ni tu tungu; maji enu-phe mu Jeluzaleme kana-mu mbandu ienu, mba undundu, mba kima kiengi kia xa o Makulu." 
Nehemiah3:1 Anga nganga ia dikota, Eiiiasibe u balumuka, ni muene ni phange jê, o jinganga, anga a tunga o Muelu ua Jimbudi, a u lumbila, anga a u ta o mabhitu mê; a lumbila katé ni mbonge ia Meiah, ni mbonge ia kathondo, Hananele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Anga akua Jedikó a tunga bhu mbandu ia Eiiiasibe ni akuá; o Zakule, monʼa Imidi, u tunga ue bhu mbandu ia ió." 
Nehemiah3:3 Anʼa Senaha anga a tunga uâ o Muelu ua Mbiji, a uimika miẋi, anga a u ta mabhitu mê ni makumba mê ni milangaji iê." 
Nehemiah3:4 Anga Melemote, monʼa Udiia, dia monʼa Kóji, u iudika ue bhu mbandu iâ; anga bhu mbandu iê, Mesulame, monʼa Belekiia, dia monʼa Mesezabele u iudika-bhu ue; anga Zadoke, monʼa Bahana, uiza u iudika ue bhu mbandu iê." 
Nehemiah3:5 Anga akua Tekoua a iudika ue bhu mbandu ia akuá enhá; kuiza-ku-phe, ku makota a jingana ja akua Tekoua ku kikalakalu kia Ngana iâ kʼa tele-ku xingu jâ mu ku ki kuatekesa." 
Nehemiah3:6 Anga Joiada, monʼa Peseia, ni Mesulame, monʼa Besudiia, a iudika o Muelu Uokulu; a uimika miẋi, anga a u ta o mabhitu mê ni makumba mê ni milangaji iê." 
Nehemiah3:7 Anga bhu mbandu iâ eza mu iudika-bhu kuala Melatiia, mukua Ngibeione, ni Jadone, mukua Melone, athu ió akua Ngibeione ni Mispa, a tokalele ku utuminu ua nguvulu ia sámbua dia ngiji ia Ufalate." 
Nehemiah3:8 Bhu mbandu iâ ua iudika-bhu Uziiele, monʼa Halaia, umoxi, ku azunzi a ulu; anga Hananiia, monʼa musumbisi a milongo u iudika ue bhu mbandu iê; anga Jeluzaleme a mu tungulula katé bhu Lumbu lua Zanze." 
Nehemiah3:9 Anga Lefaia, monʼa Hule, dikota dia kaxaxi ka akua Jeluzaleme, u iudika ue bhu mbandu ia enhó." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ueza mu iudika bhu mbandu iê Jedaia, monʼa Halumafe, ku pholo ia inzo iê-muène; anga Hatu, monʼa Hasabeneia u iudika ue bhu mbandu iê." 
Nehemiah3:11 Ua iudika kibatu kiamukuá Malkiia, monʼa Hadime, ni Hasube, monʼa Pahate-Mouabhe, a iudika ue mbandu ia mukuá ia lumbu ni kathôndo ka Mbonge ia Majiku." 
Nehemiah3:12 Anga bhu mbandu iâ Salume, monʼa Loueje, dikota dia kaxaxi kamu kuá ka Jeluzaleme, ni muene ni anʼê a ahatu, ene a iudika-bhu." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ueza mu iudika o Muelu ua Dikôlo, Hanune ni akua Zanoua; athu iâ a tunga o muelu, anga a u ta o mabhitu ni makumba mê ni milangaji j iê, anga a tunga ue midi ia kóvado ku kimbaka, hé a suka katé Muelu ua Dixita." 
Nehemiah3:14 Anga Malkiia, monʼa Lekabe, dikota dia sengu ia Bete-Xeleme, iudika o Muelu ua Dixita; u u tunga, anga u u ta o mabhitu ni makumba mê ni milangaji iê." 
Nehemiah3:15 Anga Salume, monʼa a Kole-hose, dikota dia sengu ia Mispa, u iudika o Muelu ua Ngunga; u u tunga, anga u u ta o mabhitu ni makumba mê ni milangaji iê hé u iudika ue o kimbaka kia batela ia Sela, bhua zukama ni kadíbhia ka sobha, anga u bhixila muene ku maxita ma kulumuka mu kutunda mu sanzala ia Davidi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ua mu kaiela mu kutunga Nehemiia, monʼa Azebuke, dikota dia kaxaxi ka akua Bete-Zule, u bhixila katé ku pholo ia jimbila ja Davidi, uiza bhu Mumba uòkalakale kiambote ku maku, anga u suka ku inzo ia Mazonda." 
Nehemiah3:17 Muene kia zubha kutunga, akua Levi a mu kaiela enhá: Lehume, monʼa Baní; ua iudika bhu mbándu iê Hasabiia, dikota dia kaxaxi ka akua Keila, mu sengu iê." 
Nehemiah3:18 A mu kaiela mu kuiudika, o jiphange jê, a a tuamenena kuala Bavai, monʼa Henadade, dikota dia kaxaxi ka mukuá ka akua Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Bhu mbandu iê bhene bhua kalakala Ezele, monʼa Jesuua, dikota dia akua Mixpa, ua iudika kibatu kia mukuá, ku lumbu, bhua lulama ma kubanda bhu inzo ia kubhakela mata ma ita, bhu thungi iê." 
Nehemiah3:20 Mbaluke, monʼa Zabai, anga mu kaiela mu kuiudika ni huii ioso, bhabha dikaẋi diê diengi, kutunda bhu thungi katé ki uia bhu muelu ua inzo ia nganga ia dikota, Eiiiasibe." 
Nehemiah3:21 Melemote, monʼa Udiia, dia monʼa Koji, u mu kaiela kuiudika kibatu kiamukuá, kia tundu bhu muelu ua inzo ia Eiiiasibe, hé u suka kua suku o inzo ia Eiiiasibe." 
Nehemiah3:22 A mu kaiela muene mu kuiudika o jinganga ja tungile dinhana dia Njolodá. 
Nehemiah3:23 A kaiela-ku mu kuiudika Bejamí ni Hasube, ku pholo ia inzo iâ; u a kaiela Azadiia, monʼa Mahaséia, dia monʼa Ananiia, ua iudika ue bhu mbanduʼa inzo iê." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ua mu kaiela mu kuiudika o kibatu kiamukuá, Binui, monʼa Henadade ua tungu tunde ku inzo ia Azadiia katé bhu thungi bhua takanena o kimbaka." 
Nehemiah3:25 Phalale, monʼa Uzai, hé u iudika ku pholo ia thungi, ni mbonge ia matala ia fuomoka ku inzo ia thala ia jisobha, ia xamenena ku lumbu lua kaleia; ua mu kaiela mu kuiudika Pedaia, monʼa Phaloji." 
Nehemiah3:26 Ateki a menha-phe ni aẋangi a jihuinhi ja Tembulu, a kexile mu Ofèle, a kalakala uâ hé a sukila ku pholo ia Muelu ua Menha ni kutunga, ku mbandu ia mutundila-kumbi, anga a zumbukila mbonge ia matala ia di leka." 
Nehemiah3:27 Kua ene, a kaiela-ku mu kuiudika kibatu kiamukuá akua Tekoua, mu kutunda ku pholo ia mbonge ia matala ia di lekʼoio, anga a suka ku kimbaka kia Ofèle." 
Nehemiah3:28 O Jinganga hé a tunda bhu Muelu ua jikabalu ni kuiudika, muthu ni muthu ua tungu ku pholo ia inzo iê." 
Nehemiah3:29 Ua kaiela kua ene mu kuiudika Zadoke, monʼa Imele, ku pholo ia inzo iê; ua mu kaiela Semaia, monʼa Sekaniia, mukua kulanga bhu Muelu ua Thunda ua Tembulu, ua talela ku mutundila-kumbi." 
Nehemiah3:30 A mu kaiela mu kuiudika Hananiia, monʼa Selemiia, ni Hanune, mona ua kasamanu ua Zalafe, ene a iudika kibatu kiamukuá; kua muene Mesulame monʼa Belekiia, ua a kaiela ue mu kuiudika ku pholo bhua lulamena xilu dia ʼnzo iê." 
Nehemiah3:31 O Malkiia, monʼa muzunzi a ulu ni phalata, u mu kaiela mu kuiudika ku pholo ia ʼnzo anga u bhixila ku inzo ia ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi ni akua kutadika mauenji, bhu kanga dia Muelu ua Mifekade, anga u suka ku xilu bhu thungi." 
Nehemiah3:32 Anga akua kuzunza o ulu ni phalata ni akua kutadika mauenji, a iudika uâ o dikaẋi dia kutunga ku xilu bhu thungi katé bhu Muelu ua Jimbudi." 
Nehemiah4:1 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, kia kʼivu Sambalate, kuma etu o kutunga kua kuata muene, u fuluka ni njinda, anga u thathamana kiavulu muene; anga u kuata kuxinga akua Juda." 
Nehemiah4:2 Anga u zuela bhu pholo ia phange jê ni ia kilômbo kia masoladi a Samádia, uixi: Kima kiahi kia mu bhanga o asonde a akua Juda iâ? A-nda ku a ehela-ku muene? A-ndu tena muene kusatela? O kikalakalu a-ndu ki zubha mu kizuua kimoxi ngoho? O matadi mʼoha mu túbhia, a-nda balumuka dingi nʼeza ni muenhu ku maxita ma uthôkua?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Eme Tobiia, dia mukua Amone ua kexile-nê, uixi: Kiene kimoxi! Ene né edi a tunga se kuiza ngó mukenge, kimbaka kiá kia matadi ki kia-ndu mu bhonza ku ki lundumunʼê." 
Nehemiah4:4 Ivua-ze, eie u Nzambi ietu, ki a kuata ku tu tènda, o kulebhula kuâ kua tu lebhula na-ku, ku lundumukine mu mútue uâ, hé u bhangese ene ku di bhanga mbole, mu ixi mu a-nda ku a sumbisa ku ubhika." 
Nehemiah4:5 Kikuma kiâ ku ki vungine, o kituxi kiâ ku ki jimune bhu pholo ié, mbata ene a ku kuatesa njinda bhu pholo ia akua kutunga." 
Nehemiah4:6 Kienhiki tu kuata kutunga o kimbaka, anga ki takana kiene kioso katé kaxaxi kê; mukonda muẋima ua kifuxi ua bhetamena o kukalakala." 
Nehemiah4:7 Anga ki bhita-phe kuma, kia kʼivu Sambalate ni Tobiia, ni akua Alábia, ni akua Amone, ni akua Ajidode, kuila o imbaka ia Jeluzaleme ia suína ni ku i iudika, o misula a mateka ku i xita kiá, a thathamana kiavulu." 
Nehemiah4:8 Anga a takana kumoxi mudiʼâ ene oso, phala kuiza mu kúlua ni Jeluzaleme, ni ku a vunza phala ku a jimbisa ku kikanenu kiâ." 
Nehemiah4:9 Etu-phe tua sambela Nzambi ietu, anga tu bhaka athu mu ku a langidila, ni mʼusuku ni mu muanha." 
Nehemiah4:10 Bhenhobho akua Juda, exi: Jingamba ja iokojoka kiá, ni fufutila iene iavulu, etu kimbaka ki tua-ndu tena ku ki tunga." 
Nehemiah4:11 Kuala-phe o jinguma jetu, exi: Ene ka kʼijiia, ka-ndu tena ue ku ki mona, a tukumuka-phe tua bokona kiá muʼaxaxi kâ, anga tu a jibha enhoso, kienhiki kimbaka a lémbua ku ki tunga." 
Nehemiah4:12 Anga ki bhita-phe kuma, kioso kʼiza akua Juda a kexile muʼaxaxi kâ, a kala jinga mu ku tu tangela-kiu katé mu lukuinhi, exi: Andu tunda mu jisanzala joso jiji ni jiji, kuiza mu kúlua nʼetu." 
Nehemiah4:13 Eme-phe anga ngi ta alangidi a suama bhoxi ku dima dia kimbaka ni ku matala bhulu; anga o kifuxi nga a uana-uana mu mabhata-mabhata a maneka ni mikuale iâ, ni ngumba jâ, ni honji jâ." 
Nehemiah4:14 Eme-he ngixi suíin, o ki nga zubha kutonginina ioso, anga ngi balumuka, hé ngi tangela o jingana, ni afundixi, ni kifuxi kiamukuá; ngixi: Enu kana ku a kuata uoma; mu xinganeka ngó Ngana, muene Langala-ngongo, u kuata uoma, anga mu bhângela phange jenu, ni anʼenu, ni akajʼenu ni jinzo jenu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila, kia kijiia o jinguma jetu, kuma etu tua kijiia kiá, ni kuila ndunge jâ Nzambi ua ji muange, etu oso tu vutuka ku kimbaka, muthu bhu kibatu kiê." 
Nehemiah4:16 Anga ki bhita ue kuila, tunde kiá bhu kizuuʼokio katé ku pholo kunu, ngiia kaxaxi ka minzangala iami a kuata ku kikalakalu, kaxaxi kamukuá a kala ni jingumba bhu maku, ni jingubu, ni jihonji, ni ibhakatu; anga atumini a kala jinga ku dima dia dibhata dioso dia Juda." 
Nehemiah4:17 Mu kutanga akua kutunga kimbaka, ni jingamba ambata jinga o imbamba, ni akua ku i zangula, ela jinga kala muthu lukuaku lua kuata ku kikalakalu, o luamukuá lua kuata mata a kubhânga na-u." 
Nehemiah4:18 O jipedelelu akua kutunga eza jinga a maneka kala muthu ni mukuale uê mu mbunda, anga a kuata o kutunga kienhiki; o muxiki a mbungu u kala nʼeme bhu mbandu." 
Nehemiah4:19 Eme anga ngʼambela jingana, ni makota a jingana, ni kifuxi kiamukuá, ngixi: Enu akuetu, o kikalakalu kiki kionéne, o kiene ue kia lebhelela, o etu-phe tua di te makanga a makota ku kimbaka, tua di songoloka kiavulu mudietu." 
Nehemiah4:20 Bhu kididi bhuoso bhu muivuila mbungu ia xiki, bhene bhu tu di bhongoluela; o Nzambi ietu muene ua kà tu bhângela o mvunda." 
Nehemiah4:21 Kienhiki ki tua kuata o kukalakala ku kimbaka; kaxaxi ka athu mudietu a nanga jinga ni jingumba bhu maku tunde bhu kiela o kizuua, tulé mu ngoloxi, ki mateka kutunda o jithéthembua." 
Nehemiah4:22 Mu kithanganʼomo ue ngi tangela o kifuxi, ngixi: Muila jinga o muthu ni munzangala uê, mu kala jinga mu zekela mumu mu Jeluzaleme, sembele mʼusuku uoso mu tu langidila hanji, mu muanha mu kuata ku kikalakalu." 
Nehemiah4:23 Anga tuila nʼeme, ni jiphange jami, ni minzangala iami, ni mala a kexi ku ngi kaiela ni ku ngi langidila kana muthu u zula kizuatu kiê ku mukutu; o kuia mu teka menha muthu uambata mata mê." 
Nehemiah5:1 Kudikola-phe anga kuvula kua mala ni akajʼâ, mukonda dia jiphange jâ, akua Juda." 
Nehemiah5:2 Mbata kua kexi ni iá ela jinga, exi: Nʼetu ni anʼetu a mala, ni anʼetu a ahatu, tua vuluʼetu muene; kala kiki tuienu tu tambule tiliku, sembele tu die nda tu laie." 
Nehemiah5:3 Eme iá ue, exi: Tua ximbika o jixi jetu, ni mivide ietu, ni jinzo jetu, mu tiliku ia kúdila mu nzala mumu." 
Nehemiah5:4 Bhu kala ue ni iá amba jinga, exi: Etu ni kufuta ngó o lubhaku lua sobha, tua sobho kitadi kia ngene, bhu kididi kiê etu tua ximbika o jixi jetu ni mivide ietu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Suke-phe, atuenhoso tu akua xitu imoxi, kuma etu ni akua muiji ua Juda, tu jiphange; o anʼetu úe a sokuʼâ ngó ni anʼâ ene; talesa, o kiki anʼ etu a mala ni anʼetu a ahatu tu a bhakula mu ku kala abhika; tua suku mu kuila amoxi mu anʼetu a ahatu ejidila kiá ni ubhika, o kia ku akula na-kiu, bhu makuʼetu, tua ki lémbua; mukonda athu amukuá a tambula kiá o jixi jetu ni mivide ietu, iii iala kiá bhu maku ma athu engi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Eme-phe, mu kuívua o kudikola kuâ, ni ki a kuata kuzuela kiki, ngʼivua kia ngi kuama kiavulu!" 
Nehemiah5:7 Anga ngi kala mu banza imʼiii ku muẋima uami! Hé ngi bazela o jingana ni atumini, anga ngʼa tangela, ngixi: Mu kuvualesa o makongo enu, muala kubhûnda, muthu u bhûnda mukuá muthu u bhûnda mukuá, o ene phange jenu. Anga ngʼa bhongoluela kionge kia dikota kia athu." 
Nehemiah5:8 Anga ngʼa tangela, ngixi: Abha etu tua kula kiá o phange jetu, akua Juda, a a sumbisile ku matumbu, muthu ua bhana bhuoso bhua kuatela; o kiki enu phange jenu mu a sumbisa dingi lua kaiadi, mbé etu ni tua a kula dingi lua mukuá? Ene exi ni ene húdi, kia kuvutula a ki lémbua." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ngixi dingi: Ki mua mu bhanga kima kiambote! Kífua ki mua fuamene kuenda mu uoma ua Nzambi, mbé kuiengesa ku tu lebhula kuala jinguma jetu, o matumbu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Eme uami, uixi o jiphange jami ni minzangala iami, mu kubhana makongo a kuvualesa kitadi tua bhana kitadi ni tiliku. Maji tuehienu kiá o uenji iú." 
Nehemiah5:11 Nga mi diondo a vutuidienu kiá, lelu muene, o jixi jâ, ni mivide iâ, ni midivua ia, ni jinzo jâ; mu a vutuila ue ni milambongo ia kitadi kia kuvualesa ki mua tambula ku tiliku, ni kia vinho, ni kia maji, ki muala ku a bhinjika ku mi futa, mu ki vutula." 
Nehemiah5:12 Kuala ene-phe, exi: Tu a vutuilakiu muene! Ki tu soto dingi ku a tambula kima; ioso i ua zuela, iene i tu bhanga. Bhenhobho ngʼixana o jinganga, anga ngʼa lokesa ni kuila a-nda kubhanga muene kioso ki a zuela." 
Nehemiah5:13 Eme uami ngi kukumuna homba iami, ngixi: Kienhiki Nzambi kia kukumuna muthu uoso mʼonzo iê ni ku kikalakalu kiê u fula kutumaka kizuelu kiki, u mu kukumuna kienhiki anga u xala hatu! Kuala kionge kioso: AMÉM! Anga a ximana Ngana; kifuxi kioso ka zuela dingi kima, anga a bhanga kala kiambe o kizuelu kiki." 
Nehemiah5:14 Eme ue tunde kiá bhu kizuua sobha kia ngi xindi kukala nguvulu mu ixi ia Juda, ku muvu ua makuinhʼaiadi, katé ku muvu ua makuinhʼatatu nʼiiadi ua sobha Artaxexe, kuinhi dia mivu nʼiiadi iosuʼiii, né eme, né o phange jami, ki tua dile kúdia kua unguvulu." 
Nehemiah5:15 Nguvulu ja dianga-phe, ja ngi diangelele eme, a kexi mu tatesa kifuxi, ni ku a tambula kúdia ni vinhu, anga ku thandu diê, a ta-ku ku futa makuinhiʼauana a xikulu ia itadi ia phalata; o minzangala iâ hanji ue a kuata kubhikisa o kifuxi; maji eme-phe ki kiene ki nga bhange, mukonda dia kuxila Nzambi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Inda mu kukalakala o kimbaka nga iudika-ku uami; nʼeme ni minzangala iami ioso, kana ixi ioso-ioso, i tua sumbu; o minzangala iami iene ioso muene a kalakala ku lumbu." 
Nehemiah5:17 Akua Juda ue, hama ni makuinhʼatanu a muthu kumoxi ni atumini, ni oso a kexi mu kuiza ko kuetu, ku akua matumbu a tu kondoloka, a kala jinga mu xikama ku mezʼami mu kúdia." 
Nehemiah5:18 Anga kietu kia kúdia ku kizuua ni kizuua a kala mu kujibha ngombe imoxi ni mbudi jisamanu jòsole; a teleka ue ni jinjila jami eme kúdia; ni vinhu ianzungule ia idifua idifua ioso mu kuinhi ni kuinhi dia izuua; né kiki, ki nga bhinjika ni kubhinga kúdia kua unguvulu, mukonda ngixi athu iá o ubhika ua a vudila kiá kiavulu, a a bokuesa ue mu uadiama ua tundu kinéne." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ngi te-phe muẋima, eie u Nzambi iami, tata, u ngi bhange o mbote, ku ima ioso i nga bhange athu iá." 
Nehemiah6:1 Anga ki bhita-phe dingi kuila, kia kʼivu Sambalate, ni Tobiia, ni Jeseme, dia mukua Alábia, ni jinguma jetu jamukuá joso, kuma kimbaka kioso nga ki tungu, o kuene kana-ku dingi musula ua xalela-ku, sumbala katé kithanganʼokio, o mielu ki tua i tele luua mabhitu." 
Nehemiah6:2 Sambalate ni Jeseme a tuma ku ngi tangela, exi: Izá, tu takane kumoxi mu tusanzala, mu honga ia Ono phala tu di kunde hanji. Ene-phe a kanene ku ngi bhanga kiaiibha." 
Nehemiah6:3 Eme-phe anga ngʼa tumikisa jiphunga, ngixi: Nga mu bhanga kikalakalu kia dikota, ki ngi tena ku kulumuka; ngi xia kiebhi o kikalakalu kiemana, eme hé ngʼiami mu kutakana ni enu?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Luuana lua muvimba lua tuma jinga kiómuene ku ngʼixana; eme ue anga ngʼa vutuila luuana kiene kimoxi. 
Nehemiah6:5 Lua katanu Sambalate u ngi tumikisa kiá mubhikʼê ni mukanda ua jikuka ueza na-u bhu lukuaku luê. 
Nehemiah6:6 Mu mukanda muòsoneke, exi: Kia fumana muʼaxaxi ka athu a kʼivu, ni Jeseme ue ua ki zuela, kuma nʼeie ni akua Juda mua mu kana kubaluka, kiene ki mua mu tungila o kimbaka; exi ue dingi kuma eie uandala u di bhanga sobha iâ." 
Nehemiah6:7 Eie ua tumikisa ni jipolofeta, nda a ku boke eie mu Jeluzaleme, exi: Iú muene sobha ia Juda. Hundu iii-phe, sobha ua-nda ku ivua; kala kiki, eie-phe izá kindala tu di kunde kumoxi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Eme-phe ngi tuma o ku mu tangela, ngixi: Iene ioso i ua zuela, kana kima kia bhiti-bhu; inda eie-muène ua i funha ku muẋima ué." 
Nehemiah6:9 Mbata ene oso a kexi mu kusota ku tu kuatesa uoma, exi: Andu katulaku o maku mâ, anga kikalakalu a lémbua ku ki bhanga. Kiki-phe, eie u Nzambi, suinisa o maku mami." 
Nehemiah6:10 Kioso ki nga bokona monzo ia Semaia, monʼa Delaia, dia monʼa Mehetabele, muene u ngʼambela, uixi: Tuietu mʼonzo ia Nzambi, mu Tembulu, tua kà jike mabhitu ma Tembulu; mukonda lelu a-nda kuiza ku ku jibha; nga tange kidi, a-nda kuiza muene ku ku jibha mʼusuku uenhú." 
Nehemiah6:11 Eme-phe, ngixi: Ki bhita kiebhi? Diiala kalʼeme, u lenga? Nanhi muene uala-ku, kala eme, u bokona mu Tembulu nʼa laie? Kana! Momo ki ngi xikina kubokona-mu." 
Nehemiah6:12 Anga ngi tetuluka kuma ki Nzambi ua mu tumu; muzambu uê ua ku ngi bhanga phulu, mbata ni Tobiia ni Sambalate ene a mu futile." 
Nehemiah6:13 A mu bhana dikumba dia ku mu futila nʼa ngi kuatese uoma, ngiia ngi zubha ku ki bhanga, kia kubokona mu tembulu, ngala mu kituxi, ene nda a kala ni kia ku ngi fumanesa kiaiibha, kienhiki anga ene a mona kia ku ngi tatela na-kiu o milonga." 
Nehemiah6:14 Eie Nzambi iami, ni Tobiia ni Sambalate, a te muẋima ku ima iii i a bhange, ni Nouadia ue, o polofeta ia muhatu, ni jiplofeta nʼakuá oso a sotele ku ngi kuatesa uoma." 
Nehemiah6:15 Kimbaka anga kibhua o ku ki tunga mu makuinhi atanu a izuua ni izuua iiadi ku mbeji ia elulu, kuila o mbeji ia kuata makuinhi aiadi a kizuua nʼitanu." 
Nehemiah6:16 Anga ki bhita kuma, o jinguma jetu joso, ki a kʼivu, uoma u a kuata, matumbu oso muene a tu kondolokele mu jimbandu, anga a bhuila ku mixima iâ-ene muene; mbata a tetuluka kuma Nzambi ietu muene ua bhange o kikalakalu kiki." 
Nehemiah6:17 Mu izuuʼomo-phe ue, jingana jimoxi-mu ja Juda, a soneka jinga mikanda iavulu, i a kexi mu tumikisa kua Tobiia; ni mikanda ue iavulu ia Tobiia ia kexi mu kuiza kó kuâ-ene." 
Nehemiah6:18 Mukonda akua Juda avulu muene a lokelele ku di bhaka-nê kumoxi, nda dia kukala holomʼia Sekaniia, monʼa Aiahe; anga monʼê ua diiala Johanane u sakana ue ni monʼa Mezulame monʼa Belekiia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Mbote jê ja kexi mu kubhanga eza jinga ue ku ngi tangela-ju, anga aia a mu tudila ue o ima i nga kexi mu kuzuela; uila kiki, Tobiia hé u suína ni kusoneka o mikanda ié ia ku ngi kuatesa o uoma." 
Nehemiah7:1 Anga ki bhita dingi kuila, kioso kimbaka kia zubha o ku ki tunga, eme ue nga zubha kiá kuta-ku o mabhitu; anga a sola alangidi a mielu ni jingimba akua kuimba ni akua Levi;" 
Nehemiah7:2 eme anga ngi xinda, phangʼiami Hanane, ni Hananiia, dikota dia mbonge, ngixi a kale ku pholo mu Jeluzaleme, mukonda dia muene kukala diiala dia uthu ni ujitu, mukua uoma ua Nzambi, akuá avulu dingi ndenge." 
Nehemiah7:3 Anga nga a tangela, ngixi: Mabhitu ma Jeluzaleme kʼa ma jikule jinge katé muanha ua tu; o mu ngoloxi kioso ki mu imana-bhu mu kulangidila, mu jika mabhitu, anga mu ta-ku mithathu; anga mu bhaka-ku alangidi a tungu mumu mu Jeluzaleme, kala muthu bhu kithangana kiê kia ku langidila, ulangidila ku pholo ia inzo iê kuene." 
Nehemiah7:4 O sanzala ia, tambula ixi mu kukula, kuma ia kexi ia dikota kinéne, athu-phe kʼa kidi a kexile-mu; ni jinzo kiluua a zubha ue ku ji tunga dingi jene joso." 
Nehemiah7:5 Bhenhobho Nzambi iami ngivua ua ngi te ku muẋima kuila ngi bhongolola jingana, ni makota a jingana, ni kifuxi kia mundu uoso, nda a a soneke mu jingu jâ ja Vumu. Anga mu divulu dia jingu ja vumu, ja oso a diangele kuiza, ngi sanga muʼòsoneke, kiki:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Iá ene anʼakua sengu, endele mu kikuka, ia a tombokele mʼubhika, a a kukile kuala Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilónia; anga a vutukila mu Jeluzaleme ni mu Juda, hé aia kala muthu ni muthu mu sanzala iê." 
Nehemiah7:7 Ejiie kumoxi ni Zolobabele, ni Jesuua, Nehemiia, Azadiia, Lahamiia, Nahamane, Moledekai Bilisane, Mispelete, Bikivai, Nahumu ni Bahana; kiki kiene kia tenene o dialuilu dia kifuxi kia anʼa Izalaiele:" 
Nehemiah7:7 Ejiie kumoxi ni Zolobabele, ni Jesuua, Nehemiia, Azadiia, Lahamiia, Nahamane, Moledekai Bilisane, Mispelete, Bikivai, Nahumu ni Bahana; kiki kiene kia tenene o dialuilu dia kifuxi kia anʼa Izalaiele:" 
Nehemiah7:8 a nʼa Paluxi, a tenene, midi jiiadi j ni hama ni makuinhiʼsambuadi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:9 Anʼa Sefatiia, hama jitatu ni makuiʼsambuadi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:10 Anʼa Ala, hama jisamanu ni makuiʼatatu ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:11 Anʼa Pahate-Muuabhe, ene anʼa Jesuua ni Jouabhe, midi jiiadi ni hama nake ni dikuinhi ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:12 Anʼa Elame, midi ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼatanu ni kiuana." 
Nehemiah7:13 Anʼa Zatu, hama-nake ni makuinhiʼauana ni kitanu." 
Nehemiah7:14 Anʼa Zakai, hamaʼsambuadi ni makuinhʼasamanu." 
Nehemiah7:15 Anʼa Binui, hama jisamanu ni makuinhi auana ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:16 Anʼa Bebai, hama jisamanu ni makuinhi aiadi ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:17 Anʼa Azengade, midi jiiadi ni hama jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:18 Anʼa Adonikane, hama jisamanu ni makuinhʼasamanu ni sambuadi." 
Nehemiah7:19 Anʼa Bikivai, midi jiiadi ni makuinhi asamanu ni sambuadi." 
Nehemiah7:20 Anʼa Adina, hama jisamanu ni makuinhʼatanu ni kitanu." 
Nehemiah7:21 Anʼa Atele, akua diembu dia Ezekiia, makuinhʼivua ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:22 Anʼa Hasume, hama jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:23 Anʼa Besai, hama jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi ni kiuana." 
Nehemiah7:24 Anʼa Hadife, hama ni kuinhi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:25 Anʼa Ngibeione, makuinhiʼvua ni kitanu." 
Nehemiah7:26 Mala a akua Beleme ni akua Netofa, hama ni makuinhiʼnake ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:27 Mala a akua Anatote, hama ni makuinhi aiadi ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:28 Mala a akua Bete-Azamavete, makuinhiʼauana ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:29 Mala akua Kidiate-Jeadime, Sefila, ni Behelote, hamaʼsambuadi ni makuinhʼauana ni kitatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Mala a akua Lama ni Ngaba, hama jisamanu ni makuinhi aiadi nʼumoxi." 
Nehemiah7:31 Mala a akua Mikema, hama ni makuinhi aiadi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:32 Mala a akua Betele ni Hai, hama ni makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Mala a akua Nebo iamukuá, makuinhʼatanu ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:34 Anʼa Elame iamukuá, midi ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼatanu ni kiuana." 
Nehemiah7:35 Anʼa Hadime, hama jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi." 
Nehemiah7:36 Anʼa Jedikó, hama jitatu ni makuinhʼauana ni kitanu." 
Nehemiah7:37 Anʼa Lode, ni Hadide ni Ono, hamaʼsambuadi ni makuinhi aiadi nʼumoxi." 
Nehemiah7:38 Anʼa Sena midi jitatu ni hamʼavua ni makuinhʼatatu. 
Nehemiah7:39 O Jinganga; Anʼa Jedaia, mʼonzo ia Josuué, hamʼavua ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kitatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Anʼa Imele, midi ni makuinhi atanu ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:41 Anʼa Paxule, midi ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼauana ni sambuadi." 
Nehemiah7:42 Anʼa Hadime, midi ni kuinhi ni sambuadi." 
Nehemiah7:43 Akua Levi: Anʼa Jesuua, dia Kadimiiele, ku anʼa Hodeva, makuinhi sambuadi ni kiuana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Jingimba: Anʼa Azafe, hama ni makuinhʼauana ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:45 Alangidi bhu mielu: Anʼa Salume, anʼa Atele, anʼa Talmone, anʼa Hakube, anʼa Hatita, anʼa Sobai, hama ni makuinhʼatatu ni nake." 
Nehemiah7:46 O akalakadi mu tembulu: Anʼa Ziia, anʼa Hasufa, anʼa Tabaiote," 
Nehemiah7:47 anʼa Kelo, anʼa Siia, anʼa Pedone," 
Nehemiah7:48 anʼa Lebana, anʼa Hangaba, ana Salamai," 
Nehemiah7:49 anʼa Hanana, anʼa Jidele, anʼa Ngahale," 
Nehemiah7:50 anʼa Lebaia, anʼa Lesine, anʼa Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 anʼa Kazame, anʼa Uza, anʼa Paseia," 
Nehemiah7:52 anʼa Besai, anʼa Meunime, anʼa Nefusime," 
Nehemiah7:53 anʼa Bakebuke, anʼa Hakufa, anʼa Halule," 
Nehemiah7:54 anʼa Baselite, anʼa Mehida, anʼa Halasa," 
Nehemiah7:55 anʼa Balko, anʼa Xixela, anʼa Tamaha," 
Nehemiah7:56 anʼa Nesiake, anʼa Hatifa," 
Nehemiah7:57 anʼa akua mbèle ia Solomá: anʼa Sotai, anʼa Sofelete, anʼa Pelida," 
Nehemiah7:58 anʼa Jaele, anʼa Ndalakone, anʼa Jidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 anʼa Sefatiia, anʼa Hatile, anʼa Pokelete-Zembaime, anʼa Amone." 
Nehemiah7:60 Ateki a menha oso ni aẋangi a jihuinhi ni anʼakua mbèle ia Solomá, a tena hama jitatu ni makuinhiʼvua ni kiiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:61 Athu iá ue a bandele mu kutunda mu Tele-Mele ni Tele-Halasa, Kelube, Adone, ni Imele, a lémbua-phe kutanga o ndonda ia kuvuadiua kuâ phala kuidikiza o mabhata a jitata jâ ni dianda diâ, mba ene uâ a tokala mu akua Izalaiele." 
Nehemiah7:62 Anʼa Delaia, anʼa Tobiia, anʼa Nekoda, hama jisamanu ni makuinhi auana ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ku jinganga: Anʼa Habaia, anʼa Khoji, anʼa Barzilai, ua sakenene muhatu mu anʼa Barzilai, dia mukua Ngiliiade, anga a muʼixanena kiá mu dijina dia muhatuʼê." 
Nehemiah7:64 Mala iá a sota mu divulu diâ dia majina, mu kumesena kutanga bhua tunda o kixina kia muiji uâ, maji a tokoka-phe ku a sanga-mu; kia bhekela ku a katula mu unganga, kuma a ambe exi a xidi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Anga o nguvulu u a kidika uixi kʼadie ku ima iòlumbe, a kinge muene katé ki kumoneka o nganga utena kuibhula kua Jihova Nzambi ni Udime ni Tumime." 
Nehemiah7:66 Kionge kiki kioso kumoxi, kia tena makuinhʼauana a midi ni midi jiiadi ni hama jitatu ni makuinhʼasamanu," 
Nehemiah7:67 kutange dingi abhikʼâ a mala ni a ahatau, a tenene sambuadi dia midi ni hama jitatu ni makuinhʼatatu ni sambuadi, ió ki ene; anga a kala ni hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼauana ni kitanu kia jingimba ja mala ni jʼa ahatu." 
Nehemiah7:68 O kabalu jâ, hama sambuadi ni makuinhʼatatu ni jisamanu; o jimulo jâ hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼauana ni jitanu." 
Nehemiah7:69 Kamelo jâ, hama jiuana ni makuinhʼatatu ni jitanu; o jibulu jâ, midi jisamanu ni hama sambuadi ni makuinhi aiadi." 
Nehemiah7:70 Anga mbandu ia ituamenu iâ ku jitata, a bhana ima iii ku kikalakalu. Nguvulu u bhana phala mu dizaku, midi ia jidalama, ja ulu, makuinhʼatanu a malonga, ni hama jitanu ni makuinhʼatatu a izuatu ia jinganga." 
Nehemiah7:71 Anga amoxi-mu dingi, ku ituamenu ia jitata, a bhana mu dizaku phala o kikalakalu, makuinhi aiadi a midi ia jidalama, ja ulu, ni midi jiiadi ni hama jiiadi ja jimina ja phalata." 
Nehemiah7:72 Anga o kifuxi kia subhuka a bhana uâ, makuińhi aiadi a midi ia jidalama, ja ulu; ni midi jiiadi ja jimina ja phalata, ni makuinhi asamanu a izuatu ia jinganga." 
Nehemiah7:73 Anga o jinganga, ni akua Levi, ni alangidi a mielu, ni jingimba ni amoximu ku kifuxi, ni ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi, ni Izalaiele ioso, hé a tunga mu sanzala jâ." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kia bhixila o mbeji ia kasambuadi, kuila anʼa Izalaiele a kala kiá mu sanzala jâ, kifuxi kioso hé ki bhongolokela bhu muhenda, kala muthu umoxi ngó, bhua lulama ni Muelu ua Menha; anga ambela Ejidala, dia musoneki, exi: A bheke o divulu dia kitumu kia Mozé, Ngana kia tumine Izalaiele." 
Nehemiah8:2 Anga Ejidala, dia nganga, u bheka o Divulu dia kitumu bhu pholo ia kionge, kia mala ni kia ahatu, ni kia oso a tetulukila kuívua, mu kizuua kia dianga kia mbeji ia kasambuadi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Muene anga u tangamu, ku pholo ia muhenda, ualela bhua lulama ni Muelu ua Menha, tunde mu kimene kia tundu o dikumbi, katé mu kaẋi ka kizuua ku mediia, bhu pholo ia mala ni ahatu, ni athu a tetuluka; anga o mátui ma kifuxi kioso ma jikukila kuívua o divulu dia kitumu." 
Nehemiah8:4 Anga o Ejidala, dia musoneki, uimana ku thandu dia kitala kia miẋi, kia tungile-bhu; anga a mu imanena bhu mbandu iê, ku lukualu luê lua kúdia, kuala Matitiia, ni Sema, ni Anaia, ni Udiia, ni Hilikiia, ni Mahaseia; ku lukuaku luê lua kiasu, Pedaia, ni Mizaiele, ni Melekiia, ni Hasume, ni Haxibadana, Zakadiia, ni Mezulame." 
Nehemiah8:5 Anga Ejidala u jikula o divulu bhu mesu ma kifuxi kioso, mbata muene ua kexi bhulu dia kifuxi kioso mukonda muene ua nzangamana-ku dingi; muene kuila u jikula o divulu, kifuxi kioso emana." 
Nehemiah8:6 Anga Ejidala u ximana Ngana, o Nzambi ia munéne; anga kifuxi kioso etaia ni kuleka o maku mâ bhulu, exi: Amém! Amém! Anga a bhetama, hé a bheza Ngana, ni jipholo bhoxi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Ni Jesuua, ni Bani, ni Selebiia, ni Jamine, Akube, Sabetai, Hodiia, Mahaseia, Kelita, Azadiia, Jozabade, Hanane. Pelaia, ni akua Levi, a kuata kulonga o kifuxi kia mundu kuijiia o kitumu; anga kifuxi kioso emana muene, kana muthu u tunda-bhu." 
Nehemiah8:8 Anga a tanga mu divulu dia kitumu kia Nzambi, ni mbimbi ia lomboloka kiambote; a tanga-mu, hé a lombolola o njimbu iê, a ki bhangela kuila, mbé ki a tanga, ki lomboloke." 
Nehemiah8:9 Anga Nehemiia (kuma muene ua kexile nguvulu) ni nganga Ejidala, dia musoneki, ni akua Leví, a kexi mu longa o kifuxi ni ku a lombolouela o maka, hé a tangela o kifuxi kioso, exi: Kiki kizuua kiòlumbile Ngana dia Nzambi ienu, ki mu luuale mba mu dila. Mukonda kifuxi kioso, mu kuívua maka ma kitumu, a kexe mu kudila." 
Nehemiah8:10 Nehemiia u a tangela dingi, uixi: Ndenu, mua kà die ima ia nete, ni kúnua ima ia touala, anga akuenu a kambe kuiudika kima mua kà a tumikise ue kia kúdia: mbata kizuua kiki kia dikota kiolumbile kua Ngana ietu; uila kiki, ki mu disuuate, mukonda o kusanguluka kua Ngana, iene o nguzu ienu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Anga akua Leví ue, a di xibhisa o kifuxi kioso, exi: Dixibhienu; mbata kiki kizuua kikôla; ki kia ku di suuata, kana." 
Nehemiah8:12 Bhenhobho o kifuxi kioso hé aia mu kúdia, ni kúnua, ni ku di tumikisa mákudia, ni kubhanga jifesa jonène; mukonda maka ma a longesa mʼa tetulukila kiambote." 
Nehemiah8:13 Anga ki kuáki, kizuua kia kaiadi, o makota a jitata ja kifuxi kioso, ni jinganga, ni akua Leví, a bhongolokela musoneki, Ejidala, a ki bhangela mbé kudilonga o maka ma kitumu." 
Nehemiah8:14 Anga a sanga mu kitumu muòsoneke kuma, Ngana ua tumine, mu ukunji ua Mozé, kuila anʼa Izalaiele, mu izuua iangene ia fesa, ku mbeji ia kasambuadi, a kala mu jifundu." 
Nehemiah8:15 Hé a ki tanga kuene kuoso, anga a bhitisa ngonge ni kutumikisa njimbu mu jisanzala jâ joso, ni mu Jeluzaleme, exi: Ndenu ku mulundu, mu takane-ku jithangu ja midiva, ni jithangu ja midiva ia muxitu, ni isasa ia miẋi iengi, ni isálale ia maie, ni jithangu ja miẋi ia vundu, nda mu tunge jifundu, kala kia ki soneka." 
Nehemiah8:16 Kifuxi kioso-phe, hé a tunda, anga a bheka o jithangu joso, anga a tunga jifundu jâ, amoxi ku thandu dia jinzo jâ, ni ku dima dia jinzo jâ, ni mu malumbu ma inzo ia Nzambi, ni bhu kitanda kia muelu ua Menha, ni bhu kitanda kia Muelu ua Efalaime." 
Nehemiah8:17 Anga kibuka kioso kia athu oso a vutuka kʼubhika a tunga jifundu, anga a kala muenhomo, mukonda anʼa Izalaiele ka ki bhangele dingi, tunde mu izuua ia Josuué, monʼa Nune, katé mu kizuuʼokio; anga kukala kusanguluka kuavulu, kuavulu muene!" 
Nehemiah8:18 Anga Ejidala muene u kuata kutanga mu divulu dia kitumu kia Nzambi, kizuua ni kizuua, tunde mu kizuua kia dianga katé kia sukidilaku; anga a bhitisa fesa iangene mu sambuadi dia izuua, kizuua kia kanake, anga a bhitisa fesa ia kuzumbuka, kala kia ki lekelela." 
Nehemiah9:1 Anga anʼa Izalaiele a di bhongolola mu kizuua kia makuinhi aiadi nʼiuana ni kujila ni makuba ma zuata, ni mavu ma di takela mu mítue." 
Nehemiah9:2 Anga muiji ua anʼa Izalaiele u di sandula mu matumbu oso a kexe muʼaxaxi kâ, hé a dʼimanena, anga mu kudifisala a kuata kuditanga o ituxi iâ, ni ikuma ia jitata jâ." 
Nehemiah9:3 Anga kizuua a ki uana mu mbandu jiuana. Ene ki a balumuka bhu kididi bhuemana, a tanga mu divulu dia kitumu kia Ngana Nzambi iâ mu mbandu ia kauana ia kizuua, mbandu ia kauana iamukuá anga a di fisala ni kutukulula o ituxi iâ, ni kubheza Ngana dia Nzambi iâ." 
Nehemiah9:4 Anga Jesuua, Baní, Kadimiiele, Sebaniia, Buni, Selebiia, Baní ni Kenani, anga emena ku kitalamu bhu kididi kia akua Levi bhua tulama, anga a kala kudikola ni dízui dia suína kua Ngana dia Nzambi iâ." 
Nehemiah9:5 Kuala akua Levi: Jesuua, ni Kadimiiele, Baní, Hasabeneia, Selebiia, Hodiia, Sebaniia, Petakiia; exi: Fundumukenu, tanesenu Ngana dia Nzambi ienu katé ku hádia ni hádia; ndokuenu mu tanese o dijina dia fuma iê, dia tundu o dibesá dioso ni diximanu." 
Nehemiah9:6 Eie Ngana, eie-muène ubheka ué, eie ua bhange o diulu, ni diulu dia madiulu, ni kifuxi kiê kioso; ni oxi ni ima ioso iala-mu; o misanza ia kalunga ni ima ioso iala-mu; eie Ngana anga ene oso u a bhana o muenhu, anga kifuxi kia diulu ki kala mu ku ku bheza." 
Nehemiah9:7 Eie-muène u Ngana, u Nzambi ua tunguile Mbalamu, anga u mu katula mu ixi ia Ule ku Kaladeia, anga u mu luka dijina Mbalahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Anga u mu mona ni muẋima ua iuka bhu pholo ié, hé u ta-nê kikutu, kuila ua-nda ku mu bhana o ixi ia akua Kanana, ia akua Hiti, ia akua Amolé, ia akua Peleze, ia akua Jebuzé, ia akua Jidingazé, nda u i bhana o mbutu iê; eie anga u tenesa ki ua zuela, kuambe eie Ngana ua iuka." 
Nehemiah9:9 Anga u mona dilamba dia jitata jetu mu Ijito, anga uívua o kudikola kuâ ku mbanduʼa Kalunga Ka Kusuka." 
Nehemiah9:10 Anga Falaó u mu idikiza ijimbuete ni madiuanu, ni akua mbèle iê oso, ni akua ixi iê oso; mukonda eie uejidile kuma ene a bhangele phulu iavulu ku jitata jetu; eie mu kubhanga kienhiki ua di bhekela dijina dinangenena, kala ki tua mu ki mona leluʼiki." 
Nehemiah9:11 Eie anga u bula o musanza ua kalunga bhu pholo iâ, ene hé a bhita mu kaẋi ka kalunga, bhoxi diòkukutu; a kexile mu kuiza ni ku a kaiela, anga u a bobesa mu dikungu dia zongo, mukua ni ditadi dia sonokena mu mafutʼa menha." 
Nehemiah9:12 Mu muanha anga u a songuela ni dituta dia kilembeketa, o mʼusuku u a endesa ni dituta dia túbhia, nda u a muikine mu njila mu a kexi mu kuendela." 
Nehemiah9:13 Anga u tuluka ku mulundu ua Sinai, hé u a zuelesa tunde ku diulu; anga u a bhana mabatuilu ma iuku, ni itumu ia kidi, ni matendelelu ni ijila iambote." 
Nehemiah9:14 Anga u a ejidisa o sabhalu ié ikôla; hé u a tumikisa o matendelelu, ni jingonge, ni ijila, ni kitumu mu ukunji ua mubhikʼé Mozé." 
Nehemiah9:15 Anga mu nzala iâ u a bhana kúdia mbolo ia diulu, o mu dinhota diâ u a katuila menha a fuáfua mu ditadi; Eie anga u a tangela kuila a bokone kiá mu tambula o ixi i nga lekela o lukuaku ni kuloka ngixi ngʼa bhana-iu muene." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ene-phe, o jitata jetu, kua eza ukumbu; anga a kolokotesa o xingu jâ, a fula o kuxikana, hé a dituna kubhana o mátui ku ijila ié." 
Nehemiah9:17 Anga a dituna muene ku kuívua, o madiuanu mé u ua a bhangela, ku a xinganeka kana; anga a kolokotesa o xingu iâ mu kuxikana, o mu huka kuâ anga a zangula mutumini hé a mu ta ku pholo iâ, mu kusota kuvutukila mu ubhika uâ mu Ijitu; Maji eie-phe, eie u Nzambi ia muloloki, ia kutululuka ni henda, ua kokoloka mu kutema, uene ni unéne mu kubhanga o mbote, ku a ehelela." 
Nehemiah9:18 Sumbala hanji ene a bhange o ngombe iâ ia kuzunza, exi: Iii iene o Nzambi ié, ia ku katula mu Ijito; anga a bhanga isunji ionéne mu kuiibha kuâ;" 
Nehemiah9:19 eie mu nzungule ia jihenda jé, ku a ehelela mu kikangalakata. Mu muanha dituta dia kilembeketa ki dia a kambele, né o dituta dia túbhia mʼusuku, phala kuia ni ku a muikina, ni ku a edikiza jinga o njila mu endela." 
Nehemiah9:20 Anga u a bhana o Nzumbi ié iambote, mbé i a longe; o maná ié, ku a katula-iu mu kanu diâ; anga u a bhana menha mu dinhota diâ." 
Nehemiah9:21 Hé u kuata ku a disa kienhiki mu makuinhʼauana a mivu mu kikangalakata; kana kima kia a kambele; o izuatu iâ ki ia kukile, o inama iâ ki ia jimbile ni kuenda." 
Nehemiah9:22 Eie ua a bhana ue o maungana ni madiembu, anga u a uanena o ixi mu ibuka-ibuka; ene anga a tambula o ixi ia Sihone, iene ixi ia sobha ia Hexebone, ni ixi ia Oge, sobha ia Basane." 
Nehemiah9:23 Anga u sokolola anʼâ mukuâ ni jithéthembua ja diulu, anga u a bhiẋidisa mu ixi i ua tangelele o jitata jâ ku i bokona, nda a i tambula ni a ivue." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kienhiki, anʼâ hé a bokona mu ixiʼoio, anga a i tambula i kala iâ; anga eie u tolola akua Kanana, a tungile-mu, hé u a bhana-nâ bhu maku, ni jisobha jê, ni akua ixi oso, ene nda a a bhange kioso kia a bhiti ku muẋima." 
Nehemiah9:25 Anga a tolola o jisanzala ja suína ni ixi ia nete ibhana idima kiambote, anga a bokona jinzo jezala ni jimbote joso, ni ixima iòkande kiá, ni mivide, ni midiva, ni miẋi ia ibundu ia kúdia, iandumba. Anga a dia, ekuta, a neta ni ene, hé a kala mu nanga mu jimbote, mukonda dia kulenduka kué kuavulu." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kua eza-phe kubhukumuka anga a ku balukila eie, a texi o kitumu kié ku dima diâ, anga a jibha o jipolofeta jé, a kexi mu fuila o ku a bazela, sembele ene a diele nʼa vutuke kokué. Kienhiki anga a kala mu bhanga isunji ia makota." 
Nehemiah9:27 Kia ku bhangesa eie Ngana kua a bhana bhu lukuaku lua jinguma jâ, anga a kala mu ku a tatesa; maji mu kithangana-phe kia kutata kuâ, ene ki a dikola ko kué, eie ua evua tunde mu diulu; anga mukonda dia kuvula o henda ié, u a bhana athu a a bhulula nʼa kala mu ku a kula bhu maku ma ió, o jinguma jâ a kexi mu ku a tatesa." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ela-phe, a nhoha-ku, a tonʼâ dingi o kubhanga kiaiibha bhu pholo ié; eie anga u a ehelela dingi bhu maku ma jinguma jâ, nda a a bhikise; ene-phe ki a diela, ni kudikola ko kué, eie u a evua tunde ku diulu, o mukonda dia henda ié, luavulu muene lu ua a kudila." 
Nehemiah9:29 Anga u kala mu ku a bazela, mbé ene a lungulukile ku kitumu kié; maji ene-phe a bhanga ima ia ukumbu uoso, anga a dituna kuívua o ijila ié, a bhukumukina-phe o jiphangu jé, ja bhingi muthu se u ji kuata, ji mu bhana muenhu; anga a thuthujula o isuxi iâ, a kolokotesa xingu jâ, ni kudituna kuívua." 
Nehemiah9:30 Eie-phe ua a vungina ni kilendu kié mu mivu iavulu, anga u kuata ku a bazela ni Nzumbi ié, mu ukunji ua jipolofeta jé; maji ene-phe nguaʼuâ ku ku bhana mátui; kia ku bhangesa ku a bhana bhu lukuaku lua ifuẋi ia akua jixi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Maji eie-phe mu kuvula o henda, ku a jimi mbutu mba u a ehelela; mbata eie u Nzambi ua uabhela kuloloka ni ku kuatela henda." 
Nehemiah9:32 O kiki-phe, eie u Nzambi ietu, eie u Nzambi Ionéne, Nzambi ia kutena, u kuatesa uoma, u bhaka o kikutu ni ufiiele uoso, hé ujiza ni kubhanga o mbote, kumone kutola o dilamba dioso lelu dia tu kuata etu, ni jisobha jetu, ni ilamba ietu, ni jinganga jetu, ni misesedi, ni jitata jetu, ni kifuxi kié kioso, tunde mu izuua ia jisobha ja Asídia, katé mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Nehemiah9:33 Maji, Eie-phe Ngana, mu ima ioso iala kuiza ku thandu dietu, ua lunguʼê; mukonda o kuiuka kué kuene kua ku bhangesa-kiu, etu o kubhuma kuetu kuoso kuene kua tu bhangesa o ima iii." 
Nehemiah9:34 O jisobha jetu, ni ilamba ietu, ni jinganga jetu, ni jitata jetu, kitumu kié ka ki bhakele, ka bhele mátui ku ijila ié ni ku maumbangi mé, kioso ki ua kuata jinga ku a bazela." 
Nehemiah9:35 Mbata ene mu ixi ia ungana uâ, sumbala ni jimbote janzungule ji ua a bhana, ni ixi iadixala íi ia nete i ua a tudila ku pholo, nguaʼuâ ku ku bheza, mba a ta dikunda ku ibhangelu iâ iaiibha." 
Nehemiah9:36 O kiki lelu ua tu mono, tuala tu abhika; katé ni mu ixi i ua bhele o jitata jetu, uixi a die-mu o ibundu iê, tuala-mu-phe tu abhika." 
Nehemiah9:37 O ibundu ia mu bhakula o ixi iii, iangene ia jisobha, ji ua tuika o ku tu bhikisa, mukonda dia ituxi ietu; ene ia a kuata kubhikisa o mikutu ietu, kala kiasolo mu mixima iâ; etu tuala mu kubhondalala kua dikota." 
Nehemiah9:38 O mukonda dia ima ioso iii, tua te kikutu kia kidi, kʼi tua soneka; ni ilamba ietu, ni jilevita jetu, ni jinganga jetu, ia a ki jika ni idimbu iâ." 
Nehemiah10:1 Oso a jikile o kikutu ni kidimbu enhá: Nehemiia, dia nguvulu, monʼa Hakaliia, ni Zedekiia," 
Nehemiah10:2 Selaia, Azadiia, Jelemiia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Paxule, Amadiia, Malkiia," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatu, Sebaniia, Maluke," 
Nehemiah10:5 Hadime, Melemote, Obadiia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniiele, Jinetone, Mbaluke," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulame, Abiia, Miamine," 
Nehemiah10:8 Mahasiia, Bilingai, Semaia; iá ene a kexile o jinganga." 
Nehemiah10:9 Akua Leví: Jessua, monʼa Azaniia, Binui, ku anʼa Henadade, Kadimiiele;" 
Nehemiah10:10 ni jiphange jê; Sebaniia, Hodiia, Kelita, Pelaia, Hanane," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Lehobe, Hasabiia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakule, Selebiia, Sebaniia,—" 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodiia, Baní, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 O atumini a kifuxi: Palehuji, Pahate-Mouabhe, Elame, Zatu, Baní" 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Ajingade, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniia, Bikivai, Adine," 
Nehemiah10:17 Atele, Hixikiia, Azule," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodiia, Hasume, Besai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Hadife, Anatote, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Mangepiia, Mezulame, Hezide," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mezezabiiele, Zadoke, Jaduua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiia, Hanane, Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hozeia, Hananiia, Hasube," 
Nehemiah10:24 Holohe, Pilha, Sobeke," 
Nehemiah10:25 Lehume, Hasabena, Mahaseia;" 
Nehemiah10:26 ni Ahiia, Hanane, Anane," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluke, Hadime, Bahana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ni kifuxi kia xala-ku, ni jinganga, ni akua Leví, ni alangidi a mielu, ni jingimba, ni ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi, ni oso kiá a di sanduile ku ifuẋi ia akua jixi mu kutumaka o kitumu kia Nzambi, ni akajʼâ, ni anʼâ a mala, ni anʼâ ahatu, ni jinjimu joso a kexe ni kuijiia iá a tongoloka a kexe ni kilunji," 
Nehemiah10:29 o a beta o uthu mudiʼâ, a di bande ue ku jiphange jâ ni kujiza kuoso, anga a diẋikina mu kubela ku mázui ni ku mulôko, kuila endela mu kitumu kia Nzambi, kia bhele mu ukunji ua Mozé, ngunza ia Nzambi; ni kuila a kuata anga a tumaka o ijila ioso ia Jihova Nzambi ietu, ni mabatuilu mê ni jingonge jê." 
Nehemiah10:30 Tua di bhela ue kizuelu, tuixi: Ki tu sakanesa anʼetu a ahatu ni malʼakua ixi ioio, né kusakanesa o anʼâ ahatu ni anʼetu a mala;" 
Nehemiah10:31 ni kuila, akua ixi ki a bheka uenji uoso-uoso mu kizuua kia sabhalu, mba mu izuua ia kizokola, ni jimbundu joso-joso ja kusumbisa, etu ki tu sumbu-nâ kima mu sabhalu, mba mu kizuua kiòkole; ni mavu, etu a kudima, mu muvu ua kasambuadi tua nhohesa, ki tu bhingi-mu ku tu futa dikongo dioso-dioso." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tua di xikina etu tua di xindi ue kala kijila, kuila muthu ni muthu u futa mbandu ia katatu ia xikulu ku muvu, phala o kikalakalu kia tokala ku ukunji ua inzo ia Jihova, Nzambi ietu;" 
Nehemiah10:33 mbé kusumba o jimbolo ja munôno, ni mubhaku ua musa kizuua ni kizuua, ni sata ia kuoha kizuua ni kizuua, ni sata ia jisabhalu, ni ia jimbeje ja thethama, ni ia izuua iangene, ni ima iòlumbile, ni ia jisata ja kiluuluilu kia ituxi, ni ja kuluulula Izalaiele ioso, ni kubhangesa kikalakalu kioso mʼonzo ia Nzambi ietu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Tua te ue jisorte muʼaxaxi ka jinganga, akua Leví, ni mu kifuẋi, phala kuijiia oso a bhana o jihuinhi ja kubheka mʼonzo ia Nzambi ietu, ku jinzo ja jitata jetu, mu ithangana i a xindi, ku muvu ni muvu, ia kuohela ku kalatódio ka Jihova, Nzambi ietu, kala ki a ki soneka mu kitumu." 
Nehemiah10:35 Ni kuila ue tu bheka mʼonzo ia Jihova o idima ia dianga ia mábhia metu ni ibundu ioso ia dianga ia miẋi ioso, ku muvu ni muvu;" 
Nehemiah10:36 ni jithungunu jetu ja mala, ni ja ibhaku ietu, tu bhanga kala ki a ki soneka mu kitumu; ni kuila o ʼthungunu jetu, ni ja ʼmbudi jetu, tu ji bheka mʼonzo ia Nzambi ietu, ku jinganga, ene mu bhanga o ukunji mʼonzo ia Nzambi ietu." 
Nehemiah10:37 Ni kuila ue o dikènde dietu dia kutomona, ni maujitu metu ma kubhuka, ni kibundu kia muxi uoso, ni vinhu ni maji, tuiza na-iu ku jinganga, mu maxilu ma inzo ia Nzambi ietu; ni kakuinhi ka mábhia metu ku akua Leví: ni kuila o mbandu ia kakuinhi ka idima itunda ku mábhia, tu i bhana kua akua Leví, kuma ene a a lekelela kutambula o kakuinhi ka tunda mu jisanzala jetu joso." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ni kuila ue, o nganga, monʼa Alá, u kala kumoxi ni akua Leví kioso akua Leví kia kala mu tambula o kakuinhi, ni kioso akua Leví kia bhana ue o kakuinhi ka kakuinhi ka tambula ue ene, hé a ka bheka mʼonzo ia Nzambi ietu, mu maxilu ma inzo ia kubhakela o jimbongo ja Nzambi." 
Nehemiah10:39 Mukonda anʼa Izalaiele ni anʼa Leví a tokala a bheka o maujitu ma kubhuka ma jimbundu ni ma vinhu ni ma maji, mu maxilu ió; mbata muene muala o itutu ia kididi kikôla, muene muala ue o jinganga ja kuata o ukunji, ni alangidi a mielu, ni jingimba; kífua mu kubhanga kienhiki, o inzo ia Nzambi ietu ki tu a-nda ku i ehelela." 
Nehemiah11:1 Anga ilamba ia kifuxi a kala mu Jeluzaleme, maji o kifuxi kioso kiamukuá-phe kia anʼa Izalaiele a ta j jisorte, ja kukatula mbandu imoxi ku dikuinhi, phala a kale mu mbânza ikôla ia Jeluzaleme, o dívua dia mbandu a kale mu jisanzala jamukuá." 
Nehemiah11:2 Anga kifuxi a kala mu sakidila athu oso a kexi mu ku di bhana mu vondadî iâ ni muẋima uâ uoso, exi tu kala mu Jeluza! leme, muene mu tu tunga." 
Nehemiah11:3 O atumini a tundile mu jisengu, kuiza mu ku kala mu Jeluzaleme, enhá: Maji mu jisanzala ja Juda-phe kala muthu ua kexile mu ixi iê ia tambuile, mu ʼsanzala jâ, kífua akua Izalaiele, ni jinganga, akua Leví, ni ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi, ni anʼakua mbèle ia Solomá:" 
Nehemiah11:4 Mu Jeluzaleme-phe mua tungile ni amoxi-mu anʼa Judá ni anʼa Bejamí. Mu anʼa Juda: Ataia, monʼa Uziia, monʼa Zakadiia, monʼa Amadiia, monʼa Sefatiia, monʼa Mahalaleele o mu anʼa Peleze:" 
Nehemiah11:5 Ni Mahaseia, monʼa Mbaluke, monʼa Kodiose, monʼa Hazaia, monʼa Adaia, monʼa Joiadibe, monʼa Zakadiia, monʼa Siloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Anʼa Peleze oso, a kexile mu Jeluzaleme, a tenene hama jiuana ni makuinhi asamanu ni nake dia malʼa mazonda." 
Nehemiah11:7 Anga anʼa Bejamí a kala: Salu, monʼa Mesulame, monʼa Jouede, monʼa Pedaia, monʼa Kolaia, monʼa Mahaseia, monʼa Itiiele, monʼa Jesaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Ki kua tundu ene, a mu kaiela a Ngabai ni Salai; enhoso hé atena hamʼavua ni makuinhʼaiiadi ni ʼnake." 
Nehemiah11:9 O Jouele, monʼa Zikidi, muene ua kexi mu bhita ni ku a tala enhoso; anga o Juda, monʼa Senuua, muene u kala kaiadi mu sanzala." 
Nehemiah11:10 Ku jinganga: Jedaia, monʼa Joiadibe, Jakina," 
Nehemiah11:11 Selaia, monʼa Hilikiia, monʼa Mesulame, monʼa Zadoke, monʼa Melaiote, monʼa Ahitube, o dikota mʼonzo ia Nzambi." 
Nehemiah11:12 Ni jiphange jê, a kexi mu kalakala ue mʼonzo ia Nzambi, enhoso anga atena, hama nake ni makuinhʼaiiadi ni kiiadi; ni Hadaia, monʼa Jeluhame, monʼa Pelaliia, monʼa Amisi, monʼa Zakadiia, monʼa Paxule, monʼa Malkiia," 
Nehemiah11:13 ni jiphange jê, o ituamenu ia mabhata a jitata, hama jiiadi ni makuinhʼauana ni kiiadi; ni Amasai, monʼa Azaliiele, monʼa Ahazai, monʼa Mesilemote, monʼa Imele," 
Nehemiah11:14 ni jiphange jê, malʼa mazonda, atena hama ni makuinhʼaiadi ni nake, anga Zabediiele, monʼa Jedolime, muene o thuami iâ u kala mu bhita ni ku a talela." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ku akua Leví; Semaia, monʼa Hasube monʼa Azedikame, monʼa Hasabiia monʼa Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 ni Sabetai, ni Jozabade, mu ikuna ituamena akua Leví, a kala mu tumina a kexi mu benda bhu kanga dia inzo ia Nzambi, ni kikalakalu kioso kia kanga." 
Nehemiah11:17 Ni Mathaniia, monʼa Mika, monʼa Zabidi, monʼa Asafe, o mutumini, ua kexi mu tuamenena o diximanu mu kithangana kia misambu; ni Bakebukiia, muene kaiadi mu jiphange jê; ku dima diâ kua kaiela Abida, monʼa Samuua, monʼa Ngalale, monʼa Jedutunu." 
Nehemiah11:18 Akua Levi oso mu sanzala ikôla ia Jeluzaleme, a tenene hama jiiadi ni makuinhi nake ni kiuana." 
Nehemiah11:19 Alangidi a mielu, Akune, Talamone, ni jiphange jâ, alangidi bhu mielu, akexe hama ni makuinhi sambuadi ni kiiadi." 
Nehemiah11:20 Akua Izalaiele a xalele-ku, ku jinganga ni akua Levi, a kexile mu jisanzala joso ja Juda, akexile kala muthu mu mikáu ia undundu uê." 
Nehemiah11:21 Anga o ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi a kala mu Ufele; anga Ziha ni Jispa a kala ku pholo mu tumina o ateki a menha ni aẋangi a jihuinhi. 
Nehemiah11:22 Anga Uzi, monʼa Bani, monʼa Hasabiia, monʼa Mathaniia, monʼa Mika, mu anʼa Asafo, o jingimba, u kala mu langidila akua Levi mu Jeluzaleme, a kexi mu kalakala mʼonzo ia Nzambi, kuma muene o thuami iâ, ua a kala ku pholo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Mukonda dia ene, sobha ua bhele mutendelu ua kuila, jingimba a a bhana kúdia kuâ, kizuua ni kizuua," 
Nehemiah11:24 Anga Petaia, monʼa Mesezabiiele, mu anʼa Zela, monʼa Juda, u kala ni sobha bhu mbandu iê, mu kusokelesa o milonga ni ima ioso i bhindamena o kifuxi." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ku mbandu ia tusanzala tuofele, ni mikáu iê, amoxi mu anʼa Juda a tungile mu Kidiate-álaba, ni mu jisengo jê; ni mu Dibone, ni mu jisengo jê; ni mu Jekabesiiele, ni mu jisengo jê;" 
Nehemiah11:26 ni mu Jesuua, ni mu Molada, ni mu Bete-Pelete," 
Nehemiah11:27 ni mu Hasale-suuale, ni mu Beleseba, ni mu ididi ia jisengo jê joso;" 
Nehemiah11:28 ni mu Sikalake, ni mu Mekona, ni mu ididi ioso ia jisengo jê;" 
Nehemiah11:29 ni mu Ene-Dimone, ni mu Zola, ni mu Jelumute;" 
Nehemiah11:30 ni mu Zanoua, ni mu Adulame, ni mu tumabhata tua jisengo jê; ni Lakiji, ni mu jixi jâ; ni mu Azaka, ni mu ididi ia jisengo jê. Anga a tula kibangu kiâ tunde bhu Beleseba hé a bhixila katé mu honga ia dikôlo dia Hinome." 
Nehemiah11:31 Anga o anʼa Bejamí, dia Jeba, a kala mu Mikimaxi, ni mu jisengo jê;" 
Nehemiah11:32 ni mu Anatote, ni mu Nobe, ni mu Ananiia," 
Nehemiah11:33 ni mu Hasole, ni mu Lama, ni mu Ngitaíme," 
Nehemiah11:34 ni mu Hadide, ni mu Nzeboíme, ni mu Nebalate," 
Nehemiah11:35 ni mu Lode, ni mu Ono, mu honga ia dikôlo dia akua ufunu." 
Nehemiah11:36 Anga akua Leví amoxi-mu atunga hé a kala mu makaẋi ma Juda ni ma Bejamí. 
Nehemiah12:1 Jiji jene o jinganga ni akua Leví a bandele ni Zolobabele, monʼa Salatiiele, ni Jesuua: Selaia, Jelemiia, Ejidala," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amadiia, Maluke, Hatu," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekaniia, Lehune, Melemote," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Jinetoi, Abiia," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miiamine, Mahadiia, Bileka," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia, ni Joiadibe, Jedaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoke, Hilikiia, ni Jedaia; mala iá ene a kexi mu tumina jinganga ni akuá, o jiphange jâ, mu izuua ia Jesuua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Akua Leví ue, akexile: Jesuua, Binui, Kadimiiele, Selebiia, Juda, Mataniia, enhá ene ni jiphange jâ a kexi mu tuamena o mimbu ia akua kuximana ni kuimba." 
Nehemiah12:9 Anga o Bakibúkia ni Uni, o jiphange jâ, hé a kala ku pholo iâ, mu kulangidila ni kuditambuijila mu kuimba." 
Nehemiah12:10 Anga Jesuua u vuala Joiakime, o Joiakime u vuala Eiiiasibe, Eiiiasibe u vuala Joiada," 
Nehemiah12:11 o Joiada u vuala Jonata, Jonata u vuala Jaduua." 
Nehemiah12:12 A kexe jinganga, mu izuua ia Jouakime o ituamenu mu mabhata ma jitata jâ, enhá: Mu bhata dia Selaia, Melaia, dia Jelemiia, Hananiia;" 
Nehemiah12:13 dia Ejidala, Mesulame, dia Amadiia, Nzuanane;" 
Nehemiah12:14 dia Meliku, Jonata; dia Sebaniia, Zuze;" 
Nehemiah12:15 dia Hadime, Adina; dia Melaiote, Hele-kai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 dia Ido, Zakadiia; dia Jinetone, Mesulame;" 
Nehemiah12:17 dia Abiia, Zikidi; dia Miiamine, ni dia Mouadiia, Pilitai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 dia Bileka, Samuua; dia Semaia, Jonata;" 
Nehemiah12:19 dia Joiadibe, Mathenai; dia Jedaia, Ezzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 dia Salaia, Kalai; dia Amoke, Ebele;" 
Nehemiah12:21 dia Milikiia, Hasabiia; dia Jedaia, Natanaiele." 
Nehemiah12:22 Ku kua Leví mu izuua ia Eiiiasibe, a a sonekene kuma ene atumini mu mabhata ma jitata jâ, enhá: Joiada, ni Nzuanane, ni Jaduua, há a kala uâ jinganga, katé mu utuminu ua Dario, dia mukua Pélesa." 
Nehemiah12:23 Anʼa Levi a a soneka jinga mu divulu dia malunda, katé mu izuua ia Nzuanane monʼa Eiiiasibe." 
Nehemiah12:24 A kexi-phe atumini mu akua Leví enhá: Hasabiia, Selabiia, ni Jesuua, monʼa Kadimiiele; anga o jiphange jâ a kala ku pholo iâ mu kuimba o diximanu ni kusakidila, kala kia tumine Davidi, o muthu ua Nzambi; anga a kala mu kudibhinganesa ni kuditambuijila mu kuimba." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mathaniia, ni Bakibúkia, Obadiia, Mesulame, Talamone, ni Akube, ene alangidi bhu mielu, a kexi mu langidila bhu mielu ia maxilu mu a kexi mu bhakela o jimbongo ja inzo ia Jihova." 
Nehemiah12:26 Mu izuua ia Joiakime, monʼa Jesuua, dia monʼa Jozadake, mala iá ene a kexile-ku; ene ue a kexile-ku mu izuua ia Nehemiia, dia nguvulu, ni mu izuua ia nganga Ejidala, dia musoneki." 
Nehemiah12:27 O mu kulumbila imbaka anga a sota akua Levi a kexile mu ididi ioso, nda eze-nâ mu kulumbila o imbaka ni kusanguluka, ni kuximana, ni kuimba, ni kuxika tungoma, ni tukoxi, ni jimbánza." 
Nehemiah12:28 Anga a bhongolola anʼa jingimba oso, kixi a kexile mu dinhana dia zukama ni jimbandu joso ja Jeluzaleme, kala ió atungile mu tusanzala tua Netofati;" 
Nehemiah12:29 A bhongolola ue akua bhata dia Jidingale, ni akua matutu ku mikáu ia Jibeia, ni akua Azemavete; mbata o jingimba a di tungidile ku jisengo jâ hé aditungidila mu jimbandu ja Jeluzaleme." 
Nehemiah12:30 O Jinganga ue, ni akua Leví, anga a di zelesa; anga a zelesa ue o kifuxi, ni mabhitu, ni kimbaka." 
Nehemiah12:31 Bhenhobho nga sambelesa o ilamba ia Juda ku thandu dia kimbaka, anga ngi bhanga ibuka iiadi ia makota ia jingimba, o ibuka iendela ku munôno, kimoxi ku lukuaku lua kúdia ku thandu dia kimbaka, ku mbandu ia muelu ua Dixita." 
Nehemiah12:32 Anga Hosaia muene ua kexi mu-ia ni ku a kaiela kuema diâ, ni kaxaxi ka ilamba ia Juda kumoxi," 
Nehemiah12:33 ni Azadiia, ni Ejidala, ni Mesulame," 
Nehemiah12:34 ni Juda, ni Bejamí, ni Semaia, ni Jelemiia;" 
Nehemiah12:35 o ku anʼa jinganga, ni jikoloneta jala na-ju: Zakadiia, monʼa Jonata, dia monʼa Semaia, monʼa Mathaniia, monʼa Mikaia, monʼa Zakule, monʼa Asafo," 
Nehemiah12:36 ni jiphange jâ, à Semaia, ni Azalaiele, Milalaia, Jilalai, Mahai, Netanaiele, ni Juda, ni Hanani, ni ima ia kuxikila o mimbu ia Davidi, o muthu ua Nzambi; anga o musoneki Ejidala u tuamenena ku pholo iâ." 
Nehemiah12:37 Muene kia tuamenena kienhiki, mu kubhiẋila bhu Muelu ua Ndunga, a banda ku maxikata ma sanzala ia Davidi mu kubanda ku mulundu, bhua kanduka o lumbu, mbé kutulukila ku inzo ia Davidi, katé bhu Muelu ua Menha, ku mbandu ia thunda." 
Nehemiah12:38 Anga o kibuka kia jingimba ja kaiadi kia di tela ku lukuaku lua kiasu, atuamenena ku pholo, nʼeme nga mu a kaiela ku dima diâ; anga kaxaxi ka kifuxi a kala mu kuendela ku thandu dia kimbaka, kutunda bhu Kathôndo ka Majiku katé ku Kimbaka kia Zanze;" 
Nehemiah12:39 anga a bhita bhu Muelu ua Ifalaiéme, a bhita bhu Muelu Uôkulu, a bhita bhu Muelu ua Mbiji ni bhu kathôndo ka Menha, hé a bhixila bhu Muelu ua Ibhaku; anga eza emana bhu Muelu ua Kaleia." 
Nehemiah12:40 Bhenhobho o ibuka iene kiiadi kiâ ia jingimba eza anga emana mʼonzo ia Nzambi; eme uami, ni kaxaxi ka makota a jitata tuimana." 
Nehemiah12:41 Ni jinganga Eliiakime, ni Mahaseia, ni Miniamine, ni Mikaia, ni Eliohuenai, ni Zakadiia, ni Hananiia, a mu-ia ni jikoloneta." 
Nehemiah12:42 Kumoxi ni Mahaseia ue, ni Semaia, ni Eleiazale, ni Uzi, ni Nzuanane, ni Malkiia, ni Elame, ni Ezele. O jingimba anga evisa o dízui diâ a kala mu kuimba, kumoxi ni Jezelahia, kituamenu kiâ." 
Nehemiah12:43 Mu kizuuʼokio anga a bhakula jisata ja makota, hé a kala ni kusanguluka; mukonda Nzambi ua a sangulukisile ni kusanguluka kua ndumba; katé ni ahatu ni anandenge a sanguluka, kia bhangesa kuila o kusanguluka kua Jeluzaleme a kuívua katé ni ku makanga." 
Nehemiah12:44 Mu kizuua kiene kimoxi anga a xinda ue athu a tumina mu maxilu a kutambuila o itadi, ni maujitu ma kubhuka, ni ibundu ia kutomona, ni mbandu ja kakuinhi, nda a i bongoluele mu maxilu muenhomo i tunda ku mikáu ku mábhia, ni jisanzala ku bhata, mbé o mákudia ma jinganga ni ma akua Levi, mu jimbambe jê, kala kia ma xindi kitumu; mukonda Juda ua sangulukile mu kumona dingi bhu ididi iê o jinganga ni akua Levi a kexi mu kalakalamu." 
Nehemiah12:45 Anga a kala mu bhanga o kikalakalu kia Nzambi iâ, ni kia ku di zelesa; kiene ue kimoxi ku jingimba ni alangidi bhu mielu, akala mu bhanga o kikalakalu kiâ kala kia tumine Davidi ni monê Salomá." 
Nehemiah12:46 Mukonda tunde kiá mu xahulu, mu izuua ia Davidi, ni ia Asafo, kua kexile jinge atumini a jingimba, ni mimbu ia kuximana, ni kusakidila Nzambi." 
Nehemiah12:47 Kia bhekela kuma Izalaiele ioso, kumatekena kiá mu izuua ia Zolobabele, ni mu izuua ia Nehemiia, a kala mu kubhana o kúdia kua jingimba ni kua alangidi bhu mielu kizuua ni kizuua o muthu bhu kithangana kiê; anga a kala mu lumbila o mákudia ma akua Leví, o akua Leví a lumbila o kudia kua anʼa Alá." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kizuuʼokio hé a tanga mu divulu dia Mozé, ku mátui ma kifuxi kia mundu uoso; anga a sanga kididi muòsoneke kuma akua Amone ni akua Mouabhe ka fuama kubokona dingi mu kionge kia Nzambi." 
Nehemiah13:2 Mbata ene ka tundile mu kauidila anʼa Izalaiele ni kúdia ni menha; inda a kasele Balamu kuiza mu ku a bhubhidila; sumbala o kubhubhidila kuê Nzambi ietu ua ku kituile madibesá. 
Nehemiah13:3 Kia bhiti-phe kuma, mu kuívua o kituimu kiki, a tungula athu oso a di fungile mua Izalaiele." 
Nehemiah13:4 Katungu kaka kuila kiluua ka bhita, nganga, Eiiiasibe, ua kexi mu tumina mu xilu dia inzo ia Nzambi ietu, ua tele undandu ni Tobiia;" 
Nehemiah13:5 anga a mu bhangela xilu dionéne, mʼukulu mu a kexi mu bhaka o mibhaku ia mákudia, ni uasu ua dizumba, ni itutu, ni díjimu dia mbandu ja kakuinhi ja jimbundu, ni ia vinhu, ni maji, ima ioso ioio ia tumine kubhana akua Leví, ni jingimba, ni alangidi bhu mielu, kumoxi ue ni ujitu ua kubhuka ua jinganga." 
Nehemiah13:6 Kia bhiti-phe ima ioso iii, eme mu Jeluzaleme ki ngʼala-mu; mukonda ku muvu ua makuinhʼatatu nʼiiadi ua Artaxerxe, sobha ia Babilonia, eme ngendele kua sobha muene mu di kunda-nê; o kia bhiti-phe tuizuua, sobha ua ngeha-ke, eme nga vutuka dingi mu Jeluzaleme." 
Nehemiah13:7 O ki ngeza mu Jeluzaleme, a ngi tangela o kuiibha kuoso kua bhangele Eiiiasibe mu kubhanga mbote kua Tobiia, kia mu bhangela inzo mu malumbu ma inzo ia Nzambi ietu." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ngívua kia ngi ibhila kiavulu, njinda anga i ngi kuata muene; kia ngi bhangesa kuila imbamba ioso ia kexile mʼonzo ia Tobiia nga i texi bhu kanga." 
Nehemiah13:9 Anga eme ngi tumina, hé a zelesa o maxilu moso; anga ngi bheka-mu dingi o itatu iangene ia inzo ia Nzambi, ni mibhaku ia mákudia, ni uasu ua dizumba." 
Nehemiah13:10 Nga tongolola ue kuma akua Levi ka kexi mu ku a bhana o dikanda dia mbandu iâ ia a tokala ku maujitu; akua Levi ni jingimba akua kuimba, a kexi mu bhanga o kikalakalu, a lengela kala muthu ku ixi iê." 
Nehemiah13:11 Bhenhobho nga zoko ni adikime, ngixi: O inzo ia Nzambi, mua iehelelaʼhi? Eme-phe, eme nga a bhongolola dingi, eme ngʼa vutuila dingi bhu kididi kiâ." 
Nehemiah13:12 Bhenhobho Juda ioso a bheka o díjimu dia mbandu ia kakuinhi ka jimbundu, ja mavu, ni ka vinhu, ni ka maji, mu itula ia mabhakelu ma tembulu." 
Nehemiah13:13 Anga ngi zangula nganga Selemiia, ni musoneki Zadoke, ni Pedaia, uatokala mu akua Leví, hé ngʼa a baka mu kutambula konda ia inganja ni kubhaka o itadi ni mákudia; o kua ene ngi ta-ku Hanane, monʼa Zakule, dia monʼa Mathaniia phala kukala kibese kiâ, mukonda a kexile athu a kidi, akua kitongola; anga a tuika uâ ene o ku uanena o jiphange jâ." 
Nehemiah13:14 Mukonda dia kiki eie u Nzambi iami, ku ngi jimbe; o mbote jami joso ji nga bhange ku inzo ia Nzambi iami, ni ku kikalakalu kiê, kana ku ji jimuna." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mu izuuʼomo-phe anga ngi mona athu mu Juda a mu kama vinhu kia sabhalu, ni kubheka ita ia idima ku makundʼa jibulu; a bheka ue vinhu, ni ji-uva ni ji fiku, ni imbamba ia idifua ioso, i a kexi mu kuiza na-iu mu Jeluzaleme mu kizuua kia sabhalu; anga nga a bazela ngixi kiki ki kizuua kia kusumbisa mákudia." 
Nehemiah13:16 Akua Tilo ue a kexile mu Jeluzaleme, a kala mu bheka jimbiji, ni mauenji moso ma vulu matelu, phala ku a sumbisa anʼa Juda, ni mu Jeluzaleme, mu kizuua kia sabhalu." 
Nehemiah13:17 Anga ngi zoka ni makotʼa jinganga mu Juda, nga a tangela, ngixi; Muala kubhangelaʼhi o ilulu iii, hé mu kuata kutumbulula o kizuua kia sabhalu?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Abha, manhi ki kiene ue kia bhangele kiá o jitata jenu, anga o Nzambi ietu u bheka uíndua uoso iú ku thandu dietu ni ku thandu dia sanzala iii? Enu anga mu bandekeza-ku dingi mu kualala kua njinda iê ia kuatela Izalaiele, mukonda dia kutumbulula o sabhalu?" 
Nehemiah13:19 Anga ki bhita-phe kuma, o mabhitu ma Jeluzaleme kia bhana kiá o kilembeketa, kuila o sabhalu kiluua i bhixila, ngi tuma o kujika mabhitu; anga ngi tumina kuila ka ma jikule katé sabhalu ia bhiti; anga ngi ta o minzangala iami imoxi-mu bhu mielu, mbé kuila kana kimbamba kioso-kioso ki bokona mu kizuua kia sabhalu." 
Nehemiah13:20 Bhenhobho-phe akua kuta uenji ni abadi a ima ioso-ioso a zekela kiá usuku ku kanga dia Jeluzaleme, lumoxi mba luuadi kiá muene." 
Nehemiah13:21 Nga a bazela-phe, eme ngʼa tangela, ngixi: Muala kubhitilaʼhi o usuku ku kanga dia kimbaka? Se mu ki bhanga dingi luamukuá, nga-ndu tuma ku mi kuika. Tunde kithanganʼokio ni ku pholo kunu, a batuka kuiza mu sabhalu." 
Nehemiah13:22 Akua Leví ue nga a tangela ngixi mu di zelesa, anga muiza, mu langidile bhu mielu, nda mu kôlese o sabhalu. (Mu kiki ue eie, u Nzambi, iami, ngi te muẋima; anga u ngi loloka kala kiavulu o henda ié.)" 
Nehemiah13:23 Anga ngi mona ue mu izuuʼomo, kuma akua Juda a sakanene ni ahatu a akua Asdode, ni akua Amone, ni akua Mouabhe." 
Nehemiah13:24 O anʼâ anga a kala mu zuela mbandu ia Asdode, mukonda ka tenene kuzuela dimi dia Juda, a zuela ngó o dimi dia kifuxi kiâ." 
Nehemiah13:25 Anga ngi zoka-nâ, hé ngʼa bhubhidila, ni ku a ta mázui, amoxi mudiʼâ ngʼa beta muene, ni ku a vuza o jindemba, anga ngʼa lokesa mu dijina dia Nzambi ngixi: Kana kubhana dingi anʼenu ahatu ku anʼâ a mala, ni enu ue ki mu sakane dingi o anʼâ ahatu, né ku abhenga phala anʼenu mba phala enu muene." 
Nehemiah13:26 Manhi o Solomá, o sobha ia Izalaiele, mu kusakana kuenhuku ki muene mua tele kituxi, suke muʼaxaxe ka ifuẋi ia athu avulu kana-mu sobha ia di fuile-nê, ni mu ku mu zola kuala Nzambi iê, ni mu ku mu bhanga kukala sobha ia Izalaiele ioso kuala Nzambi? Ku thandu diê-phe anga ahatu a akua matumbu a mu tesa kituxi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Etu anga tu mi bhana mátui mu ku mívua enu, phala kubhanga o kilulu kia kuiibha kuoso kuavulu kiki, anga Nzambi ietu ni tu mu bhukumukina, mu kusakana ni ahatu a akua matumbu atokala jixi jengi?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Monʼumoxi ue ua Joiada, monʼa Eiiiasibe, o nganga ia dikota, ua kexile holomʼia Sambalate, dia mukua Hole, kia ngi bhingi ue nga mu kaiesa bhu mbandu iami." 
Nehemiah13:29 Enhá ku a jimbe, Nzambi iami, mbata o unganga a u xidisa, ni kikutu ue kia unganga a ki zange, o kikutu kiangene kia akua Leví." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kienhiki kiene ki nga zelesa o mundu ku akua matumbu oso, anga ngi uana o jinganga mu ibuka, ngi londekeza o ima ia fuama o jinganga kubhanga ni ia akua Leví, kala muthu ku kikalakalu kiê;" 
Nehemiah13:31 kiene ue kimoxi ki nga bhange ni akua maujitu ma jihuinhi mu ithangana ia tokala, ni maujitu ma ima ioso ia kutomona. Eie-phe, Nzambi iami, ngi te jinge o muẋima, mbé ku ngi kale ue o mbote iami." 
Esther1:1 Maka a bhita mu izuua ia Asuuelu, Asuuelu ió ua kexe mu tumina jinga tunde ku India katé mu Etiópia, o-xi iê ioso anga i kala ni hama ia sengu ni makuinhi aiadi ni sambuadi." 
Esther1:2 Mu izuua ienhoio kia zubha muenexi Asuuelu kuhinga ungana uê mu mbonge ia Suzana," 
Esther1:3 kutula mu muvu ua katatu ua kukala ku ungana uê, u bhanga fesa ia akua mbèle iê, ni jingana ni abhikʼê. Anga a bhongolola bhu pholo iê bhebhobho, ni jixefe ja ilombo ioso ia Pélesa ni ia Mediia a kala-bhu uâ, ni jitata ni jifixiiadi ja jisengu," 
Esther1:4 muene anga u a edikiza jimbongo jê fa fumana ku mbanza, ni imbamba ioso ia ungana uê, mu hama a izuua ni makuinhi nake." 
Esther1:5 Kia zubha kubhanga izuua ienhiʼii, muenexi u bhanga dingi fesa ia mundu uoso ala mu mbonge ia Suzana, ni makota ni jindenge, mu sambuadi dia izuua; u i bhangela mu kithâdi kia palaxu ia muenexi." 
Esther1:6 Bhu kala jithanga ja linhu jizela ni jʼazulu, a ji nhenga ni malenge a phalata mu mikolo ia linhu ni púlupula, o mikolo ia bhitila mu jiphiladi ja mármore. O jihama bhua zendalalela jinga ji kala ja ulu ni phalata, o pavimendo bhoxi i kala ia mármore ikusuka, iazele, iazeluluka, ni ixikelela." 
Esther1:7 O jinganza jâ ja kunuina ji kala ja ulu, jene joso jala kiengi, ki bhuala imoxi ia sokela ni mukuâ; o vinhu i kala ia nzungule ia tubhula muenexi." 
Esther1:8 O mukúnua, exi, ki bhu kale muthu a mu bhinjika; kuma muenexi ua bhana ngonge ku jifixiiadi ja mbèle iê, uixi: Kala musonhi a bhange kioso kia mu zelela ku muẋima uê." 
Esther1:9 Na mvale Váxiti, anga u bhanga ue fesa ia ahatu, mu sala ia palaxu ia muenexi Asuuelu." 
Esther1:10 Mu kizuua kia kasambuadi-phe, kioso o muẋima ua muenexi ki uala mu ngalasa mukonda dia vinhu, u tuma Mehumanu, ni Bizita, ni Hadibona, ni Bingita, ni Abangata, ni Zetadi, ni Kadikase, sambuadi dia jingolambole a tambula konda ia dibhata dia muenexi Asuuelo," 
Esther1:11 kuila a takane na mvale Váxiti, a mu bheke bhu pholo ia muenexi, ni kitundu kiê kia ungana ku mútue, phala mala oso ala-bhu ni jifixiiadi jâ a mu mone o kuuabha kuê. Kuma muene ua tula jithalu kiambote, u uabha kiavulu ku mu tala mesu." 
Esther1:12 Maji na mvale Váxiti-phe kia mu sange jingolambole, a mu ambela kia tumu muenexi, muene ua ditunuʼê nguaʼiê kuiza. Muenexi anga u di zangala kiavulu, njinda i mu kuata." 
Esther1:13 Anga u zuela ni adiakimi ejiia phangu ni ndongo ia jithembu ku mivu ni minhamo, kuma kiene ki ejidila mu utuminu uâ, kioso kiambe kubhanga muenexi, bhu dianga hanji kubhita kuzuela ni jimesene ejiia ijila ni ífua iaʼxi." 
Esther1:14 Ene-phe ilamba a kaiela kua muenexi majina mâ, Kadisena, ni Setala, ni Adimata, ni Talxixi, ni Melese, ni Madisena, ni Memukana, sambuadi dia muthu; ene jitata ja utuminu ua Pélesa ni ua Mediia, a tena jinga kubhiẋila bhu pholo ia muenexi, ni kuxikama bhu mbandu ia kiandu kiê." 
Esther1:15 Muenexi anga u a ebhula, uixi: Na mvale Váxiti tu mu bhanga kiebhi, ua xibhaka o kitumu kia muenexi kia mu tudila o jingolambole?" 
Esther1:16 Memukana anga u vutula bhu pholo ia muenexi ni jitata, uixi: Na mvale Váxiti ka bhalumuna ngó mulonga kua muenexi, maji ua bhalumuna ue ku jitata ni ku jifixiiadi ni mala oso kiá mu jisengu ja muenexi Asuuelu." 
Esther1:17 Kuma kia bhange na mvalʼiki, kiʼla ki bhixila mu mátui ma ahatu oso, a-nda kutobhesa jinga kiá anumeʼâ; kuma anda kuila, exi: Muenexi Asuuelu ua tumine na mvale Váxiti kuila eze bhu pholo iê, muene-phe keza-bhu." 
Esther1:18 Mu kizuua kia lelu kienhiki, jindona ja Pélesa ni ja Mediia, oso a kʼivu kiá kia bhange na mvale Váxiti kiene ue kianda ku vutuila jinga a muadi uâ, o jifixiiadi ja muenexi. Bhu kaxiʼabha-phe bha-nda kuiza izala iavulu ni jimvunda." 
Esther1:19 Se kia uabhela muenexi ku ki bhanga, a tubhule ngonge, a i sonekese mu jindunda ja akua Pélesa ni akua Mediia, phala ki i xikine dingi ku i alulula, kuila Váxiti kua muenexi Asuuelu keza-ku dingi, o ungana uê muenexi a u bhane kiá mukuâ uengi u kala muthu uambote uoso ua mu tundu muene mu kuuabha." 
Esther1:20 O ngonge ia muenexi-phe kia-nda ku i xikisa katé kua suku ixi iê, ahatu oso a kala mu xila anumeʼâ kixi athu a kijingo mba athu a ngoho." 
Esther1:21 Kizuelu kiê anga ki uabhela muenexi ni jitata joso; muenexi anga u ki bhanga kala kia mu longesa Memukana. 
Esther1:22 Kuma u tuma mikanda mu jisengu joso ja tokala mu utuminu uê, kala ua a tumikisa kisoneku mu letala ioso ia usonekenu uâ, kala muiji mu dimi dioso dia uzuelelu uâ, phala enhoso a tene ku i tanga ni ku a tongolokela, kuila: Diiala muene u tumina mʼonzo iê, muene u zuela kioso kia tokala. Ni kuila ue o hundu ienhiʼii a i tange ku mbandu joso phala isambuke, o mundu uoso a ivue." 
Esther2:1 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii, muenexi Asuuelu kia mu bhu kiá o njinda, u kala mu xinganeka Váxiti ni kioso kia bhange, ni ngonge ia xikisa ia ku mu katula bhu kididi." 
Esther2:2 Bhenhobho akua mbele ia muenexi, o minzangala ene ku mu xibhidila, a mu ambela, exi: Kuku a ku sotele ana ilumba auabha kiambote ala hanji mizeletete." 
Esther2:3 Nda u sote jifixiiadi mu sengu joso ja utuminu ué, a ku bhongoluele ana ilumba oso auabha kiambote, a tula muene jithalu, a a bheke kunu mu mbonge ia Suzana, mʼonzo ia ahatu, a kale bhoxi dia lukuaku lua Henge, ngolambole ia muenexi, mukua kutambula konda ia ahatu; a a bhane ioso ia tokala ia ku di uesa ni ku di uabhesa na-iu." 
Esther2:4 O mona kilumba-phe uoso ua ku uabhela eie u muenexi, a kale kiá muene na mvale bhu kididi kia Váxiti. Hundu iâ ienhiʼii anga i uabhela kiambote muenexi, anga u ki bhanga." 
Esther2:5 Mu mbonge ia Suzana-phe mua kexile judé imoxi, dijina diê Moledekai monʼa Jaíle, monʼa Ximeii, monʼa Kiji, mukua muiji ua Bejamí." 
Esther2:6 Muenhú ua tûnda ku Jeluzaleme ni jihutile a a balakala kumoxi ni Jekoniia sobha ia Juda, a mu kutile kuala Nabukodonozolo sobha ia Babilonha." 
Esther2:7 Muenhú muene ua sase Hadesa, a mu ixana jinga dijina diê dia mukuá exi: Estere, monʼa sekuluʼê mona muhatu; kuma tatʼâ uafu, mamʼâ uafu. Mona kilumba iú, ku mu tala ku mesu ua uabha o pholo ni mukutu; o kiafu tatʼâ ni mamʼâʼiki, Moledekai ua mu tambulula ku bhata kala monʼê." 
Esther2:8 Mu kukala-phe, kia tundu kia muenexi, iu ua xikisa o ngonge, anga a bhongolola ana ilumba avulu mu mbonge ia Suzana bhoxi dia lukuaku lua Henge; ni Estere ue a mu ambata mʼonzo ia muenexi, ia a mu thelekala kua Henge mukua kutambula konda ia ahatu." 
Esther2:9 Kilumba kiki anga ki mu uabhela, u kala mu ngalasa iê; anga u lenguluka mu ku mu bhana imbamba iê ia ku di uabhesa, ni mákudia ma tokala, ni sambuadi dia ilumba oso a fuama kukala-nê a tundu mʼonzo ia muenexi; ni muene ni ilumba iê u a katula kididi kioso kiala, hé u a bhana kididi kia beta kuuabha mʼonzo ia ahatu." 
Esther2:10 Estere-phe ka di tange o muiji uê ni jindandu jê, kuma Moledekai, kiene kia mu tendelela kuila ka di tange." 
Esther2:11 Moledekai anga u kala mu kuimajana izuua ioso bhu kanga dia lumbu lua inzo ia ahatu, phala kuijiia mba Estere uala kiebhi, mba kima kiahi kia-nda ku mu bhita." 
Esther2:12 Kala kilumba-phe kia tula bhu kizuua kiê kia kubiẋila kua sobha Asuuelu, kia zubha kiá o kubhanga o kuinhi dia mbeji ni jiiadi mu ku di iudika ni ku di uabhesa mu kífua kiâ kia ahatu, kuma a bhanga mbeji jisamanu ni ku di uesa ni maji a mirra, ni mbeji jisamanu ni ku di uesa ni madizumba engi auabha kiambote mbé o ku di zelesa kala kiene kubhanga o kifua kia ahatu oso." 
Esther2:13 O kioso kiza kilumba mu kubhikila kua muenexi a mu bhanga kienhiki: Kioso kia sola mʼonzo ia ahatu kia kuia na-kiu mʼonzo ia muenexi a mu bhana-kiu. 
Esther2:14 Uia mu kumbi dia ngoloxi, o ki kúkia u vutuka mʼonzo iamukuá ia ahatu, bhoxi dia lukuaku lua Saxingazi, ngolambole ia muenexi, mukua kutambula konda ia akama; muhatu iú o kuvutuka dingi mʼonzo ia muenexi, kikale muene u mu inda, nʼa mu ixana ni kutumbula o dijina diê." 
Esther2:15 Kieza-phe o kizuua kia Estere, monʼa Abihaile, Sekulu a Moledekai kia kubhiẋila kua muenexi, ka solo kima kiengi, u sola ngó kioso kia mu longesa Henge ngolambole ia muenexi, mukua kutambula konda ia ahatu. Estere anga a kala mu ku mu uabhela ku athu oso aia jinga ni ku mu mona mesu." 
Esther2:16 Kienhiki kiambata Estere phala ku mu bheka kua muenexi. O kia zubha kubhiẋila kua muenexi Asuuelu mʼonzo iê, bhu mbeji ia kakuinhi, o mbeje ia Tebete, mu muvu ua kasambuadi ua Asuuelu kukala ku ungana," 
Esther2:17 Muenexi u beta kuzola Estere, ahatu oso ndenge. Estere anga u beta kukala mu ngalasa iê ni henda ia ku mu zola, ilumba ioso iamukuá ndenge. Muenexi anga u katula kitundu kia ungana, u mu zuika na-kiu ku mútue, u mu bhanga kukala na mvuale bhu kididi kia Váxiti." 
Esther2:18 Muenexi anga u bhanga fesa ia dikota ia jifixiiadi jê ni akua mbèle iê; i kala fesa ia fuma ia Estere. Mu sengu joso anga u a bhana hanji kithangana kia kunhoha, o mundu u a uanena maujitu ma kutubhula ni kuidikiza o fuma ia muenexi." 
Esther2:19 Kioso thembu iamukuá ia kaiadi kia bhongolola ana ilumba, Moledekai ua xikama hanji bhu muelu ua muenexi." 
Esther2:20 Kuma Estere kiluua a di tanga muiji uê ni jindandu jê, mukonda Moledekai kiene kia mu tendelela; kuma hanji u evua jinga kioso ki mu ambela Moledekai, mukuâ ni kia kexile-nê ku mu sasa." 
Esther2:21 Mu izuua ienhoio Moledekai kia xikama bhu muelu ua muenexi, bhu kala ngolambole jiiadi ja muenexi, Bingitana ni Telexi, ene ku mu ingila bhu dibhitu diê, a luualela muenexi Asuuelu, anga a mu kanena ku mu jibha." 
Esther2:22 Moledekai anga u kʼivua, u ki jimbuila na mvuale Estere; Estere anga u ki jimbuila muenexi mu dijina dia Moledekai." 
Esther2:23 O kia zubha ku a tokuesa, a ki mona kuma kidi muene, ene oso kiiadi kiâ anga a a nhenga mu miẋi. Anga a ki soneka mu divulu dia malunda bhu pholo ia muenexi." 
Esther3:1 Kia zubha kubhita imʼiii, muenexi Asuuelu u zangeleka Hamane, monʼa Hamedata, mukua Akaki, anga u mu ta ku pholo ia enhoso; ditala diê dia mu bhake di kala kota, o jifixiiadi joso, o ilamba ni akuá, ndenge." 
Esther3:2 Akua mbèle ia muenexi oso, ene kukala bhu muelu uê, anga a kala mu fukama ni kudiundila Hamane; kuma muenexi ua a tumu uixi kiene ki mu mu bhangela jinga. Moledekai-phe nguaié kufukama, ka xikina ku mu diundila." 
Esther3:3 Bhenhobho-phe akua mbèle ia muenexi, ene kukala bhu muelu uê, a mu ambela, exi: Eie Moledekai, phalaʼhi ua xibhaka kitumu kia muenexi?"
