Job20:7 ua kà bola kala o tuji tuê-muène; nuka dingi a kà moneka, o ió a muʼijidile, a kèla: Iú kuebhi?" 
Job20:8 Ua kà tuka, mukuâ ni nzoji, ka kà mu mona dingi; a kà mu lengesa kala kisukila kia usuku." 
Job20:9 O mesu a mu muene jinge, ka kà mu mona dingi, ni kididi kiê ki kia kà mu tala dingi." 
Job20:10 O anʼê a kà sota o ku di uabhesa ku jingadiama; anga a kà fukununa dingi o soua iâ ni maku mâ. 
Job20:11 Né-mbe hanji o ifuba iâ izala ni nguzu ia unzangala uâ, hanji-phe nguzu iâ a kà zeka na-iu muene mu fufutila ia mavu." 
Job20:12 Né-mbe hanji o ku ibha kua mu toualela mu kanu, muene hé u ku sueka muene koxiʼa dimi diê," 
Job20:13 Anga u ku bhaka, ka kuehela, maji o kutouala kuê u ku jijila," 
Job20:14 hanji-phe, o kúdia kuê kua kà kituka kiengi mu divumu diê; kua kà di bhanga kala ndululu ia jinhoka ja mathe a ikolakola moxi diê." 
Job20:15 Ua minha maumvuama, maji hádia ua kà ma lusa, mu vumu diê, Nzambi ua kà ma tundisa-mu." 
Job20:16 Ua kà zuuela ikolakola ia jinhoka; ua kà fua ku dimi dia diuta. 
Job20:17 Mesu mê ka kà mona jihonga ni jingiji ja subhaka ni uiki ni lete. 
Job20:18 Ibundu i tunda mu ku kalakala kuê, ua kà i vutula, ka kà i minha, kana; mu jinzungule ji di ta ku uenji uê ua kubhûnda, ka kà katula-mu kusanguluka kua kima." 
Job20:19 Mbata ua tatesa jinga athu, o jingadiama ua jʼehelela, iú ua nhana jinzu ki muene ua ji tungu." 
Job20:20 Mukonda dia luimbi luê ki lu kala ni mbambe, ka kà tena ku bhixila bhu ditala dia kubhulula o ima ioso iandala muene." 
Job20:21 O luimbi luê lua kihabula, ki luʼehela kima kusomboka, mu kienhiki-phe, o kuzediua kuê ki kua kà tena kunanga." 
Job20:22 O Muene kia kà kala bhu ditala dia ima iavulu u mona kingumba kia muʼiza; maku oso a ió a bhindama a kèza ku thandu diê-muène. 
Job20:23 Ku kala-phe hanji ima i tena kuizalesa o divumu diê, Nzambi ua kà mu tumikisa o kutema kua njinda iê, anga i kala mu kunoka ku thandu diê, kioso kia kala mu kúdia." 
Job20:24 O kia kà lenga mata a utadi ua felu, mufula ua ngôndo ua kà mu tundidila kumbandu ia mukuá." 
Job20:25 Muene ua kà di vuza o mufula ua mu kubu mu mukutu uê, o uene ua kà tunda ni kubenha kua ndululu iê; uoma ua vulu anga ua kà tula ku thandu diê." 
Job20:26 O makuvunda moso ma kà suama mu masuamenu mê-muène; túbhia ki tuʼobhuse ngoho tuene tua kà mu jikinisa, ioso ia subhuka mu balaka iê ia kà kituka kúdia kua túbhia." 
Job20:27 O maúlu a kà tungununa o kikuma kiê; ngongo ia kà zangumuka mu kuzoka ni muene. 
Job20:28 Maumvuama ma inzu iê a kà mʼambata; a ka ma lundulula kala menha bhu kizuua kia njinda ia Nzambi. 
Job20:29 Didi, ku mbandu ia Nzambi, diene o dikànda dia muthu ua ibha; iú uene o undundu ua mu bhakela kuala Nzambi." 
Job21:1 Jobe-phe anga u vutula, uixi:" 
Job21:2 Ivenu muene kiambote o maulúngilu mami, kienhiki ki mi tululuise o mixima." 
Job21:3 Ngi kuatedienu muanu, eme nga-nda kuzuela; eme ki ngi zubha o kuzuela, mu bhange kiua o kasekelu." 
Job21:4 Manhi eme nga mu di tenda ku muthu uoso-uoso? Né hanji kiene ki kia kexile, muenhu uami u kamba kiebhi ku kala ni dilamba?" 
Job21:5 Talenu kokuami nda mu diuane, ni mu te lukuaku ku dikanu." 
Job21:6 Mbata kienhiki ngó, ki ngi ki xinganeka, ngi teketa, mu mukutu uoso mu ngi bhita muene mbambi, kuií!" 
Job21:7 Mukonda diahi, athu a ibha, a kola muenhu, a kuka muene, anga a kala dingi kota mu kutena?" 
Job21:8 Anʼê a tunga a soma ku mesuʼê a ku mona, a kala kiambote kumoxi ni muene, ni mbutu iê ioso i mu kaiela." 
Job21:9 O jinzu jâ u sanga jala ni kutululuka, ki muala uoma; o mbangala ia Nzambi ki iene ku a beta." 
Job21:10 O ngombe iê ia ndumbe i vualesa muene, ki i kambe; o ngombe iê ia mukaji i teta muene, ki i seluka, lémbue." 
Job21:11 O tuana tuâ a tuʼehela kutunda ni kulenga-lenga kala kilunga; anʼâ a tuka-tuka muene ni ngalasa. 
Job21:12 A zangula dízui mu kuimba ni kangoma ni mbânza, a sanguluka muene ni kuxika mbendu." 
Job21:13 Mu kuzediua muene mua zubhila o izuua iâ, maji mu kithangana kiofele a tuluka mu mbila." 
Job21:14 Eneʼâ-phe, ene muene ambela Nzambi, kuila: Tunda bhu mbandu ietu! Mbata o jinjila jé, ki tua bhindamena ku jiʼjiia." 
Job21:15 O Muteni-a-Ioso muene nanhi, kuila etu tu mu bhikila? Mu ku mu sambela muene, tua-nda ku katula-ku kima kiahi?" 
Job21:16 Talenu muene kuila, o kuzediua kuâ, ki kua mu tunda kokuâ-ene, bhu lukuaku luâ; eme-phe kikutu kia isuéia ki ngi kale dikanga!" 
Job21:17 Lukuxi kia mu bhita kuila o mukengeji ua isuéia u jima? Mba kibuika ki a tukumuisa? Mba-phe o Nzambi mu njinda iê u a uanena misusu? 
Job21:18 Kuma edi kala ibhiate ku kitembue, mukuâ ni izeji i phephuluka ni kitaphephe." 
Job21:19 Enu muexi: Kikuma kia isuéia Nzambi uene mu ku ki bhaka phala anʼâ. Maji muene-ku, o kisuéia, muene ua tokalele ku mu bhana futu kuala Nzambi, phala ni ki mu xixima." 
Job21:20 Kioso ki muiza uíndua, u di muene-kiu muene-muène ni mesu mê, anga únua muene ku njinda ia Muteni-a-Ioso." 
Job21:21 Mbata kia zubha o kúfua, kuila a mu batula kiá ku dialuilu dia jimbeji jê, ki mu kuatelaʼhi dingi o inzu iê?" 
Job21:22 Manhi Nzambi bhuala u mu longa o kuijiia, se muene muene ua mu fundisa oso ala mu diúlu?" 
Job21:23 Bhu kala muthu u fua mu izuua iê ia nguzu, kuila ua batama hanji muene kiambote iú ua tululukʼê." 
Job21:24 O itabhu iê iezala ni lete, o mu ifuba iê muezala ni uôngo ua kindala." 
Job21:25 O mukuá u fua kiengi, mu lamba dia muẋima uê, ku mbote ua lémbua kulola-ku." 
Job21:26 Ene oso kumoxi a a funda mu mavu, o momo kiá tubamba tuene tu a vungina ene oso." 
Job21:27 Talenu muene kuma ixinganeku ienu nga ijiia kiambote, ni ima ia ibha ia makutu i mua ngi zukutisa na-iu." 
Job21:28 Mbata mua-nda kuila, muexi: Inzu ia kilamba ii kuebhi? Dibhata diala kuebhi mua tungile mukua phulu?" 
Job21:29 Mbebhu enu kiluua muʼibhula oso akua kuenda mu njila? O ijimbuete iene mu ku mi tangela, ki mu i tongolola?" 
Job21:30 Kuila athu a ibha kizuua kia uíndua ene mu ku a langa, o bhu kizuua kia njinda a a kudila?" 
Job21:31 Ima iê ia ibha, ia mu ku bhanga nanhi muene u i amba bhuoso bhuala muene? Nanhi ua-nda ku mu futa, ku imbamba iê ioso ia bhanga?" 
Job21:32 Ku dizubhilu-phe, aia mu mu bheka mu mbila, o ku mbila iê a ta-ku kilangidilu phala kuenda ni ku i langa." 
Job21:33 Ibumu ia mavu ma honga ki i mu nemena, atuʼoso a mu kaiela, kala kia kambe o dialuilu dia oso a mu kalangela kiá." 
Job21:34 Enu-phe mua mu ngi bhombelaʼhi ngoho? Mukonda ku ioso i mua mu ngi vutuila kana-ku kidi, kuma kuala ngó makutu." 
Job22:1 Kieneʼokio, Ilifaji, mukua Temane, u vutula, uixi:" 
Job22:2 Mbebhu ku muthu, Nzambi u nganhala-ku kima? Muthu se uala njimu mbote ie-muène ngó, kuabhu." 
Job22:3 Inga Muteni-a-Ioso kua mu kala ihi, kioso eie ki u kala u muthu ua iuka? Mba muene u tambula-ku kima kiahi, kioso eie ki u iukisa o jinjila jé?" 
Job22:4 Inga muene u ku bazela ku uoma ué, ua Nzambi, mba u di ta ni eie mu ku funda?" 
Job22:5 Manhi o ku ibha kué eie ki ku vulu muene, o ikuma ié ia vudila-ku muene ki iene mbambe?" 
Job22:6 Mbata o jiphange jé ua ji te ku ungunji sè kikuma kioso-kioso, o akua makoza eie ua a zula ioso ia zuatele." 
Job22:7 Ua fulu ku bhana menha a kúnua kua ió ua bhuila, o uala ni nzala, eie ua muʼimina kúdia." 
Job22:8 Maji ixi ua iʼehela mukua nguzu, oso ngoho ala ku ungana, ene a tunga-mu." 
Job22:9 Atudi ua a kaie ni maku a hatu, o jihukunhu ua ji bukujula o maku." 
Job22:10 Kiene kia ku kondolokela o mabhebhe, o kiteketela ki kia ku tula mu lusolo." 
Job22:11 Eie uala mu kitombe mua bhingi kutena kumona kima, o ndumba dia menha ia a ku bhiti ku thandu." 
Job22:12 Manhi Nzambi kala ku thandu dia maúlu? Tala ditala dia Jithéthembua! Ku di leka kuahi ngó! 
Job22:13 Eie uixi: Nzambi ku imʼiii uejiiaʼhi? Mbé muene u tena ku fundisa mu kaẋi ka kitombe kiedi buí? 
Job22:14 Imatuta ia kômo ia mu vungina, uila kiki, katena kumona, o muene u nhungina koko ku diulu." 
Job22:15 Eie uandala u kaiela o hoka ia ukulu mua diota jinga athu a ibha? 
Job22:16 Eneʼá a a buikisa kioso ngó kithangana kiâ ki ki bhixila luua; hungulule ja menha ja sengulula ibhela iâ. 
Job22:17 Nzambi a muʼambela jinga, kuila: Tunda bhu mbandu ietu. Ni kuila: O Muteni-a-Ioso ua tena ku tu bhanga kima kiahi?" 
Job22:18 Né kienhókio muene, jinzu jâ ua jʼizalesele jinge ni jimbote; mukonda dia kiki, o kikutu kia isuéia ki ngi kale dikanga!" 
Job22:19 O athu a iuka a ki mono, ia a kala ni kusanguluka; o ua kambe ku kiʼjiia ua bhanga kasekelu," 
Job22:20 uixi: Nguma ietu a mu muange, túbhia ue tua jikinisa oso a subhukile-ku ku mbandu iâ." 
Job22:21 Diluulule-phe ni muene, nda u mone kutululuka, mu kubhanga kiokio, mbote i kuiza." 
Job22:22 Nga diondo, xikina mulongi ua dikanu diê, maka mê u ma te ku muẋima ué." 
Job22:23 Se u biluka kua Muteni-a-Ioso, muene ua-nda ku ku tungisa dingi, se o kubhanga kia ibha eie u ku sandula monzo ié." 
Job22:24 Kienhokio-phe o ulu ua kà u lunjijika mukua ni fufutila, ni ulu ua Ofidi uà kela kala matadi ma jingiji." 
Job22:25 Katé ni Muteni-a-Ioso ua kà di bhanga muene kiá o ulu ué ni phalata ié ia di lunjijika. 
Job22:26 Mbata ua kà tanena mua Muteni-a-Ioso, ua kà zangumuna pholo ié kua Nzambi." 
Job22:27 Eie ua kà sambela Nzambi, o muene ue u kuívua; eie ua kà futa muene ioso i ua di hambelela kua muene." 
Job22:28 Ki uinda kubhanga kima, kia kà ku tunda mbote; o mukengeji ua kà ku muikina mu jinjila jé." 
Job22:29 O iá kiʼaia ni ku kulumuka, eie-phe ua kèla uixi: Bhulu! Anga Nzambi ua kà bhulula uoso ua di tolesa." 
Job22:30 Anga (Nzambi) u bhulula katé ni ió mukua mulonga, xi! a kà mu kudila muene, mukonda dia maku mé-eie mala ni kuzela." 
Job23:1 Jobe-phe u vutula, uixi:" 
Job23:2 Katé ni mu lelu, hanji o kuditenda kuami kua ngi ludila; o nguzu ia dibhebhu diami ia muia dingi ni ku di bandekeza, o kukema kuami kuala ndenge." 
Job23:3 Uaué! Tamanu ngʼejidile kuoso ku ngi tena ku mu sanga! Hinu ngeji ku bhixila bhu difundisilu diê. 
Job23:4 Ni kutetuluka kuoso ngeji ku mu tudila o mulonga uami, o dikanu diami ngeji ku diʼzalesa ni maka ma uanji." 
Job23:5 Ngeji kuijiia o izuelu ieje ku ngi vutuila na-iu muene, anga ngʼividila kiambote ioso ia ngi tangela." 
Job23:6 Manhi ni unéne uê uoso iuná, o kutena kuê, ueje kuzoka nʼeme? Kana. Inda ueje ku ngi langa muene." 
Job23:7 Bhobho-phe kiá o muthu ua iuka ueje ku funda ni muene, eme-phe ngeje kujituka ku mivu ni mivu kua Mufundixi uami." 
Job23:8 O kiki-phe ki ngiia ku pholo, muene koko kala-ku; se ngedi ngi vutuka ku dima, ki ngi muʼivu." 
Job23:9 Se u kalakalela ku kiasu, eme ki ngi mu mono; o kia di sueka ku dilu, ngi tokoka ku mu mona." 
Job23:10 Maji muene-phe o njila iami ua ijiia; se muene ua ngi lolele, ngeje kutunda utadi ua ulu mukuá." 
Job23:11 Kuma o inama iami ia kaiela mu manhanhu mê; njila iê nga i lange, ki ngi i tondala, kana." 
Job23:12 Ku kijila kia mizumbu iê, tundeʼami ukulu kiluua ngi tunda-ku; o maka ma dikanu diê, ma beta ku ngi uabhela o kúdia kuami ndenge." 
Job23:13 Maji o Nzambi kia lungulukila muthu, nanhi muene u mu fudisa? Kioso kiendi o muenhu uê, kiene muene kia bhanga." 
Job23:14 Mukonda o ioso iâ ngi xinda, muene ua-nda ku i kumbidila muene; ni ima dingi ia vulu, iala na-iu hanji muene, ia di fu kala iii." 
Job23:15 Kiene kia mu ngi bhekesa kuteketa bhu pholo iê-muène; ki ngi xinganeka o ima ienhiʼii, ngi mu kala ni uoma!" 
Job23:16 Mukonda o Nzambi ua botomokesa muẋima uami, o Muteni-a-Ioso muene ua ngi kuatesa uoma." 
Job23:17 Kuambe a fulu ku ngi vuza kiosuʼiki kuma ki kuiza luua kitombe, mba pholo iami u i vungina kiá ni kuvunda." 
Job24:1 Phalaʼhi Muteni-a-Ioso ka xindi ithangana ia kufundisa? Mukonda diahi o ió a muʼijiia, izuuʼiii ka mu i mona?" 
Job24:2 Sai-ku amoxi, jimbambe a ji sondolola, a nhana ilunga hé a kuata ku inga" 
Job24:3 O monʼa-kitungu bulu iê a muʼambata na-iu muene; o mutudi ngombe a mu tambula-iu mu kiximbi. 
Job24:4 Oso a bhindama a a jimbidisa o njila; o jingadiama jaʼxi kikale joso jiia ni ku di sueka. 
Job24:5 Mukua ni ki tunda o mikete ia milundu mu kikangalakata, kiene ue ki tunda eneʼá mu kuia ku midimu iâ, a di meneka mu kusota o mbole; o mukáu ua diehelela, u bhana kúdia kua ene ni kua anʼâ." 
Job24:6 A muna kúdia kuâ mu mukáu, a kanza ji-uvua mu díbhia dia mukua phulu." 
Job24:7 O mukua tuẋi, ua kambe kia ku di vungila o mbambi, a mu bhitisa o usuku sé kizuatu." 
Job24:8 O mvula ia milundu i a betesa, kia kamba bhua lengela, a basa ku matadi." 
Job24:9 O jihukunhu ja tuana tua ndenge, a a katula muene ku mele a mamʼâ, kiximbi kia ngadiama a ki xikina muene." 
Job24:10 A bhangesa kuila akua tuẋi enda sè izuatu, akua nzala o kúdia a a katula na-ku." 
Job24:11 O mu imbaka ia athu a ibha eneʼá, muene mua vukila o maji; a a kamena o vinhu mu matangi, maji hanji a kala ni dinhota." 
Job24:12 Tunde mu jimbonge athu ia kema, o iá a kuama mienhu iâ i i di kola, maji Nzambi phe ka ki mono kuila kima kia ulaji." 
Job24:13 Ene (o isuéia) ala mu kaẋi ka iâ oso a zemba o mukengeji; jinjila jâ a lémbua ku jʼijiia, o mu a sola kuendela ka nange-mu;" 
Job24:14 O kijibhanganga u balumuka mu kimene-mene, hé u jibha o ngadiama ni phulungu ua tate; o mu usuku u di fuangana ni muiii." 
Job24:15 Mukua ni mesu a mukua jiphanda kia kala mu ku kinga o kufulamana kua usuku, uixi: Mu usuku kana-ku dingi diesu dia-nda ku tena ku ngi mona; anga u sueka o pholo;" 
Job24:16 O mu usuku a kanda o jinzu ja dianga kiá kulanga mu muanha; o mukengeji ka uiji dingi. 
Job24:17 Mukonda ene osuʼó, o kimene phala ene, kila kala kitombe kia kalunga; kuma se athu a ejiia, ene evua uoma, kala uoma ua kizenji kia kalunga." 
Job24:18 Enu muexi: Akua phulu ene mu a kungulula lusolo ku thandu dia menha; ku mundu, o dikànda diâ dia kuxixima; o mu njila ja mábhia a mivide ene kʼendela-mu dingi." 
Job24:19 Mukua ni kixibhu ni munza ki a kukutisa o menha ma kikulakaji; kiene ue hádia o mbila ki ia kà sengumuna ió oso a ta ituxi. 
Job24:20 A kà mu jimba kiá kuala mamʼâ; o tubamba tua kà mu dia ni vondadi ioso; kana-ku dingi ua kà mu xinganeka; mukua mangonha a kà mu bukujula kala muxi. 
Job24:21 Kuma ua tatesa jinga o kisula kia kambe ana, anga u lémbua kubhanga o mbote ku mutudi ua muhatu." 
Job24:22 Lémbua-phe! ki kiene! Nzambi mu nguzu iê u vudisa izuua ia mazonda; a tukumuka hanji emana, kioso muene kia kexi mu ku kinga kiá o kúfua." 
Job24:23 O Nzambi kia a bhana kunhoha, ene-phe a dielela kiá ngó kienhókio; o mesu ma Nzambi phe ia a talela mu jinjila jâ." 
Job24:24 A a zangeleka muene mu ka kithangana kòfele; anga a bhita kiua kala kia muia ene oso; a a batula kala mítue ia masa. 
Job24:25 Se ki kiene, nanhi u ngi kuatesa makutu, o ioso i nga zuela a i tumbulula i kituke kingoho?" 
Job25:1 Bheneʼobho, Bidade, o musuuita, u vutula, uixi:" 
Job25:2 O kutumina ni kutena kua ngene kua Nzambi, muene u bhangesa kuila ku maúlu ku kala uembu." 
Job25:3 Nanhi u tena kutanga o ifuẋi iê? O ki banda mukengeji uê, nanhi muene u kamba ku mu muikina?" 
Job25:4 Muthu-phe u kala kiebhi ni kuiuka bhu pholo ia Nzambi? Ió a mu vuala ku (monʼa) muhatu, u kala kiebhi ni kuzela?" 
Job25:5 Tala, katé ni mbeji ki iala ni kubenha; o jithéthembua ue ku mesu mê ki ji zele." 
Job25:6 Kuambe dingi o muthu uedi kala thûthu, ni monʼa muthu uedi kala kakibamba!." 
Job26:1 Jobe-phe ua vutula, uexi;" 
Job26:2 Eie uejiia ku kuatekesʼó, kua iú ua kambe nguzu! Ni ku kudila lukuaku lua kambe kusuina!" 
Job26:3 Kaiula kahi ngó ku ua bhana kua iú ua kambe o kuijiia! Ni kulondekesa kuijiia kua subhaka kua kidi! 
Job26:4 O kiene ngó ki ua mu zuela ienʼiii, nanhi ua ku kuatekesa? O muenhu u uala na-u moxi dié, ua mu zuela, ua nanhi?" 
Job26:5 Bidade uexi Katé ni jinzumbi já iá a fua kiá jiteketa koxiʼa mavu, o muenha ma kalunga ue ateketa kumoxi ni iá a tunga kuenhoko." 
Job26:6 Ku mesu mê ni ithangana ia kèza-ku ia di monekena kala kima kia zula, kana-ku kima ki mu xitila o mukiukuluku." 
Job26:7 Muene o thunda u i zala ku thandu dia ngoho, anga u bhangesa ixi kuzenzamena bhua kambe kima." 
Job26:8 O menha ua a kuikila mu matuta ia xiketela, o ene-phe ka tanduka ni kunema kuê." 
Job26:9 O mbeji né iala mu kumuika kua nguzu iê, muene u i vungina o pholo, o ku thandu diê-phe u zala-ku dituta." 
Job26:10 Ku thanduʼa menha ua te-ku mbambe, katé ku maẋokololo kua suku o mukengeji ni kitombe." 
Job26:11 Jingunji ja diulu ji teketa, anga ji kala ni uoma ua ikusu iê." 
Job26:12 Musanza ua kalunga u u tandula ni nguzu iê, ni kutongoloka kuê, nguma u i diotela muene bhoxi." 
Job26:13 O diulu ua di kembesa ni Nzumbi iê; O lukuaku luê luene lua iudika o kinhoka ki di nhonga jihata. 
Job26:14 Iii-phe ngoho, kífua o mizumbu ia jinjila jê! i tuene mu kuívua kua muene iòfelefele ngoho! Nanhi-phe u tena kutongolola kibazu kia nzaji ia kutena kuê?" 
Job27:1 Jobe u kuata kuzuela mu ifika, uixi:" 
Job27:2 Nzambi a tane-ku! Ua ngi katula o kulúnga kuami, ni Muteni-a-Ioso ua ludisa o muenhu uami." 
Job27:3 Kioso momuʼami ki mu kala hanji muenhu ni mulenge ua Nzambi mu dizulu diami," 
Job27:4 dikanu diami ki dia kà zuela kima kia ibha, o dimi diami ki dia kà tanga mangonha." 
Job27:5 Ki ngi kale ue dikanga, o ku mi lungisa enu, kuma katé bhu nga kà fuila, nuka ngi di sandula mu kidi kiami." 
Job27:6 O kuiuka kuami ngi ku naminina muene, ki nga-nda ku kueha, kana; mbata o muẋima uami ki ua mu ngʼelesa ngó kizuua kimoxi kioso-kioso kia muenhu uami." 
Job27:7 Nguma iami a soke ni mukua phulu, o uoso u zangumuka mu ku ngi bilukila, a soke ni kisuéia." 
Job27:8 Mbata o mukua mangonha o kudielela kuê kua kà kala kuahi, kioso kia zubha kukala kinjenje, o Nzambi hé u mu sua o muenhu ué?" 
Job27:9 Mbé Nzambi ua kà muʼivua dingi o kudikola kuê, kuila dilamba dia mu tulukila kiá?" 
Job27:10 O muthu ua ibha u tanena kiebhi mua Muteni-a-Ioso? Mba u hingila kiebhi Nzambi mu ithangana ioso?. 
Job27:11 Nga-nda ku mi longa kioso kiala bhu lukuaku lua Nzambi, ki nga-nda ku mi suekela kioso kiala ni Muteni-a-Ioso." 
Job27:12 Mbata enuenuʼoso ima iii mua i mono kiá, mukonda diahi mua mu tanga ngó uanji uòkukutu?" 
Job27:13 Talesenu! Muthu ua ibha dikânda diê dia kà kala diahi ku mbandu ia Nzambi? O ió a bhanga kusuina a kà tambula undundu uahi kua Muteni-a-Ioso? 
Job27:14 Se anʼê a di sokolola, a kà buila ku xibhata; o muiji uê ki ua-nda kua kà mona kúdia nʼekuta." 
Job27:15 Oso a kà subhuka-ku, a kà a funda muʼalunga-ngombe, o atudiʼâ a kà lémbua kudila." 
Job27:16 Se o kisuéia u bhongolola phalata kala kufutila ia mavu, anga u lunda izuatu kala malôua," 
Job27:17 muene ua-nda ku i lundé ngo, maji muthu ua iuka muene ua-nda kua kà i zuata; o muthu ua bene, muene ua-nda kua kà uana o phalata iê." 
Job27:18 Muene inzu iê u i tunga kala kibamba; kala o mulangidi kia tunga o muiônga uê. 
Job27:19 Mu kuzeka, u zeka mvuama ni umvuama uê, o kia tona mesu, umvuama ki u moneka dingi." 
Job27:20 Kimbulambula ki mu kuata kala menha a disenza; mu usuku a muʼambata ku kibhungu! 
Job27:21 Kitembu kia thunda, kia kà muʼambata; o bhu kididi kiê bhua kexe, ki mu xixila-bhu muene ni nguzu ioso." 
Job27:22 Ima iosuʼiii, Nzambi u mu lunduluila-iu muene ku thandu diê, ka muʼehela, kana; sumbala muene u sota kulenga bhu lukuaku lua Nzambi." 
Job27:23 Muene kia di bhana kibhalu, akuâ a beta jimbanda ni maku, mu kusondoloka kuê, a mu tobhesa ni jibuia ni ku mu xikila jisupiia." 
Job28:1 Kidi muene, phalata iala ni ididi iê mua ku i kanda, o ulu ua kuzunza uala ue ni kididi kiê." 
Job28:2 O felu a i katula mu mavu; ku ditadi kuene kua zunza o kobidi. 
Job28:3 Athu usuku ene mu ku u tela mbambe, katé ni ku maẋokololo aia muene ni kusota matadi a suama mua vundu, ni mu kitombe kiedi buí." 
Job28:4 O kangiji kà di bhanga masenza katé bhu mbandu ia iú uoso ua tungu ue bhu mbandu iê, katé ki ka xikina ku ka vuua; bheneʼobho-phe muthu u bhanga kia tena, anga menha a di hola." 
Job28:5 O mu mavu muene muala ku tunda o kúdia, bhoxi diê a ma bilujula kala ala mu túbhia." 
Job28:6 O matadi mê kiene o kididi kia safidia, ene-phe ala ni fufuta ia ulu." 
Job28:7 O Hoka ienʼiii, kinjila ki dia xitu ka i ijiia; ni mesu ma kikuambi kiluua ue a i mona." 
Job28:8 Iama ia makota i kuama nuka ia diotele-mu, né kiá monʼa hoji kiluua a bhita-mu." 
Job28:9 Muthu-phe lukuaku luê u lu sunununa mu ku bula o matadi, milundu u i kanda-kanda tundé ku jindanji jê koxi." 
Job28:10 Ujikula mikuluja ku matadi, mesu mê anga aia ni kutonginina ioso iala-ku ia beta kuta kiavulu." 
Job28:11 Ngenda ja menha u ji xita muene, né ngó dibêbe dimoxi ki di tena kutunda, anga u sungila ku mukengeji kima kioso kia di suekele mua vundu." 
Job28:12 Maji-phe o unjimu a u sanga kuebhi? O kilunji kia kutongolola, kididi kiê kiebhi?" 
Job28:13 Muthu-phe kienhiki ka kʼijiia o ku ta ku kia te, kiene ue kulu-dia-mundu ku ki sange-ku." 
Job28:14 O mukiukuluku uila, uixi: Kiene momuʼami ki kiala-mu; o musanza ua kalunga ue, uixi: O kiene ki kiala nʼeme." 
Job28:15 Ki ki xikina ku ki bhela ulu ua nzeta, mba a ki pezalela phalata mu ku ki sumba." 
Job28:16 O ku ta kuê ki ku xikina ku ku sokesa ni ulu ua fina ua Ofidi, mba o matadi a te kiavulu a onixe, mba a safídia." 
Job28:17 O ulu ka u sokesa ni kilunji kia kutongolola, né ua kenzuluka kala kidistalu; kiene ue ki ki xikina ku ki tolokala mu makembu a ulu ua fina." 
Job28:18 Mukonda dia kiene, ni makoladi a kidistalu muthu u a jimba, mbata o kutambula unjimu kota, phelu ia nzaji ndenge." 
Job28:19 Ka ki sokesa ue ni ditadi dia topáziu ia Itiiópia, mba ngó ku ki sumba ni ulu ua kenzuluka kiambote." 
Job28:20 O unjimu-phe ua mu tunda kué? O kilunji kia kutongolola, kididi kiê kiebhi?" 
Job28:21 Mukonda kia di sueka ku mesu ma ima ioso iala ni muenhu, kia suamena jinjila ja diulu." 
Job28:22 O kidikungu kia mukiukuluku ni kúfua, ela exi: Fuma iê tua ivu muene ni mátui metu." 
Job28:23 Nzambi muene ua muʼijiia o njila, muene ua muʼijiia o kididi kiê." 
Job28:24 Mbata (Nzambi) muene u mona katé kua suku oxi; u mona ioso iala bhoxi dia diulu. 
Job28:25 Kioso kia sokelesa kunema kua kitembu, iú ua xindi kizongelu kia menha." 
Job28:26 Kioso kia te ngonge ia mvula ni njila ia kubenha kua ibazu ia nzaji. 
Job28:27 O muene-phe unjimu ua u muene iú ua uidikiza; ua u xikika iú ua u solokota katé bhu hole iê. 
Job28:28 Iú uambela o muthu, uixi: Talesa-ze! O uoma ua Nzambi, uene o unjimu; o kueha kia ibha, kuene o kuijiia." 
Job29:1 Jobe hé u kuata hanji kuzuela, uixi:" 
Job29:2 Ai-ué, taté! Ki ngi tundila kuebhi, o ku kalaʼmi dingi kala ki nga kexile mu jimbeji ja bhiti, kala mu izuua ia kexi mu ngi langa Nzambi!" 
Job29:3 Kioso Muene kia ngi muikina jinga ni kandeia kê bhu thala ia mútue uami, eme hé mua vundu ngiia ni kuendela mu mukengeji uê." 
Job29:4 Kala ki nga kexile mu izuua ia unzangala uami, kioso o kikutu kia Nzambi kia kasuêkele ki kia kexile mu balaka iami;" 
Job29:5 Kioso hanji Muteni-a-Ioso kia kexile nʼeme, o tuana tuami a ngi kondoloka;" 
Job29:6 kioso ki nga kexile mu kuila, mu lete muene mu ngi sukula inama iami, o mu ditadi muene mu ngi tundila o jingiji ja maji jiia ni ku kunguluka!" 
Job29:7 Kioso ki ngàʼia jinga bhu muelu ua mbonge, o bhu itanda bhene bhua ngi iudikila kialu kiami kia kuxikama," 
Job29:8 minzagala kia ngi mona jinga a suama; o adiakime-phe a balumuka, hé emana." 
Job29:9 O ilamba-phe maka mâ a ma jikila jinga ku muẋima, a ta muene lukuaku luâ ku dikanu;" 
Job29:10 athu òʼnéne, mbimbi iâ ia kexi mu ku sukamena, dimi diâ di a kukuta mu kanu." 
Job29:11 Se bhu kala dítui di ngʼivua, dienhódio diamba muene kuma nga zediua; se bhu kala diesu di ngi mona, dienhódio di ngi bhela umbangi." 
Job29:12 Mukonda eme nga bhulula jinga jingadiama joso ji di kola, ni monʼa kitungu ka moneka uoso u mu kudila." 
Job29:13 Kizediuise kia ió ua mu fua, kieza jinga kokuami, kuma eme nga kexile mu sangulukisa o muẋima ua mutudi ua muhatu." 
Job29:14 Eme nga di vunga jinga o kuiuka, o kuene kua dibhangele kiá kiene o kizuatu kiami, o kubhanga ima ia ku kamba kathômbo kua di bhangele kiá diene o divunga diami ni kitundu kiami kia mútue." 
Job29:15 Eme nga di bhangele eme kiá ngi diesu dia kifofo, ngi kinama kia kinema u tenguna." 
Job29:16 Kua ió a bhindama, nga kexile ngi tata, katé ni iá ki nga ejidile, milonga iâ ngi i thothesa muene ni muanu uoso." 
Job29:17 Eme o isuéia nga i bukula jinga o jingandelu, a mu nhengeneka kiá ku mazu mâ, eme ngi bhangesa kuila a mu sonona muene." 
Job29:18 Eme nga kexi mu tanga, ngixi: Hádia ngi fuila bhu kikalanga kiami bhene, anga izuua iami ngi i sokolola kala kisékele." 
Job29:19 Lundanji luami lua kà lebhelela muene katé ku menha, o mu usuku uoso dimume dia ka xikama mu jithangu jami." 
Job29:20 Ujitu uami ua-nda kua kàia ni ku di bandekeza momuʼami, o mufula uami ua kà suina kiengi bhu maku mami." 
Job29:21 Oso a kexe mu ku ngʼivua, kaiula kami a ka kinga; a kexi mu kuila muene hudí, phala kuividila o kaiula ku nga a bhana." 
Job29:22 O ki ngi zubha kuzuela, ene ka vutula dingi, kuma o izuelu iami ia kexi mu ku a sumina kala dimume." 
Job29:23 Aia jinga muene ni ku ngi kinga, kala kiene mu kinga o mvula, a bhana mu kanu, mukua ni bhu mvula ia kauana." 
Job29:24 Se nga olelesa, ene ka ki xikana kuila eme nga olelesa kiókio; kienhókio, o mukengeji ua pholo iami ka kexe mu ku u jima." 
Job29:25 Njila iâ, eme-muène nga kexile mu ku i sola, ngi xikama kala ngi kilolo kiâ, anga ngi tunga mukua ni sobha mu kaẋi ka ilômbo ia masoladi mâ, mukua ni muthu u konda malamba ku iá akua ku ta jingololo ni kudila." 
Job30:1 Maji kindala kiá, anʼa jindenge a mu ngʼolela, sumbala jitata jâ, ka fuamena ngó ku a ta kumoxi ni jímbua ja kilunga kiami." 
Job30:2 Nguzu ia maku mâ, iene ngi i bhanga kima kiahi? Ene nguzu ia unzangala momuʼâ ki iala-mu dingi, mukonda dia ku kuka." 
Job30:3 Nzala ni ku kamba ioso, kua a sekalesa, nguzu kala na-iu; aia ni ku kunha mu ididi ia kukuta, tunde ukulu, mu jingundu ni mu mikáu ia kibuika." 
Job30:4 Aia ni kunona tu miẋi tua malva ni tu mafe tua isasa, o kúdia kuâ jindanji ja muẋi ua zímbulu." 
Job30:5 Mu kaẋi ka athu aia ni ku a kaia-kaia-mu; a a kola-kola, kala kiene mu kola muthu ua nhana." 
Job30:6 A tunga mu makôlo mua vundu, ni mu jingenda ja mavu ni mu mabânda ku matadi." 
Job30:7 A zumina mu kaẋi ka isasa, hé a di bhongoluela moxi dia misonge." 
Job30:8 Ene anʼa malaji, ana a athu a kambe o majina, mu ixi aia ni kua kaia-kaia-mu." 
Job30:9 Maji-phe kiki, nga kituka ngi muimbu uâ ua kutonokena, nga di bhange ngi Sabhu iâ." 
Job30:10 A ngi zembe muene kiavulu, kia ngi mona a lengela dikanga, ka fulu-phe ku ngi ta mathe mu pholo iami." 
Job30:11 Mbata Nzambi mukolo uê ua u jituna, iú ua ngi tatesa; kienhiki ene a di zula jifelu mu kanu diâ, bhu pholo iami muène." 
Job30:12 Ku mbandu ia dilu, ku balumuka minzangala a xinjika inama iami hé a ngi lungidila jinjila jâ ja kibuika." 
Job30:13 Njila iami a i sengulula, hadi iami aia ni ku ngi vudisila na-iu; ene athu ka moneka ngó uoso u a kuatekesa." 
Job30:14 O kieza mu ku ngi lungulukila, a di lukula muene kala a mu tunda mu ngenda ia dikota, aia ni ku di mbolomuena mu kibuika." 
Job30:15 Kua ngʼiza mauoma, kijingu kiami kia phephuluka kala a kiʼambata ku kitembu, kuzediua kuami kua bhiti kala ʼtuta dia mvula." 
Job30:16 O kiki, muenhu uami ua mu ngi zunzumuka moxi, izuua ia dilamba ia ngi kondo!" 
Job30:17 Mu usuku, ifuba a ngi kubula na-iu anga a i sokomona, o kukata kua mu ngi kunha ki ku nhonha!" 
Job30:18 Mukonda dia kukata kuami kuala ni nguzu ia vulu kinéne, ni kizuatu kiami kia lunguluka, kukata kua bhingi kua ngi kutu mukua ni ngola ia divunga diami." 
Job30:19 Nzambi, tata! Eie ua ngi takuila mu malôua, eme nga di bhange kala ngi fufutila mba ngi uthôka." 
Job30:20 Nga di kola kokué, maji eie kua ngi vutuila; ngʼemana muene, maji eie ua mu ngi talʼé ngoho kienhiki, ku ngi suu." 
Job30:21 Ua ngi kitukila ni usuéia; ua muʼlua nʼeme ni nguzu ia lukuaku lué. 
Job30:22 U ngi zangumuna ni kitembu hé u ngi bhangesa kuendela ku thandu diê; mu kibazu kia kibhungu muene mu u ngi sengumuina. 
Job30:23 Maji-phe, eme nga kʼijiia, kuila hádia u ngʼambata kuʼalunga, ku inzu ia dibhongolokelu, ia kinga ene oso ala ku muenhu." 
Job30:24 Ku ndumba ia mavu ma jinzu ja budika, muthu kene mu ku zanguila-ku lukuaku? O mu kutata kuê u kamba kuzangula mbimbi ni kudikola ku mu kudila?" 
Job30:25 Manhi eme nga kambe kudila, ki nga mono muthu ua tate ni phaxi? Inga muenhu uami ki ua kexile ni dilamba kioso ki nga mono muthu ua bhindama?" 
Job30:26 Mukonda dia kiki, nga kexi-phe mu ku kinga o mbote, maji, tala, kua ngʼiza jingongo, nga kinga jinga mukengeji maji kua ngʼiza kitombe." 
Job30:27 Moxi diami mua mu fulujuka, o kunhoha nga ku lémbua; o izuua ia phaxi ia ngi tula." 
Job30:28 Nga mu kuenda ni kuxiketela, maji ki kua muanha ua dikumbi; mu kionge, ngi balumuka mu kudikola phala ku ngi kudila." 
Job30:29 Nga di bhange ngi ndandu ia jimbulu, o injila ia lebha jixingu ni mikoto, ene akuetu u nga di bundu-nâ." 
Job30:30 O kikonda ku mukutu uami kiia ni kuxiketela hé ki sonoka, o ifuba iami iia ni kujokota ku kizuza kia kukata." 
Job30:31 Kienhiki, o kakoxi kami, ka di bhange mikenu ia kubhindama, o mbendu iami, ila kala dízui dia athu a mu dila." 
Job31:1 Nga te kikutu ni mesu mami; ngi ma talesa-phe kiebhi ku monʼa kilumba kia muzeletete? 
Job31:2 Kuma kua Nzambi, bhuluʼobho, ngeji ku kala-ku ni dikânda diahi? Mba undundu uahi kua Muteni-a-Ioso, tundé ku madimbinza?" 
Job31:3 Manhi ki kuene o kutexika phala mukua ituxi, ni kuxixima kua ió oso a bhanga kia ibha?" 
Job31:4 Inga Nzambi o jinjila jami ka mu ji mona? O uendelu uami uoso ka mu u ualula? 
Job31:5 Se ngende ni mangonha, se kinama kiami kia lengela kuia mu kutobhesa muthu." 
Job31:6 Nzambi a ngi pezale ku jipezu ja iuka kiambote, nda a ngʼijiie o ku di phopheka kuami." 
Job31:7 Se mu uendelu uami nga bhambuka mu njila, se o muẋima uami ua mu kaiela (kua lungu o) mesu mami, mba ku maku mami kua naminina dibaka dioso-dioso." 
Job31:8 Kuabhu-phe, eme ngi kune, mukuetu a die; o muiji uami a u vuze muene katé ni jindanji jê bhoxi." 
Job31:9 Se o muẋima uami ua diʼehelela kudiangukila muhatu, mba se ngaii ni kuzongojola bhu dibhitu dia mukuetu." 
Job31:10 Kuabhu-phe, muhetuʼami a zuke, phala muthu uengi; muhatuʼami ue a mu kotame ku thandu kuala athu engi." 
Job31:11 Mukonda se kiene ki ngi bhanga, kieje ku ngi kala kituxi kia dikota, mulonga u bhekesa kubela ku afundixi;" 
Job31:12 mbata kieji ku kala túbhia tu jikinisa katé mu kibuika, kieji ku jimisa umonhi uami uoso." 
Job31:13 Se nga di tunu kubhana kima kia tokala ku mubhika uami ua diiala mba ua muhatu, kioso ene kia kexi mu ku ngi dionda," 
Job31:14 bheneʼobho-phe, eme ngeje ku bhanga kiebhi kioso Nzambi kia balumuka? O kia ngʼibhula o kikuma, eme ngeje ku mu vutuila kiê?" 
Job31:15 Ió ua ngi iudika mu vumu dia mamʼetu, ki muene ue ua a bhange ene? Inga ki muene umoxi ua tʼumbu, etuʼoso, kikexilu kimoxi mu divumu?" 
Job31:16 Se kima kiandalele o jingadiama eme nga ki jijidile, mba nga bhangesa mesuʼa mutudi ua muhetu kubenguka;" 
Job31:17 mba o dikânda diami nga di di ubheka uami, o monʼa kitungu ka tambula-ku kima" 
Job31:18 (mukonda tundé mu undenge uami, ua kulu nʼeme kala eme ngi tatʼâ; eme nga di bhangele ngi musonguedi ua mutudi tundé mu vumu dia mamʼetu);" 
Job31:19 se nga mono muthu ua mu fua mukonda dia kukamba kizuatu, ni iú ua bhindama mukonda dia kukamba kia ku di vunga;" 
Job31:20 se o miongo iê ki i ngi tanesa, mba muene ka di vungu ni kindemba kia jimbudi jami;" 
Job31:21 se o lukuaku luami nga-lu zengela monʼa kitungu, mukonda dia ku ngi suinisa kuala afundixi bhu dibhitu," 
Job31:22 kuabhu-phe, kiphenza kiami kia lukuaku ki sonoke mu kisuxi, ni kifuba kiami kia lukuaku ki bukuke tunde mu kisuxi, mu a lu sokekela." 
Job31:23 Kuma o njumbu ia Nzambi, phala eme, kima ki ngi kuatesa uoma, o kuimana bhu pholo ia unéne uê, ki ngeje kutena." 
Job31:24 Se eme nga dielela ku ulu, mba ngʼambela ulu ua fina, ngixi: Eie-muène kiá nga ku dielela;" 
Job31:25 mba eme nga sanguluka mukonda dia kuvula kua jimbongo jami, ni mu kuila o lukuaku luami lua bhongolola kia vulu;" 
Job31:26 se nga tale ku dikumbi kioso ki dia kexe mu kubenha, mba ku mbeji, kioso ki iia ni kuenda, ia zele kiambote," 
Job31:27 anga mu kasuèkele muẋima uami u ngʼehela ku di nganala, hé ngi leka lukuaku mu ku a bhana jibeju," 
Job31:28 kiki ue kieje ku ngi kala kituxi ki ngi belesa ku afundixi; mbata kieje kuila kala nga di tunu Nzambi uene ku diulu. 
Job31:29 Se nga sangulukila o uíndua ua mukuetu ua ngi zembe, mba eme nga tana kioso kuxixima ki kua mu tula," 
Job31:30 (dikanu diami ue ki ngi diʼehela ku ta kituxi, ni ku kola-kola mu ku mu bhingila o kúfua kuê);" 
Job31:31 se athu mu bhata diami ka kiambe muene, kuila: Aiué! Nanhi bhobho, ua kambe kuikuta ni xitu ia bhana jinga muene!" 
Job31:32 Muthu ua tundu dikanga, o nzuá-ngiza, ka zeka jinga mu nzunga; o ngenjiʼa thumba nga mu jikuila jinga muene o mabhitu mami." 
Job31:33 Se ngedi kala Adá, nga sueka ikuma iami, mulonga uami anga ngi u sueka bhu homba iami;" 
Job31:34 Kuabhu-phe, eme ngi kale ni kimbulambula bhuezala o mundu ua dikota, o uoma ua ku ngi sebulula kuala o madiembu u ngi kuate, nda eme ngi di xibhe, ngi kambe ku tunda bhu muelu." 
Job31:35 Uaué, taté! Tamanu eme nga kexile ni uoso u ngʼivua! Kuma ku di bhângela kuami kuku nga ku te dijina! O Muteni-a-Ioso a ngi vutuile! O nguma iami a soneke kutatela kuê!" 
Job31:36 Ni kidi muene o kutatela kuê ngeje ku kuʼambata bhu kisuxi kiami, ngeje ku di kuta na-ku kala kitundu." 
Job31:37 O uendelu uami ngeji ku mu londekesa-u o konda iê, mu ku bhiẋila kua muene ngeji kuia muene kala ngi kilamba." 
Job31:38 Se o ixi iami i ngi bilukila ni ku di kola, mba o mibhanga iê i didila kumoxi;" 
Job31:39 se o ibundu iê nga i di, eme nga kambe ku i futa kala kia tokala, eme nga bhekesa kalunga ku jingana jê," 
Job31:40 bhu kididi kia tidiku muʼime minha; bhu kididi kia sevada, muize iangu. Kuzuela kua Jobe kuabhu. Mahezu!" 
Job32:1 Bheneʼobho athu kitatu ió anga eha ku vutuila Jobe kuma a mono ua mu di lungise kiá muene-muène. 
Job32:2 Anga Edihu, monʼa Balakiiele, mubuzita, ua tokala ku mbutu ia Lame, njinda iê i mu kuata; u kuatela Jobe njinda, mukonda Jobe ua mu di fika ua beta kuiuka Nzambi ndenge." 
Job32:3 Njinda iê ue anga i mu kuata ku makamba a tatu a Jobe, kuma, sumbala a lémbua kia ku vutula, maji hanji elesa Jobe." 
Job32:4 Edihu-phe ua kinga Jobe nʼa dianga kuzuela, mbata Jobe ua kexi muadiakime, muene ndenge." 
Job32:5 Edihu kia mono kuila, mu kanu dia mala kitatu ió ki muala dingi kia kuvutula, njinda i mu kuata." 
Job32:6 Bhenhobho-phe, o Edihu, monʼa Balakiiele, mubuzita, u kuata kuzuela, uixi: Eme ngi monʼa ndenge, enu mu adiakime; nga kexile ni hele ni uôma ua ku mi tangela kixinganeku kiami," 
Job32:7 eme ngixi: O izuua i zuele, ndumba dia mivu i longe o kuijiia." 
Job32:8 Ni kidi muene, moxi dia muthu muala nzumbi, o nzumbi ia Muteni-a-Ioso iene i mu bhangesa o kutongoloka ni kuijiia." 
Job32:9 O makota ki ene kiá ngó ejiia, mba a kuka ene kiá ngó a tena ku tongolola kima kioso kia iuka." 
Job32:10 O kiki-phe, ngi zuela muene, ngixi: Ngʼibhienu mátui, eme ue nda ngi mi tangele kixinganeku kiami." 
Job32:11 Talesenu, nga kexi mu ku kinga o izuelu ienu, nga bhana ue mátui ku ioso i mua tanga jinga, kioso ki mua kexe mu ku sota o kulúnga." 
Job32:12 O ki nga mi di suí, ki ngi mono muthu ua tena kutolola Jobe mba ku mu vutuila mu maba mê ma kulúnga." 
Job32:13 Phala ue ki mu di thathe, kuila: Tua sange unjimu, Nzambi ngó ua ki tena, ki muthu kana." 
Job32:14 Talenu-phe, kuila, muene ka ngi zuelesa kima, eme ue ki nga-nda ku mu vutuila ni izuelu ienu." 
Job32:15 Mua kakuka-ze! mua lémbua kiá kuvutula, o ia kuzuela ki muala na-iu dingi!" 
Job32:16 Nga kinga muene, maji ki mua tena kuzuela; mua lémbua muene; o kuvutula dingi mua ki tokoka." 
Job32:17 Eme ue, ku mbandu iami, nga-nda kuvutula; nga-nda kutanga ue i nga xinganeka." 
Job32:18 Kuma ngala ni ia vulu ia kuzuela, nzumbi iami ia ngi sakalala phala ku i tanga." 
Job32:19 Mu mala mua ngi nane kala vinhu ia ubhe ia kambe kididi bhu tundila o mulenge, mukuâ ni itabhu ia ubhe ia-nda baza!" 
Job32:20 Ngʼehedienu-phe ngi zuele, nda ngi tululuke; nga-nda ku jikula mizumbu iami ni ngi vutula." 
Job32:21 Tamanu ki ngi bhange kathômbo kʼathu, mba ngi kala ni kubanza muthu." 
Job32:22 Mbata eme ki ngʼijidila ku di uabhesa; kuma se ki kiene, ió ua ngi bhanga ueje ku ngʼambata kindaúla." 
Job33:1 Eie-phe, Jobe, ívua maba mami, u bhane mátui ku maka mami moso." 
Job33:2 Kindala nga-nda kuzuela, dimi diami mu kanu diene dia mu zuela." 
Job33:3 Maba mami edikiza kuma muẋima uami ki uala ni ku di uabhesa, mizumbu iami izuela unjimu ua iuka." 
Job33:4 Nzumbi ia Nzambi iene ia ngi bhange; o mulenge ua Muteni-a-Ioso uene ua ngi bhana o muenhu. 
Job33:5 Se ua tena ngi kuatese makutu, tanga kiambote maba mé bhu pholo iami, nda u tukuluke." 
Job33:6 Tala, eme ue nga tundu kua Nzambi, kala eie; eme uami ue a ngʼumbu ni mavu." 
Job33:7 Mukonda dia kiki, ki ngi ku bhekela uoma, mba o lukuaku luami lu ku nemena ku thandu dié." 
Job33:8 O mu kidi kiene, eie ua zuelela mu mátui mami, eme ngevu dízui dia maka mé, uixi:" 
Job33:9 Eme nga zele, ki ngi moneka kikuma; nga iuka, ki ngene ni mulonga." 
Job33:10 Nzambi ua mu sota ngó bhua ku ngi kuatela, ua ngi kitula ngi nguma iê." 
Job33:11 U ngi ta inama iami bhu ditaka, o jinjila jami joso u ji tonginina." 
Job33:12 Tala-phe, mu kiki eme ngi ku vutuila, kuila: Ku tange kidi; kuma Nzambi uala kota muthu ndenge." 
Job33:13 Phalaʼhi u zoka ni muene, ni kuila uixi ioso i ngi bhanga ka-nda ku ngʼibhula kima?" 
Job33:14 Kana-phe, kiókio ki kiene. Nzambi u zuela lumoxi mba luiadi, maji kana-ku muthu u ki suua." 
Job33:15 O mu nzoji mba mu kisukila kia usuku, kioso kiza o mutouala-kilu ku thandu diʼathu, kuila a zeka bhu hama," 
Job33:16 muene-phe u jikula o mátui ma athu, anga ioso ia a longa u i jika kidimbu." 
Job33:17 Phala muthu u mu katula ku ioso ia sola kubhanga, ni ku mu bhulula ku ima ia ku di zangeleka," 
Job33:18 phala kuebhesa o nzumbi iê ku dikungu, ni muenhu uê ki u bhite ku xibhata." 
Job33:19 A mu bazela ue bhu hama iê ni misusu, ni mu ifuba iê mu kuate kuzoka sé kunhoha." 
Job33:20 Katé ni muenhu uê ki uandala kúdia, o muẋima uê kúdia muene kua touala, ka kuandala dingi, kana." 
Job33:21 O xitu iê iia muene ni kujikinina ku mesuʼê a kumona; o ifuba iê ia di suekele, iene ioso kindala ia tukuluka." 
Job33:22 O nzumbi iê iia ni kululama ku dikungu, o muenhu uê uia ni ku suetuka ku akunji a kalunga-ngombe." 
Job33:23 Maji se muene u kala ni anju iia ni kudionda, ia di bhange umoxi ku jimidi, phala kuambela muthu kioso kia fuama o kuiuka," 
Job33:24 kuabhu-phe, Nzambi ua kà mu kuatela henda, hé ua kʼàmbela anju, uexi: Mu bhulule, phala ka kutuke mu kina; nga sange kiá u mu kùla." 
Job33:25 Bheneʼobho-phe o xitu jê ji beta dingi kubuingita, anga ji somboka muene kia kexi mu nguzu ia undenge; muene anga u vutukila dingi mu izuua ia unzangala uê." 
Job33:26 Ni kidi kioso, muene ua kà sambela Nzambi mu kudionda o kiadi kiê, muene hé ua kà mu kuatela henda; pholo ia Nzambi ua kà i mona ni kutana, muthu hé a kà mu vutuila dingi o kulúnga kuê." 
Job33:27 Ua kà tala ku athu anga u zuela, uixi: Nga te kituxi, o kuiuka nga ku tondala, o kuene ki ngi katula-ku ngó kima, o Nzambi ue ka ngi vutuila kia fuama o ikuma iami." 
Job33:28 Maji o Nzambi ua bhulula o muenhu uami kuia mu kina; o muenhu uami iu ua vutuka mu kumona dingi o mukengeji. 
Job33:29 Tala-ze, iene ioso iii, kikalakalu kia Nzambi muene ku muthu, mu luiadi ni lutatu," 
Job33:30 Phala kuzaúla o muenhu uê mu diela, ni ku mu muikina ni mukengeji ua athu ala ku muenhu." 
Job33:31 Ividila-phe, eie Jobe, ngʼivue muene; dixibhe kuma eme nga-nda kuzuela muene." 
Job33:32 Maji se uala ni maka a kuzuela, ngi vutuile; zuela mukonda ngandala ku ku lungisa." 
Job33:33 Maji se kana, ngʼivue-phe; eie, dixibhe muene, eme ngi ku longe unjimu." 
Job34:1 Edihu anga u zuela dingi, uixi:" 
Job34:2 Enu muejiia, ivuenu ulungilu uami; enu mua tongoloka, bhanenu mátui kokuami." 
Job34:3 Mbata dítui di lola o maka, mukua ni dimi ki di lola o kúdia." 
Job34:4 O kioso kia iuka tu sote ku ki tungula phala etu; o mu kaẋi ketu tu tongolole kioso kia uabha-mu. 
Job34:5 Mukonda Jobe uambe, uexi: Ngi muthu ua iuka, maji o Nzambi kulúnga kuami kuoso kua ngi fuama ua ngi katula-ku." 
Job34:6 Sumbala nga lunguʼami, a ngi kiti ngi mukua makutu; fidila iami ia kituka mukôngo, ki i ẋikina dingi ku i saka; o kituxi ki nga te ki ki moneka." 
Job34:7 Muthu nanhi u soka ni Jobe, o kutobhesa u ku nua kala menha?" 
Job34:8 Hé uenda mu kizomba kia iá a bhanga kia ibha, anga uendela njila imoxi ni isuéia?" 
Job34:9 Kuma uambe, uixi: Mu ku di tuma ni Nzambi, muthu ka katula-mu kima." 
Job34:10 Mu kienhiki-phe, enu mu athu, mu jinjimu, ngʼivienu: Lu ku suke, eie Jobe! kuma Nzambi ka tena kubhanga kia ibha! o Muteni-a-Ioso ka tena kubhanga mangonha!" 
Job34:11 Mbata o muthu ua kà mu vutuila kia fuama mu imbamba iê ia bhanga jinga; u bhangesa muene kuila muthu ni muthu u tambula kia fuama o njila iê. 
Job34:12 Kidi muene, Nzambi kene mu ku bhanga usuéia, mba Muteni-a-Ioso u bhanga mangonha mu ku fundisa." 
Job34:13 Nanhi ua mu bhana o kutumina ngongo? Ima ioso ia moneka ku mesu ni iii ki i moneka, nanhi ua i te mu ididi iê?" 
Job34:14 Se Nzambi ua tele muẋima uê mu kubhanga phulu ku muthu, mba ua kexi mu ku di xinganekʼé ngó muene, anga o nzumbi iê ni mulenge uê u di bhongoluela na-u ngoho muene," 
Job34:15 xitu ioso ieje kúfua, muthu-phe ueje ku vutukila ku fufutila." 
Job34:16 Eie Jobe se moxi dié muala kutongoloka, kiki-phe ivua-kiu; bheteka mátui ku mbimbi ia kizuelu kiami." 
Job34:17 Mbé, muthu ua zembe o kidi, u tena kutumina? Eie anga uandala kubelesa ió uala ni kuiuka ni kutena?" 
Job34:18 Mbé sobha ene ku muʼila: Xé! Muthu ua ibha? Mba o ilamba a i tanga, kuila: Enu! Isuéia?" 
Job34:19 Kuambe dingi ió kene ni kubhanga katungu ka uthu ua ilamba, mba mvuama u beta ku mu bhana ujitu, o jingadiama nʼa kala ndenge; kuma enʼoso kikalakalu kia maku mê." 
Job34:20 Ene muʼanzanzʼumu a fua. Ku tula muʼaxaxe ka usuku, madiembu a ma tungutisa, anga a bhita; o iiala ia nguzu a a tolola kuala nguzu ia kambe kumoneka ku mesu." 
Job34:21 Mbata o mesu a Nzambi phe, a mu kengelela o njila ja muthu, hé a mona uendelu uê uoso." 
Job34:22 Kana-ku kitombe mba kizenji kia kalunga kia vundu kinéne mu suama iá oso a bhanga kia ibha. 
Job34:23 Mbata o Nzambi ka bhindamena kithangana kia vulu ni kutala o muthu, phala ku mu bheka bhu pholo iê mu ku mu fundisa." 
Job34:24 O Mazonda u a jimisa, sé ku a tokuesa, o bhu ididi iâ hé u ta-bhu athu engi." 
Job34:25 Mukonda muene uejiia o ibhangelu iâ; o mu usuku, u a tandanganhesa anga a iokojoka." 
Job34:26 Mukonda dia kukala isuéia, Nzambi u a betela muene bhu pholo ia oso ala ku a mona." 
Job34:27 Mbata muene a mu xisa, o njila jê a lémbua ku jiʼjiia, né imoxi ngó." 
Job34:28 Mu kubhanga kiki, a bhangesa o kudikola kua ngadiama kubanda katé kua Nzambi, muene iú uevu o kuditenda kua phulungu." 
Job34:29 Muene se nʼa bhana kutululuka, nanhi ua-nda ku mu elesa? Se o pholo iê u i sueka, nanhi u tena ku mu tala? Muene ulangidila o miji ni diembu katé ni muthu umoxi ngó." 
Job34:30 Phala o muthu uala ni mangonha, ki mungu dingi a kala mu kutumina; mbé o mundu ki u kale mu iluezu." 
Job34:31 Kuma, ni kidi kiene, se bhu kala muthu uambela Nzambi, kuma: Nga tale hadi, nguami dingi ku ta kituxi," 
Job34:32 Kioso ki nga lémbua kumona, ngi longese-kiu eie; se nga bhange mangonha, nuka dingi ngi tona ku ki bhanga," 
Job34:33 mbé muene ua-nda ku ku futa kala ki ua mesena eie, mba kiokio ku ki mesena? Mbebhu muene ua-nda ku kuambela, uixi: Solʼé é-muène, eme kʼeme ngi ku solela? tanga ki uejiia, zuela!" 
Job34:34 Athu oso ala ni kilunji a-nda kuzuela kumoxi ni eme, ni njimu uoso ua mu ngʼivua, kuila:" 
Job34:35 Jobe ua didi kuzuela, ka zuela ni kilunji; ku maka mê ki kuala kuijiia." 
Job34:36 Aiué, Tatʼetuʼé! Tamanu o Jobe a mu lolele katé ku dizubhilu, mukonda muene ua vutula kala muthu ua ibha." 
Job34:37 Kuma ku kituxi kiê ua bandekesa-ku kubhukumuka; u beta jimbanda muʼaxaxi kʼetu, ni kusebulula, maka mê u ma vudisa mu ku bilukila Nzambi." 
Job35:1 Edihu anga u zuela dingi, uixi:" 
Job35:2 Eie ua ki mono kia ku fuama eie kuzuela, uixi: Kuiuka kuami kuala kota, o kua Nzambi ndenge?" 
Job35:3 Mbata eie uambe, uixi: Ku kuiuka kua ngi kala kima kiahi? Kima kiahi ki ngi katula-ku, kia beta kota, o ku kituxi kiami ni ku kala ndenge?" 
Job35:4 Eme-phe nga-nda ku ku vutuila, ni eie ni makamba mé kumoxi." 
Job35:5 Tala ku diulu, u mone; tongolola o matuta a di leka kinéne, a beta ku di leka eie ndenge." 
Job35:6 Eie se u ta kituxi, diulu ua di bhange phulu iahi? Se ikuma ié i sokoloka, ua-nda ku di bhanga kiê?" 
Job35:7 Se eie uala u muthu ua iuka, diene u di bhanaʼhi? Mba-phe bhu maku mé, o muene u tambula-bhuʼohi?" 
Job35:8 O kikexilu kié kia ku kamba henda ki tena ngó ku bhanga kia ibha ku muthu ni mukuenu kala eie; o kuiuka kué kuzediuisa ngó monʼa muthu. 
Job35:9 Mukonda dia ku a bhondeleka kiavulu, athu a di kola, a di kola mu kusota uoso u a kudila bhu lukuaku lua enʼió ala ni kutena." 
Job35:10 Maji ki bhuala ngó muthu, uila: Nzambi uala kuebhi ua ngi bhange, u bhuselela mimbu ia diximanu usuku uoso," 
Job35:11 u beta ku tu longa ni tuijiie, iama ia bhoxi ndenge; hé u tuʼijidisa kia vulu, jinjila ji bhita bhulu ndenge?" 
Job35:12 A di kola, muene-phe kʼetaia, mukonda dia ku di zangeleka kua athu a ibha." 
Job35:13 Kutanga o kidi, o kudikola kua hatu Nzambi ka kuivu, mba Muteni-a-Ioso utala kua ene." 
Job35:14 Né-mbe eie uila, uixi: Ki ngala ku mu mona, hanji-phe, mulonga ué uala bhu pholo iê muène; uila kiki, kinga kua muene." 
Job35:15 Maji kuma Nzambi mu njinda iê kindala ka mu bhana luua kaxtiku mba u suua kiavulu ikuma ia muthu," 
Job35:16 uila kiki-phe o Jobe ua bhane mu kanu diê ni kuzuela ngó ndumba dia maka kʼate kima, a muthu ua kamba o kuijiia." 
Job36:1 Edihu u kuata dingi kuzuela, uixi:" 
Job36:2 Kinga dingi bhuʼòfele, nda ngi ku londekese, kuila, sai-ku hanji maba ma kulungisa Nzambi." 
Job36:3 Tundé ku makanga ngi kiʼamba dingi lua mukuá, kuila, o Ió ua ngi bhanga kène ni mangonha." 
Job36:4 Mbata mu ku tanga kidi, o maka mami u nga mu zuela ki a makutu, kana; kuma iú uala ni eie, muthu ua kidi mu kuzuela kuê." 
Job36:5 Tala-ze! Sumbala o Nzambi ua kulu kinéne, maji muene ka texi muthu, kuma muene ukôla mu ku tetuluka kua muxima uê." 
Job36:6 Muenhu ua kisuéia ka uʼehela, maji u batula mu kidi milonga ia jiphulungu a tate." 
Job36:7 Ku athu a iuka muene ka katula-ku o mesu mê; maji u a xikika kumoxi ni jisobha ku kiandu, hé u a zangeleka ku mivu ni mivu ki iene kúbhua." 
Job36:8 Se a a kutu mu jingidinhá, anga a a kuika ni mikolo ia mukondo," 
Job36:9 muene-phe u a ejidisa imbamba iâ ioso ia bhange, ni ikuma iâ; kuma o mu ikuma iâ muene mua laiele jinga." 
Job36:10 U jikula ue o mátui mâ, phala ku a longa, hé u a tuma kudiela kituxi kiâ." 
Job36:11 O kia muʼivua hé a mu bhikila, o izuua iâ a kà i zubhila mu kuzediua, o mivu iâ ia kà bhua ni mbote." 
Job36:12 O kia kamba-phe ku muʼivua, a kà a bhitisa ku xibhata, hé a kà fua sé ku kʼijiia." 
Job36:13 Athu a ibha mixima, a di bhakela nzungule ia njinda ku thandu diâ; kia-nda kuila Nzambi ua a kutu mu jingidinhá, a lémbua kudikola phala ku a kudila." 
Job36:14 Kalunga ka a dia mu unzangala hanji, a fuila mu kaẋi ka jindumbu ja mala a bhanga o undumbu ni mala nʼakuá." 
Job36:15 O phulungu-phe ua tate, a mu bhuluila mu kutata kuê, o mu ku mu bhondeleka, muene mua mu jikuila o mátui." 
Job36:16 Kienhiki eie ue, ua mu sota ku ku katula bhu dikelengu dia mukondo phala ku ku bheka bhu kididi kia zanze, bhua kambe kima ki ku phopheka, o mákudia ku meza mé anga a kʼèzala ni maji." 
Job36:17 Maji eie-phe, ua dʼizalesa ni uanji ua muthu u bhanga phulu, mukonda dia kiki, o kufundisa ni mabatuilu ma kidi ma ku xikamena." 
Job36:18 Enda-phe ni ku di langa, njinda ki i ku bheke mu ku ẋongona, mba u tondala mukonda dia ku xinganeka kuila uala ni ima ia vulu i tena kuku kula." 
Job36:19 Eie ua fika kuma muene ua-nda kusuua kiavulu o umvuama ué, ni ku di hahula kuoso kua nguzu ié, anga ki fudisa o ku ku bhondeleka?" 
Job36:20 O usuku ku uinde ngó, kuma muene mua-ndu katula o ifuẋi bhu kididi kiâ." 
Job36:21 Di lange-phe, ku te muxima mu ku bhanga kia ibha; kuma o ku bhanga kia ibha, kota ua jijila o ku tala hadi." 
Job36:22 Tala-phe, Nzambi u diʼdikiza kuma muene munéne mu kutena kuê! Nanhi u longa kala muene?" 
Job36:23 Nanhi u tena ku muʼibhula ioso ia bhange muene mu njila iê, mba nanhi ua muʼedi kuma: Eie ua bhange kia ibha?" 
Job36:24 Ta-kiu ku muxima, o ku jingisa ikalakalu ia Nzambi ia di monekena ku athuʼoso." 
Job36:25 Athuʼoso a mu i mona; o muthu uimana dikanga ni ku i tongolola. 
Job36:26 Kidi bá! Nzambi ukôla! Tua lémbua ku mu tongolola: o izuua ia mivu iê, ki i ẋikina ku i tanga." 
Job36:27 Kuma, muene, o mabèbe a menha ua a sungila kokue, anga u bhangesa kuila ku mbundu iê kunoka mvula." 
Job36:28 Iene i lunduluka ku matuta, hé i buabumuka nzungule ia menha ku thandu dia muthu." 
Job36:29 Mbebhu muthu u tena kutongolola kioso kia mu futunuka matuta, ni inuminu ia balaka iê?" 
Job36:30 Talesa-ze, ku thandu diâ uzala-ku o mukengeji uê, hé o kalunga ka zongo u ka vungina." 
Job36:31 Kuma o mu ima ienhiʼi-phe, muene mua fundisila madiembu, hé u a bhana kúdia kuâ kua di xala." 
Job36:32 O mukengeji u u vungina ni maku mê hé u u fudisa kubhita mu ngenda ja milembu iê. 
Job36:33 Ió u tuʼijidisa o ixinganeku iê, kala o ibhaku ki i tongolola o kibhungu kiala mu kuiza." 
Job37:1 Ima ioso iii i teketesa ue muẋima uami, u tuka muene bhu kididi kiê." 
Job37:2 Bhanenu mátui ku kibazu kia nzaji ia Nzambi, kibazu ki tunda mu kanu diê." 
Job37:3 Muene u di kolela bhoxi dia diulu dioso, o nzaji iê i telaka katé kua suku oxi." 
Job37:4 Kienhokio-phe, i di kola ni dízui dia dikota, i numina ni dízui diê dia suina; o dízui diê kia-nda kuila a dʼivu kiá, ima iii muene ka nange na-iu dingi." 
Job37:5 Ni dízui diê, Nzambi u numina ni madiuanu; u bhanga ima ia isunji, i bhinga etu tu lémbua ku i tongolola ni ku ijiia." 
Job37:6 Mukonda muene uambela kikulakaji uixi: Nokena ku mavu; ni mvula ni kibhungu ua ambela: suinenu! 
Job37:7 Mu ku bhanga kiki, o maku a athu oso ua a kotola, a lémbua kukalakala, phala ende ni kuijiia o ikalakalu iê." 
Job37:8 O iama ioso i bokona mu jingenda jâ, anga i kala mu makungu mâ." 
Job37:9 O mu jihota ja sulu muene mu tunda kitembu kia kibhungu; o ku itembu ia thunda, kuene kuijiia o mbambi." 
Job37:10 Ku mulenge ua Nzambi, kuene kua bhela o mbambi ia kitenda-hole, o menha a zanze hé a di kuata matadi." 
Job37:11 O utalalu uê uavulu, uene uizalesa o matuta, o matuta anga aia ni kulalumuna jinzaji." 
Job37:12 Ene-phe kiá, kabasa kuoso kua a tumu kuia, a muanganena kuku ni kuku, phala kubhanga ioso ia a tumu ku mbandu joso ja ixi ia kutunga ni kusoma." 
Job37:13 Muene u bheka ngó ima ioso iii phala kubazela, kia fuama mu ngongo, mba phala kuia ngó ni kubhanga jihenda jê." 
Job37:14 Eie-phe Jobe, bheteka mátui mé ku ima iii, ximbakata, u tongolole madiuanu ma Nzambi." 
Job37:15 Manhi eie uejiia kioso Nzambi kia mu kalakala o madiuanu iâ? Ni muene kia bhangesa o nzaji ku telaka mu dituta diê? 
Job37:16 Mjimbu ia kioso kia mu kuimana matuta mu dimbinza, eie uala na-iu? Ni ia isunji ia Ió ua tenena mu kuijiia?" 
Job37:17 U bhangesa kuila izuatu ié-eie i tema kioso mungongo ki mu tululuka kiambote mukonda dia kitembu kia sulu? 
Job37:18 Inga eie ua di tele-nê kumoxi, muene kia zale o diulu dia kolo, diedi ngé kala lumuenu luʼo zunze?" 
Job37:19 Tu longe kioso ki tua-nda ku mu tangela mukonda etu a tu kondoloka ku kitombe, ki tuala ni kima kia mbote ki tu tena ku mu tangela." 
Job37:20 Sai muthu uia kua muene ni ku mu tangela i ngene mu zuela? Inga o kiki kieju kala kala kuinda kuila muthu a mu sana-sana? 
Job37:21 Tala-ze, o muthu ka tena ku tala ku dikumbi ki di benha ku diulu, kuila kitembu kia zelesa-ku kia bhiti kiá." 
Job37:22 O kubenha kua kidifua kia ulu kuijiia ku thunda, mukonda Nzambi a mu kondoloka kuala ulamba u kuata uoma." 
Job37:23 Kua Muteni-a-Ioso ki tu tena ku mu bhiẋila; muene ukôla mu kutena kuê, maji-phe, mu kufundisa, o kidi kene mu ku ki lungulula." 
Job37:24 Kiene athu kiene ku mu kuatela uoma; mukonda muene kene mu ku tala kua ió a di fika kuijiia mu miẋima iâ. 
Job38:1 Kia bhiti imʼiii, Nzambi u vutuila Jobe mu kitaphephe," 
Job38:2 Nanhi muenʼiú uala ku xikelesa ikutu iami ni kuzuela ngó maka ma uoua? 
Job38:3 Kindala-phe dikute kinhonga kiê, kuma u muthu, mbata eme nga-nda ku kuibhula, eie nda u ngi vutuile." 
Job38:4 Eie ua kexile kuebhi kioso eme ki nga te madisesa ma ixi? Ngi tangele-kiu hanji se eie uejiia muene. 
Job38:5 Nanhi ua i te mu izongelu iê, se eie ua kiʼ ijiia? Mba nanhi uoleka o ngoji ia kuzongela ku thandu dia oxi?" 
Job38:6 O ixikamenu iê ia tula kuebhi, mba nanhi ua i xikikila o ditadi dia thungi?" 
Job38:7 Kithangana kiebhi jithéthembua ja kimene ki ja kexile mu kuimbila kumoxi ni kusanguluka, o anʼa Nzambi oso anga a kala mu tana?" 
Job38:8 Mba nanhi ua jika musanza ua kalunga ni mabhitu, kioso ki ua subhaka iu ua tundu mu divumu." 
Job38:9 Kioso eme ki nga te o matuta ni a mu kale kizuatu, o kitombe ni ki kale thanga iê ia ku di kuta?" 
Job38:10 Kioso eme ki nga u xindila jimbambe, eme nga u te mabhitu ni jisabhi." 
Job38:11 Anga ngi uambela, ngixi: Ua-nda kuiza ndú bhabha, kutena dingi kuia ku pholo, o bhenhabha bhene bhua kà tolokela o nguzu ia mabhuku mé?" 
Job38:12 Manhi tunde eie kia kuvuala ki uandeka o izuua ié, kimene ua ki bhele kiá ngonge, mba ikiélua, eie ua ijidisa kididi kiê." 
Job38:13 Phala iene i naminine kua suku oxi, o mu ixi muene athu a ibha a a kukumune-mu?" 
Job38:14 Iene ioso i di bhanga kala mavu koxʼa kidimbu, anga i di monekena kala kizuatu." 
Job38:15 O mukengeji uê, u ila kuengi, ku akuetuxi a u katula-ku, o lukuaku lu zangumukina ku kuama, lu bukuka." 
Job38:16 Manhi eie ua bokona kiá katé bhu otho ia musanza ua kalunga, inga uende kiá mu ididi ia zongo kinéne ia mukiukuluku?" 
Job38:17 Manhi o mabhitu a kúfua eie a ku tukuluila-u kiá, inga eie ua mono kiá o mabhitu ma kitombe kia kalunga?" 
Job38:18 O kuzanza kua ixi ioso eie ua kuijiia muene kiambote? Ngambele na-kiu hanji, se ima ioso iii eie ua ijiia." 
Job38:19 O njila iala kuebhi, iia kuà tunga o mukengeji? O ki tu lungulukila ku kitombe, o kididi kiê kiène kuebhi?" 
Job38:20 Eie phala u a bheke mu jimbambe jâ ni kutongolola jinjila jiia kʼonzo iâ? 
Job38:21 Eie o ku tanga o kidi ua kʼijiia muene, mukonda mu kithanganʼokio eie a ku vuala kiá, ni mukonda ue o dialuilu dia izuua ié-eie dia vulu muene!" 
Job38:22 Mbebhu eie ua bokuene kiá mu mabhakelu ma kikulakaji eie ua mono o umvuama ua matadi a mvula," 
Job38:23 U nga kondeka katé bhu kithangana kia mukondo, ni bhu kizuua kia kubhânga ni kúlua ita?" 
Job38:24 O njila iala kuebhi iia kuene mu kutunda o mukengeji u di muanga, o kitémbue kia mutundila-kumbi anga ki di uanena mu ngongo?" 
Job38:25 Nanhi muene ua bhange o mikunguiji ia mvuila ia kibhungu, mba o njila ia itèlu-tèlu ia inuminu ia nzaji," 
Job38:26 Phala i bhangese kunoka mu ngongo, bhuoso bhua kambe o muthu, ni mu kikangalakata ki mu moneka athu." 
Job38:27 Nda ixi ia kikangalakata ni kibuika i nue menha, o tu isasa tua nzeta ni tuende ni ku kula." 
Job38:28 Mbé o mvula iala ue ni tata? Inga nanhi ua mu vuala o mabebe ma dimume? 
Job38:29 O menha kia di kuata matadi, a mu tunda mu vumu dia nanhi? O kikulakaji kia diulu nanhi ua mu ki vuala?" 
Job38:30 O menha a kola muene ngé kala ditadi, o ku thandu dia ididi ia zongo anga ku di kuata." 
Job38:31 Inga eie u tena ku kuika o malubhambu a jithéthembua ja Ndumbe ia Ngombe mba ku jituna mikolo ia jithéthembua ja Udiiono? 
Job38:32 Mba eie u tena kubhanga o mabhongolokelu a jithéthembua ja Zodíiaku bhu ithangana iê, mba kuendesa o jithéthembua ja Kitôto ni anʼê?" 
Job38:33 Eie uejiia ilèkelelu ia diulu ni kutanga utuminu uê ku thanduʼaʼxi? 
Job38:34 Mba eie u tena kuzangumuna o mbimbi ié katé ku matuta phala o ndumba ia menha ni i ku vungina? 
Job38:35 Inga uambela o jinzaji kuila tunde-nu, o jene ni ji kutangela kuila: Etʼú, bhabhʼú?" 
Job38:36 Nanhi uate o kuijiia koxi dia muẋima ua muthu, mba nanhi ua tena kubhana kilunji ni kutongoloka ku muthu?" 
Job38:37 Nanhi muene, ni unjimu uê, u tena kualula o matuta? O itabhu ia diulu, nanhi u tena ku i lundulula?" 
Job38:38 Phala o fufutila i kituke dikènde dia kolo, o ibumu ia di kexidila ni i di naminine kumoxi mudiâ." 
Job38:39 Eie o hoji ia mukaji u tena ku i tela unhanga? Mba o nzala ia tuana tua jihoji eie u tena ku i fuisa," 
Job38:40 Kioso ene kia butama mu mauína mâ, anga a kala mu zonguela mu makungu?" 
Job38:41 Nanhi mukua ku iudikila o ilombelombe kúdia kuâ, kioso tuana tuâ ki tu di kola kua Nzambi, anga tuia ni kunhungana mukonda dia ku kamba kia kúdia?" 
Job39:1 Jihoha, thembu ia mu kala ni tuana, eie ua ijiia, inga eie ua mu langa jimbambi kioso ki ji teta tuana tuâ?" 
Job39:2 Jimbeji jâ ja kuimita, eie u tena ku jiʼalula? Inga uejiia kithangana kia ku teta?" 
Job39:3 Jene ji kotama phala kuteta tuana tuâ, anga ji di sanza ku misusu iâ." 
Job39:4 Tuana tuâ u sanga tua nete, tu kudilʼé ngó mu mukáu ua hatu, tu tunda, ki tu tena ku vutukila dingi mu mavumu mâ." 
Job39:5 Nanhi uʼehelela mikete ku mukáu, mba nanhi ua jituna mikolo ia bulu ienda ni lusolo," 
Job39:6 iene nga i bhana inzu iê, o mikáu ia kambe athu, o mu ixi ia môngua, muene mu mabhata mê." 
Job39:7 Muene uolela kiʼevua kulunguta kua mbanza ionéne, o kudikola-kola kuavulu kua muendexiʼa ibhaku, muene ka ku ivu." 
Job39:8 O milundu iene ididi iê ia kudila o sabhelela, anga uenda ni kusota ima ioso iala uisu." 
Job39:9 O kuila o kaluimba u mesena ku ku xibhidila? Inga mʼusuku uiza mu kuzeka mu kibhanga kié? 
Job39:10 Manhi u tena ku mu kuikila ku mubhanga ni mikolo? Mba u kaiela kuema dié ni ku ku sesumuina mavu a kudima mu ikhobo? 
Job39:11 Inga u mu dielela muene mukonda dia nguzu iê ia vulu? Mba ikalakalu ié-eie u muʼehela-iu muene ku i bhanga kia tokala? 
Job39:12 Inga u mu bhangesa kuila imbamba i ua kunu u ku bhekela na-iu mʼonzo, ni ku i bhongoluela muene bhu kienda kia ku vundila?" 
Job39:13 O kihendembumba u bhuka mabhabha mê ni kusanguluka; muene uala ni mabhabha ni jisala ja dibânda. 
Job39:14 Muene maiaki mê u ma xá mu mavu, anga u ma temesa mu fufutila." 
Job39:15 Anga u katula-ku o muẋima, ua kuila bhu kala kinama ki ma diata, mba iama ia mukáu i tena ku ma titidila." 
Job39:16 Anʼê u a sasa kia ibha kala ki anʼê; sumbala o kikalakalu kiê ki di bota, maji ua tululukê muene kiambote." 
Job39:17 Mbata Nzambi o kuijiia ua muʼimina-ku, ka mu bhana kitongoluelu." 
Job39:18 Maji kia-nda kuila nhanhá, mu kulenga, né kabalu mba uoso ua mondala-ku, muene ua olela." 
Job39:19 Eie o kabalu u ka bhana nguzu, mba u kʼezalesa o xingu ni jindemba?" 
Job39:20 Mbé u ka bhangesa kutuka kala kihoho? Mazulu mê mu ku bhuima kala túbhia, ka kuata uoma!" 
Job39:21 Ikoto iê i kanda-kanda bhoxi mu dikôlo, utana mu nguzu iê, anga u tunda mu ku di bonga ni iá a di zakela ibhakatu ia ita." 
Job39:22 Uoma kene na-u mba kusasumuka; ka vutuka-phe ku dima mukonda dia kulenga xibhata. 
Job39:23 Mu ku mu kondela muene, o kizu ki di kola-kola, o utadi ua felu ia sosa ni musongo, u lekujuka." 
Job39:24 Ni ku di sakesa ni ku di kukumuna, iu uia ni ku kanda makungu ni ikoto iê, dízui dia koloneta ka di suu," 
Job39:25 Ithangana ioso ki xika koloneta muene uila: Ndokuenu! O ita u i nuha dikanga, ni kulunguta kua ilamba, ni nzôngo ia ku di kola." 
Job39:26 O kuila kahaúla ka mu tuka bhulu mukonda dia kilunji kie-èie, kioso ki ka-nda kuoleka mabhabha ka lungu ku sulu?" 
Job39:27 Inga eie ua mu tumina holokoko phala ni i di leka ni ku ta kikalanga kiê bhu ditala dia lebha? 
Job39:28 Holokoko ua tunga ku matadi a lebha, kuenhoko kuene kua bhange dibhata diê, bhu dizokozoko dia ditadi, bhu kididi kia kondama" 
Job39:29 Bheneʼobho bhene bhua muena o mbole iê; o mesu mê a i muena dikanga. 
Job39:30 Anʼê a xibha manhinga, o bhuoso bhuala imbi, muene ka kambe-bhu." 
Job40:1 Ngana anga uambela dingi Jobe mu kitaphephe muenhomo, kuila:" 
Job40:2 Manhi o kuzoka mu ku bilukila Muteni-a-Ioso, kuene o kulonga? Uoso u tembula Nzambi mu kienʼiki, a vutule hanji ku ima ienʼiii." 
Job40:3 Jobe-phe anga u vutuila Ngana, uixi:" 
Job40:4 Ngana, eme nga bolo; ngi ku vutuila kima kiahi? Ku dikanu diami ngi ta-ku o lukuaku luami." 
Job40:5 Nga zuela lumoxi, ki nga-nda ku vutula dingi, mba-phe luiadi, kuabhu muene, ki nga-nda kuia dingi ku pholo." 
Job40:6 Bheneʼobho, Jihova mu kaẋi ka kitaphephe uvutuila Jobe, uixi:" 
Job40:7 Kindala di kute bhu kinhonga kala u dikuenze; eme nga-nda ku kuibhula, eie nda u ngi vutuile." 
Job40:8 Ni kidi kiene, eie kufundisa kuami ua-ndu ku kitula kingoho, mba u ngi belesa eme, eie ni u di lungise?" 
Job40:9 Inga uala ni lukuaku kala Nzambi, mba u tena ue o ku numina ni dízui kala o diê-muène?" 
Job40:10 Di kembese-phe ni matunda ni unéne; di zuike ungana ni fuma. 
Job40:11 Lundulula o jingiji ja njinda ié, u talese uoso ua di zangeleka nda u mu tululule." 
Job40:12 Tonginina oso a di zangeleka, eie u a bhane kusebuluka, akua phulu diota na-u ku thandu bhu kididi kiâ." 
Job40:13 A vungine eneʼoso kumoxi mu fufutila, o pholo iâ jikila-iu mu kididi kia di seuka." 
Job40:14 Bheneʼobho-phe kiá, eme ue ngi ki tanga ku mbandu ié kuila o lukuaku lué-eie lua kadilu, lu ku bhana kikóue kia kutolola." 
Job40:15 Kindala-phe tongolola o nguvu, i nga bhange kumoxi nʼeie, u sanga ídia iangu kala ngombe." 
Job40:16 Tala-phe, nguzu iê-muène ia mu kala mu malombo, o kusuina kua kutena kuê, kua mu kala mu misuinnhi ia divumu." 
Job40:17 Hé uandala, mukila uê u u kolesa kala muxi ua musédulo; o mixibha ia matabela mê, ia di nhonga-nhonga." 
Job40:18 O ifuba iê kala malumbungu ma ngôndo, o kitánda kia ifuba iê ioso kila kala mixi ia felu." 
Job40:19 Maji muene-phe, uala ngó matunda a kikalakalu kia ibhangelu ia Nzambi; uoso ua mu bhange, ua mu manekesa ue ni xibhata." 
Job40:20 Kidi muene, o milundu i mu bhana kia kúdia; ku milundu kuene ku sangulukila o jixitu joso mu iangu." 
Job40:21 Muene-phe u zeka mʼoxi a isasa ia vundu, u suama mu madianga ni mu malôua." 
Job40:22 O miẋi ia vundu i mu vungina ni kilembeketa kiâ; o isasa ia misalakelu ia ngiji ia mu kondoloka. 
Job40:23 Se o ngiji i di bhanga masenza, o muene ki ki mu kuatela kima; u tululukʼé muene kiambote, né-mbe o ngiji ia Njolodá i subhaka katé ku dikanu diê." 
Job40:24 Mbé sai-ku muthu u tena ku i kuata, kuila iene ia tono ni kutala, mba ku i ta mukolo mu mazulu?" 
Job41:1 Eie u tena ku kuata o ngandu ku nzolo, mba ku muʼoleka dimi ni mukolo?" 
Job41:2 U tena ku mu ta mukolo mu mazulu, mba ku mu kubula jinganzuánzua ni muinha?" 
Job41:3 Manhi muene ua-nda kudionda kiavulu? Mba u ku zuelesa ni kilendu kioso? 
Job41:4 Muenʼió eie u ta-nê kikutu? Inga u mu bhanga mubhikʼé u xalelà-ku? 
Job41:5 Ua-nda tonoka-nê kala kanjila, inga ua-ndu mu ta bhu mukolo nda u mu bhane ku tuana tué tua ahatu, tu tonoke-nê?" 
Job41:6 Akuenu mu kisangela kié a ta-nê uenji? Inga a mu uanena ku abadi akua kusumbisa? 
Job41:7 U tena ku muʼizalesa kikonda ni jinzolo, mba u muʼizalesa mútue ni matôma ma akua kutamba?" 
Job41:8 Kuaku lué, mu tule na-iu ku thandu, ki u lembalala o mvunda i ua bhiti na-iu, nuka dingi u ki fikisa!" 
Job41:9 Athu ene mu ku di metena mu ku dielela kuâ; mbé muthu i kamba ku mu bha kibhalu mu ku i mona ngó? 
Job41:10 Kana-ku muthu ua di kake u fikisa ku i tonesa. Nanhi-phe muenʼió u tena kuzangumuka bhu pholo iami? 
Job41:11 Nanhi ua dianga ku ngi bhana, phala eme ni ngi mu vutuile? Mbata o ima iene ioso iala bhoxi dia maúlu, iami eme-muène." 
Job41:12 Ki nga-ndu di xibha ku mbandu ia idiandu iê, mba ku nguzu iê ia vulu, ni kikexilu kiê kia mu bhange na-kiu." 
Job41:13 Nanhi u tena kujikula izuatu ia malombo mê? Nanhi u tena ku bokuena bhu jinganzuánzua jê ja di bunjika. 
Job41:14 Mabhitu ma dikanu diê nanhi u tena ku ma jikula? Mukonda uoma uala ku mazu mê ma kondoloka. 
Job41:15 O mikalatata ia ibalabala iê, iene o ku di zangeleka kuê; iene ia di jondo kiambote mu kimoxi-kimoxi kala a i te ni Selu." 
Job41:16 I di toteka muene kumoxi, bhu kaẋi kâ né mulenge ki u tena kubhita." 
Job41:17 I di naminina kumoxi anga i di kuatenena muene, ki i ẋikina ku i muangununa." 
Job41:18 O ki i ta ngexexe imoxi, ku di muika mukengeji; o mesu mê mʼela saxi! saxi! kala ibhebhetela ia ukielu ua kimene." 
Job41:19 Mu kanu diê mu tunda sama ja túbhia; muia ni kuila jisoso manu-manu. 
Job41:20 Mu mazuluʼê muia ni kufuafua dixi, kala dia ímbia ia mu fuluka bhu jiku, mba kitumba kia uama." 
Job41:21 O muha ua dikanu diê, u tena ku uika makala; o mu kanu diê mu tunda mulengu." 
Job41:22 Mu xingu iê muene mua tunga o nguzu; ku mu tukulukila, ni dilamba di lenga" 
Job41:23 O idiandu ia mukutu uê, ia di naminina kiambote kumoxi; o misuinhi ia jixitu jê iene ioso momuê ia di fikidila, ki bhuala musuinhi u zamba." 
Job41:24 O muẋima uê ua kolo kala ditadi, ua kolo muene kala o ditadi dia kuhuhila di kala kʼoxi." 
Job41:25 Muene se u fundumuka, ni mazonda a teketa; se u zabuka, eneʼoso ela kala a juuala." 
Job41:26 Se bhu kala muthu u mu vunda xibhata ku thandu, ki i bokona; né ngumba mba ditoma mba musongo." 
Job41:27 Kua muene, felu i di bhanga kala kiangu; o ngòndo i di bhanga mukua ni muxi ua bolo." 
Job41:28 O musongo ua mufula muene ka u lenge; o matadi a ku takula ni mbala-fundu, kua muene a kituka kala mafe." 
Job41:29 Se a mu takula jimbangala, kua muene jʼila kala iangu ia hatu; se a mu zengela ngumba, ki mu bhangesa kuolela." 
Job41:30 Kʼoxiʼa divumu diê, kuala ibheletete iedi kala jisongo; muene u di zala ku thandu dia jisongo kala uala mu malôua." 
Job41:31 O ididi ia zongo muene u i bhangesa kufulujuka kala kiene kufulujuka ímbia iala bhu jiku; o musanza ua kalunga u u kitula mukua ni kiene kufulujuka o unguendu. 
Job41:32 Mua bhiti muene mu xala hoka ia mukengeji u di muika; o mua zongo mu zela ni muene, phé, kala jimvi." 
Job41:33 Mungongo ki muala kima kia ku mu sokesa na-kiu, kuma kioso kia mu iudika, ka mu bhange phala ku kala ni uoma." 
Job41:34 Kima né kia lebha, muene u ki tala ni usudi; muene Sobha ia iama ioso ia di zangeleka." 
Job42:1 Bheneʼobho Jobe u vutuila Jihova, uixi:" 
Job42:2 Nga kʼijiia muene kiambote kuila, eie ioso ua soko na-iu; ki bhuala kima ki u xinganeka kubhanga anga a ku lembuesa na-kiu." 
Job42:3 Kala ki uambe, uixi: nanhi muenhó ni ku kamba kuijiia, u tena kusueka o kikutu? Kidi, muene, nga didi ngó ku zuela; nga zuela ima ia ngi tundu, ia madiuanu, ima eme ki nga ijidile." 
Job42:4 Eie uambe uixi: Ngʼivue, nga-nda kuzuela; eme nga-nduʼkuibhula, eie nda u ngi longe." 
Job42:5 Ngana, ki nga kuijidile kiambote, nga kuívua jinga ngó ni mátui mami; maji o kiki, mesuʼami ala ku ku mona." 
Job42:6 Kienʼiki kia ngi bhekesa ku di kuma eme-muène; nga diela muene, nga dimbuluka mu fufuta ni uthôkua." 
Job42:7 Anga ki bhita kuila o Ngana kia zubha kuzuela maka iá kua Jobe, uambela ue Ilifaji, mukua Temane, kuila: Nga ku kuatela ue njinda ni eie ni makaba mé kiiadi; mukonda ima i mua zuela kokuʼami ki i iuka, kala kia mubhikʼami Jobe." 
Job42:8 Kuatenu-phe, sambuadi dia tuana tua ngombe ni sambuadi dia ilumbe ia jimbudi, muie kua mubhikʼami Jobe, mua kà di bhele jisata. Mubhikʼami Jobe muene ua kà mi sambela; mukonda nga-nda kuẋikina kudionda kuê, phala eme ki ngi mi bhange kala kia fuama mu ulaji uenu. Mbata enu ku mu ngi zuela kioso kia iuka, kiókio kia fuama, kala o mubhikʼami Jobe." 
Job42:9 Anga aia, ni Ilifaji, mukua Temane, ni Bidade, musuuíta, ni Zofale, mukua Nahama, anga a bhanga kala kia a lekelela Ngana; Nzambi anga uívua musambu ua Jobe." 
Job42:10 Jihova anga u lungulula kikexilu kia Jobe, kioso muene kia mu sambela hanji o makamba mê; Ngana anga u mu bhana mu luiadi ima ioso ia kexile na-iu kiá ku diamtekenu." 
Job42:11 Bheneʼobho-phe kiá, phange jê joso ja mala ni ja ahetu, jiza anga ji mu bhongolokela, ni oso kiá a diʼjidile-nâ mʼukulu, anga a dia-nê mbolo mʼonzo iê, anga a mu kala ni henda, hé a mu konda malamba ma ima ioso ia ibha ia mu tumikixine Ngana; eneʼoso ela, iú ua mu bhana kitadi ni nela ia ulu, iú ua mu bhana kitadi ni nela ia ulu." 
Job42:12 Kienhiki, Ngana ua beta kuzediuisa kikexilu kia Jobe kia sukidila, o kia dianga ndenge; mukonda ua kexile ni kuinhi dia midi ni kiuana ia jimbudi, ni midi jisamanu ja jikamelu, ni midi ia makaza a jingombe, ni midi ia jibulu ja akaji." 
Job42:13 Ana ue ua kexile ni a mukuá dingi, sambuadi dia mala ni ahatu kitatu." 
Job42:14 Mona ua dianga ua muhatu ua mu luku dijina uixi, Jemima, ua kaiadi, uixi Kasiia, o ua mukuá, uixi, Kele-Hapuke." 
Job42:15 O mu ixi ioso muenhomo ki mu monekene dingi ahetu a beta kuuabha kala anʼa Jobe. Tatʼâ anga u a bhana undundu muʼaxaxe ka phange jâ ja mala. 
Job42:16 Kia bhiti imʼiii, Jobe anga u kola muenhu mu hama ia mivu ni makuinhi a uana; anga anʼê u a mona ku mesu ni anʼa anʼê, katé ku muiji ua kauana." 
Job42:17 Jobe-phe kioso kiá kia fu, ua kuka ua kikidila, izuua ia mu kumu." 
Psalms1:1 Ua zediua o muthu ió ka ẋikina kuenda mu phangu ia iiala ia bhumu, kemana mu njila ia akua ituxi, ka xikama bhu nangu dia jisemenhi." 
Psalms1:2 Muene-phe o ngalasa iê u i sanga mu ngonge ia Jihova; o ngonge iê iene ia banza mu muanha ni mu usuku. 
Psalms1:3 Muthu ió u kala mukuâ ni muxi uòphaphe bhu mbanduʼa honga ia menha, uenda ni kulukula jinga ibundu bhu thembu iê, o difue diê ki di lela ni di laúka; o kioso kia bhanga, ki tunda ni kubhanduluka." 
Psalms1:4 Ió abhumu-phe ki kiene; maji a soka ni ibhiate i phephuluka ni kitembue. 
Psalms1:5 Kala kiki, ió abhumu kà tena kuimana ku mulonga, mba akua ituxi mu kionge kia athu aiuka;" 
Psalms1:6 kuma Jihova uejiia njila ia athu aiuka; njila-phe ia athu abhumu ia kutexika. 
Psalms2:1 Phala-hi matumbu a salumuka kiki, madiembu ma fika kubhanga kimbamba kia ku di metena?" 
Psalms2:2 Jisobha mu ngongo ja di bhongolola, makota ma di longesa jindunge, phala ku kitukila Jihova, ni muthu uê ua mu undu ni maji." 
Psalms2:3 Exi: Tu katule ophi iâ mu xingu ietu, o mikolo iâ tu di zudienu-iu." 
Psalms2:4 Ió ua xikama ku maúlu ua olela; Ngana anga u a bhanga kasekelu. 
Psalms2:5 Kindala u a temena ni njinda, hé u a bhuuika mu kuluuala kuê." 
Psalms2:6 Eme-phe, sobha iami nga muʼundu bhu kididi, ku mulundu uami ukôla ua Ziione." 
Psalms2:7 Ki ngʼedi ngi kola ngonge, Jihova ua ngʼambela, uixi: Eie u monʼami, lelu muene nga ku vuala." 
Psalms2:8 Ngi bhinge, phalʼeme ngi ku bhane akua jixi ku avua, a kale undundu ué, katé ku maẋokololo mu ngongo." 
Psalms2:9 U a tolola ni mbangala ia felu; u a bhanga imenga-imenga kala ímbia ia mavu. 
Psalms2:10 Kiki-phe, enu mu jisobha, kuatenu kilunji; ivenu phangu, enu mu afundixi mu ngongo." 
Psalms2:11 Kota mu toloke kua Jihova, mu kale ni uoma uê, mu kale jinge ni kutana ni kuteketa." 
Psalms2:12 Bhombenu mona, ki mu kinge kia thathamana; kuma hinu mu diuana ku muia, njinda iê ki i uama kala túbhia. Enhó-phe a zediua oso a dielela kua Muene." 
Psalms3:1 Jihova, tata, tala nguma jami ki ja di bandekeza! Avulu muene a ngi lungulukila!" 
Psalms3:2 Avulu muene ala ku ngʼamba, exi: Kua Nzambi kala-ku dingi ni kubhuluka kuê." 
Psalms3:3 Maji Eie-phe, u Jihova, u ngubu iami ia ku ngi xitila; Eie-muène u kijingo kiami, eie ua ngi bhetula o mútue." 
Psalms3:4 Nga suína dízui ni ku dikola kua Jihova, muene-phe ua ngʼitaia ku mulundu uê ukôla." 
Psalms3:5 Nga zekele, ngele muene ku kilu; kuaki, nga tono; mukonda Jihova muene ua ngi bhake ku muenhu." 
Psalms3:6 Ki ngi kala dingi ni uoma, né jimidi ja athu a ngi balukila ku mbandu ni mbandu." 
Psalms3:7 Balumuka, eie u Jihova; u ngi kudile, Nzambi iami! Kuma jinguma jami eie ua ji bhana huxi ia pholo; o isuéia eie ua i bukula o mazu." 
Psalms3:8 Kubhuluka ku tunda kua Jihova; o ku thandu dia mundu uê ku kale dibesá. 
Psalms4:1 Ngʼivue kioso ki ngi dikola, u Nzambi iami kuma eie u ngi bhana o kulúnga; Eie ua tena ku ngi bheka bhua disanze, kioso ki nga kexile bhu kíbhidi; ngi lendukile dingi, u ngʼivue o kusamba." 
Psalms4:2 Enu malʼenu, mu ki jijidila-hi anʼathu, tata, o ku ngi jingununa ni ku ngi sebulula? Mu suka katé bhebhi ni kuzola malebhu, ni kubhindamena makutu?" 
Psalms4:3 Ijiienu-kiu kuma Jihova, mukua uoma uê u mu tungula, hé u mu tambula konda; Jihova u ngʼivua, kioso ki ngi dikola kua muene." 
Psalms4:4 Kalenu ni uoma, ki mu te dingi ituxi; bhu hama bhu mua zeka, xinganekenu moxi dia miẋima ienu phala mu di xibhe." 
Psalms4:5 Nzambi mu mu satela ni kidi, phala Jihova mu mu dielele kiambote." 
Psalms4:6 Sai athu avulu ala kuila: Tu sanga kuebhi o kibhuku? Jihova phe tu bhetukile ngó o pholo ié, kubenha kué ku tu tule." 
Psalms4:7 Ngalasa i ua ngi te ku muẋima uami kota, ia athu ndenge mu thembu ia kuvula o masa ni vinhu." 
Psalms4:8 Kala kiki, ngi zeka ni kutululuka, ngiia muene ku kilu; mukonda eie u Jihova uala ku ngʼinga; né ku ubheka uami ngala bhua kondama." 
Psalms5:1 Bhana dítui ku maka mami, u Jihova; ividila kioso ki ngala ku di ngunguina." 
Psalms5:2 Ivua dízui diami dia kudikola, u sobha iami, u Nzambi iami; kuma ko kue eie kuene ku nga lungu ni kusamba." 
Psalms5:3 Kukia ngó, eie u Jihova, u ivua o dízui diami; mu kimene munhá ngi bhana musambu uami kó kué, hé ngi kala mu ku ku xibhidila." 
Psalms5:4 Kuma eie ku Nzambi ia kuila u xikina kuuabhela ituxi; mukua phulu-phe ka tena kukula musonhi ué. 
Psalms5:5 Akua izala ka tena kuimana ku mesu mé; eie ua di zemba ni ene oso akalakala ituxi. 
Psalms5:6 Athu oso a tanga makutu; Eie hinu ua-nda kua kà a jima o mbutu; muthu uoso uaiibha ni manhinga, mukua kunganala akuâ, Eie u Jihova, ua ku ibhila muene." 
Psalms5:7 Maji eme-phe, mu kudielela o henda ié iavulu kinéne, ngala ni disesa dia kubokona monzo ié; ngi bhixila ni uoma mu ta pholo bhoxi bhu kanga dia Tembulu ié ikôla." 
Psalms5:8 Ngendese, u Jihova, mu njila ja uiukilu ué, mukonda dia iá a ngi batamena; njila ié ki i kale ni jihonda bhu pholo iami." 
Psalms5:9 Kuma enhó kuzuela kuâ ki kuala ni kukumbidila; miẋima iâ moxi ia di bhange kizakazaka kia usuéia; bhu dikelengu diâ, kina kia kalunga, sumbala a hanza ni dimi diâ." 
Psalms5:10 A êlese ku mulonga, eie u Nzambi; nda a di bhale mu jipangu ja di longesa mudiâ; a kaiese, Ngana, mukonda dia kubhukumuka kuâ kuavulu; kuma eie muene, u Ngana, a ku kitukila." 
Psalms5:11 Maji oso-phe a lengela kokué, a tane-ku! A dikole ni ngalasa, kuma eie uene ku a bhângela; oso kiá a zola o dijina dié, a kolokote ku ku dielela." 
Psalms5:12 Kuma eie, Ngana, u mukua kubhanga mbote kua ió uoso uaiuka; jihenda jé, u Jihova, ji kala ngubu ia ku mu xitila." 
Psalms6:1 Jihova, tata! kana ku ngi bazela ni njinda, kana ku ngi beta ni kuthathamana kué." 
Psalms6:2 Ngi kuatele henda, u Jihova, kuma nga bhele, nga xoueta; u Jihova, ngi sake; kuma ngala kukata katé ni mu ifuba." 
Psalms6:3 Ni ku muẋima moxi nga bhondalala ni lamba; eie-phe, u Jihova, tata, mbámbe bhebhi bhu u suka ni kungʼehelela kiki?" 
Psalms6:4 Bhomba muẋima, Jihova, u ngi kudile muenhu uami; ngi bhulule, nga ku diondo mu henda ié." 
Psalms6:5 Kuma mu kúfua ki muala dingi ku ku xinganeka; kuʼalunga, nanhi dingi u tena ku ku sakidila?" 
Psalms6:6 Nga bhuila kiá mukonda dia kukema kuami! Usuku ni usuku hama iami ngi i betesa; ila muene kiololo ni masoxi! 
Psalms6:7 Mesuʼami iá a bhua-bhu kiá ni kudila; kala kumona dingi kiambote, mukonda dia jinguma ku ngi tatesa." 
Psalms6:8 Tundenu bhu mbandu iami, enu oso mu ati a ituxi; kuma Jihova ua ngʼivu kiá dízui diami dia kudila." 
Psalms6:9 Jihova ua ngʼivu kiá o kudionda kuami; Jihova ua xikina o musambu uami. 
Psalms6:10 Jinguma jami joso a-nda kudiuana, sonhi ja-nda ku a kuata; kindala a-nda kuvutuka ni dima, anga a kotokela ni jisonhi, ka-nda kumona kuoso kua di tela." 
Psalms7:1 Jihova, tata! Nzambi iami, nga lengela ko kué; ngi bhulule kua ió oso ala ku ngi kaia, u ngi kudile." 
Psalms7:2 Kuma a hamena o muenhu uami kala hoje ia bhindamena ku ngi dia; a mesena a ngi sanujuna ku idiandu, sé muthu ku ngi bhângela." 
Psalms7:3 Jihova, Nzambi iami, se kidi muene eme nga ki bhange, se ua ngi mono ni lufuku bhu maku mami," 
Psalms7:4 se ngaii mu lokalala ió ua di xibhê, ki tu di kuata; inda nga bhana muenhu kua uoso ua ngi zembe sé kikuma;" 
Psalms7:5 nguma ió-phe a ngi kaie, a ngi kuate; muenhu uami a u titidile muene bhoxi, o ujitu uami a u fufujule mu mavu." 
Psalms7:6 Balumuka, u Jihova, mu njinda ié; imana mu bateka ió asaluka ni ku ngi seia; phaphumuka mu ku ngi zuelela, kuma mulonga uami eie-muène ua ku tokala." 
Psalms7:7 Kionge kia mundu a ku bhongoloke muene; eie u xikame mu kaẋi kâ bhu ditala dia dikota. 
Psalms7:8 Jihova mukua kufundisa o ifuẋi ioso, a dikola kokué, ngi fundise eme, u Jihova, kala kia tokala mu kulúnga kuami, ni mu kidi kiami ki ngala na-kiu moxi." 
Psalms7:9 Mukua phulu, Ngana, mu lembuese o phulu iê; maji mukua kidi-phe mu kuatese bhu kididi, a tunge a some; mukonda eie u Nzambi ia kidi, u mukua kutungula o ilunji ni mixima." 
Psalms7:10 Ngubu iami iala kua Nzambi, mukua kubhulula oso ala ni mixima iaiuka." 
Psalms7:11 Nzambi mufúndixi ua kidi, kuma u fúndisa mu uiukilu uê; Nzambi uene mu kuluuala izuua ioso." 
Psalms7:12 Se o muthu nguê kutunda ku njila iaiibha, Nzambi phe u zuika o mukuale uê; uta uê ua mufula ua u oleka, ua te kiá o misongo iê;" 
Psalms7:13 ua maneka kiá o ibhakatu iê ia ita; misongo iê iala kuasa ku jinguma i bambula túbhia. 
Psalms7:14 Iala-ze, mukua phulu muenhó, mika ia mu kuata ia kuvuala, maji kingoho; uemita usuéia, u vuala makutu." 
Psalms7:15 Ua j ikula diela, ua di kande muene, diazongo, iú uafu-mu muene, mu dikungu diê dia kande." 
Psalms7:16 Ufe uê ua mu vutukila mu mútue uê muene, o kusuína kuê kua mu vundu muene ku dikoxi diê." 
Psalms7:17 Eme-phe ngi sakidila jinga Jihova mu kutetuluka kuê; ngimba ni kuximana o dijina dia Jihova, Suke-ku." 
Psalms8:1 U Jihova, Ngana ietu, dijina dié kujinga kuahi mu ngongo ioso!" 
Psalms8:2 Mu kuzuela ku tunda mu kanu dia anʼauisu, ni tuana hanji bhu maku, eie uidikisa ue nguzu; mukonda dia ió a ku zembe; phala o nguma, ni ió mukua phonzo, a lémbue kia kuvutula." 
Psalms8:3 Kioso ki ngʼila ngi talesa ku diulu, ku ufunu ua milembu ié, ku mbeje ni jithéthembua ji ua iudika, ngʼamba, ngixi:" 
Psalms8:4 Muthu muene ua soko kiebhi, phala eie ku mu suua? Mba monʼa muthu, kuila eie u mu ta muẋima?" 
Psalms8:5 Sumbala kiene, maji ki ua mu bhanga, kifua ua bhabhelela kua Nzambi; ua mu zuika kitundu kia ukota ni ujitu." 
Psalms8:6 Ua mu bhana o kutambula konda ia imbamba ioso i ua iudika; o ima ioso ua i te bhoxi dia inama iê. 
Psalms8:7 Ni jimbudi joso ni jingombe, ni iama kiá i kala mu iangu." 
Psalms8:8 Ni jinjila ji bhita bhulu, ni jimbiji ja kalunga, ni ima ioso kiá i endela mu jinjila koxi a menha mu musanza." 
Psalms8:9 U Jihova, Ngana ietu, tata! O dijina dié kujinga kuahi mu ngongo ioso!" 
Psalms9:1 Ngi ximana Jihova ni muẋima uami uoso; ngi fumanesa ikalakalu iê ia madiuanu. 
Psalms9:2 Ngi sangulukila mo mué, ngi tana ni ngalasa; ngimba mu kuximana dijina dié, eie u Suke-ku!" 
Psalms9:3 Mukonda o jinguma jami eie ua ji vutula ku ja tundu; mu kumona o pholo ié, a di bhukana, a di vundu bhoxi, ia a jikinina muene nzaká." 
Psalms9:4 Kuma eie ua ngi bhana o kulunga, eie ua ngi zuelela ku mulonga; mukonda eie ua xikama ku kibhuna kié mù batula ni kidi." 
Psalms9:5 Matumbu eie ua a bazela, akua phulu ua a buikisa; dijina diâ ua di jimuna kulu dia mundu katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Psalms9:6 Jinguma jami ja buila, eie ua a katula kijingo; o jimbanza jâ eie ua ji sengulula, bhu ja kexile bhua di bhange jingundu, ni muthu u a xinganeka dingi ka moneka." 
Psalms9:7 Jihova-phe kiandu kiê kia xikamena kunanga; o kibhuna kiê kia kufundisila kene ku ki lundumuna. 
Psalms9:8 Muene u fúndisa o mundu ni kubatula mu kidi; o akua mabhata u a tetuluila kioso kia tokala mu uiukilu uê. 
Psalms9:9 Jihova muene o mbonge ia matala, mu lengela ió oso a a tatesa; muene kididi kiakondama mu thembu ia jiphaxi." 
Psalms9:10 Oso a ku ijiia o dijina, eie muene u Jihova a ku dielela; kuma, eie Jihova, ku muthu ua kukakula oso a ku kana." 
Psalms9:11 Imbenu diximanu dia Jihova, ua tunga mu mbanza iê ia Ziione; o ikalakalu iê iene kubhanga, tangenu-iu mu akua jixi." 
Psalms9:12 Kioso ki eza mu kuibhula o mulonga ua kijibha, kene kujimba; o ki dikola ngadiama, ka kambe ku mu ivua."
