Psalms125:2 Mukuâ ni milundu ki ia bhake Jeluzaleme bhuʼaxaxi, kiene ue Jihova kia bhake o mundu uê bhuʼaxaxi, tunde kiki ni ku hádia ni hádia." 
Psalms125:3 Mukonda o mbasá iâ ia usuéia ki i tula ku kibatu kiangene kia athuʼê aiuka; kuiengesa kuila ni ió uaiuka imoxi u zenga o lukuaku mu bhanga kima kiaiibha. 
Psalms125:4 Jihova, tata, bhanga mbote kua ió athu ambote, oso ala ni mixima iaiuka." 
Psalms125:5 Maji o ió oso-phe a xi njila, mu kuila njila jengi jabhengalala, Jihova ua kà a kokela kumoxi ni ati a ituxi; o ku thandu dia Izalaiele-phe ku kale paze." 
Psalms126:1 Kizuua kia bheka dingi Jihova athuʼê ku Ziione, a tundu mu ku a balakala, tuedile kala tua mu kuanjiua nzoji." 
Psalms126:2 Mu kanu bhenhobho mua tu izala ni jingolela, dimi di kuata mu kuimba; katé ni mu matumbu a ki ambe, exi: Athu iá Jihova ua a bhange ima ia madiuanu!" 
Psalms126:3 Jihova ua tu bhange muene ima ia makota, ia madiuanu;" 
Psalms126:4 lungulula dingi o uindua uetu, Ngana Nzambi, tu bhanduluke, kala o jihonga jakukuta ki jʼizala menha ku sulu." 
Psalms126:5 Oso a kuua ni masoxi, hinu a kà bhongolola ni ngalasa." 
Psalms126:6 Oso aia ku mábhia ni kudila, mu kuna mbutu ja iuka, edi kala a tale ngó hadi, hádia-phe eza ni kusanguluka, ambata o ita ia idima ia kutu." 
Psalms127:1 Jihova se ua kambe kutunga dibhata, a tala ngó hadi oso a di tunga; Jihova se ua kambe kulanga mbonge, mulangidi né ua tono, lémbue." 
Psalms127:2 Kingoho ue o kudimeneka ku thonga, ni kuseiala usuku kudia kua ku di huha; kuma oso a a zolo kuala muene, a a bhela ku kilu." 
Psalms127:3 Iala-ze! O ana, uene undundu u tunda kua Jihova; o ibundu ia divumu ue, muene u ku bhana-iu, kuma jene o jihuuilu." 
Psalms127:4 Ana òvuale mu nguzu ia undenge, a soko ni misongo iala bhu lukuaku lua kindanda." 
Psalms127:5 Ua zediua o diiala uoso ua a somo, o kizu kiê kiezala muene; ió ka tena kutandanganha ni jisonhi, kia di kuata ni jinguma jê bhu muelu ua mbonge." 
Psalms128:1 Ua zediua o muthu ió uoso ua kuata uoma ua Jihova, mukua kuenda jinga mu ʼnjila jê." 
Psalms128:2 Ku muanu ua ikalakalu ia maku mê u dia-ku, u zediua, u lunga, u bhanduluka, kuma ima iê ioso ienda kiambote." 
Psalms128:3 Mukajiʼê u kala kala muvide uala kuima kiavulu mu kithâdi kiaʼnzo iê, anʼê a di fua ixina ia midiva ia sabhuluka mu jimbandu ja meza mé." 
Psalms128:4 Ijiia na-kiu, kuma kienhiki ki zediua o muthu uoso uene ni uoma ua Jihova." 
Psalms128:5 Jihova ku mbanza iê ia Ziione, a tume ku ku zediuisa; eie u mone o kubhanduluka kua Jeluzaleme, izuua ioso ia muenhu ué." 
Psalms128:6 Ni ana ni alaula eie ua kà a mona mesu, ni kutululuka ku thandu dia Izalaiele!" 
Psalms129:1 A ngi huha muene luavulu ni ku ngi talesa hadi tunde mu undenge, Izalaiele a ki zuele kiá!" 
Psalms129:2 A ngi huha luavulu muene ni ku ngi talesa hadi tunde mu undenge uami, maji a lémbua ku ngi tolola!" 
Psalms129:3 Akua kudima ni alado, a ngi bhange mixinga ku kunda; o mixanda ia alado a i lebhesa muene." 
Psalms129:4 Jihova-phe muthu ua tetuluka, mukua kidi, ua batula o mikolo ia isuéia." 
Psalms129:5 Ene oso a zembe Ziione, a a kuatese jisonhi; a a bhese lusolo, a vutuke kua tundu." 
Psalms129:6 A kale kala iangu i sabhuka ku thandu dia ʼnzo, kiluua ngó i kula ia lela kiá!" 
Psalms129:7 Ia bhingi o mukua kumuna ka tena kukutila-bhu kita, o mukua kubhongolola ue ka mono dibhûbhu dia kuta bhu homba." 
Psalms129:8 Abhite-a-njila ka tena, kuila: Tana-ku! Mba amba, exi: O kizediuise kia Jihova ki kale ku thandu dié. Etu tua mi te o kizediuise mu dijina dia Jihova!" 
Psalms130:1 Tunde mua zongo mu nga kuzuka, nga dikola ko kué, u Jihova." 
Psalms130:2 Ngana, ngʼivue o dízui diami; bhana mátui kioso ki ngala kudikola." 
Psalms130:3 Eie, Jihova, se kuila u kuata konda ia ituxi ietu ioso, nanhi muene u tena kuimana bhu pholo ié?" 
Psalms130:4 Maji eie-phe, u Ngana, u mukua kuloloka, phala athu ende jinge ni ku ku xila." 
Psalms130:5 Nga kinga Jihova; muenhu uami ua kinga ni kutala kua muene; o kizuelu kiê kiene ki nga dielela. 
Psalms130:6 Muenhu uami uala mu kuinda Ngana, ua fulu kilu ndenge, ua xikamena kuma kúkia; xi, ndenge muene, ió uala mu kuinda kuma kúkia!" 
Psalms130:7 Dielela kua Jihova, u Izalaiele, kuma kua Jihova sai-ku jihenda ni kulenduka; kua muene kuala ue kubhanduluka kua vula matelu." 
Psalms130:8 Muene u kula Izalaiele mu itondalu ni ikuma ié ioso. 
Psalms131:1 U Jihova, muẋima uami ki uala ni izala, kana; ki ngala mu xikulula mesu ni katunda koso! Ki ngi di metena imbamba ia ngi tundu, mba ngi sota imbamba ia makota ki i ngi tokala!" 
Psalms131:2 Kana, inda nga bateka o muẋima uami, eme nga di xibhisa-u muene, kala mona ua sumuka kiá, kia di xibha bhu jihata ja mamʼâ; kiene ue muenhu uami moxi ua di xibha mukua ni mona ua sumuka kiá." 
Psalms131:3 Enu ue Izalaiele, dielelenu kua Jihova, tunde kiki ki mualʼiki, ni ku hádia ni hádia." 
Psalms132:1 Jihova, tata, lembalala Davidi, ni hadi ioso ia tale;" 
Psalms132:2 kioso kia lokela Jihova, anga u di hambelela kua Ngunza ia Jakobo, uixi:" 
Psalms132:3 Kia kidi kiene, mu kibuta kiami ki ngii-mu, bhu hama iami ki ngi zeka-bhu;" 
Psalms132:4 ki ngi xikina kuia ku kilu, mesuʼami ka badikinha;" 
Psalms132:5 katé ki ngi sota kididi kia Jihova kia kutula, o dibhata mu tunga Ngunza ia Jakobo." 
Psalms132:6 Álaka tua ivu exi, iala bhu Efalata, tua i bongela mu mukáu ua ditutu dia Jahale." 
Psalms132:7 Tu bokone mu balaka ia Ngana, tu bheze bhu bangu ia inama iê." 
Psalms132:8 Balumuka, Jihova, u bhixile mu dinhohenu dié, ni eie ni álaka ia nguzu ié." 
Psalms132:9 Jinganga jé ji zuate kukumbidila ni kubatula mu kidi, o athu é angene a sanzuke ni kusanguluka." 
Psalms132:10 Mukonda dia selevende ié Davidi ua mu zola! muthu ué ua mu undu ni maji, ku mu sonokese pholo." 
Psalms132:11 Jihova ua te ni Davidi, kikutu kia mulôko, ka ẋikina dingi kualuluka; kuma uambe, uixi; Mona u tunda ku mukutu ué muene u ku bhingana bhu kiandu." 
Psalms132:12 Anʼé se aiuka o kikutu kiami ki nga a bhana, ni ijila iami ioso i nga-nda ku a longa, ni ku mululu ni ku mulaula nuka ku kamba mukua muiji ué, u xikama bhu kiandu kié, katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Psalms132:13 Mukonda Jihova ua solo Ziione; kiene kididi kiê kia kutunga kia mukala ku muẋima. 
Psalms132:14 Iú uambe, uixi: Diene dinhohenu diamʼidi, katé ku hádia ni hádia; bhenhabha nga kubu muene, kuma kiene ki nga solo." 
Psalms132:15 Ngi sokolola muene ni kuvula kuoso o idima iê, katé, ni jingadiama kúdia ku a kuma." 
Psalms132:16 Jinganga jê ngi ji zuika kubhanduluka; akua bhata momo, a zanzuka, ni kusanguluka!" 
Psalms132:17 O kutena kua nguzu ia Davidi, muenhomo ku kuia-ku dingi; ngi sendela kandeia phala o muthu uami nga mu undu ni maji." 
Psalms132:18 Nguma jê ngi ji zuika jisonhi ni kusebuka; o muene-phe kitundu kiê ki kala mu luendela. 
Psalms133:1 Kidi bá! kima kia fuama, kia di uabhela kiambote, ki u sanga jiphange a takana mu muẋima umoxi!" 
Psalms133:2 Kia soko ni maji a kuhingisa ungana, a tula mu mútue, hé a mbombela ku muezu, ku muezu ua Alá, a kulumuka muene, hé a bhixila katé mu ngola ia kizuatu kiê. O kudizola ku kala kiki, ku di fuangana" 
Psalms133:3 Mukuâ ni dimume dia mulundu ua Helemone di kulumuka ku milundu ia Ziione; kuma mu uphange kala kiki, Jihova ua bhake-mu dibesá, maji dibesá dia muenhu ki uà bhua dingi!" 
Psalms134:1 Kiókole! Benzelenu Jihova enu oso mu jiselevende ja Jihova, muene mu kuimana mauusuku moso, monzo ia Jihova." 
Psalms134:2 Lekenu o maku menu mu kididi kiê kiangene, muende ni kubenzela jinga Jihova." 
Psalms134:3 A mi bhane dibesá di tunda mu Ziione, o dibesá dia Jihova ua bhanga o diulu ni ixi." 
Psalms135:1 Haleluia! Ximanenu Jihova, Ximanenu o dijina dia Jihova; mu ximanienu, enu mu jiselevende ja Jihova." 
Psalms135:2 Enu muemana mʼonzo ia Jihova, mu lumbu lua dizemba dia Nzambi ietu." 
Psalms135:3 Ximanenu Jihova, kuma muene muthu uambote; imbenu diximanu dia dijina diê, kuma kima kiaiuka." 
Psalms135:4 Mukonda Jihova ua solo Jakobo, nʼa kale muthu ua kazola kê, o Izalaiele uene o muiji ua undûndu uê uangene." 
Psalms135:5 Kuma eme ngejiia kuila, Jihova u kôla; o Ngana ietu Nzambi, ua tundu o jinzambi joso." 
Psalms135:6 Jihova ioso ia mu kexe mu vondadi iê, iene muene ia bhange, ni mu diulu ni mu ngongo, ni ku musanza, ni mu ididi ioso muazongo." 
Psalms135:7 U bhangesa mbundu kutuka jinga ku maẋokololo a jixi; u bhangesa nzaji ienda ni mvula; u katula kitembu mu dibhakelu diê. 
Psalms135:8 Muene ua beta anʼa phandekumbi mu Ijito, tunde ku athu katé ni ku ibhaku;" 
Psalms135:9 ua tubhula isuma ni madiuanu mó mué, u Ijito, ku thandu dia Falaó ni akua mbèle iê;" 
Psalms135:10 ua beta ilômbo ia miji iavulu, ua buidisa makota a jingana:" 
Psalms135:11 ni Sihone sobha ia Mamodi, ni Hoke sobha ia Basane, ni jisobha joso ja Kanana." 
Psalms135:12 Jixi jâ iu ua ji bhana mu ubhinganu, ji kale undûndu ua mundu uê ua Izalaiele." 
Psalms135:13 Eie, u Jihova dijina dié dikola, di nangenena kienhiki, katé ku hádia ni hádia! Eie, Ngana, a kala jinga mu ku ku banza ku miji ioso." 
Psalms135:14 Kuma Jihova muene u fundisa o mundu uê; né ua luualela o selevende jê, u bhomba dingi o muẋima uê." 
Psalms135:15 Iteka ia matumbu phalata ni ulu, ufunu ua maku ma athu." 
Psalms135:16 Makanu iá, maji ki i tena kuzuela; mesu iá, maji ki i tena kumona;" 
Psalms135:17 Mátui sai, maji ki itena kuívua; kuma mu kanu diâ ki muala kubhuima kuoso-kuoso." 
Psalms135:18 Oso a i iudika, ene uâ a soko-â na-iu; katé ni akuá oso a i dielela." 
Psalms135:19 Enu dibhata dia Izalaiele, tanesenu Jihova; enu dibhata dia Alá, tanesenu Jihova;" 
Psalms135:20 enu dibhata dia Levi, tanesenu Jihova; enu mu akua uoma ua Ngana, tanesenu Jihova." 
Psalms135:21 Jihova a tane-ku, tunde mu Ziione, kuma muene ua tunga mu Jeluzaleme. Haleluia!" 
Psalms136:1 Sakidilenu Jihova o mbote iê; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:2 Sakidilenu Nzambi ia jinzambi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:3 Sakidilenu Ngana ia jingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:4 U bhanga madiuanu, muene ubheka uê; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua." 
Psalms136:5 Ua kala ni uhete ua kuiudika maúlu; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:6 Uombo mavu kuthandu, o menha nʼa kale koxi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua." 
Psalms136:7 Ua tena kubhanga imuiku ia makota; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:8 Dikumbu di tumina mu muanha; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:9 Ni mbeje ni jithéthembua ji tumina mu usuku; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:10 Ua beta ana a phandekumbi mu Ijito; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:11 Iu ua katula Izalaiele muʼaxaxi kâ; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:12 Ni kànda dia nguzu, ni lukuaku luasununuka; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua." 
Psalms136:13 Ua tena kubatula Kalunga Kakusuka mu kaẋi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:14 Iú ua bhangesa Izalaiele kubhitila mu kaẋi ka menha; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:15 Maji Falaó ni kilômbo kiê ua a kukumuina muʼAlunga kakusuka; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:16 Uendesa o mundu uê mu kikangalakata; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:17 Ua beta makota a jingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:18 Ua buidisa jisobha ja fumana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:19 Sihone sobha ia Mamodi; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:20 Ni Hoke sobha ia Basane; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:21 Ua bhana oxi iâ ku i bhingana; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:22 Ikale undundu uangene ua selevende iê Izalaiele; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:23 Ua tu lembalala mu ditala dietu dia kutola; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbha. 
Psalms136:24 Ua tu kudila ku jinguma jetu ala ku tu kanena; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:25 U bhana kúdia ku jixitu joso; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua. 
Psalms136:26 Mbàmba, sakidilenu Nzambi ia diulu; kuma kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua." 
Psalms137:1 Bhu mbanduʼa jihonga, ja jingiji mu Babilónha, bhene bhu tua xikama jinga, anga tu kuata kudila, kioso ki tu xinganeka Ziione." 
Psalms137:2 O mu isasa ia sabhukila bhenhobho, muene mu tua nhenga jinga o jimbànza jetu." 
Psalms137:3 Mukonda ió oso a tu ambata ku mikolo a tu bhingi kuimba; ene a tu bhondeleka, exi: Sangulukenu; tu imbidienu hanji muimbu uoso-uoso ua Ziione." 
Psalms137:4 Muimbu-phe ua Jihova tu u imba kiebhi kunu kʼoxi iengi kua tu bheka? 
Psalms137:5 U Jeluzaleme, se nga kambe ku ku ta muẋima, lukuaku luami ue lua kadilu lu bhue uhete uê!" 
Psalms137:6 Dimi di ngi naminine ku thanduʼa dikanu, se Jeluzaleme u kamba ku ngi kala kota, ima ioso ia ngi uabhela ndenge-èlele." 
Psalms137:7 U Jihova, lembalala kia zuela anʼa Edomo kizuua kia buika Jeluzaleme, exi: Sengulula muene, sengululenu, Jeluzaleme i bhue-bhu katé ku mavu." 
Psalms137:8 Eie-phe ue u Babilónha, hinu a ku bhanga-kiu; u lungê ió uoso u ku bhanga ki ua tu bhange etu." 
Psalms137:9 U lungê uoso u kuata o tuana tué nʼa tu vunda-vunda ku matadi, hé tuila muene sasu-sasu." 
Psalms138:1 Ngi ku ximana Ngana, ni muẋima uami uoso; bhu pholo ia jinzambi, ngi ku tumbula-bhu eie." 
Psalms138:2 Ngi diunda ni kubhana o pholo kua kala o Tembulu ié, ngi ku tumbula dijina mukonda dia kiadi kié kia kidi; kuma o maka mé, Ngana, ma ulamba, ni ku a fika ngó tua lémbua." 
Psalms138:3 Kizuua ki nga dikola, eie uetaia kiá; ua ngi bhana dingi huii ku muẋima moxi." 
Psalms138:4 Jisobha joso mu ngongo ji ku ximana eie u Jihova, kuma o maka ma dikanu dié a mʼevu." 
Psalms138:5 Kidi kiene, mauendelu mé a ma ta ku mukumbi, kuma o fuma ia Jihova ia vulu kinéne!" 
Psalms138:6 Kuma Jihova sumbala kota dia ngana, maji u suua ió ua batama; mukua izala-phe u mu muena ngó mu kanga." 
Psalms138:7 Né-mbe ngʼenda mu axaxi ka malamba, eie, Ngana, u ngʼinga, ngi laia muene; kuma u tula lukuaku lué ku jinguma ja ngi kala ni njinda, o lukuaku lué lua kúdia, lu ngi bhulula." 
Psalms138:8 Jihova u ngi zubhila ioso ia ngi kambe; o kiadi kié, Ngana, ki kiene kúbhua; kana kuehelela o kikalakalu kia maku mé." 
Psalms139:1 U Jihova, eie ua ngi solokota, ua ngʼijiia." 
Psalms139:2 Ua ngʼijila ni kuxikama kuami ni kubalumuka, o ilunji iami ni mu kanga muná ia ku jimbulukila kiá." 
Psalms139:3 Ua tungula uendelu uami ni uzekelu, jinjila jami joso ja di monekena ko kué." 
Psalms139:4 Né ngó kizuelu kia ngi kala bhu dimi, eie-phe, u Jihova, ka ku dingila kima." 
Psalms139:5 Ua ngi kondo ku pholo ni ku dima, eie ua ngi tula o lukuaku lué kuthandu." 
Psalms139:6 Nga diuana kuijiia ku kala kiki! kua ngi tundu, ki ngi tena-bhu!" 
Psalms139:7 Ngi di tela kuebhi ku ngi xila o Nzumbi ié? mba, ngi lengela kuebhi, pholo ié ni i kambe ku ngi mona?" 
Psalms139:8 Se ngedi ngi banda ku diulu, eie kuene ku uala; ngi kutuke mu Bombo dia madifundu, eie ku kambe-mu." 
Psalms139:9 Se ngi kuata mabhabha ma kimene, hé ma ngi bheka kua suku o musanza," 
Psalms139:10 Né koko, lukuaku lué lua ngi bhiti ku pholo, o lué lua kúdia hanji lua ngi kuata." 
Psalms139:11 O ki ngʼila ngixi: Ngi di vunga usuku, ngi kala mu kitombe, kífua nga suama, bhenhobho usuku ua kà di bhanga kala muanha ku mbandu ni mbandu." 
Psalms139:12 Mukonda né usuku ki u xikina ku ngi sueka bhu pholo ié; ku mesu mé kua zele kala muanha; ni kuavundu ni kuazele kuene kuoso kua soko-é. 
Psalms139:13 Eie-muène ua ngi bhanga mixima moxi; eie ua ngi tunga jixitu mu vumu dia mamʼetu. 
Psalms139:14 Nga sakidila Ngana, kuma ki kôla ki ua ngi iudika, ki kuata uoma! Ikalakalu ié, Ngana, madiuanu! kia ngi tetulukila muene kiambote." 
Psalms139:15 Ifuba iami eie kua kambele ku i mona, kioso ki ua ngi bhanga ufunu mu kasuekèdia, kioso ki ua ngi Sokejeka kala koxi a mavu ku ngala." 
Psalms139:16 Mesu mé ma ngi mono mukutu uami, kioso ngó kiluua u di umba; o idiandu iami ua i soneka mu divulu dié, ni izuua iami i nga kà bhanga, kala kiluua ngó ngi i mateka." 
Psalms139:17 Ilunji ié, u Nzambi, i ua ngi xinganeka na-iu, kima kia kulalula! se ngedi ngi i kuata konda, ki ngi i tena, kuma iavudilà-ku!" 
Psalms139:18 Ku i kuata mu kimoxi-kimoxi, kuvula kua kisekele ndenge; ngʼila ngi tunda mu kubhuuama, hanji ngala bhu ualʼeie." 
Psalms139:19 Ki kôla Ngana! kisuéia hinu u mu jibha! Ngi tundidienu bhu mbandu iami, enu mu athu mua hamena o manhinga." 
Psalms139:20 Mukonda eie, Ngana, a mu ku lokalala; jinguma ji tumbula muene o dijina dié ni kubhuma." 
Psalms139:21 Manhi ngi kamba ku a zemba, a ku zembe eie u Jihova? kífua ki kamba ku ngi iibhila kia ku bhukumukina eie Ngana?" 
Psalms139:22 Nga a zembe muene, ni kizembu kia tokala; nga a kita jinguma jami." 
Psalms139:23 Nzambi ngi solokote, u ngʼijiie muẋima moxi; ngi lole, u ngi tongolole o ilunji ioso;" 
Psalms139:24 Ngi tangele, se ua ngi mono ngala kuila muengi; u ngi kutukise mu kikoka ki nangenena." 
Psalms140:1 Ngi kudile, u Jihova, ku muthu uaiibha; ngi tambule kua ió uala kiluami;" 
Psalms140:2 oso a ta ikutu ia phulu ku mixima iâ, a di bhongolola jinga mu kúlua ita." 
Psalms140:3 Dimi diâ a di zuika kala dia nhoka, kuema dia mizumbu iâ, kuala ikolakola kala ia madiuta." 
Psalms140:4 Ngi bhake, u Jihova, maku a kisuéia ka ngi kuate; ngi xitile kua ió ua suína; a ngi kanena muene ku ngi bhana kibhalu." 
Psalms140:5 Akua izala ió a ngi tela mabhebhe ni múkala; a ngi fika kúfua mu uanda ua mikolo ua ngi tela; a ngʼolekela mibhetu ku mbanduʼa njila. 
Psalms140:6 Eme-phe nga ku ambela, Ngana, ngixi eie-muène u Nzambi iami; ngʼivue kioso ki ngi dikola ko kué, u Jihova." 
Psalms140:7 U Jihova, Ngana iami, Mubhuludi, eie-muène ua ngi vungina o mútue mu kizuua kia ita." 
Psalms140:8 Isuéia, Ngana, kana kubhanga o vondadi iâ; fudisa ikutu iâ, ki iie ku pholo, phala ka di te nzabala." 
Psalms140:9 Ku mítue iâ ió oso a ngi kondo mu jimbandu, ku tule o phulu ioso iala ku mizumbu iâ." 
Psalms140:10 A kuuile makala ma uama ku thandu diâ; a a vubule muene mu túbhia; a fue mu madiela ma zongo, phala ka tene dingi kutunda-mu." 
Psalms140:11 Muzuedi uaibhʼó, ka kale dingi ni kididi mu ngongo; mukua kusuína, uíndua u mu seia katé kia mu jikinisa." 
Psalms140:12 Ngejiia kuma Jihova u fundila jinga ió uoso a mu tatesa, u tetuluila ió uoso ua bhindama." 
Psalms140:13 Sé kufula, oso aiuka a kà sakidila o dijina dié; o emana mixima nzanza, a kà tunga bhu pholo ié." 
Psalms141:1 Jihova, tata, nga di kola ko kué; endelà-ku, Ngana, mu ku ngi sanga; bhetama u ngʼivue dízui, kioso ki ngi di tenda kokué." 
Psalms141:2 Musambu uami u bande ko kué, kala uasu ua dizumba; o makuʼami, kia sununuka, a kale kala sata ia ngoloxi." 
Psalms141:3 Ngana, langidila o dikanu diami; uinge o muelu ua mizumbu iami." 
Psalms141:4 Muẋima uami ki u zuame ku kima kiaiibha, ki ngi lalame ni imbamba ia kubhukumuka. Nguami kukaiela athu a kalakala ima iaiibha, o kúdia kuâ kua fina, eme ki ngi ku indi." 
Psalms141:5 Uoso uaiukʼó, kia ngi beta, ngʼila kuma ua ngi bhange mbote; o kia ngi bazela, ki kala kala maji ma ngi uaie, ma ngi tula muene kiambote mu mútue; ió né a jijila uthu uengi, eme ngi kolokota ni kusamba." 
Psalms141:6 O Jingungu ja ilamba se a a lundumuina bhu dikenhe, kiene kiua kievua o maka ami kuma a kidi." 
Psalms141:7 Mukuâ ni ibhasu ia matadi ia di muangena mu kikoka, kiene ue ifuba ietu ia sekumuka ii ia di muangena bhu kanga, dia kina." 
Psalms141:8 Mesu ami-phe ala ko kué, u Ngana, u Jihova; ko kué kuene ku nga dielela, muenhu uami ki u di bote." 
Psalms141:9 Ngi kuate, Ngana, kuma a ngi tela mubhetu, akua kukalakala mangonha, a ngi lungila muene jingànda." 
Psalms141:10 Abhukumuka a fue mu uanda ua te ene, eme ngi bhulake, ngi bhite muene." 
Psalms142:1 Nga suína dízui ni kudikola kua Jihova; ngi dionda, ngi diondolola kua Jihova, ki ngi dixibha." 
Psalms142:2 Nga lundulula muene o ku di tenda kuami bhu pholo iê; nga mu tangela muene o dilamba diami dioso. 
Psalms142:3 Kioso o muẋima uami moxi ki ua ngi kala ni kubhondalala, eie-phe uejiia kiá njila ioso i nga tokala kuila, kuma mu njila i nga kuata, a ngi tela-mu mubhetu." 
Psalms142:4 Nga talesa bhu mbandu iami ia madilu, kana-bhu dilemba; ku ngi lengela ki ku moneka; kana muthu kia mu kuatela kima, né muenhu uami ua di boto." 
Psalms142:5 Nga dikola-phe ko kué, u Jihova, ngixi: Eie-muène u dilengelu diami; eie ngó u dibhandulukilu diami, kʼulu dia mundu kunu." 
Psalms142:6 Ngi suue, Ngana, o kudikola kuami, kuma nga tunuka kiavulu. Ngi kudile kua ió ala ku ngi zuididika, kuma ene, eme a ngi tundu mu nguzu." 
Psalms142:7 Ngi katule o muenhu uami mu kaleia, phala ngijiie kusakidila o dijina dié; athu aiuka a-ndu ngi bhongolokela; mukonda eie ua ngi bhange mbote." 
Psalms143:1 Ngʼivue musambu uami, eie u Jihova; bhetama dítui, u ngʼivue o kudikola kuami; u ngi vutuile mu kukumbidila kué ni kidi kié." 
Psalms143:2 Kana kufunda ni selevende ié; kuma ku mesu mé-eie muthu uebhi u tena kulunga? 
Psalms143:3 Kuma nguma ia zuididika o muenhu uami, ua ngi xinina muene bhoxi, kala ngi muthu ngʼàfua ukulu." 
Psalms143:4 Kala kiki, nzumbi iami ia xala mu kubhondalala, o muẋima moxi, ua ngi bhuuama!" 
Psalms143:5 Ngi lembalala o izuua ia xahulu, ngi xinganeka o ima i ua bhanga jinga; ngi banza o ufunu ua maku mé." 
Psalms143:6 Ngi sunununa o maku mami ko kué, muenhu uami ua ku kala ni dinhota, kala mʼoxi iakukuta." 
Psalms143:7 Endelà-ku, Ngana, mu ku ngʼitaia, kuma o nzumbi iami ia botomoka; kana ku ngi suekela o pholo ié, mbé ki ngi kale kala athu a mu kutuka mu kina." 
Psalms143:8 Ngi bhangese kuivua o kulenduka kué mu kimene, kuma eie-muène nga ku dielela; ngʼidikize o njila ioso i nga tokala kuila, kuma o muenhu uami ua bhetukila ko kué." 
Psalms143:9 Ngi kudile, u Jihova, ku jinguma jami, mukonda ko kué kuene ku ngi lengela mu ku di sueka." 
Psalms143:10 Ngi longe kubhanga o vondadi ié, kuma eie-muène u Nzambi iami; o Nzumbi ié iambote a ngʼendese mu kididi kia sokelela." 
Psalms143:11 Ngi phaphumune, u Jihova, mukonda dia dijina dié; mukonda dia kuiuka kué, ngi katule o muenhu uami mu malamba." 
Psalms143:12 O mu kulenduka kué, enhó, o jinguma jami, a vuze muene nda a jime mbutu; buikisa, Ngana, oso a mu bhondeleka o muenhu uami, kuma eme ngi selevende ié." 
Psalms144:1 A tane-ku! Jihova ditadi diami! kuma ua longo maku ami o kubhânga, ni milembu iami kúlua ita;" 
Psalms144:2 mukua henda iami, kimbaka kiami kia ngi xitila, mbonge iami ia matala, kilolo kiami kia ku ngi bhângela; ngubu iami, nga mu dielela muene; muene ua tolola o mundu phala a ngi belesele." 
Psalms144:3 Jihova, muthu muene ua soko kiebhi, phala eie u kale mu ku mu suua? o mona-muthu u mu tambula kiebhi o konda?" 
Psalms144:4 Kuma muthu muha, mukuâ ni kima kia ngoho; izuua iê i bhita kala kinzúnzumbia." 
Psalms144:5 Bheteka o maúlu, u Jihova, u tuluke; babata milundu phala i fuafue dixi." 
Psalms144:6 Telaka nzaji, u a muange; asa o misongo ié phala a diuane," 
Psalms144:7 Sunununa o lukuaku lué tunde bhulu bhu uala, u ngi kuate, u ngi zaule mu menha masuina, u ngi tambule, bhu maku ma athu a mbutu iengi;" 
Psalms144:8 A bhingi dikanu diâ di zuela izala ioso; o kia leka lukuaku, lu kala lua makutu." 
Psalms144:9 Hinu ngi ku imbila o muimbu uobhe, eie Ngana, u Nzambi; ngi ku xikila o mújika ku mbànza ia kuinhi dia ngoji, mu ku ku ximana." 
Psalms144:10 Eie-muène u bhana o uzonda ku jisobha; eie u kudila selevende ié Davidi ku mukuale ua kiluami. 
Psalms144:11 Ngi kudile, u ngi tambule bhu maku a mbutu ia athu engi; a bhingi o dikanu diâ di zuela izala ioso, o kia leka lukuaku, lu kala lua makutu." 
Psalms144:12 Mbé anʼetu a mala, mu unzangala uâ, a kale kale mixi ióphaphe i kula lusolo tunde mu undenge uâ; o anʼetu a ahatu ue a kale kala matadi a kuatesa bhu thungi, a kala muene mukuâ ni jiphiladi jósete ja palaxu." 
Psalms144:13 Mbé o inganja ietu izale ni huta ia mákudia a ídifua ioso, o ibhaku ietu ku mukáu, i sokoloke jimidi ni jimidi; o jimbudi jetu, ki ji kale isula." 
Psalms144:14 Jingombe jetu ji kale ni nguzu ia kukalakala, ki bhu kale dingi o kimbaka ku ki bula, ki bhu kale kusalumuka bhu bhata, ni ma-kutunda-tunda, ki bhu kale dingi o kudikola-kola mu nzunga jetu." 
Psalms144:15 Azediua o athu a kala mu ukalelu kala iú uala kiki; azediua muene o athu ala ni Jihova kuma Nzambi iâ. 
Psalms145:1 Nga ku zangeleka, eie u Nzambi, u Muenexi uami; ngi tumbula jinga o dijina dié, kutunda muiji kuiza muiji." 
Psalms145:2 Izuua ioso, Ngana, ngi ku tumbula, ngi ku ximana jinga o dijina dié, kutunda muiji kuiza muiji." 
Psalms145:3 Jihova u kôla, ua tokala ku mu ximana kiavulu; o unéne uê kana muthu u tena ku u zubha ku u ijiia!" 
Psalms145:4 Muiji umoxi u tanga o ikalakalu ié, muiji uamukuá nʼa ijiie, ni undanda ué u uene mu kubhanga." 
Psalms145:5 Hinu ungana ué ngi u tanga o fuma, ni ikalakalu ié ia madiuanu." 
Psalms145:6 Ku kale athu a thatha o isuma ié i kuatesa uoma; eme ngi ta mukumbi kuma Nzambi ukôla. 
Psalms145:7 A kà tanga musêndu ua mbote ié iavulu, hé emba o mukumbi ua kukumbidila kué." 
Psalms145:8 Jihova ua lenduka, u bhanga o mbote, u kokoloka kutema, u vula kukuatela o henda." 
Psalms145:9 Jihova ene oso u a bhanga muene mbote, ikalakalu iê ioso u i tambula konda mu henda iê." 
Psalms145:10 Ikalakalu ié ioso i ku sakidila muene, eie u Jihova; o athu é a kazola a ku tumbula." 
Psalms145:11 A kà tumbula o fuma ia ungana ué, a kà ta maka a nguzu ié." 
Psalms145:12 Phala kufumanesa muaʼaxaxi ka anʼa athu o madiuanu mé ma uzonda, ni kuijidisa o fuma ni kuuabha kua utuminu ué." 
Psalms145:13 Utuminu ué, utuminu uanangenena, o ukota ué u xalela ni ku miji ioso." 
Psalms145:14 Jihova u balumuna oso a di bhale, hé u bhetula oso a zeka bhoxi." 
Psalms145:15 Ko kué kuene kua te mesu ene oso-lolo; eie-phe u a bhana o kudia mu thembu iatokala. 
Psalms145:16 Eie uila u jikula o lukuaku lué, mienhu ioso i dia, ikuta ni ima iambote." 
Psalms145:17 Jihova mukua kidi mu njila jê joso, muene ukôla mu ikalakalu iê ioso." 
Psalms145:18 Jihova ua zukama kua ió a dikola kua muene, oso a dikola kua muene mu kidi." 
Psalms145:19 Muene u bhanga o vondadi ia ió oso a mu kala ni uoma; uívua nzongo iâ, ia kudikola, hé u a bhulula." 
Psalms145:20 O Jihova u langa oso a mu zola; iá-phe a bhukumuka hádia u a buikisa. 
Psalms145:21 Dikanu diami di sakalala mu kuximana Jihova; o xitu ioso, kutunda muiji kuiza muiji, i ximane dijina diê dikola." 
Psalms146:1 Ximanenu Jihova! Eie ue u muenhu uami moxi, ximana Jihova!" 
Psalms146:2 Katé bhuoso bhu ngà laiela, nuka ngà kamba kuximana Jihova; ngimba jinga o diximanu dia Nzambi iami, katé bhua kà ngi suka o muenhu uami." 
Psalms146:3 Kana kudielela jingana mu ngongo, mba monʼa muthu ua lémbua kubhandulula, kuma ku monʼa muthu kana-ku kubhuluka kua kima." 
Psalms146:4 Mukonda o anʼathu kubhuima kuâ kúbhua, ene anga a vutuka ku mavu; mu kizuua kienhókio, o ilunji ié ioso ia di boto." 
Psalms146:5 U zediua o muthu ió kubhanduluka kuê kua mu kala kua Nzambi ia Jakobo, ua bhingi o muẋima uê ua dielela kua Jihova muene Nzambi iê." 
Psalms146:6 Ua bhanga o diulu ni ixi, ni menha a kalunga, ni ima ioso iala-mu; mukua kukumbidila o kidi katé ku hádia ni hádia, sé kufula." 
Psalms146:7 U bhesa kaxtiko mu bhângela ió a a bhikisa; hé u bhana kúdia kua ió a tate ni nzala, Jihova u jituna ió a a kuika;" 
Psalms146:8 Jihova u jikula o mesu a ifofo; Jihova u bhetula ió a zeka bhoxi; Jihova u zola ió aiuka. 
Psalms146:9 Jihova u langa jinzuángiza; u tambula konda ia jihukunhi ni atudi; maji o njila-phe ia ísueia u i bhengeleka. 
Psalms146:10 Jihova kà tunda dingi ku ungana uê; o Nzambi ié, u Ziione, u xalela ku miji ioso. Ximanenu Jihova!" 
Psalms147:1 Ximanenu Jihova! kima kiambote o kuimba mù ximana Nzambi ietu; kiki-phe kia touala, kia fuama muene o kuximana." 
Psalms147:2 Jihova u tungisa dingi Jeluzaleme; hé u bhongolola akua Izalaiele a di muangene. 
Psalms147:3 Akexe ni kikote kia muẋima u a saka, hé u a tumba o italákanha ia malamba mâ." 
Psalms147:4 Jithéthembua muene u ji kuata o konda; u jʼixana joso muene mu majina mâ. 
Psalms147:5 Ngana ietu u kôla, ua suína mu kukalakala; o kuijiia kuê ki kuene mbambe." 
Psalms147:6 Jihova u zangeleka ió a di tululula; abhukumuka-phe u a tununa muene katé bhoxi. 
Psalms147:7 Imbidienu Jihova ni kusakidila; xikenu o mbànza mu ximana Nzambi ietu. 
Psalms147:8 Muene, muene ua vungina o diulu ni matuta, u iudika o mvula kunoka mu ngongo, u bhangesa iangu ia uisu kusabhuka ku milundu." 
Psalms147:9 Kiama mu iangu muene u ki bhana o kúdia, ni anʼa ilombelombe kioso ki i dikola kua muene." 
Psalms147:10 Nguzu ia kabalu ki iene i mu uabhela; o inama ia bhebhuluka ia diiala ki iene ia ximana. 
Psalms147:11 Ki uabhela Jihova athu a mu kala ni uôma uê, ni athu oso a dielela jihenda jê-muène." 
Psalms147:12 Ximana Jihova, eie u Izalaiele; ximana Nzambi ié, eie u Ziione." 
Psalms147:13 Mukonda muene ua kolesa dingi o jitalanga ja mabhitu mé; anʼé moxi dié ua a bhana kuzediua. 
Psalms147:14 Muene ua ku bhana o kutululuka katé kua suku o mbambe ié, muene ua ku bhana o kuikuta ni tiliku ia fina." 
Psalms147:15 U tubhula o ngonge iê mu ngongo; kizuelu kiê kienda muene lusolo. 
Psalms147:16 U lalumuna o neve kala lá, ia kindemba kia jimbudi; u kuua kikulakaji kala utókua." 
Psalms147:17 U takujula matadi a mvula kala jimbundu; o ku mbàmbi iê, nanhi u tena kuimana-ku?" 
Psalms147:18 U tuma dingi kizuelu kiê, a sengumuka; kitembue kiê ki bhuka, menha mê ma kunguluka." 
Psalms147:19 Uidikiza o maka mê kua Jakobo, ni ijila ni jiphangu jê kua Izalaiele." 
Psalms147:20 Kana-ku dingi mbutu iʼathu ua a bhange kiki; ki u a ebhula o jiphangu jê, ene ka jʼijiia. Ximanenu Jihova." 
Psalms148:1 Ximanenu Jihova ku maúlu; mu ximanienu ku matala. 
Psalms148:2 Mu ximanienu enu mu ji-anjo jê; 
Psalms148:3 Mu ximanienu enu mu kumbi ni mbeje; Ximanenu enu mu jithéthembua ja kubenha. 
Psalms148:4 Mu ximanienu, diulu dia madiulu, ni enu mu menha muala ku thandu dia diulu." 
Psalms148:5 A ximane o dijina dia Jihova, kuma muene ua zuela ngó, iene ioso ia di bhange." 
Psalms148:6 Iene ioso ua i te mu ididi iê, katé ku mbambe tulʼé! Anga i kalalà-ku muene katé ku hádia ni hádia, ua a xindila ijila, ka tena ku i somboka." 
Psalms148:7 A ximane Jihova, tunde kiá mu ngongo, ni enu mu iama muʼalunga ni mu ididi ioso iazongo;" 
Psalms148:8 Túbhia ni matadi ma mvula, neve ni mbundu, kitembu kia kibhungu, iene ioso i kumbidila o kizuelu kiê." 
Psalms148:9 Milundu ku mukáu, ni tuthuthulundu tuoso; miẋi ia ibundu, ni miẋi ia mixitu;" 
Psalms148:10 Mu iama, ni enu mu ibhaku, mu ibamba i zanzala bhoxi, ni enu mu jinjila mu bhita bhulu;" 
Psalms148:11 Mu jisobha mu ngongo, mu madiembu moso mu jixi; mu jingana, ni enu mu afundixi ku mundu." 
Psalms148:12 Mu nzangi ia mala, ni enu mu anʼa ilumba, mu adiakimi, ni enu mu anʼandenge;" 
Psalms148:13 Ene oso Ximanenu o dijina dia Jihova; mukonda diene ngó o dijina dia a tundu ene oso; muene ngó Sukè-ku mu ngongo ni ku maulu. 
Psalms148:14 Lumbinga lua povo iê ua lu bhana dingi nguzu, kia bhangesa akua kikutu kiê ku mu ximana; ene anʼê a Izalaiele, ene o mundu uê a mu zukama. Ximanenu Jihova!" 
Psalms149:1 Ximanenu Jihova, imbidienu Jihova o muimbu uobhe; mu ximanienu bhu kionge bhua bhongoloka athu ê angene." 
Psalms149:2 Izalaiele a sanguluke ni ió uoso ua mu bhanga; anʼa Ziione a kale ni ngalasa, mua muene muenexi uâ." 
Psalms149:3 A mu ximane o dijina ni kukina; a mu ximane ni kuxika kisàka ni kakoxi. 
Psalms149:4 Kuma Jihova u sanzuka ni mundu uê; muene ua-nda ku uabhesa abelesela ni ubhulukilu uê. 
Psalms149:5 Akua kikutu kiê a di te nzabala; embe ni ngalasa bhu jihama jâ bhua zeka. 
Psalms149:6 Jithathe ja kuximana jinga Nzambi ji kale bhu xingu iâ, o xibhata ia mazu aiadi a i kuate jinge bhu maku;" 
Psalms149:7 mu kuvutula phonzo muʼaxaxi ka matumbu, ni kubhesa o kaxtiko ku akua jixi;" 
Psalms149:8 phala kukuta o jisobha jâ ku malubhambu, ni anʼa jingana mu jingidinhá ja felu;" 
Psalms149:9 Mbé ku a bhanga kioso kia tokala mu kuêla kuâ kuòsoneke; kiene o kijingo kia akua kikutu kiê, o athuʼê angene. Ximanenu Jihova." 
Psalms150:1 Ximanenu Jihova. Ximanenu Nzambi ku mbanza iê ikôla; mu ximanienu ku dimbinza diedikiza o nguzu iê. 
Psalms150:2 Mu ximanienu mukonda dia ikalakalu iê ia undanda; mu ximanienu kala kia tokala mu ulamba uê ua uabha kiavulu. 
Psalms150:3 Mu ximanienu ni dízui dia koloneta; mu ximanienu ni kakoxi ni mbànza. 
Psalms150:4 Mu ximanienu ni ngoma ni kukina; mu ximanienu ni mújika ua jingoji, ni jimbendu." 
Psalms150:5 Mu ximanienu ni jingoma ja ngondo, mu ximanienu ni kuxika ku ji theia ni ku manuma." 
Psalms150:6 Uoso o muenhu uala-ku, uala ni kubhuima, a ximane Jihova. Ximanenu Jihova!" 
Proverbs1:1 Jisabhu ja Solomá, monʼa Davidi, sobha ia Izalaiele;" 
Proverbs1:2 Phala athu ejiie kikala unjimu ni ulongelu ku muenhu iú; mbé a tongolole maka ma unjimu. 
Proverbs1:3 Phala kutambula ulongelu ua tongoloka ni kukuata o uiukilu, ni kilunji, ni kutetuluka;" 
Proverbs1:4 phala kudimuna o ilalu, ni kulonga anandenge o kuijiia, ni kilunji kioso kia fuama." 
Proverbs1:5 Phala njimu ki evua a kule mu unjimu uê, o ua tongoloka a tambule kilunji kia ku di tumina." 
Proverbs1:6 Phala kubatekela o Sabhu ni dilomboluelu diê; ni kubatekela o maka ma jinjimu, ni ixima iâ." 
Proverbs1:7 Uoma ua Jihova diene o dimatekenu dia unjimu. Maji o iôua-phe a dituna o kuijiia kua unjimu ni ulongelu. 
Proverbs1:8 Eie, monʼami, ivua ulongelu ua tatʼenu, kana kueha o ijila ia mamʼenu." 
Proverbs1:9 Kuma ima ienhiʼii ia kà di bhanga kiene o kitundu kia kuzediua ku mútue ué, ni jinzenzela ja kunhenga mu xingu ié." 
Proverbs1:10 Monʼami, akua ituxi se a sota ku kusendula ni izuelu iâ ia ẋanana, eie kana ku a evua." 
Proverbs1:11 O kia kuambela, exi: Tu bande kunu, tu batamene mu kubhubhisa manhinga; tu zombe muthu ua kambe kikuma tu mu bhange-kiu;" 
Proverbs1:12 tu a habule ni muenhu uâ, mukua ni mbila; tu a minhe muene ni muvimba uâ kala a tuluka mu kina." 
Proverbs1:13 Bhene bhu tua-nda kubongela mbole ia ima ioso ia te kiavulu; tua-nda kuizalesa jinzu jetu ni ima ia kubhûnda; 
Proverbs1:14 eie bokona kiá mu kisangela kietu; etu oso muene tu kuate kiá soua imoxi. 
Proverbs1:15 Eie-phe, monʼami, enhó kana ku di ta-nâ kumoxi mu njila iâ; sondolola kinama kié mu hoka jâ;" 
Proverbs1:16 mbata o inama iâ i di sungila mu kubhanga phulu, o kieza mu kuzunza o manhinga a sakalala." 
Proverbs1:17 Ni kidi kiene, njíla iosoioso ku i olekela mubhetu ku mesu mê a ku tala, u i lémbua." 
Proverbs1:18 O iá-phe a di tela mibhetu ia ku di bhubhisa ene-muene o manhinga mâ; ala mu kuzomba o mienhu iâ-ene muene. 
Proverbs1:19 Kiene-phe ki kala o jihoka ja ió oso a hamena nganhu iaxidi; kifua kiki kia ibha, ki jibha o muenhu ua muthu uoso uala na-kiu." 
Proverbs1:20 O Unjimu u kola bhu makanga, ni bhu itanda, ni mu nzunga, uene u tenda u tona." 
Proverbs1:21 Ni mu jiphambu, ni bhua bhongoloka o mundu u ta nzògo; uimana ni kuhandekela ku mielu ia mabhitu ma imbaka, ni mu sanzala u ta maka, uixi:" 
Proverbs1:22 Enu ilalu, ulalu uenu mu suka na-u bhebhi? Enu jisemenhi, usemenhi kifua ki mu ueha dingi? Enu mu ioua, o kuijiia mu di zemba na-ku, kuambe?" 
Proverbs1:23 O ki nga mi bazelʼiki, lungulukenu kiá; talesa, ngi lundulula o Nzumbi iami ku thandu dienu, anga ngi mi ijidisa o maka mami." 
Proverbs1:24 Maji-phe o ki ngʼedi ngʼixana, enu-phe mua di tunu kuitaia; nga sunununa o lukuaku luami, ki bhuala ua ngi batekela," 
Proverbs1:25 enu mua tobhesa o kaiula kami koso, kubazela kuami mua di tunu-ku," 
Proverbs1:26 eme ue nganda ku mi olela ki mi tula o divuua, kioso ki mʼiza o kimbuua, eme nga-nda ku mi bhanga kasekelelu." 
Proverbs1:27 Mu kuila kimbuua kia mi bhixila kala kibuika, divuua dia mi tula kala mabhuku ma temanana, kia kà mi tukumuisa o hadi ni lamba," 
Proverbs1:28 kienhokio ene ela adi kola kokuami, eme-phe ki nga kà etaia; o kia kà di meneka ku ngi sota, ka tena ku ngi sanga." 
Proverbs1:29 Mbata ene o kuijiia a dizemba na-ku; a di tunu kusola o uoma ua Jihova. 
Proverbs1:30 Kaiula kami, ka ka bhana kididi; o kubazela kuami, a ku bhuidila." 
Proverbs1:31 Kala kiki-phe, a kà diaula-ku ku kibundu kia tundu ku uendelu uâ, anga jiphangu jâ-ene muene jʼa kuma." 
Proverbs1:32 Kuma o kubaluka kua jisemenhi, kene o kalunga kâ; o kubhanduluka kua ioua, kuene kua kà a buikisa." 
Proverbs1:33 Maji uoso u ngʼividila ki ngi zuela u tunga u soma, kana-ku kia iibha ki mu kuatesa uoma." 
Proverbs2:1 Monʼami, se u xikina maka mami, anga u kondeka o jingonge jami mu muẋima ué," 
Proverbs2:2 phala ute mátui mé ku unjimu, ni ku lungisa muẋima ué mu kubatekela;" 
Proverbs2:3 se u di ta mutendu mu sota o kuijiia, anga u suinisa dizui dié mu sota o kutongoloka," 
Proverbs2:4 se u sota o kutetuluka kala kia sota phalata, anga u sota ni muanu kala kia sota jimbongo jʼòsueke," 
Proverbs2:5 eie-phe ua-nda kuijiia uoma ua Jihova, anga u dʼijiia kiambote ni Nzambi." 
Proverbs2:6 Kuma Jihova muene u bhana o unjimu; o mu kanu diê muene mu tunda o kuijiia, muene mu tunda o kilunji." 
Proverbs2:7 O unjimu ua kidi muene ua u lundila oso emana mixima nzanza; Nzambi iene o ngubu i xitila oso enda mu kuiuka. 
Proverbs2:8 Phala kufikidila o jihoka ja ubatuilu uambote; o njila ia athu ê angene u i tambula konda. 
Proverbs2:9 Bhenhobho-phe eie ua-nda kuijiia kioso ki kala o kuiuka, ni ki kala o kilunji, ni ki kala o kufundisa kua kidi; ni jinjila joso ja fuama." 
Proverbs2:10 Mukonda o unjimu ua-nda kubokona mu muẋima ué, o kuijiia anga kuuabhesa o muenhu ué." 
Proverbs2:11 O kilunji kiambote-phe kia-nda ku ku bhaka, o kutongoloka kua-nda ku ku kondejeka muene;" 
Proverbs2:12 mbé o ku ku ebhesa o njila ia ibhʼoio, ni ku ku kudila ku muthu u zuela isunji," 
Proverbs2:13 o athu ió a xia ikoka ia kuimana mixima nzanza, nʼa kuata o kuenda mu jinjila ja kitombe;" 
Proverbs2:14 athu a sangulukila o ku bhanga o phulu, anga atanena o ubalukutu ua akua kubhanga kiaiibha." 
Proverbs2:15 Athu edi o ikoka iâ ienda jihonda joso ni ibhèngele; o kuenda kuâ, iá ku pholo, iá ku dima!" 
Proverbs2:16 Mbé ku ku kudila ku muhatu ua ngene ni ku muhatu uengi mukuaʼxi ia dikanga u bhomba ni izuelu iê; 
Proverbs2:17 o muhatu u xa diiala dia undenge uê, anga o kikutu kia Nzambi iê u ki jimba." 
Proverbs2:18 Mbata onzo iê i bhekesa kalunga, o jinjila jê ji bheka mu bombo dia madifundu." 
Proverbs2:19 Oso a kutuka mu njila ja muene, ka tena dingi ku sukunuka-mu; jihoka jiia ku muenhu a lémbua ku ji bonga." 
Proverbs2:20 A ku dimuna-phe, phala eie u di tele mu njila ia athu a mbote, u aluke o jihoka ja athu aiuka." 
Proverbs2:21 Kuma athu ambote ene a kà tunga mu ngongo, oso aiuka muẋima a kà nangenena muenhomo." 
Proverbs2:22 Maji akua-phulu mu ngongo a kà a buikisa-mu, o ibalukutu a kà a vuza-mu muene." 
Proverbs3:1 Monʼami, ngonge iami ku i jimbe, o muẋima ué ubhake ijila iami." 
Proverbs3:2 Kuma iene ia-nda ku ku vudisa o izuua ié; i ku bandekezela mivu ia muenhu ni kutululuka. 
Proverbs3:3 O mbote ni kidi kanaku i jimba; kutila-iu muene mu xingu ié, soneka-iu ku dibaia dia muẋima ué." 
Proverbs3:4 Bhene-phe ua-nda kumena o kiadi ni diximanu ku mesu ma Nzambi ni ku athu. 
Proverbs3:5 Dielela kua Jihova ni muẋima ué uoso; kana kudielela ngó o kilunji kié 
Proverbs3:6 Mu suue muene ngó mu mauendelu mé moso, muene a iukise o njila jé joso." 
Proverbs3:7 Ku di-mone unjimu ku mesu mé eʼmuene; ku phulu tunda-ku, u xile Jihova," 
Proverbs3:8 ienhiʼii iene o milongo phala o ngombo ié, uene o uôngo phala o ifuba ié." 
Proverbs3:9 Jihova mu jingise ni ima ioso i uala na-iu; mu bhane ku jisamba-tènde ja ima ioso ia kumona kué. 
Proverbs3:10 Kienhiki-phe o itula ié ia-nda kuizala kinéne ni tiliku, o matangi mé anga ma ẋamujuka ni maluvu." 
Proverbs3:11 Monʼami o kulonga kua Ngana ki ku ku kuate usudi; muene kia ku bazela, eie ki ki ku ibhile." 
Proverbs3:12 Kuma Ngana, uoso ua mu zola u mu longa; mukua ni tata kia longa mona uosoʼa mu indila kumona mbote." 
Proverbs3:13 Uazediua o muthu uoso ua bongo o unjimu, ni muthu uoso ua tambula o kuijiia." 
Proverbs3:14 Kuma o muenhú uenji uê kota, o uenji ua phalata ndenge; o dibhandulukilu diê kota, o ulu ua fina-fina ndenge." 
Proverbs3:15 O suilu iê kota mu kuta, madiiamande ndenge; ima ioso i uindʼoio ki i xikina ku i sokesa ni diene." 
Proverbs3:16 Ku lukuaku luê lua kadilu kuala dibandekezu dia izuua, o ku lukuaku luê lua kiasu maunvama ni kijingu." 
Proverbs3:17 Jihoka jê jihoka ja malau, o jinjila jê joso jinjila ja kutululuka." 
Proverbs3:18 Oso a u kuata, a bongo muxi ua muenhu; azediua athu oso a u jijila." 
Proverbs3:19 Katé Jihova muene, ixi ua i bhange ni unjimu, o diulu ua di iudika ni kuijiia kuê." 
Proverbs3:20 O mu kuijiia kuê muene mua jikukila o majiia ni makôlo; anga o matuta ma suka mbundu. 
Proverbs3:21 Monʼami ima ienhiʼii ki i kubhue ku mesu; lunda o unjimu ua kidi, ni kukala ni kilunji kiambote." 
Proverbs3:22 Kuma iene i kala muenhu phala o nzumbi ié, i di-bhanga makembu ambote phala o xingu iê." 
Proverbs3:23 Kienhokio-phe njila ioso i uenda, ua-nda ku i enda ni kudielela sè hele, o kinama kié ki kia-nda ku dibhukana." 
Proverbs3:24 O kioso ki u zeka, uzeka muene sè uoma; kidi-ze, u nhoha muene, o kilu kié kʼila muene nzué!" 
Proverbs3:25 Ku kala ni kekenha, ia kima kiaiibha kiza mu lusolo, né-mbe kuiza o kibuika kia athu a bhumu." 
Proverbs3:26 Mbata eie, o Jihova muene o dixamenenu dié; muene u langa inama ié phala kufue bhu ngoji." 
Proverbs3:27 Muthu uoso ua tokala ku mu bhanga mbote, eie kufule ku mu bhanga-iu se o lukuaku lué luala ni kutena kua ku ki bhanga." 
Proverbs3:28 Mukuenu kana ku mu ila: Ndé, hanji, mungu uize, ngi ku bhane kiua; se o kiene uala na-kiu kiá kindala." 
Proverbs3:29 Mukuenu kana ku mu xinganeka ima iaiibha ku muẋima, mukonda ki ua tungu-nêʼ okio, ua ku dielela." 
Proverbs3:30 Kana kuzoka ni muthu ka ku bhange kima; o ku zoka ni mukuenu kale ua ku bange kima kiaiibha. 
Proverbs3:31 Ku kale ni luimbi lua kiiala kia hame; kana ku sola hoka iosoioso ia tokala ku mauendelu mê. 
Proverbs3:32 Kuma Ngana ua di-zemba ni athu abhukumuka, maji o kikutu kiê u ki jituina athu oso aiuka muẋima." 
Proverbs3:33 Mázui ma Jihova u ma sanga mʼonzo ia athu a bhumu; maji o dibesá diê diala ku dibhata dia athu aiuka. 
Proverbs3:34 Kutanga kidi, o jisemenhi muene ue u a bhanga kasekelelu; u bhana-phe kiadi kua oso a talamana." 
Proverbs3:35 Jinjimu à lundula kijingu; maji o iôua-phe à di bongesa malebhu. 
Proverbs4:1 Enu anʼami ivenu ulongelu ua tatʼenu, jikulenu mátui mu tambule kilunji." 
Proverbs4:2 Mukonda ngala ku mi sámbukisa ulongelu ua mbote; ngonge iami ki mu i bhane dikunda. 
Proverbs4:3 Mbata eme ue nga kexi ngi mona ni tatʼetu; ngi muzelembete, eme-muène ngó a ngi zola kua mamʼetu." 
Proverbs4:4 Muene anga u kuata ku ngi longa, uixi: Muẋima ué u kuate kiambote o maka mami; aiuka ijila iami, u mone muenhu." 
Proverbs4:5 Sota unjimu, sota ku tongoloka, o maka-phe ma tunda mu kanu diami ku a jimbe mba u a ta dikunda." 
Proverbs4:6 O unjimu ku u ehe, uene uende ni ku ku langa; zola-u, uene-phe ua kà ku kala kimbaka kié." 
Proverbs4:7 Kima kiala kota ku muenhu ua muthu o unjimu; sota-phe o unjimu ni kutongoloka; ima ioso i uavu bhana-iu muene mu kusota unjimu. 
Proverbs4:8 Zangeleka unjimu, unjimu u ku zangeleke; o ki u kuata, uene u ku muesa ujitu." 
Proverbs4:9 Unjimu ua-nda ku ku zuika kitundu kia kuzediua ku mútue uê; anga u ku bhana kijinga kia matunda. 
Proverbs4:10 Ivua, monʼami, u xikine ulongelu uami, phala mivu ia muenhu ué ivule." 
Proverbs4:11 Mu njila ia unjimu mune mu nga ku longela; nga ku kutukisa mu njila ja muenhu. 
Proverbs4:12 Mu kuila-mu, makanda mé ma dixala kiambote; o ki uila ngi lenga lusolo, ku tena ku di bhukana." 
Proverbs4:13 O ulongelu ua ku kubazela, ku uehe; lunda-u muene, kuma uene o muenhu ué." 
Proverbs4:14 Kana kuẋikina ku ila mu phangu ia iala iabhumu; kana kubhita mu njila ia akua ituxi. 
Proverbs4:15 Mu njila iâ tunda-mu; ku bhite-mu, kondolokela kuengi, u bhite dikanga." 
Proverbs4:16 Kiene kialʼokio, kaii ku kilu, se ka bhange phulu; o kia kamba ku luezesa muthu mu njila jê, kilu ki a lenga mu mesu." 
Proverbs4:17 A kaka mu kudia mbolo ia ngene, anua vinhu ia kubhunda." 
Proverbs4:18 Maji o njila ia athu a iuka-phe i di bhanga mukua ni mukengeji ua kimene, uia ni ku di bandekeza mu kuzela katé kuma ki ku zubha o kúkia." 
Proverbs4:19 O njila-phe ia akua kubhanga kiaiibha mukua ni usuku-ua-nzumba; a di bhukana ku kima, maji ka kʼijiia mba kima kiahi." 
Proverbs4:20 Eie monʼami, suua maka mami, bhana mátui ku ioso i ngala ku ku longa." 
Proverbs4:21 Maba u ngala ku ku longa ka ku bhue ku mesu; lunda-u muene muʼaxaxe ka muẋima ué. 
Proverbs4:22 Kuma a di bhanga muenhu kua ió oso a di bonga-nâ, ene o kudisanza kua mukutu uâ." 
Proverbs4:23 Ku ioso ia fuama ku langa, langa o muẋima ué, kuma mu muẋima muene muala o dimatekenu dia matundilu moso ma muenhu." 
Proverbs4:24 Ambula o kuzuela kua ibhengèle; o phekalu i tanga mizumbu, ehaiu." 
Proverbs4:25 Mesu mé a tale muene ku pholo, o ibhebhetelu ié lungisa-iu muene kiambote mu njila." 
Proverbs4:26 Hoka i u bhita, dianga ku i xinganeka kiambote; o jinjila jé joso ji ku kale ja uhete!" 
Proverbs4:27 Kana ku kuata uendelu ua ku takujuka ngó, né ku dilu mba ku kiasu; o kinama kié sondolola-kiu mu kubhanga phulu." 
Proverbs5:1 Monʼami, tongolola kiambote o unjimu uami, o dítue dié dʼividile o ulongelu uami ua kuijiia." 
Proverbs5:2 Nda u kaiele kioso ki ngala ku ku dimuna; o mizumbu ié i lunde o kuijiia. 
Proverbs5:3 Mukonda o mizumbu ia muhatu uengi, i zunzumuka ixila ia uiki, o mu kanu diê mu belesela muene kiambote, maji ndenge." 
Proverbs5:4 Maji o dizubhilu diê dʼila lokoso, di lula muene kala kingululu, di toma ku muenhu kala xibhata ia mazu aiadi." 
Proverbs5:5 Inama iê i kulumuka muʼalunga; O uendelu uê u lenguluka kubheka muthu mu inferno. 
Proverbs5:6 O njila iia ku muenhu muene ka i xinganeka; jinjila jê u ji tesa jihonda, katé ki u tokoka ku ji tongolola mba ja lungu kuebhi." 
Proverbs5:7 Kiki-phe enu mu ana, ngʼivienu kunu, maka ma dikanu diami ki mu a lueze." 
Proverbs5:8 Muhatu u kala kiki, eie mu sondoloke, eʼkana ku bhixila bhu muelu uaʼnzu iê." 
Proverbs5:9 Phala o jimbongo jé ku ji bhane ngoho ku akuenu, o mivu ié ki i di bote bhu maku a kisuéia." 
Proverbs5:10 Phala ki ki bhite kuila mbote jé ji bhandulula ngó athu engi; o ikalakalu i ua talela hadi, ki i bokone mu bhata dia muthu uengi." 
Proverbs5:11 Eie anga dizubhilu dié dikala dia ku kumba, kioso o jixitu ku mukutu ué ki ji kuata ku di huha ni hadi," 
Proverbs5:12 uixi-phe: Tamanu nga bhele mátui! Kokolo diami dia ku kamba kuívua kia ngi bazela jinga! 
Proverbs5:13 Jimesene jami kia ngi longa jinga, dízui diâ ki nga di suuile; jindongixi jami, tata, né ngó ku a bhana mátui, lémbua!" 
Proverbs5:14 Sumbala mu ku zanga kuoso mundu muene ua kexi ku ngi jinguluka, ngi kala muene bhu kionge." 
Proverbs5:15 Nuá-phe menha ma kixima ki ua kande é-muène; ni ma jihungulule ji fuáfua bhu fixi ié. 
Proverbs5:16 Kifua jifiẋi jé jenda ni kubhubhila ngó mu kanga, o jihonga ja menha mé ji kungulukila muene ngó kuoso-kuoso, mu jinzunga?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ji kale-phe ngó jé é muène, ki ji kale ja kisangela ni athu engi." 
Proverbs5:18 Bhʼotho ié bhu kale kuzediua! Eie enda ni ku sanguluka jinga ni muhatuʼé ua tundunâ undenge. 
Proverbs5:19 Jithulu jê ku soke mu thembu joso; a ku uabhele kala mukaji a mbambi, a ku sangulukise ni uuabhelu uê kala ua kasexi! O henda iê iende ni ku ku sunga izuua ioso katé ku hádia ni hadia." 
Proverbs5:20 Monʼami, tata, phalʼahi u kala mu kusenduka ni luimbi lua muhatu uengi, anga u nhohena dingi bhu jihata ja muhatu ka ku tokala?" 
Proverbs5:21 Mbata mauendelu ma muthu-phe mene ku mesu ma Jihova; muene ukala mu kutongesa muoso mu bhita o muthu. 
Proverbs5:22 O muthu ua bhumu-ze, ikuma iê iene ia-nda ku mu kuika; a mu kuta muene ni mikolo ia ituxi iê-muène." 
Proverbs5:23 Ua kà fua muene mukonda dia kukamba kuívua kioso kia mu bazela jinga, ua kà jimbidila mukonda dia ulaji uavulu kinéne." 
Proverbs6:1 Monʼami, se ua kexila mukuenu ku pholo ia kudia dikongo, se muthu uengi eie ua mu sununuina o lukuaku lué." 
Proverbs6:2 Eie-phe ua di-suikika mu uanda ua kizuelu kia tundu mu kanu dié, ua di kutu ku maka mé." 
Proverbs6:3 Inda, monʼami bhanga-phe kiki u sukunuke; mukonda eie ua di bhale kiá bhu lukuaku lua mukuenu muenhó," 
Proverbs6:4 mesuʼé kua ehele kuia ku kilu, o ibhebhetelu ié ku i ehele kunhoha." 
Proverbs6:5 Di sukunune, mukua ni mbambi bhu lukuaku lua dinhanga, uila muene kala njila ia sutunuka bhu lukuaku lua mutedi a mibhetu." 
Proverbs6:6 Eie u musonde, ndé kà di kunde ni xixikinha; tongolola kiambote o jinjila jê, u dimuke." 
Proverbs6:7 Sumbala ka moneka dikota, ka moneka fixiiadi, kene ni sobha," 
Proverbs6:8 hanji-phe, bhu mvula u huka kúdia kuê; o bhu thembu ia kumuna, muene ue u bhongolola idima hé u bhaka." 
Proverbs6:9 Eie-phe, na musonde, tata, u zeka katé bhebhi? Ola kuẋi i ua kà phaphumuka ku kilu kié?" 
Proverbs6:10 O ki ua mu kuila kindala ku kilu, kindala eiʼu koxilla, kindala eiʼu bunjika maku bhu thulu phala ku zeka-ku hanji." 
Proverbs6:11 Ua-nda ku tukumuka uadiama ua kuiza kala muii, o jiphaxi ja ku tula kala kiiala kia maneka." 
Proverbs6:12 O muthu uala ni Kadiaphemba, uezala ni ituxi, uenda ni usemenhi mu kanu diê." 
Proverbs6:13 U bhalula ni mesu, uzuela ni inama, u bhanga ijimbuete ni milembu." 
Proverbs6:14 Mu muẋima mua mu tungu usuéia, mu ithangana ioso ufunha jindunge jaiibha, uenda ni kukuna jimvunda mu jinvunda." 
Proverbs6:15 Kienhiki utukumuka kibuika kia mu tula, anga ki mu buikisa ni lusolo katé kia jikinina, ni kubalumuka dingi ka tena." 
Proverbs6:16 Ima isamanu iii Jihova ua di zemba na-iu, o kia sambuadi-phe kua muene kisunji:" 
Proverbs6:17 o mesu ma tala ni izala, o dimi di tanga makutu, o maku ma zunza manhinga ma muthu ua kambe kikuma," 
Proverbs6:18 muẋima u funha ixinganeku ia bolo, inama i sakalala mu kulenga phala kubhanga phulu," 
Proverbs6:19 o mbangi ia mangonha itanga makutu, ni mukua kuzokesa jiphange u kuna jimvunda muʼaxaxe kâ." 
Proverbs6:20 Eie monʼami aiuka o kitumu kia tatʼenu, o ngonge ia mamʼenu-phe ku i ehe." 
Proverbs6:21 Imʼiii kutila-iu muene ku muẋima ué, u xalele na-iu mu thembu joso; nhenga-na-iu mu xingu ié." 
Proverbs6:22 O ki uia mu kunhunga, iene i ku endesa; kioso ki u zeka, iene i ku langa; o ki u phaphumuka ku kilu, ienda ni ku ku zuelesa." 
Proverbs6:23 Kuma kitumu kandeia, o ngonge mukengeji; o kubazela kua ku ku iukisa, iene o njila ia muenhu." 
Proverbs6:24 Phala ku ku langa, u bhuluke ku muhatu uaiibha, ni ku maka ma touala ma ku bhomba na-u kuala muhatu uengi." 
Proverbs6:25 Uuabhelu ua pholo iê ki u ku sendule mu muẋima ué; muene kia kuata ku ku talesa, mesu mê kana ku a ehela ku ku diangula." 
Proverbs6:26 Mbata muhatu ua kidianzunga, u ku xisa bhu ditala dia ku kuata kubhinga kambolo; kuma o ndumbu ia muhatu, u seia o muenhu uoso ua beta kuta kiambote." 
Proverbs6:27 Mbé muthu utena kusueka túbhia bhu homba, anga izuatu iê i kamba kujikata?" 
Proverbs6:28 Inga muthu u tena kuendela kulu dia makala ma uama, nʼa kamba kuẋomoka inama?" 
Proverbs6:29 Kiene-phe kibhita ni uoso u di-bonga ni mukaji a mukuá; kà kamba kikuma, uoso ngó u mu tuta lukuaku." 
Proverbs6:30 Muiii, kia nomuena kudila ngó o nzaia iê ia mu kuata, ka mu tembula." 
Proverbs6:31 Maji, se a mu sange, ua-nda kufuta lusambuadi; soua ioso ia dibhata diê iia-mu." 
Proverbs6:32 Maji o uoso u ta phanda ni muhatu, ua kambe kilunji; kuma mu ku ki bhanga, ua-lu jikinisa o muenhu uê." 
Proverbs6:33 U tambula kibetu, u bonga malebhu; o môndo uê ki ua kà bhua." 
Proverbs6:34 Kuma o diiala diê, kia-nda kuila ua fuluka ni difuba, mu kizuua kia kuvutula o phonzo, ka-nda kutena ku mu loloka." 
Proverbs6:35 Né uedi, ngi futa kima kiahi, muene ka xikina; né ua mu vudixila maujitu, muene ka xikina ku ma tambula." 
Proverbs7:1 Eie monʼami, tata, aiuka maka mami, ijila iami kondeka-iu moxi dia muẋima ué." 
Proverbs7:2 Ijila iami, aiuka na-iu muene, u mone muenhu; ngonge iami, kondeka-iu kala o anʼa mesu mé." 
Proverbs7:3 Kutila ijila iami ku milembu ié, soneka-iu ue ku dibaia dia muẋima ué." 
Proverbs7:4 Tangela o Unjimu, kuamba: Eie u phangʼiami ia muhatu; o Kusunguluka ne mu ambele, uixi: Eie u ndandu iami." 
Proverbs7:5 Enhá ende ni ku ku inga, mbé ki u mona mukajiʼa mukuenu, ni kʼiza muhatu uengi ni ku ku zeia ni maka mê." 
Proverbs7:6 Mbata kioso ki ngʼemanene bhu njanena iaʼnzo iami, hé ngi kuata ku zonguela mu mazungu mê," 
Proverbs7:7 nga mono muʼaxaxe ka ilalu, hé ngi tongolola bhuʼaxaxii ka minzangala, mukuenze umoxi, ua kambe kilunji." 
Proverbs7:8 Iu bhita mu nzunga katé bhu thungi, ulunga mu njila iia kʼonzo iê;" 
Proverbs7:9 kuma kua fulamana kiá, ngoloxi kiá muene, kumbi dia koloka, ngoloxi ia lémbe kiá, o kuma kua vundu muene bui, kitombe kia usuku." 
Proverbs7:10 Ngi mona-phe muhatu iu tunda iuná, uala kuia ku mu kauidila, ni ukembu ua kiuaia, masunga ua ma te kiá ku muẋima uê." 
Proverbs7:11 Muhatu muenhú, ulolo u vula, ni jimvunda; mʼonzo iê kene dingi ku nanga-mu, o inama iê ia nanga ngó ni kuenda." 
Proverbs7:12 Kindala ua tundu, iú mu nzunga, iú bhu kitanda, uzombela kuku, uila koko, iú bhu thungi ni kuzongojola." 
Proverbs7:13 Ua di-bongo-nê, hé u mu bhana beju; ni pholo ia kambe o sonhi, uixi:" 
Proverbs7:14 Lelu ngala ni jisata ja paze ku bhata; kuma lelu ngi kumbidila o jihasa jami ji nga di hambelela. 
Proverbs7:15 Kiene ki ngʼejiia ku ku kauidila, ni ku sota o pholo ié ni makidikidi, eme-phe nga ku bongo muene!" 
Proverbs7:16 Hama iami nga i zadiʼê kiá, nga i te muene kidivunga kia muhota ni thanga ia kubolodala, ni malasola ma linho ia fina, ia tundu ku Ejitu." 
Proverbs7:17 Hama ioso muene eme nga i sangela ni uasu ua dizumba, ni uxila, ni kanela." 
Proverbs7:18 Zá-phe, tua kà sungile ni ku di fembesa usuku uoso katé kuákie; tu te hanji dibasa dietu, henda jetu jibhue." 
Proverbs7:19 Mbata munumeʼami, ku bhata kalaku; uende njila ia dikanga;" 
Proverbs7:20 Bhu maku uambata kasaku kʼezala kitadi; ió kuiza kuê, mbeji ki ia thethamʼiki, kikale ifua muene!" 
Proverbs7:21 Ua mu bhombo muene kienhiki ni ʼkumba dia maka, ua mu sèndula ni mizumbu iê katé kia mu tolola." 
Proverbs7:22 Muene-phe hê uia ni ku mu kaiela mukuâ ni ngombe iia bhu dijibhilu mu ku i jibha; uia kala mbambi ia mu lengela kúfua mu uanda, mba ngulungu, ia fu bhu mubhetu." 
Proverbs7:23 Uia muene ni kuenda katé kia mu asa o musongo mu izavu, kala njila i lengela o kuia mu fua bhu ngoji, ka kʼijiia kuila a mu kotekela mubhetu u mu dia o muenhu." 
Proverbs7:24 Kiki-phe, eie monʼami, ngi bhane mátui, maka ma tunda mu kanu diami bhaka-nâ ku muẋima." 
Proverbs7:25 Muẋima ué ki u di-texile ku jinjila jê-muène; ku kuate ku nhunganena mu tuhoka tua muhatu ió. 
Proverbs7:26 Mukonda muene uabhalesa iu ua bûba kiá mundu ua nzungule, avulu muene a buikisa muhatu ió ku undumbu uê." 
Proverbs7:27 Onzo iê kifua iene o ikoka iia mu kina, hé isombokela ni ku kulumuka muene katé mu bombo dia kalunga." 
Proverbs8:1 Abha manhi unjimu ki uala ku dikola lua vulu muene; o kuijiia kua muẋima ue ki kuala kubhana mbimbi iê? 
Proverbs8:2 Ni bhu thala ia milundu, ni ku mbanduʼa njila, ni bhu jiphambu u u sanga." 
Proverbs8:3 Ni bhu mbanduʼa mabhitu a diembu, ni bhu muelu ua mbanza, ni bhu mielu iaʼnzo, u tenda u tona," 
Proverbs8:4 enu mu athu, enuʼenu ngala ku mi kolela! Dizui diami ngi di lungisa mu ku handekela anʼa athu." 
Proverbs8:5 Enu mu ilalu, di longienu ki kala o kudimuka; enu mu ioua, Sotenu muẋima ua unjimu." 
Proverbs8:6 Ivenu, mukonda nga-nda ku tanga ima ia uhete; o mizumbu iami ia-nda kujikuka mu ku zuela ima ia iuka." 
Proverbs8:7 Mbata dikanu diami di tanga o kidi, mizumbu iami ia di-zemba ni uzuelelu ua kubhuma." 
Proverbs8:8 Maka moso ma dikanu diami, u ma sanga mu uiukilu uê; se u ma tekula, ku sange-mu ngó ibhengele mba kubhuma." 
Proverbs8:9 Uoso u ma batekela kiambote, usanga kuma, maka ma kidi; oso a di longo ia a ejiia, a a mona kuiuka." 
Proverbs8:10 Xikinenu ulongelu uami, ki mu xikine phalata; kuma o kuijiia kota, o ulu ua fina uòtungule, ndenge." 
Proverbs8:11 Kuma unjimu kota, o madiiamande ndenge; ima ioso inda o muthu ki i soka ni unjimu." 
Proverbs8:12 Eme, ngi Unjimu, nga tungu bhuamoxi ni kudimuka, eme nga bongo phangu ni ndunge." 
Proverbs8:13 Uoma ua Jihova, o kueha kia ibha; nga di zemba ni ukumbu, ni izala, ni uendelu uaiibha, ni dikanu dizuela isunji." 
Proverbs8:14 O phangu ni ndongo, ni unjimu ua kidi, u i sanga kokuami; eme ngi kilunji, ni undanda eme ngene na-u." 
Proverbs8:15 O jisobha ki u a mona kutuminʼokio, ni ilamba kioso kia iukisa o milonga, eme-muène na Unjimu ngala ku a bha-kiu." 
Proverbs8:16 O ilamba ni atumini, eme nga a bhana o kutumina, kumoxi ni afundixi oso mu ngongo." 
Proverbs8:17 Nga zola oso a ngi zola, a di meneka mu ku ngi sota a ngi sanga muene." 
Proverbs8:18 Ni jimbongo ni kijingu, ioso iii eme ngene na-iu; ngala muene katé ni umvama unanga ni kuiuka." 
Proverbs8:19 Kibundu kiami eme kota mu kuta, o ulu ua fina ndenge, né a u zunzila kuebhiʼoko; jimbote jami eme kota, phalata ia kutungula, ndenge." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngi batesa muthu mu njila ia kuiuka, ngi mu endesa muʼaxaxi ka jihoka ja kutetuluka." 
Proverbs8:21 Phala ngi lunduise makamba mami o jimbote ji nangenena, ni ngʼizalese o jingonga jâ ni jimbongo." 
Proverbs8:22 Jihova ua ngi bhanga tunde bhu diandekelu dia jinjila jê, munhá ngó uila ibhangelu iê ka i iudika luua, eme a ngi diangela ku ioso ia bhange." 
Proverbs8:23 Tunde dia tunde, eme a ngi unda ni maji, tunde ku dimatekenu kioso ngoho oxi ka i andeka luua ku i umba." 
Proverbs8:24 Ki kua kexi luua makôlo kioso kia ngi vuala eme, ki kua kexi luua majiia ezala ni menha." 
Proverbs8:25 Milundu ki ia muene luua kidiki, ki kua kexi luua tu-thuthulundu, muene mua ngi vuala eme." 
Proverbs8:26 Oxi iene ka i bhangele luua, mba mikáu, mba ngó dimatekenu dia fufutila ioso-ioso iai mundu." 
Proverbs8:27 Muene kioso kia kexi ku polondala maúlu, eme kiá bhobho; kia kexi mu xinda o kikondoluese ku mizumbu ia mukiukuluku." 
Proverbs8:28 Ni kia kexi ku xikika o matuta bhulu, kia fikidila o majiia ma mukiukuluku," 
Proverbs8:29 ni kia xindila musanza ua kalunga o mbambe, phale menha mê ki ma somboke o mbambe iê; ni kioso kia kubu o madiesesa maʼxi," 
Proverbs8:30 eme-phe nga kexi-nê kumoxi bhenhobho, ngi dixibulu diê; kizuua ni kizuua ngi kala ngi minangu iê, ngi kuata kusannguluka ni kukemba bhu pholo iê ithangana ioso." 
Proverbs8:31 Oxi-phe kioso ki ia tungu kiá, ngi kuata ku di kenha ku thandu dia xi ia kutunga ni kusoma, ngi kala ni malau mami muʼaxaxi ka anʼa athu." 
Proverbs8:32 Kiki-phe enu, mu ana, ngʼivenu, kuma azediua ió oso aiuka o ijila iami, anga a kaiela mu jinjila jami." 
Proverbs8:33 Ividilenu kia mi longa, mu dimuke, ki mu di tune-kiu." 
Proverbs8:34 Uoso muthu u ngi bhana mátui muene ua zediua, anga uia ni ku ngi xikamena bhu mielu iami kizuua ni kizuua; hé ukuata ku kingila bhu mielu bhuoso bhu ngi bokuena." 
Proverbs8:35 Mbata uoso ua ngi sange eme, ua sange muenhu; ni Jihova muene ue u mu lendukila, kuma u mu bhanga favolo." 
Proverbs8:36 Maji uoso u ngi ta kituxi, ua kakula o muenhu uê muene; kuma ene oso a ngi zemba eme, andala kalunga, ala mu kenga kúfua." 
Proverbs9:1 Unjimu uatungu kiá onzo iê, iambata sambuadi dia ngunji." 
Proverbs9:2 Ua jibha kiá ibhaku iê, o vinhu iê ua i lungu kiá bhuamoxi, ua zale kiá o meza mê." 
Proverbs9:3 Ua tumu tuhetu tuê kubhita ni kuambela athu, ni ku a exana tunde bhu thalʼèlele ia diembu, uixi:" 
Proverbs9:4 Uoso uala sébhue, eze kunu kokuami. A kamba kilunji ua ambela, uixi:" 
Proverbs9:5 Zenu, mudie ku mbolo iami, mu nue ku vinhu i nga lungisa kiambote phala enu." 
Proverbs9:6 O uoua ehenu-u mu mone muenhu, di tedienu mu njila ia kilunji!" 
Proverbs9:7 Muthu uoso u sota kuiukisa o semenhi, ku mu iza dilebhu; ió uoso u bazela o muthu ua bhumu, u di bhekela jindaka." 
Proverbs9:8 Kana kubazela semenhi, phala muene ka ku zembe; se uambe kubazela, bazela-phe o njimu, muene ua-nda ku ku zola." 
Proverbs9:9 O njimu mu longe, muene ua-nda ku beta dingi kudimuka, muthu ua iuka mu tetulule, u mu mone kiʼaia ku pholo ni kutongoloka." 
Proverbs9:10 Mukonda o uoma ua Jihova diene o dimatekenu dia kuijiia; o unjimu uala mu kudijiia ni Ió Ukôla. 
Proverbs9:11 Mbata ko kuamiʼeme kuene ku ua kà muena o kuvula kua izuua ié, hé a kà ku bandekezela-ku mivu ia muenhu." 
Proverbs9:12 Eie se ukala u njimu, mbote ié eʼmuene i u bonga-ku; o ki u kala-phe u semenhi, eʼmuene ua di-bhange-kiu." 
Proverbs9:13 Muhatu ua dilaji-ze kavuanza kavula; muene u kala kiximba kia ngoho-phe, kʼejiia kima." 
Proverbs9:14 Uxikama ku kialu bhu muelu uaʼnzo iê, bhu thalʼèlele ia diembu," 
Proverbs9:15 phala kuenda ni kuixana oso ala kubhita, ió oso muene ala kuenda njila iâ, uixi:" 
Proverbs9:16 Uoso kilalu, a tale kunu. A kambe kilunji u a ambela, uixi:" 
Proverbs9:17 Menha ma kunhana ma touala kiengi, o mbolo ia kudia ni kusuama kuuabha kuahi ngó!" 
Proverbs9:18 Maji muene-phe ka kʼijiia, kuila bhenhobho bhene bhua di lunjika o imbi; o asonhi a muhatu muenhó u a sanga oso bhu hole ia bombo dia kalunga." 
Proverbs10:1 Jisabhu ja Solomá. Mona ua dimuka u bheka kusanguluka kua tatʼâ; maji mona-phe kia kala dilaji dia hatu, u bheka lamba diahi ngó kua mamʼâ!" 
Proverbs10:2 Jimbongo ja kubhuma jene mu di bota; maji o kuiuka ku kudila muthu ku kalunga. 
Proverbs10:3 Jihova kene kuila muthu ua iuka u mu ehelela mu nzala; maji o luimbi lua mukua ituxi u lu vutula kuema. 
Proverbs10:4 Uoso u kalakala ni lukuaku lua usonde, u kala ngadiama; maji o lukuaku lua akua midimu-phe lu bhekela umvuama." 
Proverbs10:5 Uoso u muna bhu mvula, muenhó njimu ia mona; maji mukua kuzeka bhu thembu ia kubhongolola, mona u kuatesa jisonhi." 
Proverbs10:6 Mabesá ma tula ku mútue ua muthu uaiuka; maji o dikanu dia athu a bhumu diezala ni usuéia. 
Proverbs10:7 Delembalelu dia muthu uaiuka di kala dibesá, maji o majina a isuéia-phe a kà di bhanga kala kima kia bolo." 
Proverbs10:8 O muthu ua dimukina ku muẋima, u tambula ijila; maji o kiôua kiatu mu kanu, ua-nda kudibhala mukonda dia dikanu diê." 
Proverbs10:9 Uoso uenda ni muẋima uazele, ió ua di-fikidila mu kuenda kuê; uoso-phe uselula o uendelu uê, ua-nda ku di monekena." 
Proverbs10:10 Mukua kubhalula ni mesu, u bhekesa jindolo ku muẋima; maji o mukua utalelu ua iuka, u bhekesa kudisanza." 
Proverbs10:11 Dikanu dia muthu ua iuka, ndunga ia muenhu; dikanu-phe dia athu a bhumu dia sueka uséia." 
Proverbs10:12 Luma lu balumuna jimvunda; maji o henda iavungina o itondalu ioso. 
Proverbs10:13 Unjimu u u sanga ku mizumbu ia mukua kilunji; maji o mbangala ia xikamena kubeta mu kunda dia muthu ua kambe kilunji. 
Proverbs10:14 O Jinjimu, a-kondeka o unjimu uâ; maji o dikanu dia kioua-phe mukua ni nzendu ia kusekala." 
Proverbs10:15 O mvuama, jimbongo jê, iene o mbonge iê ia kusuamena; kalunga ka dia jingadiama-phe, o uadiama uâ uene." 
Proverbs10:16 Kima ki bhanga o muthu uaiuka ki bhekela muenhu; maji o nganhu ia kisuéia i vuala kituxi. 
Proverbs10:17 Uoso u xikina kia mu longa, uala mu njila ia muenhu; maji uoso u tènda kia mu bazela, unhungana jinga ngó." 
Proverbs10:18 Uoso u kondeka o luma ni ku di-uabhesa ku mizumbu, mukua makutu; uoso-phe uenda ni kabódio, kioua." 
Proverbs10:19 Mu kuzuela kua vulu, ki mu kambe kutondala; o ua di xibidila-phe uala njimu, ki kioua." 
Proverbs10:20 Dimi dia muthu ua iuka-phe mukua ni phalata iótungule; muẋima-phe ua isuéia ki uate kima. 
Proverbs10:21 Mizumbu ia muthu ua iuka, i dikila mundu; o ioua-phe, mukonda dia kukamba kilunji, afua." 
Proverbs10:22 Dibesá dia Ngana diene di muesa jimbongo; o umvuama u tunda kua muene ki u bheka dilamba. 
Proverbs10:23 Muthu uaiibha, kutonoka kuê o kubhanga kiaiibha; mukua kilunji-phe, minangu iê, o ku di-longa unjimu." 
Proverbs10:24 Mukua-phulu kima kioso ki mu kuata uoma, kiene ki mudia; muthu ua iuka-phe Nzambi u mu bhana kioso kiendi o muẋima uê." 
Proverbs10:25 Mukua phulu uia nzaká, kala ki somboka o kitembu kia kibhungu; maji o muthu ua iuka, ua kalelà-ku kala a mu tunga bhu ndanji." 
Proverbs10:26 Mukua ni mvindangele ki ia dizemba ni mazu, o dixi ki dia di-zemba ni mesu, kiene ue o musonde kia dizemba ni oso aia ni ku mu tuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Uoma ua Jihova uia ni kubandekeza ku izuua; maji o mivu-phe ia akua phulu a ká i lengululuisa. 
Proverbs10:28 O kudielela kua athu a iuka, kubheka kusanguluka; akua phulu-phe kudielela kuâ, kua kà jimuka muene loló!" 
Proverbs10:29 Njila ia Jihova iene o mbonge ia dilengelu phala oso emana muẋima nzanza, maji phala ati-a ituxi ia di bhange kibuika." 
Proverbs10:30 Muthu ua iuka ka tena ku mu sendumuna, akua phulu-phe ka tena kutunga mu ngongo." 
Proverbs10:31 Dikanu dia muthu ua iuka, di sokolola unjimu; dimi-phe dia kisuéia, dia xikamena ku di batula." 
Proverbs10:32 Mizumbu ia muthu ua iuka, iezala ni ima iambote; dikanu-phe dia isuéia, diezala phulu mu phulu." 
Proverbs11:1 Pezu ia kupezala ni mangonha Jihova ia mu ibhila kiavulu; maji o nzongo-phe ia kuzonga mu kidi, iene ku mu uabhela kinéne." 
Proverbs11:2 Bhuoso bhua tuama ukumbu, hádia bhu kaiela ue dilebhu; maji oso a di tululula, ene adimuka." 
Proverbs11:3 O kidi kia athu aiuka, kiene kia kà endesa; maji o uendelu ua lusebu, u bhekela atondadi kusekala." 
Proverbs11:4 Jimbongo ki ji tena kubhandulula ngana iê bhu kumbi dia njinda; maji o kuiuka ku kudila muthu ku kalunga. 
Proverbs11:5 O kuiuka kua muthu ua mbote, ku mu iukixila o njila iê; mukua phulu-phe uséia uê uene u mu dia." 
Proverbs11:6 Mujitu, ki mu bhulula o kuiuka kuê; ati-a-ituxi-phe a a kuatela mu kubhuma kuâ." 
Proverbs11:7 Mukua phulu se uafu, kudielela kuê kuoso kua suku; mukua mangonha-phe kudielela kuê, kudi-fula." 
Proverbs11:8 Muthu ua iuka ene ku mu bhulula ku kibhidi ni ku dilamba; mukua phulu-phe anga u bhingana-bhu. 
Proverbs11:9 Muthu uaiibha ni mangonha, u sendumuna mukuá ni dikanu diê; aiuka-phe mukonda dia kutongoloka kuâ, a kà bhulaka." 
Proverbs11:10 Ki sangulukisa sanzala, o uuabhelu ua athu ambote a tungu-mu; akua phulu né afua, mundu u kola kikoue." 
Proverbs11:11 Diembu di zangalala mukonda dia akua kidi a tungu-mu ala ku dizediuisa; maji ki sendumuna diembu, ki tunda ku kabódio ka akua-phulu." 
Proverbs11:12 Muthu uoso uia ni kuila kia tala mukuá ki kima, ua kambe kilunji; maji o ua tetulukʼó, u di xibha ni muelu hudí." 
Proverbs11:13 Ndaxi ia maka utungununa kikutu; maji o mukua muẋima ua kitongola-phe, kikutu u ki kondeka muene." 
Proverbs11:14 Bhua kambe o phangu ni ndongo, mundu u lalumuka; maji bhuala o nzungule ia jindongixi, mundu a tunga a soma." 
Proverbs11:15 Uoso u di xikina úlemba ua muthu ka mu ijiia, muenhó hádia ki nu talesa hadi; maji uoso u dituna úlemba, utunga usoma." 
Proverbs11:16 Muhatu ua nheṗhuka, kijingu kiê kia kalé, mukuâ ni mala ma suína nu kukalakala, kia lunda o jimbongo." 
Proverbs11:17 Muthu ua mbote, u bhanga mbote ku muenhu uê; maji o kingumba kú diiala katé ni mukutu uê u u talesa hadi." 
Proverbs11:18 Mukua-phulu kia kalakala, kima kia bhanga ki ki tundu mbote; uoso-phe u kuna jimbutu ja kutetuluka, ua xikamena futu ia kidi." 
Proverbs11:19 O kubhanga kia iuka, iene o njila iia ku muenhu; maji uoso u uabhela phulu, ua-lu di kengela kalunga." 
Proverbs11:20 Athu a kala ni xidi ia muẋima. Jihova a mu ibhila kiavulu; oso-phe emana nzanza mu uendelu uâ, ene ku mu uabhela kinéne." 
Proverbs11:21 Kisuéia né-mbe maku mê ua ma koteka bhu muẋima, hanji kà kamba mulonga; maji o mbutu ia athu a iuka, ia kà bhulaka." 
Proverbs11:22 Mukuâ ni nela ia ulu ku muzulu ua ngulu, kiene kia di fuangana ni muhatu ua uabha o pholo, nʼa kambe o kilunji." 
Proverbs11:23 Athu ambote vondadi iâ o kubhanga mbote iene, akua phulu-phe axikamena ngoho njinda ia Nzambi." 
Proverbs11:24 Sai-ku amoxi a bhana kiavulu, maji hanji-phe o jimbongo jâ jiia ni ku di-bandekeza; amukuá-phe asombuesa o unjenje, anga a bonga uíndua." 
Proverbs11:25 Muenhu ua muthu ua uabhela ku uanena akuá, u mona mbote; kuma uoso u tekela, muene ue a mu tekela." 
Proverbs11:26 Muthu uoso nguaiê kusumbisa o mbutu jê, mundu a mu ta mázui; maji mukua kusenga o idima iê, ku mútue uê dibesá dia kalʼé." 
Proverbs11:27 Muthu uoso u sakalala mu ku kengela akuá o mbote, uala ku di kengela kavumbi; uoso-phe u kengela akuá o phulu, muene ua mu di kengelaiu." 
Proverbs11:28 Muthu uoso u di fiiala jimbongo jê, ua-nda kusenguluka hé u di bhala; athu aiuka-phe abuingita kala kimuẋi kiala ni jithangu ja uisu." 
Proverbs11:29 Muthu uoso u ta mualala ni kuzukutisa o dibhata diê muène, bhu mu subhuka ngó kitembu; kioua-phe muene o ngamba ia njimu." 
Proverbs11:30 Muthu uambote, ibundu iê i di fuangana ni muxi ua muenhu; uoso u sungila kokuê o mienhu ia athu, muene njimu." 
Proverbs11:31 Se muthu uaiuka u mona phaxi ni lamba mu ngongo, kuambe dingi o mukua-phulu ni mukua-ituxi." 
Proverbs12:1 Muthu uoso ua uabhela o ku mu longa, ió muene o dikamba dia kuijiia; maji o mukua ku di zangala kia mu bazela, ió-phe kioua kia hatu." 
Proverbs12:2 Muthu uambote u enda jinga ni kavumbi ka Jihova; maji Jihova u êlesa uoso mukua ilunji ia dianguka. 
Proverbs12:3 Muthu ka tena ku di kuatenena ni ikalakalu iaiibha; maji o lundanji lua athu aiuka, bhuoso bhu lua di kubu, kene ku lu sondolola." 
Proverbs12:4 Muhatu uala ni ujitu u di bhanga kitundu ku mútue ua muadi uê; maji o muhatu u bhanga ima ia jisonhi, u di bhanga mukua ni utúlua mu ifuba ia munumiʼê." 
Proverbs12:5 Athu a iuka, ni ixinganeku iâ iezala kidi ni kilunji; maji o jiphangu-phe ja athu a bhumu, jʼezala mangonha moso." 
Proverbs12:6 Maka ma athu a bhumu, ma kana ngó kubatamena manhinga ma akuá; maji o dikanu-phe dia athu aiuka, diene dia a bhulula." 
Proverbs12:7 Athu a bhumu, hádia a kà a lalumuna, ka kà moneka dingi; maji o dibhata-phe dia athu a iuka, dinangenena." 
Proverbs12:8 Muthu kioso kia soko o unjimu uê, kiene ue kia ká mu tumbula; maji o semenhi ia muẋima-phe, athu oso a mu sebulula." 
Proverbs12:9 Kota o muthu ua di tululula, hé uenda ni kubhanga o kikalakalu kiê; kuindi ió ua di zangeleka muene, maji ua lémbua bhua kúdia." 
Proverbs12:10 Muiuki uinga o muenhu ua ibhaku iê; maji o muẋima ua athu abhumu-phe, uezala usuéia." 
Proverbs12:11 Uoso u dima o mukáu uê, u kala ni kúdia kuê kua nzungule; uoso-phe u kaiela o ima ia kingoho, ió ua kambe kilunji." 
Proverbs12:12 Muẋima ua muthu ua bhumu, uinda ngoho phulu mu phulu ni ku dikengela o kufua mu uanda ua akua phulu; lundanji-phe lua athu a iuka lu ima muene o kimbundu kia kuiuka kuâ." 
Proverbs12:13 Mukua-phulu, itondalu ia mizumbu iê, iene o mikolo iê ia di-kuta na-iu; maji o muthu uaiuka, ubhulaka ku iluezu." 
Proverbs12:14 Muthu uene ku di dikila ni mbote i tunda ku ibundu ia uzuelelu ua dikanu diê-muene; o ioso muthu ia bhanga ni maku mê, hádia a mu vutuila-iu." 
Proverbs12:15 Kioua uendelu uê-muène u u mona kuiuka; maji uoso uividila kiambote o ku mu longa, muene muthu ua dimuka." 
Proverbs12:16 Diilaji, bhuoso bhua mu thathamesa, njinda iê lelu muene i di-monekena; mukua kilunji-phe, ubatekela, anga uila kala kʼevu kima." 
Proverbs12:17 Uoso u tanga o kidi, u tukulula o kulunga; maji o mbangi ia mangonha, u tanga nzungule ia makutu." 
Proverbs12:18 Sai athu, uzuelela uâ u toma ku miẋima kala jiphondo ja xibhata; dimi-phe dia jihete ja kuzuela, di bheka kudisanza." 
Proverbs12:19 Mizumbu ia kidi, itunga i soma; dimi-phe di tanga makutu, dinanga ngó kathangana." 
Proverbs12:20 Akua kufunha ilunji iaiibha, mu muẋima mua a tunga ngoho mangonha moso; maji akua kulongesa o kutululuka ni kubatama, ene a tunga ni kusanguluka." 
Proverbs12:21 Kana divuua di tula ku muthu ua iuka; maji akua phulu-phe u sanga ezala ni kikote. 
Proverbs12:22 Mizumbu i tanga makutu, ia di fuangana kisunji kua Jihova; maji oso a kumbidila o kidi, ene a mu uabhela muene." 
Proverbs12:23 Muthu ua dimuka, ka xikina kutanga o kuijiia kuê; maji o muẋima-phe ua ioua, uenda ni ku di tanga o uoua uene." 
Proverbs12:24 Lukuaku lu kalakala makidikidi, luene lu tumina; maji o jisemenhi-phe, ji xikamena ngó kufuta lubhaku." 
Proverbs12:25 O kubhindama kua muẋima, kuene mu kubhelesa o muthu; maji mbimbi ia mbote, i mu sanguluisa." 
Proverbs12:26 Muthu ua iuka, u di bhanga musonguedi u tuamenena ku pholo ia mukuá; maji o uendelu ua akua phulu-phe, u texikisa." 
Proverbs12:27 Musonde, o xitu iê ia unhanga, u lémbua ku i oha; maji o kuhandamana-phe, uene o ujitu uonéne ua muthu." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu kukaiela kuiuka, muene muala o muenhu; kuma mu njila ja kuiuka, ki mueniʼê kalunga." 
Proverbs13:1 Mona ua tetuluka, uívua ki mu bazela tatʼâ; maji o semenhi-phe, kene kuívua kia mu bazela." 
Proverbs13:2 Muthu uádia ku mbote i tunda ku kibundu kia dikanu diê; maji o muenhu-phe ua ibalukutu, kúdia kuâ, kikote." 
Proverbs13:3 Uoso u langa dimi diê, muenhu uê ua u kondeka; uoso-phe uzuela kiavulu, muenhu uê ua u jibha." 
Proverbs13:4 Muẋima ua musonde, uinda ngó maji ka mono kima; akua kukalakala makidikidi-phe, u sanga a neta." 
Proverbs13:5 Muthu uaiuka, maka ma makutu u di zemba-nâ; mukua-phulu-phe ukuma, mbata u di bhekela sonhi." 
Proverbs13:6 Muthu uaiuka, o kuiuka kuê kuene ku mu kondeka mu uendelu uê; mukuaituxi-phe, o phulu iê iene i mu sendumuna." 
Proverbs13:7 Sai-ku athu a di-bhanga kala jimvuama, mbé kala ni kima; sai-ku ue-phe a di-bhanga kala jingadiama, maji mbongo jâ jivula." 
Proverbs13:8 Kidikulu kia muenhu ua muthu, o jimbongo jê; ngadiama-phe, ua kambe kia ku di kula, tendʼê, lémbue." 
Proverbs13:9 Mukengeji ua athu aiuka u bhetula muẋima, kuma u muika kinéne; maji o kandeia-phe ka akua-phulu, ka xikamena ku ka jima." 
Proverbs13:10 Ukumbu-phe u bheka ngó jimvunda; athu-phe a tetulukʼó, a bhanga ioso ni unjimu." 
Proverbs13:11 Umvuama u tunda mu kubhongolola ngoho kioso-kioso, ki u nange kubhita; uoso-phe ututumba ni kuongeka kamuanu-kamuanu, soua iê iia ni ku di-bandekeza." 
Proverbs13:12 Kudielela kua kokoloka, ku sukisa o muẋima; maji o kiendi o muẋima, kuila kia bhixila, ki di-bhanga muxi ua muenhu." 
Proverbs13:13 Uoso u tènda o phangu ia mu bhana, u jikinina; uoso-phe u xila ngonge, ubhanduluka." 
Proverbs13:14 Ulongelu ua muthu uejiia, u di bhanga fixi ia muenhu; mbé o kubhangesa muthu kuebha o mibhetu ia kalunga." 
Proverbs13:15 Kutetuluka kua kidi, ku bongesa ujitu; maji o njila-phe iá ió a dianguka, i talesa hadi, (kuma i muesa lamba)." 
Proverbs13:16 Muthu uadimuka, o ima ia bhanga u i endesa kiambote; maji o Semenhi-phe, uaneka o usemenhi uê." 
Proverbs13:17 Kisuéia kia phunga, mua bhita u xisa divuua; maji o kilolo-phe kia fiiele, o kua bhita, u bheka kudisanza." 
Proverbs13:18 Uoso ka xikina ku mu bazela, uaxikamena uadiama ni usuéia; maji uoso-phe u suua kia mu bazela, uaxikamena kijingo." 
Proverbs13:19 O kima kiendi o muẋima se ki di bhanga, muenhu uetu u sanguluka; maji o ku di batuka ni phulu, kiene o kima kiaiibhila o maioua." 
Proverbs13:20 Uoso uenda ni jinjimu, u biluka njimu; uoso-phe u kala kamba dia ku kaiela o ioua, kanange kukituka kala ene." 
Proverbs13:21 Akua-ituxi, o hadi iâ iakalé, kuma i a kaiejela muene; athu aiuka-phe, a kà tambula futu ia jimbote ni kubhanduluka." 
Proverbs13:22 Muthu uambote-phe, uxia undundu ku ana ni ku aláula; maji umvuama ua mukua-ituxi, uòlunde phala ni u xialela ku ió uaiuka." 
Proverbs13:23 Jingadiama, ku thonga iâ, a bhongolola idima ianzungule; sai-phe athu, mukonda dia kuhungana kuâ, a di talesa hadi i a bhitula o muenhu." 
Proverbs13:24 Uoso ukamba kusasa o mona ni mbangala, ua mu zembe; uoso-phe ua zola monʼê, ka kambe ku mu beta bhu kithangana kia tokala." 
Proverbs13:25 Muthu uambote, udia anga nhu uê uikuta; maji o divumu-phe dia akua phulu, di dia ngó ki dʼikuta." 
Proverbs14:1 Muhatu ua njimu, u tunga o inzo iê; maji o kioua-phe kia muhatu, mueniʼê u i bula ni maku mê." 
Proverbs14:2 Uoso uenda ni muẋima ua iuka, muene ua mu xila Jihova; uoso-phe uenda mu njila ja kubhengalala, ió ka suu Nzambi." 
Proverbs14:3 O mbangala i beta o kiôua, o ukumbu u tunda mu kanu diê-muène; maji o njimu mizumbu iê iene i mu kondeka kiambote." 
Proverbs14:4 Bhua kambe o jingombe, u sanga mu kidilu mua xala ngoho; maji ku undanda ua ngombe, athu abhongolola idima ianzungule." 
Proverbs14:5 Mbangi ia kidi, ki i tena kuta makutu; mbangi-phe ia mangonha, u tanga makutu mu makutu." 
Proverbs14:6 Semenhi u sota unjimu, maji uene ka di-mono na-u; maji o makua-kilunji-phe ku di longa uene o mukumbi uê." 
Proverbs14:7 Kioua mu sondoloke, mukonda ku mizumbu iê o maka a unjimu kua a sange-ku." 
Proverbs14:8 Muthu ua dimuka, unjimu uê o ku tongolola kiambote o njila iê; maji o usemenhi ua maioua-phe, o kunganala." 
Proverbs14:9 Ioua o kituxi a ki kembela; maji o muʼaxaxe ka jifiiele muala kubhanduluka. 
Proverbs14:10 Ki kata miẋima ua muthu, muene ngó u kʼijiia; o ki u sanguluka ue, muthu bhu mbandu u tokoka ku di bunda mu kusanguluka kuê." 
Proverbs14:11 Dibhata dia akua-mundu, dia xikamena kusekala; balaka-phe ia jifiiele, hádia ku pholo itunga-isoma." 
Proverbs14:12 Sai njila, muthu u i mona kuiuka; maji o ku dizubhilu diê-phe, ikoka ia kalunga." 
Proverbs14:13 Muẋima, né-mbe hanji mu kuolela muene, ukata; Kuma sai bhabha, o kusanguluka zubhilu diê malamba." 
Proverbs14:14 Muthu uaiibha o muẋima, njila jê hádia ja-nda ku mu kuma; maji o muthu uambote-phe, ka xikina ku uabhela o ífua iê." 
Proverbs14:15 Kilalu maka oso a zuela kuala athu, muene u a xikina; maji ió ua sunguluka-phe, u zonga kiambote kioso kienda." 
Proverbs14:16 Njimu mukua-uoma, o kiaiibha u ki lenga; kioua-phe u di-vunza, u dimona uzonda, u fika kuila ua tungu ua somo." 
Proverbs14:17 Muthu u thathamana lusolo, u zanga ima; o mukua ilunji ia mudiangu, athu a mu kuma." 
Proverbs14:18 O jisemenhi, hádia a tambula undundu ua kusebuluka; maji o jinjimu-phe, a kà zakela itundu ia kuijiia." 
Proverbs14:19 Athu aiibha a kà toloka bhu pholo ia athu a mbote; o isuéia-phe a kà tolokela bhu mielu ia iá oso aiuka. 
Proverbs14:20 Ngadiama a mu zemba, katé ni ku jindandu jê kuene; maji o mvuama-phe, makamba a vula." 
Proverbs14:21 Uoso u sebulula mukuá, uate kituxi; uoso-phe u kuatela henda kua iú ua tate, u bonga kuzediua." 
Proverbs14:22 Mbé oso a bhanga kiaiibha, ka mu zanga muene? Oso-phe a bhanga kiaiuka, kua a xikamena mbote ni kidi." 
Proverbs14:23 O kututumba kuoso muene ni kukalakala kubhekela, kubhanduluka; maji o kuzuela-phe kuahatu, ku xisa mu uadiama." 
Proverbs14:24 O jimbongo kiene o kijinga kia jinjimu jala ni kuijiia; o lusebu lua iôua-phe, uoua mu uoua ngó." 
Proverbs14:25 Mbangi i tanga o kidi, u kudila o mienhu; maji o u sabhula makutu, ió kifumbe." 
Proverbs14:26 Muthu mu kuxila Jihova mua mu kala kidielelesu kia kolokota; ni anʼê a sanga jinga disuamenu mua muene. 
Proverbs14:27 O uoma ua Jihova iene o fixi ia muenhu, mbé o kubhangesa muthu kuebha o mibhetu ia kalunga." 
Proverbs14:28 Kijingo kia sobha, ki tunda mu kuvula o mundu; kuma o kilamba kia kambe o mundu uavulu, ki sekala." 
Proverbs14:29 Muthu u kokoloka o kutema, ió muene o hete ia dikota; uoso-phe ka nange kuthathamana, ió uoua uê u dianeka." 
Proverbs14:30 Muẋima ua batama, ubhekela kudisanza mu mukutu; maji o dixinga-phe, di bolesa ifuba." 
Proverbs14:31 Uoso u sondemeka o ngadiama, uala kulokalala Mubhangi uê; uoso-phe u bindumina o hukunhu, ua jingisa uoso ua mu bhanga." 
Proverbs14:32 Kisuéia, o usuéia uê uene ua-nda ku mu kakula; maji o muthu Uaiuka-phe, katé ni mu kúfua kuê, hanji sai kia dielela." 
Proverbs14:33 Unjimu unhohena mu muẋima ua mukua-kilunji; maji mu thulu ia maioua, ki mu suama kima." 
Proverbs14:34 O kubhanga kiaiuka, kujingisa o ifuẋi; maji o ituxi-phe, i bheka kusekala ku mundu." 
Proverbs14:35 Muenexi ua di-uabhela ni selevende ia sunguluka; maji o njinda iê-phe i landula uoso o semenhi u bhanga ima i kuatesa jisonhi. 
Proverbs15:1 Kuvutula kua kulenduka, kubhuisa jimvunda; maji o kuzuela kua kunonga, kubhekela njinda." 
Proverbs15:2 O dimi dia jíngambi ja kuijiia, di uabhesa o unjimu; maji o dikanu-phe dia maioua, di lundulula ngó uoua mu uoua." 
Proverbs15:3 Mesu ma Jihova, mala mu ididi ioso, ni kukengelela athu aiibha ni athu ambote." 
Proverbs15:4 O dimi di zuela ni kilendu, di di bhanga muxi ua muenhu; maji o dimi-phe di lula mu kuzuela, di budikisa o muẋima." 
Proverbs15:5 Kioua ka xikina kuividila ki mu bazela tatʼâ; muthu-phe u suua kia mu héula, ió uadimuka." 
Proverbs15:6 Mʼonzo ia muthu uaiuka, muene mu dilundilu dia ima ionéne; maji o jimbote-phe ja mukua-phulu, jʼenda ni jingongo." 
Proverbs15:7 O mizumbu ia jinjimu, i lundulula kuijiia; maji o muẋima ua ioua-phe, ki kiene ki u bhanga."
