Proverbs15:8 Jihova ua di-zemba ni sata ia athu abhumu; maji ki mu uabhela muene, o kuividila musambu ua athu aiuka." 
Proverbs15:9 Njila ia muthu uabhumu, kua Jihova kisunji; maji muene-phe ua diuabhela ni uoso u kaiela o kuiuka." 
Proverbs15:10 Uoso ulueza o njila, o kibetu kiê kivula; uoso-phe kia mu tangela kʼevu, ua xikamena kúfua." 
Proverbs15:11 Se ni ditungilu dia madifundu ni dibuikilu, kiiadi kiâene bhu pholo ia Jihova, kuambe dingi o miẋima ia anʼ athu?" 
Proverbs15:12 Semenhi ua di-zemba ni uoso u mu bazela; muene ka xikina kubhiẋila bhuoso bhuala o jinjimu. 
Proverbs15:13 O muẋima se ua tana, pholo ikemba kiengi; maji o ki kata muẋima, ni nzumbi ia muthu idisuuata." 
Proverbs15:14 O muẋima ua mukua-kilunji, u bhangela o kuijiia; dikanu-phe dia jisemenhi kúdia kuâ, o uoua uene." 
Proverbs15:15 Mukua-hadi izuua iê ioso ia lamba ngó; uoso-phe mukua muẋima uatana, ió muene mukua jifesa jakalʼé." 
Proverbs15:16 Kota kukala ni kiatolo, hé u kala ni uoma ua Jihova bhuamoxi; dikué nzungule ia umvuama, i kenanesa muẋima mʼoxi." 
Proverbs15:17 Sembele o kakúdia ka tumafe bhuala o henda, kuindi o ngombe ianete bhuala o luma." 
Proverbs15:18 Diiala di thathamana kiavulu, u vulumuna jimvunda; maji o ió mukua kuxididika-phe u bhuisa jimvunda." 
Proverbs15:19 Njila ia musonde mukua ni kikanzo kia minha ia kathathala; maji hoka-phe ia athu aiuka, u sanga ia babelela kiambote." 
Proverbs15:20 Njimu ia mona, u sangulukisa tatʼâ; maji o semenhi, u kuatesa jisonhi kua mamʼâ." 
Proverbs15:21 Muthu na kambe kilunji, minangu iê o usemenhi; maji o mukua kilunji-phe, uenda ditonono mu uendelu uê." 
Proverbs15:22 Bhua kambe o kaiula phala kumona o phangu ni ndongo, mabanzelu moso ma kituka kingoho; maji bhuala o nzungule ia jindongixi, ndunge joso ji tunda ni kubhanduluka." 
Proverbs15:23 Muthu kuijiia kuvutula kizuelu kiambote ni dikanu diê, ki mu sanguluisa; kuma o kizuelu kiene mu touala bhu thembu iê!" 
Proverbs15:24 Muthu ua dimuka, u bandela mu njila ia muenhu, mbé kufula kuboloka mu bombo dia madifundu, bhoxi." 
Proverbs15:25 Jihova hinu ua-nda ku muanga onzo ia akua-izala; maji o jimbambe ja undundu ua mutudi ua muhatu u ji soma kiambote. 
Proverbs15:26 Jindunge joso ji funha o muthu uabhumu, ji di bhanga isunji kua Jihova; maka-phe ma athu zele o muẋima, mene ku mu uabhela." 
Proverbs15:27 Muthu uoso u fundamena o nganhu ia kudia mangonha, u titidisa dibhata diê; maji uoso u iibhila o mahitula, muene u kola o muenhu." 
Proverbs15:28 Muẋima ua muthu uaiuka, Uxinganeka kioso kia tokala kukumbulula; dikanu-phe dia akua-phulu, di lukula nzungule ia jindaka." 
Proverbs15:29 Jihova athu a bhuma ua sanduka dikanga; maji uividila o musambu ua athu aiuka. 
Proverbs15:30 Kima kia tetuluka ku mesu, ki tanesa muẋima; o fuma se ia uabha, ni ifuba ineta." 
Proverbs15:31 Muthu uoso u xikina kubhana mátui mu kuividila o kubazela kua disanze, ió u tunga dibhata mu kaẋi kumoxi ni jinjimu." 
Proverbs15:32 Ua tènde o kibazu kia ku mu bazela, ua tènde o muenhu uê; maji uoso-phe u suua kia mu bazela, ió uanda kubonga kuijiia." 
Proverbs15:33 Uoma ua Jihova kiene o kikômbo ki bheka o unjimu; uinda o kijingo u dianga kubatama. 
Proverbs16:1 Ima ioso i xinganeka o muẋima, i tunda ku muthu; maji o kuvutula kua kidi kua hundu ia dikanu-phe, ku tunda kua Jihova." 
Proverbs16:2 Muthu kia tala o jinjila jê joso, uila ja zele muene; maji o Jihova-phe, muene mukua kuzonga miẋima bhu longa dia pezu." 
Proverbs16:3 Ikalakalu ié ioso bhakula-iu kua Jihova, muene u ku xikikila ima ioso i u kana kubhanga." 
Proverbs16:4 Jihova ima ioso ua i iudikila ni dizubhilu diê dia i tokala; katé ni mukua phulu, o bhuilu diê o kizuua kia jingongo." 
Proverbs16:5 Muthu uoso ua di zangeleka mu muẋima, u di bhanga kisunji kua Jihova; né-mbe maku mê u ma bunjika bhu thulu, sai hanji mulonga uê kua Nzambi." 
Proverbs16:6 Bhuala o henda anga bhu kala ue o kidi, kituxi ki jima; maji athu kuebha o ituxi, ki kale ngó ku uoma ua Jihova." 
Proverbs16:7 Mauendelu ma mathu se ma uabhela Jihova, muene-phe u mu bhangesa kuila katé ni jinguma jê, atunganê ku paze." 
Proverbs16:8 Kota kia tolo kia tundu ku kidi; dikue o jinzungule ja itula ia di lungu ni mangonha. 
Proverbs16:9 O muẋima ua muthu, u xinda o njila iê ia kuenda; maji Jihova muene u mu tesa díkanda diambote." 
Proverbs16:10 Muenexi kuzuela kuê kuoso, kifua muzambu uene-nau; o kieza mu kubatula o dimanda, dikanu diê ki di lueza, kana." 
Proverbs16:11 Ni pezu ia kidi, ni balasa ia kidi, itunda kua Jihova; matadi moso ma jipezu ja kutela uenji, Jihova muene ua ma tumu." 
Proverbs16:12 Kima kia kisunji o jisobha kubhanga ima ia kubhuma; mbata o kubatula mu kidi, kuene kuxikika o utuminu ni kiandu kia jisobha." 
Proverbs16:13 Jisobha bhuoso bhua sanga mizumbu i batula mu kidi, ene a sanguluka; Kuma sobha kamba dia ió uoso u zuela ima ia lungu mu njila." 
Proverbs16:14 O kuthathamana kua sobha, mukua ni mukunji ua kalunga; maji o muthu-phe ua sunguluka, ua soko-bho ku mu ximbakatesa." 
Proverbs16:15 Pholo ia Muenexi se i ku tala ni ngalasa, eie u bonga muenhu; o kiadi kiê, mukua ni dituta dia mvula ia isanga bhu kasamanu." 
Proverbs16:16 Kota ku di longa o unjimu, dikue kufuna o ulu; o kudilonga ue kilunji kota, phalata ndenge." 
Proverbs16:17 Kikoka kia athu aiuka (emana miẋima nzanza), o kulenga kubhanga kiaiibha; uoso uedi kuma muenhu ngi u kondeka, aʼluke o uendelu uê." 
Proverbs16:18 O izala iene mu tuama, anga kukaiela o kusenguluka; o kudizangeleka kua muẋima kuene mu diangela, anga kukaiela kiua o kibhalu." 
Proverbs16:19 Muthu sembele-ze o kukala ni muẋima ua batama, bhuamoxi ni ió oso a lenduka; dikue kuuana o mbole ia kubhunda ni akua izala." 
Proverbs16:20 Muthu uoso u batekela kiambote o maka, ua-nda kusanga kubhanduluka; o uoso-phe u dielela Jihova, ió kuzediua kuê." 
Proverbs16:21 Muthu uoso uejidila ku muẋima, ió a muila uadimuka; o uzuela kiatouala, u zubhisa akuâ o kudilonga." 
Proverbs16:22 Oso a bonga kilunji, a bongo ndunga ia muenhu; maji ioua-phe, o uoua uene u a talesa o hadi." 
Proverbs16:23 Muẋima ua muthu uadimuka, uene ulonga o dikanu diê, anga u mu bandekeza uhete ua kuzuela mu mizumbu iê." 
Proverbs16:24 Maka ma kilendu, kixila kia uemba; ma toualesa muenhu, anga mʼelukisa ifuba." 
Proverbs16:25 Sai njila muthu u i fika kuiuka, maji o bhuilu diê-phe, iene o ikoka ia kalunga." 
Proverbs16:26 Muthu u kalakala, u kalakela mbote iê-muène, oko ki mu suinisa, o dikanu diê diia ni ku mu bhinga." 
Proverbs16:27 Monʼa kadiaphemba u kanda o phulu iene; o ku mizumbu iê u sanga kua bambuka kala túbhia. 
Proverbs16:28 Thulukutu u zokesa akuâ; mukua kabaka u muanga makamba a di zolo kinéne. 
Proverbs16:29 Kingualulu u zela mukuá, anga u mu bheka mu njila iaiibha." 
Proverbs16:30 Muthu uaiibha kieza kufunha o isunji, ku mesu u badikinha-ku; uila u di kokota ku mizumbu-phe, phulu ua i bhange kiá." 
Proverbs16:31 Jimvi kitundu kia ujitu, se uala na-ju mu njila ia kuiuka." 
Proverbs16:32 Muthu u xididika uala kota, kindanda ndenge; o utolola muẋima uê uala kota, uatolola mbonge ndenge." 
Proverbs16:33 Kibhuku ki buila bhu jihata, maji Jihova muene u ki muena o phangu ia ku ku lungisa-kiu." 
Proverbs17:1 Sembele kakúdia ka kukuta ni kutululuka, ki ngʼindi o nzungule ia jisata ja ibhaku mʼonzo, kumoxi ni jimvunda." 
Proverbs17:2 Mubhika uala ni masunga, u tumina ni ku thandu dia monʼa ngana u bhanga ima ia jisonhi; undundu ua tokala jiphange, ni muene u tambula-ku dikanda." 
Proverbs17:3 Phalata a i tunguila bhu dizunzilu, o ulu a u tunguila bhu mbèmbu; maji Jihova muene mukua kutungula o miẋima ia athu." 
Proverbs17:4 Mukua kuhbanga phulu u bhana mátui ku mizumbu izuela kiaiibha; o mukua makutu u xamenesa mátui mê mu kuividila o dimi di tanga isunji. 
Proverbs17:5 Muthu uoso u tobhesa ngadiama, ua lokalala uoso ua mu bhanga; muthu uoso u sanguluka mukonda dia mukuá ua bhituka mu jiphaxi ja zongo, muenhʼô sai kaxtiku kê." 
Proverbs17:6 Athu a kuka, kitundu kiâ o aláula; o kijingu kia ana-phe, o jitata." 
Proverbs17:7 Maka ma uhete, kene ku a tela kiôua; o makutu, kene ku a tela muadiakime." 
Proverbs17:8 Oso a a tambula diminhinu, dienhidi mbambe ni diiamande kua ene; kuoso-kuoso kua di tela, di a bhandulula." 
Proverbs17:9 Uoso u vungina o itondalu ia akuá, ua-lu di sotela ukamba; maji uoso u vulumuna o maka ma bhiti kiá, ió u muangesa athu a di zola kiavulu." 
Proverbs17:10 Kibazu kimoxi kia tula ku hete, ki mu bokona kinéne mu muenhu; hama ia jixikote ndenge, ja tula ku kiôua." 
Proverbs17:11 Muthu ua bhumu, kífua kiê o ku kituka; ki bhinga-phe ku mu katuila kiiala kia suína, muene u mu toza." 
Proverbs17:12 Muthu sembele o ku di bonga ni kitôto kia mukaji, kia jimbidisa o tuana, kuindi o ku di bonga ni kiôua ki muiza o ulaji uê." 
Proverbs17:13 Muthu uoso u vutula o phulu kua mu bhange o mbote, ió uíndua mʼonzo iê ki mungu dingi ubhua-mu." 
Proverbs17:14 Mvunda bhu iandekela, mukua n: kubula mumba ua menha; tula-phe o ku di ẋokuesa ni mukuenu, kiosuiki mvunda kiluua ibambuka." 
Proverbs17:15 Moxi o muthu u lungisa o kisuéia, kadi o muthu uelêsa o muiuki, kiiadi kiá k muene, Jihova ua di zemba-nâ." 
Proverbs17:16 O muene-phe kiôua, bhu maku mê u bhelaʼhi ngó suilu ia kitadi mu kusumba o unjimu, se muene ka moneka kilunji?" 
Proverbs17:17 Dikamba u zola mu thembu joso; o ndandu u di monekena mu jiphaxi. 
Proverbs17:18 Muthu ua kamba kilunji, u zangula lukuaku luê, anga u di tambulula ulemba ua mukuá." 
Proverbs17:19 Uoso ua uabhela kuzoka, ua uabhela ikuma; o uoso u leka kinéne o muelu uê, ua mu sota kusenguluka." 
Proverbs17:20 Mukua muẋima ua dianguka, ka tena ku mona mbote; o mukua uzuelelu ua luiadi, hádia u di bhala mu kiluezu." 
Proverbs17:21 Uoso u vuala kiôua, ua di bhekela lamba; mukonda tata ia vuala dilaji, ka tena kusanguluka." 
Proverbs17:22 Muẋima ua sanguluka, u di bhanga milongo ia mbote mu mukutu ua muthu; maji o muẋima-phe ua budika ni dilamba, u kukutisa ifuba." 
Proverbs17:23 Mukua phulu u tambula diminhinu mu kasuèkele, mbé kubilula kidi kioso kia uanji ua kubatula kiambote o dimanda bhu milonga." 
Proverbs17:24 Unjimu ua mukua kilunji u di monekena bhu pholo iê; maji o mesu-phe a kiôua, a takujuka ngó makanga ni kukengelela ku mikáu iahatu kai; uandala kutala kua suku oxi." 
Proverbs17:25 Mona ua dilaji u bheka dilamba kua tatʼâ, hé u ludisa o muẋima kua mamʼâ ua mu muesa o dikumbi." 
Proverbs17:26 Muthu ua mbote, o ku mu bhanga kiaiibha, kikôla! O jingana ue ki kia a fuama kuhohesa muthu u bhanga kia iuka, mukonda dia kuiuka kuê." 
Proverbs17:27 Muthu uoso mu kuzuela kuê maka uia ni ku a fikisa, ió muene o njimu; o muthu u kala ni muẋima ua tululuka, iò uala ni kilunji." 
Proverbs17:28 O muthu né-mbe kiôua, a kia di xihba a mu kita njimu; exi ua di xibhidila ki kiôua, se ua jika muene o mizumbu iê." 
Proverbs18:1 Muthu ki muiza kubhanga o jivondadi, jê, u baluka; o unjimu ua kidiʼó, u sola kúlua na-u." 
Proverbs18:2 Kiôua ua di zemba ni kubatekela o diba; muene uinda ngó ku di londekeza o uôua uê, ua mu kala mu muẋima." 
Proverbs18:3 Muthu ua bhumu o kienda, lusebu lu mu kaiela; ki ku tunda o dilebhu, ku kaiela o sonhi." 
Proverbs18:4 Hete ia diiala, o maka mê mukua ni ngiji iazongo; o fixi ia unjimu, mukua ni dibhubha dia menha." 
Proverbs18:5 Ki kiauabha o kusuua kisuéia mu kufunda milonga, phala ku kundula o muthu ua iuka." 
Proverbs18:6 Mizumbu ia semenhi i mu sotela jimvunda, o dikanu diê di mu kengela kibetu." 
Proverbs18:7 Kiôua kalunga ka mu dia o muenhu, ka tunda ku dikanu diê-muène; o mizumbu iê, diene o dibhèbhe di zumbula o muenhu uê." 
Proverbs18:8 Maka ma mbombo-kumbodi, mukua ni dikoka dia touala, a somboluela katé mu mídia." 
Proverbs18:9 Mukua usudi, mu ukalakalelu uê, ua soko ni nzangi." 
Proverbs18:10 Dijina dia Jihova mukua ni mbonge ia matala ia di jikidila; muthu uoso ua iuka, kuene kua lengela, anga a mu bhaka kididi kia kondama." 
Proverbs18:11 Mukua itadi, jombongo jê u ji kita mbonge ia ku mu fikidila; phala muene, kifua kimbaka kia lebha kitala." 
Proverbs18:12 Muẋima ua muthu u di zangelaka, ua-lu sota kibhalu; uinda o kijingu, u dianga o kubatama." 
Proverbs18:13 Ku vutula kua lusolo, kuila ioso kiluua u ivua, ió uôua ni ku di bhekela sonhi; kota o kudianga kuividila." 
Proverbs18:14 Muthu ki mu bhetula mu kukata, o muẋima uê-muène; maji se muẋima ua budika, mukuahii u tena ku u bhetula?" 
Proverbs18:15 Muẋima ua hete, u sota o kuijiia; mátui ma jinjimu, ma sota kutongolola." 
Proverbs18:16 Muthu, bhu pholo ia jingana, u kuata ujitu bhu maku, uene u ku xitunuina o njila, anga u kubheka-bhu." 
Proverbs18:17 Muthu kia kuata ku diba diê, u di mona kulunga; katé mukuá uiza anga u mu fula." 
Proverbs18:18 Athu kia di kuata jiphata, ata-bhu-phe Sorte; iene i batula o phata, iene i uanena mazonda." 
Proverbs18:19 O kubhomba phange ua luuala ku beta kubhonza, ku tambula o mbonge ia imbaka ndenge; o jinzaia ja kuzoka-zoka ja soka ni jisabhi ja felu ku dizemba." 
Proverbs18:20 Izuelu i tunda mu kanu dia muthu, i di bhanga kifua kibundu kikutisa o mala mê; u di dikila ni kioso ki tubhula o mizumbu iê." 
Proverbs18:21 Ni kúfua ni muenhu, ima iiadiʼii ia tunga ku uzonda ua dimi; oso-phe a zola o dimi, hádia a diaula-ku ku kibundu kiê." 
Proverbs18:22 Uoso u bonga muhatu ua mbote, ua bongo kima kia ujitu; muthu ió Ngana ua mu bhange favolo." 
Proverbs18:23 Ngadiama kia zuela, u dionda; maji o mvuama-phe, u vutula ni mikalu." 
Proverbs18:24 Muthu u vula makamba, ua-lu di sotela kukakuka; maji sai-phe dikamba di beta kota, o phange ndenge." 
Proverbs19:1 Ngadiama ua kambe mangonha uala kota ku ujitu, kuindi o semenhi ia dikanu ua di bhange o ndaxi." 
Proverbs19:2 O uximba-phe ue, ua kukamba o unjimu ku muẋima, ua iibha; o mukua ku sakamesa inama iê ni kuenda, ka nange kuzanga." 
Proverbs19:3 Usemenhi ua muthu, uene u mu seluila o njila iê; o ku muẋima uê-phe, u tatela Ngana." 
Proverbs19:4 Umvuama u vudisa makamba, maji o ngadiama-phe a mu zemba katé ni kua kamba diê uene-nê kiá." 
Proverbs19:5 Mbangi ia makutu, katena ku di zula mu mulonga; o u tanga o makutu, ka tena kubhuluka." 
Proverbs19:6 Muthu uoso u bhanga jimbote, avulu a di uabhesa kua muene; kuma kadia muthu, kamba dia ió uoso u mu bhekela maujitu bhu maku." 
Proverbs19:7 Ngadiama, ni phange jê joso ji mu zemba; ku tange dingi o makamba mê, ma mu sanduka muene! Muene uila u a sota ni maka oso-oso, ene-phe usudi u a kuatʼâ!" 
Proverbs19:8 Uoso u tambula unjimu, muenhó ua zolo o muenhu uê; uoso uongeka o kutetuluka, mbote u i mona." 
Proverbs19:9 Mbangi i julukala makutu ku milonga, sai kaxitiku kê; o mukua ku tanga makutu, u buika." 
Proverbs19:10 O kioua, muenhu ua ufina ki ua mu fuama; o mubhika, ku mu ta ku ukota ua kutumina ilamba, ki kia kufidila." 
Proverbs19:11 Muthu uadimuka, ki mu bateka o njinda, o kutetuluka kuê; o kuloloka o itondalu ia akuâ, uene o ujingilu uê." 
Proverbs19:12 Sobha, o ki muiza kutema, mukua ni muzonga ua hoji ia munzangala; o ki muiza kubhanga mbote, mukua ni dimume di tula ku kisasa." 
Proverbs19:13 Kilalu kia mona, u di bhanga dinhengena kua tatʼâ; o kutangelela kua muhatu mʼonzo ia kusakana, mukuâ ni inzo i kuata kunoka ni kumbomba ithangana ioso." 
Proverbs19:14 Muthu uene mu lundula onzo ni jimbongo ji mu xila o adiê; maji muhatu ua dimuka, kale Ngana u ku bhana-nê." 
Proverbs19:15 Usonde, u bheka kuia ku kilu kia muioko-ioko; maji o muthu-phe u kamba kututumba ni kukalakala, nzala i mu dia." 
Proverbs19:16 Uoso muthu uʼaluka kijila, muene ua zola o muenhu uê; maji uoso u landuka o mauendelu ma mu tokala, uafu." 
Proverbs19:17 Uoso u bindumuna ngadiama, ua sobhesa kua Ngana; Jihova muene hinu u mu futa o mbote iê." 
Proverbs19:18 Mona u mu bazela, kioso kuila sai hanji kima kia kudielela-ku; maji kana ku mu bazela ni njinda katé ki u mu jibha." 
Proverbs19:19 Muthu mukua njinda iavulu, kale u mueha hanji nʼa bongo divuua; o ki uila u mu kula, mungu ua-nda ku mu kuiʼé dingi luamukuá." 
Proverbs19:20 Xikina kaiula, o kia ku toza, ku te-bhu phata; phala o izuua ié ia sukidila-ku, uijiiie kuenda na-iu kiambote." 
Proverbs19:21 Mu muẋima ua muthu mua vula jiphangu, maji o kioso kia xindi kuala Jihova, kiene muene ki xalela." 
Proverbs19:22 Muthu ki mu bhangesa ku mu zola ku akuá, o kubhanga o mbote; maji ngadiama ua beta ujitu, ka soko ni mukua makutu." 
Proverbs19:23 Uoma ua Nzambi, u bheka muthu ku muenhu; uoso uala-nau u ximbakata, ki bhuala kiaiibha kia bhita-na-kiu." 
Proverbs19:24 Musònde, u sueka lukuaku luê bhu homba; o kieza ku lu ta mu kanu, uila kala kia mu ibhila." 
Proverbs19:25 Ua beta o seletete, ni kiximba ua mu dimuna; bazela mukua kilunji, ua mu mone kia di longa kiua kiambote." 
Proverbs19:26 Uoso u tatesa phaiʼâ, mba u kaiesa manhʼâ, mona ió u kuatesa sonhi, u bhekesa dilebhu." 
Proverbs19:27 Eie monʼami, se uevu kia ku longo, ximbakata kiá; kana dingi ku kuata o kubhita bhu mbandu, ni kuxa o maka ma kuijiia." 
Proverbs19:28 Mbangi ia Kadiaphemba, o ubatuilu ua iuka u mu kuatesa usudi; o dikanu dia athu abhumu, di kuuela ituxi ni milonga." 
Proverbs19:29 Iiala ia bhumu, a xikamena hádia ku a fundisa; o jixikote, ja xikamena o dikunda dia maiôua." 
Proverbs20:1 O vinhu i bheka ulaji, uálua ua lulu u bheka jinzaia; o uoso u di texila mu ima ienhiʼii, u biluka kiôua kia hatu." 
Proverbs20:2 O njinda ia sobha, mukua ni hoji ki i dila; uoso u mu salumuna o njinda iê, ua di bhange-kiu, kuma ua di te o muenhu uê bhu kíbhidi." 
Proverbs20:3 Muthu o milonga u i lenga luelu, nʼu bongo o ujitu; maji o iôua-phe a j uabhela o ku di vubula mu jimvunda." 
Proverbs20:4 Musonde kia muila: dima-ze, uixi: Kuma kuala mbàmbi; o bhu thembu-phe ia kubhongolola idima, u di ta mu bhinga, maji u lémbua-ku." 
Proverbs20:5 O ixinganeku mu muẋima ua muthu, ia zonga kala menha; maji o muthu ua tetuluka-phe, iene ioso uia ni ku i tubhula ku kanga." 
Proverbs20:6 Avuluʼâ akua ku di-ta jinzabala, exi tu athu ambote; maji o muthu uala muene ni kitongola, mukua-hi muene ua mu bongo kiá?" 
Proverbs20:7 Muthu ua iuka, uendela mu kuiuka kuê, ió kuzediua u ku xila anʼê, muene kia tunda-ku." 
Proverbs20:8 Sobha kia tulama ku kiandu kiê kia kufundixila, mesu mê mene ma zubha na-u o usuéia uoso." 
Proverbs20:9 Mukuahi muene u tena kuamba: Eme muẋima uami nga u ixika muene, nga zele muene, ki ngala ni kituxi?" 
Proverbs20:10 O pezu ku kala luiadi, ni nzòngo ku kala luiadi, ima iiadi iii Jihova ua di zemba na-iu." 
Proverbs20:11 Katé mona-ndenge a mu ijidila ku ima iê ia bhanga, se ia zele kiambote anga i iuka muene." 
Proverbs20:12 Ni dítui di xikina o kuívua, ni diesu di xikina o kumona, Jihova muene ua bhange kiiadi kiâ." 
Proverbs20:13 O kilu kuende ni ku ki uabhela, phala ki mu ku ijiie uadiama; tona mesu, mbé uikute ni mbolo ia di xala." 
Proverbs20:14 Ngenji uila kia fumbu, kia fumbu, maji uila utula kuʼonzo iê, iu u di ximana uixi: Uenji nga u te." 
Proverbs20:15 Ulu sai, o phelu ja nzaji ue nzungule; maji o mizumbu ia di longo o unjimu, ioio mukua ni jôia ia fina." 
Proverbs20:16 Uoso uila o muthu ka muijiia u mu kalela ku ulemba, ió kizuatu kiêmuène ua-nda ku ki ta ku ungunji, mu kula o muthu uengi." 
Proverbs20:17 Muthu kiadia o mbolo ia kunhana mu mangonha, u ivua kutouala; maji kuejilʼuku, u tukumuka mu kanu mua muizala mbuelekese ja mavu." 
Proverbs20:18 Kaiula, kene ka fikidila kioso muthu kia kana ku bhanga; o ku loza ita, bhu kala muene unjimu." 
Proverbs20:19 Mukua kabódio u tungununa o kikutu; kienhiki-phe, eie dimuka, kana du di nhenga ni akua kuzela kiavulu." 
Proverbs20:20 Uoso u xinga tatʼâ mba mamʼâ, mvela iê ia kà jima, anga u xalela mu kitombe ki bheka kikote." 
Proverbs20:21 O undundu, se ua u tambula ngó ni lusolo bhu diandekelu, o dizubhilu diê di kala dia uíndua." 
Proverbs20:22 Kana kuila: Ngi vutula phonzo kia ngi bhangʼiki; inda ua kinga Jihova, muene ua-nda ku ku bhulula." 
Proverbs20:23 Pezu ki ji kale luiadi, kiókio kisunji kua Jihova; o jibalasa-phe ja mangonha kima kiaiibha." 
Proverbs20:24 O mauendelu ma muthu-phe, Jihova u ma tambula konda; muthu-phe u tena kiebhi ku tongolola o njila iêmuène?" 
Proverbs20:25 O kuzuela kua kulundumuka, uixi: Nga ki tela Nzambi, o ki u zubha kubhana jipolomesa, anga u tangalala kiua ni ixinganeku." 
Proverbs20:26 Sobha ia tetuluka, athu abhumuʼó u a jima mbutu, ni ku a bhitisa dilola ku thandu." 
Proverbs20:27 O kitongoluelu kia muthu, kene o kandeia ka uika Jihova moxi dia muthu, mbé o ku mu tukuluila ioso ia suama kʼoxi dia muẋima." 
Proverbs20:28 O kubhanga mbote ni kukaiela o kitongola, iene ima i fikidila sobha; o kiandu kiê ki di fikidila mu ubatuilu ua mbote." 
Proverbs20:29 Makembu a minzangala, o kuvulanguzu; o kuuabha kua adiakimi, o jimvi mu mútue." 
Proverbs20:30 Jifidila ja midimba ia kibetu, ji bhanga kiambote ku athu a bhumu, katé ni jihome ji a xila o kinduma mu mídia, jène jène ku a sungisa kilunji." 
Proverbs21:1 Muẋima ua sobha, bhu lukuaku lua Jihova, mukuâ ni milombo ia menha; kuoso kua solo muene, kuene kua u lungisa." 
Proverbs21:2 Muthu kia tala o jinjila jê joso, u ji mona kuila ja uabha muene; maji Jihova u solokota muene katé bhua suku o miẋima." 
Proverbs21:3 Kubatula o milonga mu kidi ni kufundisa athu sè katungu, kia beta ku uabhela Jihova, ku mu bhakuila jisata, ndenge." 
Proverbs21:4 Mesu a di tudika ni muẋima ua di zangeleka, kituxi; katé ni ikalakalu ia athu abhumu ue, kituxi." 
Proverbs21:5 Mukua muanu, o ixinganeku iê i bhangela kuvudisa nzungule ia jimbote; maji o ixinganeku ia mukua dimuámua ni lusolo-lusolo, i mu xila ngó uadiama." 
Proverbs21:6 Ku kalakela o kulunda umvama u tunda mu kutanga makutu, kingoho; oso-phe a ki jijila a-lu kenga kalunga." 
Proverbs21:7 Ungumba ua isuéia, hádia ua-nda ku a jima ene o mbutu; mbata a di tunu kukumbidila o kidi." 
Proverbs21:8 Njila ia muthu, mu kusekala kuê, ienda ibhengèle ioso; maji o ua zedʼió, kikalakalu kiê kifuama muene." 
Proverbs21:9 Kota o kutunga ubheka bhu hota ia mbanjidilu iaʼnzo, ki ngʼindi o kutunga ni muhatu u tangelela kiavulu, mu inzo ia zanze kiambote." 
Proverbs21:10 O muẋima ua mukua phulu, uinda kubhanga o phulu iene; o kia mona mukuâ, u sanga ki mu ibhila." 
Proverbs21:11 O seletete mukua kusebha, kioso kia bonga o kaxitiku, kieneʼokio-phe ki bhangesa kuila o kiximba u biluka njimu; kuma o njimu-phe kia mu longa o kikombo, ki mu tetulukila lusolo." 
Proverbs21:12 Muthu ua mbote, u tongolola onzo ia kisuéia anga u sunga-bhu kilunji, kia mona o isuéia ala ku a langumuina bhoxi." 
Proverbs21:13 Uoso u xita o mȧtui mê ki dikola ngadiama, muene ue hinu u dikola, maji ka-nda ku mu ivua." 
Proverbs21:14 Ujitu ua ku bhela bhu hota, uximbakatesa o njinda; o diminhinu dia kombuesa bhu homba, di batamesa o nzaia." 
Proverbs21:15 Muiuki, o kusanguluka kuê u ku sanga mu kubhanga ima ia iuka; maji oso a bhanga kiaiibha, o kuiibha kuâ, kuia ni ku a sasumukisa." 
Proverbs21:16 Muthu uoso u xisa o njila ia kilunji, nʼa kala mu ku bungana ngó, ua kà nhohena bhu kilômbo kia madifundu." 
Proverbs21:17 Uoso ua uabhela kúdia kivema ni kungozala, hinu ku mu iza uadiama; o uoso ua uabhela o vinhu ni maji, bhuene bhua suka kuma ka tena dingi ku di bhanga nʼa kala ni jimbongo." 
Proverbs21:18 Mukua-phulu ufua bhu kididi kia muthu ua iuka; o kidiangu ufua bhu kididi kia muthu uemana muẋima nzanza. 
Proverbs21:19 Sembele kutunga ku ubheka mu tutu mua kambe athu, ki ngʼindi kukala ni muhetu mukua kuhoia uthathamana kiavulu." 
Proverbs21:20 Umvama uinda o muthu, u u sanga mʼonzo ia njimu, ni maji ue u a sanga momo; maji o dilaji-phe, né ua mono jimbongo, ʼkala jene joso u ji dié." 
Proverbs21:21 Uoso u kaiela o uiukilu, nʼa jijila kubhanga o mbote, ua-nda kobonga muenhu, ni kulunga ni kijingo." 
Proverbs21:22 Njimu ua soko-bho kubokona mu mbonge ia mazonda, anga u i tolola, he u lundumuina bhoxi o imbaka ia ukuenze uoso ua di fiiala ene." 
Proverbs21:23 Muthu uoso u langa o dikanu diê nʼa koteka o dimi diê, ió muenhu uê ua u kondeka ku kikote ni lamba." 
Proverbs21:24 Mukua ukumbu, ua di zangeleka, a mu luka mukua kasekelu mukonda mukua kusekalesa akuâ." 
Proverbs21:25 Musònde kima ki mu zunzumuna, o hânji jê, mukonda maku mê ka xikina ku kalakala." 
Proverbs21:26 Mukua luimbi, kumbi dioso di mu bhuila ngó ni kuhamena o ima ni luimbi luê, maji u lembua-ku; o muthu ua iuka-phe ku kieha kiê, u bhana muene kiavulu ka jijila kima." 
Proverbs21:27 Sata ia akua kubhuma, kisinji kua Nzambi; kuambe dingi-phe ki a i bheka ni muẋima ua kubhanga phulu!" 
Proverbs21:28 Mbangi i tanga makutu, ió hádia ua kà fua; uoso-phe uividila kidi kioso, o kieza ku maka-phe utenda u tona ka tena ku mu êlesa." 
Proverbs21:29 Kisuéia pholo iê u i kolesa muene ngé; maji o muthu uemana nzanza-phe, njila iê u i tongesa muene kiambote." 
Proverbs21:30 Jihova ku tena ku mu dimukina, ku tena ku mu bhanga ndunge, ku tena ue ku mu ta kikutu kia ufue." 
Proverbs21:31 O kabalu a ka polondala muene, mbé o kizuua kia kʼèza o ita; maji o ki dʼiza-bhu, o kutolola kikale ku tunda kua Jihova." 
Proverbs22:1 Kota kukala ni dijina dia uabha o fenge, kuindi o kusola nzungule ia jimbongo; muthu o ku ku ximana ue kota, kuindi kúvua o umvuama ua phalata ni ulu." 
Proverbs22:2 Ni mvuama ni ngadiama sai bhu a takanena; oko kiiadi kiâ Jihova muene ua a iudika! 
Proverbs22:3 Njimu kiluezu u ki muena mu kanga, anga u suamʼé kiá; ilalu-phe a lundujuka ngó, katé ki a bonga divuua." 
Proverbs22:4 O kuditolesa ni kuxila Jihova, futu iâ jimbongo, ni kijingo, ni muenhu." 
Proverbs22:5 Mu njila ia mukua ituxi muezala minha ni mabhèbhe; uoso-phe u kondeka o muenhu uê, kikale u bholoka muene dikanga." 
Proverbs22:6 Longa mona-ndenge mu njila ioso ia tokala o kuendela; katé kieza mu ku kuka, ka xikina ku i xisa, lémbue." 
Proverbs22:7 Mvama muene patalá ia jingadiama; mukua ku sobha muene selevende ia ió mukua kusobhesa. 
Proverbs22:8 Uoso u kuua usuéia, u bhongolola phulu; o ku pholo ku aia, a mu iokojola." 
Proverbs22:9 Uoso uene ni utalelu ua mbote, sai dibesá diê; mukonda u tena kutonginina o ngadiama, ni ku mu bhana kúdia." 
Proverbs22:10 Semenhi mu kaie, phala mvunda isuke; kuma muene ki aia, ni mulonga uabhu; ni kusonoka o pholo ue kuabhuku." 
Proverbs22:11 Uoso u uabhela kuzela muẋima, anga u kala ni kuzuela kua kilendu, katé ni sobha muene u kala kamba diê." 
Proverbs22:12 Mesu ma Jihova, ma tambula konda ia muthu ua tetuluka; maji o maka ma mukua phulu-phe, u a ta kavuanza." 
Proverbs22:13 Musònde uila: Bhu kanga bhuala hoje, nga vula kufuila mu nzuanga." 
Proverbs22:14 Dikanu dia muhatu uengi, mukuâ ni diela dia zongo; uoso a mu luualela kuala Jihova, muene ufua-mu." 
Proverbs22:15 Uôua ua nhenganana ku muẋima ua mona-ndenge; maji kabasa u bhita ku mbangala, phala ku mu longa, kindala ua u tula." 
Proverbs22:16 Uoso u bhondeleka o ngadiama, phala ku di bhanga muene, ni uoso u bhakuila o mvama, ki bhuala phata, hinu u biluka ngadiama." 
Proverbs22:17 Bheteka mátui mê uividile o uanji ua jingambi, o muẋima uê-phe jikula-u u di longe unjimu." 
Proverbs22:18 Kuma maka-phe enhá kima kia mbote, se u ma lunda moxi dié, ene-phe a fuama kunanga ku mizumbu ié." 
Proverbs22:19 Phala uende ni kudielela jinga kua Jihova, kiene-phe ki nga mu ku longela-u lelu; ngi ku longa-u eie muene;" 
Proverbs22:20 Abha, eme ki nga ku sonekena ima ia ujitu ni uhete, ia tokala kioso ki kala o phangu ni ndongo," 
Proverbs22:21 phala ku ku tetuluila o maka ma kidi, o ki u ma tongolola, nda u tene ku a vutuila ni maka ma kidi oso a tuma ku ku ibhula?" 
Proverbs22:22 O ngadiama kana ku mu nhana o kiê, mbata muene mukuenu ngadiama; o ki u kala bhu milonga, muthu uaia phulungu eie kana ku mu dia mangonha." 
Proverbs22:23 Kuma Jihova ua-nda ku mu bhângela mvunda iê; oso-phe a mu bhundile kiki, muene ua kà a katula o muenhu." 
Proverbs22:24 Mukua njinda, kana ku kala-nê ku kisangela, kana ue kuendela kumoxi ni uezala jimvunda, uthathamana kiavulu." 
Proverbs22:25 Phala ku di longe o jinjila jê anga u labhula-mu o dibhèbhe hinu di kúdia o muenhu bhu xingu. 
Proverbs22:26 Kana kuta kisangelu ni akua ku di bhana maku, mba u kala muʼaxaxe ka akua ku di ta ku ulemba ua kudia makongo." 
Proverbs22:27 Kuma o ki u lémbua bhu u nomuena phala kufuta dikongo, phala hi ngó a ku tambula o hama ié ia kuzeka, nʼa ku tulula-ku?" 
Proverbs22:28 Kana kusondolola o jimbambe jʼokulu ja tele adiʼé. 
Proverbs22:29 Eie ua mono muthu uala ni makidikidi mu kikalakalu kiê? Muenhó-phe hinu a-nda ku mu xikika bhu pholo ia jingana; ka tena ku mu tula ngó bhuamoxi ni athu ió a sebhuluka. 
Proverbs23:1 Kioso ki u xikama ku meza mu kúdia ni nguvulu, kuata kilunji u tongolole kiambote uoso uala-nê bhu pholo ié." 
Proverbs23:2 Tula o phoko bhu dikelengu dié, nda u batule o kisola kié, se uene u ngandixi." 
Proverbs23:3 Màkudia mê eie ki u ma mona kuuabhʼokio, ki ma ku kuate luimbi; mbata makudia ma mangonha." 
Proverbs23:4 Kana ku di huha kiavulu mu kusota ku kala u mvuama; kilunji kié kioso ku ki te mu kusoto ngó umvama inda katula-ku o muẋima. 
Proverbs23:5 Kifua mesu mé ma jijila kutalesa ima ia kingoho? jimbongo-ze jene ni mabhabha, jituka kala holokoko anga ji di leka bhulu." 
Proverbs23:6 Muthu se ua mono kala uala ku ku toka diesu, eie-phe kana kudia ku mbolo iê, o makudia mê ma toualʼomo, ki ma ku kuate luimbi." 
Proverbs23:7 Mbata muenhó kioso kia banza mu muẋima uê kiene muene kiala; oko u kuila; Dia-ze, nua-ze; maji o muẋima uê ua mu kala unguma." 
Proverbs23:8 Eie-phe ua-nda kuila o ki uadi ua ki lusu, o maka mê ma mbote mu ua mu tela, ma di boto." 
Proverbs23:9 Mátui ma kiôua ku ma zangele maka mé, mbata o kuzuela kué kuoso kua unjimu muene u ku tobhesʼé." 
Proverbs23:10 Kana ku sondolola o jimbambe jʼokulu, kana ku ta kinama kié mu mikáu iangene ia tokala anʼa di-fundu." 
Proverbs23:11 Kuma o mukudi uâ-ene Dizonda; muene u a zokela o mvunda, eie anga u tala hadi." 
Proverbs23:12 Muẋima ué u kaiele kioso kia ku longa, o mátui mé lungisa-nâ ku makʼa unjimu." 
Proverbs23:13 Mona enda muene ni ku mu bazela, né-mbe u mu bha jimbangala, muene ká-nda kúfua lémbue." 
Proverbs23:14 Eie u mu beta ni mbangala, o mu kubhanga kiki, ua mu vutula kuʼalunga kueji kuia." 
Proverbs23:15 Eie monʼami, muẋima ué se u di longa o unjimu iú, o muẋima uami uandu sanguluka, éue, muẋima uami muene u sanguluka." 
Proverbs23:16 O ki ngʼivua muene kuila o mizumbu ié ia zuela ima ia uhete, ni anʼa-sonhi moxi diami a kala ni ngalasa." 
Proverbs23:17 Muẋima ué ki u kale ni dixinga dia akua ituxi; inda kumbi dioso dia kambamba suua ngó kuxila Jihova. 
Proverbs23:18 Kuma kienhiki ki ku bhesa dizubhilu dia mbote; o kudielela kué ki ku kala kua ku di fula. 
Proverbs23:19 Monʼami, ívua kunu, u dimuke; o muẋima ué u lunge mu njila." 
Proverbs23:20 Ku kale mu kisangela kia jihólua ja vinhu, mba u di bunda kumoxi ni jingandixi ja kudia xitu." 
Proverbs23:21 Kuma o hôlua ni ngandixi, hinu a kà kuzuka mu uadiama; o kuzeka kilu kiavulu, kuendesa muthu mu makoza." 
Proverbs23:22 Eie monʼa-kime, tatʼenu ua ku vuala enda ni ku muivua jinga, o mamʼenu-phe kieza mu kukuka, kana ku mu ehelela." 
Proverbs23:23 Sumba o kidi, kana ku ki sumbisa; inda uila ni unjimu, ni ku di kondeka eʼmuene kiambote, hé u ta-ku ni masunga." 
Proverbs23:24 Kuma ngalasa i di bandekeza kiavulu kua muthu ua vuala o muiuki; o uoso ua vuala o hete iejiia kiavulu, ió kuene kiá o kutana kuê." 
Proverbs23:25 O Tatʼenu ni mamʼenu a tane-ku, ió uoso ua ku bhandulukile a sanguluke." 
Proverbs23:26 Monʼami ngi bhane o muẋima ué, o mesu mé mʼende ni kuuabhela jinga o jinjila jami." 
Proverbs23:27 Kuma o muhatu ua kidianzunga ua di bhanga kala diela dia zongo, muhatu ka ku tokala ua soko ni kixima kia bhoto o mizumbu." 
Proverbs23:28 Muenhú ue u zomba o maiala kala kifumbe, uia ni kubatuila mu njila hé u kuata o kuzongojola, anga muʼaxaxe ka mala u kala mu vudisa-mu athu a kamba o kukala ni ufiiele." 
Proverbs23:29 Mukua-hi u di kola-kola ni kudila dikokolo? Mukuahi u bhita, ni jingongo? Mukuahi u bhânga-bhânga jimvunda? Mukuahi u kala ngó mu tangelela? Mukuahi uizala ni jifidila ja ku di kuama-kuama ngó? Mukuahi u kusuka o mesu?" 
Proverbs23:30 Ima iii ia fuama ngoho, ió oso ene kulandukila bhuoso bhu a sanga o vinhu, ni akua kusota o makunua ma kodiuisa mʼofungise." 
Proverbs23:31 Vinhu ku i tale ki u i mona o ku kusuka, ki ila mu kopho nguí, anga i thuthuma kifulu hé i kenzuluka kimuanu." 
Proverbs23:32 Ku ia kà suka koko, inumata kala nhoka, ialala mukua ni kita-sèle." 
Proverbs23:33 Mesu mé ma-nda kutonginina kiá ahatu angene, anga muẋima ué u tanga isunji." 
Proverbs23:34 Ua-nda kuila kala muthu uai ku kilu mu kaẋi ka musanza ua kalunga, uila kala muthu kilu kia mu kuatela ku sungu ia muxi ua mvela ia naviiu." 
Proverbs23:35 Anga u kuata kuila, uixi: Kua ngi bhela jimbangala ki ngʼevu-ku; a ngi beta muene, maji né ngó kuxiximʼé! Nga-nda kuphaphumuka-phe kithangana kuẋi? phala o uhólua ngiie dingi ku u sota." 
Proverbs24:1 Ku kale ni dixinga dia akua-phulu, kuinde ue kukala-nâ bhuamoxi." 
Proverbs24:2 Mukonda o muẋima uâ ufunha usuéia, o mizumbu iâ i tanga isunji." 
Proverbs24:3 Kutunga dibhata unjimu u u kala na-u, kiu ta-bhu masunga-phe dibhata ua di fikidila." 
Proverbs24:4 O kuijiia kuene kuizalesa jinzo ni ima ioso ia mbote, ia te kiavulu, iene mu ku inda o muthu." 
Proverbs24:5 Kuma, o njimu dizonda; o muthu ua di longo kiavulu iu ua zubha, kusuina kuê kuia ni ku di bandekeza." 
Proverbs24:6 Mukonda kúlua o ita, ku tunda ku jiphangu ni ikutu ia sunguluka; o bhua bhongoloka nzungule ia jinjimu, bhu tunda kikóue." 
Proverbs24:7 Semenhi-phe unjimu uoso ua mu kala bhua lebha; o kieza bhu telelu mu kufunda, katena kujikula dikanu." 
Proverbs24:8 Muthu uoso uate muẋima mu kubhanga o phulu, a mu luka exi mesene ia ixinganeku iabolo." 
Proverbs24:9 O kiôua, kubanza kuê ngó, kituxi kiene; o Semenhi, u kuata kulongolola, athu oso a mu zemba." 
Proverbs24:10 Bhu kizuua kia phaxi, se u beleketa, kuabhu, ni nguzu ié itola." 
Proverbs24:11 Se ua mono nguzu ia ku ki bhanga, kudila athu oso a a xindi kuia muʼalunga, ni ió oso a ambata phala ku a jibha." 
Proverbs24:12 O ki uila uixi: Manhì diâ! manhi ió mukua kutala o miẋima, kanda ku ki bhanga konda? Ió mukua kulonda o muenhu ué, ka-nda ku kʼijiia? manhi muene muthu kioso ki a bhanga ki kiene kia mu vutuila?" 
Proverbs24:13 Diá uiki, monʼami, kuma u bhana kudisanza; udia kixila kia uiki, mukonda kiene kiatouala mu kanu." 
Proverbs24:14 Kienephe ki touala ue o unjimu mu muenhu ué, se ua di longa-u; se ua u kuata, ua-nda ku ku xila kuzediua, o bhuoso bhu ua jika muẋima ka ku kakula-bhu." 
Proverbs24:15 Eie u muthu ua bhumu, kana ku batamena ku dibhata dia muthu ua iuka, o kididi kiê bhua kondamena eie ku ki sekalese." 
Proverbs24:16 Kuma o muthu ua iuka, né ua di bhale lusambuadi, ubalumuka; maji athu abhumu-phe, à ka jikinina mu kibuika." 
Proverbs24:17 Kioso ki di bhala nguma ié, eie ku sanguluke; o kia di bhukana, muẋima ué ki u tane." 
Proverbs24:18 Jihova ua vula ku ki mona, anga ki mu ibhila ku mesu mé, anga njinda iê u i zumbula kua ió." 
Proverbs24:19 Ku kale mu jiphata, ki u mona athu ala kubhanga o phulu; kukale ni dixinga dia athu a bhumu." 
Proverbs24:20 Mbata o muthu ua bhumu, ka kà mona futu ia kima; o muanga ua akua phulu, ua kà jima." 
Proverbs24:21 Eie, monʼami, xila Jihova, ni muenexi ue mu xile; kana kubhangana kumoxi ni akua kulungujuka." 
Proverbs24:22 Mukonda o kibuika kiâ, kila ngó lundumuku! O kusekala kuâ, nanhi u tena ku ku ijiia?" 
Proverbs24:23 Jiji ue jene o jisabhu ja jingijiie; exi: O kukala ni katungu ka athu bhu kibhuna kia kufundisa milonga, koko kuzanga." 
Proverbs24:24 Uoso uambela o kisuéia kuma: Eie ua lungu, mundu u mu tanga ikuma, o miji ioso i mu dila hunji." 
Proverbs24:25 Maji oso-phe a mu bazela, a kà a ximana; enhó à kala ni nzungule ia jimbote ku thandu diâ." 
Proverbs24:26 Muthu u batula kiambote mu kuzuela, mukua ni iú ua bhana nzóbole ku mizumbu ia muthu." 
Proverbs24:27 Dianga ku bhanga o ima ioso ku kanga, dianga ue ku polondala o midimu ié ku mábhia mu mukáu, kiene kiua ki u tunga o inzo phala dibhata." 
Proverbs24:28 Kana ku di xikina umbangi ua ku kundula mukuenu, bhua kambe kikuma; kifua eie uandala mizumbu ié u i bhitisa mu makutu?" 
Proverbs24:29 Kana kuila, uixi: Kioso kia ngi bhange muene, eme ue kiene ki nga-nda ku mu bhanga, mukonda kala muthu ngi mu vutuila kiafuama mu ima ioso ia ikalakalu iê." 
Proverbs24:30 Ngʼele ku díbhia kua dimina o kimonha, eme nga bhiti kuzongola kʼóbhia dia mivide dia muthu ua kambe o kilunji," 
Proverbs24:31 talesa-ze nga sange díbhia dioso dia koboka mu minha, o kibende kioso kia takana ni kasau-sau, o lumbo luê lua matadi lua lundumukina bhoxi." 
Proverbs24:32 O ki nga ki mono, nga sunga-bhu kilunji, o ki nga kiʼedi suí, nga tambulaku disá." 
Proverbs24:33 Kuma eie ua uabhela o kuila: ngi zeka-ku kakilu, ngi zendalala-ku hanji bhuofele, ngi bunjike maku ngi zeke-ku dingi." 
Proverbs24:34 Utukumuka-phe uadiama ua kuiza kala kifumbe kia ku batuila; o kubhindama kua ku tula kala a ku kondela kuala kiiala kia nguzu kia maneka. 
Proverbs25:1 Jiji, jisabhu ue ja Solomá, athu a ji kopiiala mu thembu ia Ezekiia, sobha ia Juda, uixi:" 
Proverbs25:2 Kijingo kia Nzambi o ku kola kikutu mu kukondeka ima ioso; kijingophe kia jingana, o ku solokota ima ioso ia tokala kuijiia." 
Proverbs25:3 Kia di leka o maúlo, kia zongo o ixi, kiene ue kia zongo o muẋima ua jingana u bhonza kuijiia ioso iala-mu." 
Proverbs25:4 Phalata dianga ku i kenza o makololo, nʼa i zunze kiua phala itunde kitutu kia ujitu." 
Proverbs25:5 Sobha, dianga ku mu sondoluela o kiiala kia bhumu kiala bhu mbandu iê, phala o kiandu kia utuminu uê ki di fikidile mu ufundisilu ua kidi." 
Proverbs25:6 Kana ku di zangeleka bhu pholo ia Muenexi; Kana ue ku di ta bhu ditala dia athu a makota. 
Proverbs25:7 Mukonda sembele a ku idi: Banda bhabha; ki ki soko ni ku ku tulula hé a ku tununa bhu pholo ia mundu ni ia sobha ua mu mono kiá ni mesu mé. 
Proverbs25:8 Kana kusakamena kuia mu kufunda dimanda, sumba bhu bhuila o maka, eie u lémbua kia ku bhanga, mu kuila mukuenu ua ku belesa kiá." 
Proverbs25:9 Di tetulule ni mukuenu muene, ku mu xe bhoxi anga ua kà mu tanga ndunda kuengi, hé u mu tungununa." 
Proverbs25:10 Sumba uoso ua muʼambelʼó u ku bhekela kíbhidi ki ku xalesa mu dilebhu. 
Proverbs25:11 Mukonda kima se u ki zuela bhu thembu iê ia tokala, kila kala jimasá ja ulu bhu mabandeja ma phalata." 
Proverbs25:12 Mukua ni ki kala o jibixa ja ulu, ni jinzenzela ja ulu ua fina, kiene ue kia soko o kubazela kua njimu mu dítui dia uabhela o kubatekela." 
Proverbs25:13 Kala ki kala o utalalu ua neve mu tembu ia ku muna idima, kiene ue kia soko ni phunga ia fiiele kua ió oso a mu tuma; mukonda uximbakatesa muenhu ua jingana jê." 
Proverbs25:14 Kala ki kala o matuta ahatu a takujuka ngó ni kitembu, sè kubheka mvula ia kima, kiene ue kia soko ni muthu u di ta jinzabala, ni kudielelesa mukuá ujitu uene ka mu bhana-u." 
Proverbs25:15 Kilamba u fundisa o milonga, utetuluka ngó kia ku mona o ku xididika kué; mukonda o dimi dia lenduka kiambote, di bula o ifuba." 
Proverbs25:16 Eie ua bongo uiki? Dia-phe ngó uoso ua ku soko; o ki uila u ta-ku, u ku kuma, anga u u lusa ni uene." 
Proverbs25:17 Kinama kié katula-kiu, ku nhungine kiavulu mʼonzo ia mukuenu, mukonda kindala ka nange ku di kuma nʼeie, hé u ku iibhila kiá, anga u ku zemba." 
Proverbs25:18 Muthu uoso u tatela mukuá umbangi ua makutu, ua di bhange nzûndu, ni xibhata, mukua ni musongo uatu." 
Proverbs25:19 Kudielela dikamba dia miẋima iiadi, mu thembu ia kubhindama, kia soko ni kudielela kixinji kia dizu, mba kudielela kinama kia sokomoka." 
Proverbs25:20 Muthu ua tate mu muẋima, o ku mu tela mimbu ia ngalasa, mukua ni muthu u zula izuatu iê bhu kumbi dia mbambi, mukua ni ku ta vindangele mu jifidila." 
Proverbs25:21 Nguma ié se ua mu mono ni nzala, mu bhane kúdia, a die; se ua mu mono ni dinhota, mu bhane menha anue;" 
Proverbs25:22 mbata mu ku bhanga kiki, ua mu longela makala mauama ku thandu dia mútue uê; eie-phe Jihova hinu u ku futa-kiu." 
Proverbs25:23 Kitembu ki tunda ku suku, kiza ni ku xinjikila mvula; o dimi di tanga iaiibha, di bhekela pholo ia funduluka ni njinda." 
Proverbs25:24 Sembele ku tunga ubheka mu hota ia mbanjidilu iaʼnzu; ki ngʼindi ku tunga mu sabhalalu ni muhatu u tangelela kiavulu. 
Proverbs25:25 O ngolokela ja mbote ji tunda kʼoxi ia dikanga, ja soko mukua ni menha ma talala kiambote mu kanu, ku dinhota dia muthu uaiokojoka." 
Proverbs25:26 Muthu ua iuka kia mu longa o kuiibha kuala o kisuéia, uila kala fixi ia vunzuluka, u di bhanga kala ndunga iala ni menha a sotama." 
Proverbs25:27 Muthu kudia uiki ua vulu, ki kia uabha; kiene ue o muthu ku di mona kijingu kié muène, ki ki bheka kijingu." 
Proverbs25:28 Muthu se ua lémbua ku di tumina o jihânhi jê, u di fangana ni mbonge ia lundumuna imbaka, iii ia xalela ngoho." 
Proverbs26:1 Neve, ki ia fuama bhu thembu ia mbànze, mvula ki ia fuama bhu thembu ia kumuna; kiene ue kimoxi o kijingo ki kia fuama ku dilaji." 
Proverbs26:2 Njila i nhungina kima, phiáphia u tukila ue kima; o muthu ue ku mu ta o mázui nʼa mu kuata, kale bhu kala kikuma." 
Proverbs26:3 Xikote ia tokala monde mba kavualu, o mukolo mu mazulu ua tokala jumendu, o mbangala-phe ia tokala ku makunda ma athu oso a kamba kilunji." 
Proverbs26:4 Kiôua ku mu tambuijile kia tokala mu uôua uê-muène; nʼeie-phe ua vula ku di fangana-nê. 
Proverbs26:5 Vutuila o kiôua ni ku mu jimbuila o uôua uê; phala ka di mone unjimu ku mesu mê-muène. 
Proverbs26:6 Uoso u tumikisa o jinjimbu mu kanu dia kiôua, ua mu di batula o inama, ua mu bhuita kiluezu." 
Proverbs26:7 O Sabhu mu kanu dia maiôua, ia soko ni inama ia huhi-a-lènge; inhengena ngó, ki i moneka nguzu." 
Proverbs26:8 Kubhana kijingu ku kiôua mba ku mu menekena, kia sokuʼê ngó ni ku ta o ditadi dia diiamande, dia te kitadi kiavulu, bhu mbala-funda ia kutakuila." 
Proverbs26:9 Sabhu ikala mu kanu dia maiôua, idifua ni muinha u bokona bhu dikànda dia lukuaku lua hôlua." 
Proverbs26:10 Muthu uoso uixana o ioua ni idiangu kuiza ku sedivisu iê, phala ku mu kalakela, ua soko ni muthu u kuata misongo anga u kala mu kuasa ngó oso-oso a bhita njila iâ." 
Proverbs26:11 Kiôua kia naminina o uôua uê, mukua ni ímbua ialukila o kúdia kuê kua lusele kiá." 
Proverbs26:12 Eie ua mono muthu ua di fika njimu ku mesu mê muene? Muenhó, sembele o kiôua u mu dielela dikue muene." 
Proverbs26:13 O kimonha, uila: Mu njila muala hoje, mu nzunga mua batukila hoje!" 
Proverbs26:14 Musonde u bilujuka ngó bhu hama iê, mukua ni kibilujuka o dibhitu mu masokokelu mê." 
Proverbs26:15 Musonde u vuua lukuaku luê bhu dilonga; o kieza mu kuta mu kanu uila kala kia mu iibila. 
Proverbs26:16 O Musonde ku muẋima uê kia di mona kuijiia, phala muene kota, sambuadi dia jihete ejiia kuvutula kiambote bhu maka, ku mesu mê ndenge," 
Proverbs26:17 O muthu uala kubhita njila iê, anga u di ta mu mvunda ia athu engi, ua soko mukuâ ni muthu u kuata ma mátui o ímbua iangene ia mu sombokʼê." 
Proverbs26:18 Ki kala o dilaji di takujula o iẋinji ia túbhia, ni misongo ibhekela kalunga," 
Proverbs26:19 kiene ki bhanga o muthu u dianga ka nganala mukuâ, anga uamba uixi: Nga ki bhangela kutonoka." 
Proverbs26:20 Bhua kambe jihuinhi, túbhia ta jima; o bhua kambe mukua jimbuémbue; mvunda isuka." 
Proverbs26:21 Mukua ni makala ma bheka o mbàmbe, jihuinhi ji uika túbhia; kiene ue ki kala o ndaxi mu kubambula jimvunda." 
Proverbs26:22 Maka ma mukua jimbuémbue, ma di bhanga mukuâ ni dikoka dia touala, di somboluela katé mu mala." 
Proverbs26:23 Mizumbu i fulujuka ni kutanga o henda, o ku muẋima anga ku tunda usuéia, ia difu ni kienga kia mavu kiò folale ni makololo a phalata." 
Proverbs26:24 Muthu ua zemba mukuá, u di uabhesa ni muzumbu; maji o moxi a muẋima-phe, ua sueka mangonha." 
Proverbs26:25 Muene kia ku zuelela ni mbimbi iê ia ẋanana kiambote, ku mu dielele; mukonda o mu thulu iê, mua di kondela sambuadi dia isunji iaiibha." 
Proverbs26:26 Né hanji o luma luê u lu sueka kala muthu uambote, hádia usuéia uê ua-nda kutungunuka bhua tena o kionge." 
Proverbs26:27 Muthu uoso u kanda diela, muene ua-nda kufua-mu; o uoso u mbolomona ditadi, muene dia-nda ku mu mbolomokena." 
Proverbs26:28 Dimi di tanga makutu, di bhekela kuiibha kuavulu; o dikanu di uabhela kukuata ngó kafua-ku-pholo, di bhekela kusendumuka." 
Proverbs27:1 Ku te nzabala ia kizuua kia mungu, mbata ioso ia-nda kuiza na-iu o kizuua kia mungu eie kua ijiia." 
Proverbs27:2 Ehela muthu uengi a ku ximane, maji o dikanu dié-eʼmuene, kana; muthu ua tundu dikanga a ki zuele, maji o mizumbu ié, kana." 
Proverbs27:3 Ditadi di nema, o museke u di jika; maji o njinda ia kiôua, mu kunema, kiiadiʼokio ndenge." 
Proverbs27:4 Njinda kifumbe, o kuthathamana ku bhanga kiaiibha; maji nanhi u tena ku di fikidila bhuala o difuba?" 
Proverbs27:5 Sembele o kubazela kua di aneka bhu pholo ia mundu, dikue o henda iala ngó mu kasuekele." 
Proverbs27:6 Jifidila ji tu kuama o dikamba, ji di bhanga ijimbuete ia jihenda; maji o jibeju ja ku tu nzobola ku nguma, ji bheka kiluezu, kuma ji tu nganala." 
Proverbs27:7 Muenhu ua muthu se uekuta, kixila kia uiki u ki diata-diatela muene bhoxi; maji o mukua nzala-phe, ni kia lulu u ki mona kutouala." 
Proverbs27:8 Muthu kiʼaxa o dibhata diê anga uia ni kunhunga, usoka ni njila ia xisa o kikalanga kiê hé i kuata ngó kuzelela." 
Proverbs27:9 Mukua ni maji ni ima ia mazumba ki i tanesa o muẋima, kiene ue o kaiula ka dikamba ki ka tanesa o haxi ia kate." 
Proverbs27:10 Kumbi di ku kuata ngongo, kamba diê ku mu landuke, ni kamba dia tatʼenu ku mu xe, uixi kale ngiia mʼonzo ia phangʼiami, mokonda: Kota o dikamba dia ku kala bhua zukama, kuindi o phange iala dikanga." 
Proverbs27:11 Dimuka monʼami, u tanese o muẋima uami, phala ngi kale ni kia ku vutuila oso a ngi tembula." 
Proverbs27:12 Mukonda o njimu kiluezu u ki muena mu kanga, anga u suamʼê kiá; maji o jisemenhi-phe alundujuka ngó, katé kia bonga o divuua." 
Proverbs27:13 Muthu kia di xikina ulemba ua muthu uengi, eie-phe mu tambule o kizuatu; o uoso uemanena muhatu uengi, eie mu tambule kikunji." 
Proverbs27:14 Uoso u ximana kamba diê ni dízui dia zanguka, ni ku mu tundila muene mu kimenemene muná ni ku ximana, kiókio a mu kita na-kiu mázui." 
Proverbs27:15 Mukua ni isukusuku i kuata ku miâmia bhu kumbi dia mvula ia muzumbi, kiene ue kia soko ni muhatu ua uabhela kutangelela kiavulu." 
Proverbs27:16 Uoso u bhangela o ku mu fudisa, u soka mukuâ ni iú uala kusota ku koteka o kitembu mba kukoteka maji bhu lukuaku." 
Proverbs27:17 Felu ni felu i zuika mukuá, kiene ue kamba ni kamba a di bhetula miẋima." 
Proverbs27:18 Uoso uinga mufiku, ku mufiku udia-ku ibundu iê; uoso ue uxibhidila ngana iê, u tambula ujitu." 
Proverbs27:19 Kala o pholo ia muthu ki i di monekena mu kutala mu menha, kiene ue o muẋima ua muthu ki u di monekena kua muthu ni mukuá." 
Proverbs27:20 Ni kalunga ni dibuikilu, kene kuikuta; ni mesu ma muthu ue kiene, kene kuila: Bhenhabha kuabhu hanji, bhua ngi soko." 
Proverbs27:21 Phalata a i tunguila bhu dizunzilu, o ulu a u tunguila mu túbhia tua muzukuta; o muthu-phe a mu tunguila bhu kaẋi ni kia mu ximana kuala akuá." 
Proverbs27:22 O kiôua né uedi u mu zuka ni muixi mu kinu, bhua moxi ni masa mʼòsuange, o uôua uê ki u mueha." 
Proverbs27:23 Sota kujiia kioso kiala o jimbudi jé; ta muẋima ku ibhaku. 
Proverbs27:24 Mukonda o jimbongo ki jene kuxalelà-ku; manhi o kitundu kiene kuxalela kutunda muiji kuiza muiji? 
Proverbs27:25 Ki fuáfua o iangu, anga o sabhelela i moneka, suá-phe kiá o iangu ku milundu." 
Proverbs27:26 Jimbudi ja tuana jene jiia ku kizuatu kiê, o jihombo ja isutu phala kusumba mikáu." 
Proverbs27:27 Lete ia jihombo-phe ia-nda kusoka phala huta ié-eie ni ia dibhata dié, ni huta ia kudikila tuhetu tué." 
Proverbs28:1 Isuéia a di ta ku lusolo, nè-mbe ua a landemeka ka moneka; maji o athu oso a iuka-phe, a di fikidila kala hoje ia munzangala." 
Proverbs28:2 O ixi, mukonda dia ikuma iâ, utuminu uê u vula jingana; maji kioso-phe ki uiza bhu maku ma muthu umoxi uadimuka, uala ni kilunji, utuminu uê u nangenena." 
Proverbs28:3 Ngadiama ku ulamba, kia huha o jiphulungu, u difua ni mvula ia kibhungu i jibha jimbutu, mʼoxi hé muiza nzala." 
Proverbs28:4 Oso a xisa bhu mbandu, kioso kia xindi o kitumu, kifua a ximana o isuéia; oso-phe a lunda o kitumu ni ku ki bhanga, isuéia ala kuzoka na-iu." 
Proverbs28:5 Athu a bhumu, o uendelu ua ngonge ia kuiuka, ki utena ku a jimbulukila; maji oso-phe a sota Jihova, ima ioso ia tetulukila kiambote." 
Proverbs28:6 Ngadiama, ua kambe mangonha, uala kota ku ujitu; muthu uabhumu, né-mbe u kala mvuama, ndenge." 
Proverbs28:7 Uoso uaiuka o ngonge, muene njimu ia mona; maji o kamba dia jingandixi, ubheka jisonhi kua tatʼâ." 
Proverbs28:8 Uoso u sokolola o jimbongo jê mu ku vualesa kitadi kia sobhesa, ni kubhunda-bhunda ngó akuâ, ua-nda ku ji bhongoluela ió uoso uene mu kala ni henda ia ngadiama." 
Proverbs28:9 Uoso o mátui mê u ma landukisa, nguaiê kubatekela mu kuividila o ngonge, katé ngó ni musambu uê, u kituka kisunji kiaiibha kua Ngana!" 
Proverbs28:10 Muthu uoso u bhangesa kuila athu a iuka u a luezesa anga a kutuka njila iaiibha, muene-ku ua-nda kúfua mu diêla diê dia kande; maji athu aiukʼó, o mbote a i lundula muene." 
Proverbs28:11 O muthu kia kala mvama, ku muẋima uê u di mona kudimuka; maji o ngadiama uala ni kilunji uejiia ku mu tungununa." 
Proverbs28:12 Athu aiuka kia bonga ditala dia ujitu, bhu kala kutana kua nzungule; maji o isuéia-phe, se a i tudika, athu bhu kaia kusuama-suama." 
Proverbs28:13 Muthu uoso u vunga o ikuma iê, katena kubhanduluka; maji muthu uoso-phe ikuma iê u i fisala, anga u i ambula, ió hinu a mu kuatela henda." 
Proverbs28:14 Ua zediua o muthu uoso uenda ni uoma ua Ngana mu thembu joso; maji uoso-phe u ẋiẋidisa o muẋima uê, ió ua xikamena kulaukila mu kikote." 
Proverbs28:15 Mukua-phulu kia tambula ukota ua kutumina o muiji ua jingadiama, u di bhanga mukua ni hoji i nanga ni kuzuma, mba mukuâ ni kitôto kia di zekele nzala." 
Proverbs28:16 Sobha kia kamba kutetuluka, u vudisa ungumba; maji o sobha ia kambe luimbi lua kitadi, kulaia kuê kuia muene bhua lebha." 
Proverbs28:17 Muthu se uabhangele ufumbe ua kujibha mukuá, o manhinga ma iú a mu jibha anga ma mu oseka, uila o lengʼé katé mu kina, tuleé; aie, ki bhu kale muthu u mu kudila." 
Proverbs28:18 Muthu uoso uenda ni muẋima ua iuka, hinu ua kà bhuluka; maji o ua kuata-phe mauendelu ma bhangalala, kà nanga kúfua mu dikungu." 
Proverbs28:19 Uoso u dima o mavu mê, udia anga uikuta; maji uoso-phe u landukila o imonha, uadiama hinu u mu vudila." 
Proverbs28:20 Muthu u kala ni kitongola, hinu u bonga mabesá ma nzungule; maji uoso-phe u di sukila kuta jimbongo mu lusolo, kindala u bonga milonga." 
Proverbs28:21 O kuxila athu mukonda ngó dia jipholo, ki kiauabha; kuma mukua katungu ka athu, ua soko-bho kuta kituxi, mukonda ngó dia kakibhasu ka mbolo." 
Proverbs28:22 Muthu kia kala ni diesu diaiibha, dia luimbi, u di ta mazalu mu kuata jimbongo; ka kʼijiia-phe kuila uadiama ua mu kinga ku pholo ku aia." 
Proverbs28:23 Uoso u bazela muthu, o ku pholo kuaia, a beta ku mu zola; kuindi o mukua kubhomba ni dimi dia kukuata ngó káfua ku pholo." 
Proverbs28:24 Muthu uoso u nhana tatʼâ, mba mamʼâ, anga uila, uixi: Ki kituxi, mukonda mʼonzo ietu etu-ene, muenhó kijibhanganga, kuma uasoko ni kifumbe." 
Proverbs28:25 Mukua luimbi, mvunda ja mu vula; uoso-phe ua dielela kua Jihova, uia ni kuneta kiengi, kuma a kà mu dikila jinga." 
Proverbs28:26 Muthu uoso ua dielela o muẋima uê-muène, kiôua; muthu uoso-phe uenda ni masunga, ka sukamena." 
Proverbs28:27 Uoso u bhana o nagadiama, muene ka kà tala hadi ni uadiama; uoso-phe u jika ku mesu, hádia ua kà Iala hadi ni mázui." 
Proverbs28:28 O isuéia kioso ki i banda bhu ditala dia dikota, athu a suama; enhó-phe kuila abuika kiá, athu a iuka kiene kiua kiaia ni kusokoloka." 
Proverbs29:1 O muthu uila: Lelu a mu bazela, mungu, a mu bazela, sè kueha o njila iê, maji u kolesa o muẋma uê, hinu u tukumuka a mu jimi o mbutu, sè ngó bhua bhulakela." 
Proverbs29:2 Athu aiuka kia a zangeleka mu kutumina ixi, mundu u sanguluka; maji o kisuéia-phe kia tambula o kutumina ngongo, mundu u kumba!" 
Proverbs29:3 Muthu uoso u suinina o kuijiia, u bheka ngalasa kua tatʼâ; maji muthu uoso-phe u di nhenga ni ahatu a idianzunga, o iuaia, usala-sala umvama uê uoso." 
Proverbs29:4 Sobha, kufikidila oxi, kale u kaiela ubatuilu ua kidi; maji o kamba dia maujitu a madiminhinu, usendumuna oxi." 
Proverbs29:5 Muthu uoso u kuata kuhanza mukuâ, phala ngó ku mu kuata kafua-pholo, kiókio ua mu zalela uanda mu njila." 
Proverbs29:6 Muthu ua iibha o muẋima, o kutondala kuê ku di bhanga díbhebhe; maji o muthu ua iuka-phe, ukala jinga mu kuimba ni kutana." 
Proverbs29:7 Muthu ua iuka, u tongesa kiambote o mulonga ua phulungu; maji o ua bhukumuka-phe, ki ki mu kuatela kima." 
Proverbs29:8 Akua kasekelelu, a buikisa sanzala; maji o jinjimu-phe, abateka o njinda." 
Proverbs29:9 Muthu uejiia, kia di kuata ni iú kʼejiia kima, kixi u di vunza mba uolela, ió kunhoha ka ku mono." 
Proverbs29:10 Ifumbe, muthu mukua muẋima uemana nzánza, a mu kuatela luma; maji athu aiuka-phe, a sota ku mu langa o muenhu uê, ni ku mu bhanga o mbote." 
Proverbs29:11 Dilaji, njinda iê ioso u i aneka; maji o njimu-phe, uximbakata anga o njinda iê u i kondeka." 
Proverbs29:12 Se nguvulu u kuata kusuua o maka moso ma makutu, jiselevende jê joso u ji mona kukala isuéia." 
Proverbs29:13 Ni ngadiama ni mukua kutambula avasu, atakana bhuamoxi; maji kiiadi kiâ Jihova muene u a muikina o mesu." 
Proverbs29:14 Sobha, u kuata kufindisa o jingadiama mu kidi, kiandu kiê ua ki phaphe muene, kinangenena katé ku hádia." 
Proverbs29:15 O mbangala ni kibazu kia kubazela, i dimuna muthu; monandenge-phe se a mu talela ngoho, sè ku mu bazela, mungu u kuatesa jisonhi kua manhʼâ." 
Proverbs29:16 Isuéia kioso ki i sokoloka, ni milonga ue i sokoloka; maji o kibuika kia enhó, athu a iuka hinu a ki mona mesu." 
Proverbs29:17 Mona uenda ni ku mu bazela, nda muene ue a ku bhane dinhohenu, katé ni muenhu ué mʼoxi u bonga maláu." 
Proverbs29:18 Bhua kambe o mizambu ia upolofeta, mundu uoso udianguka ni ituxi; maji uoso-phe uaiuka o ngonge ia Jihova, ió ua zediua." 
Proverbs29:19 Mubhika ku mu bazela ngoho ni dikanu, kʼevu nʼa di longo; kuma ima né ua ivu muene kiambote, kutumaka u mu lémbua." 
Proverbs29:20 Eie ua mono muthu mukua kuzuela kua lusolo, muenhó sembele o kiôua u beta ku mu dielela, dikue muene." 
Proverbs29:21 Muthu, o mubhika ku mu sasa ni uhete uavulu tunde undenge kala mona, hádia sai kizuua u diela." 
Proverbs29:22 Kiiala kia mukua njinda, u vulumuna jimvunda; o mukua nganji, mukua ku di vudixila o itondalu." 
Proverbs29:23 Muthu mukua ukumbu, o ukumbu uê uene hádia u mu katula o kijingo; maji o mukua muẋima ua batama-phe u bonga ujitu." 
Proverbs29:24 Uoso u ta kisangela ni muiii, ua zembe o muenhu uê; mukonda uívua jindaka, maji u lémbua ku mu tungununa." 
Proverbs29:25 O kukala ni uoma ua muthu, ki di bhanga mubhetu u fuisa muthu; maji uoso u dielela kua Jihova, uala ditala dia di leka, ka mu tena." 
Proverbs29:26 Avulu ene mu kusota ku di uabhesa ku jisobha jala kutumina, maji Jihova muene u batula o milonga ia muthu ni muthu." 
Proverbs29:27 Muthu ua bhumu, o mukua mangonha, u di bhanga kisunji phala athu aiuka; o mukua mauendelu ma kidi ue, u di bhanga kisunji phala muthu ua bhumu." 
Proverbs30:1 Maka ma Angulo, monʼa Jake; maka ma mesene. Muthu muenhó anga uambela Ithiiele, ni Ukale, uixi:" 
Proverbs30:2 O kutanga kidi, eme nga beta kutobha athu oso ndenge; kilunji kia muthu ki ngala na-kiu." 
Proverbs30:3 Ngedi ki nga di longo unjimu, o Muthu Ukôla ki nga mu tongolola." 
Proverbs30:4 Mukuahi ua bandele kiá ku diulu iu ua tuluka? Mukuahi ua koteka o kitembu bhu maku mê? Mukuahi ua kutila menha bhu kizuatu kiê? Mukuahi ua xikika o jihota joso jaʼxi? Dijina diê nanhi, mba o dijina dia monʼê nanhi, se eie ua mu ijiia." 
Proverbs30:5 Mbata o maka moso ma Nzambi, ma zela, ma kidi; mene o ngubu ixitila oso a mu dielela muene." 
Proverbs30:6 Ku bandekeze-phe kama ku maka mê, muene ua vula ku ku bazela, anga u ku mona u mukua makutu." 
Proverbs30:7 Ima iiadi nga ku bhingi: kiosuʼiki kiluua ngifua, ku ngʼimine-iu:" 
Proverbs30:8 ngixi o ukumbu ngi sandule-u, ni kuzuela kua kutanga makutu; kana ku ngi bhana uadiama, kana ue ku ngi bhana umvama; inda ngi bhane ngó o kúdia kuoso kua tokala ku ngi soka." 
Proverbs30:9 Nga lengesa kuila o ki ngizala, ni jimbote ja ndumba, nga vula ku ku dituna kiá eie, hé ngiia, ngixi: O Jihova muene nanhi? O ki ngi kala ngi ngadiama ia ngadiádia, ngavula kunhana, kifua nga lebhukisa o dijina dia Nzambi." 
Proverbs30:10 Mubhika kana ku mu tatela bhu pholo ia ngana iê, muene ua vula ku kuta mázui, eie anga u tala o hadi." 
Proverbs30:11 Sai-ku muiji ua athu a lebhula tatʼâ, o manhʼâ a tokoka ku mu tanga o mbote." 
Proverbs30:12 Sai-ko muiji ua athu u di mona kuzela ku mesu mê-muène, o uene-phe nuka a u sukuile o dixidilu diê." 
Proverbs30:13 Sai-ko muiji ua athu, o mesu mâ manama bhulu, ibhebhetelu iâ a i tudika bhuluʼobho!" 
Proverbs30:14 Sai-ku muiji, ala ni maju mukua ni jixibhata, o jingandelu jâ kala jiphoko, phala kujikinisa o jiphulungu kulu dia mundu, ni akua-hadi a bhondalala kiá muʼaxaxi ka anʼathu." 
Proverbs30:15 O dizaia uene ni anʼê aiadi, enhá: Bhana, Bhana! Sai ima itatu ki iene kuikuta mba iuana muene, ki iene kuila: Kuabhu kiá!" 
Proverbs30:16 O mbila; o divumu dia mbaku; o mavu kene kuikuta ni menha; ni túbhia; enhá kene kuila exi: Kuabhu kiá! 
Proverbs30:17 Muthu uoso mesu mê ma kala mu bhanga kasekelu kua tatʼâ, o mamʼâ ka xikina ku mu tumaka, muthu ió ilombelombe ia honga hinu i mu lokola-nâ, anga anʼa jiholokoko a ma dia." 
Proverbs30:18 Sai-ku ima itatu ia mu ngi di uanesa, o kia kauana ki nga kʼijiia:" 
Proverbs30:19 O njila ia holokoko bhulu; o njila ia nhoka bhu ndangi; o njila ia naviiu muʼaxaxi ka kizanga kia kalunga; o njila ia diiala ni monʼa kilumba, ki a di endesa." 
Proverbs30:20 Kiene ue o njila ia muhatu mukua jiphanda; muene uila udia, u kondona ku dikanu diê, uixi-phe: Emeʼamʼiú, ki nga teʼami kituxi." 
Proverbs30:21 Sai-ku ima itatu ibhangesa oxi ku di vunza, o kia kauana oxi ki itena kusoka na-kiu:" 
Proverbs30:22 kia mubhika ku kala ku usobha ua kutumina; kia kiôua ku kala ni kúdia kua di xala; 
Proverbs30:23 kia muhatu a mu senge anga u sakana dingi; ni kia mubhika ua muhatu ku kala muene o mulundudi ua ngana iê ia muhatu. 
Proverbs30:24 Sai-ku ima iuana iofelefele mu kutola kulu dia mundu, maji o kudimuka-phe kuahi ngó;" 
Proverbs30:25 jixixikinha, muiji ua kambe o nguzu, hanji-phe o bhu thembu ia mvula bhene kiá bhua bhongolola o makudia mâ;" 
Proverbs30:26 jisèle, muiji ua kubhuila muene, hanji-phe mabhata mâ a ma iudika muene ku matadi mu jindànji." 
Proverbs30:27 Kihoho, ki kiene ni sobha, hanji-phe mu kutunda kuâ a di ta muene ku ibuka-ibuka." 
Proverbs30:28 O nzengèdia u di kuatenena ni maku, maji hanji-phe, u tunga muene mu mazemba ma jingana ni jisobha." 
Proverbs30:29 Sai-ku ima itatu o kuenda kuá kua di uabhela, tata! o kauana-phe u nama muene kiambote kiná!" 
Proverbs30:30 O hoje ua tunda o iama ioso ku nguzu, kuoso kua lunga pholo uia ngó, ki kuala kima ki xikina ku mu vutula-ku;" 
Proverbs30:31 O kolombolo dia sanji, kiendela ku inama iiadi; o kisutu kia hombo ue; ni muenexi kia ẋinuka." 
Proverbs30:32 O ki ki kala eie ua bhange usuéia, ua di zangeleka, mba ua kana kima kiaiibha, bateka o dikanu dié ni lukuaku." 
Proverbs30:33 Mukonda o kukama lete, kuzunza matheka; o kutukuta dizulu, kubhubhisa manhinga; o kutunha o njinda, ku vulumuna jimvunda." 
Proverbs31:1 Maka ma sobha Lemuuele, ua tokala ku Masá, ma mu longo manhʼâ ni ku mu tendelela, uixi:" 
Proverbs31:2 Eie Lemuuele, tata, monʼami ua phande-kumbi, nga ku ambela kiebhize? Kiebhi-ze monʼami? Kiebhi-ze tata, mona nga ku vuala mu mala diami? Kiebhi-ze, monʼami ua jiplomesa?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ahatu-ze ku a handamene, kana ku a zangela o nguzu ia unzangala ué, mauendelu mê kana ku ma lungisa ku ahatu ió ene mu kutexikisa o jisobha." 
Proverbs31:4 Lumuuele, tata, jingana ki kia a fuama o kúnua vinhu, anʼa jingana ala kutumina ki kia a fuama o kusola makunua ma kodiuisa." 
Proverbs31:5 Phala ki kibhite kuila ela anua, a jimba o kitumu anga a selula o kidi kia tokala kulungisa o jiphulungu." 
Proverbs31:6 Kúnua ku kodiuisa bhanenu-ku ió oso a xikamena kiá o kufua, o vinhu bhanenu-iu oso ala mu kikote kia muẋima." 
Proverbs31:7 Mbé anue, phala ajimbe o uadiama uâ, sembele o hadi iâ ka i lembalala dingi." 
Proverbs31:8 Jikula o dikanu diê mu kubhângela o dibubu ualembua kuzuela, ni ió oso ka moneka dingi muthu." 
Proverbs31:9 Jikula muene o dikanu dié, u batule milonga mu kidi; o jingadiama ni oso a bhindama, eie batuila-u o milonga iâ mu kidi." 
Proverbs31:10 Muhatu ua mbote, uala ni kilunji, mukuahi u tena ku mu sanga? muenhó ua beta kota mu kuta o suilu, o matadi avulu a phelu ja nzaji, ndenge." 
Proverbs31:11 Muẋima ua munumiʼê ua nhohena kua muene; muhatu iú, soua ki ia mu kamba dingi." 
Proverbs31:12 Muhatu iú, izuua ioso ia muenhu uê, ubhanga mbote mu mbote kua muadi uê, phulu kana." 
Proverbs31:13 Usota lâ, ni linho, anga u kuata kukalakala ni maku mê, ni vondadi ioso." 
Proverbs31:14 Uila kala naviiu ia jingenji; kúdia kuê, ua kà ku takana dikanga." 
Proverbs31:15 Usuku hanji, muene uabalumuka kiá, iu uanena kiá akua dibhata diê o kúdia; abhikʼê a ahatu iu u a uanena kiá kia kubhanga." 
Proverbs31:16 U tongolola o kitaka, anga u ki sumba muene; uphapha mulenga ni nganhu ioso ia tundu mu kukalakala kua maku mê." 
Proverbs31:17 U di ẋiẋika o miongo ni ukuenze, u suinisa o maku mê." 
Proverbs31:18 O uenji uê ua ta, u uila muene suií, uixi: Iú ua fika, o uene ue ua uabha; o kandeia kê mʼusuku ki ka tena kujima." 
Proverbs31:19 U kuata ni maku mê ku nzelele, o makànda ma maku mê ma kuata muene ku muhongo ua nzelele." 
Proverbs31:20 Ni lukuaku luê, u tambuisa uoso ua tate; o phulungu ua bhindama, u mu bhana muene, ka mu kotekela o maku mê, kana." 
Proverbs31:21 O mbàmbi ia neve, ki i mu kuata uoma, kuma akua mbèle iê oso muene endela mu izuatu iòfolale." 
Proverbs31:22 Muene u di tungila jithanga jê ja muhota; o izuatu iê, ia linho ia fina ni purpura." 
Proverbs31:23 Muadi uê a mu ijiia bhu nangu dia mundu ni bhu mabhitu a imbaka ia mbonge, kioso kia xikama kumoxi ni adiakime aʼxi." 
Proverbs31:24 U tunga milele ia linho ia fina, anga u i sumbisa, o jingenji bhu kibangu u a bhana jiphonda." 
Proverbs31:25 Ni kuhandamana ni kukunzama iene o izuatu iê ia di zakela na-iu; uolela kia tala o thembu iala kuiza-ku ku pholo, ka kala ni uoma ua izuua ia hádia." 
Proverbs31:26 Kia jikula dikanu, u zuela ni uhete; o dimi diê, diejidila kulenduka." 
Proverbs31:27 U tongesa kiambote kioso kia mu kuenda o dibhata diê; ka xikina kúdia kudia ku tunda ku usonde. 
Proverbs31:28 Anʼê ela a balumuka, a mu ixana, exi: Mamanhi ua zediua; kiomuène ue munumiʼê, uila u balumuka, u mu tanesa, uixi:" 
Proverbs31:29 Ahatu avuluʼâ ene mu kubhanga ima ia ujitu; maji eie ene oso ua a tundu. 
Proverbs31:30 Kisangu-sangu ki nganala o muthu, o kuuabha ue kua mukutu kingoho; maji o muhatu-phe u kala ni uoma ua Jihova, ió muene a mu ximana." 
Proverbs31:31 Ku kibundu kia kalakala maku mé mu bhanienu-ku, o ikalakalu iê i mu ximane bhu mielu ia mbonge bhuala athu oso." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Maka a tele Ndongixi (Mulongixi), monʼa sobha ia Jeluzaleme, uambe uixi:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Kingoho mu kingoho! Mulongixi, uixi: Kingoho mu kingoho! Ioso muene ukumbu ngoho!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 O muthu u bhanduluka-ku ihi ku kikalakalu kiê kioso kia mu bhanga ni hadi kulu dia mundʼuku? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Ku tunda muiji, kuiza muiji; maji o ixi ia kalé, kiene ki iene kiene." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 O dikumbi di tunda, di tula, o ku dia tundila kiá kuene ku di vutukilé dingi, bhu kididi kiê bhu diene mu tundila." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 O kitembu kiia ku Sulu, hé ki kondolokela ku Suku; anga kienda ni kunhungʼé kienhiki, o mu kia bhitile kiá muene mu ki bhitʼé dingi ni kunhingumuka mu kunhunga kuê kuene na-ku." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 O jingiji joso jiia ní ku kungulukila mu kalunga, maji-phe o kalunga kene kuizala. O kuoso kuene mu kiia o jingiji joso ni ku kunguluka, kuene ku jene mu kuia kiá, kuene ku ji kuata o kuié dingi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ima ioso ienhiʼii i bhuidisa kinéne, kana muthu-phe u tena ku i jimbulula. O mesu ka zumbuka mu kumona, o mátui ue kʼezala ni kuívua." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 O kima kia kexile-ku kiá, hádia kiene kia kà kalèku dingi; O kiókio kia bhangele kiá, ku hádia a kà ki bhanga dingi lua mukuá; kia bhangesa kuila kulu-dia-mundu kana-ku kima kieza lelu." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kuala kima kiela exi: Tala, kima kiki kia ubhe? Kia kexile-ku kiá ku mivu ia bhiti, kuila etu kiluua ngó tu kala-ku." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kuma o ima ia bhiti kiá athu kene ku i lembalala dingi; o ima ia kèza-ku ue, ka kà i lambalala dingi ku athu a kèza-ku, kuila o iene ia bhiti kiá." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Eme, ngi Ndongixi, nga kexi ngi sobha ia Izalaiele, mu Jeluzaleme." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ngixi-phe, o muẋima uami ngi u ta hanji ku unjimu, phala ngi tongolole, ngi solokote kiambote ni kuijiia kuoso, o ima ioso iene ku bhita kulu-dia-mundu. O ki nga iʼdi suí: Ngixi ikalakalu ioso iii o Nzambi ua i bhana anʼahu phala ngó ku a longela-mu." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nga tonginina ku ikalakalu ioso iene kubhanga athu kulu-dia-mundu, nga i mono kuila ioso muene kingoho ni lamba dia muẋima." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 O kia bhengalala, kia bhengalala kiá muene, kene ku ki iukisa dingi; o kiókio kia kambe-bhu, kene ku ki zonga." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Anga ngi zuela mu muẋima uami, ngixi: Eme nga di bhange munéne; o mu kuijiia ue nga a tundu ene oso a ngi diangelele mu Jeluzaleme, kidi-phe muene. Muẋima uami uezala kiavulu ni unjimu ni kuijiia kua di-xala." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Anga ngiia, ngixi: O muẋima uami ngi u te hanji mu kutongolola o unjimu ni kuijiia kiambote o Ulaji ni Uôua; o ki nga iedi sui, nga tetuluka, ngixi: Mbé iene iosuʼiii ue dilamba ngó ku muenhu." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Mbata o mu kuvula o kuijiia, muala ue kubhuila kua nzugule; kuma o ió u vula o kuijiia, u vula ue ni ia kubhanga, o dilamba ue di mu vudila dingi." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Hé ngʼambela o muẋima uami, ngixi: Izá ngi ku teze hanji ni kusanguluka; kala kiki, kemba, sanguluka! Maji mu ku kʼila ue suí, nga ki mono kuma ukumbu ngó." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Katé ni kuolela nga ku mono kutekuka; o ngalasa iene i ngi bhandululʼahi? 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nga kenga mu muẋima uami kioso ki ngi di-ta mu kúnua vinhu, (maji ni kutumina o muẋima uami ni kilunji), ni kiki kioso ki ngi di-bhakula ku ulaji katé ki ngi mona kioso kia fuama anʼathu kubhanga kulu-dia-mundu, mu kithangana kioso kia izuua iâ ia butuʼiii ia muenhu uâ." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Anga ngi di iudikila ima ia matunda! Nga di-tungila jinzo; nga didimina mábhia a mivide. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nga didimina jindombe ni mabakala a itulu; mixi i bhana o ibundu, kana-bhu ua kambe-mu mu mábhia eneʼá." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Nga bhange ue ni izanga ia menha, mbé kutekela na-iu o ditutu dia mixi ia mu kula." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nga sumbu abhika a mala ni abhika a ahetu; nga kexile ue ni abhika a a vualela kiá ku bhata diami; nga vuile ue ndumba dia jingombe ni jimbudi, ene oso a ngi diangelele mu Jeluzaleme ndenge." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 O phalata ni ulu anga ngi i bhaka ku maxita-maxita, ni makembu oso a jisobha ni ma akua jixi; nga dʼizalesa ue ni jingimba ni mala ni ahatu, ni ima ioso ia uabhela anʼathu kulu-dia-mundu; ndumba ia mala ni ahatu, ni ima ioso kiá ia kuxikila o mimbu ue." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Anga o ku kula kuami ku vula kinéne, hé ngi tûnda, ngi kala muene kotʼélele ene oso a ngi diangelele mu Jeluzaleme a kala ndenge. Hanji-phe, mu ima iosuʼiii, o kilunji kiami kikié." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Iene ioso iandalele o mesuʼami, ki nga a fudisa na-iu; o muẋima uami ki ngi u bhangesa kufula kusanguluka kuoso-kuoso; maji inda muẋima uami ua sanguluka jinga mu ikalakalu iami ioso, mukonda diene o dikânda diami, mu ikalakalu iami ioso i nga bhange kuludia-mundu kunu." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Anga ngi bhetuka o mesu mu kutala ima ioso ia kalakala o maku mami, ni kikalakalu kioso ue ki nga bhange kia tundu mu kukalakala kuami, o ki nga iede sui, mu nga bhiti ni dibhuilu diê, nga i mono kuila ioso ku mundu mbé ukumbu ngó ni ʼlamba dia muẋima, kuma ioso bhoxiʼabha ki iala ni kubhanduluka kua kima." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Anga ngi lungulukila ue o kutongolola ki kala o kuijiia, ni ulaji, ni uôua; kuma o muthu uoso hádia u kaiela kua sobha, ua kà bhanga kima kiahi? Ua kà bhangʼé muene ioso kiá ia bhanga jinga akuá." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Bhenhobho nga mono kuila o kuijiia kua beta muene kota mu ku ta o uôua ndenge, mukuâ ni muanha ki u kala kota mu ku uabha o usuku ndenge." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 O njimu mesuʼê a mu kala mu mútue, o kiôua-phe uendela mua vundu; sumbala a di tungula maji nga tetuluka kuila o ima i bhita kua iú iene ue i bhitʼê kua ió." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Anga ngi kiʼamba mu muẋima uami, ngixi: Kioso ki bhita na-kiu o kiôua, kiene ue kiʼanda kua kà bhita nʼeme; abha-phe eme nga sotelaʼhi ngó kuijiia kuosuʼku? Anga ngi kiʼamba muene mu muẋima uami ngixi, o kiki ue manhi ukumbu ngoho." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mbata ki tu fike kuila o njimu a kà beta o ku mu lembalala, o kiôua ni ki kale ndenge; kuma ku izuua ia hádia, o ima ioso ka kà i lembalala dingi, kuila bhua bhiti kiá tu izuua. Ene oso a kà fua kiò-muene, kutale o njimu uejiia, uixi o kiôua kejiia kima." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Anga o muenhu iú u ngi iibhila, mukonda o ikalakalu ioso ku mundu i bheka ngó malamba! Kidi muene. Ioso muene kulu-diamundu kingoho ni ʼlamba dia muẋima!" 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Anga o ikalakalu iami ioso i nga bhange kulu-dia-mundu i ngi iibhila mukonda dia uxilu u nga-nda ku i xila o muthu uoso hádia ua-nda ku ngi bhingana. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kuma nanhi ua kʼijiia se u kala njimu mba u kala kiôua kia hatu? Maji-phe o muenhú muene-muène ua kà i lundula, ia kà kituka iê-muène, o ima ioso i nga kalakala ni unjimu uoso kulu-dia-mundu; kiki ue kingoho muene." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kienhiki kia ngi bhekesa kuambela o muẋima uami, ngixi: Jimba-ku! Kana kudielela ku ikalakalu ioso i nga bhange kulu-dia-mundu. Anga ngi suína muene kubhangesa kuila o muẋima uami ki u kale ni kudielela kua kima kulu-diamundu." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kuma sai muthu o kikalakalu kiê u ki bhanga ni unjimu uoso ni kuijiia kuoso ni uhete ua maku a sakalala, maji, o mungu, u ki xilé ngó muthu uengi ka kalakala-ku; ki kituka dikânda diê-muène kiá. Kidi muene. Kiki ue ukumbu ngoho ni nzungule ia dibhuilu!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mbata kima kiahi kiene, muthu kia kala na-kiu dingi ku kikalakalu kiê, kioso kia bhanga kulu dia mundu kunu, ni ku di-buila-buila ngó o muẋima mu ima ioso ia mu kuenda ni kubhanga leluʼidi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kuma o izuua iê ioso ia jindolo ngó, o ibhangelu iê ia malamba muene; katé ni mu usuku o muẋima ua muthu ki u nhoha. Èlé! kiki ue ukumbu ngoho!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Manhi ki kima kiambote muene o muthu kúdia ni kúnua, o muenhu uê ni u kembe mu mbote ia kikalakalu kiê? O kienhiki ue nga ki mono kuila ki tunda ku lukuaku lua Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Mbata se ki luene, nanhi u ngi tunda, hé u ngi somboka eme mu kúdia ni kúnua ni kukemba?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kuma o muthu ua iuka, Nzambi u mu bhana o unjimu ni kuijiia, hé u mu tela-ku o kusanguluka; maji o mukua ituxi-phe, Nzambi u mu bhana kukalakala mbé a bhongolole, a lunjijiké ima ia-nda kubhana kua ió a muindi kuala Jihova. Maji kienhiki ue ukumbu ngoho ni ʼlamba dia muẋima." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ima ioso iala ni kithangana kiê kia i xindila Nzambi; iene ioso i bhita kulu dia mundʼuku iala ni thembu iê. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Sai thembu ia kuvuala, ni thembu ia kúfua; sai thembu ia ku kuna, ni thembu ia kuvuza (ioso iòkune)." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Sai thembu ia kujibha, ni thembu ia kusaka (kutumba); thembu ia kubula, ni thembu ia kutunga." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Sai thembu ia kudila ni thembu ia kuolela; thembu ia mukondo, ni thembu ia kutuka-tuka." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Sai thembu ia kumuanga matadi, ni thembu ia kubhongolola matadi; thembu ia ku di-bhubhala, ni thembu ia kusongoloka ku di-bhubhala." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Sai thembu ia kusota, ni thembu ia kujimbidisa; thembu ia kubhaka ni thembu ia kutexi bhu kanga." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Sai thembu ia kutandula, ni thembu ia kutunga; sai kithangana kia kuzuela ni kithangana kia ku di xibha." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Sai ithangana ia kuzola ni ithangana ia kuzemba; ithangana ia ita, ni ithangana ia uembu." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 O mukalakadi-phe u katula-ku ihi ku kiókio kiene mu kukalakala? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nga mono kuma, o Ngana, anʼathu ua a bhana ikalakalu iosuʼiii phala ngó dilamba diâ, mukonda o mu ikalakalu ienʼiii muene mua a talesela o hadi." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ima ioso Nzambi ua i bhange ni kuuabha bhu thembu iê; iú ua zangula o mundu uene, iú ua u te mu muẋima uâ, maji o muthu ua lémbua kuijiia o kikalakalu kioso kia bhange Nzambi, tundé ku dimatekenu katé ku dizubhilu." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Kí kia ngi tetulukila muene, kuila, kana-ku dingi kima kiengi kia fuama o muthu kubhanga kala o kusanguluka ni kubhanga mbote ku muenhu uê." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ni kuila ue, o muthu uoso, se u dia, nʼa nu, nʼa kembe ku mbote ioso ia kikalakalu kiê, ʼió-phe ujitu ua Nzambi kiá." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mbate nga kʼijiia kuila, ima ioso i bhanga Nzambi, i xalelà-ku kiá; ka tena dingi kubandekeza-ku kima, ka tena dingi ue ku katula-ku kima. O Nzambi ima ioso u i bhanga kienhiki phala a mu kuate jinge uoma." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 O ima i tu mona lelu, ia kexi-ku kiá, o ima ia kèza-ku ue ia kexi-ku ue kiá. O Ngana Nzambi-phe uà kʼèbhula katé ni ima ioso ia bhiti kiá." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Nga mono ue dingi kulu dia mundu kunu, kuila bhu kididi kia kufundisa bhene bhu kididi kia kuhâma dingi; o bhu kididi kia kubatuila milonga, kuhâma dingi kiavulu." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Anga ngʼila ku muẋima uami, ngixi: Nzambi hinu ua kà fundisa ua iuka ni ua ibha; mukonda sai thembu ia ima ioso, kixi ixinganeku mba ikalakalu." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Anga ngʼamba ue dingi ku muẋima uami, ngixi: Mukonda dia anʼathu, phala Ngana Nzambi a tene ku a lola, o ene ue a tene ku dʼijiia kuila, athu mu kikexilu kiâ, a sokuʼâ ngó muene ni iama." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mukonda kioso ki bhita ku anʼathu, kiene ue ki bhitʼé ku iama; ima ioso i bhita kiòmuene kua ene oso; o ki fua iú, kiene ue ki fué ió; ene oso o muenhu uene umoxi. Ukota ua muthu-phe ku iama ki u moneka; kuma ene oso muene kingoho." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ene oso muene aia kididi kimoxi; ene oso-phe, fufuta ngó; kienhiki ene oso muene a kà biluka fufutila." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Nanhi muene u ki tanga kuila o jinzumbi ja anʼathu jiia bhulu, o ja iama jiia muʼalunga bhoxi mu mavu?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Eme nga ki mono muene, kuila kanaku kima kia beta o kuiuka, kala o muthu kusanguluka mu ikalakalu iê ioso, mukonda diene o dikânda diê, kulu dia mundu kunu, kuma hádia, nanhi dingi u mu vutula nʼa mone o ima ioso ia-nda ku mu bhingana kuema diê, kuila muene ua jimuka kiá?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Anga ngi lunguluka dingi, hé ngi tongolola o kubhondeleka ni kutatesa kuoso kuala mu kubhanga athu kulu-dia-mundu; anga ngi mona o masoxi ma ió oso a a tatesa, ni masoxi ma iá oso a kambe uoso u a konda o malamba; o kusuína kuala ku mbandu ia atatexi maji o ene-phe a a tatesa, a lémbua ngó uoso ua konda o malamba!" 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Anga ki ngi bhekesa kuila, ngixi: Alunguʼâ ió afu kiá, kuindi iá ala hanji ni muenhu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Maji o ua beta hanji o kulúnga bhu kaẋiʼabha, ió uoso kiluua ngó a mu vuala; mukonda o kuiibha kuoso kua mu bhanga o athu kulu-dia-mundu kunu, muene ka ku mono luua." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Inda nga mono ue kuma o kukalakala kuoso ni kusakalala o maku mu ibhangelu, kuene ku bhekela ku muthu o luimbi lua mukuá uoso a zukama-nê. Kuma kienhiki ue kingoho ni lamba dia muẋima." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 O kiôua-phe u di-koteka kiá o maku mê, anga u dia o xitu ié-muène, ni kuila, uixi:" 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kota o lukuaku luezala ni kutululuka ni kunhoha, kuindi o maku ene kiiadi kiâ ezala ni ndumba dia ikalakalu ni dilamba dia muenhu." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Anga ngi lunguluka lua mukuá, mu kutala nga mono ukumbu kala iú, kulu dia mundu:" 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kuala muthu uala ngó ubhekèlele uê, kala dingi ni mukuá iadi, kidi muene, ka moneka mona mba ngó phange ia muhatu; maji muenhú, kia kuata o kukalakala, ka zumbuka, mba mesuʼê a mu suka mu kutala o jimbongo; mba ngó uila, uixi: Ki ngalʼiki, nga mu kalakalela nanhi, eme nga fulu o kubhana muenhu uami o jimbote joso ja u tokala? Kuma kienhiki ue kingoho ni nduezu mu kukalakala." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kota o ku kala kiiadi, muthu umoxi ndenge; kuma o kiiadi a beta kubhanduluka mu ikalakalu iâ." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Mbata se bhu kala muthu u di bhala, mukuá u mu balumuna; maji ió uala ubheka uê, kokôlo diê! Kuma se ua di bhale, ki bhua-ndo kala mukuá u mu balumuna." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Se kiiadi ue a zeka bhuamoxi, a ditemesa ni munza mudiâ; maji o muthu umoxi-phe u di temesa kiebhi?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Se bhu kala muthu u sota kutolola-bhu umoxi, kiiadi kiâ à-lua-nê, kuma ene mu kiʼamba muene, exi: “O ngoji lu bhita lutatu, ki lu batuka lusolo”." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 O munzangala ua ngadiama uala njimu, ua beta kota; kuindi o muadiakime ua kuka, ua kambe o kilunji, iú uala ku usobha, ua bhingi ka xikina dingi ku mu bazela kuala muthu uosouoso." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Mbata bhuala iú u tunda muene mu kaleia, nʼeza ku usobha mu kutumina; sumbala kiene muene, a mu vuala ngadiama mu utuminu uê." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Kulu-dia-mundu, o athu oso a muenhu nga a mono ku kaiejela o munzangala ió, o kabhinganu ua-nda kuhinga ungana bhu kididi kia sobha." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 O mundu uê ua kexile mu kutumina, ki u xikina ku u tanga; o ió ue, hádia a kʼèza-ku, ka kà tena kusanguluka ni muene. Kuma ue, ni kidi kiene, iene iosuʼiii kingoho ni lamba ngó dia muẋima." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Kinama kié langa-kiu, kioso ki u bokona mʼonzo ia Nzambi; beta kuzukamena o kuívua, kana kubhana ujitu ua ioua, kuma ene kʼejiia kuila a mu bhanga kiaiibha." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 O dikanu dié ki di zuela lusolo, mba o muẋima ué u lenguluka kutanga kizuelu kioso-kioso kua Nzambi; mbata Nzambi iú mu diulu, eiʼeie bhoxi; kienhiki, o kioso ki u zuela, maka mé u a fikisa." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Kuma mu kubhanga ima ia vulu, ni jinzoji ue jivula. O kiôua-phe a muʼivila mu kuzuela ngó ndumba dia ima." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kioso ki u plometela kima kua Nzambi, bhanga na-kiu lusolo; kuma Nzambi kà uabhela ioua; kala kiki, ioso i ua polometela Nzambi, futa na-iu muene." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kota ku kamba kubhana polomesa, kuindi i ua bhana anga u lémbua ku i bhanga." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Dikanu dié ku di ehele ni di bhangesa mukutu ué ku ta kituxi, mba uamba bhu pholo ia anju, uixi: Kuku kutondala; Kuma phalaʼhi u thathamesa Ngana Nzambi, mukonda dia dizuí diéeie, anga ki mu bhekela o kusengulula o kikalakalu kia maku mé-eie?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mukonda, mukuâ ni mu nzungule ia jinzoji ki muala ngó kingoho, kiene ue mu ndumba dia kuzuela-zuela ngoho, muala uôua; kala kiki, eie enda ni kuxila Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Se u mona mu ixi o jingadiama a ji tatesa, o kusuína anga kukala bhu kididi kia kufundisa ni kubatuila o milonga, eie-phe kienhókio ku di uanekiu; mukonda muthu né uala ditala dionéne, sai-ku ue a mu tundu, o ió uâ sai-ku dingi a beta, a a tundu ue ene. Maji sai-ku Umoxi ngó ua tundu enhoso, ua-lu tumina mu ngongo ioso." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ki tunda mu mavu ki bhandulula ene oso; katé ni sobha u dielela mu mábhia ku mukáu. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Uoso u zola o kitadi, o kitadi ki mungu ki mu kuma dingi. O uoso u uabhela jinzungule, ki mungu dingi a ibhila kadienge, kuma kienhiki ue ukumbu ngoho." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Mbata bhuoso bhu vudila o jimbongo, bhene ue bhu vudila oso a ji dia; kuma o jingana jê a bhandulukaku dingi ni kima kiahi? Kikale a kala mu ku ji tala ngó ni mesu, kuabhu!" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 O kilu kia muthu u kalakala, ki touala muene nzué, né uadi bhua tolo, mba u dia bhua vulu. Maji o mvuama, mukua itadi ia vulu, o itadi iê ki i muehela kuzeka." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 O kima ue ki nga mono kia ibha dingi kiavulu kulu dia mundu, kienhiki; O muthu ku lunda o jimbongo phala kuzangiua kuê-muène." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 O kikala u bhita ni uíndua uoso-uoso, jimbongo joso ji di bota; o mona a mu vuala, u lémbua kuxala-ku ni kima kioso-kioso bhu maku." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Muthu-phe kala kia tundu mu vumu dia mamʼâ, ua zula, kiene ue kia kà vutukʼê, ua kʼàia muene maku a hatu, kala kiejile ku muenhu iú; ku ikalakalu iê ioso kà kambata-ku kima bhu lukuaku luê."
