Jeremiah29:28 Mukonda kiene kia tumina ku tu tangela ku Babilonha kuila: Uhutile ua-nda kunakina muene kiavulu; tungenu jinzu mu kalemu; kunenu mábhia mu-die ku ibundu iê. 
Jeremiah29:29 Sofoniia, nganga, anga mukanda uenhú u u tangela mu mátui ma Jelemiia, polofeta." 
Jeremiah29:30 Kizuelu kia Jihova anga ki tula kua Jelemiia, kuila:" 
Jeremiah29:31 Tuma kutangela enhoso ala ku ubhika, uexi: Jihova uambe kiki ku mbandu ia Semaia, nehelamita, kuila: Mukonda Semaia ua mi zambuila upolofeta, o eme ki ngi mu tumu, iú ua mi bhangesa kuila mudielela ku makutu," 
Jeremiah29:32 kala kiki. Jihova uambe kiki, uixi: Tala, Semaia, nehelamita, nga-nda ku mu zungila, ni muene ni muiji uê, muene ka kà kala ni muthu u tunga mu kaxi ka kifuxi kiki, o mbote i nga-nda kubhanga ku kifuxi kiami, muene ka kà i mona mesu, Jihova ua ki tange, mukonda muene ua zuela ni kubhumina Jihova." 
Jeremiah30:1 Kizuelu kia tundu kua Jihova kí kieza kua Jelemiia, kuila:" 
Jeremiah30:2 Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ua zuela kiki, uixi: Maka oso u ngene ku ku tangela, soneka-u mu divulu." 
Jeremiah30:3 Mukonda kua-nda kuiza izuua, eme ngi Jihova, nga-nda ku vutulula ubhika ua kifuxi kiami kia Izalaiele ni Juda, eme ngi Jihova, anga ngi tona dingi ku a bheka mu ixi i nga bhele ku jitata jâ, anga a ívua, i kala iâ." 
Jeremiah30:4 Enhá ene o maka a tange Jihova ku mbandu ia Izalaiele ni Juda. 
Jeremiah30:5 Mukonda Jihova uambe kiki: Tuevu mbimbi ia kuteketa, ia Uoma-phe, ki ia kutululuka, kana." 
Jeremiah30:6 Ibhulenu-phe, mu mone, se diiala u kala ni mika ia kuvuala. Phalaʼhi-phe nga lu mona mala oso a di kuata maku mu miongo kala muhatu ua-nda kutula mona bhoxi? Abha phalaʼhi, pholo joso ja kituluka ni ku di suuata?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ahi Mukonda kizuua kiókio kia kudilá-ku kinéne, katé ki kiala ni mukuá a soko-nê! Thembu iii ia mukondo phala Jakobo; maji-phe ku mukondo uenhó, muene ue a-nda ku mu bhululʼé." 
Jeremiah30:8 Kuma, Jihova dia Ifuẋi, uixi: Mu kizuua kienhokio, kiene ki nga-nda kua ká bukula o jungu ia ku kala ku thanduʼa xingu ié, ophi ié nga-nda kua kà i bukula; ki mungu dingi akuaʼxi iengi a kà bhanga abhika o kifuxi kiki," 
Jeremiah30:9 maji a kà bhikila Jihova, Nzambi iâ, ni Davidi, sobha iâ, nga-nda ku a balumuina-nê." 
Jeremiah30:10 Ku kale-phe ni uoma, eie mubhukʼami Jakobo, Jihova ua ki tange, eie ue Izalaiele, kana kusasumuka; kuma, tala, nga-nda ku ku bhulula ku jixi ja makanga, ni muiji ué ku ixi ia uhutile uê; anga Jakobo ua kà vutuka dingi, hé ua kà nhoha, ua kà kala muene bhua kondama; ki bhua kà kala u mu kuatesa uoma." 
Jeremiah30:11 Mbata eme ngala kumoxi nʼeie, phala ku ku bhulula, Jihova ua ki tange; mukonda miji ioso mu nga ku muangena, nga-nda ku a bhana o zubhilu diâ; maji eie-phe, ki nga-nda ku ku zubhidisa, suke nga-nda ku ku bhana ue kaxtiku ké mu kizongelu kia fuama, kuma eie muene ue, ki ngi ku mono ni kukala kidi u muthu ua bene." 
Jeremiah30:12 Mukonda Jihova uambe, uixi: Uhaxi ué, ki u xikina ku u saka; o fidila ié iia ni kuxixima." 
Jeremiah30:13 U ku zokelela ku mulonga ué, ka moneka, mbé nʼa ku kutu o jifidila; kuala ni milongo i tena ku ku saka." 
Jeremiah30:14 Ene oso u ua kexile-nâ ku usai, a ku jimbi kiá, ene ue eie ka mu ku kuibhula dingi; mukonda nga ku kuama ni kituezu kia nguma, nga ku bhana kaxtiku ka kisuéiea, mukonda dia unéne ua ku ibha kué, ni nzungule dia ituxi ié." 
Jeremiah30:15 U di kolelaʼhi mukonda dia kiioko-ioko kié? Misusu ié ia kalunga. Mukonda-phe dia ku ibha kué kua vulu kinéne ni jinzungule ja ituxi ié, kiene ki nga bhangela ima ienhiʼii." 
Jeremiah30:16 Maji oso-phe a kúdia eie, ene a-nda kua kà diua uâ; o jinguma jé joso a-nda kuia ku ubhika ene oso; oso a ku nhana eie ene a-nda ku a nhana ue; oso a ku bhunda eme ue nga-nda ku a bhakula mu kubhunda kuene." 
Jeremiah30:17 Mukonda o kudisanza kué nga-nda ku ku vutuila-ku anga ngi saka o itoto ié, eme ngi Jihova, kuma ala ku kuixana: Na kahukunhu, ni kuila exi: Na Ziione, mukonda ka moneka dingi muthu u muʼibhula." 
Jeremiah30:18 Jihova uambe, kiki, uixi: Tala, uhutile ua jibalaka ja Jakobo ngi u bhuisa-ku, anga mabhata mê ngi ma kuatela henda; o mbanza iê a kà i tunga dingi ku thanduʼa ibhela iê iòkulu, o dizemba dia sobha dia kà kala kala ki dia kexile jinge." 
Jeremiah30:19 Mu kaxi kâ mu tunda jinga diximanu ni mbimbi ia kusanguluka; nga-nda ku a sokolola muene, ka seluka kana, anga ngʼa zangeleka, ka kala ni mukondo." 
Jeremiah30:20 Hé tuana tuâ tua kèla kala mu jithembu ja xahulu, o kionge kiâ kia kà di fikidila muene bhu pholo iami, hé ngi bhana kaxtiku kua ene oso a muia ni ku a bhondeleka." 
Jeremiah30:21 Kota diâ dia ngana ua kà tunda momuʼâ, o uoso ua-nda ku a tumina, ua kà tunda mu kaxi kâ muene, nda eme ngi mu zukamesa; o muene nʼa kà bhixila kokuami; kuma muthu nanhi u sota mudiê ku ngi bhixila eme? Jihova uzuelʼó." 
Jeremiah30:22 Enu-phe mua kà kala mu mundu uami, eme nga kà kala ngi Nzambi ienu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Tala, kibhungu kia Jihova o njinda iê ia tundu, ia di bhange kibhungu kiia ni ku komba, ia kà sonoka ni usuéia ku thandu dia mútue ua oso a bhanga kiaiibha." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ki ia kà vutuluka kuema, o njinda ia kutema kua Jihova, katé ki ia kà zubha ku bhanga ni ku kumbidila ioso ia muʼindi muẋima uê; kienhiki, ku zubhilu dia izuua, kia-nda ku mi tombolokela kiambote." 
Jeremiah31:1 Jihova uixi: Mu izuuʼomo nganda ku kala eme ngi Nzambi ia miji ioso ia Izalaiele, ene a kà kala kifuxi kiami." 
Jeremiah31:2 Jihova uambe kiki: O kifuxi kia bhulaka ku xibhata, kia bongo kuzediua mʼoxi ia kisekele; muene Izalaiele, kioso eme ki nga-nda ku mu nhohesa." 
Jeremiah31:3 Kithangana kiá kia bhiti-bhu tundé kia ngi tukulukila Jihova, uixi: Tala, nga ku zolo ni henda ki i moneka dizubhilu, nga ku sungu ue ni jihenda ja kulenduka, kokuami." 
Jeremiah31:4 Hanji nga-nda ku ku tunga dingi, ua kà kala ua tungiua, eie u muzeletete ua Izalaiele! Hanji ua-nda ku kemba ni isaka ié, ua kà tunda kumoxi ni iá a mu kuimba ni kukina." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ku milundu ia Samádia hanji ua-nda kua kà kuna-ku o mivide; akua ku kuna a kà kuna hé a dia muene ku ibundu iê ni kusanguluka. 
Jeremiah31:6 Mbata hádia kua kà kala kizuua kia-nda kudikola akua kulanga ku thandu dia mulundu ua Ifalaimi. Balumukenu tu bande ku Ziione kua Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Mbata Jihova uixi: Imbenu ni ngalasa kua Jakobo; tanenu mukonda dia Kitoto kia ifuẋi; tenu nzongo, imbenu diximanu, zuelenu muexi: Bhulula, Jihova, o mundu ué iá, a subhuka kua Izalaiele." 
Jeremiah31:8 Tala, kuma ngʼiza-nâ tundé ku ixi ia ku suku, nga-nda kua bhongolola muene tundé kua suku oxi; ngʼiza-nâ kumoxi ni ifofo ni inema, ni ahatu emita, kumoxi ni iá a mu bhanduluka a kala kifuxi kia dikota, kia-nda kuvutuka bhabha." 
Jeremiah31:9 À keza ni kudila, nga kà ambata ni kudionda; ngà kʼendesa ku tungiji tua menha, ngiia-nâ mu njila ia iuka, mua bhingi, kà ka dibhukana dingi; kuma eme nga di bhange ngi tata phala Izalaiele, O Ifalaíme muene phande-kumbi iami." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ivuenu kizuelu kia Jihova, enu mu miji iʼathu, mu ki tangele ku ikolo ia takuka ku makanga, muexi: Ió ua tena kumuanga Izalaiele, ua-nda ku muʼongeka dingi hé u mu langa kala mubidi kia langa kilunga kiê kia jimbudi." 
Jeremiah31:11 Mukonda Jihova ua kula Jakobo, iú ua mu bhulula bhu lukuaku lua iú ua mu tundu mu kusuina." 
Jeremiah31:12 Kienhiki-phe, a kèza hé a kà sanguluka bhu ditala dia Ziione, a kà lengela ku mbote ia Jihova, ku tidiku ni ku makúnua, ni ku maji, ni ku tumbudi, ni tungombe; anga muenhu uâ ua kèla kala jindombe jʼòtekele, ki mungu dingi enda ni mukondo." 
Jeremiah31:13 Kuabhu-phe, muhetu ua muzeletete ua kà sanguluka mu ku kina, ni minzangala ia mala ue, ni iá a kuka kiá; o kudila kuâ nga kà ku bilula kusanguluka, hé nga kà a konda malamba, o dilamba diâ nga kà di bilula kutana" 
Jeremiah31:14 Anga ngà kʼekutisa muenhu ua jinganga ni ima ia nete, o mundu uami, mbote jami ja-nda kua kà a kuma muene, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah31:15 Jihova ua zuela kiki: Mu Lama, evu-mu mbimbi, jingololo ni kudila lujiji; Lakele ua mu dila tuana tuê, nguê ku mu di xibhisa ku tuana tuê, mukonda ki tua moneka dingi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Jihova-phe uambe kiki: Mbimbi ié ia kudila suikika na-iu, kumoxi ni masoxi ma mesu mé; kuma o kikalakalu kié kiala ni futu iê, Jihova ua ki tange, mukonda ku ixi ia nguma iâ ene a-nda kutunda-ku mu kuvutuka." 
Jeremiah31:17 Hanji sai kia kudielela ku disukilu dia xala-ku phala luvualu lué, Jihova ua ki zuela, kuma hádia anʼé a kà vutuka mu jimbambe jâ jʼokulu." 
Jeremiah31:18 Nga kʼivu muene kiambote kuila Ifalaíme ua kexi mu ku di tenda, uixi: Eie ua ngi bhe jingongo, eme nga mono ngongo, mukuâ ni kamona ka ngombe kiluua hanji kʼejidila; ngi bilule mu kudiela, phala eme ngi diele, mukonda eiʼeie u Ngana dia Nzambi iami." 
Jeremiah31:19 Mukonda, ni kidi kiene, kioso ki nga biluka, nga diela muene; o kioso ki nga zubha ku dʼijiia, nga beta ku ditabela diami; nga tandanganha muene; xi, sonhi ja ngi kuata, mukonda o lusebu lua unzangala uami nga luʼehela muene kiavulu." 
Jeremiah31:20 Manhi Ifalaíme ki monʼami ua hate? Kamona kami ka makembu? Mukonda kioso ki ngi zubha ku mu zuela ima ia ku mu bhanga kia ibha, hanji ngi mu xinganeka ni muẋima uoso; kienhiki miẋima moxi i ngi bhuá-mu mukonda dia muene, hanji nga-nda ku mu kuatela henda ia vulu, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah31:21 Uixi: Eʼmuene di tele imaku, di kubile eʼmuene jiphiladi, u te muẋima ué mu hoka, mu njila mu uende; vutuka, eʼmuzeletete ua Izalaiele, vutuka mumu, mu jimbanza jé." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ua kà suka bhebhi ni kubungana, ki ua ẋinukʼokio, monʼa kilumba? Kuma Jihova ua bhange kima kia ubhe mu ngongo Muhatu umoxi ua-nda ku ta iala dimoxi mu lukumbi." 
Jeremiah31:23 Jihova dia ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Kizuelu kiki a-nda ku ki tanga hanji mʼoxi ia Juda ni mu mabhata mê, kioso ki nga-nda kuzubhaku o ubhika ua uhutile uê, kuila: Jihova a ku zediuise, eie dibhata dia kubatula o milonga mu kidi, eie u mulundu uê ukola!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Mua muene, muene mua kà tunga Juda ni mabhata mê moso kumoxi; ni iá kiá ue oso idimakaji, ni akua kuenda ni ilunga." 
Jeremiah31:25 Mukonda o muenhu ua iokojoka nga uʼikutisa, o mienhu ioso iala ni malamba nga i disa í iekuta." 
Jeremiah31:26 Ku iene iosuʼiii-phe, ngi phaphumuka hé ngi tala; kakilu kami ngevu kedile muene: Nzué!" 
Jeremiah31:27 Tala, izuua í iza, Jihova ua ki tange, ki nga-nda ku kuna dibhata dia Izalaiele ni dibhata dia Juda ni mbutu ia athu ni mbutu ia iama." 
Jeremiah31:28 Hé kia kà kala phe kiki: Mukua ni ki nga fulu kilu ku thandu diâ, phala kuvuza, phala kubula, ni kuvutula kuema, phala kumuanga, phala kutatesa, kiene ue ki nga-nda kufula o kilu ku thandu diâ, phala kutunga ni ku kuna, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah31:29 Mu izuua muenhomo, ki mungu dingi a ki tanga, kuila: jitata a di jiúva ja uisu, o mazu ma tuana mʼezala uengenge." 
Jeremiah31:30 Maji muthu ua kà fuila kikuma kiê-muène; muthu uoso u dia jiúva ja uisu, muene u kala ni uengenge ku mazu." 
Jeremiah31:31 Kuma Jihova, uixi: Kua-nda kuiza izuua, i nga-nda ku ta kikutu kia ubhe ni dibhata dia Izalaiele, ni dibhata dia Juda," 
Jeremiah31:32 ki ki kala dingi kala o kikutu ki nga tele ni jitata jâ, mu kizuua ki nga a kuata mu lukuaku, phala ku a katula mʼoxi ia Ijitu; mbata o kikutu kiamiʼokio ki nga tele-nâ, ene a ki buakulula, kia tumbuluka muene, sumbale eme ngi Jihova hanji nga sakana-nâ, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah31:33 Maji o kiki kiene o kikutu ki nga-nda kuta ni bhata dia Izalaiele, kia-nda kúbhua o izuuʼoio, Jihova ua ki tange: Nga kà ta o kitumu kiami mu thulu iâ, nga kà ki soneka muene ku muẋima uâ; eme nga kà kala ngi Nzambi iâ ene a kà kala mundu uami." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ki kua kà kala dingi muthu u longa mukuá, mba muthu uambela phangiʼé, kuila: Ijiia Jihova; mukonda ene oso a-nda kua kà ngʼijiia, tundé ku monʼa-ndenge mudiʼâ katé ku muadiakimi, Jihova ua ki tange. Mukonda nga-nda kuloloka o ikuma iâ, o ituxi iâ ki nga kà i xinganeka dingi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Kienhiki kia tange Jihova mukua kubhana o dikumbi phala mukengeji mu muanha, ni itumu ia mbeji ni jithéthembua phala mukengeji mu usuku, Io u jikula makungu mu kalunga anga u bhangesa mabhuku mê kuzuma; Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta diene o dijina diê." 
Jeremiah31:36 Se o itumu iii i nga xindi i tunda bhu pholo iami, eme ngi Jihova, o mbutu ia Izalaiele ue ki ia-nda ku kala dingi muiji bhu pholo iami katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Jeremiah31:37 Maji Jihova uambe kiki: Se maúlu a tena ku ma zonga katé ku thandu, o maxikamenu maʼxi nʼa ma zongo katé bhoxʼèlele, eme ue mbutu ioso ia Izalaiele ngi di tuna na-iu mukonda dia ima iâ ioso ia bhange, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah31:38 Jihova uixi: Tala, kua-nda kuiza izuua, o mbanza iii a kà i tunga dingi phala Jihova, tundé bhu inzu-ia-matala mu Hanamiiele katé bhu dibhitu dia thungi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Mukunga ua kuzongela a-nda ku u tandeleka ku pholo katé bhu kamulundu ka Ngalebe, anga u kondolokela mu ku lunga ku Ngoua." 
Jeremiah31:40 Dikolo dioso dia imbi ni uthôka, mikáu ioso katé ku honga ia Sedolone, katé bhu thungi ia dibhitu dia Jikabalu, kua lungila ku thunda, ioso a kà i lumbila Jihova; ka kà i vuza dingi, ka kà i bula dingi katé ku hádia ni hádia." 
Jeremiah32:1 O kizuelu kieza kua Jelemiia kia tundu kua Jihova, mu muvu ua kakuinhi ua Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, iú uene o muvu ua kakuinhi ni nake ua Nabukodonozolo." 
Jeremiah32:2 Thembuʼoio-phe, ifuẋi ia masoladi ia tokala sobha ia Babilonha, ia kondoloka Jeluzaleme; o Jelemiia dia polofeta a mu kuikila mu lumbu lua kilangidilu, lua kexile kʼonzo ia sobha ia Juda;" 
Jeremiah32:3 mbata Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, ua mu kuikile, uexi; Mukonda eie ua mu zambuilaʼhi upolofeta, kuila: Jihova uambe, kiki: O mbanza iii, nga-nda ku i bhakula bhu maku a sobha ia Babilonha, muene ua-nda ku i tolola." 
Jeremiah32:4 O Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, ka-nda kubhuluka bhu maku ma akua Kaldeia; maji a-nda ku mu bhakula muene ni kidi bhu maku ma sobha ia Babilonha, anga u zuela-nê muene ʼkanu ni kanu, o mesu mê a-nda kumona o mesu ma muene." 
Jeremiah32:5 O muene anga ua kʼàmbata Zedekiia, uia-nê ku Babilonha, hé ua kà kala koko, katé eme ki nga-nda ku mu zungila, Jihova ua ki tange; né-mbe hanji mu luâ ni akua Kaldeia, lémbue, ki mua-nda ku tolola?" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jelemiia-phe, hé u zuela, uixi: Kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kokuami, kuila:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Tala, Hanamiiele, monʼa Salume, sekuluʼé, ua-nda ku ku sanga, uixi: Mukáu uami uala mu Anathothe sumbʼé na-u, kuma eie ua fuama o ku u kula phala ku u sumba." 
Jeremiah32:8 Hanamiiele, monʼa sekuluʼami hé uiza muene kokuami kala kia tange kizuelu kia Jihova, mu lumbu lua kilangidilu hé u ngʼambela, uixi: Sumba kindala, mukáu uami uala mu Anathothe, mu ixi ia Bejamí; mukonda é-muene ua fuama o undundu, eie uala ni kidikulu; sumba-u u kale mukáu ué. Anga ngi tetuluka ngixi: kiki kizuelu kia Jihova." 
Jeremiah32:9 Mukáu anga ngi u sumba muene kua Hanamiiele, monʼa sekuluʼami, uala mu Anathothe, anga ngi mu pezalela kitadi, kuinhi dia xíkulu ia phalata ni sambuadi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Hé ngi soneka dijina diami ku mukanda ua uenji, anga ngi ta-ku o kidimbu mu ku u jika, hé bhu kala ni jimbangi; anga ngi mu pezalela o kitadi kiê ku pezu." 
Jeremiah32:11 Hé ngi katula o kisoneku kia uenji, kutale kia mukanda uʼojike ni kidimbu kala kia tumu o kitumu ni jingonge, uixi iú ua kambele kujika," 
Jeremiah32:12 anga kisoneku kia uenji ngi ki bhana kua Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, monʼa Mahaseia, bhu mesuʼa Hanamiiele, monʼa sekuluʼami, ni bhu mesuʼa jimbangi a di te majinʼâ mu kisoneku kia uenji ni bhu mesuʼa jijudé joso a kexile mu ku xikama mu lumbu lua kilangidilu." 
Jeremiah32:13 Anga ngʼambela Mbaluke bhu mesuʼa eneʼoso, ngixi:" 
Jeremiah32:14 Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Tambula mikanda iii, ni í kisoneku kiki kia uenji, kutale mukanda uʼojike ni kidimbu, uixi iú uʼojikule, u i te mu kitutu kia utuma, phala a tene ku i bhaka mu izuua ia vulu muene." 
Jeremiah32:15 Mukonda Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Hádia hanji anda kusumba jinzu, ni mikáu ni mábhia a mivide mu ixi mumu." 
Jeremiah32:16 O ki nga zubha kubhana o kisoneku kia uenji kua Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, nga sambe kua Jihova, ngexi:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Auá! Jihova, tata! Eie ua iudika o maúlu ni ixi, ni kutena kuoso kua nguzu ié, ni lukuaku lué lua sununuka; kanaku kima ki u mona kuila kisunji ku mesu mé." 
Jeremiah32:18 Eie jihenda jé uene muji kuatela jimidi ja vulu, anga u vutuila phonzo ia jitata bhu nzemba ia anʼâ anda ku a bhingana ene; Kutende! Nzambi ia kutena! Ua bhingi dijina diê muene Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta." 
Jeremiah32:19 Ukola mu kaiula, Munéne mu ima ia bhanga! mukonda o mesu mé ma jikuka ni ku kengelela ku thandu dia jinjila joso ja anʼathu, phala kubhana muthu ni muthu kala kia fuama o jinjila jê ni kioso kiala o ibundu ia ibhangelu iê." 
Jeremiah32:20 Eie ua ta ijimbuete ni isunji mu ixi ia Ijitu katé mu kizuua kia lelu, ku tale mua Izalaiele, uixi mu athu engi a mukuá, eie ua di iudikila dijina, diene-phe di uala na-diu ni mu leluʼmu." 
Jeremiah32:21 Eie ua katula mundu ué ua Izalaiele mʼoxi ia Ijitu ni kubhanga isunji ni madiuanu ni lukuaku lué lua nguzu, ni lukuaku lué lu ua tandeleka ni kimbuua kionéne." 
Jeremiah32:22 Eie ua a bhana o ixi iii, i ua lokela o jitata jâ kuila ua-nda ku a bhana-na-iu; ixi i kunguluka lete ni uemba." 
Jeremiah32:23 Iá a bokona-mu muene, í ia kituka iâ-ene, maji a kambe kutumaka dízui dié, iá a fulu kuenda mu kitumu kié; iene ioso i ua a tumu kubhanga, ene ka i bhange; kiene-phe ki ua tumina, phala kua eze divuua dioso dienhidi." 
Jeremiah32:24 Tala-ze, Ngana, o milombo! Eza kiá mu kúlua o mbonge phala ku i tambula, ni mbonge iene iʼòbhane kià bhu maku ma akua Kaldeia a mu i zokela ni xibhata, ni ku nzala, ni ku dibhebhu; o ki ua zuela kia di bhange muene, tala, kiene-ze kiá ki tua mu monʼiki." 
Jeremiah32:25 Sumbala kiene, maji-phe eie u Jihova Nzambi, ua ngi tangela kuma: Mukáu sumba-u mu kitadi phalʼeie, u kuate ue jimbangi ji ki mona, sumbale o mbonge iò-bhane kiá bhu lukuaku lua akua Kaldeia." 
Jeremiah32:26 Bheneʼobho-phe kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kua Jelemiia kuila; 
Jeremiah32:27 Tala-ze, eme Jihova, Nzambi ia Xitu ioso; mbé sai-ku kima kioso-kioso ki ngi bhekela ku diuana?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Kala kiki, Jihova uambe kiki: Tala, mbonge iii eme ngi i bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Kaldeia ni bhu lukuaku lua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, ua-nda ku i tambula muene." 
Jeremiah32:29 O akua Kaldeia, a mu bhângela kutolola o mbonge iii, a-nda kubokona muene moxi diê, anga mbonge a kà i ta túbhia, nʼa kʼoha jinzu jala ni matala a kuoha uasu ua dizumba kua Bahale ni ku bhana makúnua ku jinzambi jengi, mbé o ku ngi lokalala eme o njinda." 
Jeremiah32:30 Mukonda anʼa Izalaiele ni anʼa Juda ka bhange ngó kima kioso-kioso, kikale ngó o ku ibha mu ku ibha bhu mesu mami, tundé mu unzangala uâ. Mbata anʼa Izalaiele kene dingi mu ku bhanga kima kiengi, kikale o ku ngi lokalala o njinda iene ni ibhangelu ia maku mâ; Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah32:31 Mukonda o mbonge iii tundé kia i tunga, ienhé ngó phala njinda iami ni kutema kuami katé mu kizuua kia lelu, nda eme ngi i katulé-ku ku mesuʼ ʼami." 
Jeremiah32:32 Ku ima ioso ia ibha ia bhange anʼ Izalaiele ni anʼ Juda, phala ku ngi lokalala o kutema, ene ni jisobha jâ, ni ilamba iâ, ni jinganga jâ, ni jipolofeta jâ, kumoxi kiá ni athu oso mua Juda ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah32:33 Eme iá a ngi bhana dikunda, pholo kana; sumbala eme nga a longo hanji, o mu ku a longa ngi di meneka muene, ene-phe nguâ kubhana mátui, phala kuividila kioso ki ngala ku a longa." 
Jeremiah32:34 Inda o kia bhange ene, o ku-ta ima iâ ia isunji, ni ufusa mu inzu iexana mu dijina diami, phala ku i sebulula." 
Jeremiah32:35 Iá a tunga matala ma Bahale, ala mu honga ia monʼa Hinome, phala kubhangesa anʼâ a mala ni anʼâ a ahatu kubhita mu túbhia tua Muloko; o kima eme nuka nga ambelelè-kiu ku ki bhanga, mba ki ngi bhita ngó ku muẋima uami, kuila a bhange ufusa uenhó; phala ene a bhangese Juda kuta kituxi." 
Jeremiah32:36 Kiene-phe, kindala, kiambela Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ku mbandu ia mbonge iii, i mua mu tanga, muexi: A i bhana kiá bhu lukuaku lua sobha ia Babilonha, ku xibhata, ni ku nzala ni ku dibhebhu." 
Jeremiah32:37 Tala-ze, eme nga-nda ku a bhongolola ku jixi joso ku nga a takuile mu njinda iami, ni mu kutema kuami, ni mu kuthathamana kuami kua vulu kinéne; nga-nda kutona dingi ku a bheka bhu kididi kienhiki anga ngi bhangesa kuila a tunga muenhomo, ni kudondama kuoso." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ene a kà kala athuʼami, eme ngi kala ngi Nzambi iâ." 
Jeremiah32:39 Anga ngʼa bhana ene oso muẋima umoxi, ni njila imoxi, nʼa ngi kuatela uoma izuua ioso, phala mbote iâ ene ni mbote ia anʼâ, a-nda ku a bhingana." 
Jeremiah32:40 Hé nga kà ta-nâ kikutu ki nangenena, ki kia kà a sondoloka dingi, mbé o ku a bhanga mbote, anga nga kà ta uoma uami ku muẋima uâ, phala eme ki mungu dingi a ngʼixa." 
Jeremiah32:41 Anga ngʼenda ni ku sanguluka muene mukonda dia ene, kioso ki ngiia ni ku a bhanga o mbote, hé ngʼa kuna muene mu ixi muenhumu, ku kidi kiene, ni muẋima uami uoso ni muenhu uami uoso." 
Jeremiah32:42 Mukonda Jihova uambe kiki: Kala eme ki nga bheka o ku ibha kuosʼuku ku thandu dia mundu uenhú, kiene ue ki nga-nda kubheka ku thandu diâ, o mbote ioso i ngene mu kana ku a bhanga." 
Jeremiah32:43 A-nda ku sumba muene mikáu mu ixi ienhiʼii, i muala ku tanga enu, muixi: Ia di bhange kikangalakata, ki mu moneka athu mba iama; a i bhakula kiá bhu lukuaku lua akua Kaldeia!" 
Jeremiah32:44 Mikáu muene a-nda ku i sumba mu kitadi, ni ku di bhangela mikanda ia uenji, anga a i ta idimbu muene, hé a bhangesa jimbangi ku ki kalela ku pholo mu ixi ia Bejamí, ni mu ikanzu ia Jeluzaleme, ni mu jimbonge ja Juda, ni mu jimbonge ku milundu, ni mu jimbonge mu iphenza, ni mu jimbonge ku mbandu ia Sulu; mukonda eme hádia nga-nda kubhangesa kuila a vutuka dingi mu ixi mumu, a tunda ku uhutile uâ, kiene kia tange Jihova." 
Jeremiah33:1 Kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza kua Jelemiia, lua kaiadi, kioso hanji muene kiala a mu jikila mu lumbu lua kilangidilu, kiexi:" 
Jeremiah33:2 Jihova ua mu bhanga o ima iii, Jihova uala ku i iudika phala o ku i kuatesa, uambe kuila, Jihova diene o dijina diê." 
Jeremiah33:3 Dikole kokuami, nda eme ngi ku vutuile ni ngi ku tudile jimene ja ima ionéne, ia kuata ia kolo, i ua kambiʼeie kuijiia." 
Jeremiah33:4 Mukonda Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki, ku jinzu ja mbonge iii, ni ku jinzu ja sobha ia Juda ja bulu ni matalabuku ni ku xibhata" 
Jeremiah33:5 Ene anga a di lukula mu kubhânga ni akua Kaldeia, maji-phe phala ngoho ku a ezalesa ni imbi ia athu, u nga kuama mu njinda iami ni mu kutema kuami; mbata mbonge iii nga i suekela o pholo iami mukonda dia ku ibha kuâ kuoso." 
Jeremiah33:6 Maji tala-ze, nganda ku bheka ku thandu diâ, kudisanza ni kuiluka anga ngʼa saka muene, anga ngʼa tukuluila jinzungule ja kutululuka ni ja kidi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Nga kà songolola uhutile ua Juda ni uhutile ua Izalaiele, anga nga kà a tunga dingi kala ku dimatekenu." 
Jeremiah33:8 Nga-nda kua kà a sukula o kuiibha kuâ kuoso, kua ta jinga na-ku ituxi kokuami; nga kà a loloka o ikuma iâ ioso ia ta jinga na-iu ituxi kokuami, ia a bhekesa o ku ngi tondalela." 
Jeremiah33:9 Mbonge iii ia kà kituka dijina diami dia kusanguluka, ni diximanu, ni fuma, mu kaxi ka miji ioso kulu-dia-mundu, oso evua mbote ioso ni kutululuka kuoso ku nganda ku mu bhana." 
Jeremiah33:10 Jihova uambe kiki, uixi: Bhu kididi kiki (ki muala kutanga muexi: Kia di bhange kikangalakata, ki bhu moneka athu mba iama) mu jimbonge ja Juda ni mu jinzunga ja Jeluzaleme, ja biluka jingundu, ki mu moneka athu, ki mu moneka akua bhata, ki mu moneka iama," 
Jeremiah33:11 Hanji a-nda kuívua-mu o mbimbi ia kukemba, ni mbimbi ia kusanguluka; mbimbi ia ngaiala, ni mbimbi ia dibhanga; ni mbimbi ia iá a mu tanga, exi: Ximanenu Jihova dia Ifuẋi, kuma Jihova mukua mbote, mukonda o kulenduka kuê ki kuene kúbhua; ni mbimbi ia iá a mu kuiza mu ku bheka diximanu monzo ia Jihova; mbata o kikexilu kia ixi nga-nda ku ki lungulula uila ku dimatekenu, kiene kia tange Jihova." 
Jeremiah33:12 Jihova-phe dia Ifuẋi uambe kiki: Hanji bhu kididi kiki, kia di bhange ngundu, bhua kambe athu, mba iama, ni mu jimbonge jê joso, hádia mua-nda kukala dibhata dia tubhila a nhohesa ibhaku iâ." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mu jimbonge jala ku milundu, ni mu jimbonge jala mu iphenza, ni mu jimbonge ja Sulu, ni mu ixi ia Bejamí, ni mu jimbandu ja Jeluzaleme ni mu jimbonge ja Juda, hanji mua-nda ku kala ibhaku i bhita bhu maku ma akua kualula, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah33:14 Tala, izuua í iza, eme ngi Jihova, ki nga-nda kutenesa kizuelu kia iuka ki nga zuela ku mbandu ia dibhata dia Izalaiele ni dibhata dia Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mu izuua ienhoio ni mu kithangana kienhokio ngi bhangesa kuila kua Davidi kusabhuka Luthangu lua Ubhe lua kulunga, muene anga ua kà fundisa mu kidi ni kuiuka mu ngongo." 
Jeremiah33:16 Mu izuuʼomo, Juda ua kà bhuluka, o Jeluzaleme u tunga u soma; o didi diene o dijina dia ká muʼixana: Jihova Muene Kulunga Kuetu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Mbata Jihova uambe kiki, uixi: Davidi ki mungu dingi ku mu kamba mona ua diiala u xikama bhu kiandu kia dibhata dia Izalaiele." 
Jeremiah33:18 Ni ku jinganga ue o jilevita, ki kuà kamba monʼa diiala uimana bhu pholo iami mu ku bhakula sata ia kuoha, nʼende ni kuoha mibhaku ia makúdia ni kubhakula ilumbu izuua ioso." 
Jeremiah33:19 Kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza kua Jelemiia, kuila:" 
Jeremiah33:20 Jihova ua tange kiki: Se mu tena kunumununa kikutu kiami kia muanha ni kikutu kiami kia usuku, katé ki mu tena muene o kubhuisa-ku muanha ni usuku bhu kithangana kiâ," 
Jeremiah33:21 kuabhu-phe, ni kikutu ki nga te ni Davidi, dia mubhikʼami mu tena ue ku ki tumbulula, phala ka kale ni mona ua diiala u tumina bhu kiandu kiê; kiene kimoxi ue ni jilevita, o jinganga, akunji ami." 
Jeremiah33:22 Kala kiene kulémbua o kutanga kifuxi kioso kia diulu, ni kisekele ku ndundu ia kalunga, a lémbua ku kizonga, kiene ue ki nga-nda kusokolola o luvualu lua Davidi mubhikʼami ni jilevita ala ni ukunji bhu pholo iami." 
Jeremiah33:23 Kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza dingi kua Jelemiia kuila: 
Jeremiah33:24 Eie kuene mu mona kiene mu zuela mundu iú, exi: Miji i iadi ia solele Jihova, kiki ua iehelela? Anga a sebulula athuʼami kala nuka a kexile athu bhu pholo iâ." 
Jeremiah33:25 Jihova dia Ifuẋi phe, uambe kiki: Se kikutu kiami kia muanha ni usuku kia lémbua kunangenena, eme hé ngi lémbua kuta-ku jingonge ji tumina diulu ni ixi," 
Jeremiah33:26 kiene ue, eme nga-nda ku di tuna luvualu lua Jakobo, ni lua Davidi, mubhikʼami, mu kikexilu kia kuila o ku mbutu iâ, ki ngi katula-ku dingi uoso u tumina ku mbutu ia Mbalahamu, ni Izake, ni Jakobo; mukonda ubhika uâ nga-nda ku u bhuisa-ku muene anga ngʼa kuatela henda." 
Jeremiah34:1 Kizuelu kia tundu kua Jihova kí kia tula kua Jelemiia, kioso Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha ni masoladi mê moso, ni mautuminu moso mu ngongo, a kexile mu ku a tumina kuala muene, ni ifuẋi ioso kia mu lu ita ni Jeluzaleme ni jimbonge jê joso, kiexi:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki; Ndé u tangele Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, u muʼambele: Jihova uambe kiki: Talesa, mbonge iii nga-nda ku i bhana bhu lukuaku lua sobha ia Babilonha, o muene ua-nda ku ioha mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah34:3 Eie-phe, kua-nda kusubhuka bhu lukuaku lua muene; inda a-nda ku ku kuta muene anga a ku bhakula bhu lukuaku luê; o mesu mé a-nda kumona muene mesu ma sobha ia Babilonha, o muene ue ua-nda ku ku zuelela muene kanu ni kanu, hé ua kà bokona mu Babilonha." 
Jeremiah34:4 Né kieneʼokio, kizuelu-phe kia Jihova ivua-kiu eie Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda; Jihova-phe uambe kiki kokué, uexi: Kua-nda kúfua ku xibhata." 
Jeremiah34:5 Uanda kufuʼé muene ni kutululuka, kala kia bhanga jinga kiohele kia jitata jè, o jisobha ja ku diangelelè-ku, kiene ue kia kà kuʼoha eie, anga a kà ku dila muene, exi: Auá! Jihova, tata! Mukonda o kizuelu eme nga ki tange, eme ngi Jihova." 
Jeremiah34:6 Anga Jelemiia, dia polofeta, u tudila Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, o maka mosoʼama, mu Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah34:7 Kioso masoladi ma sobha ia Babilonha kia mu lua ita ni Jeluzaleme, kumoxi ni jimbonge joso ja Juda ja subhuka-ku: O mbonge ia Lakiji ni ia Azeka; mukonda, ku jimbonge ja di fikidila ja Juda, jiji jene ngó ja subhuka-ku." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kua Jelemiia, kioso sobha Zedekiia kia te kikutu ni mundu uoso ua kexile mu Jeluzaleme, phala ku kola o ufolo." 
Jeremiah34:9 Kuila kala muthu ambuidise mubhikʼé ua diiala ni mubhikʼé ua muhatu, uoso hebeleu nʼa tambule ufolo; phala ki bhu kale muthu uenda ni ku a bhikisa, kuma ene uâ jijudé, phange jâ." 
Jeremiah34:10 Ilamba ioso anga a kʼivua, ni mundu uoso a bokona mu kikutu, kuila kala muthu ehe mubhikʼé ua diiala kala muthu ehe mubhikʼé ua muhatu, a kale jifolo nda ki bhu kale dingi muthu uia ni ku a bhikisa; ene oso a kʼivu-phe anga a eha muene." 
Jeremiah34:11 Maji-phe mu kubhanga kathangana a diela dingi, anga a vutula abhikʼâ a mala ni abhikʼâ a ahatu, ehele kiá anga a a ta dingi ku ubhika ua ku a tumina, mala ni ahetu." 
Jeremiah34:12 Kizuelu kia Jihova-phe anga kiza kua Jelemiia, ku mbandu ia Jihova, kuila:" 
Jeremiah34:13 Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Eme nga ta kikutu ni jitata jenu, mu kizuua ki nga a katula mu ixi ia Ijitu, mʼonzo ia ubhika, ngixi:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Kʼibhua sambuadi dia mivu, kala muthu a jitune uoso phangʼiê, hebeleu, a mu sumbisa kokué, iú ua ku bhikila kiá eie mu mivu isamanu, u mu ambudisa ni ufolo kokué; maji phe jitata jenu nguâ ku ngʼivua, mba ku ngi bhetekela mátui." 
Jeremiah34:15 Leluʼidi-phe enu mua diela, ku ima iambote i mua bhange bhu mesuʼami, mu ku kola o ufolo muthu ni mukuá; enuʼenu phe mua tele ue kikutu bhu pholo iami, mu dibhata diexana mu dijina diami." 
Jeremiah34:16 Mua biluka-phe, enu mua sebulula o dijina diami, enu mua bhangesa kuila muthu ni muthu u vutukila mubhikʼê ua diiala, o iú u vutukila mubhikʼê ua muhatu, u mua tambuixile kiá ufolo mu vondadi ienuʼanuenu muene; enu mua tona ku a ta dingi bhoxi dia ubhika ni a mi kale abhikʼenu a mala ni a ahatu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Uila kiki, Jihova uambe, uixi: Enu nguenu ku ngʼivua eme, phala kukola ufolo, muthu u kolela kua phangʼiê, muthu u kolela kua mukuá; kiki-phe, talenu, eme nga-nda ku mi kolela ufolo, Jihova ua kiambe, muia ku xibhata, muia ku dibhebhu, muia ku nzala, anga nga-nda ku mi bhana kala kima ki sasumukisa mautuminu moso mu ngongo." 
Jeremiah34:18 Athu a bulu kikutu kiami nga-nda ku a bhakula, ió a kambe ku kuatesa kizuelu kia kikutu kia te bhu pholo iami ni monʼa ngombe, a mu uane mu mbandu jiiadi ni ku mu sesa muene mu kaxi ni kaxi." 
Jeremiah34:19 O ilamba ia Juda, ni ilamba ia Jeluzaleme, ni jingolambole, ni jinganga, ni mundu uoso mu ixi, ua bhiti mu kaxi ka mbandu jiiadi ja monʼa ngombe;" 
Jeremiah34:20 ngi ki tanga muene, kuila nga-nda ku a bhakula bhu maku ma jinguma, ni bhu maku ma iá a mu a sotela kalunga kâ, o imbi iâ ia kà kituka kúdia kua njila ja diulu ni iama ia mukáu." 
Jeremiah34:21 Katé ni sobha Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, ni ilamba iê, nga-nda ku a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua nguma jâ ni bhu lukuaku lua iá a mu a sotela kalunga kâ; bhu lukuaku lua kifuxi kia masoladi ma sobha ia Babilonha, a mi lengele kiá enu." 
Jeremiah34:22 O kiki-phe nga-nda kutumina, eme ngi Jihova, anga ngi bhangesa kuila ene a vutukila dingi mu kúlua ni mbonge iii, a lua na-iu muene, hé a i tolola nʼa ioha mu túbhia; o jimbonge ja Juda nga-nda ku ji bhanga jingundu, katé ki ji mono dingi muthu u tungamu." 
Jeremiah35:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kua Jelemiia, mu izuua ia Jehoiakí, monʼa Joziia, sobha ia Juda, kiexi:" 
Jeremiah35:2 Ndé ku bhata dia Jilekabita, nda u zuele-nâ, ua ambate kʼonzo ia Jihova, uie-nâ mu xilu dimoxi, nda u a nuise vinhu." 
Jeremiah35:3 Hé ngi kuata Jahazaniia, monʼa Jelemiia, monʼa Habaziniia, ni jiphange jê, ni anʼê oso, ni bhata dioso dia Jilekabita;" 
Jeremiah35:4 anga ngiia-nâ mʼonzo ia Jihova, mu xilu dia anʼa Hanane, monʼa Jingidaliia, muthu ua Nzambi, ualèla bhu xilu dia ilamba, uala ku pholo dia dixilu dia Mahaseia, monʼa Salume, mulangia-dibokuenu." 
Jeremiah35:5 Anʼa akua bhata dia Jilekabita, anga ngʼa tudila jinganza jezala vinhu, ni jikopho, ngixi; Nuenu vinhu." 
Jeremiah35:6 Maji ene exi: Ki tua-nda kúnua vinhu; mukonda Jonadabe, monʼa Lekabe, tatʼetu, ua tuʼambela, uixi: Ki mungu dingi mu nua vinhu, kixi enu, kixi anʼenu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Ki mua kà tunga inzu, mba mu kuna mbutu, mba mu phapha miẋi, mba mu kala ni dibhia dioso-dioso dia mivide; maji izuua ienu ioso mua kâ tunga mu jifundu ja jibalaka, mbé mu kole muenhu mu ndumba dia izuua kulu-dia-mundu, ku muala kuenda ni kunhunganena." 
Jeremiah35:8 Tua tumaka-phe o dízui dia Jonadabe, monʼa Lekabe, tatʼetu, mu iene ioso ia tuʼambela; kí kia tu bhekela kuila mu izuua ietu ioso ki tu tena kúnua vinhu, kixi etu, kixi ahetuʼetu, kixi anʼetu a mala, kixi anʼetu a ahatu." 
Jeremiah35:9 Ki tua tena ue kutunga jinzu phala ni ji kale dibhata dietu; ki tu moneka ue díbhia dia mivide, mba mukáu, mba mbutu." 
Jeremiah35:10 Maji tuà tunga mu jifundu ja jibalaka, kienhiki-phe tuevu etu tua bhange kala kioso kia tu tendelela Jonadabe dia tatʼetu." 
Jeremiah35:11 O kioso-phe Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha kia bande mu ixi iii, etu tuambe, tuexi: Zenu, tuienu mu Jeluzaleme, mukonda dia ifuẋi, ia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia, ni mukonda dia ifuẋi ia masoladi ma akua Sídia; kuabhu-phe etu tua xalela kiá mu Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah35:12 Bheneʼobho-phe, kizuelu kia Jihova, anga kiza kua Jelemiia kuila:" 
Jeremiah35:13 Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Ndé, ka tangele mala a Juda ni iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme: Manhi ki mungu dingi mu xikina ku mi longa, phala ni muivue o maka mami? Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah35:14 Maka ma Jonadabe, monʼa Lekabe, a tendelela ku anʼê kuila ka nue vinhu, a a bhake, mbata kanu muene katé mu kizuuʼiki, kia a kala kota evu muene o kijila kia tatʼâ; eme-phe ngène mu mi zuelela enu, ngi di meneka mu ku mi zuelela, enu nguenu ku ngʼivua." 
Jeremiah35:15 Abhikʼami, jipolofeta, ene oso nga mi tumikisa-nâ, ngi di meneka ni ku a tumikisa, ngixi: Dielenu-phe kindala, muthu a biluke ku njila jé ja ibha, ibhangelu ienu mu i bhange ia iuka, ki mu kaiele jinzambi jengi phala ku ji bhikila; kienhokio mua-ndu kala mu ixi i nga mi bhana enu ni jitata jenu; maji enu nguenu ku ngi bhetekela dítui mba ku ngi tumaka eme." 
Jeremiah35:16 Mukonda dia kuila anʼa Jonadabe, monʼa Lekabe, a bhake kijila kia tatʼâ, muene kia a tendelela, maji athu iá ka ngi tumaka." 
Jeremiah35:17 Kienhiki-phe Jihova, Nzambi ia Ifuẋi, o Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Nga-nda ku bheka ku thandu dia Juda ni ku thandu dia oso kiá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme, ku ibha kuoso ku nga tange ku thandu diâ, mbata eme ngène mu zuela, ene nguâ kuivua; nga kolo kokuâ, ene ka ngʼitaia." 
Jeremiah35:18 O ku dibhata dia Jelekabita, Jelemiia uixi; Jihova dia Huxi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Mukonda mua tumaka kijila kia Jonadabe, tatʼenu, enu mua bhake ijila iê ioso, enu mua bhange muene kala kia mi tendelesa muene," 
Jeremiah35:19 kala kiki, Jihova dia Huxi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Kua Jonadabe, monʼa Lekabe, nuka kua kà kamba mona ua diiala, u ngʼimanena jinga bhu pholo iami mu ku ngi talela izuua ioso." 
Jeremiah36:1 Anga ki bhita kuila mu muvu ua kauana ua Jehoiakí, monʼa Joziia, sobha ia Juda, kiene kieza kizuelu kiki kia Jihova kua Jelemiia, kuila:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Katula dilanda dia divulu nda u soneke muenhomo o maka oso u ngène ku ku zuelela, a tokala Izalaiele, ni a Juda, ni a jixi joso tunde mu kizuua ki nga kuzuelela eie, tundé mu izuua ia Joziia ndú mu lelu." 
Jeremiah36:3 Nga fika, kuila, akua dibhata dia Juda, a-nda kuivua ku ibha kuoso ku ngʼandala ku a bhanga, phala muthu ni muthu a diele ku njila jê ja ibha, eme nda ngi loloke kikuma kiâ ni kituxi kiâ." 
Jeremiah36:4 Kienhókio Jelemiia anga uixana Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia; Mbaluke anga u soneka maka moso ma Jihova ku dikanu dia Jelemiia, mu dilanda dia divulu, oso a mu tukulukilile na-u muene." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jelemiia anga u tendelela Mbaluke, uexi: Eme a ngi kuika; ki ngi tena kubokona mʼonzo ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah36:6 Bokona-phe eie, u tange mu dilanda di ua sonekena ku dikanu diami, o maka moso ma Jihova, mu mátui ma mundu, mʼonzo ia Jihova, mu kizuua kia ku jila kúdia; u a tangela ue mu mátui ma akua Juda oso a tunda mu jimbonge jâ, muene mu ua a tangela." 
Jeremiah36:7 Amoxi o kudionda kuâ ku sonokena bhu pholo ia Jihova, kala muthu a bhane dikunda ku njila jê ja ibha mukonda njinda ia Jihova ia dikota ni kutema kuê kuene mu ku di londekeza na-ku mu ku bilukila o athu iá." 
Jeremiah36:8 Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, anga u bhanga muene kala kioso kia muʼambela Jelemiia, dia polofeta, anga u tanga mu divuluʼomo maka oso a Jihova, mʼonzo ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah36:9 Hé ki bhita, mu muvu ua katanu ua Jehoiakí, monʼa Joziia, sobha ia Juda, bhu mbeji ia kavua, kia kola o ku jila kúdia, bhu pholo ia Jihova, ku mundu uoso mu Jeluzaleme ni ku mundu uoso ua kexile mu ku tunda mu jimbanza joso ja Juda ni kuiza mu Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah36:10 Mbaluke-phe anga u tanga mu divuluʼomo maka oso a Jelemiia, mʼonzo ia Jihova, mu xilu dia Jemadiia, monʼa Safane, o musoneki, mu lumbu lua dikota, bhu muelu ua dibhitu dia inzu ia Jihova, mu mátui ma athu oso." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikeia, monʼa Jemadiia, monʼa Safane, kioso kievu maka oso a Jihova mu divulu dieneʼodio," 
Jeremiah36:12 u kulumuka kʼonzo ia sobha, uia mu xilu dia musoneki; u sanga-mu adiakime oso a xikama mueneʼomo, ene a ngana Elixama, musoneki, ni Delaia, monʼa Semaia, ni Elenatane, monʼa Akebolo, ni Jemadiia, monʼa Safane, ni Zedekiia, monʼa Hananiia ni eneʼoso adiakime a kamukuá." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikeia anga u a tudila maka oso evu kua Mbaluke ku a tanga mu divulu, mu mátui ma kifuxi kioso." 
Jeremiah36:14 Adiakime oso bheneʼobho, a tuma Jehudi, monʼa Netaniia, monʼa Selemiia, monʼa Kuzahi, ku tangela Mbaluke, kuila: O dilanda di ua tangela mu mátui a Kifuxi, kuata-diu bhu maku, uize kunu. Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia hé u katula o dilanda, u di kuata bhu maku, anga uiza kuala ene." 
Jeremiah36:15 Anga a mu ambela, exi: xikama, kindala, u di tangele mu mátui etu. Mbaluke anga u di tangela muene mu mátui ma ene." 
Jeremiah36:16 Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha kuivua maka oso enhó, uoma ua a kuata, anga a di lungulukila mudiâ ni ku di iala-iala, hé ambela Mbaluke exi: Ni kidi muene, maka oso iá, sobha tua-nda ku mu tangela-nâ." 
Jeremiah36:17 Anga ebhula Mbaluke, exi: Kindala tu tangele kioso ki ua soneka maka mosoʼama ku dikanu diêmuène." 
Jeremiah36:18 Mbaluke anga u a ambela, uixi: Ua ngi tangela muene maka osoʼá ni dikanu diê, eme-ème nga a soneka mu divulu ni tinda." 
Jeremiah36:19 Bheneʼobho adiakime a tangela Mbaluke, exi: Ndé, ka suame, nʼeie ni Jelemiia; ki bhu kale muthu uijiia bhuoso bhu muala." 
Jeremiah36:20 Ene anga aia mu kutangela sobha mu lumbu; maji o dilanda a di bhake mu xilu dia Elixama, o musoneki, sobha iá a mu tangela muene maka oso enhó mu mátui mê." 
Jeremiah36:21 Sobha anga u tuma Jehudi nʼa mu bhekele o dilanda, Jehudi anga u di katula mu xilu dia Elixama, o musoneki, anga u di tangela mu mátui a sobha ni mu mátui a ilamba ioso a kexile mu jimbandu ja sobha." 
Jeremiah36:22 (Kieneʼokio-phe, o sobha ua kexile mʼonzo iê ia mbambi, bhu mbeji ia kavua, ua xikama mu kuota bhu túbhia tua mu tudila ku pholo bhu kienga kiala ni makala a uama)." 
Jeremiah36:23 Anga ki bhita kuila Jehudi kia tange-ku kiá mafe a tatu mba a uana a malanda, sobha u katula nivete ia musoneki anga u batula na-iu o dilanda anga u di vubula mu túbhia tuala bhu kienga kia makala katé ʼIanda dioso ki dia jokota mu túbhia tua kexile bhu kienga." 
Jeremiah36:24 O sobha ni abhikʼê oso evu maka enhó, uoma ki ua a kuatele ngó mba a tandula ue izuatu iâ." 
Jeremiah36:25 Sumbala Elenatane ni Delaia ni Jemadiia, a bhingi sobha kuila dilanda ka diohe mu túbhia, maji muene nguê ku a bha mátui." 
Jeremiah36:26 Kiala-bhu kota phala muene, o kutuma dingi Jelamiiele, monʼa Hameleke, ni Selaia, monʼa Azediiele, ni Selemiia, monʼa Abidele, kuila a kute Mbaluke, o musoneki, ni Jelemiia dia polofeta; maji-phe Jihova ua a suekʼâ." 
Jeremiah36:27 Bheneʼobho kizuelu kia Jihova kieza kua Jelemiia, kioso sobha kiʼoha o dila: nda kumoxi ni maka ma sonekena Mbaluke ku dikanu dia Jelemiia, kuila" 
Jeremiah36:28 Katula dingi dilanda diengi, u sonekeku o maka oso a kexile ku diodio dia dianga, dioha Jehoiakí, sobha ia Juda." 
Jeremiah36:29 O Jehoiakí, sobha ia Juda, u muʼambela, uexi; Jihova uambe kiki: Eie uoha dilanda didi, uixi: Mukonda dia kuila eie ua soneka-ku mu kubhana jimene, uixi: Ni kidi kiene, sobha ia Babilonha ua-nda kuiza anga u muanga ixi iii nʼa bhangesa kuila ni athu ni iama i batuka-mu?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Kala kiki, Jihova uambe kiki kua Jehoiakí, sobha ia Juda: Jehoiakí ka kà kala ni iú u xikama bhu kiandu kia Davidi, o kimbi kiê a kà ki takuila bhu muanha ua dikumbi ni ku mbambi ia kiaúla kia usuku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Kikuma kiê-muène ngi ki zungila ku thandu diê ni ku thandu dia mbutu iê ni ku thandu dia abhikʼê; nga-nda kubheka ku thandu diê-muène ni ku thandu dia iá a tungu mu Jeluzaleme ni ku thandu dia athu mu Juda, o ku ibha kuosuʼoko ku ngene mu ku a tangela, ene iá a di tunuʼâ ku ngʼivua." 
Jeremiah36:32 Jelemiia hé u katula dilanda diengi, u di bhana kua Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, o musoneki, iú ua sonekena-ku, ku dikanu dia Jelemiia, maka oso a divulu dioha Nzuakí, sobha ia Juda, mu túbhia; o kuene hanji kua di tele dingi maka a mukuá a di fu ni enhó." 
Jeremiah37:1 Anga sobha Zedekiia, monʼa Joziia, u hinga ungana bhu kididi kia Jekoniia, monʼa Nzuakí, a mu tele ku usobha ua ixi ia Juda, kuala Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah37:2 Maji-phe kutale muene, uixi abhikʼê, ni mundu uoso akuaʼxi, ki bhuala ua bhana mátui ku maka a Jihova, a zuelela ku ukunji ua polofeta Jelemiia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Sumbale kiene, maji sobha Zedekiia ua tumikisa Jukale, monʼa Selemiia, ni Sofoniia, monʼa Mahaseia, o nganga, kua polofeta Jelemiia, phala a muʼ ambele, kuila: A tu diondele kindala kua Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Kieneʼokio, Jelemiia ua kexi mu kuila u tunda u bokona mu kifuẋi kia mundu, mukonda ka mu jikilile luua mu Kaleia." 
Jeremiah37:5 O kifuẋi kia masoladi a Falaó, anga ki tunda mu Ijitu; o kioso akua Kaldeia a kondolokele Jeluzaleme ni ku mu xita mu jimbandu, kievu njimbu iii, a lenga hé Juluzaleme a mu xa." 
Jeremiah37:6 Bheneʼobho-phe, kizuelu kia Jihova kiza kua polofeta Jelemiia, kuamba:" 
Jeremiah37:7 Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele uambe kiki: Sobha ia Juda ua mi tumikisa kokuami, phala ku mu jimbuluila, mua kà mu tangela kiki, muexi: Tala, kifuẋi kia masoladi a Falaó, a tundu mu Ijitu phala kuiza ku mi banda, kia-nda ku vutukʼé mu ixi iâ mu Ijitu." 
Jeremiah37:8 Anga akua Kaldeia a kà vutuka mu kúlua ni mbonge iii, hé a i tambula nʼa kà ioha muene mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah37:9 Jihova phe uambe kiki: Ki mu tobhese mienhu ienu, ni kuila: Amá! Ki bhuala phata muene! Akua Kaldeia a-nda ku tu xa muene! Mbata ka-nda ku mi xa-phe." 
Jeremiah37:10 Mukonda, né kiá mu jibha o kifuẋi kioso kia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia, a mu lua ni enu, anga kokuâ ku subhuka ngó òkuame, hanji enhó kala muthu u balumuka mu balaka iê anga uoha o mbonge iii mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah37:11 Anga ki bhita kiki: Kioso kia mu bhanda o kifuẋi kia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia a mu tunda mu Jeluzaleme, mukonda dia kifuẋi kia masoladi ma Falaó," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jelemiia u tunda mu Jeluzaleme phala kuia mu ixi ia Bejamí, mu kutambula dikanda diê mu kaxi ka mundu uê." 
Jeremiah37:13 Kioso muene kiala bhu dibhitu dia Bejamí, bhua kexile ue kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, dijina diê a muʼixana Jediia, monʼa Selemiia, monʼa Hananiia; muenhú hé u kuta Jelemiia dia polofeta, uexi: Eie ua mu lengela ku akua Kaldeia." 
Jeremiah37:14 Jelemiia-phe, uixi: Makutu. Ki nga mu lengela ku akua Kaldeia. Maji muene phe nguê ku muʼivua; kienhiki Jediia u kuta Jelemiia, hé uia-nê ku adiakimi." 
Jeremiah37:15 O adiakimi anga a thathamena kiavulu Jelemiia, hé a mu beta; a mu ta mu kaleia, mʼonzo ia Jonatane, o musoneki; mbata a i bhangele kiá dikuikilu." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jelemiia kia bokona monzo ia dikuikilu, mu maxilu mê, Jelemiia ua bhange-mu muene ndumba dia izuua." 
Jeremiah37:17 Sobha Zedekiia anga u tuma ku mueha; sobha hé u muʼibhula, ku kasuekele, mʼonzo iê, uixi: Sai-ku kizuelu kia Jihova? Jelemiia, uixi: Sai. Hé u muʼambela dingi, uixi: Anda ku ku bhakula bhu lukuaku lua sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah37:18 Jelemiia hé uambela dingi soba Zedekiia, uixi: Nga te kituxi kiahi kokuʼé, ni ku abhikʼé, ni ku kifuẋi kiki, ki kia mi bhekesa ku ngi ta mu kaleia?" 
Jeremiah37:19 O jipolofeta jenu, ji kuebhi, ja kexi mu ku mi zambuila, kuila: Sobha ia Babilonha ka-nda kuizaku mu kúlua nʼenu mba kúlua ni ixi iii?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kiki-phe eie sobha, ngana iami, ivua ngi kuʼambele: O kudionda kuami ku sonokene bhu mesuʼé ku ngʼehele ku vutukila mʼonzo ia Jonatane, o musoneki, phala ki ngʼize mu ku fuila momo." 
Jeremiah37:21 Sobha Zedekiia anga u tendelela kuila Jelemiia a mu tule mu lumbu lua kilangidilu; hé aia ni ku mu bhana mbolo imoxi ku kizuua, ku nzunga ia akua kubhanga jimbolo, katé kiabhu mbolo joso mu mbonge; kienhiki Jelemiia anga u kala jinga mu lumbu lua kilangidilu." 
Jeremiah38:1 Anga a kʼivua kua Sefatiia, monʼa Matane, ni Jedaliia, monʼa Paxulu, ni Jukale, monʼa Selemiia, ni Pazulu, monʼa Malkiia, o maka oso Jelemiia a kexi mu tangela mundu, uixi:" 
Jeremiah38:2 Jihova uambe kiki: Uoso u xala mu mbonge mumu, ua-nda kufua ku xibhata, ni ku nzala ni ku kipheku; maji uoso uia ku akua Kaldeia ua-nda ku kola muenhu; mukonda o muenhu uê, uene kiá ua-nda ku kituka kibhundile kiê, hé u laia." 
Jeremiah38:3 Jihova uambe kiki: O mbonge iii ni kidi muene, a-nda ku i bhakula bhu lukuaku lua kifuẋi kia masoladi a sobha ia Babilonha, o muene anga u i tolola." 
Jeremiah38:4 Makota hé ambela sobha, exi: Muthu iú a fue, kuma muene mu ku bhanga kiki, uala kubhuidisa o maku ma athu a fuama kúlua ita a subhuka hanji mu mbonge mumu, ni maku ma kifuẋi kioso mu ku a zuelela maka a di fu kiki; mukonda o muthu iú kala mu sota kutululuka kua kifuẋi kiki, maji phulu ngó." 
Jeremiah38:5 Sobha Zedekiia-phe, uixi: Talenu, muene uelʼé kiá bhu makuʼenu; mukonda sobha ka tena kulenda kima kioso-kioso ki mi bhanga enu kia ibha." 
Jeremiah38:6 Bheneʼobho, Jelemiia a mu kuata, a mu takuila mu kiboiongo kia Malkiia, monʼa sobha, kia kexile mu lumbu lua kilangidilu; Jelemiia hé a mu zezesa ni mikolo; maji mu kiboiongo ki mua kexile menha, inda maloua ngó; Jelemiia hé u kuzuka mu malôua." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ebede-Meleke, mukua Itiiopia, o ngolambole, ua kexile mʼonzo ia sobha, anga u kʼivua kuila Jelemiia a mu te mu kiboiongo (kieneʼokio-phe sobha ua xikama bhu muelu ua Bejamí);" 
Jeremiah38:8 kithanganʼokio, Ebede-Meleke u tunda mʼonzo ia sobha uia mu kutangela sobha, uixi:" 
Jeremiah38:9 Sobha, tata! Ngana iami! Athu iá a bhange kia ibha muene ku ioso ia bhange kua Jelemiia dia polofeta, o ku mu ta mu kiboiongo; ku tanga o kidi, bhu kididi bhua mu teʼobho, ua-nda kufua ni nzala, mukonda mu mbonge kana-mu dingi jimbolo." 
Jeremiah38:10 Bheneʼobho-phe, sobha u tendelela Ebede-Meleke, mukua Itiiopia, uexi: Katula-ku makuinhi a tatu a muthu bhabha, nda u katule Jelemiia, dia polofeta, mu kiboiongo, kiosuʼiki kiluua a fua ni nzala." 
Jeremiah38:11 Anga Ebede-Meleke u katula athu, uia mʼonzo ia sobha, bhoxi dia dilundilu dia jimbongo ja sobha, anga u katula-mu itetele ia makoza, okulu kiá, a kuka, ni izuatu muene ia tandujuka, hé u i zezesa ni mikolo kua Jelemiia, uala mu kiboiongo." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebede-Meleke, mukua Itiiopia, anga uambela Jelemiia, uixi: Ta kindala o makoza iá, a kuka, a tandujuka, a bolo kiá, mu jihábia ja maku mé, mikolo i bhite ku thandu dia makoza. Jelemiia kiene kia bhange." 
Jeremiah38:13 Jelemiia anga a mu sunga ni mikolo, a mu katula mu kiboiongo; hé u kala mu lumbu lua kilangidilu." 
Jeremiah38:14 Kieneʼokio sobha Zedekiia u tuma ku muʼixana, o Jelemiia, polofeta, anga uiza bhu pholo iê, bhu muelu ua katatu, ua kexile kʼonzo ia Jihova; o sobha anga uambela Jelemiia, uixi: Nga kuʼibhula kima kimoxi, kana ku ngi suekela kima." 
Jeremiah38:15 Jelemiia hé uambela Zedekiia, uixi: Eme ki ngi ku jimbuila-kiu, ni kidi kiene, eie kua-nda ku ngi jibha? O ki ngi ku bhana kaiula, eie uanda ku ngʼivua?" 
Jeremiah38:16 Bheneʼobho, mu kasuekele, Zedekiia ua lokela muene Jelemiia, uixi: Ki kola! Jihova a nangenene, ua tu bhange o muenhu iú, kuila eme ki nga-nda ku ku jibha, kana, mba ngi ku bhakula ue bhu maku ma iá a mu kenga ku ku jibha." 
Jeremiah38:17 Jelemiia-phe uambela Zedekiia, uixi: Jihova, Nzambi ia Ilombo Ieta, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Se uia mu ku di bhakulʼé é-muene kiluelu ku ilamba ia sobha ia Babilonha, kuabhu-phe, eie ua-nda ku kola muenhu, o mbonge iii ka-nda ku ioha mu túbhia, enu mua-nda kulaia nʼeie ni dibhata dié." 
Jeremiah38:18 O ki uila nguami kuia ku makota a sobha ia Babilonha, kuabhu-phe, o mbonge iii a-nda ku i bhakula bhu lukuaku lua akua Kaldeia, ene anga a i oha mu túbhia, eie-phe kua-nda kusubhuka bhu makuʼâ." 
Jeremiah38:19 Sobha Zedekiia hé uambela Jelemiia, uixi: Ngala ni hele ia jijudé a lengela ku mbandu ia akua Kaldeia; a soko-bho ku ngi bhakula bhu maku mâ nʼa ngi bhange kasekelu." 
Jeremiah38:20 Jelemiia uixi: Ka-nda ku ku bhakula. Nga ku diondo, ivua dízui dia Jihova, kala ki ngala ku ku tangela na-diu; se u dʼivua, ua-nda ku kala kiambote, o muenhu ué ua-nda kulaia muene." 
Jeremiah38:21 Maji eie ki uila nguami ku tunda, kizuelu-phe kienhiki, kia ngi londekeza Jihova." 
Jeremiah38:22 Kuma ahetu oso a xala mʼonzo ia sobha ia Juda a-nda ku ambata ku makota ma sobha ia Babilonha; ene uâ, ahetu, a-nda ku ki tanga, exi: Athuʼé ene ku ku tululukisa a ku funhisa ia a ku lende; o kiki kia ku mono inama ia ku kuzuka kiá mu maloua, ene a vutuka kuema." 
Jeremiah38:23 Kienhiki ahetuʼé oso ni tuana tué a-nda ku ambata kuala Jikaldeu, eiemuène kua-nda kusubhuka bhu maku mâ, inda o lukuaku lua sobha ia Babilonha luene muene lua-nda ku ku kuta, o mbonge iii muene ua-nda ku ioha mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah38:24 Bheneʼobho Zedekiia uambela Jelemiia uixi: Maka iá ki bhu kale muthu u a ejiia, phala eie kufue." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kioso makota kia-nda ku kʼivua, kuila nga zuela ni eie, hé a kuendela, exi: Tu tangele ioso i uambela sobha, kana ku tu suekela-iu, phala etu ki tu ku jibhe; o sobha ua kuambela kima kiahi?" 
Jeremiah38:26 Eie-phe u a tangela, uixi: Eme ngʼejile bhu pholo ia sobha mu ku mu dionda, phala ka ngi vutuile mʼonzo ia Jonatane, ni ngi fuile momo." 
Jeremiah38:27 O makota oso kioso kieza kua Jelemiia mu ku muʼibhula, muene ua a vutuila kala kia mu longesa sobha; ene iá a mu xi, mukonda o kikutu ki ki tungunuka." 
Jeremiah38:28 Jelemiia anga u kala mu lumbu lua kilangidilu katé bhu kizuua mbonge ia Jeluzaleme kia i tambuile, kia tambula o mbonge ia Jeluzaleme muene iú hanji mueneʼomo." 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu muvu ua kavua ua Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, bhu mbeji ia kakuinhi, Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha anga uiza ni kifuẋi kiê mu kúlua ni Jeluzaleme, mbonge anga u i konda." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi, ua Zedekiia, bhu mbeji ia kauana, mu kizuua kia kávua ku mbeji, kiene kia bulu o lumbu lua mbonge." 
Jeremiah39:3 Anga makota oso a sobha ia Babilonha a bokona hé emana bhu muelu ua dikaẋi, enhá: a ngana Nenga-Sazele, Sanga-Nebu, Xasekime, Labe-Sadi, Nenga-Sazele, Labe-Make, ni akuá eneʼoso makota ma sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah39:4 Anga ki bhita kuila, Zedekiia-phe, sobha ia Juda, kioso kia a mono, kumoxi ni makuenze mê moso ma ita, a lenge, anga a tunda ni usuku mu mbonge, a di tela njila ia kadíbhia ka sobha, bhu dibhitu diala bhu kaxi ka malumbu ma iadi, anga u tunda u di ta mu njila ia kiphenza." 
Jeremiah39:5 Maji-phe o kifuẋi kia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia, ki a kaiela, anga Zedekiia a mu kuatela mu dinhana dia Jedikó, hé a mu kuta, anga a mu tumikisa kua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, bhu Dibalah, mʼoxi ia Hamate, anga u mu fundixila mueneʼomo." 
Jeremiah39:6 Anga sobha ia Babilonha u jibha ana oso a Zedekiia, bhu Dibalah bheneʼobho, Zedekiia iú tala muene ni mesu; o ilamba ioso, makota mua Juda, sobha ia Babilonha ua a jibha ue ene oso." 
Jeremiah39:7 Hé u tufula mesu a Zedekiia, u mu kuta ni malubhambu aiadi a ngondo, phala kuia-nê ku Babilonha." 
Jeremiah39:8 Akua Kaldeia anga oha inzu ia sobha mu túbhia ni jinzu ja mundu uoso, o imbaka ioso ia Jeluzaleme hé a i bula." 
Jeremiah39:9 O tumbalu-mbalu tua subhuka mu mbonge ni iá kiá a tundile ku mbandu iâ ia a di bundile ku jinguma, kumoxi kiá ni iá a subhuka ku mundu, Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, uainâ ku Babilonha." 
Jeremiah39:10 Maji oso ió jingadiama, mu athu, ka moneka kima, Nabuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, ua a xisa mʼoxi ia Juda; anga u a bhana mábhia ma mivide ni mikáu mu kizuua kieneʼokio." 
Jeremiah39:11 Maji o Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, ua tendelele Nabuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, ku mbandu ia Jelemiia, uixi:" 
Jeremiah39:12 O mesu mé ta na-u kua muene, u mu katule, kana ku mu bhanga ku ibha kuoso-kuoso; inda uila kioso muene kia ku tangela, eie kiene ki u mu bhanga muene." 
Jeremiah39:13 Kienhiki kiene Nabuzaladane, kabhitangu ka akua kulanga, kia tumina, anga Nebuzahabane, ni Labe-Sadi, ni Nenga-Sazele, ni Labe-Make, ni makota oso a sobha ia Babilonha," 
Jeremiah39:14 a tuma ku katula Jelemiia mu lumbu lua kilangidilu, hé a mu bhana kua Jedaliia monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane nda a muʼambate kʼonzo iê; muene hé u kala mu kaxi ka mundu uoso." 
Jeremiah39:15 Tala, kizuelu kia Jihova kiejile kua Jelemiia, kioso kia mu jika hanji mu lumbu lua kilangidilu, kiexi: Ndé, u tangele Ebede-Meleke, mukuá Itiiopia, uixi:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta, Nzambi ia Izalaiele uambe kiki: Tala, eme nganda kubheka maka ami ku thandu dia mbonge iii, ki phala mbote, kana, maji phala kuiibha; anga kizuelu kiami kia kà tenena muene bhu mesu mé mu kizuuʼokio." 
Jeremiah39:17 Eie-phe, mu kizuuʼokio, nga-nda ku ku bhululʼé muene, eme ngi Jihova, bhu maku ma iá a ku kuata uoma ku a tala ngó pholo, ka-nda ku ku bhakula-bhu." 
Jeremiah39:18 Mukonda ni kidi kiene, nga-nda ku ku bhulula, o ku xibhata kua kà di bhala-ku; maji o muenhu ué uene ua-nda ku kala o mbole ié, mukonda ua dielela kokuami, eme ngi Jihova." 
Jeremiah40:1 O kizuelu kieza kua Jelemiia, kia tundu ku mbandu ia Jihova, kioso Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, kiʼambudisa Jelemiia bhu Lama, kioso kia mu katula, kuila muene uala hanji ni malubhambu mê mu kaxi ka ene oso ai ku uhutile a tundu mu Jeluzaleme ni mua Juda, kua ió a ambata ku uhutile ia ai na-u ku Babilonha." 
Jeremiah40:2 Mbata o kabhitangu ka kilangidilu uambata Jelemiia iú ua muʼambela, uixi: Jihova, Nzambi ié ua tange divuua didi ku kididi kiki." 
Jeremiah40:3 Jihova phe ua di bheka muene iú ua bhange kala kiambele, mukonda mua te kituxi kua Jihova, nguenu kutumaka dízui diê, kú kua mʼiza ima ioso kala ienhiʼii." 
Jeremiah40:4 Kikiphe, tala, nga ku jituna lelu ku malubhambu ma kexile mu maku mé. Se kia ku uabhela kuiza nʼeme ku Babilonha, zá; eme muene nga-nda ku ku langa, maji se ki ki ku uabhela kuiza nʼeme ku Babilonha, kalʼé. Talesa-phe, oxi ioso iala ku mesu mé, bhuoso bhu ua mono bhua ku uabhela, bhua ku iukila ku mesu mé, ndé, u kaliʼé bhenhobho." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kuma-phe, muene ka vutukile luua, u muʼambela, uixi: Vutuka kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane, ió a mu te ku ukota ua jimbonge ja Juda kuala sobha ia Babilonha, phala u tunge-nê mu kaxi ka kifuẋi; o ki uila dingi sai kuma kuengi kua ku uabhela kuia, ndé. Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu hé u mu bhana ni huta ia ku dila mu njila ni mahitula anga u muʼambudisa phala kuié." 
Jeremiah40:6 Uenhú o uijilu ua Jelemiia kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, bhu Mixpa, anga u tunga-nê mu kaxi ka kifuẋi kia athu a subhukile mu ixi ia Juda." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kioso o makota a ilombo ia masoladi, kumoxi ni mundu uâ, a kexile ku mukáu, kia kʼivu kuila sobha ia Babilonha ua te Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, ku ukota ua kutumina ixi, ia a mu bhana ue kulangidila mala ni ahatu ni tuana tua ndenge ni jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu ixi, a kambele kuia-nâ ku uhutile mu Babilonha," 
Jeremiah40:8 anga eza ku di mona ni Jedaliia bhu Mixpa, a kexile: Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, ni Nzuanana, ni Jonatane, anʼa Kadiiá, ni Selaia, monʼa Tanumete, ni anʼa Ifai, mukua Netofe, ni Jezaniia, monʼa muthu ua tokala bhu Mahaka, ni ene ni mundu uâ." 
Jeremiah40:9 Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane, anga u a lokela ene ni mundu uâ uixi: Ki mu kale ni uoma ua kubhikila akua Kaldeia; kalenu moxʼumu, bhikilenu sobha ia Babilonha, ima i miʼende kiambote." 
Jeremiah40:10 Eme-phe nga tungu bhenhabha bhu Mixpa, nda ngi di lunge ni akua Kaldeia oso eza kokuetu; enu-phe endenu ni kubhongolola o vinhu, ni ibundu ia musonoko ua mvula, ni maji, mu i te mu itabhu ienu, nda mu tunge mu jimbonge joso ji mua bhundu." 
Jeremiah40:11 Kiene kimoxi ue ni jijudé joso a kexile ku Mouabhe, ni mu kaxi ka anʼa Amone, ni ku Idomo, ni iá a kexile mu jixi joso jenhojo, kievu kuila sobha ia Babilonha ua xisa-ku o masubhu mua Juda, iú ua a tela-ku Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane, ku ungana ua kutumina," 
Jeremiah40:12 ene oso o jijudé a kexile mu ididi ioso mua a takuilile, a vutuka anga eza mʼoxi ia Juda, kua Jedaliia, bhu Mixpa; hé a bhongolola ndumba dia vinhu ni ibundu ia musonoko ua mvula ni kuvula kuoso." 
Jeremiah40:13 Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá ni makota oso a ilombo akexile ku mukáu, anga eza kua Jedaliia bhu Mixpa," 
Jeremiah40:14 anga a mu tangela, exi: Eie ua kʼijiia kiambote kuila Bahali, sobha ia anʼa Amone, ua tumikisa Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia phala ku ku katula o muenhu? Maji Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane ngué kuẋikina ia mu zuelela." 
Jeremiah40:15 Sumbala, Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, ua tangela Jedaliia mu kasuekele, bhu Mixpa, uixi: Nga-nda kuia kindala ni nga kà jibha Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, ki bhua-nda ku kala muthu u kʼijiia; mukonda diahi muene uandala ku ku katula eie o muenhu, o kibuka kioso kia Juda kia di bhongoluela kokué anga ki muangana, o a a subhuka kua Juda hé a jima o mbutu?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Maji-phe Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, uambela Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, uexi: Kana kubhanga kiokio; mukonda eie ua mu tanga makutu, Ijimaiele ua mu mu tatelʼé ngó." 
Jeremiah41:1 Anga ki bhita-phe kuila mu mbeji ia kasambuadi, Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, monʼa Elixama, ua tokala ku muiji ua jisobha, ueza kumoxi ni tubhitangu tua sobha, mu ku ejiia, kuinhi dia muthu dieza na-diu kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, bhu Mixpa; ene anga a dia-nê mbolo kumoxi bheneʼobho bhu Mixpa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Anga Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, u balumuka, kumoxi ni kuinhi diê dia muthu dia kexi na-diu, anga a kuama Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane, ni xibhata, kienhiki anga a jibha ió a mu tele ku ukota ua xi, kuala sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ijimaiele hé u jibha ue jijudé joso ja kexile kumoxi ni Jedaliia bhu Mixpa, kumoxi ni akua Kaldeia, mala a ita a kexile bheneʼobho." 
Jeremiah41:4 Mu kizuua kia kaiadi, anga ki bhita kiki, kuila muene ua jibha kiá Jedaliia, sé muthu ku kʼijiia," 
Jeremiah41:5 anga kuiza-phe athu a tundu ku Xikeme ni ku Silu ni ku Samádia; makuinhi nake a muthu, ni miezu iòkonge, ni izuatu ia tandujuka ni mikutu ia batujuka; o bhu maku a bheka maujitu mâ makudia ni uasu ua dizumba phala ku uʼambata mʼonzo ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah41:6 O Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, kiʼai mu ku a kauidila, ua ile ni kudila tundé bhu Mixpa; o kia a sange, iú ua ambela uixi: Ndokuenu kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane." 
Jeremiah41:7 Anga ki bhita kuila, ene kiʼai ni kuenda, katé kia bhixila mu kaxi ka mbonge, Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, ua a jibha, ni muene ni athuʼê a kexile-nâ kumoxi, iú ua a lunduluila mu fiẋi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Maji mu kaxi kâ mua kexile kuinhi dia muthu ambela Ijimaiele, kuila: Etu ku tu jibhe; mukonda tuala ni jimbongo ji tua sueka ku makáu, ni tiliku, ni sevada, ni maji ni uiki. Muene ue kiene kia ehela, ka a jibha kala kia jibha o jiphange jâ." 
Jeremiah41:9 O fiẋi, mua tele imbi ioso ia jibha Ijimaiele, mukonda dia Jedaliia, iene ia kandele sobha Aza mukonda dia Bahasa, sobha ia Izalaiele; ienhiʼii muene iezalesa Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, ni imbi." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ijimaiele, anga uʼambata ku uhutile, athu oso a subhukile akexile bhu Mixpa; ku tale anʼa ahetu a sobha, uixi o kifuẋi kioso kia athu a subhukile bhu Mixpa, a bhele Nebuzaladane kabhitangu ka kilangidilu kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane; ene osuʼâ, Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia ua ambata ku ubhika anga uia-nâ phala ku di bunda ku anʼa Amone." 
Jeremiah41:11 Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, kioso kievu, kumoxi ni makota oso a ilombo ia masoladi a kexi-nê kumoxi, o ku ibha kuosʼuku kua bhange Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia," 
Jeremiah41:12 a katula mala oso a kexile na-u, hé aia mu kulua ni Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, anga a mu sanga bhu mbanduʼa menha a vulu a kala mu Ngibiione." 
Jeremiah41:13 Anga-phe ki bhita kiki kuila: Kifuẋi kioso kia kutile Ijimaiele, ki kia mono Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, uala mu kuiza kumoxi ni adiakime oso a ilombo ia masoladi, a kuata kusanguluka." 
Jeremiah41:14 O kifuẋi kioso kia athu a kutile Ijimaiele bhu Mixpa, kia mu bhe dikunda, anga ki vutuka, kiia kua Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá." 
Jeremiah41:15 Maji Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, kumoxi ni nake dia muthu a lenge, kia mono Nzuanana, anga aia ku anʼa Amone." 
Jeremiah41:16 Bheneʼobho, Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, kumoxi ni makota ma ilombo ia masoladi, a kexile-nê kumoxi, anga a katula iá a subhuka ku kifuẋi kia tambula kua Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia, tunde bhu Mixpa kioso kia jibha Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, ni mala, makuenze a ita ni ahatu, ni tuana tua ndenge, ni jingolambole a a tambuile bhu Ngibiione." 
Jeremiah41:17 Anga a katuka, aia mu kutunga bhu Jelute-Kimane bhua zukama ni Beleme, phala bhobho kiá kubokona mu Ijitu," 
Jeremiah41:18 mukonda dia akua Kaldeia; mbata a a kuatelele uoma, mukonda dia Ijimaiele, monʼa Netaniia ua jibha Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, a mu tele ku ungana uaʼxi kuala sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah42:1 Bheneʼobho makota ma ilombo ia masoladi oso, o jikabhitangu, ni Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, ni Jezaniia, monʼa Hozaia, ni mundu uoso tundé ku monʼa-ndenge tulé ku muadiakimi." 
Jeremiah42:2 Anga ambela polofeta Jelemiia, exi: Kudionda kuetu ku sonokene kindala bhu pholo ié, u tu diondele kua Jihova, Nzambi ié, ku ene osuʼá subhuka, mbata ku nzungule i tua kexile, tua subhuka tua tolo kiá, kala ki ua mu di muena éʼmuène ni mesu mé." 
Jeremiah42:3 Phala Jihova, Nzambi ié, a tu longese njila i tua fuama kuendela ni kioso ki tua fuama kubhanga." 
Jeremiah42:4 Polofeta Jelemiia anga u ambela, uixi: Eme nga mʼivu; tala, eme nga-nda kusamba kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu kala ki mua zuela; o kioso-kioso Jihova kia mi vutuila, eme nga-nda ku mi tangelakiu, ki nga-nda ku mi dingila kima." 
Jeremiah42:5 Ene hê a vutuila Jelemiia, exi: Jihova a tu kale mbangi ia kidi ni ufiiele, bhu kaxi ketu, se tu kamba kubhanga kioso kiambe o kizuelu kioso kia-nda ku ku tumikisa na-kiu Jihova, Nzambi ié, kókuetu." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kizuelu kiê, ki uabhiʼê mba ki ibhiʼê, dízui dia Jihova, Nzambi ietu, ku tua-nda ku ku tumikisa, diene di tua-nda kutumaka, phala tu muene-ku mbote, mu kutumaka dízui dia Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Anga ki bhita kuila, kia zubha kúbhua kuinhi dia izuua, kiene kieza kizuelu kia Jihova kua Jelemiia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Anga uixana Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá, ni makota oso a ilómbo ia masoladi, o tubhitangu, a kexile-nê kumoxi, ni mundu uoso, tundé ku mona-ndenge tulé ku muadiakimi." 
Jeremiah42:9 Hé uʼambela, uixi: Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ku mua ngi tumikisa, phala ku bhiẋidisa o kudionda kuenu ku pholo iê, uambe kiki:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Se mu kalenu muene mʼoxi muenhumu kiambote, kuabhu-phe, eme ue nga-nda ku mi tunga, ki nga-nda ku mi bula, kana; nga-nda ku mi kuna, ki nga-nda ku mi vuza; kuma o ku ibha kuoso ku ngène mu ku mi bhanga, kua ngi kuata ku muẋima." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ki mu kale ni uoma ua sobha ia Babilonha, mua mu kuatela o uoma; ki mu kale ni uoma, Jihova ua ki tange, mukonda eme ngala ni enu phala ku mi bhulula, ni ku mi bhangesa kubhulaka bhu lukuaku luê." 
Jeremiah42:12 Nga-nda ku mi bhanga jihenda, phala muene ue a mi kale ni jihenda, jenu, nda a mi vutule dingi mʼoxi ienu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Maji-phe, enu ki muila, muixi: Etu mʼoxi mumu ki tua-nda ku kalamu, hé mu kamba kutumaka o dízui dia Jihova, Nzambi ienu," 
Jeremiah42:14 muexi: Kana, kota o kuietu ku ixi ia Ijitu, koko ki tua-nda kumona-ku dingi ita, mba tuà kʼevua mbimbi ia koloneta, mba tua kà kala ni nzala ia kudia inda tua kà kala kuneʼoko." 
Jeremiah42:15 Kiókio-phe hé kiene, ivuenu kizuelu kia Jihova, enu mua subhuka kua Juda: Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Se enu mua jijila ku ta ngoho jipholo jenu phala kubokona mu Ijitu, anga mu bokona momo phala kunhunganena-mu," 
Jeremiah42:16 mua-nda kuila o xibhata ia mi kuatele uoma, o koko ia-nda ku à mi tula muene mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ni nzala i mua kuatela hele kunu, ia kà kala ni enu mu Ijitu, o kuenhoko kuene ku mua-nda kua kà fuila." 
Jeremiah42:17 Kienhiki kiene kia-nda kua kà bhita ni athu oso a ta jipholo jâ mu kubokona mu Ijitu phala kunhunganena-mu; a kà fua ku xibhata, ni ku nzala, ni ku dibhebhu; ku eneʼoso ió ki kua kà subhuka muthu mba ku bhulaka muthu, ku kibuika ki nga-nda kubheka ku thandu diâ." 
Jeremiah42:18 Mbata Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Kala kia lunduluka o njinda iami ni kutema kuami ku thandu dia iá a tungile mu Jeluzaleme, kiene kia-nda kulunduluka o kutema kuami ku thandu dienu, se mu bokona mu Ijitu; anga mua kà kituka mu akua mázui, mu kidiuanu, enhoso a mi zemba, mu kala mu akua lusebu, o kididi kiki, ki mungu dingi mu ki mona." 
Jeremiah42:19 Jihova ua zuela ku mbandu ienu, eie u masubhu a Juda! Kana kubokona mu Ijitu; ijiienu-kiu mu kidi, kuila lelu nga mi bhela umbangi u mi bhanga kia ibha." 
Jeremiah42:20 Mukonda enu o mienhu ienu mua i tobhesa, kuma mua ngi tumikisa kua Jihova, Nzambi ienu, muexi: Tu sambele kua Jihova, Nzambi ietu; o iene ioso muene i ku tangela Jihova Nzambi ietu, iene muene eie i u tu tangela, etu ni tu i bhange." 
Jeremiah42:21 Iene-phe iii i nga mi tangela lelu; maji mu ima ioso ia ngi tumu na-iu muene kòkuenu, enu mua tokoka ku bhana mátui ku dízui dia Jihova, Nzambi ienu." 
Jeremiah42:22 Kikiphe ijiienu-kiu mu kidi, kuila, ku xibhata, ni ku nzala, ni ku dibhebhu, kuene ku mua-nda kua kâ fuila, mu kididi kiene ki mua bhindamena ku bokona phala kunhunganena-mu." 
Jeremiah43:1 Anga ki bhita kuila kioso Jelemiia kia zubha kutangela mundu uoso o kizuelu kia Jihova, Nzambi iâ, kizuelu kia mu tumikisine na-kiu Jihova, Nzambi iâ, ene kiá o maka oso enhó muene a tange muene." 
Jeremiah43:2 Bheneʼobho phe Azadiia, monʼa Hozaia, ni Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá ni athu oso akua izala, a zuela, a tangela Jelemiia, exi: Eie ua mu tanga makutu; Jihova, Nzambi ietu ka ku tumu kutanga, kuila: Ka bokona mʼoxi ia Ijitu, phala kunhunganena momo." 
Jeremiah43:3 Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, muene ua mu ku funhisa eie kokuetu, phala u tu bhakule bhu lukuaku lua akua Kaldeia ni a tu jibhe mba a tu tumikisa ku ixi ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah43:4 Nzuanana-phe, monʼa Kadiiá, ka tumaka, mba umoxi ngó ku makota ma ilombo ia masoladi, mba o mundu uoso, o dízui dia Jihova, phala ku kala mʼoxi ia Juda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Inda kia di te-ku, Nzuanana, monʼa Kadiiá ni makota oso a ilombo ia masoladi a zangula iá o masubhu a Juda, a vutuka ku jixi joso kua a takuilile phala eze mu kunhunganena mʼoxi ia Juda," 
Jeremiah43:6 o mala, ni ahetu, ni tuana tua ndenge, ni anʼa ahetu a sobha, ni mienhu ioso kiá ia xile Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, kua Jedaliia, monʼa Haikane, monʼa Safane, ni Jelemiia muene dia polofeta, ni Mbaluke monʼa Nediia." 
Jeremiah43:7 Anga a bokona-nâ mu Ijitu, mukonda nguâ kutumaka o dízui dia Jihova, anga eza katé bhu Tafane." 
Jeremiah43:8 Bheneʼobho kizuelu kia Jihova, anga kʼiza kua Jelemiia, bhu Tafane, kuila:" 
Jeremiah43:9 Eie nomona ni maku mê, matadi a makota, u ma sueke koxiʼa mavu mu folono iala bhu muelu ua inzu ia Falaó iala mu Tafane, o kioso ki ua a sueka, o mala a akua Juda bhene muene bhua kala." 
Jeremiah43:10 Anga u a ambela, uixi: Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele uambe kiki: Talenu, nga-nda kutuma, hé ngi katula Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, mubhikʼami, hé ngi ta kiandu kiê kuthandu dia matadi iá u nga sueka, muene balaka iê ia ungana, uà kà iʼòlekela ku thandu dia matadi enhá." 
Jeremiah43:11 Hé ua kʼèza anga ua kà kuama o ixi ioso ia Ijitu: O uoso a muʼambe ku kalunga, ku kalunga; a muʼambe ku ubhika, ku ubhika; a muʼambe ku xibhata, ku xibhata;" 
Jeremiah43:12 Nga-nda kua kà ta mu túbhia o jinzu joso ja jinzambi ja Ijitu; muene ua-nda kuà jiʼoha anga u jiʼambata ku uhutile; o ixi ia Ijitu anga i kemba kiua kala mubidi kia zuata o kizuatu kiê; muenhomo muene, ua kà tunda-mu ni kutululuka." 
Jeremiah43:13 O iteka ia Beteseme, iala mʼoxi ia Ijitu, ua-nda kua kà i bula-bula, o jinzu ja jinzambi ja Ijitu hádia ua ká jiʼoha mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah44:1 O Kizuelu kieza kua Jelemiia, ku mbandu ia jijudé joso, ja tungu mʼoxi ia Ijitu, a kexile bhu Mingidole, ni bhu Tafane, ni bhu Nofe, ni mʼoxi ia Patulu, kiexi;" 
Jeremiah44:2 Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Enu mua di muena o kuiibha kuoso ku nga lauila ku thandu dia Izalaiele ni ku thandu dia jimbonge joso ja Juda; talenu, leluʼidi ja di bhange jingundu ki bhuala muthu u tunga-mu." 
Jeremiah44:3 Mukonda dia kuiibha kuâ kua bhanga jinga, phala ku ngi thathamesa, kioso kiʼàia jinga mu kuoha uasu ua dizumba ni kudiundila jinzambi jengi, ja bhingi ene ka jʼijidile ngó, né ene, mba enu, mba o jitata jenu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Eme-phe, abhikʼami oso, o jipolofeta, nga mi tumikisa-nâ, ngi di meneka mu ku a tumikisa ku mi tangela, kuila: Tatʼenu! Kana kubhanga kiki kia bolo ki nga ibhila eme." 
Jeremiah44:5 Maji ene nguâ kubhana mátui; mba a bheteka dítui diâ nʼa diele ima iâ ia ibha, nʼehe kuia ni kuoha uasu ua dizumba ku jinzambi jengi." 
Jeremiah44:6 Njinda iami-phe ni kutema kuami anga i di lundulula hé i uamena mu jimbonge ja Juda ni mu jinzunga ja Jeluzaleme; jene jí ja kituka ixi ia kisekele, ja biluka jingundu, kala ki kia di monekena mu lelu." 
Jeremiah44:7 Kiki-phe, Jihova, Nzambi dia Ilombo Ieta, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Enu muenhu uenu mu u bhangelaʼhi kuiibha kua soko kiki! Kia mi bhangesa o kuzangula o diiala ni muhatu, ni mona-ndenge ni iú uala hanji ku mele anga mu a katula mu kaxi ka Juda hé mu fula ku xa-mu ngó muthu uosouoso u subhuka." 
Jeremiah44:8 O ki mua-nda ku ngi thathamesa ni ikalakalu ia maku menu, kioso ki muʼoha uasu ua dizumba ku jinzambi jengi mʼoxi ia Ijitu, mu mua bokona, enu, phala kunhunganena-mu, mbebhu kʼenuʼenu mua-nda ku di jimisa o mbutu anga mu di bhanga mu akua mázui ni lusebu mu kaxi ka miji ioso mu ngongo?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Kuiibha kua jitata jenu mua ku jimbi kiá, ni kuiibha kua jisobha ja Juda, ni kuiibha kua ahetuʼâ, ni kuiibha kuenu enuʼenu, ni kuiibha kua ahetuʼenu, kua bhangela jinga mʼoxi ia Juda ni mu jinzunga ja Jeluzaleme?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Nguâ ku di tolesa katé mu kizuua kia lelu, mba a kala ni uoma, mba enda mu ngonge iami, mba mu itumu iami i nga te bhu pholo ienu ni bhu pholo ia jitata jenu." 
Jeremiah44:11 Kala kiki, Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Talenu, pholo iami nga-nda ku i talesa kokuenu phala ku mi bhanga kiaiibha, Juda dioso nga-nda ku mu vuza." 
Jeremiah44:12 Nga-nda ku katula o masubhu, a subhuka kua Juda, a te pholo iâ mu kubokona mʼoxi ia Ijitu phala kunhunganena momo, anga a buikila eneʼoso mʼoxi ia Ijitu; a kà di bhala ku xibhata, a kà fua ku nzala; a kà jikinina muene tundé ku mona-ndenge tulé ku muadiakime; ni ku xibhata ni ku nzala kuene kua kà fuila; a kà kituka mbolèle, a ka di bhanga kisunji, ni mázui ni lusebu." 
Jeremiah44:13 Mbata oso a tungu mu ixi ia Ijitu nga-nda kua kà a zungila ni xibhata, ni nzala ni dibhebhu, kala ki nga zungila Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah44:14 Katé ki mua kà moneka muthu u bhulaka hé u subhuka ku mbandu ia masubhu a Juda, a bokona mʼoxi ia Ijitu phala kunhunganena momo, hé u vutuka mʼoxi ia Juda, kala ki kia a kexile kinéne muene ku muẋima, o kuvutuka phala kutunga dingi mʼoxi ia Juda; maji kiki-phe ka kà vutuka, kikale kiá ngoho oso a kà bhulaka." 
Jeremiah44:15 Mala oso ejidile kuila ahetuʼâ a mu kuoha uasu ua dizumba ku jinzambi jengi, ni ahatu emanene bheneʼobho, kifuẋi muene kia dikota kumoxi ni mundu uoso ua tungile mu Ijitu, bhu Patulu, a vutuila Jelemiia, exi:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Ku maka ió u ua tu tangela mu dijina dia Jihova, eie ki tua-nda ku ku tumaka:" 
Jeremiah44:17 Kota-kota tua-nda kutumaka kizuelu kia tundu mu kanu dietuʼetuene, tuenda ni kuoha jinga o uasu ua dizumba kua sobha ia diulu ia muhatu, ni ku mu bhakuila makúnua, kala ki tuene mu kubhanga kiá etu, ni jitata jetu, ni jisobha jetu, ni ilamba ietu, mu jimbonge ja Juda ni mu jinzunga ja Jeluzaleme; etu tuene mu kala ni kúdia kua di xala ni kusanguluka, kana-ku ue kuiibha kuoso-kuoso ku tua mono." 
Jeremiah44:18 Maji tundé kiá ki tueha o kuoha uasu ua dizumba, kua sobha ia diulu ia muhatu, ni ku mu bhakuila o makúnua, ioso muene ia tu kambe, tua diua ku xibhata ni ku nzala." 
Jeremiah44:19 Etu-phe, kizuua kuẋi, ki tuoha uasu ua dizumba kua sobha ia diulu ia muhatu, etu tua mu bhakuila makúnua, mba ku mu bhangela jimbolo phala ku mu diundila ni ku mu bhanga ujitu ua makúnua, o mala etu anga a kamba ku kala-bhu?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Bheneʼobho-phe, Jelemiia uambela kifuẋi kioso, o mala ni ahatu, ni mundu uoso a mu vutuilile kiki, uixi:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Manhi enu mua fika kuila Jihova ua kambe ku kʼijiia, mba ku muẋima uê ki ki mu bhiti-ku, o uasu ua dizumba u muʼohela mu jimbonge ja Juda, ni mu jinzunga ja Jeluzaleme, enu ni jitata jenu, ni jisobha jenu, ni ilamba ienu, kumoxi ni mundu uoso uala mu ixi?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Kí kia bhekela kuila Jihova ue ka tenene dingi kulendukila mu kithangana kia vulu o kuiibha kua ibhangelu ienu ni ima ia isunji i mua bhanga jinga, ixi ienu iú ua i bilula kikangalakata, ia di bhange kima ki kuatesa uoma, ia kituka ixi ia mázui, ki i moneka athu a tungamu, kala ki muala ku i mona leluʼidi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Mbata enu muʼoha uasu ua dizumba, kuma mua te kituxi kua Jihova, nguenu ku tumaka o dízui dia Jihova, mua fulu kuenda mu ngonge iê ni mu itumu iê, kiene kia mʼijiia kuiibha kuosʼuku kala ki kia di monekena mu kizuua kia lelu." 
Jeremiah44:24 Jelemiia anga uambela dingi mundu uoso ni ahetu oso, uixi: Ivenu kizuelu kia Jihova, enuʼoso mu akua Juda, mua tungu mʼoxi ia Ijitu." 
Jeremiah44:25 Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ua mu zuela kiki, uexi: Ni enu ni ahatuʼenu, ki mu ki zuela ngó ni dikanu dienu, maji mua ki bhange muene ni makuʼenu, muixi: Ni kidi kiene tua-nda ku kumbidila muene izuelu ietu i tua tange, ia kuoha o uasu ua dizumba kua sobha ia diulu ia muhatu ni mu mu bhanga ujitu ua makúnua; kiene-phe muene ki mua tona kutanga enu mua kumbidila muene kala ki mua zuela." 
Jeremiah44:26 Uila kiki, ivuenu o kizuelu kia Jihova, enuʼoso mu akua Juda mua tungu mʼoxi ia Ijitu: Talenu, eme ngi loka mu dijina diami dia dikota, eme ngi Jihova, kuila ki mungu dingi dijina diami a di tumbula kuala dikanu dia muthu ua tokala kua Juda mʼoxi ioso ia Ijitu, nʼedi: Ki kola! Jihova a nangenene!" 
Jeremiah44:27 Kiki-phe nga-nda ku a langidila, ki phala mbote, maji phala kuiibha; athu oso mua Juda, ala mʼoxi ia Ijitu, a-nda kujikinina ku xibhata ni ku nzala, katé kiʼábhua-mu ene oso." 
Jeremiah44:28 O oso a-nda kua kà subhuka ku xibhata, a kà tunda mʼoxi ia Ijitu mu ku vutuka mʼoxi ia Juda, maji a kà kala ngó ofele mu ku alula. Phala o masubhu a subhuka kua Juda, ia a bokona mʼoxi ia Ijitu phala kunhunganena momo, a kà kʼijiie mba kizuelu kiebhi ki nangenena, mba o kiâ ene mba o kiamiʼeme." 
Jeremiah44:29 O kiki ki mi kala kiene o kijimbuete, eme ngi Jihova, kuila nga-nda ku mi betela bhu kididi kienhiki; enu nda mu kʼijiie kuila ni kidi kiene o maka mami ma nangenena ku thandu dienu phala ku mi bhanga kiaiibha." 
Jeremiah44:30 Jihova phe uambe kiki: Talenu, Falaó dia Hofala, sobha ia Ijitu, nga-nda ku mu bhakula bhu lukuaku lua jinguma jê ni bhu lukuaku lua iá a mu sota ku mu jibha; kala ki nga bhakula Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, bhu lukuaku lua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, nguma iê, ua kexile mu mu sota ku mu jibha." 
Jeremiah45:1 O maka a zuela Jelemiia, dia polofeta, kua Mbaluke, monʼa Nediia, kioso muene kia kexi mu kusoneka maka ió, mu divulu, ku dikanu dia Jelemiia, mu muvu ua kauana ua Nzuakí, monʼa Joziia, sobha ia Juda, uixi:" 
Jeremiah45:2 O Jihova, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, ku mbandu ié eie, Mbaluke, ua tange, kuila:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Eie, uambe, uixi: Kindala, kokolo diami, tatʼé! Kuma ku thandu dia hadi i ngala kumona, Jihova ua ngi ueza-ku dingi dilamba! Nga zondo ni kukema kuami, nhohenu nga di lémbua." 
Jeremiah45:4 Eie-phe u mu tangela kiki: Jihova uambe, uixi: Tala, kioso ki nga tungu, ngi ki bula; o kioso ki nga phaphe, ngi ki vuza; kienhiki muene mu ixi ioso muenhumu." 
Jeremiah45:5 Eie anga uia ni kusota maunéne? Kana ku a sota; Mukonda nga-nda kubheka kuiibha ku thandu dia xitu ioso, eme ngi Jihova, eie-phe o muenhu ué uene u nga-nda ku ku bhana kuma iene o mbole ié kuoso-kuoso ku u di texila." 
Jeremiah46:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova, kieza kua Jelemiia, dia polofeta, kia kuzoka ni akua jixi." 
Jeremiah46:2 Ku mbandu ia Ijitu, kia bilulukila kifuẋi kia Falaó dia Neku, sobha ia Ijitu, kifuẋi kiê kia kexile bhu mbandu ia honga ia Ufalate, bhu Kakemixi; kifuẋi kia jibhile Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, mu muvu ua kauana ua Nzuakí, monʼa Joziia, sobha ia Juda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 Exi: Zakelenu o ngubu iòfele ni ia dikota muize ku ita. 
Jeremiah46:4 Tenu makomola ku jikabalu mu sambele, enu mu asambedi a jikabalu tukulukenu ni jikapasete ja kuxitila mítue, o matoma menu zelesenu-nâ, zuatenu ivunga-thulu." 
Jeremiah46:5 Mukonda diahi nga mu mona akua uoma kubhana-ku makunda? Mazonda mâ a ma tolola, o mu kulenga ka mu tala dingi kuema; kuma uoma uavulu ua a kuata ku mbandu joso— Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah46:6 Ua lenguluka ka lenge, o ió uala dizonda ka subhuke; ku mbandu ia kusuku, bhu ndundu ia honga ia Ufalate bhene bhua dibhukanena ia a-di-bhale." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nanhi muenhú, uiza ni kubanda kala honga ia Nilu, ua bhingi menha mê ma kunguluka kala ma jingiji?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ijitu muene ua mu kuiza ni kubanda kala Nilu, o menha mê ene ala mu ku kunguluka kala a jingiji; kuma muene uixi: Nga-nda kubanda, nga kà vungina ixi, nga kà jikinisa o mbonge ni oso a tungu momo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Enu jikabalu bandenu, enu mu makalu numinenu, mazonda ende ni kutunda; akua Itiiópia ni akua Pute ejiia kubhânga ni ngubu, ni akua Lida ejiia kubhânga ni kuoleka o mufula." 
Jeremiah46:10 Mbata o kizuua kiki kiene o kizuua kia Ngana, kia Jihova dia Ifuẋi, kizuua kia kuvutula phonzo phala nʼa vutule ditota ku jinguma jê; o xibhata ia kà dia, ia kʼekuta, ia kà kodiua ni manhinga mâ. Mbata Jihova dia Ifuẋi, o Ngana,— uala ni kilumbu mu ixi ia kusuku, bhu mbandu ia ngiji ia Ufalate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Banda ku Ngiliiade, ua kà tambule maji ma dizumba eie u muzeletete, u monʼa kilumba ua Ijitu; milongo né ua i vudisa, kingoho; eie o ku disanza ku ku mono dingi!" 
Jeremiah46:12 Miji ioso dilebhu dié evu ku di zuela, o ngongo iezala ni mikole-kole ia kudikola kué; mukonda dizonda ua di bhukana ku dizonda, kiiadi kiâ ia a dibhalela kumoxi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Kizuelu kia tangele Jihova kua Jelemiia, polofeta, ku mbandu ia kuiza kua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, phala kujimisa o ixi ia Ijitu." 
Jeremiah46:14 Exi: Tuienu mazelele mu Ijitu, kiki ivisenu-kiu bhu Mingidole, jimbulenu-kiu a kivue mu Nofe ni mu Tafane; tangenu, muexi: Di bhakule, u di lunge; mukonda o xibhata ia di kiá kioso kia ku kexile mu jimbandu jé." 
Jeremiah46:15 Kia bhiti kiebhi mazonda mé oso a a te bhoxi? A lémbua kuimana mukonda Jihova muene ua a tolojola. 
Jeremiah46:16 Ua sokolola ió a kexile mu ku di bhukana; ene uâ a di bhala-bhala iú ku thandu dia mukuá, iú ku thandu dia mukuá, ia a di zuelesa, exi: Balumuka, phala tu vutuke kuembu dietu, mʼoxi mua tu vualela, mukonda dia xibhata ia tu phopheka."
