Jeremiah46:17 Anga a di kola bheneʼobho, exi: Falaó, sobha ia Ijitu, ua di bhangiʼé ngó muxindu ua hatu; kuma kithangana kia xindile ua ki bhitisa." 
Jeremiah46:18 Sobha ua bhingi dijina diê muene Jihova dia Ifuẋi, uambe uixi: Eme ngi nangenena! Kuma ni kidi kiene, kala kiala o mulundu ua Tabolo bhu kaẋi ka milundu ni mulundu ua Kalamelu bhu mbandu ia kalunga, kiene kià kʼeza muene." 
Jeremiah46:19 Eie-phe di lunge, phala kuia ku ubhika, eie u thungi, u monʼa kilumba ua Ijitu; mukonda Nofe a-nda kuà mu sengulula, ua kà uama kala makala ma túbhia katé ki mua kà tena dingi kutunga muthu uoso-uoso." 
Jeremiah46:20 Kangombe ka mukaji ka uabha kinéne, eieʼmuène u Ijitu, maji, tala, kibuika kié kí kiza kiá, kia mu tundila ku suku." 
Jeremiah46:21 Katé ni masoladiʼé a ku futila, edi kala tungombe tua nete, tuʼòbhange mu kaxi ké; maji enhá ue a bhe-ku makunda ia a lengela kumoxi; a lémbua kuimana, kuma o kizuua kiâ kia kusenguluka kia bhiẋila kumoxi ni kithangana kiâ kia ku a zungila." 
Jeremiah46:22 O dízui diâ dia kèla kala mulokoso ua nhoka ia mu lenga; kuma nguma jê a kà di lukula ni kifuẋi kia masoladi, a-nda ku muʼendela ni makuua kala akua kuxanga jihuinhi." 
Jeremiah46:23 Ditutu diê dia xitile, ki di ẋkina ku di bokona, a di kokela-bhoxi Jihova ua ki tange, mukonda a beta o kudivualulula kihoho ndenge; ka ẋikina ku a tanga." 
Jeremiah46:24 O monʼa kilumba ua Ijitu, sonhi ja mu kuata; kuma a mu bhakula bhu lukuaku lua kifuẋi kia akua suku." 
Jeremiah46:25 Jihova dia Huxi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uixi: Talesa, Amoni dia Nó nganda ku mu zungila, ni Falaó, ni Ijitu ni jinzambi jâ, ni jisobha jâ; ni Falaó muene, ni oso a dielela kua muene." 
Jeremiah46:26 Anga ngà ka a bhakula bhu lukuaku lua iá a bhindamena ku a jibha, bhu lukuaku lua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, ni bhu lukuaku lua abhikʼê; maji hádia u tunga dingi kala mu izuua iê ia ukulu, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah46:27 Eie-phe Jakobo, dia mubhikʼami, ku kale ni uoma, mba u kala ni kimbuua eie Izalaiele; mukonda eme nga-nda ku ku bhuluila muene dikanga, o mbutu ié ngi i bhuluila muene ku ixi ia ubhika uâ; o Jakobo hádia u vutuka, anga ua kà nhoha, u tuluka muene, ki bhua kà kala muthu u mu kuatesa uoma." 
Jeremiah46:28 Eie ku kale ni uoma, mubhikʼami Jakobo, Jihova ua ki tange, uexi: mukonda eme ngala ni eie; mbata miji ioso mu nga ku takuila, nga-nda ku a jima o mbutu; maji eie phe, ki nga-nda ku ku jikinisa, inda nga-nda ku ku bhana kaxtiku ké mu kizongelu kia tokala, kuma ki nga-nda ku kuila ngixi mu mulonga eie ue uabhu-mu muene." 
Jeremiah47:1 O kizuelu kia Jihova, kieza kua polofeta Jelemiia, kia kuzoka ni akua Fidíxia, kioso hanji Falaó kiluua a jimisa o mbânza ia Ngaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Jihova, uambe, kiki: Tala o menha a tunda kusuku a-ndo balumuka anga a di bhanga kihungulule ki subhajaka, anga a kʼèzalesa ixi ioso muene ni uvimba uê, ni mbonge ni oso a tungu momo; athu a kà di kola-kola, ene oso a tungu mu ngongo a kà dila jingololo." 
Jeremiah47:3 O mu kuívua o mixindu ia ikoto ia jikabalu jâ ja nguzu, ni jibuia ja makalu mâ, ni kunumina kua malola mâ; jitata a lembua kubhanga kioso kʼiandalele tuana tuâ mukonda dia (kubulukuta) kua maku mâ." 
Jeremiah47:4 Mukonda dia kizuua kia mu kuiza phala kubuikisa o akua Fidíxia oso, phala kubatuila ku Tilu, ni ku Sidone, mbebhu ki kuize athu mu ku a kudila; mbata Jihova ua-nda kujikinisa akua Fidíxia, ió oso a subhuka mu kikolo kia Kafitoli." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ngaza kua muʼiza kabhuetete, Axikilone a mu vuza kumoxi ni masubhu a dikolo diê; katé-phe bhebhi bhu u suka ni ku di tandujula?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Éhʼê! Xibhata ia Jihova, tata! Eie ua-nda kunhoha katé bhebhi? Vutuka mu kizu kié, nhoha, tululuka muene!" 
Jeremiah47:7 Eie-phe u nhoha kiebhi, se Jihova muene ua ku bhana ngonge ia kuzoka ni Axikilone, ni ndundu ja musanza ua kalunga? Bhobho-phe bhene bhua kuxindila." 
Jeremiah48:1 Mu kulungulukila Mouabhe, Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Nebu, kokolo diê, kuma a mu sengulula; Kidiataimi, sonhi ja mu kuata, kuma a mu tolola kiá; Miska sonhi ja mu kuata, ua bhuuama." 
Jeremiah48:2 Matunda a Mouabhe kala-ku dingi; mukonda mu Hexebone a mu xinganeka kiaiibha, exi: Zenu kunu, tu mu vuze muene phala ka kale dingi Kifuẋi kia kima; ni eie ue Madimene a-nda ku ku vuza; o xibhata ia-nda kuia ni ku ku kaiela." 
Jeremiah48:3 Dízui dia ku dikola kua Holonaime: Kua muʼiza kibuika ni kusenguluka kua dikota! 
Jeremiah48:4 Mouabhe a mu sengulula kiá; tuana tuê a tuivu nzongo ja kudikola. 
Jeremiah48:5 Kuma ene ia aiʼó ni kudila kua kiiokoioko bhu kalundu ka Luhiti; mbata bhu dikulumukinu dia Holonaime, o jinguma ja Mouabhe evila-bhu mikemu ni kudikola." 
Jeremiah48:6 Exi: Lengenu, bhululenu o muenhu uenu, muile kala muẋi ua mutamálaka mu ixi ia kisekele." 
Jeremiah48:7 Mbata, mukonda dia kudielela ku uala-na-ku ku ima ié i uene kubhanga ni jimbongo ji uala na-ju, eie ue a-nda ku ku tolola; o Kamu ua-nda kutu-nda, uia ku ubhika kumoxi ni jinganga jê ni ilamba iê." 
Jeremiah48:8 Mbata mukua kumuanga ua-nda kuiza ku mbonge joso ki bhu kala imoxi ngó i subhuka; o dikolo ue dia-nda kujimuka; o kiphenza kia-nda kusenguluka kuma Jihova ua ki tange. 
Jeremiah48:9 Mouabhe mu bhanienu mabhabha kuma kia tuka, ua-nda ku tundʼé, o jimbonge jê ja-nda kukituka jíngundu, ki mua-nda kumoneka muthu u tunga-mu dingi." 
Jeremiah48:10 Lamba dia ió uoso u bhanga o kikalakalu dia Jihova ni mangonha; lamba dia ió ue uoso u bhaka o xibhata iê ku manhinga. 
Jeremiah48:11 Mouabhe uene ni kunhoha kuê tundé mu undenge uê, o mavunze mê ma tula muene bhu hole; ka mu lunduluila kitabhu nʼeze kitabhu, mba uia ku ubhika; kiene kia mu bhangesa kuila o utoualelu uê uene hanji umoxi, uʼòlunde, ni dizumba diê ki di tumbuluka luua." 
Jeremiah48:12 Kala kiki, izuua i iza, Jihova ua ki tange, i nga-nda ku mu tumikisa alunduludi, a-nda ku mu tukisa mazalu, anga o ithabhu iê a i lundulula o isudi iê a i bula." 
Jeremiah48:13 Kieneʼokio-phe Mouabhe ua kà kala ni jisonhi ja Kamu, mukuá ni Izalaiele ki ala ni jisonhi ja Betele, ua mu mexile kidielelu kiê." 
Jeremiah48:14 Mua-nda ku kiʼamba kiebhi, muexi: Tu mazonda, tu malʼa nguzu mu ita?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mouabhe a mu sengulula kiá, ua tundu mu jimbonge jê ni kubanda, o minzangala iê ia mala ia solele, ia kulumuka mu kijibha, Sobha ua ki tange, o dijina diê Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta." 
Jeremiah48:16 Kujimbila kua Mouabhe kueza kiá, o hadi iê ia lenguluka kuiza; o hadi iê iza muene lusolo." 
Jeremiah48:17 Mu kuatedienu henda, enuʼenu oso mua mu kala mu jimbandu jê, enuʼenu oso mua muʼijiia o dijina; zuelenu-kiu, muexi: o mbangala ia kolo, dikoue dia iuka kinéne, dia bukuka kiebhi?" 
Jeremiah48:18 Eie u muhatu ua tungu, u monʼa Dibone, ku fuma ié tuluka-ku, u xikame bhoxi dia kukuta; mukonda ió ua sengulula Mouabhe, ua bande, ueza kokué, imbaka, iéʼeie, ua i sengulula kiá." 
Jeremiah48:19 Di te-ze mu njila u zongole, éʼmonʼa muhetu ua tungu bhu Alouele; uoso ua muia ni lusolo, muʼibhule; o ió ua bhulaka, u muʼila: Kia bhiti kiebhi?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Mouabhe sonhi ja mu kuata kuma a mu (tatesa) tohola; dikodienu mu dile kala imbungu; tulenu-kiu hundu mu Anone, muixi: Mouabhe a mu sengulula." 
Jeremiah48:21 O kiki difundisilu dieza ue ku ixi ia kiphenza, kua Holone, ni kua Jaza ni kua Mefate," 
Jeremiah48:22 ni kua Dibone, ni kua Nebu, ni kua Bete-Dibalataime," 
Jeremiah48:23 ni ku Kidiataimi, ni kua Bete-Kamulu, ni kua Bete-Meone," 
Jeremiah48:24 ni kua Kidiote, ni kua Bozola; katé ni ku jimbonge joso ja ixi ia Mouabhe, kixi jala makanga, uixi jala bhua butu." 
Jeremiah48:25 Nguzu ia Mouabhe iòbatule, lukuaku luê a lu batula, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah48:26 Mu kodiuisienu, mukonda ua di zangeleka mu kuzoka ni Jihova; Mouabhe ua-nda kua kà di dimbula mu ima iê ia lusu muene; ua kà kituka kima kia kasekelu." 
Jeremiah48:27 Mukonda eie ue Izalaiele ku mu bhanga jinga kasekelu? Manhi a mu sange mu kaxi ka miii? Phalaʼhi-phe ua mu kuila ki uiza mu ku mu zuela uolela? 
Jeremiah48:28 Jimbonge xé-nu-ju mu tunge mu matadi, enu muà tunga bhu Mouabhe; muile kala diembe ki di tunga o kikalanga kiê ku nzènde ia dikenhe." 
Jeremiah48:29 Ku di zangeleka kua Mouabhe tuevu ku ku zuela, ni kidi kiene, muene ua di zangeleka kinéne muene; ni izala iê ni ukumbu uê, ni ku di tudika kuê ni bhu ditala bhuoso bhuala o muẋima uê." 
Jeremiah48:30 Jihova uixi: Eme ngʼejiia muene o kuthathamana kué, maji ki kimʼé luua; o makutu mê ka-nda kubhanga kima." 
Jeremiah48:31 Kienhiki nga-nda kukema mukonda dia Mouabhe; xi, ngi dikola muene mukonda dia Mouabhe dioso; mbata akua Kidi-Helese a kà dila jingololo." 
Jeremiah48:32 Eie-phe nga-nda ku ku dila ni udidilu ua Jahezale, eie u muẋi ua muvide mu Sibama; jithangu jé ja bhiti musanza ua kalunga jí ja bhixila katé ku musanza ua Jahezele; maji o mubuikixi ua laukila ku ibundu iê ia kudinji ni ku dibhongoluelu dié." 
Jeremiah48:33 Mu mukáu ua mbote ua uabha ku kuna idima ni mu ixi ia Mouabhe, o kutonoka ni kusanguluka a ku katula-mu kuma nga bhangesa vinhu kúbhua mu makamenu; jiúva ka-nda ku ji kama dingi ni kutana; o kutana ue kuene ki kua-ndu kala dingi kutana." 
Jeremiah48:34 O ku dikola kua Hexebone a kuʼivu katé ku Eleale ni ku Jahaze, tundé mu Zouale katé mu Holonaime mbimbi iê ia kudikola a ivu, iedi muene kala mona ua ngombe ua mivu itatu; mukonda katé ni menha ma Nidimi a kà kituka dibuikilu." 
Jeremiah48:35 Anga ngi bhangesa kuila mu Mouabhe, oso a bhakuila jinzambi jâ ni ku jiʼohela uasu ua dizumba bhu ididi ia dileka, a jimukamu, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah48:36 Kienhiki ki bhangesa kuila o muẋima uami u dʼitaia kala mbèndu, mukonda dia akua Kidi-Helese; mbata nzungule ioso ia bhongoluele ia di boto." 
Jeremiah48:37 Mukonda mítue ioso ia kà kituka mabhaia, o miezu ioso ia kà bhueka; majuʼoso a kʼezala iẋenge, o bhu inhonga a kà di kumba jisaku." 
Jeremiah48:38 Bhu thala dia jinzu joso ja Mouabhe ni mu jinzunga mua kà kala kibulukutu kia dilamba kua ene oso; mukonda Mouabhe nga mu bulu kala kitutu kia kambe kuiuka, eme ngi Jihova." 
Jeremiah48:39 Ua budijika, tata! Ku kumba kuahi! Mouabhe ua lunguluka dikunda, sonhi jahi ngó ja mu kuata! Kienhiki Mouabhe ua-nda ku kituka kima kia lusebu ni kimbuua kua iò oso a mu kala mu jimbandu." 
Jeremiah48:40 Mukonda Jihova uambe kiki: Tala, Muene ua-nda kubhita bhulu kala holokoko, anga uʼoleka mabhabha mê ku thandu dia Mouabhe." 
Jeremiah48:41 Jimbânza a ji tambula, o jimbonge a ji bhundu, bhu kumbiʼ-ʼodio o muẋima ua mazonda ma Mouabhe, ua kà di bhanga kala o muẋima ua muhetu kia kala bhu mika ia kuvuala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Mouabhe-phe a-nda ku mu sengulula mbé ka kale dingi kifuẋi; mukonda ua di zangeleka mu kuzoka ni Jihova. 
Jeremiah48:43 Ni uoma, ni dikungu, ni dibhebhe, iá eza ku thandu dié eie ua tunga bhu Mouabhe, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah48:44 Uoso u lenga ku uoma, ua kà di bhala mu dikungu; o ió u tunda mu dikungu, ua kà fua bhu dibhebhe; mukonda nga-nda kubheka ku thandu dié, ku thandu dia Mouabhe, o muvu uê ua ku mu zungila, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah48:45 A kexile mu kulenga, nguzu jabhu ia a sukamena mu kilembeketa kia Hexebone; maji túbhia tua tundu mu Hexebone, ni mulengu mu kaxi ka Sihone, ua jikinisa thungi ja Mouabhe ni nguzu ia iiala ia bhumu." 
Jeremiah48:46 Eie Mouabhe, kokolo dié! Kifuẋi kia Kamu kia jimi! Mukonda anʼê a mala ala jihutile, anʼê a ahatu ala ku ubhika." 
Jeremiah48:47 Maji kua kà suka izuua, kikexilu kia Mouabhe nga kà ki lungulula, jihutile jê ja kà vutuka dingi, mu kizuua kia sukidila, Jihova ua ki tange katé bhabha bhene bhua suku o difundisilu dia Mouabhe." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ku mbandu ia anʼa Amone, Jihova uambe kiki; Manhi Izalaiele ua kambe anʼa mala, mba jindundu? Mukonda diahi-phe, Malkane muene ua lundula Ngade, o Kifuẋi kiê ia a tungu mu jimbanza jêʼmuene?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Uila kiki, Jihova uixi: Talesa, izuua í iza, mu Labáh dia anʼa Amone, nganda kuivisa-mu kikoue kia ita, anga mu di bhanga ndunji ja maxita o ididi iê ia tumina jinga a ka ioha mu túbhia; anga Izalaiele ua kà lundula oso a mu lundula muene, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah49:3 Dila kala kimbungu, eie Hexebone, kuma Hai a mu sengulula; di kodienu, enu mu anʼa Labáh, di kutienu idinhaji bhu kinhonga, tenu jingololo, muende ni kuimajana mu ikanzu; kuma Malkane ua-nda kuia ku ubhika kumoxi ni jinganga jé ni ilamba iê." 
Jeremiah49:4 Mukonda diahi u di ximanena jihonga, jihonga jé ja uabha kinéne, eie monʼa kilumba ua ẋinuka, eie ua dielela ku jimbongo jé, uixi: Nanhi muene uiza mu kuzoka nʼeme?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Tala-ze; nga-nda kubheka kiteketela ku thandu dié, kia eneʼoso a ku kala mu jimbandu jé, kiene kiambe Ngana, Jihova dia Huxi; anga a kà mi takuila ku kanga, kala muthu a kà mu lunduila ku pholo, ki bhua ká kala uongeka uoso ua jimbidila." 
Jeremiah49:6 Maji ki a-nda kuzubha ku bhita iosuʼiii, jihutile, jʼanʼa Amone, nga-nda kua kà a vutula dingi, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ku mbandu ia Idomo, Jihova dia Huxi, uambe kiki: Mbé mu Temane kana-mu dingi kuijiia? Mulongi iuná ua athu ejiia ki uala-mu dingi? O kuijiia kuâ kua tumbuluka kiá?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Lengenu, Vutukenu, mu tunge mua zongo, enu mua tunga mu Dedane, mukonda eme nga bheka kibuika kia Izaú ku thandu diê mu kithangana ki nga mu zungila." 
Jeremiah49:9 Se akua kumuna ejiie kokué, kʼeje kuxisa manonena? Se miii, mʼusuku, kʼeje ku ku nhana ue kioso kia a soko?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Maji eme Izaú nga mu zula, nga tukulula o masuamenu mê, ka-nda kutena dingi kusuama; muiji uê ua senguluka, kiene kimoxi ue ni jiphange jê ni jinzukame jê, o muene ue ka moneka dingi." 
Jeremiah49:11 Jihukunhi jé xisa naju, eme ngʼa bhaka ku muenhu; o atudiʼé a-nda ku ngi dielela eme." 
Jeremiah49:12 Mukonda Jihova uambe, kiki: Talesa, kuma iá ka a xindile kúnua kopho, a-nda ku i nua muene iene ioso, eie anga u subhukʼé muene? Kana, ka kambe ku ku belesa muene, eie ue uanda ku i nua." 
Jeremiah49:13 Mukonda nga di lokela eme-muene-muène, eme ngi Jihova, kuila Bozola ua kà di bhanga kima ki kakukisa, ni lusebu, ni dibuikilu, ni kisunji; o jimbnonge jê joso ja kà di bhanga jingundu ji nangenena." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ngʼevu fuenge ia tundu kua Jihova, kuila a tumikisa mukunji ku akua jixi, phala ku a tangela, kuila: Bhongolokenu muize mu kuzoka-nê, balumukenu mu lue ita." 
Jeremiah49:15 Kuma, talesa, nga ku bhange u ndenge muʼaxaxe ka Huxi, mu kizomba kia athu, eie a ku sebulula." 
Jeremiah49:16 O ku dizangeleka kué ni ku di temeneka kua muẋima ué kua ku nganala kiavulu. Eie ua tunga mu mabànda ku matadi, ua tulama bhu thala dia milundu, né-mbé kikalanga kié u ki ta bhua dileka kala holokoko, hanji, kuenhoko kuene ku nga-nda ku ku lundumuna, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah49:17 Kienhiki, Idomo ua-nda ku kala kima kia kidiuanu; uoso-uoso u bhita bhu mbandu iê ua-nda kudiuana anga u xika muphióphio mukonda dia mabhebhu mê." 
Jeremiah49:18 Ua kèla kala bhu kibuika kia Sodoma ni Ngomola ni iá a zukamene na-u, kiene kia tange Jihova; ki bhua kà moneka uoso u tunga bhobho, monʼa muthu u tunga bhobho ka moneka." 
Jeremiah49:19 Kuma mukuá ni hoji ki i tunda ni kubanda ku Njolodá, iendela kubula dibhata dia dizonda; mbata mu kithangana kiofele ngó, bhua kexile ngi mu kaiesa-bhu, o ngi mu sola eme nanhi, ni ngi mu te ditala dia ku mu tumina? Mukonda, nanhi ua di fuangana nʼeme? Nanhi u ngi xindila kithangana? Mubidi nanhi u tena kuimana bhu pholo iami?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Kala kiki, ivuenu kaiula ka Jihova, ka tange muene kua Idomo; ni ixinganeku ia thulu iê, mu kuzoka ni iá a tungu bhu Temane; mbata ni kidi kiene, o jindenge mu kilunga ja-nda kua kà a sunga-sunga; kuma ni kidi muene, mabhata mâ ua kà ma senguluila ku thandu diâ." 
Jeremiah49:21 O mu kulundumuka kuê, o kibazu kiê, ngongo ia tunguta; o mutendu uê katé ni ku Kalunga ka Kusuka a uivu o kinuminu." 
Jeremiah49:22 Tala-phe, ua kà banda kala holokoko, u tuka, uoleka mabhabha mê ku thandu dia Bozola; o muẋima ua mazonda ma Idomo, mu kizuuʼokio, ua kèla kala muẋima ua muhetu uala bhu mika ia kuvuala." 
Jeremiah49:23 Bhu kaxi ni Damasku. Ni Hamate ni Alapade sonhi ja a kuata; o kievu njimbu ja ibha, mueza kuambuka; ku musanza ua kalunga kuala phaxi; kutululuka ki ku moneka." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasku ua iokojoka; ue te-ku dikunda phala kulenga, kiteketela kia mu kuata; kimbuua ni misusu ia mu tambula mukutu uoso kala muhatu ua mu vuala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Mbonge ia fumana, mbonge ia ditonokenu diami, kiki a i ehelela ku i ehelela kuahi ngó!?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Kala kiki, minzangala iê ia mala ia kà tembujukila mu nzunga; o makuenze oso a ita mu kizuuʼokio a kà jikinina, kiene kia tange Jihova dia Ifuẋi" 
Jeremiah49:27 Anga nga kà uika túbhia mu lumbu lua Damasku, tuene hé tua kà jikatesa mazemba oso a Bene-Hadade." 
Jeremiah49:28 Kialulukila Kedale ni kia bilukila mautuminu ma Hazole, a buikisa Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, Jihova uambe kiki: Balumukenu mu bande mu kuzoka ni Kedale; ana oso a tokala ku Thunda buikisenu na-u." 
Jeremiah49:29 Jibalaka jâ a ka a bhunda-ju ni ibhaku iâ, ni jikolotina jâ, ni ingolongondo iâ ioso, ni jikamelu jâ a kà jʼambata phala ene; hé a ká a kolela, exi: ku mbandu joso kuala uoma!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Ndokuenu, lengenu, sandukenu dikanga, mu tunge mua zongo, enu mua tunga bhu Hazole, kiene kiambe Jihova, mukonda Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, ua mi te kikutu kia ufe, iú ua xinganeka ku mi bhanga phulu." 
Jeremiah49:31 Balumukenu mu bande mu kúlua ni muiji ua tululuka, ua tunga ua soma Jihova ua ki tange, muiji ki u moneka mabhitu mba makumba, kuma ene a tunguʼâ ngó." 
Jeremiah49:32 O jikamelu jâ ja-nda ku kala mbole, o ndumba ia ibhaku iâ, ia-nda ku kituka ngó ima ia kubhunda; anga ngi muangena ku itembu ioso, ió oso a a bhutu o jindemba bhu jihota jâ, o ku mbandu joso nga-nda ku a bhekela kibuika, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah49:33 Bheneʼobho, Hazole ua-nda ku kituka tungilu dia midikixi, ngùndu i nangenena; ki bhua kà kala u tunga-mu mba monʼa muthu u bhanga-mu dibhata." 
Jeremiah49:34 O kizuelu kia Jihova, kieza kua Jelemiia, polofeta, ku mbandu ia Elame, mu dimatekenu dia utuminu ua Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, kiexi:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Jihova dia Ifuẋi uambe kiki: Tala, hádia mufula ua Elame nga-nda ku u bukula, o mufula ua nguzu iê kiá muene." 
Jeremiah49:36 Hé ngi bheka kua Elame o itembu i uana ia thungi ji uana ja diulu, ene anga ngʼa uanena kua tungu o itembu iuana ienhiʼii; ki bhua kà kala ixi mu kamba kuiza jingômbo ja lenge ku Elame." 
Jeremiah49:37 Hádia ngi bhangesa Elame ku kala ni uoma bhu pholo ia jinguma jê, ni bhu pholo ia oso a bhindamena ku mu jibha; nga-nda ku bheka hadi ku thandu diâ, ni kutema kua njinda iami, eme ngi Jihova, nganda kutumikisa xibhata iia ni ku a kaiela katé ki i zubha ku a jimisa o mbutu." 
Jeremiah49:38 Anga kiandu kiami ngi ki ta mu Elame; ni sobha ni ilamba iê ngʼa sengulula-mu, ka kala-mu dingi, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kia kà kala phe kiki, kuila mu kizuua kia kà sukidila-ku, kiene ki nga kà bhangesa ku vutuka jihutile ja Elame, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah50:1 O kizuelu kia zuela Jihova ku mbandu ia Babilonha ni ku mbandu ia ixi ia jikaldeu, mu kuzokanâ, kua Jelemiia polofeta, uixi:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Tangenu-kiu mu kaxi ka akua jixi. Ambenu-kiu a kʼivue, lekenu muene o mvela ambenu-kiu a kʼivue, kana ku ki sueka, kuila: Babilonha a mu tolola kiá, Bele ua tandanganha, Melodake a mu bhiti ku thandu, o iteka iâ sonhi ja a kuata, jinzambi jâ ja dibhale bhoxi." 
Jeremiah50:3 Mukonda kua muʼendela muiji ua kusuku ueza mu kuzoka-nê, ua-nda kubhangesa kuila ixi iê i kituka ixi ia ngùnzu, ki i moneka uoso u tunga-mu; tundé ku muthu tulé ku iama ene oso a lenge, aii muene, lalá!" 
Jeremiah50:4 Jihova uixi: Mu izuuʼomo ni kithanganʼokio, anʼa Izalaiele a kʼèza, ni ene ni anʼa Juda kumoxi; mu kuiza kuâ, a kʼèla ia enda ia dila, mu kusota Jihova Nzambi iâ." 
Jeremiah50:5 A kʼèbhula njila ia Ziione, kueneʼoko kuene kua talela jipholo jâ; hádia a kʼèza anga a kà di bunda kua Jihova mu kikutu ki nangenena kia bhingi ki mungu dingi a ki jimba." 
Jeremiah50:6 Kifuẋi kiami kia di bhangele kala mbudi ja jimbidila, tubhila tuâ ene muene a ji tondalesa, a jiʼehelela kutexika mu milundu; a tunda mulundu eza mulundu ni kuenda, a jimbi kididi kiâ kia kunhohena." 
Jeremiah50:7 Eneʼoso a kexi muʼia ni ku ji bonga, aia ni ku ji diʼâ; o jinguma jâ aia ni kutanga, exi: Ki tuandu kala-ku ni kikuma; mukonda ene a te kituxi kua Jihova, uene o Kibuta kia Kuiuka; xi, kua Jihova, o Kidielelesu kia jitata jâ." 
Jeremiah50:8 Mu kaxi ka Babilonha lengenu-mu, mu tunde mu ixi ia jikaldeu; muile kala ilumbe ia jimbudi bhu pholo ia kilunga." 
Jeremiah50:9 Mukonda, tala, eme nga-nda kufundumuna ni kutumikisa, kifuẋi kia miji iònene, akua ixi ia kusuku, a kà di iudika mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, bheneʼobho a ka mu tolola muene; o misongo ia mifula iâ ia kèla kala ia kiiala kia dizonda; né umoxi ngó ki u vutuka ua kambe kubhanga kima." 
Jeremiah50:10 O Kaldeia ua kà di bhanga mbole; ene oso a kà mu bhunda-bhunda hé ki a kuma, kiene kiambe Jihova." 
Jeremiah50:11 Mukonda mua sanguluka, mua tuka-tuka ni kutana, enu mua bhunda-bhunda o undundu uami! Anga mu di nanukisa kala kangombe ka nete, muia ni kuthúlula kala jikabalu ja nguzu." 
Jeremiah50:12 Kizuua mamʼenu ua-nda kutandanganha kiavulu! Ió ua mi vuala, hádia sonhi ji mu kuata! Tala, ua-ndu kala uene kiá o muiji ua suku kuema dia akuâ, u di bhanga kikangalakata, ixi ia kukuta, ia biluka ngùndu, muda huhúm!" 
Jeremiah50:13 Mukonda dia njinda ia Jihova, ki mua kà kala muthu u tunga-mu, maji ia kà kituka ixi ia kibuika ngó, kuabhu; uoso u bhita mu Babilonha ua kà diuana, anga u xika muixi kia mona o mabhebhu mê moso." 
Jeremiah50:14 Anuʼenuʼoso muʼoleka o mufula, di iudikienu phala Babilonha mu mu kondoloke; mu muʼasa muene, misongo kana ku i mamena, mukonda ua te kituxi kua Jihova." 
Jeremiah50:15 Te-nu nzongo ia kuzoka-nê! Mu kondolokienu! Muene ue ua tolokʼê kiá! Madisesa mê ma lundumuka, o imbaka iê iòbule. Mukonda iii iene o phonzo ia Jihova; mu vutuidienu ditota; kioso kia bhange muene kiene ki mu mu bhanga ue." 
Jeremiah50:16 Uoso u kuna ni ió uoso uambata kibholola bhu thembu ia kumuna, mu Babilonha mu tukudienumu; mukonda dia xibhata ia bhinjika, kala muthu ua-nda ku vutukila ku kifuẋi kiê, o muthu ni muthu anga u lengela ku ixi iâ." 
Jeremiah50:17 Izalaiele ua soko ni mbudi ia jimbila; a mu kaiesa kuala jihoji; sobha ia Asídia muene ua dianga ku mu dia; o kua suku kunu, Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, muene ua mu bukula o ifuba." 
Jeremiah50:18 Kala kiki, Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe kiki: Tala, sobha ia Babilonha nga-nda ku mu zungila, ni muene ni ixi iê, kala ki nga zungila sobha ia Asídia." 
Jeremiah50:19 Anga Izalaiele ngi mu vutukisa mu kibuta kiê, hé ua kà di dikila ku mulundu ua Kalamelu ni ua Baxane; muenhu uê anga uikutila ku mulundu ua Ifalaimi ni ua Ngiliiade." 
Jeremiah50:20 Mu izuuʼomo ni mu kithanganʼokio, Jihova uixi, kuiibha kua Izalaiele a-nda kuà ku sota, maji ki kuanda kumoneka dingi; ni ituxi ia Juda ue, maji ki ia kà moneka; kuma eme nga-nda kuloloka oso u ngi xisa masubhu." 
Jeremiah50:21 Banda mu kuzoka ni Melataimi, banda u zoke-nê, ni iá ue a tungu bhu Pekode; jimisa muene o mbutu, sengulula ioso kuema diâ, Jihova ua ki tange, u bhange ioso kala ki nga ku tumu." 
Jeremiah50:22 Munumango ua ita uala mu ngongo ni kibuika kia dikota! 
Jeremiah50:23 Kiṗhuṗhilu kia ixi ioso a ki batula, a ki bukujula, tata! Babilonha ua kituka kiebhi kidiuanu mu kaxi ka miji!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Nga ku tela mabhebhe, eie uafu-mu muene, Babilonha! Eie phe ku kʼijidile! A ku bongo, iá a ku kuata, mukonda eie ua di metena kuzoka ni Jihova." 
Jeremiah50:25 Jihova ua jikula mu dilundilu diê, iú ua katula-mu ingolongondo ia kutema kuê; mbata Jihova, Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta; uala ni kikalakalu kia kubhanga mu ixi ia akua Kaldeia." 
Jeremiah50:26 Zenu-phe mu lue-nê, tundenu muene ku maẋokololo aʼxi, jikulenu-phe inganja iê, ixi ioso titidilenu-iu mukuâ ni iangu, sengululenu-iu muene iene ioso: ki bhu kale kima ki mu subhuka." 
Jeremiah50:27 Tungombe tuê tuoso jibhenu-tu ni xibhata, kulumukenu bhu dijibhilu: kokolo diâ! Mukonda o kizuua kiâ kieza-bhu, ni kithangana kiâ kia ku a zungila!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Dienhidi diene o dízui dia iá a lenge, ia a bhulaka mu ixi ia Babilonha, mbé nʼa di jimbule mu Ziione o phonzo ia Jihova, Nzambi ietu, o phonzo ia Tembulu iê." 
Jeremiah50:29 Babilonha mu bhongoluedienu oso akua kuasa ni misongo, oso ejiia kuoleka o mufula, a zoke-nê; mu tedienu ndala-mbuta mu jimbandu, phala ki bhu kale muthu u lenga-mu; mu futienu kala kia fuama o ikalakalu iê, kioso kia bhange muene, kiene ue ki mu mu bhanga; kuma ua di zangelekele mu kuzoka ni Jihova, mu kuzoka ni Ukola mua Izalaiele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Kala kiki minzangala iê ia mala a-nda ku fuila mu jinzunga; o makuenziʼê oso a ita bhu kizuuʼokio, a-nda ku a vuza, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah50:31 Kiki-phe, tala, nga ku lungulukila, eie nʼa mama dia ukumbu! Jihova, Nzambi ia Ilombo Ieta ua ki tange: mukonda kizuua kié kieza-bhu, o kithangana kié ki nga-nda ku ku zungila." 
Jeremiah50:32 Kienhiki, nʼa kaukumbu, ua-nda ku di bhukana anga u di bhala, u mu balumuna ka-nda ku moneka; anga jimbanza jê ngi ji ta mu túbhia, tuene anga tuoha katé mu jimbandu jê joso." 
Jeremiah50:33 Jihova dia Ifuẋi uambe kiki: Anʼa Izalaiele ni anʼa Juda a a talesa o hadi kumoxi; o ió oso ambata anʼa Izalaiele ku ubhika, a a bhake muene, nguâ kua eha." 
Jeremiah50:34 Maji-phe o Mukudi uâ, Kindanda; Jihova dia Uombo Ieta; diene o dijina diê, ni kidi kiene o mvunda iâ ua-nda ku i bhânga, phala ixi nʼa i bhane o kunhoha, ni kuzukutisa iá a tungu mu Babilonha." 
Jeremiah50:35 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia akua Kaldeia, Jihova ua ki tange, ni ku thandu dia ia a tungu mu Babilonha, ni ku makota mê ma jingana ni ku jingijiie jê." 
Jeremiah50:36 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza kua oso a tanga o makutu, anga a kà kituka ioua; xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku mazonda mê, anga a kàia ku kiambu." 
Jeremiah50:37 O xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia jikabalu jâ ni ku thandu dia makalu mâ ni ku thandu dia kifuẋi kia athu a di bundu kumoxi mu kaxi kâ; ene-phe a kà di bhanga kala ahetu; xibhata ia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia jimbongo jâ, a kà ji bhunda-bhunda." 
Jeremiah50:38 Kikukute kia kà laukila ku thandu dia menha mâ, anga ma kukuta; mukonda iala ixi ia iteka ia kusonga, o ene phe ala ni kuthathamana mukonda dia iteka iâ." 
Jeremiah50:39 Kiene kia-ndo bhekesa kuila mu tunga ngó iama ia ixi ia kisekele ni iama ia mukáu mu ikolo; ni i minzoue muene ue mu ia kà tunga; ki mungu dingi mua kà kala athu, mba kutungamu, ku tunda muiji kuiza muiji." 
Jeremiah50:40 Mukuá ni Nzambi kia jikinisa Sodoma ni Ngomola ni jimbanza ja zukamene na-ju, kiene kimoxi ue momo ki mua kà kala u tunga-mu, mba monʼa muthu u tá-mu dibhata, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah50:41 Tala, ku suku kua-ndo tunda kifuẋi kia muiji ua dikota; sobha ja nguzu ja-nda ku tunda muene ku maẋokololo mu jimbandu jaʼxi." 
Jeremiah50:42 A ka kuata mifula ni madionga bhu maku; athu a di kake, kʼejiia ku kuatela henda; dízui diâ dia kà numina kala musanza ua kalunga, a kʼendela ku jikabalu mukuá ni muthu u lengela kuia ku ita, mu kuzoka nʼeie, monʼa kilumba ua Babilonha." 
Jeremiah50:43 Sobha ia Babilonha uevu fuma iâ, o maku mê iá a botomoka; kimbuua kia mu kuata, kua muiza misusu, kala muhatu ua-nda ku vuala." 
Jeremiah50:44 Talesa, umoxi uila kala hoji, uanda kubanda ni hungulule ia Njolodá, uendela dibhata dia dizonda, maji muʼanzanzʼumu nga-nda ku mu kaiesa-bhu; uoso nga mu solo eme muene ngi mu ta-bhu mu kuzoka-nê; mbata nanhi ua di fu nʼEme? Nanhi muene u ngʼixana eme mu kufunda? Nanhi muene o mubidi u tena kuimana bhu pholo iami?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Kala kiki, ivuenu kaiula ka Jihova ka te mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, ni ixinganeku iê ia kanena na-iu ixi ia akua Kaldeia, uixi, ni kidi muene, ka kilunga né kòfele, kʼaia muene ni ku a kuka, kuma dibhata diâ hádia di xala ngùndu kidi muene." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ixi ia teketa ku kinuminu kia Babilonha kioso kia mu tolola; o kudikola kuê a kuʼivu mu kaxi ka miji ioso. 
Jeremiah51:1 Jihova uambe kiki: Tala, hádia ngi fundumuna kitembu ki buikisa, mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, ni mu kuzoka ni ió a tungu mu kaxi ka iá ene ku ngi balukila eme." 
Jeremiah51:2 Hádia ngi tumikisa akua kubhiata, mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, anga a mu bhiata muene, o mavu mê anga a ma lundulula; kuma bhu kizuua kiê kia kubhondalala a kà mu konda ku mbandu joso." 
Jeremiah51:3 O muasi a misongo oleke mufula uê mu kuzoka ni iú uejiia ue kuoleka o mufula, ni mu kuzoka ni íú ua dielela o kivunga-thulu kiê; o minzangala iê ia mala kana ku i kuatela henda; o kifuẋi kiê kioso kia masoladi jikinisenu-kiu muene." 
Jeremiah51:4 Hádia a fuila mu ixi ia akua Kaldeia, a a tomena mu jinzunga." 
Jeremiah51:5 Mukonda Izalaiele ni Juda ka ehelela luua kuala Nzambi iâ, kua Jihova dia Ifuẋi, némbe hanji oxi iâ izala ni ikuma bhu pholo ia ió Ukola mua Izalaiele." 
Jeremiah51:6 Mu kaxi ka Babilonha lengenu-mu! O muthu ni muthu a bhulule muenhu uê. Ki mu di jikinise anuʼenu mu ku ibha kuêmuène; mukonda o kiki kiene o kithangana kia phonzo ia Jihova; Muene hádia u mu bhana kioso kia mu fuama. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilonha ua di bhangele kala kopho ia ulu bhu lukuaku lua Jihova, ia kexe mu ku kodiuisa o ngongo ioso; ku vinhu iê kuene kuanu akua jixi; kiene kia bhangesa miji ioso kudianguka." 
Jeremiah51:8 Maji mu kithangana kimoxi, Babilonha ua di bhale iú ua senguluka; mu didienu, mu kuate maji ma dizumba mbé o misusu iê, sumba u di sanza." 
Jeremiah51:9 Kuma Babilonha tuandelele ku mu saka nʼa disanze maji muene ua lémbua kudisanza; muʼambudisienu, kala muthu aie ku ixi iê; mbata difundisilu diê dia bhixila ku diulu, dia di leka tulé ku matuta a suku-ku bhulu." 
Jeremiah51:10 O kulunga kuetu, Jihova ua ku bheka mu mukengeji; zenu, nda tu ki tange mu Ziione, o kikalakalu kia Jihova, Nzambi ietu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Zelesenu misongo, o ivunga-thulu iudikenu-iu muene kiambote; Jihova ua phaphumuna miẋima ia jisobha ja Mediia; mbata kia mu kala miẋima mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, o ku muanga kuene; mukonda iii iene o phonzo ia Jihova, o ditota dia Tembulu iê." 
Jeremiah51:12 Olekenu dibandela ku thandu dia imbaka ia Babilonha, kilangidilu ki kole, tenu alangidi, iudikenu mibhetu; mukonda Jihova ua xinganeka iú ua bhange kala kiambele ku mbandu ia iá a tungu mu Babilonha." 
Jeremiah51:13 Eie, tata! Ua tunga ku thandu dia menha ma ndumba, uezala ni jimbongo ja vulu! Zubhilu dié dia bhixila, kala o kizongelu kia unjenje ué!" 
Jeremiah51:14 Jihova dia Ifuẋi ua di lokela muenemuène, uixi: Ni kidi kiene nga-nda ku kuizalesa ni athu kala uombe, ene à kʼemba ni kutana ku thandu dié-eie." 
Jeremiah51:15 Kuma muene ua bhange o ixi ni kutena kuê, o ngongo iú ua mu i tumina ni kuijiia kuê, iú ua zale o diulu mu unjimu uê." 
Jeremiah51:16 Muene kia di ta mutendu mu kuivisa dízui diê, diulu dioso dizala kilungutu kia menha, mbundu iia ni kutukumuka tundé kua suku oxi; Muene ua bhange o jinzaji mbé o mvula, anga u katula kitembu mu malundilu mê." 
Jeremiah51:17 Bheneʼobho-phe athu a tobha, kuijiia a ku lémbua; akua kusula iteka ia kuseta, ene oso sonhi ja a kuata; mukonda o iteka iâ ia utadi ua kuzunza iala makutu, kuma kana-bhu né kiteka kimoxi ngó kiala ni muenhu moxi diê." 
Jeremiah51:18 Kuma iteka kingoho, a i kalakela kutobhesa ngó athu; hádia bhu kithangana ki nga-nda ku i zungila, ioso i jikinina." 
Jeremiah51:19 Dikanda dia Jakobo-phe ki kiene ki dia di fu; mukonda Muene muene ua bhange o ima ioso; o Izalaiele uene o muiji ua undundu uê; Jihova dia Ilombo Ita, diene o dijina diê." 
Jeremiah51:20 Eie eie u kiṗhuṗhilu kiami, eie u mata mami ma ita, ngi sasujula miji ioso ni eie, sobha joso ngi ji sengulula nʼeie." 
Jeremiah51:21 Ni kabalu ni iú ua sambela-ku ngʼa sasujula nʼeie; ni dikalu ni uoso uia mu dikalu ngʼa sasujula nʼeie. 
Jeremiah51:22 Ni diiala ni múhetu ngʼa sasujula ni eie; ni munzangala ni ua kuka ngʼa sasujula nʼeie; ni munzangala ua diiala ni kilumba kia muzeletete ngʼa sasujula nʼeie. 
Jeremiah51:23 Mubidi ni kilunga kiê nga kà a sasujula ni eie; kidimakaji ni ngombe jê jiiadi nga kà a sasujula nʼeie; jikabhitangu ni atumini nga kà a sasujula nʼeie. 
Jeremiah51:24 Anga mua kà ki mona ku mesuʼenu, kioso Babilonha ni ene oso a tungu mu Kaldeia, ki nga-nda ku a futa o ufusa uâ uoso ua bhanga jinga mu Ziione, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah51:25 Eme bhabhʼú, mu kuzoka nʼeie, eie u mulundu ua kimuanga u muanga ixi ioso, Jihova ua ki tange; lukuaku luami ngi lu sunununa mu kuzoka nʼeie, ngi kumbolomuena muene ku matadi, anga ngi ku bhanga mulundu ua túbhia." 
Jeremiah51:26 Momuʼè ka kà katula-mu ditadi dia thungi mba ditadi dia ku tela madisesa, mukonda eie ua kà kituka o ngùndu i nangenena; kiene kia tange Jihova." 
Jeremiah51:27 Lekenu o mvela mu ngongo, mbungu xikenu-iu mu kaxi ka akua jixi; akua jixi a di zelese phala kuzoka-nê; bhongololenu mautuminu ma Alalate, ni Mini, ni Xikena, mu kuzoka-nê; mu kuzoka-nê katulenu kilolo, o jikabalu ji muʼendele muene mukua ni uombe ua salumuna." 
Jeremiah51:28 Zelesenu akua jixi mu kuzoka-nê: ni jisobha ja Mediia ni tubhitangu tuê ni ilamba iê ioso ni ixi ioso ia utuminu uê. 
Jeremiah51:29 Kieneʼokio-phe o ixi ia kà teketa, mbata o ixinganeku ioso ia Jihova ia nguzu mu kuzoka ni Babilonha, phala kubhangesa kuila ixi ia Babilonha i kala ngùndu ki i mono athu a tunga-mu." 
Jeremiah51:30 O mazonda a Babilonha kubhânga a kuʼeha, a di jikila mu imbaka, nguzu iâ ia zondo, a biluka kala ahetu; o mabhata mâ a mʼoha mu túbhia, sabhi jâ a ji bukujula." 
Jeremiah51:31 Muambatiʼa mikanda ua kà lenga mu ku takana ni muambatiʼa mikanda ua kamukuá, o mukunji mu ku takana ni mukunji ni mukuá, phala ku ki tangela sobha ia Babilonha kuila o mbanza ié a i tambula kiá mu jimbandu joso." 
Jeremiah51:32 O matabhu a kuvuua a ma xitila, o iangu a iʼoha mu túbhia; o makuenze oso a ita, uoma ua a kuata." 
Jeremiah51:33 Mukonda Jihova dia Ifuẋi, Nzambi ia Izalaiele, uambe uixi: O monʼa kilumba ua Babilonha uedi kala dizanzu (kienda) bhu kumbi dia kuvunda jimbutu; kua mu xala ngó kithangana kumbi dia kumuna di bhixila." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha ua ngi di kihabula, ua ngi diota-diota, ua ngi bhange ngi kitutu kia hatu, ua ngi minha mukuá ni kimudikixi iú uezalesa vumu diê ni kikexilu kiami kia ujitu; iu ua ngi kaiela bhu kanga." 
Jeremiah51:35 O kusuina kua ngi bhange eme ni xitu iami, kuize ku thandu dia Babilonha, ua tunga mu Ziione a ki tange; o manhinga mami ma laúkile ku thandu dia iâ a tungu mu Kaldeia, Jeluzaleme a ki tange." 
Jeremiah51:36 Uila kiki Jihova uambe: Tala, mvunda ié nga-nda ku i bhânga, nganda kuvutula phonzo ku phonzo ia ku tate eie; o musanza uê ngi u kukutisa, o otho iê ngi i bhuisa-ku." 
Jeremiah51:37 O Babilonha anga u kituka maxita, u di bhanga tungilu dia jinhoka ja ibha, kisunji, mu ku mu mona athu a xika muphióphio, ni umoxi ngó u tunga-mu ka moneka." 
Jeremiah51:38 A kà kumuina kumoxi kala minzangala ia jihoji; a kà di zumina muene kala tuana tua jihoji. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ki a-nda kuila a salumuka eme ngʼa bhana kúnua kuâ, hé ngʼa kodiuisa phala nʼende ni kutuka-tuka; maji hádia a kà zeka kilu kia muiokoioko, ki mungu dingi a tona, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah51:40 Nga-nda ku a kulumuisa kala jimbudi jiia bhu dijibhilu, mukua ni ilumbe ia jimbudi ni isutu ia jihombo." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sezake a mu tambula, tata! O matunda ma ixi ioso a ma kuata muene mu kitukumuise! Babilonha ua di bhange kisunji mu kaxi ka akua jixi," 
Jeremiah51:42 O musanza ua kalunga ua bande ku thandu dia Babilonha, ndumba ia mabhuku ma kalunga ia mu vungina." 
Jeremiah51:43 Jimbanza jê joso ja kituka bhoxi-mavu, ixi ia kukuta, ia di bhange kikangalakata, ixi ki i moneka uoso u tunga-mu, mba mu bhita ngó monʼa muthu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Hádia Bele mu Babilonha, nga-nda ku mu zungila, o ioso ia minha mu kanu diê nga-nda ku mu katula-iu, akua jixi ki mungu dingi aia ni kuia kokué; o kimbaka ue kia Babilonha kia di bhale." 
Jeremiah51:45 Enu mu mundu uami, mu kaxi ka Babilonha tundenu-mu, muthu ni muthu a bhulule o muenhu uê, mukonda dia kiaúla kia njinda ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah51:46 O miẋima ki i mi titile mba mu kala ni uoma ua kibulukutu ki muʼivua mu ngongo; mbata mua-nda kuila kuiza muvu ni kibulukutu kiê, o ki kuiza muvu ua mukuá ni kibulukutu kia mukuâ; mu ngongo mua kà kala usueia, mutumini u zoka ni mutumini ua mukuá." 
Jeremiah51:47 Uila kiki, izuua í iza, i nga-nda kuzungila o iteka ia kusonga ia Babilonha, o ixi iê ioso ia kà kala ni jisonhi; o ió oso a mu tokala a a tubujula, a kà di bhalela muene mu kaxi kê." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ni diulu ni ixi, ni ioso iala na-iu, ia kà tana mu ku mona Babilonha; mukonda ku suku kuene kua-nda ku muʼijila oso a-nda ku mu muangamuanga, Jihova ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah51:49 Kala Babilonha kia bhangesa ku dibhala jithomiue ja Izalaiele, kiene ue mu Babilonha kia kà dibhala jithomiue mu ixi ioso." 
Jeremiah51:50 Enu-phe mua subhuka ku xibhata ndénuʼenu, ki muʼimane; ku makanga kuenhoko lembalalenu Jihova, o Jeluzaleme aie ni kubanda ku miẋima ienu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Mua kà kiʼamba, kuila: Sonhi ja tu kuata muene mukonda tua sebuluka; pholo ia tuʼizala jisonhi, mbata kueza akua jixi jengi mu mabhezelu a kola a inzu ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah51:52 Uila kiki, Jihova uambe, uixi: Kua-nda kuiza izuua i nga kà zungila o iteka iâ ia kusonga; o ixi iê ioso ia kʼezala ni kukema kua ió oso a a kubula." 
Jeremiah51:53 Mukonda nê-mbe hanji o Babilonha u banda katé ku diulu mba u kolesa o kitala kia kimbaka kiê, kokuami muene hanji kuene ku tunda oso a mu tulukila phala ku mu muanga, Jihova ua kiʼambe." 
Jeremiah51:54 O nzôngo ia kudikola a ivu mu Babilonha, ni ia kibuika kia dikota mu ixi ia akua Kaldeia;" 
Jeremiah51:55 mukonda Jihova ua jimisa Babilonha, ua-nda kubhangesa kuila momuê dízui dia dikota di jima-mu ue; anga o mabhuku mé ma kà zuma kala kilungutu kia menha ma vulu; o kinuminu kia dízui diê a-nda ku kʼivua muene." 
Jeremiah51:56 Mukonda o mubuikixi ua-nda ku muʼendela, ua-nda kuendela Babilonha, o mazonda mê ua kà ma kuta, o mifula iâ ua i bukujula kiá; mukonda Jihova, Nzambi uavu o futu, ua kà mu vutuila kioso kia fuama." 
Jeremiah51:57 Nga kà kodiuisa o ilamba iê, ni jinjimu jê, ni jikabhitangu jê, ni makota mê ma jinganga, ni mazonda mê; hé a ká zeka kilu ki nangenena, ki mungu dingi a tona; Sobha ua bhingi dijina diê Jihova dia Ilombo Ieta muene ua ki tange." 
Jeremiah51:58 Jihova phe, dia Ilombo Ieta, uambe kiki: O imbaka ia zanze ia Babilonha hádia a kà i bula muene iene ioso, o mabhitu mê ma lebha kiambote ma kà uama mu túbhia; anga ifuẋi ia kà kalakala mu kingoho, o miji ia kà xikamena ngó phala túbhia, hé ia kà iokojoka muene." 
Jeremiah51:59 O kizuelu kia tumikisa Jelemiia, o polofeta, kua Selaia, monʼa Nediia, monʼa Mahaseia, kioso kia luʼia ku Babilonha kumoxi ni Zedekiia, sobha ia Juda, mu muvu ua kauana ua utuminu uê, anga Selaia u kala kilamba kia tululuka." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jelemiia hé u soneka mu divulu dibhebhu dioso dia-nda kuiza ku thandu dia Babilonha; maka oso enhá òʼsoneke kiá ku mbandu ia Babilonha. 
Jeremiah51:61 Jelemiia hé uambela Selaia, uixi: Kioso eie ki ua kà bhixila ku Babilonha, ua kà tala hé u tanga maka oso enhá." 
Jeremiah51:62 Hé ua kà zuela, uixi: Jihova, tata! Eie ua zuela ku mbandu ia kididi kiki, kuila ua-nda ku ki jimisa muene, katé ki bhu xala uoso u tunga-bhu, tundé ku muthu katé ku iama, maji ki biluka muene ngùndu i nangenena." 
Jeremiah51:63 Anga kia kà kala-phe kiki: Kioso eie ki ua kà zubha kiá kutanga o divulu didi, ua kà di kutila ku ditadi hé u di takuila mu kaxi ka ngiji ia Ufalate," 
Jeremiah51:64 hé uà kʼèla uixi: Kienhiki ue kia kà njoboka Babilonha, o kubalumuka ua kà ku lémbua, mukonda dia usuéia u nga-nda ku mu bhekela ku thandu diê. Akua Babilonha a kà lémbua muene. Bheneʼabha bhua suku o maka a Jelemiia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiia kioso kia hingi ungana, ua kexile mu makuinhi aiadi a mivu ni umoxi, iú uandeka kutumina, hé u tumina kuinhi dia mivu ni kamoxi mu Jeluzaleme; o dijina dia manhʼâ, a muʼila jinga exi Hamtale, monʼa Jelemiia dia Libina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Anga u bhanga ioso ia ibha ku mesu ma Jihova, kala ioso kiá ia bhanga jinga Nzuakí." 
Jeremiah52:3 Mukonda dia kienhiki-phe, anga ki bhita kuila, mukonda dia njinda ia Jihova ia kuatela Jeluzaleme ni Juda, Jihova ua a kaie bhu pholo iê; anga Zedekiia u lungulukila sobha ia Babilonha mu kuzoka-nê." 
Jeremiah52:4 Mu ku bhiẋila-phe mu muvu ua kávua, ua utuminu uê, bhu mbeji ia kakuinhi, mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeji kiene kieza Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha, mu kúlua ni Jeluzaleme, muene ni Kifuẋi kiê kioso kia masoladi anga a mu tela kibènge hé a mu kandeia jimbonge mu jimbandu joso." 
Jeremiah52:5 Mbonge anga a i konda kienhiki katé mu muvu ua kakuinhi ni umoxi ua utuminu ua sobha Zedekiia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Bhu mbeji ia kauana, ku kizuua kia kávua ku mbeji, kioso o nzala ki ia tundu kinéne mu mbonge, o Kifuẋi kia akuaʼxi kúdia a ku lémbua." 
Jeremiah52:7 Kiene kia jikula dizungu mu mbonge anga makuenze oso a mu lua ita hé a lenga, a tunda ni usuku, a di tela njila i lunga bhu dibhitu, bhu kaxi ka imbaka i iadi ia zukamene ni jindombe jà itulu ia sobha, anga a ila mu njila ia kuia ku kiphenza." 
Jeremiah52:8 Maji o Kifuẋi kia masoladi ma jikaldeu sobha a mu kaiela hé a mu kuatela mu kiphenza kia Jedikó, o Kifuẋi kiê kioso kia masoladi anga ki muangana makidikidi, a mu xa ubheka uê." 
Jeremiah52:9 O iá anga sobha a mu kuta, anga a mu bandesa kua sobha ia Babilonha, bhu Dibalah, mu ixi ia Hamate, bheneʼobho bhene muene bhua mu elesela." 
Jeremiah52:10 Anʼa Zedekiia anga a a batula mitue kuala sobha ia Babilonha, bhu mesuʼê muene; o ilamba ioso ia Juda anga u i batula ue mitue bhu Dibalah bhene." 
Jeremiah52:11 Anga u tufula o mesu a Zedekiia, u mu kuta ni malubhambu aiadi a ngondo; hé sobha ia Babilonha u mu ambata uia-nê ku Babilonha, anga u mu bhaka mu kiboiongo katé bhu kizuua kiê kia kufua." 
Jeremiah52:12 O bhu mbeji ia katanu, mu kizuua kia kakuinhi ku mbeji, (uenhu-phe uene o muvu ua kuinhi niʼvua, ua utuminu ua Nabukodonozolo, sobha ia Babilonha) kiene kieza Nebuzaladane, mu Jeluzaleme, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, ua kexile mu kunanga bhu pholo ia sobha ia Babilonha." 
Jeremiah52:13 Anga uoha inzu ia Jihova ni dizemba dia sobha, kumoxi ni jinzu joso mu Jeluzaleme; jinzu joso ja adiakime ua jiʼoha mu túbhia." 
Jeremiah52:14 O Kifuẋi kioso kia masoladi ma akua Kaldeia, kia kexile kumoxi ni kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, kia bulu imbaka ioso ia kondolokele Jeluzaleme." 
Jeremiah52:15 O jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu Kifuẋi, ni mbandu ia mundu ua xalele mu mbonge, ni iá a balukile ia a di tele kiá ku mbandu ia sobha ia Babilonha, ni iá a subhuka kua eneʼoso, Nebuzaladane kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, ua a kuika iú uai na-u." 
Jeremiah52:16 Maji ku jingadiama ja ngadiadia mu ixi, Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, uaxi-ku amoxi-moxi-mu phala kudima ji-úva ni kukala idimakaji iaʼxi." 
Jeremiah52:17 Jikaldeu inga a bula dingi o jiphiladi ja ngondo ja kexile mʼonzo ia Jihova, ni maxikikilu, ni musanza ua kalunga ua ngondo ua kexile mʼonzo ia Jihova, inga ngondo ioso a i ambata, aia na-iu ku Babilonha." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ambata ue ni jímbia, ni jipá, ni jingalufu, malonga a menha a pholo, ni jingutu, ni itutu ioso ia ngondo ia kubhangela ukunji mʼonzo ia Jihova." 
Jeremiah52:19 Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu anga u zangula ue ni jikopho, ni ididi ia kuohela uasu ua dizumba, ni malonga a menha a pholo, ni jímbia, ni jikandiielu, ni jingutu, ni itutu ia kutela maji ni mvindangele; kutale ima ioso ia ulu mu ulu, uixi ia phalata mu phalata." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ni jiphiladi jiiadi ni musanza umoxiʼèlele ua kalunga, ni kuinhi dia ngombe ni kiiadi ja ngondo ja kexile bhu kididi kia ibaka, o maxikikilu a iudikile sobha Solomá phala inzu ia Jihova; ima iosuʼiii, o ngondo iê, ka i pezalele." 
Jeremiah52:21 O jiphiladi-phe, imoxi ngó o kitala kiê, i kala ni kuinhi dia kóvadu ni nake, hé a i kondoloka kuala nzenzela ia kuinhi dia kóvadu ni kiiadi; o mukomo uê ua milembu iuana, o moxi diê mu kubuka ndungulu." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ku mútue ua philadi kua kexile kapitele ka ngondo; o kitala kia kapitele, kia kóvadu jitanu, ni kitanda ni jilomá ja kondoloka o kapitele, ja ngondo joso; o philadi ia mukuá ue ni jilomá jê, ia di fuile kienhiki." 
Jeremiah52:23 Kala mbandu ku kala makuinhiʼ vua a jilomá ni kisamanu, kitanda kioso a ki kondoloka kuala hama ia jilomá." 
Jeremiah52:24 Kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, uambata ue ni Selaia, nganga ia dikota, ni Sofoniia, nganga ia kaiadi, ni alangi a mabhitu kitatu." 
Jeremiah52:25 O mu mbonge uambata-mu ue ngolambole imoxi ua kexi mu kutumina athu oso aia ku ita; ni sambuadi dia athu ngambi ja maka a kexile kumoxi ni sobha, a a sangele mu mbonge, kumoxi ni musoneki ua kangane, ua kexi mu kusoneka ene oso aia ku ita, ni makuinhi a samanu dingi a athu ku mundu, a a sangele mu kaxi ka mbonge." 
Jeremiah52:26 Kioso Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, kia ambata, ua a bheka kua sobha ia Babilonha bhu Dibalah." 
Jeremiah52:27 O sobha ia Babilonha anga ua a beta u a jibhila bhu Dibalah, mʼoxi ia Hamate. Kienhiki kiambata Juda mʼoxi iê, phala ku mu bheka ku ubhika." 
Jeremiah52:28 O mundu uambata Nabukodonozolo ku ubhika mu muvu ua kasambuadi uenhú: Midi jitatu ni makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu kia jijudé. 
Jeremiah52:29 O mu muvu ua kuinhi ni nake dia utuminu ua Nabukodonozolo, muene uambata dingi mu Jeluzaleme, hamaʼnake ni makuinhi a tatu ni kiiadi kia mienhu, ku ubhika." 
Jeremiah52:30 O mu muvu ua makuinhi aiadi ni kitatu ua utuminu ua Nabukodonozolo, Nebuzaladane, kabhitangu ka kilangidilu, mu jijudé uambata-mu dingi, ku ubhika, hamaʼsambuadi ni makuinhi auana ni kitanu kia mienhu; anga mienhu ioso i kala midi jiuana ni hama jisamanu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Anga ki bhita kuila mu muvu ua makuinhi a tatu ni sambuadi ua uhutile ua Nzuakí, sobha ia Juda, mu mbeji ia kakuinhi ni kiiadi, bhu kizuua kia makuinhi aiadi ni kitanu ku mbeji, kia muvu ua dianga ua utuminu ua Evile-Melodake, sobha ia Babilonha, kiene sobha muenhú kia bhetula mútue ua Nzuakí, sobha ia Juda, iú ua mu katula mu inzu ia dikuikilu;" 
Jeremiah52:32 Anga u mu zuelesa ni ujitu uoso, anga u tudika kiandu kiê ku thandu dia iandu ia jisobha joso ja kexile na-ju mu Babilonha." 
Jeremiah52:33 Anga u mu zula izuatu iê ioso ia kexile na-iu mu kiboiongo; hé uia ni kudia jinga kúdia bhu pholo ia sobha izuua iê ioso ia kexile ku muenhu. 
Jeremiah52:34 Anga aia muene ni ku mu bhanga kiambote kuala sobha ia Babilonha, ni kutambula dikanda diê dia mu tokala izuua ioso, katé bhu kizuua kiê kia kúfua, kienhiki muene izuua ioso ia muenhu uê." 
Lamentations1:1 Kuahi ngó, o kudikotamena kua dikotamena ó mbonge iná; mʼokulu kutunga kuahi ngó! O kiki iedi kala mutudi ua muhatu, tata! O kia kexi, muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi, muene kutènde, na mvuale muʼaxaxi ka jixi, ua biluka kiebhi vasalu ia kufuta lubhaku, enu mala!" 
Lamentations1:2 Usuku uoso ua kudila kinhenge; o masoxi mê a kuata kunguluka jinga ngó mu pholo; o muʼaxaxi ka makamba mê ki muala ngó u mu konda dilamba; o makamba mê moso-lolo ma mu bhange ndunge; a biluka muene jinguma jê. 
Lamentations1:3 Juda uaii ku ubhika, kia mu iza o hadi, ua muangana muene mukonda dia ubhika ua mu vudila; uaxalela muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi, o dinhohenu ua di lémbua. Ene oso a kexi ku mu landameka, a mu kuata kioso muene kia bhondalala mu jiphaxi jê." 
Lamentations1:4 Ikoka ia Ziione í dila, mukonda ki bhuala dingi muthu ubhita-mu phala kuiza ku kionge kia fesa; mielu iê ioso ia di koto; o jinganga jê ji kala mu ku di kumuina! Ilumba iê ia mizeletete ia bhondalala, o muene-phe uala mu kiminhu kia kulula kua muxima." 
Lamentations1:5 Jinguma jê ja mu iokola, oso a mu kuatela luma a sanguluka; mbata Jihova ua mu bhondeleka, mukonda dia nzungule ia itondalu iê; tuana tuê iá aia ku ubhika, hanji kia a tuamenesa o kisuéia." 
Lamentations1:6 Kilumba kia Ziione kijingu kioso kia mu-bhu; ilamba iê ioso ia kituka mukuâ ni jisoko ja lémbua kubonga sabhelela; mu kuenda a kala mu kuimajana, mbé o kubhuila, kisuéia ua a tuamenesa." 
Lamentations1:7 Mu makumbi a malamba-mê Jeluzaleme iú lembalala-ke ima iê ia ujitu ni malau, iakexi na-iu mu izuua ia xiahulu; u i lembalala kiua kia muiza o hadi ni ngongo!" 
Lamentations1:8 Jeluzaleme uate kituxi kiaiibha kiavulu, kiene ki a sebulukila; ene oso a mu bhele jinge ujitu, kiki a mu sebulula, mukonda a mu mono kuila uala tuẋi, uazuluka! Muene ue u kala mu kumba, iú u vutuka ni dima, sonhi ja mu kuata." 
Lamentations1:9 Dixidilu diê dia mu kala ku izuatu iê, muene ka lembalele kuila o ku dizubhilu diê ua-nda kutala hadi; kiene-phe kia mu bhela o kibhalu kia kalunga kiki; ki bhuala u mu konda malamba. Eie, Jihova, ngi tale bhu nga tatela; mbata o nguma ua di te nzabala." 
Lamentations1:10 Jeluzaleme ima iê ioso ia matunda ia kexe na-iu, kisuéia ua sunununa o lukuaku luê mu ku mu tambula-iu; uamono muene o matumbu kia bokona mu kididi kiê kiangene; ene-phe o matumbu u uambele eie, kuila ka bokone bhu kionge kié." 
Lamentations1:11 Mundu uê uoso aia ni kukema mu kusota mbolo ia kúdia; a bhana muene ima iâ iabeta o ku ta kalu mu toloko ia kúdia, mbé kuximbakatesa o muenhu; Eie, Jihova, tongolola-kiu u ki mone, mukonda kusekala kua ngi tula-ze." 
Lamentations1:12 Enu kifua ki kia mi kate, enu muala ku bhita mu kikoka? Ilenu hanji suii mu mone, mba sai-ku dilâmba kala o diami, dia ngʼiza ku handuʼidi; o dilâmbva dia ngi bhondeleka na-diu Jihova, bhu kizuua kia uamene o njinda iê." 
Lamentations1:13 Ua tumikisa túbhia mu ifuba iami, tunde bhuluʼobho, ii iabambuka muene ni kuuama; inama iami ua i zalela uanda, ua ngi vutula ku dima; ua ngi sengulula muene, kumbi dioso dia kambamba nga tolamana." 
Lamentations1:14 O kanga ia itondalu iami, a ngi kutila na-iu ku thandu kuala o lukuaku luê; o itondalu iami ioso iothangune muene, iá a ngi tudika-iu mu xingu; o muene iú ua ngi iokola, nguzu ioso ia ngi bhu; Jihova iu ua ngi bhakula ku iiala ia bhingi kuila bhu maku mâ, ki nga-nda kutena dingi kusutunuka-bhu." 
Lamentations1:15 Jihova ua diatela bhoxi o mazonda mami moso ma ita, ma kexile nʼeme mu dibhata muene; ua ngʼixanena nzungule ia mundu, phala ku ngi sosomuena o nzangi ia minzangala iami ia mala; Jihova ua zangula kilumba, monʼa Juda, iú ua mu tuzala kala mu ditangi dia kukamena o vinhu." 
Lamentations1:16 Mukonda dia ima ienhiʼii, kiene eme ki nga-lu didila; kala kiki mesu mami, o mesu mami muene, ma kungulula ndumba ia kisoxi; mbata o Mutululuixi, ua tokalele o ku ngi ximbakatesa o muenhu uami, ua ngi sondoloka bhu mbandu iami; anʼami mua eza kukakuka, mukonda dia nguma ua ngi tundu o thulu." 
Lamentations1:17 Ziione u kala mu kuzanza o maku mê, u mu bhetula ngó muẋima ka moneka; Jihova ua tuminʼê muene, kuila Jakobo a mu kitukile kuala iá oso ala mu jimbandu jê; Jelezaleme a mu kitula muene kala muthu ua kasana." 
Lamentations1:18 Jihova ualunguʼê muene; mbata éme-ku, eme nga balukila o ngonge iê; enu-phe, ivenu, mu miji ioso, talenu o kikote kia ngʼiza! Ni ilumba iami ia mizeletete, ni minzangala iami ia mala, ene oso aii-nâ ku ubhika." 
Lamentations1:19 Makamba mami nga exana kiua, maji ene a ngi koloka; jinganga jami ni ikulakaji iami azunzumukina mu mbonge muenhumu; kioso ene kia di tele mu sota kia kúdia phala kuximbakatesa o muenhu uâ." 
Lamentations1:20 Talesa, Jihova, o kutata kuosʼuku kua ngʼiza; mídia ia ngi dimbuluka moxi; muẋima moxi ua ngi sandanganha; kuma nga bhange umbalu uaiibha kiavulu; ngedi o bhu kanga xibhata iii i ngi jibha o tuana, o mʼoxi aʼnzu Kalunga-Ngombe iu u nhunga!" 
Lamentations1:21 Athu ia evua muene kioso ki ngala kukema, maji o u ngi konda malamba ka moneka; jinguma jami joso kievu o jiphaxi joso ji ngala kubhita na-ju, a tana-phe, mukonda kima kia ngi tundu kokué eie; maji, kioso kia kèza o kizuua ki ua tangeʼokio, ene ua bhu ngatelʼabha hiun eza-bhu." 
Lamentations1:22 Tamanu o kubhuma kuâ kuoso ku di monekena bhu pholo ié eie; nda u a bhange kala ki ua ngi bhange emʼiki, mukonda dia itondalu iami ioso-lolo; mbata o kukema kuami kuavulu, o muẋima ua ngi sandujuka moxi." 
Lamentations2:1 Kuahi ngó o kutema kua Jihova, kua bhingi mu njinda iê monʼa kilumba ua Zione ua mu vungina kiki mu ifuke! Kijingu kia Izalaiele, kia suile o mbambe ni diulu, kiki-phe Jihova ua ki zubila bhoxi; kizuua kia mu kuata o kutema, ka lembalala dingi o mbenza ia kutula o inama iâ." 
Lamentations2:2 Mabhata moso-lolo ma Jakobo, Jihova ua ma jikinisa, sé ngó ku a lendukila; jimbonge ja kolo, ja monʼa kilumba kia Juda, kia vulumuka o njinda iê, joso ua ji lundumuina bhoxi; utuminu uoso ua u kasanesa, o ilamba iê ia sebuluka." 
Lamentations2:3 Kioso kia uama o njinda iê, nguzu ioso ia Izalaiele ua i batula; nguma uedi usolomoka, muene-phe lukuaku luê lua kadilu ua lu kotekʼê; ua uamena Jakobo, mukua ni mulengu ua túbhia, iu ua buidisa ima ioso ku mbandu ni mbandu." 
Lamentations2:4 Mufula uê ua uoleka kiá ni luma, kala ki bhanga ió ua tu zembe; o lukuaku luê lua kadilu, ua lu suinisa mukuâ ni nguma; ima ioso ia uabhele kiavulu ku mesu mu balaka ia kilumba kia Ziione, muene ua i jikinisa-mu. Ua lundulula-mu o njinda iê kala túbhia." 
Lamentations2:5 Jihova ua di bhange kiá kala nguma; Izalaiele ua mu jikinisa; ua jikinisa o mazêmba mê moso; ua mu buikisila o jimbonge; o kilumba kia Juda iú ua mu sokoluela o kudila ni mukondo. 
Lamentations2:6 Balaka iê ua mu budila-iu ni usuéia, kala fundu mu díbhia; ni ididi iê ia kionge ua mu senguluila-iu; Jihova, o jifesa jangene ni izuua ia sabha-lu mu Ziione ua i lâmbe-mu; njinda iê ki ia di vunza, ni sobha ni nganga ki ja mu kuatela dingi kima." 
Lamentations2:7 Jihova kalatódio kê ua ka ẋimbuka, o dibhezelu diê dia mu kumu; imbaka ia fikidila mazêmba mê ua i bhakula bhu lukuaku lua isuéia; abhangela jibuia mʼonzo ia Jihova, kala kiene kubhita mu kizuua kia kionge kia fesa." 
Lamentations2:8 Jihova ua kanene kusengulula o kimbaka kia monʼa kilumba kia Ziione; uatandeleka ngoji, lukuaku luê lua jijila muene o kusengulula; ni kimbaka ni lumbu ua a tungutisa, ia a sekalela bhuamoxi." 
Lamentations2:9 Imabhitu iê ia lundumuka bhoxi, ii ia di lâmbela koxiʼa mavu ku ia lundumukina; o jisabhi jê muene ua ji bukujula ni jitalanga jê; ni sobha iê ni ilamba iê, iá nanga kiá muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi iengi, mua bhingi ki muene dingi kitumu mba kubazela; o muenhomo jipolofeta jê, ki ji kala dingi ni lumono lua Jihova, lémbue." 
Lamentations2:10 O ikulakaji ia monʼa kilumba Ziione a xikama ni ene mu mavu, exi ngó muene hudí; a di kuua fufuta ku mitue, a zuata idinhaji; o ilumba ia Jeluzaleme, azenzamena mítue bhoxi katé mu mavu." 
Lamentations2:11 Mesu mami ma fefetela ni masoxi, enu mala! O mídia moxi ia ngi dimbuluka; miẋima iami ia di zunzila bhoxi mukonda dia kusenguluka kua senguluka o kilumba kia mundu uami! Abha kua bhingi ni tumbonga, enu mala, ni tuana ku mele ia ambukila mu jinzunga ja diembu!" 
Lamentations2:12 Tuana ebhula a mamʼâ, exi: O kiki-phe, kuebhi kuala o masa ni vinhu? Hé akala mu kuambukila mu jinzunga ja diembu; anga aia ni kuzubhila o muenhu bhu jihata ja a-mamʼâ, bhene!" 
Lamentations2:13 Ngi ku tela umbangi uahi? Eie kilumba, monʼa Jeluzaleme, ngi ku fikisa ni nanhi? Ngi kuila ngixi o ki ualʼiki kia bhitile kiá kua nanhi, ni ngi ku bhetuila-ku o muẋima, eie kilumba kia muzeletete, tata, mona Ziione? Mukonda o divuua dié dia vudilà-ku mukuâ ni kiakulu o kizanga kia kalunga, mukuahi u ku bhandulula?" 
Lamentations2:14 Misesedi ié, a ku zambuila makutu ni usemenhi; ka ku tukuluila o ufusa ué, phala ku ku dimuna; hinu ki kua kuiza kuia ku ubhika; maji ene a ku zambuila imbamba ia makutu ni usemenhi, iene ia bhangesa ku ku bheka ku ubhika." 
Lamentations2:15 Athu oso a bhita mu kikoka, a bhânga ibhubhu; a xika miẋi; a bhuka ku mítue iâ, mu kudiuana o kilumba, monʼa Jeluzaleme, exi: Iene-ze o mbongʼii ia lukile exi: Suke-ku mu kuuabha, muene Ditunda di sanguluisa oxi ioso?" 
Lamentations2:16 Nguma jê joso-lolo muene, a bhane mu kanu mu ku ku tembula eie; a xika mixi, a di keketa ku mazu, exi: Né! tua mu minha muene! Ni kidi kiene muene, kiki kiene o kizuua, ki tua kinga jinga ukulu; lelu tua ki sange, tua ki mono." 
Lamentations2:17 Jihova ua bhange kioso kia kanene, kizuelu ua ki tenesa, kia xindile tunde mu izuua ia xahulu; ua sengululʼê muene, kulenduka nguê; uenzela o nguma ku di thatha ku thandu dié eie; o kusuína kua isuéia kuene ku a bhanʼê o kidifikidilu kiasoko." 
Lamentations2:18 O muẋima ua Jeluzaleme ua di kola kua Jihova; eie kimbaka kia kilumba, monʼa Ziione, tata! Masoxi mé ma kunguluke muene kala ngiji, ni mu usuku ni mu muanha! Ku nhohe! O anʼa mesuʼé ka zumbuke mu kudila." 
Lamentations2:19 Balumuka, udikole muene mʼusuku, bhu diandekelu dia ilangidilu: Lundulula o muẋima ué kala menha bhu pholo ia Jihova Leka maku mé kua muene, u diondele o muenhu ua tuana tué; a kuata kuambukila ngó mu jiphambu-a-njila ja jinzunga joso, kingumba o nzala!" 
Lamentations2:20 Tala Jihova, u tongolole, muthu kuii ua mu bhange kiki! Abha-phe, ahatu mbé adia muene o kibundu kiâ eneʼâ muene, o tuana tuâ tuavuala, tua sase ene bhu jihata jâ? A jibha o nganga ni polofeta monzo ié iangene bhu dibhezelu dia Jihova?" 
Lamentations2:21 Ni ikulakaji ni tuana tua ndenge, azeka bhoxi mu maluua; ni ilumba iami ia mizeletete ni makuenze ami a mala, oso muene a lalumuka ku xibhata; eie ua a jibha bhu kizuua kia tukuluka o njinda ié; eie ua a batula o xingu, ni ku a kuatela ngó henda, lémbue." 
Lamentations2:22 Eie ua bhiti ku mbandu joso ni ku kolomona ima ioso i ngi kuatesa uoma, kala bhu kizuua kiene kubhongolola mundu ku fesa. Mu kienhiki, bhu kizuua kia bhixila o njinda ia Jihova, né ngó muthu ka bhuluka-bhu, mba usubhuka, lémbue. Athu oso u nga sase, eme nga a dikila, nguma iami-phe ua a jimisa o mbutu." 
Lamentations3:1 Eme nga di muena jingongo kia tuluka o mbangala ia njinda ié. 
Lamentations3:2 Muene ua ngi zangula iú ua ngí batesa mu kitombe, ki mu mukengeji, kana." 
Lamentations3:3 Kutanga o kidi, ua ngi balukila muene; kumbi dioso dia kambàmba lukuaku luê lua ngi te bhu kíbhidi." 
Lamentations3:4 Ua ngi sekalesa o xitu iami ku mukutu, ni kikonda kiami; o ifuba iami ua i bulabula." 
Lamentations3:5 Ua ngi tungila kixitu, iu ua ngʼoseka ni ndululu ni kututumba." 
Lamentations3:6 Ua ngi xikika mu ididi mua vundu, kala athu à fua kiá okulu." 
Lamentations3:7 Ua ngi kondela ku mbandu joso kala lumbu, bhua kutundila nga lémbua-bhu; malubhambu ma neme, ua ngi jika-u ni nguzu." 
Lamentations3:8 Bhu suske dia ku dikola, hé ngi ta mutendu, maji muene musambu uami u ngi xitila-u dibhitu." 
Lamentations3:9 Jinjila jami ua ji xiti ni matadi mòsonge; jihoka jami muene ua ji bhengeleka. 
Lamentations3:10 Uixi kala kitôto mu ku ngi batamena; mukuâ ni hoji ia tela. 
Lamentations3:11 Ua ngi tungamesa mu jinjila jami, o ki nga ila muengi, kuene kua ngi sasujuila ku idiandu; ua ngi xi nga senguluka." 
Lamentations3:12 Uoleka mufula uê, iú ua ngi bhange, kífua eme ngi ditonokenu diê dia kupondala o misongo iê." 
Lamentations3:13 Misongo ia tundu mu kizu kiê, ua ngʼase na-iu mu miongo." 
Lamentations3:14 Nga biluka ngi diba dia kasekelelu ka mundu uami; eme ngi mukumbi uâ, kumbi dioso dia kambamba." 
Lamentations3:15 Ua ngi kumisa ni ma-kulula, kiene ki ngalʼiki nga juuala ni muẋi ua abixindo ua ngi nuisa." 
Lamentations3:16 Ua ngi disa mbuelekese ja kisèkele, ki kia ngi bulu o mazu; ua ngi vumbu mu utókua." 
Lamentations3:17 O muenhu uami ua u katula ku paze, mbote ki nga i te dingi muẋima." 
Lamentations3:18 Ngixi-phe: Kuabhu, bhu ngalʼabha nguzu ia ngi-bhu, ni kudielela kuami kuene mua Jihova kua ngi-bhu ue kiá." 
Lamentations3:19 Lembalala, Ngana, o phaxi iami ni ngongo, xinganeka o abixindo ni ndululu, i ua ngi bhana." 
Lamentations3:20 Ima ienhiʼii muenhu uami hanji uala ku i lembalala, anga u di kotamena moxi diami." 
Lamentations3:21 Maji eme-phe, ngala kuila o ki ngi lembalala kima kiná, nguzu iza dingi." 
Lamentations3:22 Kuma o jihenda ja Jihova jene-ze ja bhiti-bhu, etu tua kambe kujima o mbutu; mbata jihenda jê ki jene ni dizubhilu." 
Lamentations3:23 Imene ioso kuila ngó kúkia, jatomboka jʼobhe; o ku kumbidila kuê, kuvula kuahi!" 
Lamentations3:24 Jihova muene kimanga kiami, kiene kiambe o muenhu uami; uila kiki ngiia ni ku mu dielela muene." 
Lamentations3:25 Jihova muthu ua mbote phala ió oso a mu nhenganana muene, mbé o muthu uoso u mu bhindamena." 
Lamentations3:26 Kima kiambote o ku kala ni kudielela, ni kuxibhidila sé jibuia o kubhuluka ku tunda kua Jihova." 
Lamentations3:27 Kima kiambote phala muthu o kutala hadi ni kànga ia Jihova mu thembu ia undenge. 
Lamentations3:28 Ni ku di xikamena kididi kia ubheka, ni kuila muene, hûdí; kuma Nzambi muene ua mu tuika-iu." 
Lamentations3:29 Adiunde ni muzumbu bhoxi; sumba mu kubhanga kiókio bhu kala kubhanduluka! 
Lamentations3:30 A bhane ditama diê kua uoso u mu bha jihuxi; adie muene jindaka, ekute." 
Lamentations3:31 Mbata Jihova kene kuila uẋimbuka, nʼa ẋimbukilà-ku." 
Lamentations3:32 Kuma, né kia beta muthu hé u mu bheka mu lamba, sai bhua-nda ku mu lendukila, kuma ukaiela kia soko o nzungule ia jihenda jê." 
Lamentations3:33 Kuma muene o kubeta anʼathu ni ku a bhondeleka, ki kima kia kubhangela vondadi iê." 
Lamentations3:34 Ku diata-diata bhoxi dia inama o jipelezo joso jaʼxi, Jihova ka ki monʼuê kuuabha;" 
Lamentations3:35 kuselula o kulûnga kua muthu bhu pholo ia Suke-ku, Jihova ka ki monʼê kuuabha;" 
Lamentations3:36 kúdia o mangonha kua mukuenu bhu dimanda diê, Jihova manhi kienhiki ka ki monʼuê?" 
Lamentations3:37 Mukuahi muene uzuela, kima anga ki bhita, se Jihova ka ki tumina?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mu kanu dia Ió ua Suka-ku, manhi ki muene mu tunda o divuua ni mbote?" 
Lamentations3:39 Muthu ua muenhu u kuatela-hi-phe ku ditata? Inda muthu ni muthu a di tate mukonda dia ituxi iê! 
Lamentations3:40 Jinjila jetu tu ji tongolole kiambote, tu ji lole muene kioso ki jala, tu alukile kua Jihova." 
Lamentations3:41 Tu lekienu o miẋima ietu ni maku kua Nzambi ku diulu, hé tuamba kuila:" 
Lamentations3:42 Tua tondala, tua bhange ima ia kubaluka; kiene ki ua kambela ku tu loloka." 
Lamentations3:43 Ua tu vungu ni njinda ié, kala mu kitata mu ua tu te, eie ua tu zuididika: ua tu jibha muene, ngué ku tu kuatela henda." 
Lamentations3:44 Ua di jikila mu matuta, ua lenge misambu ietu, phala ki i ku bhixile." 
Lamentations3:45 Ua tu tula muʼaxaxi ka ifuẋi kala tu makololo, tu ixita iahatu." 
Lamentations3:46 Nguma jetu joso ja bhâne makanu ni ku tu lebhula. 
Lamentations3:47 Kua tuiza kingûmba ni diêla, kusenguluka ni kubuika." 
Lamentations3:48 Mesu mami ma lundulula mikunguiji ia menha, mukonda dia kibuika kia tula kua monʼa kilumba kia povo iami." 
Lamentations3:49 Mesuʼami, a dila a tona, mukonda bhu nhohena muthu ki bhua moneka." 
Lamentations3:50 Ngi kuata kienhiki katé Jihova, ku diuluʼoko, kia ngʼivua hé u zongola kunu." 
Lamentations3:51 Mesuʼami ala ku ngi vunza o muẋima moxi kuma kia ngi kate kiavulu mukonda dia anʼa ilumba a tokala mu mbonge iami. 
Lamentations3:52 Nguma jami ja ngi zembe sè kikuma, a ngi kuata kala ngi njila bhu mubhetu." 
Lamentations3:53 A takuila muenhu uami mu dikungu, iá a ngi lunduluila matadi ku thandu, phala kujikinisa o muenhu uami." 
Lamentations3:54 Menha anga a ngi bhita bhu thala ia mútue; ngixi-phe: Eme nga fuʼó! 
Lamentations3:55 Jihova, nga di kola mu dijina dié, koxi kuene ku nga kuzukʼoko." 
Lamentations3:56 Eie dízui diami ua dʼivu; ku sueke o dítui, nʼu kambe kuívua o kuzuluma kuami, ni ku dikola kuami." 
Lamentations3:57 Eie kizuua ki nga ku bhingile, bhenhobho eie ua ngi zukamene; uixi-phe: Ku kale ni uoma!" 
Lamentations3:58 Eie Jihova, ua fundu o dimanda dia-nda ku ngi dia o muenhu, eie ua kula o muenhu uami." 
Lamentations3:59 Mangonha moso ma ngi bhange, eie Jihova ua a mono; fundisa, Ngana, o mulonga uami." 
Lamentations3:60 Lûma luâ luoso eie ua lu mono, ni ilunji iâ ioso iala ku ngi funhina eme." 
Lamentations3:61 Malebhu mâ, eie u Jihova ua evu o ixingeneku iâ ioso iala ku ngi funhina eme, eie ua i mono." 
Lamentations3:62 O mizumbu ia oso a fundumukina o ku ngi lua, ni ilunji iâ iala ku ngi funhina eme ku kumbi dioso dia kambamba eie ua ijiia." 
Lamentations3:63 Tongolola-u Ngana, kuma ni kia xikama, ni kia balumuka, eme muène ngi mukumbi uâ." 
Lamentations3:64 Jihova, eie hinu u a bhana o futu, ia soko ni ikalakalu ia maku mâ." 
Lamentations3:65 Eie u a bhana o ufuófuo ua muẋima, mázui mé nda ma tule ku tandu diâ." 
Lamentations3:66 Zuididika-u, Ngana, o mu njinda ié a jime o mbutu phala a jimuke bhoxi dia diulu, diangene dia Jihova." 
Lamentations4:1 Kuahi ngó o kuhimba kua himbi o ulu! O ulu ua fina ua uabhele kiambote, o kiki ua lunguluka ni uene, tata! O matadi ma dibhezelu dia ngene di kola a ma muangena mu jithungi ja jinzunga joso, enu mala!" 
Lamentations4:2 Anʼa Ziione, a kôla ku kijingu mukuâ ni ulu uafina, o kiki asokʼuâ kiá ni itutu ia utuma, a di bhange kala kikalakalu kia mumbi-a-jímbia, tata!" 
Lamentations4:3 Katé ni mabheku ku mukáu a bheteka o thulu, anga amuisa anʼâ; maji o kilumba kia mundu uami, ua biluka kisuéia kala kihendembumba mu kikangalakata." 
Lamentations4:4 O dimi dia mona bhu maku, dia kokotela mu kanu mbebhu o dinhota; Tumbonga kia bhinga o kúdia, ki bhuala u a bhana-ku." 
Lamentations4:5 Oso a dile jinge o ima ia ximbuka kiambote, kiki ia a botomokena mu jinzunga; oso a a sasela mu izuatu ikusuka, kiki ia a nanga mu ditobe." 
Lamentations4:6 Mukonda o kituxi kia monʼa kilumba kia mundu uami, kia beta kota o kia Sodoma ndenge, a mu vumbile mu uthôkua muʼanzanzʼumu, sé ngó kuila bhu kala lukuaku lua muthu lu ki bhanga." 
Lamentations4:7 O ilamba iê ki ia kexi, mu kulekujuka neve ndenge; o mu kuzela ue kota o lete ndenge; o mu kusuka mikutu, ene kota o makoladi ndenge; aẋanana kiambote, katé mu kulujela a somboka o jisafídia!" 
Lamentations4:8 Maji o kiki a xikelela ni ene dikala ndenge; o kia bhita mu nzunga ka ejiia dingi. Kikonda kiâ kia naminina ni kiene ku ifuba, kia kukuta muene, kia biluka ni kiene kala luhuinhi!" 
Lamentations4:9 Afu ku xibhata a beta ujitu, dikue ió afu ku nzala, tata! Mbata iá a fu ku nzala, a tuama o kuhoha ni ku di xibha kala a a kubula, mukonda dia kukamba o ima ia kúdia i tunda ku mábhia." 
Lamentations4:10 Maku ma ahatu, a zola Nzambi, ene muene a lambe o tuana tuâ-ene! O xitu iâ iene o huta ia kúdia kuâ, bhu thembu iabhiẋila o kusenguluka kua monʼa kilumba kia mundu uami, enu mala!" 
Lamentations4:11 Jihova ua kumbidila o njinda iê, ku muẋima kua mu zele kiua; uaiukula o mualala ua njinda iê ia uamesa túbhia mu Ziione katé ni ku madisesa bhoxi." 
Lamentations4:12 O jisobha mu ngongo, ni athu a tunga ku mundʼuku, kana, ka ki fikile, kuila o kisuéia ni nguma a bokuena muene bhu mielu ia Jeluzaleme bhobho." 
Lamentations4:13 Kima kiki kieza mukonda dia ituxi ia misesedi, ni phulu ia jinganga, a ẋiamuine o manhinga ma athu aiuka, a ma ẋiamuina muene mu kaxi ka Jeluzaleme." 
Lamentations4:14 A babajala mu kuenda kala ifofo mu jinzunga, a di kasanesa ni manhinga; Ki bhinga-phe muthu ka tena kubabata ku izuatu iâ." 
Lamentations4:15 Kia kexi hanji, aia ni ku di kola, exi: Abhukenu, tua xidi! Abhukenu, abhukenu! ki mu babate! O kia kala kiá mu takujuka ku matumbu, mu ifuẋi ia athu engi, exi: Mumu ka tunge-mu." 
Lamentations4:16 Kuma o njinda ia Jihova, ia a muanga-muanga; muene nuka dingi ua-nda ku a suua; kuma ka xila jinga o pholo ia jinganga, ka ẋikinine ue kukuatela henda ia athu a kuka kiá." 
Lamentations4:17 Etu-phe mesu a sukile ni kutalela kuoso ku tu tunda o dikuatekesu, manhi tua di nganala mu ku kinga; o kudielela kuetu kua kingoho. Anga tu kuata kuzonguela bhu matala ni kutalela ku kifuẋi ki ki tena kukudila muthu." 
Lamentations4:18 O ki tua zangula jinga díkanda dia kuenda, akala mu ku tu tola, o kuenda mu jiluua jetu-phe kia tu bhonzele: Tuexi-phe: Lamba dietu dia tuiza, izuua ietu ieza-bhu; xi, kuma disukilu dietu dia bhixila." 
Lamentations4:19 Akua ku tu bhesa lusolo, a betele kusangama o jinjila ji bhita bhulu ndenge. Mu ku tu landameka kuâ, o ki tuila tuia ku milundu, tuala-nâ; o ki tuia mu kikangalakata, míkala iâ tua i sange." 
Lamentations4:20 O na tudilu dia kubhuima kuetu a tu ûndila-nê kua Jihova, a mu kuatela mu madiela mâ; o muene-phe, muene tua mu edile, tuixi; né kiá ki tu bhinga ku xalela muʼaxaxe ka akua jixi, tua kà kala mu kilembeketa kia muene." 
Lamentations4:21 Eie-phe, monʼa kilumba kia Edomo, ua tungu mʼoxi ia Uze, tana-ku, u sanguluke! Dikáu-ze hádia dia-nda kubhiẋila ue kokué, hinu-phe ukodiua na-diu anga u di vungununʼê eʼmuene-muène hé u xala tuẋi." 
Lamentations4:22 O kaxtiku ka kikuma kié, eie monʼa kilumba kia Ziione, mu bhua mu kala, kuma ka tenena kiá; Nzambi muene nuka dingi a kà tona ku ku balakala ku ubhika. Kala kiki, muene hinu uiza kuibhula o ikuma ié, eie u kilumba kia Edomo; muene ua-nda ku ku tungununa o ituxi ié ioso." 
Lamentations5:1 Lembalala, Jihova, kia tu izʼiki! Tongolola hanji, utale o mondo ua tu tula!" 
Lamentations5:2 Undundu ua muiji uetu uai ku athu engi; jinzo jetu akua makanga a ji tambula. 
Lamentations5:3 Tuaxalela tu jihukunhu, ki tu moneka tata; o jimama jetu a di bhange kala atudi." 
Lamentations5:4 Menha etu a kúnua, tua mu a sumba mu kitadi; o jihuinhi ja kutelekela, tuala ku ji tambuila mu suilu iatokala." 
Lamentations5:5 A tu langata, hanji a tu nhenganana bhu jixingu; kubhuila kua tu kuata, maji o dinhohenu tua di lémbua." 
Lamentations5:6 Tua leka o maku etu ku akua Ijito ni ku akua Asídia, phala a tu ikutise ni kúdia." 
Lamentations5:7 Jitata jetu a zangele, kuma a tele kituxi, ia afuá-phe kiá. Etu-ku, leluʼidi etu tuahula o mulonga uâ-ène." 
Lamentations5:8 Abhika ene ala ku tu tumina, ki bhuala muthu u tena ku tu tambula bhu lukuaku luâ." 
Lamentations5:9 O kutakana ngó kúdia kuetu kututu, ki bhinga tu kala bhu bhulubhulu dia kúfua, kingûmba o xibhata ia tu imanena mu mikáu." 
Lamentations5:10 Kikonda kia tu hîmbi-ni-kiene kala forno, mukonda dia hadi ia nzala." 
Lamentations5:11 Ahatu mu Ziione a a bhange undumbu, o ilumba mu madiembu ma Juda kiomuène." 
Lamentations5:12 Jingana a ji nhenga muene ni maku mâ, o jipholo ja adiakimi né ngó ku ji xila, lémbua!" 
Lamentations5:13 Minzangala a i jijidika exi, kale mu huhila bhu ditadi; o anʼa-ndenge bhendu-bhendu ni ita ia jihuinhi." 
Lamentations5:14 Adiakimi ka mu xikama dingi bhuʼnangu dia mundu bhu muelu, o minzangala ue ka mu kuimba dingi." 
Lamentations5:15 Kukembela o muenhu kua tu-bhu, o kukina a tu katula-ku, kua tu iza kiá jingololo." 
Lamentations5:16 Kitundu ku mútue kia tu laúka. Kokolo dietu, tata, kuma tua te ituxi!" 
Lamentations5:17 Kiene kia tu bhekela kuambuka katé ni muẋima moxi, kiene ue kia tu bhekela mesu ku tu kala ni kavunda." 
Lamentations5:18 Hanji kia senguluka o mulundu ua Ziione, mikenge kifua kuene ku nangu diâ dia kuendela." 
Lamentations5:19 Eie-phe, u Jihova, hanji ki ua di fikidila, mukonda eie unagenena muene katé ku hádia ni hádia; o kiându kié kia kuata muene, ku tunda miji kuiza miji." 
Lamentations5:20 Eie-phe u tu landuka kièbhi, ni tuie muene nzaká? Ua tu ehelelaʼhi kiki, mu thembu ioso iii?" 
Lamentations5:21 Tu vutule dingi kokué, u Jihova, nda etu tu tene o ku ku vutukila; tu tombuele dingi o izuatu ietu ku ubhe, kala ki tua kexe mu xiahulu." 
Lamentations5:22 Phala-hi, eie Ngana, u tu ximbuka ni ku tu dila hunji kiki? Phala-hi iene u tu balukila ni ku tu kuatela njinda iadikota kala iii?" 
Ezekiel1:1 Ku muvu ua makuinhi a tatu, mu kizuua kia katanu ku mbeji ia kauana, anga ki bhita kuila, kioso ki ngala mu kaxi ka jihutile, bhu ndundu ia ngiji ia Kebale, maúlu a jikuka eme hé ngi mona isunji ia Nzambi." 
Ezekiel1:2 Mu kizuua kia katanu ku mbeji (mu muvu ua katanu ua uhutile ua sobha Nzuakí). 
Ezekiel1:3 O kizuelu kia Jihova anga kiza muene kua Izekiiele, monʼa Buzi, o nganga, mʼoxi ia akua Kaldeia, bhu kibumu kia ngiji ia Kebale, bhenhobho bhene muene bhua mu tudila o lukuaku lua Jihova ku thandu diê." 
Ezekiel1:4 Mu kutala, nga mono kitémbue kia nguzu kiala mu kuijiia ku mbandu ia suku, ni dituta dia dikota ni túbhia tuedi kala kitumba kia mu uama; o mu jimbandu jê anga mu di-muika, o mu kaxi kê mu kala kima kia kidifua kia kìphembe, ki kala mu tunda mu túbhia." 
Ezekiel1:5 O mu kaxi kê anga mu kala mu kutunda kídifua kia iama i uana; o kídifua kiá kienhiki: a kala ni kídifua kala kia muthu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Ene anga a kala ni jipholo jiuana-jiuana, ni mabhabha auana-auana." 
Ezekiel1:7 O inama iâ ia tandelela; o makanda mâ ma inama medi kala ki kala o kidiatelu kia monʼa ngombe, anga iia ni kubenha kala utadi ua kobidi uabhu o dixidilu." 
Ezekiel1:8 Anga a kala ni maku a muthu mʼoxi dia mabhabha mâ, ku mbandu jene kiuana kiâ; kienhiki anga enʼoso kiuana kiâ a kala ni pholo jâ ni mabhabha mâ." 
Ezekiel1:9 O mabhabha eneʼâ aia ni kudibudika kiiadi kiâ; ka lunguluka kioso kia kala mu kuenda; muthu uendela kuoso kua lungila o pholo iê. 
Ezekiel1:10 O pholo jâ ji kala ni kídifua kia pholo ia muthu; ku mbandu ia lukuaku lua kiasu, enʼoso kiuana kiâ a kexile ni pholo ia ngombe; ni pholo ue ia holokoko kiuana kiâ." 
Ezekiel1:11 O jipholo jâ ni mabhabha mâ, ku thandu, ja di kexidila; kala xelubini o mabhabha mê a di-kexidila kiiadi-kiiadi kumoxi, o aiadi a mukuá ene a di vungu na-u o mikutu iâ." 
Ezekiel1:12 Kala muthu kuoso kua talela o pholo kuene kuʼaia; kuoso o nzumbi ku ia bhingi o kuia, aia; o kia kala mu kuenda, kʼaii ni kulungujuka." 
Ezekiel1:13 O ku tala o iama ienhiʼii, o kidifua kiâ ela kala makala a túbhia a uama, a di fuangana makongolo a túbhia; o túbhia tuia ni kubhilajaka mu kaxi ka iama, anga o túbhia tuia ni kubenha, o mu túbhia mu tunda jinzaji." 
Ezekiel1:14 O iama iia anga iza ni kulenga, ita tuhonda mukua ni ki teleka jinzaji." 
Ezekiel1:15 O ki nga kuata kutala o iama iii, ngi mona bhuala malola mu mavu bhu mbanduʼa iama, pholo jiuana dilola, pholo jiuana dilola." 
Ezekiel1:16 O ku tala o malola, ni ukalakalelu uê, o kidfua kiâ kiene kimoxi; o ku a tala ni ukalakalelu uê, u fika kala o dilola diala mu kaxi ka mukuá, o dilola diala mu kaxi ka mukuá." 
Ezekiel1:17 O kiela kuenda, endela ku mbandu jâ joso jiuana; ka xikina kulunguluka kioso kiʼaia ni kuenda." 
Ezekiel1:18 O malola eneʼâ kitala kiê kulebha kuahi, a kuata uoma; o jikamba ja malola eneʼâ kiuana kiâ, jʼezala mesu mu jimbandu." 
Ezekiel1:19 O kioso o iama ki i kuata o kuenda, o malola eneʼâ aia ni kuendela bhu mbandu iâ; kioso ki zangumuka o iama bhulu, o malola a zangumuka ue bhulu." 
Ezekiel1:20 O kuoso kua solo o nzumbi kuia, aia; kuoso-kuoso muene kua bhingi o nzumbi kuia, o malola a zangumuka ku pholo iâ, mukonda o nzumbi ia muthu ua muenhu ia kexile mu malola." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ene kiela kuenda, ene ue enda; ene ki ela kuimana, ene ue emana; kiela ene a zangumuka bhulu ku thandu dia mavu, o malola ue a zangumuka ku pholo diâ; mukonda o nzumbi ia iama iala mu malola eneʼô." 
Ezekiel1:22 O ku mítue ia iama anga ku kala kidifua kia muthandu ua diulu, o ku u tala kuzela kuê ku kuata uoma, kuma uedi kala kidistalu kiazele kiavulu, kia di-zale bhulu dia mítue iâ." 
Ezekiel1:23 O bhoxi dia muthandu, bhene bhua kexi o mabhabha mâ ma kadilu, dimoxi di lulama ni dia mukuá; xelubini joso a kala ni mabhabha aiadi a vungina o mukutu ku mbandu kuku; ni amukuá aiadi a vungina o mukutu ku mbandu ia mukuá." 
Ezekiel1:24 O ene kiʼaia ni kuenda, ngʼevu kinuminu kia mabhabha mâ kala kinuminu kia dibhubha dia menha a vulu, mukuâ ni dízui dia Ió ua Tena-Ioso, dízui dia mutendu ua dikota, kala muxindu ua masoladi a mondala jikabalu; kioso kiemana, o mabhabha mâ mʼòlekele a ma tulula." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ku thandu dia muthandu ua kexile bhulu dia mítue iâ evu-ku dizui. O ene kioso kiemana, o mabhabha olekele a a tulula." 
Ezekiel1:26 O kuthandu dia muthandu ua kexile kulu dia mítue iâ, kua kexile kima kia di-fuangana kala kiandu, kiedi kala tadi dia safídia; o kuthandu dia kiandu kua kexile kala kidifua kia muthu, ua di-nenge kuthandu diê." 
Ezekiel1:27 Eme nga mono kidifua kia kìphembe ni ukalelu kala túbhia mʼoxi diê, tunde mua di-fu o malombo mê katé bhulu; o tundé mua di-fu o malombo mê, katé bhoxi, nga mono kidifua kia túbhia ni kubenha kua di muika mu jimbandu." 
Ezekiel1:28 Mukuâ ni ki kala o hongolo ku diulu, ki i moneka ku matuta bhu kumbi dia mvula, kiene ue kia di-fuile o mukengeji uenhú ua kondoloka mu jimbandu; kienhiki kia di-fuile o kubenha kua unéne ua Jihova; o kienhiki kioso ki nga ki mono, nga dibhale o pholo bhoxi, eme ngevu o dízui dia ió ua kexile mu zuela." 
Ezekiel2:1 Anga u ngʼambela, uixi: Eie monʼ muthu, balumuka uimane, nga-nda ku ku zuelesa." 
Ezekiel2:2 Bhenhobho kioso muene kia mu zuela ni eme, nzumbi ia Ngana ia bokona momuʼami ii ia ngʼimanesa, eme ngevu ió ua kexi ku ngi zuelesa." 
Ezekiel2:3 Muene ua ngʼambela, uixi: Eie monʼa muthu, eme nga mu ku tuma ku anʼa Izalaiele, ku miji ia ẋinuka, a ngi ẋinukina eme; ni ene ni jitata jâ a ngi tondalela, katé ni mu lelu muenhumu." 
Ezekiel2:4 O anʼâ a thathamana jipholo, ia a huku miẋima; eme-phe ngi ku tuma kua ene, ua ambela kiki: O Jihova, Nzambi, uambe kiki:" 
Ezekiel2:5 O ene-phe, kixi evua mba a kamba kuívua, (mbata ene ala dibhata dia ẋinuka) a-nda kuijiia-phe kuila mu kaxi kâ muejile musesedi." 
Ezekiel2:6 Eie-phe, u monʼa muthu, kana ku a kuatela uôma, mba u kala ni uôma ua ioso ia zuela; né-mbe hanji o izuelu iâ i di-bhanga muxitu ua minha ni jisongo phala eie, eie anga u tunga ni jimvuanga, kana kukala ni uôma ua izuelu iâ, mba u teketa ki u mona o jipholo jâ, kuma ene ala dibhata dia ẋinuka." 
Ezekiel2:7 Maji eie-phe, ua kà a tangela o maka ami, kixi evua kixi a kamba kuívua, kuma ene ala dibhata dia ẋinuka." 
Ezekiel2:8 Maji eie-phe, u monʼa muthu, ívua kioso ki ngala ku ku tangela, ku kale ni kuẋinuka uila ki ala o dibhata dia ẋinuka; eie jikula mu kanu dié, u die kioso ki ngala ku ku bhana." 
Ezekiel2:9 O ki nga tale, nga mono lukuaku lua mu kuiza ni kusununuka kokuami, o bhu lukuaku bhuala dilanda dia divulu." 
Ezekiel2:10 Anga u di zala bhu pholo iami, diene diòsoneke ni moxi ni ku kanga; o ku dilanda a soneka-ku mitendu ni ku di tula mienhu, ni lamba!" 
Ezekiel3:1 Bhenhobho u ngʼambela, uixi: Monʼa muthu, diá ioso i ua mono. Dilanda didi diá-diu, nda uie, u zuelele o dibhata dia Izalaiele." 
Ezekiel3:2 Kienhókio hé ngi jikula o dikanu diami, muene hé u ngi bhana kúdia o dilanda, anga u ngʼambela, uixi:" 
Ezekiel3:3 Monʼa muthu, vumu dié bhana-diu kia kúdia, nda uizalese o mídia ié ni dilanda didi di ngala ku ku bhana. Bhenhobho, ngadi anga ngʼivua dia touala mu kanu diami kala uiki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Anga u ngʼambela, uixi: Monʼa muthu, ndé, u bokone mu dibhata dia Izalaiele, u mu tangele o maka mami," 
Ezekiel3:5 Mukonda eie ka ku tumikisa ku muiji u zuela mbimbi iengi, mba muiji u zuela mbimbi i bhonza ku ívua, maji ku dibhata dia Izalaiele." 
Ezekiel3:6 Mba ku ndumba dia miji i dingula, ala ni mbimbi ia bhonzo, a bhingi kia zuela ku tena kua evua; eme-phe se nga ku tumikisiniʼé kua enhó, ni kidi muene, eji ku ku bhana mátui." 
Ezekiel3:7 Maji o dibhata dia Izalaiele, ki dia-nda kuinda ku ku bhana mátui, mukonda ene ngua-uâ ku bhana matui kokuamiʼeme; mbata o dibhata dioso dia Izalaiele diène ni pholo ia huku ni muẋima ua kolokota." 
Ezekiel3:8 Talaphe, kiene ki nga bhangela kuila o pholo ié ia kolokota mu kutala o jipholo jâ ene ja kolokota, ni dibhomo dié-eie dia suina mu kutala o dibhomo dia ene." 
Ezekiel3:9 O dibhomo dié nga di bhange kala utadi ua diiamande mu kukola, diene dia beta kukola o ditadi dia fijilu ndenge; uila kiki-phe, kana ku a kala ni uôma, mba u teketa ki u mona o jipholo jâ, mbata ene ala dibhata dia bhukumuka." 
Ezekiel3:10 Iú ua ngʼambela dingi, uixi: Eie monʼa muthu, tá mu thulu ié o maka mami oso u nga-nda ku ku tangela, ívua na-u muene ni mátui mé." 
Ezekiel3:11 Zangula-phe, uie ku jihutile, ku ana muiji ué, kixi evua, kixi a kamba kuívua, ua kà a zuelele ni ku a tangela, kuamba: O Jihova, Nzambi, uambe kiki:" 
Ezekiel3:12 Anga o Nzumbi ia Nzambi u ngi balumuna, hé ngivua, ku dima diami, dízui dia mutendu ua dikota, dia tokomoka tundé bhu kididi kiê, diexi: O unéne ua Jihova u tane-ku!" 
Ezekiel3:13 Anga ngʼivua o kinuminu kia mabhabha a iama a muia ni ku di-beta-beta kumoxi ni kinuminu kia malola ku pholo diâ, ni mutendu ua kibazu kionéne." 
Ezekiel3:14 Bhenhobho, Nzumbi ia Nzambi ia ngi zangumuna, ii ia ngʼambata; eme anga ngiia ni dilamba dia vulu mu kikenene kia! muenhu uami; maji o lukuaku lua Jihova lua kexile ni nguzu iavulu ku thandu diami."
